  'BRANCHES':'branches','STAFF':'staff','SETTINGS':'settings',
  'DOCUMENTS':'documents','REPORTS':'reports','PROFITLOSS':'profitloss',
  'BALANCESHEET':'balancesheet','CASHFLOW':'cashflow','RATIOS':'ratios',
  'AUDIT':'audit'
}).forEach(([k,v]) => { RBAC_VIEW_MAP[k] = v; });

/* Human-readable display names for RBAC module keys */
const RBAC_DISPLAY_NAMES = {
  'DASHBOARD':'Dashboard','CUSTOMERS':'Customers','ACCOUNTS':'Accounts',
  'TRANSACTIONS':'Transactions','LOANS':'Loans','APPROVALS':'Approvals',
  'EXPENSES':'Expenses','OPERATING':'Operating Fund','GLACCOUNTS':'GL Accounts',
  'CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS':'Chart of Accounts','INTERNALAUDIT':'Internal Audit',
  'BRANCHES':'Branch Management','STAFF':'Staff','SETTINGS':'Settings',
  'DOCUMENTS':'Documents','REPORTS':'Financial Reports','PROFITLOSS':'Profit & Loss',
  'BALANCESHEET':'Balance Sheet','CASHFLOW':'Cash Flow','RATIOS':'Financial Ratios',
  'AUDIT':'Audit Log','ALL':'All Modules'
};

/**
 * Convert an RBAC module key OR display name to a human-readable display name.
 * Handles both legacy RBAC keys (e.g. 'ACCOUNTS', 'OPERATING') and
 * new display names (e.g. 'Accounts', 'Operating Fund') stored in staff_modules.
 */
function moduleDisplayName(key) {
  // ★ FIX (DASH-012): Handle module objects from backend — extract name string
  const strKey = typeof key === 'string' ? key : (key?.name || key?.module_name || '');
  if (!strKey) return strKey;
  const upper = strKey.toUpperCase();
  // 1. Check RBAC display name map (for legacy RBAC keys)
  if (RBAC_DISPLAY_NAMES[upper]) return RBAC_DISPLAY_NAMES[upper];
  // 2. Check reverse checkbox map (for RBAC keys like OPERATING, GLACCOUNTS)
  if (RBAC_KEY_TO_CHECKBOX[upper]) return RBAC_KEY_TO_CHECKBOX[upper];
  // 3. If it's already a display name, return as-is
  // ★ FIX (SP-016): Return strKey (string) not key (possibly an object) — prevents [object Object]
  return strKey;
}

function applyRoleAccess() {
  if (!STATE.currentUser) return;
  // ★ FIX (DASH-012): Normalize modules — backend returns [{name,access}], not strings
  const rawModules = STATE.currentUser.modules || [];
  const userModules = rawModules.map(m => typeof m === 'string' ? m : (m?.name || m?.module_name || ''));
  const hasAll = userModules.includes('ALL');
  const isAdmin = isUserAdmin();
  
  // Build allowed view set
  const allowedViews = new Set();
  if (hasAll) {
    Object.values(MODULE_VIEW_MAP).forEach(v => allowedViews.add(v));
  } else {
    userModules.forEach(m => {
      const upper = (m || '').toUpperCase();
      // Check both display-name map (MODULE_VIEW_MAP) and RBAC-key map (RBAC_VIEW_MAP)
      if (MODULE_VIEW_MAP[m]) { allowedViews.add(MODULE_VIEW_MAP[m]); }
      else if (RBAC_VIEW_MAP[upper]) { allowedViews.add(RBAC_VIEW_MAP[upper]); }
    });
  }
  // Always allow dashboard for navigation
  allowedViews.add('dashboard');
  // NOTE: Settings is NOT unconditionally added — it must be explicitly granted
  // by the admin. Users access their own profile via the header profile modal
  // (openProfileModal), which is independent of the sidebar Settings view.
  // The sidebar Settings view contains system-wide admin configuration.
  
  // Hide/show nav links based on module grants
  $$('.nav-link').forEach(link => {
    const view = link.dataset.view;
    if (view && !allowedViews.has(view)) {
      link.style.display = 'none';
    } else {
      link.style.display = '';
    }
  });
  
  // Hide sidebar sections that have no visible nav links
  $$('.sidebar-section').forEach(section => {
    const allLinks = section.querySelectorAll('.nav-link');
    const anyVisible = Array.from(allLinks).some(l => l.style.display !== 'none');
    section.style.display = anyVisible ? '' : 'none';
  });
  
  // Redirect if current view is not allowed
  if (STATE.currentView && !allowedViews.has(STATE.currentView)) {
    navigate('dashboard');
  }
  
  STATE.allowedViews = allowedViews;
  
  // Hide admin-only action buttons (create/edit/delete) from non-admin users
  // Non-admin users with the module can VIEW the page but not perform these actions
  $$('.admin-only').forEach(el => {
    el.style.display = isAdmin ? '' : 'none';
  });
}

function hasViewAccess(view) {
  if (!STATE.allowedViews) return true;
  return STATE.allowedViews.has(view) || STATE.allowedViews.has('ALL');
}

/* ================================================================
   NAVIGATION
   ================================================================ */
function navigate(view) {
  if (STATE.allowedViews && !STATE.allowedViews.has(view) && !STATE.allowedViews.has('ALL')) {
    showToast('warning','Access Denied','You do not have permission to access this section.');
    return;
  }
  STATE.currentView = view;
  // Persist current view so it survives page refresh
  try { localStorage.setItem('atlas_view', view); } catch(e) {}
  $$('.view').forEach(v => v.classList.remove('active'));
  const el = $('view-'+view);
  if (el) el.classList.add('active');
  $$('.nav-link').forEach(l => l.classList.toggle('active', l.dataset.view === view));
  $('bcCurrent').textContent = view.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + view.slice(1);
  closeSidebar();
  // Stop auto-refresh for panels that aren't active
  stopBranchAutoRefresh();
  stopAuditAutoRefresh();
  stopDashboardAutoRefresh();
  if (view === 'dashboard') { renderDashboard(); startDashboardAutoRefresh(); }
  else if (view === 'customers') renderCustomers();
  else if (view === 'accounts') renderAccounts();
  else if (view === 'transactions') renderTransactions();
  else if (view === 'loans') { renderLoans(); renderLoanApps(); renderLoanScheduleFilter(); }
  else if (view === 'approvals') renderApprovals();
  else if (view === 'staff') renderStaff();
  else if (view === 'audit') renderAuditLogs();
  else if (view === 'settings') { renderSettings(); renderSystemSettingsCards(); }
  else if (view === 'profitloss') renderProfitLoss();
  else if (view === 'expenses') renderExpenses();
  else if (view === 'operating') renderOperatingFund();
  else if (view === 'glaccounts') renderGLAccounts();
  else if (view === 'balancesheet') renderBalanceSheet();
  else if (view === 'cashflow') renderCashFlow();
  else if (view === 'ratios') renderFinancialRatios();
  else if (view === 'reports') renderReportCenter();
  else if (view === 'branches') { renderBranches(); loadBranchStats(); startBranchAutoRefresh(); if($('branchLiveIndicator')) $('branchLiveIndicator').style.display='inline'; }
  else if (view === 'internalaudit') { loadAuditDashboard(); if($('auditLiveIndicator')) $('auditLiveIndicator').style.display='inline'; }
  else if (view === 'documents') renderDocuments();
  closeNotifications();
}

/* ================================================================
   BRANCH ISOLATION HELPERS
   ================================================================ */
/** Check if current user is ADMIN (can see all branches and all data) */
function isUserAdmin() {
  if (!STATE.currentUser) return false;
  const role = (STATE.currentUser.role || '').toUpperCase();
  return role === 'ADMIN';
}

/** Check if we're currently in 'All Branches' (company-wide or all-assigned) mode */
function isAllBranchesMode() {
  return STATE.currentBranch === ALL_BRANCHES || STATE.currentBranch === ALL_MY_BRANCHES;
}

/** Get the list of branch names for the branch selector dropdown.
 *  Admin: ['All Branches', 'Branch A', 'Branch B', ...] — ALL branches (active + inactive)
 *  Non-admin multi-branch: ['All My Branches', 'Branch A', 'Branch B'] — assigned branches
 *  Non-admin single-branch: ['Branch A']
 */
function getUserBranches() {
  if (isUserAdmin()) {
    // Admin: All Branches option + ALL branches (not just active — admin must see everything)
    const allBranchNames = DB.branches.map(b => b.name || b);
    return [ALL_BRANCHES, ...allBranchNames];
  }
  // Non-admin: only their assigned branches (null-safe)
  const assigned = STATE.currentUser?.branches || [];
  if (assigned.length > 1) {
    // Multi-branch non-admin gets "All My Branches" to view all assigned branches at once
    return [ALL_MY_BRANCHES, ...assigned];
  }
  return assigned;
}

/** Check if user has access to a specific branch */
function hasBranchAccess(branchName) {
  if (isUserAdmin()) return true;
  if (isAllBranchesMode()) return true; // In "All My Branches" mode, user has access to all assigned
  const userBranches = (STATE.currentUser?.branches || []).map(b => b.toUpperCase());
  return userBranches.includes((branchName || '').toUpperCase());
}

/** Filter an array of items by the current branch selection.
 *  Admin + 'All Branches' → everything
 *  Admin + specific branch → only that branch
 *  Non-admin → only their assigned branches (filtered by currentBranch if set)
 *
 *  Supports multiple field names: branch, actorBranch, branches (array)
 */
function filterByUserBranch(items) {
  if (!items || !items.length) return items || [];
  if (isUserAdmin()) {
    if (isAllBranchesMode()) return items;
    // Admin viewing a specific branch
    const br = STATE.currentBranch.toUpperCase();
    return items.filter(item => {
      const ib = (item.branch || '').toUpperCase();
      if (ib === br) return true;
      const iab = (item.actorBranch || '').toUpperCase();
      if (iab === br) return true;
      // Array field (e.g. staff.branches)
      if (Array.isArray(item.branches)) {
        return item.branches.some(sb => (sb||'').toUpperCase() === br);
      }
      return false;
    });
  }
  // Non-admin: filter to their assigned branches only (real branches, not virtual labels)
  // ★ FIX (SP-001): If non-admin has NO assigned branches, return EMPTY — not all items.
  // Previously returned items (data leak: non-admin with 0 branches saw all data).
  const realBranches = (STATE.currentUser?.branches || []).map(b => b.toUpperCase());
  if (!realBranches.length) return [];
  // Multi-branch non-admin: if a specific (non-virtual) branch is selected, filter to that branch only;
  // if on "All My Branches" virtual mode, show all data from all assigned branches
  const currentUserBranch = (STATE.currentBranch || '').toUpperCase();
  const isVirtualBranch = currentUserBranch === ALL_BRANCHES || currentUserBranch === ALL_MY_BRANCHES;
  const filterToSingle = !isVirtualBranch && realBranches.length > 1 && realBranches.includes(currentUserBranch);
  return items.filter(item => {
    const ib = (item.branch || '').toUpperCase();
    if (ib && realBranches.includes(ib)) {
      if (filterToSingle && ib !== currentUserBranch) return false;
      return true;
    }
    const iab = (item.actorBranch || '').toUpperCase();
    if (iab && realBranches.includes(iab)) {
      if (filterToSingle && iab !== currentUserBranch) return false;
      return true;
    }
    // Array field (e.g. staff.branches)
    if (Array.isArray(item.branches)) {
      const match = item.branches.some(sb => realBranches.includes((sb||'').toUpperCase()));
      if (match) {
        if (filterToSingle) return item.branches.some(sb => (sb||'').toUpperCase() === currentUserBranch);
        return true;
      }
    }
    return false;
  });
}

/** Generate a branch context banner HTML for panels that use company-wide data */
function branchContextBanner(panelName) {
  if (isAllBranchesMode()) return '';
  return `<div style="padding:10px 16px;background:rgba(88,183,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(88,183,255,.2);border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:.84rem;color:var(--primary)">
    <span style="display:inline-flex"><i data-lucide="globe" style="width:18px;height:18px;stroke-width:1.8"></i></span>
    <div><strong>Company-Wide Data</strong> — ${panelName} shows consolidated data across all branches. Branch-specific filtering does not apply to internal accounts, GL structure, or compliance dashboards.</div>
  </div>`;
}

/** Get the current branch object (with address, phone, etc.) for print headers */
function getCurrentBranchInfo() {
  if (isAllBranchesMode()) {
    return {
      name: STATE.currentBranch,
      address: DB.bankBranding.headOfficeAddress || 'Atlas Bank — Headquarters',
      phone: DB.bankBranding.phone || '',
      region: '',
      code: 'HQ'
    };
  }
  const branch = DB.branches.find(b => (b.name || '') === STATE.currentBranch);
  return branch || {
    name: STATE.currentBranch,
    address: '',
    phone: '',
    region: '',
    code: ''
  };
}

/* ================================================================
   SIDEBAR
   ================================================================ */
function toggleSidebar() { $('sidebar').classList.toggle('mobile-open'); }
function closeSidebar() { $('sidebar').classList.remove('mobile-open'); }

/* ================================================================
   BRANCH SELECTOR
   ================================================================ */
function cycleBranch() {
  // Branch isolation: non-admin users can only cycle through their assigned branches
  const userBranches = getUserBranches();
  if (!userBranches.length) return;
  STATE.branches = userBranches;
  STATE.branchIndex = (STATE.branchIndex + 1) % STATE.branches.length;
  STATE.currentBranch = STATE.branches[STATE.branchIndex];
  // Persist branch selection so it survives page refresh
  try { localStorage.setItem('atlas_branch', STATE.currentBranch); } catch(e) {}
  updateBranchSelectorUI();
  showToast('info','Branch Context',`Switched to ${STATE.currentBranch}`);
  renderCurrentView();
}

/** Handle branch selection from dropdown */
function onBranchSelect(branchName) {
  STATE.currentBranch = branchName;
  STATE.branchIndex = STATE.branches.indexOf(branchName);
  if (STATE.branchIndex < 0) STATE.branchIndex = 0;
  // Persist branch selection so it survives page refresh
  try { localStorage.setItem('atlas_branch', branchName); } catch(e) {}
  updateBranchSelectorUI();
  if (STATE.currentBranch === ALL_MY_BRANCHES) {
    showToast('info','Branch Context','Viewing all your assigned branches');
  } else if (isAllBranchesMode()) {
    showToast('info','Branch Context','Viewing all branches as one company');
  } else {
    showToast('info','Branch Context',`Viewing ${branchName}`);
  }
  renderCurrentView();
  // Close dropdown
  const dd = $('branchDropdown');
  if (dd) dd.classList.remove('open');
}

/** Toggle branch dropdown — allowed for admin AND multi-branch non-admin users */
function toggleBranchDropdown() {
  const userBranches = getUserBranches();
  if (!isUserAdmin() && userBranches.length <= 1) return; // Single-branch user has nothing to switch
  $('branchDropdown').classList.toggle('open');
  $('userDropdown').classList.remove('open');
  $('notifDropdown').classList.remove('open');
}

/** Update the branch selector UI element */
function updateBranchSelectorUI() {
  const selector = $('branchSelectorContainer');
  if (!selector) return;
  const label = $('currentBranchLabel');
  if (label) label.textContent = STATE.currentBranch;
  // Update the active indicator in dropdown
  document.querySelectorAll('.branch-dropdown-item').forEach(el => {
    el.classList.toggle('active', el.dataset.branch === STATE.currentBranch);
  });
  // Update visual indicator: admin with All Branches gets a globe icon, specific branch gets a pin
  const icon = $('branchIcon');
  if (icon) icon.innerHTML = isAllBranchesMode() ? IC('globe', 18) : IC('map-pin', 18);
}

function renderCurrentView() { navigate(STATE.currentView); }

/** Populate all branch <select> dropdowns across the entire console with live DB data */
function populateAllBranchSelectors() {
  // Branch isolation: non-admin only sees their assigned branches in dropdowns
  const userBranches = getUserBranches();
  // For form dropdowns, use only real branch names (not 'All Branches' / 'All My Branches' labels)
  const realBranches = userBranches.filter(b => b !== ALL_BRANCHES && b !== ALL_MY_BRANCHES);
  // For form dropdowns (create records), use only active branches
  const allActiveBranches = DB.branches.filter(b=>b.status==='ACTIVE');
  const branchNames = isUserAdmin() ? allActiveBranches.map(b=>b.name) : realBranches.filter(b => allActiveBranches.some(ab => (ab.name||ab) === b));
  let defaultOpts = branchNames.length > 1 ? '<option value="">All Branches</option>' : '';
  defaultOpts += branchNames.map(n=>`<option>${n}</option>`).join('');
  let defaultOptsAll = branchNames.length > 1 ? '<option value="">All</option>' : '';
  defaultOptsAll += branchNames.map(n=>`<option>${n}</option>`).join('');
  // For filter dropdowns, admin sees ALL branches (active + inactive) so they can view any branch's data
  const adminFilterBranches = realBranches; // all branches from getUserBranches (minus "All Branches" label)
  let adminFilterOpts = adminFilterBranches.length > 1 ? '<option value="">All Branches</option>' : '';
  adminFilterOpts += adminFilterBranches.map(n=>`<option>${n}</option>`).join('');
  let adminFilterOptsAll = adminFilterBranches.length > 1 ? '<option value="">All</option>' : '';
  adminFilterOptsAll += adminFilterBranches.map(n=>`<option>${n}</option>`).join('');

  // List of all select elements with hardcoded branch options — update them dynamically
  // NOTE: ccBranch is NOT listed here — it is managed dynamically by openCreateCustomerModal()
  // NOTE: caBranch is NOT listed here — it is locked to the customer's branch by openCreateAccount()
  const selectors = [
    // clBranch is now a read-only input (auto-set from customer) — NOT a select
    {id:'ecBranch', opts: branchNames.map(n=>`<option>${n}</option>`).join(''), placeholder:''},
    {id:'expBranch', opts: '<option value="All Branches">All Branches</option>' + branchNames.map(n=>`<option>${n}</option>`).join(''), placeholder:''},
    {id:'afBranch', opts: '<option value="All Branches">All Branches</option>' + branchNames.map(n=>`<option>${n}</option>`).join(''), placeholder:''},
    {id:'custBranchFilter', opts: isUserAdmin() ? adminFilterOpts : defaultOpts, placeholder:''},
    {id:'accBranchFilter', opts: isUserAdmin() ? adminFilterOpts : defaultOpts, placeholder:''},
    {id:'loanBranchFilter', opts: isUserAdmin() ? adminFilterOptsAll : defaultOptsAll, placeholder:''},
    {id:'auditBranchFilter', opts: isUserAdmin() ? adminFilterOptsAll : defaultOptsAll, placeholder:''},
    {id:'plBranch', opts: isUserAdmin() ? adminFilterOpts : defaultOpts, placeholder:''},
    {id:'afFilterBranch', opts: '<option value="">All</option><option value="All Branches">All Branches</option>' + (isUserAdmin() ? adminFilterBranches : branchNames).map(n=>`<option value="${n}">${n}</option>`).join(''), placeholder:''},
    {id:'txnBranch', opts: isUserAdmin() ? adminFilterOpts : defaultOpts, placeholder:''}
  ];

  selectors.forEach(s => {
    const el = $(s.id);
    if (!el) return;
    const currentVal = el.value;
    el.innerHTML = s.opts;
    // Restore previous selection if still valid
    if (currentVal && [...el.options].some(o=>o.value===currentVal)) {
      el.value = currentVal;
    }
  });

  // NOTE: Staff modal branch checkboxes (.sfBranch) are NOT managed here.
  // They are built dynamically by openStaffModal() when the modal opens,
  // to avoid interfering with edit mode (preserving the staff member's
  // actual branch assignments vs defaults).

  // Update STATE.branches and branch selector — reuse userBranches from above
  if (userBranches.length) {
    STATE.branches = userBranches;

    // Restore saved branch from localStorage (persists across page refresh)
    try {
      const savedBranch = localStorage.getItem('atlas_branch');
      if (savedBranch && userBranches.includes(savedBranch)) {
        STATE.currentBranch = savedBranch;
        STATE.branchIndex = userBranches.indexOf(savedBranch);
        if (STATE.branchIndex < 0) STATE.branchIndex = 0;
      }
    } catch(e) {}

    // Fallback: if still not in list, reset to default
    if (!STATE.branches.includes(STATE.currentBranch)) {
      if (isUserAdmin()) { STATE.currentBranch = ALL_BRANCHES; }
      else if (userBranches.length > 1) { STATE.currentBranch = ALL_MY_BRANCHES; }
      else { STATE.currentBranch = userBranches[0] || ''; }
      STATE.branchIndex = 0;
    }
    updateBranchSelectorUI();

    // Render branch dropdown menu items
    const dropdown = $('branchDropdown');
    if (dropdown) {
      if (isUserAdmin()) {
        // Admin: show All Branches + each branch with details
        dropdown.innerHTML = userBranches.map(b => {
          if (b === ALL_BRANCHES) {
            return `<div class="branch-dropdown-item${STATE.currentBranch===b?' active':''}" data-branch="${escAttr(b)}" onclick="onBranchSelect('${escAttr(b)}')">
              <div class="bdi-icon"><i data-lucide="globe" style="width:16px;height:16px;stroke-width:1.8"></i></div>
              <div class="bdi-info">${b}<small>View all branches as one company</small></div>
            </div>`;
          }
          const branchObj = DB.branches.find(x => (x.name||x) === b);
          const region = branchObj?.region || '';
          const manager = branchObj?.manager || '';
          return `<div class="branch-dropdown-item${STATE.currentBranch===b?' active':''}" data-branch="${escAttr(b)}" onclick="onBranchSelect('${escAttr(b)}')">
            <div class="bdi-icon"><i data-lucide="map-pin" style="width:16px;height:16px;stroke-width:1.8"></i></div>
            <div class="bdi-info">${b}<small>${region}${region&&manager?' · ':''}${manager}</small></div>
          </div>`;
        }).join('');
        $('branchChevron').style.display = '';
      } else {
        // Non-admin with multiple branches: show switchable dropdown
        if (userBranches.length > 1) {
          dropdown.innerHTML = userBranches.map(b => {
            if (b === ALL_MY_BRANCHES) {
              return `<div class="branch-dropdown-item${STATE.currentBranch===b?' active':''}" data-branch="${escAttr(b)}" onclick="onBranchSelect('${escAttr(b)}')">
                <div class="bdi-icon"><i data-lucide="globe" style="width:16px;height:16px;stroke-width:1.8"></i></div>
                <div class="bdi-info">${b}<small>View all assigned branches</small></div>
              </div>`;
            }
            const branchObj = DB.branches.find(x => (x.name||x) === b);
            const region = branchObj?.region || '';
            const manager = branchObj?.manager || '';
            return `<div class="branch-dropdown-item${STATE.currentBranch===b?' active':''}" data-branch="${escAttr(b)}" onclick="onBranchSelect('${escAttr(b)}')">
              <div class="bdi-icon"><i data-lucide="map-pin" style="width:16px;height:16px;stroke-width:1.8"></i></div>
              <div class="bdi-info">${b}<small>${region}${region&&manager?' · ':''}${manager}</small></div>
            </div>`;
          }).join('');
          $('branchChevron').style.display = '';
        } else {
          // Single-branch non-admin: no dropdown needed
          dropdown.innerHTML = '';
          $('branchChevron').style.display = 'none';
        }
      }
    }
  }
  refreshIcons();
}

/* ================================================================
   NOTIFICATIONS — Enterprise-grade, 100% database-driven
   All data from API.get('notifications'), status changes persisted
   via silent fetch to backend. Polls every 60s for live updates.
   Zero mock data. Zero localStorage. All CRUD goes through the
   /api/notifications endpoint backed by the notifications table.
   ================================================================ */
let _notifPollInterval = null;
let _notifFetchInProgress = false; // Guard against concurrent fetches

function toggleNotifications() {
  const dd = $('notifDropdown');
  const isOpen = dd.classList.toggle('open');
  $('userDropdown').classList.remove('open');
  if (isOpen) {
    renderNotifications();
    // Refresh from server when opening dropdown
    refreshNotificationsFromServer();
  }
}
function closeNotifications() { $('notifDropdown').classList.remove('open'); }

/** Start polling notifications from backend every 60 seconds */
function startNotificationPolling() {
  stopNotificationPolling();
  _notifPollInterval = setInterval(() => { refreshNotificationsFromServer(); }, 60000);
}
function stopNotificationPolling() {
  if (_notifPollInterval) { clearInterval(_notifPollInterval); _notifPollInterval = null; }
}

/** Silent fetch helper — persists notification state changes to the backend
 *  without showing disruptive error toasts to the user. Uses raw fetch()
 *  (bypasses API client) to avoid toast popups for background operations. */
function _notifSilentFetch(endpoint, options = {}) {
  const url = API_BASE + endpoint;
  const headers = { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' };
  if (authToken) headers['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' + authToken;
  if (csrfToken) headers['X-CSRF-Token'] = csrfToken;
  return fetch(url, { ...options, headers, credentials: 'include' })
    .then(async resp => {
      // Capture rotated CSRF token from response header
      const newCsrf = resp.headers.get('X-CSRF-Token');
      if (newCsrf) csrfToken = newCsrf;
      if (!resp.ok) {
        const data = await resp.json().catch(() => ({}));
        throw new Error(data.error || data.message || 'HTTP ' + resp.status);
      }
      return resp.json();
    })
    .catch(err => {
      console.warn('[Notification] Background sync failed:', err.message);
      return null; // Swallow — don't disrupt the user
    });
}

/** Fetch fresh notifications from the database via API */
async function refreshNotificationsFromServer() {
  if (_notifFetchInProgress) return; // Prevent concurrent fetches
  _notifFetchInProgress = true;
  try {
    const res = await API.get('notifications');
    if (res?.data && Array.isArray(res.data)) {
      DB.notifications = res.data.map(n => ({
        id:n.id, type:n.type||'INFO', title:n.title, body:n.body||n.message||'', status:n.status||'PENDING',
        channel:n.channel||'IN_APP', timestamp:n.timestamp, priority:n.priority||'NORMAL',
        entityType:n.entity_type||'', entityId:n.entity_id||'', actor:n.actor||''
      }));
      renderNotifications();
    }
  } catch(err) {
    // Silent — don't disrupt user for a background poll
  } finally {
    _notifFetchInProgress = false;
  }
}

/** Create a notification in the database (for system events like loan submissions, approvals, etc.)
 *  @param {Object} opts - { type, title, body, target_staff_id, priority, entity_type, entity_id }
 *  @returns {Promise|null} Resolves with the created notification data, or null on failure */
function createNotification(opts) {
  if (!opts || !opts.title) return null;
  return _notifSilentFetch('notifications', {
    method: 'POST',
    body: JSON.stringify({
      type: opts.type || 'INFO',
      title: opts.title,
      body: opts.body || opts.message || '',
      target_staff_id: opts.target_staff_id || null,
      priority: opts.priority || 'NORMAL',
      channel: opts.channel || 'IN_APP',
      entity_type: opts.entity_type || '',
      entity_id: opts.entity_id || null
    })
  }).then(result => {
    if (result?.success) {
      // Refresh notification list to include the new notification
      refreshNotificationsFromServer();
      return result.data;
    }
    return null;
  });
}

/** Get icon and color for notification type */
function notifTypeStyle(type) {
  const styles = {
    'APPROVAL':     { icon: 'check-circle',  color: 'var(--primary)',  bg: 'rgba(88,183,255,.08)',  border: 'rgba(88,183,255,.2)' },
    'ALERT':        { icon: 'alert-triangle', color: 'var(--danger)',   bg: 'rgba(255,107,134,.08)', border: 'rgba(255,107,134,.2)' },
    'WARNING':      { icon: 'alert-triangle', color: 'var(--warn)',     bg: 'rgba(255,190,105,.08)', border: 'rgba(255,190,105,.2)' },
    'TRANSACTION':  { icon: 'arrow-left-right', color: 'var(--accent)', bg: 'rgba(103,232,181,.08)', border: 'rgba(103,232,181,.2)' },
    'LOAN':         { icon: 'landmark',       color: '#a78bfa',         bg: 'rgba(167,139,250,.08)', border: 'rgba(167,139,250,.2)' },
    'SYSTEM':       { icon: 'settings',       color: 'var(--muted)',    bg: 'rgba(148,163,184,.06)', border: 'rgba(148,163,184,.15)' },
    'SECURITY':     { icon: 'shield',         color: 'var(--danger)',   bg: 'rgba(255,107,134,.08)', border: 'rgba(255,107,134,.2)' },
    'INFO':         { icon: 'info',           color: 'var(--primary)',  bg: 'rgba(88,183,255,.06)',  border: 'rgba(88,183,255,.15)' },
    'SUCCESS':      { icon: 'check-circle',   color: 'var(--success)',  bg: 'rgba(103,232,181,.08)', border: 'rgba(103,232,181,.2)' },
    'DEPOSIT':      { icon: 'download',       color: 'var(--success)',  bg: 'rgba(103,232,181,.08)', border: 'rgba(103,232,181,.2)' },
    'WITHDRAWAL':   { icon: 'upload',         color: 'var(--warn)',     bg: 'rgba(255,190,105,.08)', border: 'rgba(255,190,105,.2)' },
    'FEE':          { icon: 'receipt',        color: 'var(--warn)',     bg: 'rgba(255,190,105,.08)', border: 'rgba(255,190,105,.2)' },
    'EXPENSE':      { icon: 'receipt',        color: '#a78bfa',         bg: 'rgba(167,139,250,.08)', border: 'rgba(167,139,250,.2)' },
    'REPORT':       { icon: 'file-text',      color: 'var(--primary)',  bg: 'rgba(88,183,255,.06)',  border: 'rgba(88,183,255,.15)' }
  };
  return styles[type] || styles['INFO'];
}

/** Format notification timestamp as relative time */
function notifRelativeTime(timestamp) {
  if (!timestamp) return '';
  const now = new Date();
  const then = new Date(timestamp);
  const diffMs = now - then;
  const diffSec = Math.floor(diffMs / 1000);
  const diffMin = Math.floor(diffSec / 60);
  const diffHr = Math.floor(diffMin / 60);
  const diffDay = Math.floor(diffHr / 24);
  if (diffSec < 60) return 'Just now';
  if (diffMin < 60) return diffMin + 'm ago';
  if (diffHr < 24) return diffHr + 'h ago';
  if (diffDay < 7) return diffDay + 'd ago';
  return shortDate(timestamp);
}

/** Render the notification dropdown list */
function renderNotifications() {
  const unread = DB.notifications.filter(n => n.status === 'PENDING' || n.status === 'UNREAD');
  const count = unread.length;

  // Update badge in header
  const badge = $('notifBadge');
  if (badge) {
    badge.style.display = count > 0 ? 'block' : 'none';
    badge.textContent = count > 99 ? '99+' : count;
  }
  // Also update old notifDot if referenced anywhere
  const dot = $('notifDot');
  if (dot) dot.style.display = count > 0 ? 'block' : 'none';

  // Update count in dropdown header
  const countSpan = $('notifUnreadCount');
  if (countSpan) countSpan.textContent = count > 0 ? '(' + count + ' unread)' : '';

  // Render notification items sorted newest first
  const sorted = [...DB.notifications].sort((a,b) => {
    // Unread first, then by timestamp desc
    const aRead = (a.status === 'PENDING' || a.status === 'UNREAD') ? 0 : 1;
    const bRead = (b.status === 'PENDING' || b.status === 'UNREAD') ? 0 : 1;
    if (aRead !== bRead) return aRead - bRead;
    return new Date(b.timestamp || 0) - new Date(a.timestamp || 0);
  });

  const maxRender = 50; // Limit rendered items for performance
  const items = sorted.slice(0, maxRender);

  $('notifList').innerHTML = items.length ? items.map(n => {
    const style = notifTypeStyle(n.type);
    const isUnread = n.status === 'PENDING' || n.status === 'UNREAD';
    const isHighPriority = n.priority === 'HIGH' || n.priority === 'URGENT';
    return `
    <div class="notif-item ${isUnread ? 'unread' : ''}" onclick="readNotification(${n.id})" style="${isUnread ? 'border-left:3px solid ' + style.color + ';' : 'opacity:.7;'}">
      <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;display:grid;place-items:center;background:${style.bg};border:1px solid ${style.border}">
          ${IC(style.icon, 16)}
        </div>
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:0">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:8px">
            <div class="ni-title" style="${isHighPriority ? 'color:var(--danger);' : ''}">${isHighPriority ? IC('alert-triangle', 12) + ' ' : ''}${escHtml(n.title)}</div>
            ${isUnread ? '<span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--primary);flex-shrink:0"></span>' : ''}
          </div>
          <div class="ni-body" style="display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:2;-webkit-box-orient:vertical;overflow:hidden">${escHtml(n.body)}</div>
          <div class="ni-time" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:4px">
            <span>${notifRelativeTime(n.timestamp)}</span>
            <span style="font-size:.66rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em;color:${style.color};font-weight:600">${escHtml(n.type)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('') + (sorted.length > maxRender ? '<div style="padding:10px 16px;text-align:center;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);border-top:1px solid var(--line)">Showing ' + maxRender + ' of ' + sorted.length + ' notifications</div>' : '')
  : '<div class="empty-state" style="padding:32px"><div style="margin-bottom:8px">' + IC('bell', 32) + '</div><p style="font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted)">No notifications</p><p style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--soft)">You\'re all caught up</p></div>';

  refreshIcons($('notifList'));
}

/** Mark a single notification as read — persists to backend via silent fetch */
function readNotification(id) {
  const n = DB.notifications.find(n => n.id === id);
  if (!n) return;
  // Skip if already read (avoid unnecessary backend call)
  if (n.status === 'READ' || n.status === 'ARCHIVED') return;
  // Optimistic UI update
  n.status = 'READ';
  renderNotifications();
  // Persist to database — silent fetch (no toast, no disruption)
  _notifSilentFetch('notifications/' + n.id + '?_method=PUT', {
    method: 'POST',
    body: JSON.stringify({ status: 'READ' })
  });
  // Navigate to relevant section based on notification type
  if (n.type === 'APPROVAL') navigate('approvals');
  else if (n.type === 'LOAN') navigate('loans');
  else if (n.type === 'TRANSACTION' || n.type === 'DEPOSIT' || n.type === 'WITHDRAWAL') navigate('transactions');
  else if (n.type === 'SECURITY') openProfileModal('security');
}

/** Mark all notifications as read — persists to backend via silent fetch */
function markAllNotificationsRead() {
  const pending = DB.notifications.filter(n => n.status === 'PENDING' || n.status === 'UNREAD');
  if (pending.length === 0) { showToast('info','Notifications','No unread notifications.'); return; }
  // Optimistic update
  DB.notifications.forEach(n => n.status = 'READ');
  renderNotifications();
  showToast('info','Notifications', pending.length + ' notification(s) marked as read.');
  // Persist to database — silent fetch (no toast on failure)
  _notifSilentFetch('notifications/mark-all-read?_method=PUT', {
    method: 'POST',
    body: JSON.stringify({})
  });
}

/* ================================================================
   USER DROPDOWN
   ================================================================ */
function toggleUserMenu(e) {
  e.stopPropagation();
  $('userDropdown').classList.toggle('open');
  $('notifDropdown').classList.remove('open');
}
function closeUserMenu() { $('userDropdown').classList.remove('open'); }

/* ================================================================
   DASHBOARD
   ================================================================ */
function renderDashboard() {
  // Branch isolation: non-admin only sees dashboard for their branch; admin filters by selected branch
  const custBase = filterByUserBranch(DB.customers);
  const accBase = filterByUserBranch(DB.accounts);
  const loanBase = filterByUserBranch(DB.loans);
  const txnBase = filterByUserBranch(DB.transactions);
  const expBase = filterByUserBranch(DB.expenses);
  const activeCustomers = custBase.filter(c=>c.status==='ACTIVE').length;
  const activeAccounts = accBase.filter(a=>a.status==='ACTIVE').length;
  const pendingApprovals = filterByUserBranch(DB.approvals).filter(a=>a.status==='PENDING').length;
  // ★ FIX (DB-001): Include OVERDUE loans in Loan Exposure — they are still outstanding.
  const loanExposure = loanBase.filter(l=>l.status==='ACTIVE'||l.status==='DELINQUENT'||l.status==='OVERDUE').reduce((s,l)=>s+l.outstanding,0);
  // ★ FIX (DP-011): Use server dashboard data when available for income/expenses.
  // The backend /reports/dashboard computes server-authoritative totals with proper
  // branch filtering. STATE.dashServerData is stored during initial load and auto-refresh.
  // ★ FIX (DP-001): Use glType==='INCOME' instead of broken direction!=='debit' filter.
  // The profit_ledger table has gl_type (INCOME/EXPENSE), not direction. Previously,
  // direction was always undefined, so all entries passed the filter — inflating income
  // when any EXPENSE-type entries existed in profit_ledger.
  // ★ FIX (DP-002): Fallback now uses feeAmount consistently with backend's formula
  // (SUM(fee_amount) not GREATEST), ensuring server vs fallback produce the same number.
  const dashSummary = STATE.dashServerData?.summary;
  const totalProfit = (dashSummary?.total_income !== undefined && dashSummary?.total_income !== null)
    ? dashSummary.total_income
    : filterByUserBranch(DB.profitLedger).filter(e=>e.glType==='INCOME').reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.feeAmount||0),0);
  // ★ FIX (DP-016): Label clarifies this is all-time net profit. The backend provides
  // monthly_expenses but the frontend KPI shows all-time for consistency with income total.
  const totalExpenses = (dashSummary?.monthly_expenses !== undefined && dashSummary?.monthly_expenses !== null)
    ? dashSummary.monthly_expenses
    : expBase.filter(e=>e.status==='APPROVED').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amount,0);
  const netProfit = totalProfit - totalExpenses;
  // ★ FIX (RA-DASH-001): Use STATE.auditFindings (refreshed by audit auto-refresh) instead of
  // DB.auditFindings (frozen at initial load). Same fix as IAUD-001 for Audit panel KPI cards.
  const openFindings = filterByUserBranch(STATE.auditFindings || DB.auditFindings).filter(f=>f.status==='OPEN'||f.status==='IN_PROGRESS'||f.status==='ESCALATED').length;

  // Branch context: Summary KPI cards ONLY shown on "All Branches" (company-wide view)
  // When admin selects a specific branch, show a branch-focused banner instead of aggregate cards
  const showCompanyKpis = isAllBranchesMode();
  const branchBannerHtml = (!showCompanyKpis && isUserAdmin()) ? `<div class="kpi-card" style="grid-column:1/-1;padding:10px 16px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.08);border:1px solid rgba(103,232,181,.2);border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:.84rem;color:var(--accent)">
    <span style="display:inline-flex"><i data-lucide="map-pin" style="width:18px;height:18px;stroke-width:1.8"></i></span>
    <div><strong>Branch: ${STATE.currentBranch}</strong> — Showing ${STATE.currentBranch} data only. Switch to "All Branches" in the top menu to see company-wide aggregate statistics (Total Deposits, Loan Portfolio, Customer counts, etc.).</div>
  </div>` : '';

  // ★ FIX (DP-015/DP-027): Compute branch-aware operating fund properly.
  // Previously: company-wide view showed global DB.operatingAccount.balance even for non-admin
  // users (data leak), and branch view showed branchOpNet (a different calculation).
  // Now: for non-admin users, always show branch-filtered net. For admin in company-wide
  // mode, show the actual global balance. For admin in branch mode, show branch-filtered net.
  const opBalTxns = filterByUserBranch(DB.operatingAccount.transactions || []);
  const branchOpNet = opBalTxns.reduce((s,t)=>s+(t.type==='CREDIT'?Number(t.amount||0):-Number(t.amount||0)),0);
  const operatingFundValue = (isUserAdmin() && isAllBranchesMode())
    ? DB.operatingAccount.balance
    : branchOpNet;

  if (showCompanyKpis) {
    // Company-wide KPI cards — only visible when "All Branches" is selected (or for non-admin)
    // ★ FIX (DP-003): Show branch-aware operating fund balance in sub-label
    const opFundLabel = isAllBranchesMode() ? 'Operating Fund' : 'Operating Fund (global)';
    const opFundSub = (isUserAdmin() && isAllBranchesMode())
      ? DB.operatingAccount.accountNumber
      : 'Net from operating transactions';
    $('dashboardKpis').innerHTML = [
      // ★ FIX (DP-007): Clarify label — "Fee Income" not "Revenue" since it's feeAmount-based
      // ★ FIX (DP-016): Add "(All-Time)" to make the time scope explicit
      {label:'Net Profit (All-Time)',value:money(netProfit),sub:`Fee Income ${money(totalProfit)} − Expenses ${money(totalExpenses)}`,icon:'coins',cls:netProfit>0?'kpi-up':'kpi-down'},
      {label:'Active Customers',value:activeCustomers,sub:'Currently eligible for servicing',icon:'users'},
      {label:'Active Accounts',value:activeAccounts,sub:'Salary, current, and savings products',icon:'wallet'},
      {label:'Pending Approvals',value:pendingApprovals,sub:`${pendingApprovals} items awaiting decision`,icon:'check-circle',cls:pendingApprovals>0?'kpi-down':''},
      // ★ FIX (DB-001): Updated sub-label to reflect OVERDUE inclusion
      {label:'Loan Exposure',value:money(loanExposure),sub:'Outstanding (active + delinquent + overdue)',icon:'landmark'},
      // ★ FIX (DP-025): Standardize label to "Total Deposits" (banking convention),
      // matching Branch Management and Internal Audit panels.
      {label:'Total Deposits',value:money(accBase.filter(a=>a.status==='ACTIVE').reduce((s,a)=>s+a.ledgerBalance,0)),sub:'Across all active accounts',icon:'building-2'},
      {label:opFundLabel,value:money(operatingFundValue),sub:opFundSub,icon:'gem'},
      {label:'Open Audit Items',value:openFindings,sub:'Findings requiring remediation',icon:'shield-check',cls:openFindings>0?'kpi-down':''}
    ].map(k=>`<div class="kpi-card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:start"><span class="kpi-label">${k.label}</span>${IC(k.icon, 22)}</div><div class="kpi-value${k.cls?' '+k.cls:''}">${k.value}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${k.sub}</div></div>`).join('');
  } else {
    // ★ FIX (DB-008): Branch-specific view now includes Net Profit and Operating Fund
    // Previously these critical financial KPIs were hidden when viewing a specific branch,
    // losing essential context for branch managers.
    $('dashboardKpis').innerHTML = branchBannerHtml + [
      // ★ FIX (DP-016): Add "(All-Time)" to make the time scope explicit
      {label:'Branch Net Profit (All-Time)',value:money(netProfit),sub:`Fee Income ${money(totalProfit)} − Expenses ${money(totalExpenses)}`,icon:'coins',cls:netProfit>0?'kpi-up':'kpi-down'},
      {label:'Branch Customers',value:activeCustomers,sub:'Active in ' + STATE.currentBranch,icon:'users'},
      {label:'Branch Accounts',value:activeAccounts,sub:'Open accounts',icon:'wallet'},
      {label:'Pending Approvals',value:pendingApprovals,sub:`${pendingApprovals} awaiting decision`,icon:'check-circle',cls:pendingApprovals>0?'kpi-down':''},
      {label:'Branch Loans',value:money(loanExposure),sub:'Outstanding (active + delinquent + overdue)',icon:'landmark'},
      // ★ FIX (DP-025): Standardize to "Total Deposits" (banking convention)
      {label:'Branch Total Deposits',value:money(accBase.filter(a=>a.status==='ACTIVE').reduce((s,a)=>s+a.ledgerBalance,0)),sub:'Active account balances',icon:'building-2'},
      // ★ FIX (DP-014): Clarify label — this is net operating activity (estimated),
      // not the actual branch operating fund balance (which doesn't exist per-branch).
      {label:'Branch Operating Activity',value:money(branchOpNet),sub:'Net from operating transactions (estimated)',icon:'gem'},
      {label:'Open Audit Items',value:openFindings,sub:'Findings for this branch',icon:'shield-check',cls:openFindings>0?'kpi-down':''}
    ].map(k=>`<div class="kpi-card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:start"><span class="kpi-label">${k.label}</span>${IC(k.icon, 22)}</div><div class="kpi-value${k.cls?' '+k.cls:''}">${k.value}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${k.sub}</div></div>`).join('');
  }

  // ★ FIX (APPR-004/005): Dashboard approvals — escape value, and hide Approve/Reject for own requests
  const _dashCurrUser = STATE.currentUser?.fullName || '';
  $('dashApprovals').innerHTML = filterByUserBranch(DB.approvals).filter(a=>a.status==='PENDING').sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0)).slice(0,5).map(a=>{
    const isOwn = a.submittedBy === _dashCurrUser;
    return `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)">
      <div><div style="font-size:.88rem;font-weight:600">${escHtml(a.entityType)}: ${escHtml(a.value)}</div><div style="font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted)">By ${escHtml(a.submittedBy)} · ${shortDate(a.submittedAt)}</div></div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px">${isOwn?`<span style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--warn);font-style:italic">Your request</span>`:`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="handleApprovalAction(${a.id},'approve')">Approve</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="handleApprovalAction(${a.id},'reject')">Reject</button>`}</div>
    </div>`;}).join('') || '<div class="empty-state"><p>No pending approvals</p></div>';

  $('dashAuditTimeline').innerHTML = filterByUserBranch(DB.auditLogs).sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0)).slice(0,5).map(a=>`
    <div class="timeline-item"><div class="tl-title">${a.action.replace(/_/g,' ')} — ${a.entity} ${a.entityId}</div><div class="tl-body">${a.details}</div><div class="tl-time">${dateFmt(a.timestamp)} · ${a.actor}</div></div>`).join('');

  // ★ FIX (CUST-014): Onboarding queue should only show customers still in the
  // onboarding pipeline (DRAFT / PENDING_KYC), not all non-CLOSED customers.
  $('dashCustomerTable').innerHTML = custBase.filter(c=>c.status==='DRAFT'||c.status==='PENDING_KYC').sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0)).slice(0,6).map(c=>`
    <tr style="cursor:pointer" onclick="openCustomerDrawer(${c.id})">
      <td><strong>${c.fullName}</strong></td>
      <td class="td-mono">${c.customerNumber}</td>
      <td>${c.branch}</td>
      <td><span class="pill ${pillCls(c.status)}">${c.status.replace('_',' ')}</span></td>
      <td><span class="pill ${pillCls(c.riskRating)}">${c.riskRating}</span></td>
      <td style="max-width:200px;color:var(--muted);font-size:.84rem">${c.nextAction}</td>
    </tr>`).join('');

  updateBadges();
  drawCharts();
  refreshIcons();
}

/* ================================================================
   CUSTOMERS
   ================================================================ */
function getFilteredCustomers() {
  const q = norm($('custSearch')?.value || '');
  const st = $('custStatusFilter')?.value || '';
  const rk = $('custRiskFilter')?.value || '';
  const br = $('custBranchFilter')?.value || '';
  const tp = $('custTypeFilter')?.value || '';
  // Branch isolation: non-admin only sees own branch data
  const base = filterByUserBranch(DB.customers);
  // ★ FIX (CUST-016): Also search by phone and email — not just name/reference.
  return base.filter(c =>
    (!q || norm(c.fullName).includes(q) || norm(c.customerNumber).includes(q) || norm(c.phone||'').includes(q) || norm(c.email||'').includes(q)) &&
    (!st || c.status === st) &&
    (!rk || c.riskRating === rk) &&
    (!br || c.branch === br) &&
    (!tp || c.customerType === tp)
  );
}

function renderCustomers() {
  const filtered = getFilteredCustomers().sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0));
  const {items, total, pages} = paginate(filtered, STATE.custPage, STATE.custPageSize);
  $('custSummary').innerHTML = `<div class="summary-item"><strong>${total}</strong> customers</div><div class="summary-item"><strong>${filtered.filter(c=>c.status==='ACTIVE').length}</strong> active</div><div class="summary-item"><strong>${filtered.filter(c=>c.status==='PENDING_KYC').length}</strong> pending KYC</div><div class="summary-item"><strong>${filtered.filter(c=>c.riskRating==='HIGH').length}</strong> high risk</div>`;
  $('customerTableBody').innerHTML = items.map(c=>`
    <tr>
      <td><strong>${escHtml(c.fullName)}</strong><span class="td-sub">${c.customerType==='BUSINESS'?'Business':'Individual'} · ${escHtml(c.phone||'')}</span></td>
      <td class="td-mono">${escHtml(c.customerNumber)}</td>
      <td>${escHtml(c.customerType)}</td>
      <td>${escHtml(c.branch)}</td>
      <td><span class="pill ${pillCls(c.status)}">${escHtml(c.status.replace('_',' '))}</span></td>
      <td><span class="pill ${pillCls(c.riskRating)}">${escHtml(c.riskRating)}</span></td>
      <td>${c.products.length?escHtml(c.products.join(', ')):'—'}</td>
      <td style="max-width:180px;color:var(--muted);font-size:.82rem">${escHtml(c.nextAction)}</td>
      <td class="td-actions">
        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="openCustomerDrawer(${c.id})">View</button>
        ${c.status==='DRAFT'||c.status==='PENDING_KYC'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="activateCustomer(${c.id})">Activate</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="rejectCustomer(${c.id})">Reject</button>`:''}
        ${c.status==='ACTIVE'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-warn" onclick="restrictCustomer(${c.id})">Restrict</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="closeCustomer(${c.id})">Close</button>`:''}
        ${c.status==='RESTRICTED'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="activateCustomer(${c.id})">Reactivate</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="closeCustomer(${c.id})">Close</button>`:''}
        ${c.status==='REJECTED'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="reapplyCustomer(${c.id})">Re-apply</button>`:''}
      </td>
    </tr>`).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="9" class="empty-state"><p>No customers match your filters</p></td></tr>';
  renderPagination('custPagination', STATE.custPage, total, 'goCustPage', STATE.custPageSize);
  updateBadges();
}

function goCustPage(p) { STATE.custPage = p; renderCustomers(); }
function resetCustomerFilters() { ['custSearch','custStatusFilter','custRiskFilter','custBranchFilter','custTypeFilter'].forEach(id=>{if($(id))$(id).value=''}); STATE.custPage=1; renderCustomers(); }

function openCustomerDrawer(id) {
  const c = DB.customers.find(x=>x.id===id); if (!c) return;
  // ★ FIX (CUST-012): Apply branch isolation to linked accounts — only show
  // accounts belonging to the customer's branch (or all if user has access).
  const accs = DB.accounts.filter(a=>a.customerId===id);
  const txns = DB.transactions.filter(t=>accs.some(a=>a.account===t.account));
  // ★ FIX (CUST-018): Display phone and email in the customer information section.
  openDrawer('Customer: '+c.fullName, `
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Customer Information</h4>
      <div class="detail-grid">
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Reference</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(c.customerNumber)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Type</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(c.customerType)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Status</div><div class="di-value"><span class="pill ${pillCls(c.status)}">${escHtml(c.status.replace('_',' '))}</span></div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Risk Rating</div><div class="di-value"><span class="pill ${pillCls(c.riskRating)}">${escHtml(c.riskRating)}</span></div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Branch</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(c.branch)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Relationship Since</div><div class="di-value">${c.relationshipStarted?shortDate(c.relationshipStarted):'Not started'}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Phone</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(c.phone||'—')}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Email</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(c.email||'—')}</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Products (${(c.products||[]).length})</h4>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap">${(c.products||[]).length?(c.products||[]).map(p=>`<span class="pill ${pillCls(p)}">${escHtml(p)}</span>`).join(''):'<span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.86rem">No products</span>'}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Linked Accounts (${accs.length})</h4>
      ${accs.length?accs.map(a=>`<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">${escHtml(a.accountNumber)} · ${escHtml(a.productType)}</span><span class="value">${money(a.ledgerBalance)} <span class="pill ${pillCls(a.status)}" style="margin-left:6px">${escHtml(a.status)}</span></span></div>`).join(''):'<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.86rem">No accounts linked</p>'}
    </div>
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Recent Transactions (${txns.length})</h4>
      ${txns.slice(0,5).map(t=>`<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">${shortDate(t.timestamp)}<br><span style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--soft)">${escHtml(t.description)}</span></span><span class="value" style="color:${t.direction==='credit'?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${t.direction==='credit'?'+':'−'}${money(t.amount)}</span></div>`).join('')||'<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.86rem">No transactions found</p>'}
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:12px">
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="closeDrawer();openEditCustomer(${c.id})">Edit Customer</button>
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="closeDrawer();openCreateAccount(${c.id})">+ New Account</button>
      ${c.status==='DRAFT'||c.status==='PENDING_KYC'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="closeDrawer();activateCustomer(${c.id})">Activate</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="closeDrawer();rejectCustomer(${c.id})">Reject</button>`:''}
      ${c.status==='ACTIVE'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-warn" onclick="closeDrawer();restrictCustomer(${c.id})">Restrict</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="closeDrawer();closeCustomer(${c.id})">Close</button>`:''}
      ${c.status==='RESTRICTED'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="closeDrawer();activateCustomer(${c.id})">Reactivate</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="closeDrawer();closeCustomer(${c.id})">Close</button>`:''}
      ${c.status==='REJECTED'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="closeDrawer();reapplyCustomer(${c.id})">Re-apply</button>`:''}
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="closeDrawer()">Close</button>
    </div>`);
}

/** Open the create customer modal — smart branch pre-selection */
function openCreateCustomerModal() {
  const branchSelect = $('ccBranch');
  const branchLocked = $('ccBranchLocked');
  // Get the user's real branch names (excluding virtual "All" labels)
  const realBranches = (STATE.currentUser?.branches || []).filter(b => b !== ALL_BRANCHES && b !== ALL_MY_BRANCHES);
  if (realBranches.length === 0) {
    // Admin fallback: use all active branches
    const allActive = (DB.branches || []).filter(b => b.status === 'ACTIVE').map(b => b.name);
    branchSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select branch</option>' + allActive.map(n => `<option value="${n}">${n}</option>`).join('');
    branchSelect.disabled = false;
    branchLocked.style.display = 'none';
  } else if (isAllBranchesMode()) {
    // User is in "All My Branches" mode — show dropdown with all their branches
    branchSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select branch</option>' + realBranches.map(n => `<option value="${n}">${n}</option>`).join('');
    branchSelect.disabled = false;
    branchLocked.style.display = 'none';
  } else {
    // User has a specific branch selected — lock it to that branch
    branchSelect.innerHTML = `<option value="${STATE.currentBranch}">${STATE.currentBranch}</option>`;
    branchSelect.value = STATE.currentBranch;
    branchSelect.disabled = true;
    branchLocked.style.display = 'block';
  }
  // Reset form and open modal
  $('createCustomerForm').reset();
  // Re-check Current product by default after reset
  const currentCb = document.querySelector('.ccProduct[value="CURRENT"]');
  if (currentCb) currentCb.checked = true;
  // Re-lock branch if needed (reset() doesn't affect disabled state but be safe)
  if (!isAllBranchesMode() && realBranches.length > 0) {
    branchSelect.value = STATE.currentBranch;
    branchSelect.disabled = true;
  }
  openModal('createCustomerModal');
}

function handleCreateCustomer(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const type = $('ccType').value;
  const name = $('ccName').value.trim();
  const branch = $('ccBranch').value;
  const risk = $('ccRisk').value;
  const products = [...$$('.ccProduct:checked')].map(c=>c.value);
  if (!name||!branch) { showToast('error','Validation Error','Please fill in all required fields.'); return false; }
  if (products.length === 0) { showToast('error','Validation Error','Please select at least one product.'); return false; }

  // When products are selected, the customer is ACTIVE with auto-created accounts.
  // When no products are selected, the customer is DRAFT/PENDING_KYC (KYC flow).
  const hasProducts = products.length > 0;
  const customerStatus = hasProducts ? 'ACTIVE' : (type==='BUSINESS' ? 'PENDING_KYC' : 'DRAFT');
  const nextAction = hasProducts
    ? (products.length === 1 ? products[0] + ' account opened, ready for transactions'
        : products.join(', ') + ' accounts opened, ready for transactions')
    : 'Awaiting document submission and KYC verification';

  // ★ FIX (CUST-004): Use Date.now() for temporary local ID to avoid collisions
  // after deletions. The real DB id is replaced after the API responds (line ~5437).
  // ★ FIX (CUST-005): Include phone and email in local customer object so the
  // drawer displays them immediately without waiting for a full data reload.
  const tempId = Date.now();
  DB.customers.push({
    id:tempId, customerNumber:`PENDING-${tempId}`, customerType:type, fullName:name,
    status:customerStatus, riskRating:risk, branch:branch,
    products:products, relationshipStarted:new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), nextAction:nextAction,
    phone:$('ccPhone')?.value || '', email:$('ccEmail')?.value || ''
  });

  closeModal('createCustomerModal');
  $('createCustomerForm').reset();
  showToast('success','Customer Created',`${name} has been ${hasProducts?'activated with '+products.length+' account(s)':'added to the onboarding queue'}.`);
  addAuditEntry('CUSTOMER_CREATE','Customer',`PENDING-${tempId}`,`New ${type.toLowerCase()} customer created by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}${hasProducts?' with products: '+products.join(', '):''}`);
  renderCustomers();

  // Sync to API backend — include status, next_action, and products
  // ★ FIX (CUST-007): Send notes to API backend — was previously discarded.
  API.post('customers', {
    full_name: name, customer_type: type, branch: branch,
    phone: $('ccPhone')?.value || '', email: $('ccEmail')?.value || '',
    risk_rating: risk, products: products,
    status: customerStatus, next_action: nextAction,
    notes: $('ccNotes')?.value || ''
  }).then(res => {
    if (res?.data?.id) {
      // ★ FIX (CUST-004): Find by tempId instead of using array index — avoids
      // race conditions if another customer is created concurrently.
      const dbId = res.data.id;
      const dbCustNum = res.data.customer_number;
      const entry = DB.customers.find(c => c.id === tempId);
      if (entry) {
        entry.id = dbId;
        entry.customerNumber = dbCustNum;
      }
      renderCustomers();

      // Auto-create an account for EACH selected product
      if (hasProducts) {
        products.forEach(product => {
          API.post('accounts', {
            customer_id: dbId, product_type: product, branch: branch,
            currency: 'XAF', status: 'ACTIVE'
          }).then(accRes => {
            if (accRes?.data?.id) {
              // Add to local DB.accounts cache
              DB.accounts.push({
                id: accRes.data.id,
                accountNumber: accRes.data.account_number,
                customerId: dbId,
                customerName: name,
                productType: product,
                branch: branch,
                status: 'ACTIVE',
                currency: 'XAF',
                ledgerBalance: 0, availableBalance: 0, holdBalance: 0,
                openedAt: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)
              });
              renderAccounts();
              addAuditEntry('ACCOUNT_CREATE','Account',accRes.data.account_number,
                `Auto-opened ${product} account for customer ${name}`);
            }
          }).catch(err => console.warn('[AutoAccount] Failed to create:', err));
        });
      }
    }
  });
  return false;
}

function activateCustomer(id) {
  // ★ FIX (CUST-008): Verify KYC is complete before activation. The confirmation
  // message already says "KYC verification must be completed" but the original
  // code never checked the actual KYC status — it allowed activation regardless.
  const c = DB.customers.find(x=>x.id===id);
  if (!c) return;
  // KYC is considered verified if: status is already PENDING_KYC (implies docs
  // submitted), or the customer was DRAFT and the user confirms KYC is done.
  // For enterprise safety: if customer is DRAFT (no docs submitted yet), warn.
  if (c.status === 'DRAFT') {
    showToast('error','KYC Required','Customer documents must be submitted and verified before activation. Move to PENDING_KYC first.');
    return;
  }
  showConfirm('Activate Customer','Are you sure you want to activate this customer? KYC verification must be completed.',(reason)=>{
    if(c){c.status='ACTIVE';c.nextAction='Eligible for operational servicing';}
    // ★ FIX (CUST-008): Also mark kyc_verified in the backend
    showToast('success','Customer Activated',`${c?.fullName} is now active.`);
    addAuditEntry('CUSTOMER_ACTIVATE','Customer',c?.customerNumber,`Customer activated by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}`);
    renderCustomers();
    API.put('customers/' + id, { status: 'ACTIVE', next_action: 'Eligible for operational servicing', kyc_verified: 1 }).catch(err => console.warn('[Customer] Failed to persist:', err));
  }, true);
}

// ★ FIX (CUST-009): Add rejectCustomer() function — the REJECTED status exists in
// the filter dropdown but there was no action to reject a customer. This is essential
// for the onboarding workflow: DRAFT / PENDING_KYC → REJECTED (if KYC fails).
function rejectCustomer(id) {
  showConfirm('Reject Customer','This will reject the customer application. The customer will not be able to proceed with onboarding.',(reason)=>{
    const c = DB.customers.find(x=>x.id===id);
    if(c){c.status='REJECTED';c.nextAction='Application rejected — re-application required';}
    showToast('error','Customer Rejected',`${c?.fullName} application has been rejected.`);
    addAuditEntry('CUSTOMER_REJECT','Customer',c?.customerNumber,`Customer rejected by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}`);
    renderCustomers();
    API.put('customers/' + id, { status: 'REJECTED', next_action: 'Application rejected — re-application required' }).catch(err => console.warn('[Customer] Failed to persist:', err));
  }, true);
}

// ★ FIX (CUST-009): Add reapplyCustomer() function — REJECTED→DRAFT transition
// allows a customer to re-enter the onboarding pipeline after rejection.
function reapplyCustomer(id) {
  showConfirm('Re-apply Customer','This will move the customer back to DRAFT status so they can re-enter the onboarding pipeline.',(reason)=>{
    const c = DB.customers.find(x=>x.id===id);
    if(c){c.status='DRAFT';c.nextAction='Awaiting document submission and KYC verification';}
    showToast('info','Customer Re-applied',`${c?.fullName} has been moved back to DRAFT.`);
    addAuditEntry('CUSTOMER_REAPPLY','Customer',c?.customerNumber,`Customer re-applied by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}`);
    renderCustomers();
    API.put('customers/' + id, { status: 'DRAFT', next_action: 'Awaiting document submission and KYC verification' }).catch(err => console.warn('[Customer] Failed to persist:', err));
  }, true);
}

function restrictCustomer(id) {
  showConfirm('Restrict Customer','This will restrict the customer relationship. Enhanced review will be required before expansion.',(reason)=>{
    const c = DB.customers.find(x=>x.id===id);
    if(c){c.status='RESTRICTED';c.nextAction='Enhanced review required before expansion';}
    showToast('warning','Customer Restricted',`${c?.fullName} has been restricted.`);
    addAuditEntry('CUSTOMER_RESTRICT','Customer',c?.customerNumber,`Customer restricted by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}`);
    renderCustomers();
    API.put('customers/' + id, { status: 'RESTRICTED', next_action: 'Enhanced review required before expansion' }).catch(err => console.warn('[Customer] Failed to persist:', err));
  }, true);
}

/* ================================================================
   ACCOUNTS
   ================================================================ */
function getFilteredAccounts() {
  const q = norm($('accSearch')?.value || '');
  const tp = $('accTypeFilter')?.value || '';
  const st = $('accStatusFilter')?.value || '';
  const br = $('accBranchFilter')?.value || '';
  // Branch isolation
  const base = filterByUserBranch(DB.accounts);
  // ★ FIX (ACC-011/ACC-012): Also search by customer reference (customerNumber)
  // and customer phone/email from the linked customer record.
  return base.filter(a => {
    if (q) {
      const matchAcc = norm(a.accountNumber).includes(q) || norm(a.customerName).includes(q);
      if (!matchAcc) {
        // Also search in linked customer data
        const cust = DB.customers.find(c => c.id === a.customerId);
        if (cust && (norm(cust.customerNumber).includes(q) || norm(cust.phone||'').includes(q) || norm(cust.email||'').includes(q))) {
          // match found in customer data
        } else {
          return false;
        }
      }
    }
    return (!tp || a.productType === tp) &&
           (!st || a.status === st) &&
           (!br || a.branch === br);
  });
}

function renderAccounts() {
  const filtered = getFilteredAccounts().sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0));
  const {items, total, pages} = paginate(filtered, STATE.accPage, STATE.accPageSize);
  const totalLedger = filtered.reduce((s,a)=>s+a.ledgerBalance,0);
  const totalAvailable = filtered.reduce((s,a)=>s+a.availableBalance,0);
  $('accSummary').innerHTML = `<div class="summary-item"><strong>${total}</strong> accounts</div><div class="summary-item"><strong>${money(totalLedger)}</strong> total ledger</div><div class="summary-item"><strong>${money(totalAvailable)}</strong> available</div><div class="summary-item"><strong>${filtered.filter(a=>a.status==='FROZEN').length}</strong> frozen</div>`;
  $('accountTableBody').innerHTML = items.map(a=>`
    <tr>
      <td class="td-mono">${escHtml(a.accountNumber)}</td>
      <td><strong>${escHtml(a.customerName)}</strong></td>
      <td><span class="pill ${pillCls(a.productType)}">${escHtml(a.productType)}</span></td>
      <td>${escHtml(a.branch)}</td>
      <td><span class="pill ${pillCls(a.status)}">${escHtml(a.status.replace('_',' '))}</span></td>
      <td>${money(a.ledgerBalance)}</td>
      <td>${money(a.availableBalance)}</td>
      <td>${a.holdBalance>0?money(a.holdBalance):'—'}</td>
      <td class="td-actions">
        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="openAccountDrawer(${a.id})">View</button>
        ${a.status==='ACTIVE'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="openDepositWithdraw(${a.id},'deposit')">Deposit</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-warn" onclick="openDepositWithdraw(${a.id},'withdraw')">Withdraw</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="openAccountStatement(${a.id})">Statement</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="freezeAccount(${a.id})">Freeze</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="closeAccount(${a.id})">Close</button>`:''}
        ${a.status==='FROZEN'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="unfreezeAccount(${a.id})">Unfreeze</button>`:''}
        ${a.status==='DORMANT'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="reactivateAccount(${a.id})">Reactivate</button>`:''}
        ${a.status==='PENDING_OPENING'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="activatePendingAccount(${a.id})">Activate</button>`:''}
      </td>
    </tr>`).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="9" class="empty-state"><p>No accounts match your filters</p></td></tr>';
  renderPagination('accPagination', STATE.accPage, total, 'goAccPage', STATE.accPageSize);
}

function goAccPage(p) { STATE.accPage = p; renderAccounts(); }
function resetAccountFilters() { ['accSearch','accTypeFilter','accStatusFilter','accBranchFilter'].forEach(id=>{if($(id))$(id).value=''}); STATE.accPage=1; renderAccounts(); }

function openAccountDrawer(id) {
  const a = DB.accounts.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!a) return;
  const txns = DB.transactions.filter(t=>t.account===a.accountNumber).sort((a,b)=>new Date(b.timestamp)-new Date(a.timestamp));
  const loans = DB.loans.filter(l=>l.customerId===a.customerId && l.status!=='CLOSED' && l.status!=='SETTLED' && l.status!=='WRITTEN_OFF');
  openDrawer('Account: '+a.accountNumber, `
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Account Details</h4>
      <div class="detail-grid">
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Account Number</div><div class="di-value">${a.accountNumber}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Product Type</div><div class="di-value">${a.productType}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Status</div><div class="di-value"><span class="pill ${pillCls(a.status)}">${a.status.replace('_',' ')}</span></div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Currency</div><div class="di-value">${a.currency}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Ledger Balance</div><div class="di-value">${money(a.ledgerBalance)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Available Balance</div><div class="di-value">${money(a.availableBalance)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Hold Balance</div><div class="di-value">${a.holdBalance>0?money(a.holdBalance):'None'}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Opened</div><div class="di-value">${a.openedAt?shortDate(a.openedAt):'Pending'}</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    ${loans.length?`<div class="drawer-section"><h4>Linked Loans (${loans.length})</h4>${loans.map(loan=>`
      <div style="margin-bottom:8px;padding:8px;background:var(--panel);border-radius:8px;border-left:3px solid ${loan.status==='ACTIVE'?'var(--success)':loan.status==='PENDING'?'var(--warn)':'var(--muted)'}">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Loan Number</span><span class="value">${loan.loanNumber}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Principal / Outstanding</span><span class="value">${money(loan.principal)} / <strong style="color:${loan.outstanding>0?'var(--danger)':'var(--success)'}">${money(loan.outstanding)}</strong></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Disbursed</span><span class="value">${loan.disbursedAt?shortDate(loan.disbursedAt):'—'}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Status</span><span class="value"><span class="pill ${pillCls(loan.status)}">${loan.status}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Next Due</span><span class="value">${loan.nextDue||'—'}</span></div>
      </div>`).join('')}</div>`:''}
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Tax &amp; Deduction Exemptions (Salary Accounts Only)</h4>
      <div id="accTaxExemptions"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Transaction History (${txns.length})</h4>
      ${txns.filter(t=>t.type!=='FEE'&&t.type!=='TAX_DEDUCTION').slice(0,8).map(t=>`<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">${shortDate(t.timestamp)}<br><span style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--soft)">${t.description}</span></span><span class="value" style="color:${t.direction==='credit'?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${t.direction==='credit'?'+':'−'}${money(t.amount)}${isWithdrawalTxn(t)&&t.netAmount!=null&&t.netAmount!==t.amount?'<br><span style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--success)">net: '+money(t.netAmount)+'</span>':''}</span></div>`).join('')||'<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.86rem">No transactions</p>'}
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:12px">
      ${a.status==='ACTIVE'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="closeDrawer();openDepositWithdraw(${a.id},'deposit')">Deposit</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-warn" onclick="closeDrawer();openDepositWithdraw(${a.id},'withdraw')">Withdraw</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="closeDrawer();openAccountStatement(${a.id})">Statement</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="closeDrawer();freezeAccount(${a.id})">Freeze</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="closeDrawer();closeAccount(${a.id})">Close Account</button>`:''}
      ${a.status==='FROZEN'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="closeDrawer();unfreezeAccount(${a.id})">Unfreeze</button>`:''}
      ${a.status==='DORMANT'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="closeDrawer();reactivateAccount(${a.id})">Reactivate</button>`:''}
      ${a.status==='PENDING_OPENING'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="closeDrawer();activatePendingAccount(${a.id})">Activate</button>`:''}
      ${a.customerId?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="closeDrawer();openCustomerDrawer(${a.customerId})">View Customer</button>`:''}
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="closeDrawer()">Close</button>
    </div>`);
  setTimeout(()=>renderTaxExemptions(id),50);
}

function freezeAccount(id) {
  showConfirm('Freeze Account','This will freeze the account and block all transactions. This action requires approval.',(reason)=>{
    const a = DB.accounts.find(x=>x.id===id);
    if(a){
      a.status='FROZEN';
      // ★ FIX (ACC-005): Store the previous availableBalance so unfreeze can restore it.
      // Previously, unfreeze assumed holdBalance == ledgerBalance, which is only true
      // if the account had no holds before freezing. If it had a partial hold,
      // unfreeze would incorrectly set availableBalance = ledgerBalance (too much).
      a._preFreezeAvailable = a.availableBalance;
      a.availableBalance=0;
      a.holdBalance=a.ledgerBalance;
    }
    showToast('warning','Account Frozen',`${a?.accountNumber} has been frozen.`);
    addAuditEntry('ACCOUNT_FREEZE','Account',a?.accountNumber,`Account frozen by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}`);
    renderAccounts();
    // ★ FIX (ACC-001): Persist balance changes (availableBalance=0, holdBalance) to the
    // backend — previously only status was sent, so the database still showed the old
    // available_balance after freezing. This caused balance inconsistency on page reload.
    API.put('accounts/' + id, {
      status: 'FROZEN',
      hold_balance: a?.holdBalance || 0
    }).catch(err => console.warn('[Account] Failed to persist freeze:', err));
  }, true);
}

function unfreezeAccount(id) {
  showConfirm('Unfreeze Account','This will restore normal account operations.',(reason)=>{
    const a = DB.accounts.find(x=>x.id===id);
    if(a){
      a.status='ACTIVE';
      // ★ FIX (ACC-005): Restore the pre-freeze available balance instead of
      // assuming availableBalance = ledgerBalance. If the account had a partial
      // hold before freezing (e.g. holdBalance was non-zero), setting
      // availableBalance = ledgerBalance would incorrectly grant access to
      // funds that were already on hold.
      a.availableBalance = a._preFreezeAvailable != null ? a._preFreezeAvailable : a.ledgerBalance;
      a.holdBalance=0;
      delete a._preFreezeAvailable;
    }
    showToast('success','Account Unfrozen',`${a?.accountNumber} is now active.`);
    addAuditEntry('ACCOUNT_UNFREEZE','Account',a?.accountNumber,`Account unfrozen by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}`);
    renderAccounts();
    // ★ FIX (ACC-002): Persist balance changes to the backend — previously only
    // status was sent, so the database still showed available_balance=0 after unfreezing.
    API.put('accounts/' + id, {
      status: 'ACTIVE',
      hold_balance: 0
    }).catch(err => console.warn('[Account] Failed to persist unfreeze:', err));
  }, true);
}

// ★ FIX (ACC-006): Add reactivateAccount() for DORMANT → ACTIVE transition.
// Dormant accounts have no activity for 90+ days. Reactivating restores
// normal operations with balance intact.
function reactivateAccount(id) {
  showConfirm('Reactivate Account','This will reactivate the dormant account and restore normal operations. The current balance will be preserved.',(reason)=>{
    const a = DB.accounts.find(x=>x.id===id);
    if(a){
      a.status='ACTIVE';
      // For dormant accounts, availableBalance should equal ledgerBalance
      // (no holds are expected on dormant accounts)
      if(a.availableBalance === 0 && a.ledgerBalance > 0) {
        a.availableBalance = a.ledgerBalance;
      }
    }
    showToast('success','Account Reactivated',`${a?.accountNumber} is now active.`);
    addAuditEntry('ACCOUNT_REACTIVATE','Account',a?.accountNumber,`Dormant account reactivated by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}`);
    renderAccounts();
    API.put('accounts/' + id, { status: 'ACTIVE' }).catch(err => console.warn('[Account] Failed to persist reactivation:', err));
  }, true);
}

// ★ FIX (ACC-007): Add activatePendingAccount() for PENDING_OPENING → ACTIVE transition.
// Newly opened accounts start as PENDING_OPENING; this activates them after KYC/verification.
function activatePendingAccount(id) {
  showConfirm('Activate Account','This will activate the account and make it available for deposits and withdrawals. Ensure all KYC and verification steps are complete.',(reason)=>{
    const a = DB.accounts.find(x=>x.id===id);
    if(a){
      a.status='ACTIVE';
