      if(!a.openedAt) a.openedAt = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
    }
    showToast('success','Account Activated',`${a?.accountNumber} is now active and ready for transactions.`);
    addAuditEntry('ACCOUNT_ACTIVATE','Account',a?.accountNumber,`Pending account activated by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}`);
    renderAccounts();
    API.put('accounts/' + id, { status: 'ACTIVE' }).catch(err => console.warn('[Account] Failed to persist activation:', err));
  }, true);
}

function renderTaxExemptions(accountId) {
  const a = DB.accounts.find(x=>x.id===accountId);
  const container = $('accTaxExemptions');
  if(!container) return;
  if(!a || a.productType !== 'SALARY') {
    container.innerHTML = '<p style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">Tax exemptions only available for salary accounts.</p>';
    return;
  }
  const exemptions = a.taxExemptions || [];
  const deductionTypes = [
    {key:'tax.paye_rate', label:'PAYE Income Tax'},
    {key:'tax.cnps_retraite_employee', label:'CNPS Retraite (Employee)'},
    {key:'tax.cnps_prestations', label:'CNPS Prestations'},
    {key:'tax.citec_employee', label:'CITEC Logement (Employee)'},
    {key:'tax.stamp_duty_rate', label:'Stamp Duty / Droit de Timbre'},
    {key:'tax.union_dues_rate', label:'Union / Syndicat Dues'}
  ];
  container.innerHTML = deductionTypes.map(d => {
    const isExempt = exemptions.includes(d.key);
    return `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);font-size:.86rem">
      <span>${d.label}</span>
      <label class="toggle-switch" style="margin-left:12px">
        <input type="checkbox" ${isExempt?'checked':''} onchange="toggleAccountTaxExemption(${accountId},'${d.key}',this.checked)">
        <span class="toggle-slider"></span>
      </label>
      <span style="font-size:.76rem;color:${isExempt?'var(--warn)':'var(--success)'};min-width:70px;text-align:right">${isExempt?'EXEMPT':'Applied'}</span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('') + '<p style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--soft);margin-top:8px">Exempted deductions will NOT be deducted from this account\'s withdrawals and payslips.</p>';
}

function toggleAccountTaxExemption(accountId, taxKey, isExempt) {
  // ★ FIX (ST-086): Added RBAC gate — tax exemptions are admin-only.
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can modify tax exemptions.'); return; }
  const a = DB.accounts.find(x=>x.id===accountId);
  if(!a) return;
  if(!a.taxExemptions) a.taxExemptions = [];
  if(isExempt) {
    if(!a.taxExemptions.includes(taxKey)) a.taxExemptions.push(taxKey);
  } else {
    a.taxExemptions = a.taxExemptions.filter(k=>k!==taxKey);
  }
  renderTaxExemptions(accountId);
  const settingName = DB.settings.find(s=>s.key===taxKey)?.name || taxKey;
  showToast('success','Exemption Updated',`${settingName} ${isExempt?'exempted':'applied'} for ${a.accountNumber}.`);
  addAuditEntry('TAX_EXEMPTION_TOGGLE','Account',a.accountNumber,`Tax exemption for ${taxKey} ${isExempt?'enabled':'disabled'} on account ${a.accountNumber} by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}`);
  // Persist tax_exemptions to backend so they survive page refresh
  API.put('accounts/' + accountId, { tax_exemptions: a.taxExemptions }).catch(err => {
    console.warn('[Tax Exemption] Failed to persist to backend:', err);
  });
}

/* ================================================================
   DEPOSIT / WITHDRAW
   ================================================================ */
let STATE_DW = { type: 'deposit' };

function openDepositWithdraw(accountId, type) {
  const a = DB.accounts.find(x=>x.id===accountId);
  if(!a) return;
  if(a.status!=='ACTIVE') { showToast('error','Account Not Active','Deposits and withdrawals can only be made on active accounts.'); return; }
  $('dwAccountId').value = a.id;
  $('dwCurrentBalance').textContent = money(a.availableBalance);
  $('dwAfterBalance').textContent = '—';
  $('dwAmount').value = '';
  $('dwDescription').value = '';
  $('dwMemo').value = '';
  $('dwCategory').value = type==='deposit'?'Cash':'ATM';
  setTxnType(type);
  openModal('depositWithdrawModal');
}

function setTxnType(type) {
  STATE_DW.type = type;
  $('dwType').value = type;
  $('dwDepositBtn').className = 'txn-type-btn' + (type==='deposit'?' active-deposit':'');
  $('dwWithdrawBtn').className = 'txn-type-btn' + (type==='withdraw'?' active-withdraw':'');
  $('dwSubmitBtn').textContent = type==='deposit'?'Submit Deposit':'Submit Withdrawal';
  $('dwModalTitle').textContent = type==='deposit'?'Deposit Funds':'Withdraw Funds';
  updateBalancePreview();
}

function updateBalancePreview() {
  const a = DB.accounts.find(x=>x.id===Number($('dwAccountId').value));
  if(!a) return;
  const amt = Number($('dwAmount').value) || 0;
  const feeInfo = $('dwFeeInfo');
  const minWd = getMinimumWithdrawal();
  const maxWd = getMaximumDailyWithdrawal();
  if(STATE_DW.type === 'withdraw' && amt > 0) {
    if(amt < minWd) {
      $('dwAfterBalance').innerHTML = `<span style="color:var(--danger);font-size:.82rem">Minimum withdrawal: ${money(minWd)} FCFA</span>`;
      if(feeInfo) feeInfo.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }
    if(amt > maxWd) {
      $('dwAfterBalance').innerHTML = `<span style="color:var(--danger);font-size:.82rem">Maximum daily withdrawal: ${money(maxWd)} FCFA</span>`;
      if(feeInfo) feeInfo.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }
    const tax = calculateWithdrawalTaxes(amt, a.productType, a.id);
    const after = a.availableBalance - tax.totalDebit;
    let previewHtml = `<span style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)">Requested: ${money(amt)}</span>`;
    if(tax.fee > 0) previewHtml += ` <span style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--warn)">Bank Fee (${tax.feePct}%): ${money(tax.fee)}</span>`;
    if(tax.taxesEnabled) {
      previewHtml += ` <span style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--accent)">Taxes: ${money(tax.totalTax)}</span>`;
      previewHtml += ` <span style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--success)">Net: ${money(tax.netAmount)}</span>`;
    } else {
      if(tax.feeFromWithdrawal) previewHtml += ` <span style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--success)">You receive: ${money(tax.netAmount)}</span>`;
    }
    previewHtml += `<br>Balance after: <span style="color:${after<0?'var(--danger)':'var(--success)'}">${money(after)}</span> <span style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)">Total debit: ${money(tax.totalDebit)}</span> <span style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--soft)">(account: ${a.productType})</span>`;
    $('dwAfterBalance').innerHTML = previewHtml;
    // Detailed fee/tax info
    if(feeInfo) {
      let infoHtml = '';
      if(tax.fee > 0) {
        infoHtml += `<div style="margin-bottom:4px">Bank Fee: ${money(tax.fee)} (${tax.feePct}% of ${money(amt)}) — <strong>${tax.feeFromWithdrawal?'Deducted from withdrawal':'Charged to account separately'}</strong>.`;
        infoHtml += ` <span style="color:var(--primary);cursor:pointer" onclick="toggleWithdrawalFeeMode('${a.productType}')" title="Click to switch">[ Switch Mode ]</span></div>`;
      }
      if(tax.taxesEnabled && tax.breakdown.length > 0) {
        infoHtml += `<div style="margin-top:6px;padding:8px 10px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.06);border:1px solid rgba(103,232,181,.12);border-radius:8px;font-size:.78rem;line-height:1.8"><strong style="color:var(--accent)">Statutory Deductions:</strong><br>`;
        tax.breakdown.forEach(d => { infoHtml += `<span style="color:var(--text2)">${d.label}</span> <span style="color:var(--warn)">${d.rate}</span> = <strong style="color:var(--danger)">-${money(d.amount)}</strong><br>`; });
        infoHtml += `<strong style="color:var(--accent)">Total Tax: -${money(tax.totalTax)}</strong></div>`;
      }
      if(!tax.taxesEnabled) {
        const settingKey = 'tax.apply_on_' + a.productType.toLowerCase() + '_withdrawal';
        infoHtml += `<div style="margin-top:6px;font-size:.76rem;color:var(--soft)"><span class="pill pill-rejected" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="toggleTaxSetting('${settingKey}')" title="Click to enable taxes for ${a.productType}">Taxes OFF</span> <span style="cursor:pointer;color:var(--primary)" onclick="toggleTaxSetting('${settingKey}')">[Enable statutory deductions for ${a.productType} accounts]</span></div>`;
      }
      feeInfo.style.display = infoHtml ? 'block' : 'none';
      feeInfo.innerHTML = infoHtml;
    }
  } else {
    const after = STATE_DW.type==='deposit' ? a.availableBalance + amt : a.availableBalance - amt;
    $('dwAfterBalance').innerHTML = amt > 0
      ? `Balance after: <span style="color:${after<0?'var(--danger)':'var(--success)'}">${money(after)}</span>`
      : '—';
    if(feeInfo) feeInfo.style.display = 'none';
  }
}

/* ── Transaction type helpers ── */
// handleDepositWithdraw stores type as 'WITHDRAW' (from 'withdraw'.toUpperCase())
// but many checks compare against 'WITHDRAWAL'. This helper covers both.
// ★ FIX (TXN-008): Added 'CASH_WITHDRAWAL' — backend checks for this type
// in its withdrawal fee enforcement. If it's ever used, this helper must cover it.
function isWithdrawalTxn(t) { return t && (t.type === 'WITHDRAWAL' || t.type === 'WITHDRAW' || t.type === 'CASH_WITHDRAWAL'); }

/* Parse memo-encoded taxBreakdown. Format: {original_memo}|||TBK|||[{json}]
 * Returns { memo, taxBreakdown } where taxBreakdown is an array of deduction objects
 * or [] if no encoded data is found.
 */
function parseMemoTaxBreakdown(rawMemo) {
  if (!rawMemo || typeof rawMemo !== 'string') return { memo: rawMemo || '', taxBreakdown: [] };
  const delim = '|||TBK|||';
  const idx = rawMemo.lastIndexOf(delim);
  if (idx === -1) return { memo: rawMemo, taxBreakdown: [] };
  const memo = rawMemo.slice(0, idx);
  const jsonStr = rawMemo.slice(idx + delim.length);
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(jsonStr);
    if (Array.isArray(parsed)) return { memo, taxBreakdown: parsed };
  } catch(e) { /* not valid JSON, ignore */ }
  return { memo, taxBreakdown: [] };
}

/* Shared helper for all statement rendering functions.
 * Returns two Sets:
 *   hideSet  — indices of child FEE/TAX_DEDUCTION rows to completely HIDE from the statement.
 *              These are rows whose parent withdrawal has feeMode='WITHDRAWAL' (fee already
 *              included in the withdrawal amount — showing them as separate debits is misleading).
 *   skipBalSet — indices of child rows whose amount should NOT affect the running balance.
 *               For WITHDRAWAL mode, children are hidden so this is a superset of hideSet.
 *               For ACCOUNT mode, children are separate debits and MUST affect the balance.
 *
 * Also returns parentExpandMap: Map<parentIdx, {fee, totalTax, netAmount, feePct, feeMode}>
 * so that parent withdrawal rows can display an inline deduction breakdown.
 */
function buildStatementChildSets(periodTxns) {
  const hideSet = new Set();
  const skipBalSet = new Set();
  const parentExpandMap = new Map();
  periodTxns.forEach((t, i) => {
    if ((t.type === 'FEE' || t.type === 'TAX_DEDUCTION') && t.direction === 'debit') {
      for (let j = i - 1; j >= 0; j--) {
        const prev = periodTxns[j];
        if (prev.account === t.account && isWithdrawalTxn(prev)) {
          const feeMode = prev.feeMode || 'WITHDRAWAL';
          if (feeMode === 'WITHDRAWAL') {
            // Fee/tax is deducted FROM the withdrawal amount.
            // The parent withdrawal's amount IS the total debit.
            // Hide these child rows entirely — show breakdown inside parent instead.
            hideSet.add(i);
            skipBalSet.add(i);
            // Record parent expansion data
            if (!parentExpandMap.has(j)) {
              parentExpandMap.set(j, {
                fee: prev.fee || 0,
                totalTax: prev.totalTax || 0,
                netAmount: prev.netAmount != null ? prev.netAmount : prev.amount,
                feePct: prev.feePct || 0,
                feeMode: feeMode,
                taxBreakdown: prev.taxBreakdown || []
              });
            }
          }
          // ACCOUNT mode: fee/tax are separate debits — show them, include in balance
          break;
        }
      }
    }
  });
  return { hideSet, skipBalSet, parentExpandMap };
}

/* Compute the correct net balance impact for each transaction in a sorted list.
 * For WITHDRAWAL-mode children (fee/tax deducted from withdrawal): net = 0 (already in parent amount).
 * For ACCOUNT-mode children (fee/tax charged separately): net = -amount (separate debit).
 * Returns a Float64Array of the same length as txns.
 */
function computeTxnNets(txns) {
  const nets = new Float64Array(txns.length);
  for (let i = 0; i < txns.length; i++) {
    const t = txns[i];
    if (t.type === 'FEE' || t.type === 'TAX_DEDUCTION') {
      // Look back for parent withdrawal to determine feeMode
      let feeMode = 'WITHDRAWAL'; // default
      for (let j = i - 1; j >= 0; j--) {
        if (txns[j].account === t.account && isWithdrawalTxn(txns[j])) {
          feeMode = txns[j].feeMode || 'WITHDRAWAL';
          break;
        }
      }
      // ACCOUNT mode: fee/tax is a separate debit from the account
      // WITHDRAWAL mode: fee/tax is already included in the parent withdrawal amount
      nets[i] = feeMode === 'ACCOUNT' ? (t.direction === 'credit' ? t.amount : -t.amount) : 0;
    } else {
      nets[i] = t.direction === 'credit' ? t.amount : -t.amount;
    }
  }
  return nets;
}

function _findSetting(key) {
  // Case-insensitive lookup — the DB may store fee_mode keys with uppercase
  // product type (e.g. withdrawal.fee_mode_SALARY) while the fee % keys use
  // lowercase (e.g. withdrawal.fee_salary). This helper finds the match either way.
  let s = DB.settings.find(x=>x.key===key);
  if (s) return s;
  s = DB.settings.find(x=>x.key.toLowerCase()===key.toLowerCase());
  return s;
}

function getWithdrawalFeePct(productType) {
  const key = 'withdrawal.fee_' + productType.toLowerCase();
  const s = _findSetting(key);
  return s ? Number(s.value) : 0;
}

function getWithdrawalFeeMode(productType) {
  const key = 'withdrawal.fee_mode_' + productType.toUpperCase();
  const s = _findSetting(key);
  return s ? s.value : 'WITHDRAWAL'; // WITHDRAWAL = deduct from amount, ACCOUNT = charge on top
}

function toggleWithdrawalFeeMode(productType) {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can modify fee modes.'); return; }
  const key = 'withdrawal.fee_mode_' + productType.toUpperCase();
  const s = _findSetting(key);
  if(!s) return;
  const oldVal = s.value;
  const newVal = oldVal === 'WITHDRAWAL' ? 'ACCOUNT' : 'WITHDRAWAL';
  const _fmPayload = { key: s.key, value: newVal };
  if (s.effectiveFrom) _fmPayload.effective_from = s.effectiveFrom;
  // ★ FIX (ST-076): Persist to backend BEFORE updating local state. Previously updated
  // s.value immediately then fire-and-forget the API call, causing stale data on API failure.
  API.put('settings', _fmPayload).then(() => {
    s.value = newVal;
    renderSettings();
    renderTaxSettings();
    showToast('success','Fee Mode Updated', productType+' accounts: fee will now be '+(s.value==='WITHDRAWAL'?'deducted FROM the withdrawal amount':'charged to the bank account ON TOP of the withdrawal')+'.');
    addAuditEntry('FEE_MODE_TOGGLE','Setting',key,'Fee mode for '+productType+' set to '+s.value+' by '+STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
  }).catch(err => {
    console.warn('[Fee Mode] Failed to persist to backend:', err);
    showToast('error','Save Failed','Failed to toggle fee mode. Please try again.');
  });
}

/* ================================================================
   WITHDRAWAL TAX / DEDUCTION ENGINE
   All rates are configurable via Settings > Withdrawal Taxes & Fees
   ================================================================ */
function getTaxSetting(key, fallback) {
  // ★ FIXED: Use case-insensitive _findSetting() to match DB keys regardless of casing.
  // Settings keys may be stored with mixed case (e.g. Tax.CNPS_Retraite vs tax.cnps_retraite).
  const s = _findSetting(key);
  return s ? Number(s.value) : fallback;
}
function getTaxSettingStr(key, fallback) {
  // ★ FIXED: Use case-insensitive _findSetting() for string settings too.
  const s = _findSetting(key);
  return s ? s.value : fallback;
}
function taxesApplyToAccount(productType) {
  const key = 'tax.apply_on_' + productType.toLowerCase() + '_withdrawal';
  return getTaxSettingStr(key, 'NO') === 'YES';
}
// ★ FIX (ST-012): Corrected setting keys to match backend seed values.
// Previously used non-existent keys 'tax.minimum_withdrawal'/'tax.maximum_daily_withdrawal',
// causing minimum to fall back to 1000 FCFA instead of regulatory 5000 FCFA.
function getMinimumWithdrawal() { return getTaxSetting('withdrawal.minimum_salary', 5000); }
function getMaximumDailyWithdrawal() { return getTaxSetting('withdrawal.maximum_daily_salary', 2000000); }

function calculateWithdrawalTaxes(amount, productType, accountId) {
  const taxesEnabled = taxesApplyToAccount(productType);
  const result = { taxesEnabled, breakdown: [], totalTax: 0, netAmount: amount, fee: 0, feePct: 0 };

  // Get account-level exemptions
  let exemptions = [];
  if (accountId) {
    const acc = DB.accounts.find(x => x.id === accountId);
    if (acc) exemptions = acc.taxExemptions || [];
  }

  // Withdrawal fee (separate from tax exemptions)
  result.feePct = getWithdrawalFeePct(productType);
  const feeMode = getWithdrawalFeeMode(productType);
  result.fee = exemptions.includes('withdrawal.fee') ? 0 : Math.round(amount * result.feePct / 100);
  result.feeFromWithdrawal = feeMode === 'WITHDRAWAL';

  if (!taxesEnabled) {
    result.totalDebit = result.feeFromWithdrawal ? amount : amount + result.fee;
    result.netAmount = result.feeFromWithdrawal ? amount - result.fee : amount;
    return result;
  }

  // Compute taxable deductions from gross amount
  const payeRate = getTaxSetting('tax.paye_rate', 7.50) / 100;
  const cnpsRetraiteRate = getTaxSetting('tax.cnps_retraite_employee', 4.80) / 100;
  // ★ FIX (ST-010): Fallback corrected from 1.70% to 7.00% to match backend seed.
  // Previously, a missing setting would cause 75.7% under-calculation of this
  // statutory employer contribution — a Cameroon CNPS regulatory violation.
  const cnpsPrestationsRate = getTaxSetting('tax.cnps_prestations', 7.00) / 100;
  const citecRate = getTaxSetting('tax.citec_employee', 1.00) / 100;
  const stampDutyRate = getTaxSetting('tax.stamp_duty_rate', 0.50) / 100;
  const consolidatedReliefAnnual = getTaxSetting('tax.consolidated_relief_annual', 200000);
  const percReliefRate = getTaxSetting('tax.percentage_relief_rate', 20.00) / 100;
  const unionDuesRate = getTaxSetting('tax.union_dues_rate', 1.00) / 100;

  const basicSalary = amount;
  const payeExempt = exemptions.includes('tax.paye_rate');
  const cnpsRetraiteExempt = exemptions.includes('tax.cnps_retraite_employee');
  const cnpsPrestationsExempt = exemptions.includes('tax.cnps_prestations');
  const citecExempt = exemptions.includes('tax.citec_employee');
  const stampDutyExempt = exemptions.includes('tax.stamp_duty_rate');
  const unionDuesExempt = exemptions.includes('tax.union_dues_rate');

  const cnpsRetraite = cnpsRetraiteExempt ? 0 : Math.round(basicSalary * cnpsRetraiteRate);
  const cnpsPrestations = cnpsPrestationsExempt ? 0 : Math.round(basicSalary * cnpsPrestationsRate);
  const citec = citecExempt ? 0 : Math.round(basicSalary * citecRate);
  const stampDuty = stampDutyExempt ? 0 : Math.round(basicSalary * stampDutyRate);
  const unionDues = unionDuesExempt ? 0 : Math.round(basicSalary * unionDuesRate);

  const monthlyRelief = Math.round(consolidatedReliefAnnual / 12);
  const percRelief = Math.round(basicSalary * percReliefRate);
  const taxableIncome = Math.max(0, basicSalary - monthlyRelief - percRelief - cnpsRetraite - citec);
  const payeTax = payeExempt ? 0 : Math.round(taxableIncome * payeRate);

  result.breakdown = [
    { label: 'PAYE Income Tax', rate: (payeRate * 100).toFixed(2) + '%', amount: payeTax, key: 'tax.paye_rate', exempt: payeExempt },
    { label: 'CNPS Retraite (Employee)', rate: (cnpsRetraiteRate * 100).toFixed(2) + '%', amount: cnpsRetraite, key: 'tax.cnps_retraite_employee', exempt: cnpsRetraiteExempt },
    { label: 'CNPS Prestations', rate: (cnpsPrestationsRate * 100).toFixed(2) + '%', amount: cnpsPrestations, key: 'tax.cnps_prestations', exempt: cnpsPrestationsExempt },
    { label: 'CITEC Logement (Employee)', rate: (citecRate * 100).toFixed(2) + '%', amount: citec, key: 'tax.citec_employee', exempt: citecExempt },
    { label: 'Stamp Duty / Droit de Timbre', rate: (stampDutyRate * 100).toFixed(2) + '%', amount: stampDuty, key: 'tax.stamp_duty_rate', exempt: stampDutyExempt },
    { label: 'Union / Syndicat Dues', rate: (unionDuesRate * 100).toFixed(2) + '%', amount: unionDues, key: 'tax.union_dues_rate', exempt: unionDuesExempt }
  ];

  result.totalTax = result.breakdown.reduce((s, d) => s + d.amount, 0);

  if (result.feeFromWithdrawal) {
    result.netAmount = amount - result.fee - result.totalTax;
    result.totalDebit = amount;
  } else {
    result.netAmount = amount - result.totalTax;
    result.totalDebit = amount + result.fee;
  }
  return result;
}

function toggleTaxSetting(key) {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can modify tax settings.'); return; }
  // ★ FIX (ST-016): Use case-insensitive _findSetting() instead of exact match.
  // Previously used DB.settings.find(x=>x.key===key) which fails if casing differs.
  const s = _findSetting(key);
  if(!s) return;
  const oldVal = s.value;
  const newVal = oldVal === 'YES' ? 'NO' : 'YES';
  const _tsPayload = { key: s.key, value: newVal };
  if (s.effectiveFrom) _tsPayload.effective_from = s.effectiveFrom;
  // ★ FIX (ST-075): Persist to backend BEFORE updating local state. Previously updated
  // s.value immediately then fire-and-forget the API call, causing stale data on API failure.
  API.put('settings', _tsPayload).then(() => {
    s.value = newVal;
    renderTaxSettings();
    renderSettings();
    showToast('success','Tax Setting Updated', s.name + ' set to ' + s.value);
    addAuditEntry('TAX_SETTING_TOGGLE','Setting',key, s.name + ' set to '+s.value+' by '+STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
  }).catch(err => {
    console.warn('[Tax Setting] Failed to persist to backend:', err);
    showToast('error','Save Failed','Failed to toggle tax setting. Please try again.');
  });
}

async function handleDepositWithdraw(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const id = Number($('dwAccountId').value);
  const a = DB.accounts.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!a) return false;
  const amount = Number($('dwAmount').value);
  const desc = $('dwDescription').value.trim();
  let category = $('dwCategory').value;
  const memo = $('dwMemo').value.trim();
  const type = STATE_DW.type;
  // Enterprise: Salary deposits to SALARY accounts are tagged as 'Payroll Credit' for payslip matching
  if (type === 'deposit' && category === 'Salary' && a.productType === 'SALARY') {
    category = 'Payroll Credit';
  }
  if(!amount || amount <= 0) { showToast('error','Validation Error','Please enter a valid amount.'); return false; }
  if(type === 'withdraw') {
    const minWd = getMinimumWithdrawal();
    if(amount < minWd) { showToast('error','Below Minimum','Minimum withdrawal amount is '+money(minWd)+' FCFA.'); return false; }
    const maxWd = getMaximumDailyWithdrawal();
    if(amount > maxWd) { showToast('error','Above Maximum','Maximum daily withdrawal is '+money(maxWd)+' FCFA. Please contact your branch for higher limits.'); return false; }
  }
  // Calculate withdrawal taxes and fees using configurable engine
  let fee = 0, feePct = 0, netDisbursement = amount, totalDebit = amount, feeFromWithdrawal = true;
  let taxBreakdown = [], totalTax = 0, taxesEnabled = false;
  if(type === 'withdraw') {
    const taxResult = calculateWithdrawalTaxes(amount, a.productType, a.id);
    fee = taxResult.fee;
    feePct = taxResult.feePct;
    feeFromWithdrawal = taxResult.feeFromWithdrawal;
    netDisbursement = taxResult.netAmount;
    totalDebit = taxResult.totalDebit;
    taxBreakdown = taxResult.breakdown;
    totalTax = taxResult.totalTax;
    taxesEnabled = taxResult.taxesEnabled;
  }
  if(type==='withdraw' && totalDebit > a.availableBalance) { showToast('error','Insufficient Funds','Total debit of '+money(totalDebit)+(feeFromWithdrawal?' (withdrawal includes fee'+(taxesEnabled?' and taxes':'')+')':' (withdrawal '+money(amount)+' + fee '+money(fee)+(taxesEnabled?' + taxes '+money(totalTax):'')+')')+' exceeds available balance of '+money(a.availableBalance)); return false; }
  // ★ FIX (ACC-004): Use Date.now() for temporary local ID to avoid collisions.
  // The real DB id is replaced after the API responds (line ~6210).
  const tempId = Date.now();
  const newRef = 'PENDING-' + tempId;
  const direction = type==='deposit'?'credit':'debit';
  const newTxn = {
    id: tempId, ref: newRef, type: type.toUpperCase(),
    status: 'POSTED', branch: a.branch, account: a.accountNumber,
    accountType: a.productType, customerName: a.customerName,
    description: desc, category: category, direction: direction,
    // ★ FIX (TXN-007): Removed redundant ternary — both branches returned `amount`.
    // Original: `type==='withdraw' ? (feeFromWithdrawal ? amount : amount) : amount`
    // Simplified to just `amount` for clarity.
    amount: amount,
    memo: (memo || (type+' transaction')) + (taxBreakdown.length > 0 ? '|||TBK|||' + JSON.stringify(taxBreakdown) : ''),
    fee: fee, feePct: feePct, feeMode: feeFromWithdrawal ? 'WITHDRAWAL' : 'ACCOUNT', netAmount: type==='withdraw' ? netDisbursement : amount,
    totalTax: totalTax, taxesEnabled: taxesEnabled, taxBreakdown: taxBreakdown,
    module: 'Teller', timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
  };
  DB.transactions.push(newTxn);
  // ★ CRITICAL FIX: AWAIT the database save BEFORE showing any success feedback.
  // Previously this was fire-and-forget — the success toast/receipt showed immediately
  // even when the backend API call silently failed. Now we await confirmation.
  console.log('[DW] Sending transaction to database:', newTxn.type, direction, money(amount), '→', a.accountNumber);
  let saveResult;
  try {
    saveResult = await API.post('transactions', {
      type: type.toUpperCase(), direction: direction, amount: amount, account: a.accountNumber,
      account_type: a.productType, customer_name: a.customerName,
      description: desc, category: category, branch: a.branch,
      module: 'Transactions', fee: fee, fee_pct: feePct,
      fee_mode: type==='withdraw' ? (feeFromWithdrawal ? 'WITHDRAWAL' : 'ACCOUNT') : '',
      net_amount: type==='withdraw' ? netDisbursement : amount,
      total_debit: type==='withdraw' ? totalDebit : amount,
      total_tax: totalTax,
      status: 'POSTED'
    });
  } catch(apiErr) {
    console.error('[DW] API.post threw exception:', apiErr);
    saveResult = null;
  }
  // ★ Verify backend confirmed the save
  if (!saveResult || !saveResult.data || !saveResult.data.id) {
    console.error('[DW] Database save FAILED. Response:', saveResult);
    // Rollback: remove from in-memory cache — transaction was NOT saved
    const idx = DB.transactions.findIndex(t => t.ref === newRef);
    if (idx >= 0) DB.transactions.splice(idx, 1);
    showToast('error','Database Save Failed','The transaction could not be saved to the database. Please check your server connection (XAMPP MySQL must be running) and try again. If the problem persists, check the Apache error log at xampp/apache/logs/error.log');
    renderTransactions();
    return false;
  }
  // Backend confirmed — update the in-memory record with the real DB id
  newTxn.id = saveResult.data.id;
  newTxn.ref = saveResult.data.ref || newTxn.ref;
  // ★ SERVER-SIDE FEE SYNC: If the backend returned server-calculated fees,
  // override the local values to stay in sync with the database.
  // The backend independently calculates fees from settings — the frontend values
  // are advisory only. This ensures the receipt/statement show the actual fees stored.
  if (saveResult.data.server_fee !== undefined) {
    const srvFee = saveResult.data.server_fee;
    const srvFeePct = saveResult.data.server_fee_pct || 0;
    const srvFeeMode = saveResult.data.server_fee_mode || 'WITHDRAWAL';
    const srvNetAmount = saveResult.data.server_net_amount;
    const srvTotalDebit = saveResult.data.server_total_debit;
    // Only override if server actually calculated fees (non-zero or different)
    if (srvFee !== fee || srvFeePct !== feePct) {
      console.log('[DW] Server-side fee override: client fee='+fee+'/'+feePct+'% → server fee='+srvFee+'/'+srvFeePct+'%');
    }
    fee = srvFee;
    feePct = srvFeePct;
    feeFromWithdrawal = srvFeeMode === 'WITHDRAWAL';
    netDisbursement = srvNetAmount !== null ? srvNetAmount : netDisbursement;
    totalDebit = srvTotalDebit !== null ? srvTotalDebit : totalDebit;
    // Update the in-memory transaction with server values
    newTxn.fee = fee;
    newTxn.feePct = feePct;
    newTxn.feeMode = srvFeeMode;
    newTxn.netAmount = netDisbursement;
    newTxn.amount = amount; // original gross amount stays
  }
  console.log('[DW] Database confirmed. ID:', newTxn.id, 'Ref:', newTxn.ref, 'Fee:', fee, 'Net:', netDisbursement);
  // Create separate fee transaction if fee > 0
  let feeTxn = null;
  if(fee > 0) {
    const feeTempId = Date.now() + 1;
    const feeRef = 'PENDING-' + feeTempId;
    feeTxn = {
      id: feeTempId, ref: feeRef, type: 'FEE',
      status: 'POSTED', branch: a.branch, account: a.accountNumber,
      accountType: a.productType, customerName: a.customerName,
      description: 'Withdrawal fee ('+feePct+'% of '+money(amount)+')',
      category: 'Withdrawal Fee', direction: 'debit',
      amount: fee, memo: 'Fee for '+newTxn.ref+': '+(feeFromWithdrawal?'deducted from withdrawal':'charged to account')+'. '+feePct+'% of '+money(amount)+' = '+money(fee)+'. '+(feeFromWithdrawal?'Net disbursement: '+money(netDisbursement)+'.':'Total debit: '+money(totalDebit)+'.')+' [Parent: '+newTxn.ref+']',
      fee: 0, feePct: 0, _parentId: newTxn.id,
      module: 'Fees', timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    DB.transactions.push(feeTxn);
    /* Sync fee transaction to database */
    // CRITICAL: Only send as POSTED when feeMode=ACCOUNT (separate debit from account).
    // When feeMode=WITHDRAWAL, fee is already included in the main withdrawal amount —
    // sending as POSTED would cause the backend to double-debit the account.
    const feeSyncStatus = feeFromWithdrawal ? 'PENDING' : 'POSTED';
    API.post('transactions', {
      type: 'FEE', direction: 'debit', amount: fee,
      account: a.accountNumber, account_type: a.productType,
      customer_name: a.customerName,
      description: feeTxn.description, category: 'Withdrawal Fee',
      branch: a.branch, module: 'Fees',
      fee: 0, fee_pct: 0, fee_mode: 'WITHDRAWAL',
      net_amount: fee, total_debit: fee, total_tax: 0,
      status: feeSyncStatus,
      parent_id: newTxn.id  // ★ FIX (TXN-002): Link child to parent for reliable reversal matching
    }).then(res => { if(res?.data?.id) { feeTxn.id = res.data.id; } }).catch(()=>{});
    /* Record withdrawal fee as profit — ★ SKIPPED on purpose.
       The backend (transactions.php) now writes directly to profit_ledger inside
       the transaction POST handler. This is the enterprise-grade approach: the
       server is the single source of truth. The frontend's recordProfitEntry()
       call has been removed to prevent duplicate entries.
       See: transactions.php lines 422-487 (server-side profit ledger recording). */
  }
  // Create separate tax transaction if taxes > 0
  let taxTxn = null;
  if(taxesEnabled && totalTax > 0) {
    const taxTempId = Date.now() + 2;
    const taxRef = 'PENDING-' + taxTempId;
    const taxDesc = taxBreakdown.map(d => d.label + ' ' + d.rate + '=' + money(d.amount)).join('; ');
    taxTxn = {
      id: taxTempId, ref: taxRef, type: 'TAX_DEDUCTION',
      status: 'POSTED', branch: a.branch, account: a.accountNumber,
      accountType: a.productType, customerName: a.customerName,
      description: 'Statutory deductions on withdrawal',
      category: 'Tax Deduction', direction: 'debit',
      amount: totalTax, memo: 'Tax for '+newTxn.ref+': '+taxDesc + '. Total tax: '+money(totalTax)+'. Gross: '+money(amount)+'. Net: '+money(netDisbursement)+'. [Parent: '+newTxn.ref+']',
      fee: 0, feePct: 0, _parentId: newTxn.id,
      module: 'Tax', timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    DB.transactions.push(taxTxn);
    /* Sync tax transaction to database */
    // CRITICAL: Only send as POSTED when feeMode=ACCOUNT (separate debit from account).
    // When feeMode=WITHDRAWAL, taxes are already included in the main withdrawal amount —
    // sending as POSTED would cause the backend to double-debit the account.
    const taxSyncStatus = feeFromWithdrawal ? 'PENDING' : 'POSTED';
    API.post('transactions', {
      type: 'TAX_DEDUCTION', direction: 'debit', amount: totalTax,
      account: a.accountNumber, account_type: a.productType,
      customer_name: a.customerName,
      description: taxTxn.description, category: 'Tax Deduction',
      branch: a.branch, module: 'Tax',
      fee: 0, fee_pct: 0, fee_mode: 'WITHDRAWAL',
      net_amount: totalTax, total_debit: totalTax, total_tax: 0,
      status: taxSyncStatus,
      parent_id: newTxn.id  // ★ FIX (TXN-002): Link child to parent for reliable reversal matching
    }).then(res => { if(res?.data?.id) { taxTxn.id = res.data.id; } }).catch(()=>{});
  }
  // Update in-memory account balance (backend already updated atomically in POST handler)
  if(type==='deposit') { a.ledgerBalance += amount; a.availableBalance += amount; }
  else { a.ledgerBalance -= totalDebit; a.availableBalance -= totalDebit; }
  const customer = DB.customers.find(c=>c.id===a.customerId);
  let auditDetail = `${type==='deposit'?'Deposit of':'Withdrawal of'} ${money(amount)} from ${a.accountNumber} (${a.customerName}) by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Category: ${category}. Description: ${desc}`;
  if(fee>0) auditDetail += ` Fee: ${money(fee)} (${feePct}%).`;
  if(totalTax>0) auditDetail += ` Statutory Tax: ${money(totalTax)}.`;
  auditDetail += ` Net: ${money(netDisbursement)}. Total Debit: ${money(totalDebit)}.`;
  addAuditEntry(type==='deposit'?'ACCOUNT_DEPOSIT':'ACCOUNT_WITHDRAWAL','Account',a.accountNumber, auditDetail);
  STATE.lastTransaction = newTxn;
  STATE.lastTransactionAccount = a;
  STATE.lastTransactionBalance = a.availableBalance;
  STATE.lastFeeTxn = feeTxn;
  STATE.lastTaxTxn = taxTxn;
  closeModal('depositWithdrawModal');
  let successMsg = `${money(amount)} ${type==='deposit'?'deposited to':'debited from'} ${a.accountNumber}.`;
  if(fee>0) successMsg += ` Fee: ${money(fee)} (${feePct}%).`;
  if(totalTax>0) successMsg += ` Tax: ${money(totalTax)}.`;
  successMsg += ` Net: ${money(netDisbursement)}. New balance: ${money(a.availableBalance)}`;
  showToast('success',type==='deposit'?'Deposit Posted':'Withdrawal Processed', successMsg);
  showTransactionSuccess(newTxn, a, a.availableBalance, type, fee, feePct, feeTxn);
  renderAccounts();
  renderTransactions();
  renderDashboard();
  return false;
}

function showTransactionSuccess(txn, account, newBalance, type, fee, feePct, feeTxn) {
  const isDeposit = type === 'deposit';
  const hasFee = fee > 0;
  $('tsModalTitle').textContent = isDeposit ? 'Deposit Successful' : 'Withdrawal Successful';
  $('tsSuccessIcon').innerHTML = '&#10003;';
  $('tsDetails').innerHTML = `
    <div class="detail-grid">
      <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Transaction Type</div><div class="di-value" style="color:${isDeposit?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${isDeposit?'CREDIT':'DEBIT'}</div></div>
      <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Amount</div><div class="di-value" style="font-size:1.2rem">${money(txn.amount)}</div></div>
      <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Reference</div><div class="di-value td-mono" style="font-size:.82rem">${txn.ref}</div></div>
      <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Account</div><div class="di-value" style="font-size:.84rem">${txn.account}</div></div>
      <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Account Name</div><div class="di-value">${txn.customerName}</div></div>
      <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">New Balance</div><div class="di-value">${money(newBalance)}</div></div>
    </div>
    ${hasFee?`<div style="margin-top:10px;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--warn-dim);border:1px solid rgba(255,190,105,.2)">
      <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--warn);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:6px">Withdrawal Fee Applied</div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Fee Rate (${account.productType})</span><span class="value" style="color:var(--warn)">${feePct}%</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Fee Amount</span><span class="value" style="color:var(--warn)">${money(fee)}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Fee Mode</span><span class="value" style="font-size:.82rem;color:${(txn.feeMode||'WITHDRAWAL')==='WITHDRAWAL'?'var(--success)':'var(--warn)'}">${(txn.feeMode||'WITHDRAWAL')==='WITHDRAWAL'?'From Withdrawal':'From Account'}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Requested Amount</span><span class="value">${money(txn.amount)}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Net Disbursement</span><span class="value" style="font-weight:700;color:var(--success)">${money(txn.netAmount != null ? txn.netAmount : txn.amount)}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Total Debited</span><span class="value" style="font-weight:700">${money((txn.feeMode||'WITHDRAWAL')==='WITHDRAWAL' ? txn.amount : txn.amount + fee)}</span></div>
      ${feeTxn?`<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Fee Reference</span><span class="value td-mono" style="font-size:.78rem">${feeTxn.ref}</span></div>`:''}
    </div>`:''}
    <div style="margin-top:10px;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)">
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Purpose / Description</span><span class="value">${txn.description || 'N/A'}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Category</span><span class="value">${txn.category}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Date / Time</span><span class="value">${dateFmt(txn.timestamp)}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Operator</span><span class="value">${STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System'}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Branch</span><span class="value">${txn.branch}</span></div>
      ${txn.memo?`<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Memo</span><span class="value" style="max-width:60%;font-size:.82rem">${escHtml(parseMemoTaxBreakdown(txn.memo).memo)}</span></div>`:''}
    </div>`;
  const isSalaryWithdrawal = account.productType === 'SALARY' && !isDeposit;
  $('tsPrintPayslipBtn').style.display = isSalaryWithdrawal ? 'inline-flex' : 'none';
  openModal('transactionSuccessModal');
}

/* ================================================================
   TRANSACTION RECEIPT PRINTING — Enterprise Grade
   ================================================================ */
function printTransactionReceipt() {
  const txn = STATE.lastTransaction;
  const account = STATE.lastTransactionAccount;
  if(!txn) { showToast('error','Error','No transaction data available for printing.'); return; }
  const isDeposit = txn.type === 'DEPOSIT';
  const customer = DB.customers.find(c=>c.id===account?.customerId);
  const branch = DB.branches.find(b=>b.name===txn.branch);
  const hasFee = txn.fee > 0;
  const b = DB.bankBranding || {};

  // Generate unique receipt document number and register
  const receiptDocNumber = generateDocumentNumber('RCPT');
  const receiptDocRecord = registerDocument({
    documentNumber: receiptDocNumber,
    type: 'RECEIPT',
    subtype: isDeposit ? 'DEPOSIT_RECEIPT' : 'WITHDRAWAL_RECEIPT',
    accountNumber: txn.account,
    customerId: account?.customerId || 0,
    customerName: txn.customerName,
    branch: txn.branch,
    periodFrom: txn.timestamp.slice(0,10),
    periodTo: txn.timestamp.slice(0,10),
    operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
    generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    printCount: 0,
    lastPrintedAt: null,
    exportCount: 0,
    lastExportedAt: null,
    summary: {
      totalTransactions: 0,
      openingBalance: 0,
      closingBalance: account?.availableBalance || 0,
      totalCredits: 0,
      totalDebits: 0,
      grossPay: 0,
      netPay: 0,
      totalDeductions: 0,
      amount: txn.amount,
      transactionRef: txn.ref
    },
    status: 'ACTIVE'
  });
  STATE.lastReceiptDocId = receiptDocRecord.id;
  receiptDocRecord.printCount = 1;
  receiptDocRecord.lastPrintedAt = new Date().toISOString();

  const sortCode = branch ? (branch.code + '-001') : 'N/A';
  const genDate = dateFmt(new Date().toISOString());

  const html = `
    <div class="ent-doc">
      <!-- Enterprise Header -->
      <div class="ent-doc-header">
        <div class="edh-left">
          <div class="edh-logo">${b.logo ? '<img src="'+escUrl(b.logo)+'" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:14px" alt="Logo">' : (b.bankName||'A').charAt(0)}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="edh-bank-name">${escHtml(b.bankName||'Atlas Bank')}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">${escHtml(b.headOfficeAddress||'')}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">SWIFT: ${escHtml(b.swiftCode||'N/A')} &middot; BEAC Approval: ${escHtml(b.cbnLicenseNumber||'N/A')}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="edh-right">
          <div class="edh-doc-title">${isDeposit?'Deposit':'Withdrawal'} Receipt</div>
          <div>Receipt Ref: ${receiptDocNumber}</div>
          <div>Generated: ${genDate}</div>
          <div>Operator: ${escHtml(STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System')}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ent-doc-body">
        <!-- Transaction Reference Information -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Transaction Reference</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Receipt Number</div><div class="edf-value">${receiptDocNumber}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Transaction Reference</div><div class="edf-value" style="font-family:'Geist Mono',monospace;font-size:.82rem">${txn.ref}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Date &amp; Time</div><div class="edf-value">${dateFmt(txn.timestamp)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Branch</div><div class="edf-value">${txn.branch}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Sort Code</div><div class="edf-value">${sortCode}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Teller / Operator</div><div class="edf-value">${escHtml(STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System')}</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Account Holder Information -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Account Holder Information</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Account Holder</div><div class="edf-value">${escHtml(txn.customerName)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Account Number</div><div class="edf-value" style="font-family:'Geist Mono',monospace;font-size:.82rem">${txn.account}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Account Type</div><div class="edf-value">${txn.accountType} Account</div></div>
            ${customer?`<div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Customer Reference</div><div class="edf-value">${customer.customerNumber}</div></div>`:''}
            ${customer?`<div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Customer Type</div><div class="edf-value">${customer.customerType||'N/A'}</div></div>`:''}
            ${customer?`<div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Phone</div><div class="edf-value">${customer.phone||'N/A'}</div></div>`:''}
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Transaction Details -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Transaction Details</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Transaction Type</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:${isDeposit?'#16a34a':'#dc2626'};font-weight:800">${isDeposit?'CREDIT (Deposit)':'DEBIT (Withdrawal)'}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field" style="background:#eff6ff;border-color:#bfdbfe"><div class="edf-label">Amount</div><div class="edf-value" style="font-size:1.2rem;color:#1a365d">${money(txn.amount)}</div></div>
          </div>
          ${hasFee?`
          <div style="margin-top:12px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden">
            <div class="ent-doc-earnings-row" style="background:#f7fafc;font-weight:700;font-size:.76rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:#4a5568"><span>Fee Details</span><span>Amount (FCFA)</span></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-deductions-row"><span>Withdrawal Fee (${txn.feePct}%)</span><span class="eddr-value">&minus;${money(txn.fee)}</span></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-deductions-row"><span>Requested Amount</span><span>${money(txn.amount)}</span></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-deductions-row"><span>Net Disbursement</span><span style="font-weight:700;color:#16a34a">${money(txn.netAmount != null ? txn.netAmount : txn.amount)}</span></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-deductions-row" style="background:#fef2f2;font-weight:800;color:#dc2626;border-top:2px solid #dc2626"><span>Total Debited</span><span>${money((txn.feeMode||'WITHDRAWAL')==='WITHDRAWAL' ? txn.amount : txn.amount + txn.fee)}</span></div>
          </div>`:''}
        </div>

        <!-- Additional Information -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Additional Information</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Purpose / Description</div><div class="edf-value">${escHtml(txn.description || 'N/A')}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Category</div><div class="edf-value">${txn.category}</div></div>
            ${txn.memo?`<div class="ent-doc-field" style="grid-column:1/-1"><div class="edf-label">Memo</div><div class="edf-value">${escHtml(parseMemoTaxBreakdown(txn.memo).memo)}</div></div>`:''}
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Balance Summary -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Account Balance</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grand"><span>Balance After Transaction</span><span>${money(account?.availableBalance || 0)}</span></div>
        </div>

        <!-- Machine-Readable Reference -->
        <div style="text-align:center;padding:10px;margin:12px 0;border:1px dashed #cbd5e0;border-radius:8px;background:#f7fafc">
          <div style="font-family:'Courier New',monospace;font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.2em;color:#4a5568">${txn.ref}|${txn.timestamp.slice(0,10)}|${sortCode}|${txn.account}|ATLAS</div>
        </div>

        <!-- Certification -->
        <div class="ent-doc-cert">
          <strong>Certification:</strong> This receipt certifies that the above-referenced transaction has been duly processed and posted to the designated account. The transaction details shown herein have been verified against ${escHtml(b.bankNameShort || b.bankName || 'Atlas Bank')}&rsquo;s core banking system records. This document is generated electronically and does not require a physical signature. Any discrepancy should be reported to your branch within 7 business days of the transaction date.
        </div>

        <!-- Signatures -->
        <div class="ent-doc-signatures">
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">${escHtml(STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'Authorized Officer')}</div>
            <div class="eds-role">Teller / Branch Operations</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">${escHtml(txn.branch)}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">Branch Manager</div>
            <div class="eds-role">Branch Authorization</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">Authorized Signatory</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Footer -->
        ${buildEnterpriseFooter(receiptDocNumber, 'transaction receipt')}
      </div>
    </div>`;

  closeModal('transactionSuccessModal');
  addAuditEntry('RECEIPT_PRINTED','Receipt',receiptDocNumber,`${isDeposit?'Deposit':'Withdrawal'} receipt printed. Ref: ${receiptDocNumber}. Txn: ${txn.ref}. Account: ${txn.account}. Amount: ${money(txn.amount)}.`);
  printIsolated(html);
}

/* ================================================================
   SALARY ACCOUNT WITHDRAWAL ADVICE — Enterprise Grade
   Document generated at withdrawal from salary accounts.
   Shows withdrawal details, bank fee, and net disbursement.
   Salary deductions belong on the monthly Payroll Credit Advice (payslip),
   NOT on withdrawal documents — per enterprise banking standards.
   ================================================================ */
function printSalaryPayslip() {
  const txn = STATE.lastTransaction;
  const account = STATE.lastTransactionAccount;
  if(!txn) { showToast('error','Error','No transaction data available for printing.'); return; }
  const customer = DB.customers.find(c=>c.id===account?.customerId);
  const branch = DB.branches.find(br=>br.name===txn.branch);
  const b = DB.bankBranding || {};
  const withdrawalAmount = txn.amount;
  const withdrawalFee = txn.fee || 0;
  const withdrawalFeePct = txn.feePct || 0;
  const netDisbursement = txn.netAmount != null ? txn.netAmount : withdrawalAmount;
  const feeMode = txn.feeMode || 'WITHDRAWAL';
  const totalTax = txn.totalTax || 0;
  const taxesEnabled = txn.taxesEnabled || false;
  const taxBreakdown = txn.taxBreakdown || [];
  const totalDeductions = withdrawalFee + totalTax;
  const totalDebited = feeMode === 'WITHDRAWAL' ? withdrawalAmount : withdrawalAmount + withdrawalFee;
  const genDate = dateFmt(new Date().toISOString());
  const docNumber = generateDocumentNumber('PYL');
  const docRecord = registerDocument({
    documentNumber: docNumber, type: 'PAYSLIP', subtype: 'WITHDRAWAL_ADVICE',
    accountNumber: txn.account, customerId: account?.customerId || 0, customerName: txn.customerName,
    branch: txn.branch, periodFrom: txn.timestamp.slice(0,10), periodTo: txn.timestamp.slice(0,10),
    operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
    generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), printCount: 1, lastPrintedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    exportCount: 0, lastExportedAt: null,
    summary: { totalTransactions: 0, openingBalance:0, closingBalance: account?.availableBalance || 0, totalCredits: 0, totalDebits: totalDebited, grossPay: 0, netPay: netDisbursement, totalDeductions: totalDeductions, amount: withdrawalAmount, transactionRef: txn.ref },
    status: 'ACTIVE'
  });
  STATE.lastPayslipDocId = docRecord.id;

  const sortCode = branch ? (branch.code + '-001') : 'N/A';

  // Build deduction rows from the actual transaction data (computed by calculateWithdrawalTaxes from settings)
  const hasAnyDeductions = withdrawalFee > 0 || (taxesEnabled && totalTax > 0);
  let deductionRows = '';
  if (withdrawalFee > 0) {
    deductionRows += `<div class="ent-doc-deductions-row"><span>Withdrawal Fee (${withdrawalFeePct}%)</span><span class="eddr-value">&minus;${money(withdrawalFee)}</span></div>`;
  }
  if (taxesEnabled && taxBreakdown.length > 0) {
    taxBreakdown.forEach(d => {
      if (d.exempt) {
        deductionRows += `<div class="ent-doc-deductions-row" style="background:#fffbeb"><span>${d.label} <span style="font-size:.72rem;color:#f59e0b;font-weight:700">[EXEMPT]</span></span><span style="color:#f59e0b">&minus;${money(0)}</span></div>`;
      } else if (d.amount > 0) {
        deductionRows += `<div class="ent-doc-deductions-row"><span>${d.label} (${d.rate})</span><span class="eddr-value">&minus;${money(d.amount)}</span></div>`;
      }
    });
  }

  const html = `
    <div class="ent-doc">
      <!-- Enterprise Header -->
      <div class="ent-doc-header">
        <div class="edh-left">
          <div class="edh-logo">${b.logo ? '<img src="'+escUrl(b.logo)+'" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:14px" alt="Logo">' : (b.bankName||'A').charAt(0)}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="edh-bank-name">${escHtml(b.bankName||'Atlas Bank')}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">${escHtml(b.headOfficeAddress||'')}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">SWIFT: ${escHtml(b.swiftCode||'N/A')} &middot; BEAC Approval: ${escHtml(b.cbnLicenseNumber||'N/A')}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="edh-right">
          <div class="edh-doc-title">Salary Account Withdrawal Advice</div>
          <div>Advice Ref: ${docNumber}</div>
          <div>Transaction Ref: ${txn.ref}</div>
          <div>Date: ${genDate}</div>
          <div>Operator: ${escHtml(STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System')}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ent-doc-body">
        <!-- Account Holder Information -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Account Holder Information</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Account Holder</div><div class="edf-value">${escHtml(txn.customerName)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Account Number</div><div class="edf-value" style="font-family:'Geist Mono',monospace;font-size:.82rem">${txn.account}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Account Type</div><div class="edf-value">${txn.accountType} Account</div></div>
            ${customer?`<div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Employee / Customer ID</div><div class="edf-value">${customer.customerNumber}</div></div>`:''}
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Branch</div><div class="edf-value">${txn.branch}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Sort Code</div><div class="edf-value">${sortCode}</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Withdrawal Transaction Details -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Withdrawal Transaction Details</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Transaction Reference</div><div class="edf-value" style="font-family:'Geist Mono',monospace;font-size:.82rem">${txn.ref}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Date &amp; Time</div><div class="edf-value">${dateFmt(txn.timestamp)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Processing Branch</div><div class="edf-value">${txn.branch}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Teller / Operator</div><div class="edf-value">${escHtml(STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System')}</div></div>
            ${txn.description?`<div class="ent-doc-field" style="grid-column:1/-1"><div class="edf-label">Purpose / Narration</div><div class="edf-value">${escHtml(txn.description)}</div></div>`:''}
            ${txn.memo?`<div class="ent-doc-field" style="grid-column:1/-1"><div class="edf-label">Memo</div><div class="edf-value">${escHtml(parseMemoTaxBreakdown(txn.memo).memo)}</div></div>`:''}
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Deductions (sourced from transaction — computed by settings engine) -->
        ${hasAnyDeductions ? `
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Deductions &amp; Fees</div>
          <div style="border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:4px">
            <div class="ent-doc-deductions-row" style="background:#f7fafc;font-weight:700;font-size:.76rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:#4a5568"><span>Item</span><span>Amount (FCFA)</span></div>
            ${deductionRows}
            <div class="ent-doc-deductions-row" style="background:#fef2f2;font-weight:800;color:#dc2626;border-top:2px solid #dc2626"><span>Total Deductions</span><span>&minus;${money(totalDeductions)}</span></div>
          </div>
          ${taxesEnabled ? `<div style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:6px;padding:6px 10px;background:#f7fafc;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:6px">Fee Mode: ${feeMode === 'WITHDRAWAL' ? 'Deducted from withdrawal amount' : 'Charged to account separately'}. Statutory rates sourced from Settings &gt; Withdrawal Taxes &amp; Fees.</div>` : ''}
        </div>` : ''}

        <!-- Disbursement Summary -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Disbursement Summary</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Amount Requested</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#dc2626">${money(withdrawalAmount)}</span></div>
          ${hasAnyDeductions ? `<div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Less: Total Deductions</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#dc2626">&minus;${money(totalDeductions)}</span></div>` : ''}
          <div class="ent-doc-net" style="border-color:#1a365d;background:#eff6ff"><span style="color:#1a365d;font-weight:800">Net Disbursement</span><span style="color:#1a365d;font-weight:800;font-size:1.1rem">${money(netDisbursement)}</span></div>
        </div>

        <!-- Account Balance After -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Account Balance After Transaction</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grand"><span>Available Balance</span><span style="font-size:1.05rem">${money(account?.availableBalance || 0)}</span></div>
        </div>

        <!-- Machine-Readable Reference -->
        <div style="text-align:center;padding:10px;margin:12px 0;border:1px dashed #cbd5e0;border-radius:8px;background:#f7fafc">
          <div style="font-family:'Courier New',monospace;font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.2em;color:#4a5568">${txn.ref}|${txn.timestamp.slice(0,10)}|${sortCode}|${txn.account}|ADVISORY</div>
        </div>

        <!-- Certification -->
        <div class="ent-doc-cert">
          <strong>Certification:</strong> This withdrawal advice certifies that the above-referenced debit transaction has been duly processed and posted to the designated salary account. All deductions and fees shown have been computed in accordance with the configured withdrawal settings and applicable account exemptions. The disbursement details shown herein have been verified against ${escHtml(b.bankNameShort || b.bankName || 'Atlas Bank')}&rsquo;s core banking system records. This document is generated electronically and serves as supplementary proof of withdrawal alongside the official transaction receipt. Any discrepancy should be reported to your branch within 7 business days of the transaction date.
        </div>

        <!-- Signatures -->
        <div class="ent-doc-signatures">
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">${escHtml(STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'Authorized Officer')}</div>
            <div class="eds-role">Teller / Branch Operations</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">${escHtml(txn.branch)}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">Branch Manager</div>
            <div class="eds-role">Branch Authorization</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Footer -->
        ${buildEnterpriseFooter(docNumber, 'withdrawal advice')}
      </div>
    </div>`;

  closeModal('transactionSuccessModal');
  addAuditEntry('WITHDRAWAL_ADVICE_PRINTED','Document',docNumber,`Withdrawal advice printed. Ref: ${docNumber}. Customer: ${txn.customerName}. Amount: ${money(withdrawalAmount)}. Net: ${money(netDisbursement)}.`);
  printIsolated(html);
}

/* ================================================================
   ACCOUNT STATEMENT
   ================================================================ */

/* Fetch full transaction history for a specific account directly from the API.
 * This bypasses the server-side branch filter so that statements show ALL
 * transactions regardless of which branch processed each one.
 * Results are cached per-account within the session for reuse across print/export.
 */
async function fetchAccountTransactions(accountNumber) {
  if (STATE.statementTxnCache && STATE.statementTxnCache[accountNumber]) {
    return STATE.statementTxnCache[accountNumber];
  }
  try {
    // Always attempt API fetch regardless of API_CONNECTED flag — the catch handles failure
    const resp = await API.get('transactions', { account: accountNumber, status: 'POSTED', pageSize: 5000, sortBy: 'created_at', sortOrder: 'ASC' });
    if (resp && resp.data) {
      const txns = resp.data.map(t => {
        // Reconstruct taxBreakdown from deductions returned by API
        const deductions = t.deductions || [];
        let taxBreakdown = deductions.map(d => ({
          label: d.deduction_name || d.label || '',
          rate: d.rate ? parseFloat(d.rate).toFixed(2) + '%' : '0.00%',
          amount: parseFloat(d.amount || 0),
          key: d.deduction_key || '',
          exempt: parseFloat(d.amount || 0) === 0
        }));
        // If no deductions from API but memo has encoded taxBreakdown, parse it
        if (taxBreakdown.length === 0 && t.memo) {
          const { taxBreakdown: memoBreakdown } = parseMemoTaxBreakdown(t.memo);
          if (memoBreakdown.length > 0) taxBreakdown = memoBreakdown;
        }
        return {
          id:t.id, ref:t.ref, type:t.type, status:t.status, branch:t.branch||'',
          account:t.account||'', accountType:t.account_type||'', customerName:t.customer_name||'',
          description:t.description||'', category:t.category||'', direction:t.direction,
          amount:parseFloat(t.amount||0), memo:t.memo||'', module:t.module||'',
          timestamp:t.created_at, fee:t.fee?parseFloat(t.fee):0, feePct:t.fee_pct?parseFloat(t.fee_pct):0,
          netAmount:t.net_amount!=null?parseFloat(t.net_amount):null,
          feeMode:t.fee_mode||'',
          totalTax:t.total_tax?parseFloat(t.total_tax):0,
          taxesEnabled:parseFloat(t.total_tax||0)>0,
          taxBreakdown: taxBreakdown,
          deductions: deductions
        };
      });
      if (!STATE.statementTxnCache) STATE.statementTxnCache = {};
      STATE.statementTxnCache[accountNumber] = txns;
      console.log('[Statement] Fetched ' + txns.length + ' transactions for ' + accountNumber + ' from API');
      return txns;
    }
  } catch(e) {
    console.warn('[Statement] API fetch failed, falling back to local cache:', e);
  }
  // Fallback: use locally cached transactions
  console.warn('[Statement] Using local transaction cache — may be incomplete for non-admin users.');
  return DB.transactions.filter(t => t.account === accountNumber && t.status === 'POSTED');
}

function openAccountStatement(accountId) {
  const a = DB.accounts.find(x=>x.id===accountId); if(!a) return;
  const allTxns = DB.transactions.filter(t=>t.account===a.accountNumber && t.status==='POSTED').sort((a,b)=>new Date(a.timestamp)-new Date(b.timestamp));
  const now = new Date();
  const threeMonthsAgo = new Date(now); threeMonthsAgo.setMonth(threeMonthsAgo.getMonth()-3);
  const defaultFrom = threeMonthsAgo.toISOString().slice(0,10);
  const defaultTo = now.toISOString().slice(0,10);
  const customer = DB.customers.find(c=>c.id===a.customerId);
  openDrawer('Statement: '+a.accountNumber, `
    <div class="statement-header">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:10px">
        ${DB.bankBranding.logo ? '<img src="'+escUrl(DB.bankBranding.logo)+'" style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;object-fit:cover" alt="Logo">' : '<div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;display:grid;place-items:center;background:var(--primary);color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:1.1rem">'+DB.bankBranding.bankName.charAt(0)+'</div>'}
        <div>
          <h3 style="margin:0;font-size:1.05rem">${DB.bankBranding.bankName}</h3>
          <p style="margin:0;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)">Account Statement · ${a.customerName}</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="statement-meta">
      <div><div class="sm-label">Account Number</div><div class="sm-value">${a.accountNumber}</div></div>
      <div><div class="sm-label">Account Name</div><div class="sm-value">${a.customerName}</div></div>
      <div><div class="sm-label">Customer Ref</div><div class="sm-value">${customer?customer.customerNumber:'N/A'}</div></div>
      <div><div class="sm-label">Product Type</div><div class="sm-value">${a.productType}</div></div>
      <div><div class="sm-label">Branch</div><div class="sm-value">${a.branch}</div></div>
      <div><div class="sm-label">Current Balance</div><div class="sm-value">${money(a.ledgerBalance)}</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="filters-bar">
      <div class="filter-field"><label>From</label><input type="date" id="stmtFrom" value="${defaultFrom}" onchange="refreshStatementView(${a.id})"></div>
      <div class="filter-field"><label>To</label><input type="date" id="stmtTo" value="${defaultTo}" onchange="refreshStatementView(${a.id})"></div>
      <div class="filter-field" style="align-self:end"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="refreshStatementView(${a.id})">Refresh</button></div>
    </div>
    <div id="statementContent"></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:16px">
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="printAccountStatement(${a.id})"><i data-lucide="printer" style="width:14px;height:14px;stroke-width:2;vertical-align:-2px"></i> Print Statement</button>
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="exportStatementCSV(${a.id})"><i data-lucide="download" style="width:14px;height:14px;stroke-width:2;vertical-align:-2px"></i> Export CSV</button>
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="closeDrawer()">Close</button>
    </div>
  `);
  refreshIcons();
  refreshStatementView(accountId);
}

async function refreshStatementView(accountId, preloadedTxns) {
  const a = DB.accounts.find(x=>x.id===accountId); if(!a) return;
  const from = $('stmtFrom')?.value || '';
  const to = $('stmtTo')?.value || '';

  // ── Database-driven: re-fetch the account's current balance from API ──
  // This ensures we have the latest ledger_balance, not a stale in-memory value
  try {
    const accResp = await API.get('accounts/' + a.id);
    if (accResp && accResp.data) {
      const freshBal = parseFloat(accResp.data.ledger_balance || 0);
      const freshAvail = parseFloat(accResp.data.available_balance || 0);
      if (freshBal !== a.ledgerBalance) {
        console.log('[Statement] Account balance updated from API: ' + a.ledgerBalance + ' → ' + freshBal);
        a.ledgerBalance = freshBal;
        a.availableBalance = freshAvail;
        // Also update the Current Balance display in the drawer header
        const balEl = document.querySelector('.statement-meta .sm-value');
        // Find the balance cell in the statement header
        const stmtHeader = document.getElementById('statementContent')?.parentElement;
        if (stmtHeader) {
          const balCells = stmtHeader.querySelectorAll('.sm-value');
          if (balCells.length >= 6) balCells[5].textContent = money(freshBal);
        }
      }
    }
  } catch(e) {
    console.warn('[Statement] Could not re-fetch account balance from API, using in-memory value:', e);
  }

  // Get ALL posted transactions for this account (API fetch bypasses branch filter)
  const allTxns = (preloadedTxns || await fetchAccountTransactions(a.accountNumber))
    .sort((x,y)=>new Date(x.timestamp)-new Date(y.timestamp));

  // Compute correct net balance impact per transaction (handles both WITHDRAWAL and ACCOUNT fee modes)
  const allNets = computeTxnNets(allTxns);

  // Database-driven fallback: if ledgerBalance is 0 but we have transactions,
  // compute the true balance from the full transaction history
  let effectiveBalance = a.ledgerBalance;
  if (effectiveBalance === 0 && allTxns.length > 0) {
    const computedBalance = allNets.reduce((s,n) => s + n, 0);
    if (computedBalance !== 0) {
      console.log('[Statement] In-memory balance is 0 but transactions exist. Using computed balance: ' + computedBalance);
      effectiveBalance = computedBalance;
      a.ledgerBalance = computedBalance;
      a.availableBalance = computedBalance;
    }
  }

  // Compute closing balance = current balance minus the net of all transactions AFTER the period.
  // This gives the actual balance at the end of the statement period.
  const afterNet = allTxns.reduce((s,t,i) => (to && t.timestamp.slice(0,10) > to) ? s + allNets[i] : s, 0);
  const closingBalance = parseFloat((effectiveBalance - afterNet).toFixed(2));

  // Filter to transactions within the statement period
  const periodTxns = allTxns.filter(t => {
    if(from && t.timestamp.slice(0,10) < from) return false;
    if(to && t.timestamp.slice(0,10) > to) return false;
    return true;
  });

  // Opening balance = closing balance minus the net of transactions during the period
  const duringNet = periodTxns.reduce((s,t) => {
    const origIdx = allTxns.indexOf(t);
    return s + (origIdx >= 0 ? allNets[origIdx] : 0);
  }, 0);
  const openingBalance = parseFloat((closingBalance - duringNet).toFixed(2));

  let currentBalance = openingBalance;
  const credits = periodTxns.filter(t=>t.direction==='credit' && t.type!=='FEE' && t.type!=='TAX_DEDUCTION').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const debits = periodTxns.filter(t=>t.direction==='debit' && t.type!=='FEE' && t.type!=='TAX_DEDUCTION').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const netMovement = credits - debits;
  const averageBalance = periodTxns.length > 0 ? (openingBalance + closingBalance) / 2 : closingBalance;
  const interestEarned = periodTxns.filter(t=>t.category==='Interest Credit').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  // ★ FIX (ACC-009): Only count FEE/TAX_DEDUCTION rows that are NOT hidden
  // (WITHDRAWAL-mode child rows are already included in the parent withdrawal
  // amount — counting them separately would double-count). Use hideSet from
  // buildStatementChildSets. Also include 'Software Expense' category.
  const feeCharges = periodTxns.filter(t=>{
    if (t.category === 'Software Expense') return true;
    if (t.type !== 'FEE' && t.type !== 'TAX_DEDUCTION') return false;
    const idx = periodTxns.indexOf(t);
    if (hideSet.has(idx)) return false;
    return true;
  }).reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);

  let html = `
    <div class="statement-totals">
      <div class="st-box"><div class="st-label">Opening Balance</div><div class="st-value">${money(openingBalance)}</div></div>
      <div class="st-box"><div class="st-label">Total Credits</div><div class="st-value" style="color:var(--success)">+${money(credits)}</div></div>
      <div class="st-box"><div class="st-label">Total Debits</div><div class="st-value" style="color:var(--danger)">−${money(debits)}</div></div>
      <div class="st-box"><div class="st-label">Net Movement</div><div class="st-value" style="color:${netMovement>=0?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${netMovement>=0?'+':''}${money(netMovement)}</div></div>
      <div class="st-box"><div class="st-label">Average Balance</div><div class="st-value">${money(averageBalance)}</div></div>
      <div class="st-box"><div class="st-label">Closing Balance</div><div class="st-value" style="font-weight:700">${money(closingBalance)}</div></div>
    </div>
    ${interestEarned > 0 ? `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin:8px 0"><div class="st-box" style="flex:1"><div class="st-label">Interest Earned</div><div class="st-value" style="color:var(--success)">+${money(interestEarned)}</div></div><div class="st-box" style="flex:1"><div class="st-label">Fees &amp; Charges</div><div class="st-value" style="color:var(--danger)">−${money(feeCharges)}</div></div></div>` : ''}
    <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--soft);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;padding:8px 0 6px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line2);display:flex;justify-content:space-between">
      <span>Date / Description</span><span style="display:flex;gap:16px"><span style="min-width:100px;text-align:right">Amount</span><span style="min-width:100px;text-align:right">Balance</span></span>
    </div>`;
  // Show pending auto-deductions for this account
  const pendingDeductions = [];
  DB.loans.filter(l => (l.debitAccountId === a.id || DB.accounts.filter(ac=>ac.customerId===l.customerId&&ac.id===a.id).length>0) && (l.status==='ACTIVE'||l.status==='DELINQUENT') && l.autoDeduct !== false).forEach(l => {
    const pendingInst = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s=>s.loanId===l.id && (s.status==='DUE'||s.status==='MISSED'||s.status==='PARTIALLY_PAID'));
    pendingInst.forEach(inst => {
      const due = inst.principal + inst.interest - inst.paid;
      if(due > 0) pendingDeductions.push({loan:l.loanNumber, inst:inst.installment, due:inst.due, amount:due, status:inst.status});
    });
  });
  if(pendingDeductions.length > 0) {
    const totalPending = pendingDeductions.reduce((s,d)=>s+d.amount,0);
    html += `<div style="padding:12px 14px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--warn-dim);border:1px solid rgba(255,190,105,.2);margin-bottom:14px">
      <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--warn);font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;margin-bottom:8px">Pending Auto-Deductions (${pendingDeductions.length})</div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Total Pending</span><span class="value" style="color:var(--warn);font-weight:700">${money(totalPending)}</span></div>
      ${pendingDeductions.slice(0,5).map(d=>`<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:4px 0;font-size:.82rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)"><span style="color:var(--warn)">${d.loan} #${d.inst} · ${d.due}</span><span style="font-weight:600">${money(d.amount)}</span></div>`).join('')}
      ${pendingDeductions.length>5?`<div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);padding-top:4px">+${pendingDeductions.length-5} more...</div>`:''}
    </div>`;
  }
  // Use shared helper to determine which child rows to hide vs show
  const { hideSet, skipBalSet, parentExpandMap } = buildStatementChildSets(periodTxns);
  if(periodTxns.length===0) {
    html += '<div class="empty-state"><p>No transactions in the selected period</p></div>';
  } else {
    periodTxns.forEach((t, idx) => {
      const isChild = t.type === 'FEE' || t.type === 'TAX_DEDUCTION';
      // WITHDRAWAL-mode children are completely hidden (deductions shown inside parent row)
      if (hideSet.has(idx)) return;
      const isParentExpanded = parentExpandMap.has(idx);
      const skipForBal = skipBalSet.has(idx);
      if(!skipForBal) {
        if(t.direction==='credit') currentBalance += t.amount;
        else currentBalance -= t.amount;
      }
      // Build inline deduction breakdown for parent withdrawals (WITHDRAWAL mode)
      let expandHtml = '';
      if (isParentExpanded) {
        const ex = parentExpandMap.get(idx);
        let dedLines = '';
        if (ex.fee > 0) dedLines += `<div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">Fee (${ex.feePct}%): −${money(ex.fee)}</div>`;
        if (ex.taxBreakdown && ex.taxBreakdown.length > 0) {
          ex.taxBreakdown.forEach(d => {
            if (d.amount > 0) dedLines += `<div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">${d.label}: −${money(d.amount)}</div>`;
          });
        }
        if (ex.netAmount != null && ex.netAmount !== t.amount) {
          dedLines += `<div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--success);font-weight:600">Net Disbursement: ${money(ex.netAmount)}</div>`;
        }
        if (dedLines) {
          expandHtml = `<div style="margin-top:4px;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:rgba(255,190,105,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,190,105,.12)">${dedLines}</div>`;
        }
      }
      html += `<div class="statement-row${isChild?' style="opacity:.55;font-style:italic"':''}">
        <div class="sr-date">${shortDate(t.timestamp)}</div>
        <div class="sr-desc"><div>${t.description}</div><div class="sr-ref">${t.ref} · ${t.category}</div>${expandHtml}</div>
        <div class="sr-amount td-${t.direction}">${t.direction==='credit'?'+':'−'}${money(t.amount)}</div>
        <div class="sr-balance">${money(currentBalance)}</div>
      </div>`;
    });
  }
  html += `
    <div class="statement-totals" style="margin-top:14px">
      <div class="st-box"><div class="st-label">Closing Balance</div><div class="st-value">${money(closingBalance)}</div></div>
      <div class="st-box"><div class="st-label">Transactions</div><div class="st-value">${periodTxns.length}</div></div>
      <div class="st-box"><div class="st-label">Period</div><div class="st-value" style="font-size:.82rem">${from||'...'} to ${to||'...'}</div></div>
    </div>`;
  const el = $('statementContent');
  if(el) el.innerHTML = html;
}

async function printAccountStatement(accountId) {
  const a = DB.accounts.find(x=>x.id===accountId); if(!a) return;
  const from = $('stmtFrom')?.value || '';
  const to = $('stmtTo')?.value || '';

  // Get ALL posted transactions for this account (API fetch bypasses branch filter)
  const allTxns = (await fetchAccountTransactions(a.accountNumber))
    .sort((x,y)=>new Date(x.timestamp)-new Date(y.timestamp));
