  // Compute correct net balance impact per transaction (handles both WITHDRAWAL and ACCOUNT fee modes)
  const allNets = computeTxnNets(allTxns);

  // Correct opening/closing balance computation considering out-of-period transactions
  const afterNet = allTxns.reduce((s,t,i) => (to && t.timestamp.slice(0,10) > to) ? s + allNets[i] : s, 0);
  const closingBalance = parseFloat((a.ledgerBalance - afterNet).toFixed(2));
  const periodTxns = allTxns.filter(t => {
    if(from && t.timestamp.slice(0,10) < from) return false;
    if(to && t.timestamp.slice(0,10) > to) return false;
    return true;
  });
  const duringNet = periodTxns.reduce((s,t) => {
    const origIdx = allTxns.indexOf(t);
    return s + (origIdx >= 0 ? allNets[origIdx] : 0);
  }, 0);
  const openingBalance = parseFloat((closingBalance - duringNet).toFixed(2));

  const totalCredits = periodTxns.filter(t=>t.direction==='credit' && t.type!=='FEE' && t.type!=='TAX_DEDUCTION').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const totalDebits = periodTxns.filter(t=>t.direction==='debit' && t.type!=='FEE' && t.type!=='TAX_DEDUCTION').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const interestEarned = periodTxns.filter(t=>t.category==='Interest Credit').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  // ★ FIX (ACC-009): Same fix as in refreshStatementView — exclude hidden child rows
  const printHideSet = buildStatementChildSets(periodTxns).hideSet;
  const feeCharges = periodTxns.filter(t=>{
    if (t.category === 'Software Expense') return true;
    if (t.type !== 'FEE' && t.type !== 'TAX_DEDUCTION') return false;
    const idx = periodTxns.indexOf(t);
    if (printHideSet.has(idx)) return false;
    return true;
  }).reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const netMovement = totalCredits - totalDebits;
  const averageBalance = periodTxns.length > 0 ? (openingBalance + closingBalance) / 2 : closingBalance;
  const customer = DB.customers.find(c=>c.id===a.customerId);
  const branch = DB.branches.find(b=>b.name===a.branch);
  const sortCode = branch ? (branch.code + '-001') : 'N/A';
  const stmtDate = dateFmt(new Date().toISOString());
  const stmtRef = generateDocumentNumber('STMT');

  // Register document for tracking (same as Documents Panel)
  const docRecord = registerDocument({
    documentNumber: stmtRef, type: 'STATEMENT', subtype: 'BANK_STATEMENT',
    accountNumber: a.accountNumber, customerId: a.customerId,
    customerName: a.customerName, branch: a.branch,
    periodFrom: from, periodTo: to,
    operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
    generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    printCount: 1, lastPrintedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    exportCount: 0, lastExportedAt: null,
    summary: { totalTransactions: periodTxns.length, openingBalance, closingBalance, totalCredits, totalDebits, grossPay:0, netPay:0, totalDeductions:0, amount:0, transactionRef:'' },
    status: 'ACTIVE'
  });

  // Build transaction rows with running balance (enterprise table format)
  let txnRows = '';
  let currentBal = openingBalance;
  // Use shared helper to determine which child rows to hide vs show
  const { hideSet, skipBalSet, parentExpandMap } = buildStatementChildSets(periodTxns);
  if (periodTxns.length === 0) {
    txnRows = '<tr><td colspan="7" style="text-align:center;padding:24px;color:#718096">No transactions recorded in the selected period.</td></tr>';
  } else {
    periodTxns.forEach((t, idx) => {
      const isChild = t.type === 'FEE' || t.type === 'TAX_DEDUCTION';
      if (hideSet.has(idx)) return; // Hide WITHDRAWAL-mode children entirely
      const isParentExpanded = parentExpandMap.has(idx);
      const skipForBal = skipBalSet.has(idx);
      if (!skipForBal) {
        if (t.direction === 'credit') currentBal += t.amount;
        else currentBal -= t.amount;
      }
      const valDate = new Date(t.timestamp);
      valDate.setDate(valDate.getDate() + (t.direction === 'credit' ? 0 : 1));
      // Build inline deduction breakdown for print
      let expandDesc = '';
      if (isParentExpanded) {
        const ex = parentExpandMap.get(idx);
        let parts = [];
        if (ex.fee > 0) parts.push('Fee '+ex.feePct+'%: −'+money(ex.fee));
        if (ex.taxBreakdown) ex.taxBreakdown.forEach(d => { if(d.amount>0) parts.push(d.label+': −'+money(d.amount)); });
        if (ex.netAmount != null && ex.netAmount !== t.amount) parts.push('Net: '+money(ex.netAmount));
        if (parts.length) expandDesc = '<div style="font-size:10px;color:#b45309;margin-top:2px">'+parts.join(' | ')+'</div>';
      }
      txnRows += `<tr${isChild?' style="opacity:.55"':''}>
        <td style="white-space:nowrap">${new Date(t.timestamp).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'})}</td>
        <td style="white-space:nowrap">${valDate.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'})}</td>
        <td><div style="font-weight:600">${t.description}</div><div class="edt-mono">${t.ref}</div>${expandDesc}</td>
        <td class="edt-mono">${t.category}</td>
        <td class="edt-credit" style="text-align:right">${t.direction==='credit'?money(t.amount):'—'}</td>
        <td class="edt-debit" style="text-align:right">${t.direction==='debit'?money(t.amount):'—'}</td>
        <td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:600">${money(currentBal)}</td>
      </tr>`;
    });
  }

  const printHtml = `
    <div class="ent-doc" id="entStatementDoc">
      <!-- Enterprise Header -->
      <div class="ent-doc-header">
        <div class="edh-left">
          <div class="edh-logo">${DB.bankBranding.logo ? '<img src="'+escUrl(DB.bankBranding.logo)+'" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:14px" alt="Logo">' : DB.bankBranding.bankName.charAt(0)}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="edh-bank-name">${DB.bankBranding.bankName}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">${DB.bankBranding.headOfficeAddress}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">SWIFT: ${DB.bankBranding.swiftCode} · BEAC Approval: ${DB.bankBranding.cbnLicenseNumber}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="edh-right">
          <div class="edh-doc-title">Account Statement</div>
          <div>Statement Ref: ${stmtRef}</div>
          <div>Generated: ${stmtDate}</div>
          <div>Operator: ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System'}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ent-doc-body">
        <!-- Account Holder Information (13 fields — same as Documents Panel) -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Account Holder Information</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Account Holder</div><div class="edf-value">${a.customerName}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Customer Reference</div><div class="edf-value">${customer?customer.customerNumber:'N/A'}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Account Number</div><div class="edf-value">${a.accountNumber}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Product Type</div><div class="edf-value">${a.productType} Account</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Currency</div><div class="edf-value">${a.currency}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Account Status</div><div class="edf-value">${a.status}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Branch</div><div class="edf-value">${a.branch}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Sort Code</div><div class="edf-value">${sortCode}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Date Opened</div><div class="edf-value">${a.openedAt?new Date(a.openedAt).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}):'N/A'}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Customer Type</div><div class="edf-value">${customer?customer.customerType:'N/A'}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Phone</div><div class="edf-value">${customer?customer.phone||'N/A':'N/A'}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Email</div><div class="edf-value">${customer?customer.email||'N/A':'N/A'}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Risk Rating</div><div class="edf-value">${customer?customer.riskRating:'N/A'}</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Statement Period Summary -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Statement Period Summary</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr">
            <div class="ent-doc-field" style="background:#eff6ff;border-color:#bfdbfe"><div class="edf-label">Period</div><div class="edf-value" style="font-size:.82rem">${from && to ? new Date(from).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'})+' — '+new Date(to).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}) : 'All Transactions'}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field" style="background:#eff6ff;border-color:#bfdbfe"><div class="edf-label">Days in Period</div><div class="edf-value">${from && to ? Math.max(1,Math.ceil((new Date(to)-new Date(from))/(1000*60*60*24))) : 'N/A'}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field" style="background:#eff6ff;border-color:#bfdbfe"><div class="edf-label">Number of Entries</div><div class="edf-value">${periodTxns.length}</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Balance Summary -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Balance Summary</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Opening Balance (as at ${from ? new Date(from).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}) : 'first transaction'})</span><span class="edtr-value">${money(openingBalance)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Total Credits</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#16a34a">+${money(totalCredits)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Total Debits</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#dc2626">−${money(totalDebits)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Net Movement</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:${netMovement>=0?'#16a34a':'#dc2626'}">${netMovement>=0?'+':''}${money(netMovement)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Average Balance</span><span class="edtr-value">${money(averageBalance)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grand"><span>Closing Balance (as at ${to ? new Date(to).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}) : 'now'})</span><span>${money(closingBalance)}</span></div>
        </div>

        <!-- Interest & Charges Summary (for savings accounts) -->
        ${a.productType==='SAVINGS'?`<div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Interest &amp; Charges Summary</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Interest Earned in Period</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#16a34a">+${money(interestEarned)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Savings Rate (p.a.)</span><span class="edtr-value">4.20%</span></div>
        </div>`:''}
        ${feeCharges>0?`<div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Fees &amp; Charges Summary</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Total Fees &amp; Charges in Period</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#dc2626">−${money(feeCharges)}</span></div>
        </div>`:''}

        <!-- Transaction Detail Table -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Transaction Detail</div>
          <table class="ent-doc-table">
            <thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Value Date</th><th>Description / Reference</th><th>Category</th><th style="text-align:right">Credit</th><th style="text-align:right">Debit</th><th style="text-align:right">Balance</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>${txnRows}</tbody>
          </table>
        </div>

        <!-- Certification -->
        <div class="ent-doc-cert">
          <strong>Certification:</strong> This statement is a true and complete reflection of all transactions posted to the above-referenced account during the stated period. The balances shown have been verified against ${DB.bankBranding.bankNameShort}'s core banking system records. This document is generated electronically and does not require a physical signature. Any discrepancy should be reported to your branch within 14 days of the statement date.
        </div>

        <!-- Signatures -->
        <div class="ent-doc-signatures">
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">${STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'Authorized Officer'}</div>
            <div class="eds-role">Account Officer / Branch Operations</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">${a.branch}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">Branch Manager</div>
            <div class="eds-role">${a.branch}</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">Authorized Signatory</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Confidentiality Footer -->
        <div class="ent-doc-footer">
          ${DB.bankBranding.bankNameShort} Limited · Registered in Cameroon · ${DB.bankBranding.registrationNumber} · BEAC Approval: ${DB.bankBranding.cbnLicenseNumber}<br>
          Registered Office: ${DB.bankBranding.headOfficeAddress}<br>
          SWIFT Code: ${DB.bankBranding.swiftCode} · Sort Code: ${sortCode}<br>
          Tel: ${DB.bankBranding.phone} · Email: ${DB.bankBranding.email}<br><br>
          <strong>CONFIDENTIAL:</strong> This document contains privileged and confidential information intended solely for the named account holder. Unauthorized use, disclosure, copying, or distribution is strictly prohibited. If you have received this statement in error, please notify ${DB.bankBranding.bankNameShort} immediately at compliance@${DB.bankBranding.website}.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;

  $('statementPrintArea').innerHTML = printHtml;
  $('statementPrintArea').style.display = 'block';
  $('statementPrintArea').classList.add('printing');
  closeDrawer();
  setTimeout(()=>{ window.print(); $$('[id$="PrintArea"]').forEach(el => { el.classList.remove('printing'); el.style.display = 'none'; }); }, 300);
  addAuditEntry('STATEMENT_PRINTED','Account',a.accountNumber,`Statement printed for ${a.customerName}. Ref: ${stmtRef}. Period: ${from||'All'} to ${to||'All'}. Transactions: ${periodTxns.length}.`);
}

async function exportStatementCSV(accountId) {
  const a = DB.accounts.find(x=>x.id===accountId); if(!a) return;
  const from = $('stmtFrom')?.value || '';
  const to = $('stmtTo')?.value || '';

  // Get ALL posted transactions for this account (API fetch bypasses branch filter)
  const allTxns = (await fetchAccountTransactions(a.accountNumber))
    .sort((x,y)=>new Date(x.timestamp)-new Date(y.timestamp));

  // Compute correct net balance impact per transaction (handles both WITHDRAWAL and ACCOUNT fee modes)
  const allNets = computeTxnNets(allTxns);

  // Correct opening/closing balance computation
  const afterNet = allTxns.reduce((s,t,i) => (to && t.timestamp.slice(0,10) > to) ? s + allNets[i] : s, 0);
  const closingBalance = parseFloat((a.ledgerBalance - afterNet).toFixed(2));
  const periodTxns = allTxns.filter(t => {
    if(from && t.timestamp.slice(0,10) < from) return false;
    if(to && t.timestamp.slice(0,10) > to) return false;
    return true;
  });
  const duringNet = periodTxns.reduce((s,t) => {
    const origIdx = allTxns.indexOf(t);
    return s + (origIdx >= 0 ? allNets[origIdx] : 0);
  }, 0);
  const openingBalance = parseFloat((closingBalance - duringNet).toFixed(2));

  let currentBalance = openingBalance;
  // Use shared helper to determine which child rows to hide vs show
  const { hideSet, skipBalSet, parentExpandMap } = buildStatementChildSets(periodTxns);
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('Account Statement', [
    ['Account Number', a.accountNumber],['Account Holder', a.customerName],['Product Type', a.productType],
    ['Branch', a.branch],['Period From', from||'All'],['Period To', to||'All']
  ]);
  const header = 'Date,Reference,Description,Category,Direction,Amount (FCFA),Running Balance (FCFA)\n';
  const rows = periodTxns.map((t, idx) => {
    const isChild = t.type === 'FEE' || t.type === 'TAX_DEDUCTION';
    if (hideSet.has(idx)) return ''; // Hide WITHDRAWAL-mode children
    const isParentExpanded = parentExpandMap.has(idx);
    const skipForBal = skipBalSet.has(idx);
    if(!skipForBal) {
      if(t.direction==='credit') currentBalance+=t.amount; else currentBalance-=t.amount;
    }
    let desc = t.description;
    if (isParentExpanded) {
      const ex = parentExpandMap.get(idx);
      let parts = [];
      if (ex.fee > 0) parts.push('Fee '+ex.feePct+'%: -'+money(ex.fee));
      if (ex.taxBreakdown) ex.taxBreakdown.forEach(d => { if(d.amount>0) parts.push(d.label+': -'+money(d.amount)); });
      if (ex.netAmount != null && ex.netAmount !== t.amount) parts.push('Net Disbursement: '+money(ex.netAmount));
      if (parts.length) desc += ' [' + parts.join(' | ') + ']';
    }
    return `${csv(shortDate(t.timestamp))},${csv(t.ref)},${csv(desc)},${csv(t.category)},${csv(t.direction)},${csvNum(t.direction==='credit'?t.amount:0)},${csvNum(currentBalance)}`;
  }).filter(r=>r).join('\n');
  const totalCredits = periodTxns.filter(t=>t.direction==='credit' && t.type!=='FEE' && t.type!=='TAX_DEDUCTION').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const totalDebits = periodTxns.filter(t=>t.direction==='debit' && t.type!=='FEE' && t.type!=='TAX_DEDUCTION').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const footer = csvFooter(periodTxns.length, [{label:'Opening Balance (FCFA)',value:csvNum(openingBalance)},{label:'Closing Balance (FCFA)',value:csvNum(closingBalance)},{label:'Total Credits (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalCredits)},{label:'Total Debits (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalDebits)}]);
  downloadCSV(meta + header + rows + footer, `statement-${a.accountNumber}-${from||'all'}-${to||'all'}.csv`);
  showToast('success','Statement Exported',`Account statement for ${a.accountNumber} with ${periodTxns.length} transactions exported.`);
  addAuditEntry('STATEMENT_EXPORT','Account',a.accountNumber,`Statement exported by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Period: ${from||'All'} to ${to||'All'}. Transactions: ${periodTxns.length}`);
}

/* ================================================================
   TRANSACTIONS
   ================================================================ */
function setupTxnFilters() {
  const hours = Array.from({length:24},(_,i)=>String(i).padStart(2,'0'));
  $('txnFromHour').innerHTML = '<option value="">00:00</option>' + hours.map(h=>`<option value="${h}">${h}:00</option>`).join('');
  $('txnToHour').innerHTML = '<option value="">23:59</option>' + hours.map(h=>`<option value="${h}">${h}:59</option>`).join('');
  const fillSel = (id,items,label) => { $(id).innerHTML = `<option value="">${label}</option>` + items.map(i=>`<option value="${i}">${i}</option>`).join(''); };
  fillSel('txnBranch',[...new Set(DB.transactions.map(t=>t.branch))].sort(),'All Branches');
  fillSel('txnAccount',[...new Set(DB.transactions.map(t=>t.accountType))].sort(),'All Accounts');
  fillSel('txnStatus',[...new Set(DB.transactions.map(t=>t.status))].sort(),'All Statuses');
  fillSel('txnCategory',[...new Set(DB.transactions.map(t=>t.category))].sort(),'All Categories');
  fillSel('txnModule',[...new Set(DB.transactions.map(t=>t.module))].sort(),'All Modules');
}

function getFilteredTransactions() {
  const q = norm($('txnSearch')?.value || '');
  const date = $('txnDate')?.value || '';
  const from = $('txnFromHour')?.value === '' ? 0 : Number($('txnFromHour').value);
  const to = $('txnToHour')?.value === '' ? 23 : Number($('txnToHour').value);
  // Branch isolation
  const base = filterByUserBranch(DB.transactions);
  return base.filter(t => {
    const td = t.timestamp.slice(0,10);
    const th = Number(t.timestamp.slice(11,13));
    return (!q || [t.ref,t.branch,t.account,t.description,t.category,t.module,t.memo,t.status,t.customerName].some(v=>norm(v).includes(q))) &&
      (!date || td === date) && th >= from && th <= to &&
      (!$('txnBranch')?.value || t.branch === $('txnBranch').value) &&
      (!$('txnAccount')?.value || t.accountType === $('txnAccount').value) &&
      (!$('txnDirection')?.value || t.direction === $('txnDirection').value) &&
      (!$('txnStatus')?.value || t.status === $('txnStatus').value) &&
      (!$('txnCategory')?.value || t.category === $('txnCategory').value) &&
      (!$('txnModule')?.value || t.module === $('txnModule').value);
  }).sort((a,b) => new Date(b.timestamp) - new Date(a.timestamp));
}

function renderTransactions() {
  const filtered = getFilteredTransactions();
  const {items, total} = paginate(filtered, STATE.txnPage, STATE.txnPageSize);
  const credits = filtered.filter(t=>t.direction==='credit' && t.type!=='FEE' && t.type!=='TAX_DEDUCTION' && t.type!=='REVERSAL').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const debits = filtered.filter(t=>t.direction==='debit' && t.type!=='FEE' && t.type!=='TAX_DEDUCTION' && t.type!=='REVERSAL').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  // ★ FIX (TXN-014): Exclude CANCELLED and FAILED from netWithdrawals in addition to REVERSED.
  // Previously only REVERSED was excluded, meaning cancelled/failed withdrawals inflated the net.
  const netWithdrawals = filtered.filter(t=>isWithdrawalTxn(t) && t.feeMode==='WITHDRAWAL' && t.direction==='debit' && t.status==='POSTED').reduce((s,t)=>s+(t.netAmount!=null?t.netAmount:t.amount),0);
  // ★ FIX (RA-TXN-001): Changed "credits"/"debits" labels to "net credits"/"net debits" to
  // clarify that FEE, TAX_DEDUCTION, and REVERSAL transactions are excluded. Previously,
  // users summing the visible table rows would get different totals than the summary showed.
  $('txnSummary').innerHTML = `<div class="summary-item"><strong>${total}</strong> transactions</div><div class="summary-item"><strong style="color:var(--success)">${money(credits)}</strong> net credits <span style="font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted)">(excl. fees)</span></div><div class="summary-item"><strong style="color:var(--danger)">${money(debits)}</strong> net debits <span style="font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted)">(excl. fees)</span></div>${netWithdrawals>0?`<div class="summary-item"><span style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)">Net Withdrawn</span><strong style="color:var(--success)">${money(netWithdrawals)}</strong></div>`:''}`;
  $('txnTableBody').innerHTML = items.map(t=>{
    const isChild = t.type==='FEE'||t.type==='TAX_DEDUCTION';
    const canReverse = t.status==='POSTED' && !isChild && !t._pendingReversal && (t.direction==='debit'||t.amount>1000);
    return `<tr${isChild?' style="opacity:.6"':''}>
      <td style="white-space:nowrap">${dateFmt(t.timestamp)}</td>
      <td class="td-mono">${escHtml(t.ref)}</td>
      <td>${escHtml(t.branch)}</td>
      <td class="td-mono">${escHtml(t.account)}</td>
      <td>${escHtml(t.description)}${isChild?' <span style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--warn)">[inc. in withdrawal]</span>':''}</td>
      <td>${escHtml(t.category)}</td>
      <td><span class="td-${t.direction}">${t.direction}</span></td>
      <td><span class="pill ${pillCls(t.status)}">${escHtml(t.status.replace('_',' '))}</span></td>
      <td class="td-${t.direction}">${isChild?money(t.amount):isWithdrawalTxn(t)&&t.feeMode==='WITHDRAWAL'&&t.netAmount!=null&&t.netAmount!==t.amount?money(t.netAmount)+'<br><span style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)">gross: '+money(t.amount)+'</span>':money(t.amount)}</td>
      <td class="td-actions">
        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="openTransactionDrawer(${t.id})">View</button>
        ${t.status==='PENDING_APPROVAL'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="approveItem(${t.id})">Approve</button>`:''}
        ${canReverse?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="reverseTransaction(${t.id})">Reverse</button>`:''}
      </td>
    </tr>`;}).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="10" class="empty-state"><p>No transactions match your filters</p></td></tr>';
  renderPagination('txnPagination', STATE.txnPage, filtered.length, 'goTxnPage');
}
function goTxnPage(p) { STATE.txnPage = p; renderTransactions(); }

function openTransactionDrawer(id) {
  const t = DB.transactions.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!t) return;
  const isChild = t.type==='FEE'||t.type==='TAX_DEDUCTION';
  const { memo: cleanMemo } = parseMemoTaxBreakdown(t.memo || '');
  const safeMemo = escHtml(cleanMemo);
  openDrawer('Transaction: '+t.ref, `
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Transaction Details</h4>
      <div class="detail-grid">
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Reference</div><div class="di-value td-mono" style="font-size:.88rem">${escHtml(t.ref)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Status</div><div class="di-value"><span class="pill ${pillCls(t.status)}">${escHtml(t.status.replace(/_/g,' '))}</span></div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Branch</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(t.branch)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Account</div><div class="di-value td-mono" style="font-size:.88rem">${escHtml(t.account)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Customer</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(t.customerName)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Category</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(t.category)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Module</div><div class="di-value">${t.module}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Direction</div><div class="di-value td-${t.direction}">${t.direction}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Amount</div><div class="di-value td-${t.direction}">${isWithdrawalTxn(t)&&t.feeMode==='WITHDRAWAL'&&t.netAmount!=null&&t.netAmount!==t.amount?money(t.netAmount)+' <span style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)">(gross '+money(t.amount)+')</span>':money(t.amount)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Timestamp</div><div class="di-value">${dateFmt(t.timestamp)}</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    ${t.fee > 0 && isWithdrawalTxn(t) ? `<div class="drawer-section" style="margin-top:8px;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(255,190,105,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,190,105,.15)">
      <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--warn);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:6px">Withdrawal Fee Breakdown</div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Fee Rate</span><span class="value" style="color:var(--warn)">${t.feePct || 0}%</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Fee Amount</span><span class="value" style="color:var(--warn)">${money(t.fee)}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Fee Mode</span><span class="value" style="font-size:.82rem;color:${(t.feeMode||'WITHDRAWAL')==='WITHDRAWAL'?'var(--success)':'var(--warn)'}">${(t.feeMode||'WITHDRAWAL')==='WITHDRAWAL'?'Deducted From Withdrawal':'Charged To Account'}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Requested Amount</span><span class="value">${money(t.amount)}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Net Disbursement</span><span class="value" style="font-weight:700;color:var(--success)">${money(t.netAmount != null ? t.netAmount : t.amount)}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Total Debited</span><span class="value" style="font-weight:700">${money((t.feeMode||'WITHDRAWAL')==='WITHDRAWAL' ? t.amount : t.amount + t.fee)}</span></div>
      ${t.totalTax > 0 ? `<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Tax Deductions</span><span class="value" style="color:var(--danger)">${money(t.totalTax)}</span></div>` : ''}
    </div>` : ''}
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Memo</h4><p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.6">${safeMemo}</p></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:12px">
      ${t.status==='PENDING_APPROVAL'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="closeDrawer();approveItem(${t.id})">Approve</button>`:''}
      ${t.status==='POSTED' && !isChild && !t._pendingReversal && (t.direction==='debit'||t.amount>1000)?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="closeDrawer();reverseTransaction(${t.id})">Reverse</button>`:''}
      ${t._pendingReversal?`<span style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--warn)">`+IC('clock',12)+` Reversal pending approval</span>`:''}
      ${t.account?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="closeDrawer();viewTxnAccount('${escHtml(t.account)}')">View Account</button>`:''}
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="closeDrawer()">Close</button>
    </div>
  `);
}

// ★ FIX (TXN-012): Dedicated function for "View Account" button in transaction drawer.
// Previously, the account number was interpolated directly into an onclick string,
// which is an XSS risk if the account number contains quotes or special characters.
// Now the account number is passed as a function argument, properly escaped.
function viewTxnAccount(accountNumber) {
  navigate('accounts');
  setTimeout(() => {
    const a = DB.accounts.find(x => x.accountNumber === accountNumber);
    if (a) openAccountDrawer(a.id);
  }, 200);
}

/* ================================================================
   LOANS
   ================================================================ */
function switchLoanTab(btn, tabId) {
  btn.closest('.tabs').querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  ['loans-active','loans-applications','loans-schedule','loans-fund'].forEach(id=>{
    const el = $(id);
    if (el) el.style.display = id===tabId ? 'block' : 'none';
  });
  if (tabId==='loans-active') renderLoans();
  else if (tabId==='loans-applications') renderLoanApplications();
  else if (tabId==='loans-schedule') renderLoanSchedule();
  else if (tabId==='loans-fund') renderLoanFundPanel();
}

/* ================================================================
   FUND LOAN POOL FROM GL — Credits GL 1200 + auto-credits BANK-LF-0001
   ================================================================ */
function openFundLoanFromGLModal() {
  // Refresh the dropdown each time (balances may have changed)
  const flgSelect = $('flgSourceAccount');
  if (flgSelect) {
    const glAccounts = (DB.chartOfAccounts || []).filter(a => a.code !== '1200' && a.is_active);
    flgSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select source GL account...</option>' +
      glAccounts.map(a => {
        const bal = a.net_balance || 0;
        return `<option value="${a.code}">${a.code} — ${a.name} (${a.type}, Bal: ${money(bal)})</option>`;
      }).join('');
  }
  $('flgAmount').value = '';
  $('flgDescription').value = '';
  openModal('fundLoanGLModal');
}

async function handleFundLoanFromGL(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const sourceAccount = $('flgSourceAccount').value;
  const amount = Number($('flgAmount').value);
  const description = $('flgDescription').value || 'Loan fund allocation';

  if (!sourceAccount) { showToast('error', 'Missing Account', 'Please select a source GL account.'); return false; }
  if (!amount || amount <= 0) { showToast('error', 'Invalid Amount', 'Please enter a valid amount.'); return false; }

  const sourceName = (DB.chartOfAccounts || []).find(a => a.code === sourceAccount)?.name || sourceAccount;
  showConfirm('Fund Loan Pool',
    `Transfer ${money(amount)} from GL ${sourceAccount} (${sourceName}) to GL 1200 (Loans & Advances)?\n\nThis will also credit BANK-LF-0001, making ${money(amount)} available for loan disbursement.`,
    async () => {
      try {
        await refreshCsrfToken();
        const result = await API.post('general-ledger', {
          action: 'LOAN_FUND_CREDIT',
          source_account: sourceAccount,
          amount: amount,
          description: description
        });

        if (result && result.success !== false) {
          const data = result.data || result;
          closeModal('fundLoanGLModal');
          showToast('success', 'Loan Pool Funded',
            `${money(amount)} transferred from GL ${sourceAccount} (${sourceName}) to Loan Fund.\n` +
            `GL 1200 debited: ${money(amount)}\n` +
            `BANK-LF-0001 new balance: ${money(data.loan_fund_balance_after || 0)}`);
          addAuditEntry('LOAN_FUND_CREDIT', 'Loan Fund', 'BANK-LF-0001',
            `Funded Loan & Advances by ${money(amount)} from GL ${sourceAccount} (${sourceName}). Operator: ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Ref: ${data.reference || 'N/A'}.`);
          // Refresh all related panels
          renderLoanFundPanel();
          renderDashboard();
        } else {
          showToast('error', 'Funding Failed', result?.error || 'Unknown error.');
        }
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('[FundLoanFromGL] Failed:', err);
        showToast('error', 'Funding Failed', 'An error occurred. Check the console.');
      }
    },
    true
  );
  return false;
}

/* ================================================================
   LOAN FUND PANEL — Displays Loans & Advances Fund + Loan Interest
   ================================================================ */
function renderLoanFundPanel() {
  const lf = DB.loanFundAccount;
  const li = DB.loanInterestAccount;

  /* Populate GL source account dropdown for Fund from GL modal */
  const flgSelect = $('flgSourceAccount');
  if (flgSelect && flgSelect.options.length <= 1) {
    // Show all GL accounts EXCEPT 1200 (Loans & Advances) — can't fund from itself
    const glAccounts = (DB.chartOfAccounts || []).filter(a => a.code !== '1200' && a.is_active);
    flgSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select source GL account...</option>' +
      glAccounts.map(a => {
        const bal = a.netBalance || 0;
        return `<option value="${a.code}">${a.code} — ${a.name} (${a.type}, Bal: ${money(bal)})</option>`;
      }).join('');
  }

  // Branch-filter transactions by actorBranch
  const lfBranchTxns = filterByUserBranch(lf.transactions);
  const liBranchTxns = filterByUserBranch(li.transactions);
  const lfDebits = lfBranchTxns.filter(t=>t.type==='DEBIT').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const lfCredits = lfBranchTxns.filter(t=>t.type==='CREDIT').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const liCredits = liBranchTxns.filter(t=>t.type==='CREDIT').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const branchBannerHtml = isAllBranchesMode() ? '' : `<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.08);border:1px solid rgba(103,232,181,.2);border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--accent)"><strong>Branch: ${STATE.currentBranch}</strong> — Showing loan fund transactions and net balance for this branch only.</div>`;

  // Branch-specific net balances for loan fund and interest accounts
  const lfNetBalance = isAllBranchesMode() ? lf.balance : (lfCredits - lfDebits);
  const liNetBalance = isAllBranchesMode() ? li.balance : liCredits;
  const balLabel = isAllBranchesMode() ? '' : ` (${STATE.currentBranch})`;

  /* ★ KPI consistency: compute totals from transaction list (not from local balance mutations).
     This ensures displayed values always match the visible transaction history. */
  const lfTotalDebits = lfBranchTxns.filter(t=>t.type==='DEBIT').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const lfTotalCredits = lfBranchTxns.filter(t=>t.type==='CREDIT').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const liTotalCredits = liBranchTxns.filter(t=>t.type==='CREDIT').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);

  /* Summary bar */
  $('loanFundSummary').innerHTML = branchBannerHtml + (isAllBranchesMode() ? `<div class="summary-item"><strong>2</strong> internal accounts</div>` : `<div class="summary-item"><strong>2</strong> internal accounts (${STATE.currentBranch})</div>`)
    + `<div class="summary-item"><strong>${money(lfNetBalance)}</strong> Loan Fund balance${balLabel}</div>`
    + `<div class="summary-item"><strong>${money(liNetBalance)}</strong> Interest Income balance${balLabel}</div>`
    + `<div class="summary-item"><strong>${money(lfNetBalance + liNetBalance)}</strong> combined</div>`;

  /* Loan Fund KPIs */
  $('lfBalance').textContent = money(lfNetBalance);
  $('lfBalance').style.color = lfNetBalance < 0 ? 'var(--danger)' : 'var(--success)';
  $('lfDebits').textContent = money(lfTotalDebits);
  $('lfCredits').textContent = money(lfTotalCredits);
  $('lfTxnCount').textContent = lfBranchTxns.length;

  /* Loan Interest KPIs */
  $('liBalance').textContent = money(liNetBalance);
  $('liBalance').style.color = 'var(--success)';
  $('liCredits').textContent = money(liTotalCredits);
  $('liTxnCount').textContent = liBranchTxns.length;

  /* Loan Fund transactions — branch-filtered (most recent first) */
  const lfTxns = [...lfBranchTxns].sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0)).slice(0, 20);
  $('lfTransactions').innerHTML = lfTxns.length === 0
    ? '<div style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted);padding:12px">No transactions yet. Loan disbursements and principal repayments will appear here.</div>'
    : lfTxns.map(t => `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:6px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:.78rem">
        <div><span style="color:${t.type==='DEBIT'?'var(--danger)':'var(--success)'};font-weight:700">${t.type}</span> <span style="color:var(--muted)">${t.ref}</span><br><span style="color:var(--soft)">${t.description}</span></div>
        <div style="text-align:right"><span style="font-weight:700;color:${t.type==='DEBIT'?'var(--danger)':'var(--success)'}">${t.type==='DEBIT'?'-':'+'}${money(t.amount)}</span><br><span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.72rem">${t.date}</span></div>
      </div>`).join('');

  /* Loan Interest transactions — branch-filtered (most recent first) */
  const liTxns = [...liBranchTxns].sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0)).slice(0, 20);
  $('liTransactions').innerHTML = liTxns.length === 0
    ? '<div style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted);padding:12px">No transactions yet. Loan interest received from repayments will appear here.</div>'
    : liTxns.map(t => `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:6px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:.78rem">
        <div><span style="color:var(--success);font-weight:700">${t.type}</span> <span style="color:var(--muted)">${t.ref}</span><br><span style="color:var(--soft)">${t.description}</span></div>
        <div style="text-align:right"><span style="font-weight:700;color:var(--success)">+${money(t.amount)}</span><br><span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.72rem">${t.date}</span></div>
      </div>`).join('');

  /* ★ DATABASE SYNC: After rendering, silently refresh loan fund data from backend.
     This ensures the next render cycle shows GL-authoritative values, not stale local mutations.
     Non-blocking — does not slow down the current render.
     ★ Uses a debounce flag to prevent recursive re-triggering. */
  if (API_CONNECTED && !STATE._lfRefreshPending && !renderLoanFundPanel._silentMode) {
    STATE._lfRefreshPending = true;
    API.get('loan-fund-accounts').then(data => {
      STATE._lfRefreshPending = false;
      if (data && Array.isArray(data)) {
        let changed = false;
        data.forEach(acct => {
          const mappedTxns = (acct.transactions||[]).map(t => ({
            id: t.id, ref: t.ref, date: t.date, type: t.type,
            description: t.description, amount: parseFloat(t.amount||0),
            balance: parseFloat(t.balance_after||0),
            operator: t.operator||'', timestamp: t.created_at||''
          }));
          if (acct.fundType === 'LOAN_FUND' || acct.accountNumber === 'BANK-LF-0001') {
            const newBal = parseFloat(acct.balance||0);
            if (Math.abs(DB.loanFundAccount.balance - newBal) > 0.01) {
              DB.loanFundAccount.balance = newBal;
              changed = true;
            }
            // Merge transactions: keep existing local ones, add new from backend, deduplicate by id
            const existingIds = new Set(DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.map(t=>t.id));
            mappedTxns.forEach(t => { if (!existingIds.has(t.id)) { DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.push(t); changed = true; } });
          } else if (acct.fundType === 'LOAN_INTEREST' || acct.accountNumber === 'BANK-LI-0001') {
            const newBal = parseFloat(acct.balance||0);
            if (Math.abs(DB.loanInterestAccount.balance - newBal) > 0.01) {
              DB.loanInterestAccount.balance = newBal;
              changed = true;
            }
            const existingIds = new Set(DB.loanInterestAccount.transactions.map(t=>t.id));
            mappedTxns.forEach(t => { if (!existingIds.has(t.id)) { DB.loanInterestAccount.transactions.push(t); changed = true; } });
          }
        });
        // Re-render silently ONLY if values actually changed (no toast, no disruption)
        if (changed) {
          const prev = renderLoanFundPanel._silentMode;
          renderLoanFundPanel._silentMode = true;
          renderLoanFundPanel();
          renderLoanFundPanel._silentMode = prev;
        }
      }
    }).catch(() => { STATE._lfRefreshPending = false; });
  }
}

function renderLoans() {
  // Populate branch filter dynamically from DB.branches (database-loaded)
  const branchFilter = $('loanBranchFilter');
  if (branchFilter && branchFilter.options.length <= 1) {
    const currentVal = branchFilter.value;
    const branches = [...new Set(DB.branches.map(b => b.name).filter(Boolean))];
    branchFilter.innerHTML = '<option value="">All</option>' + branches.map(b => `<option>${b}</option>`).join('');
    if (currentVal) branchFilter.value = currentVal;
  }
  const q = norm($('loanSearch')?.value || '');
  const st = $('loanStatusFilter')?.value || '';
  const br = $('loanBranchFilter')?.value || '';
  // Branch isolation — exclude PENDING/UNDER_REVIEW loans (they live in Applications tab until fully approved)
  const branchFiltered = filterByUserBranch(DB.loans).filter(l => l.status !== 'PENDING' && l.status !== 'UNDER_REVIEW');
  const filtered = branchFiltered.filter(l =>
    (!q || norm(l.loanNumber).includes(q) || norm(l.customerName).includes(q)) &&
    (!st || l.status === st) &&
    (!br || l.branch === br)
  ).sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0));
  // ★ FIX (LOAN-004): Use consistent data source for summary — all from 'filtered' to match visible cards
  const totalExposure = filtered.reduce((s,l)=>s+l.outstanding,0);
  const totalPrincipal = filtered.reduce((s,l)=>s+l.principal,0);
  // ★ FIX (RA-LOAN-004): Delinquent count from branchFiltered (portfolio-level) not filtered
  // (status-filter-scoped). When user filters by ACTIVE status, the delinquent count would
  // show 0 because no DELINQUENT loans are in the ACTIVE-only filtered set. Now it always
  // shows the total delinquent count for the branch, regardless of status filter.
  $('loanSummary').innerHTML = `<div class="summary-item"><strong>${filtered.length}</strong> loans</div><div class="summary-item"><strong>${money(totalExposure)}</strong> outstanding</div><div class="summary-item"><strong>${money(totalPrincipal)}</strong> total principal</div><div class="summary-item"><strong>${branchFiltered.filter(l=>l.status==='DELINQUENT').length}</strong> delinquent</div>`;
  $('loanCards').innerHTML = filtered.map(l=>{
    const progress = l.principal > 0 ? ((l.principal - l.outstanding) / l.principal * 100).toFixed(0) : '0';
    const debitAcct = DB.accounts.find(a=>a.id===l.debitAccountId);
    const pendingInstallments = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s=>s.loanId===l.id && (s.status==='DUE'||s.status==='MISSED'||s.status==='PARTIALLY_PAID'));
    const overdueInstallments = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s=>s.loanId===l.id && (s.status==='MISSED'||s.status==='PARTIALLY_PAID'));
    const nextInstallment = pendingInstallments[0];
    const nextDueAmount = nextInstallment ? nextInstallment.principal + nextInstallment.interest - nextInstallment.paid : 0;
    const totalPendingAmount = pendingInstallments.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.principal+i.interest-i.paid,0);
    const penaltyPct = Number(DB.settings.find(x=>x.key==='loan.late_payment_penalty')?.value || 2);
    const customerFallbackCount = DB.accounts.filter(a=>a.customerId===l.customerId && a.status==='ACTIVE' && a.id!==l.debitAccountId).length;
    const loanAutoEnabled = l.autoDeduct !== false;
    return `
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-header">
        <div><h3>${escHtml(l.loanNumber)}</h3><p style="margin-top:4px">${escHtml(l.customerName)} · ${escHtml(l.branch)}</p></div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center">
          <label class="toggle-switch" title="${loanAutoEnabled?'Auto deduction ON — click to toggle':'Auto deduction OFF — click to toggle'}"><input type="checkbox" ${loanAutoEnabled?'checked':''} onchange="toggleLoanAutoDeduct(${l.id})"><span class="toggle-slider"></span></label>
          <span class="pill ${pillCls(l.status)}">${escHtml(l.status)}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-grid" style="margin-bottom:14px">
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Outstanding</div><div class="di-value">${money(l.outstanding)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Interest Rate</div><div class="di-value">${l.interestRate}%${l.loanModule==='CREDIT_UNION'?' <span style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)">('+Math.round(l.interestRate/12*100)/100+'%/mo)</span>':''}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Next Due</div><div class="di-value">${l.nextDue}${nextInstallment?' <span style="color:var(--warn);font-size:.76rem">('+money(nextDueAmount)+')</span>':''}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Debit Account</div><div class="di-value" style="font-size:.82rem">${debitAcct?debitAcct.accountNumber+' ('+debitAcct.productType+')':'Not set'}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Repayment Mode</div><div class="di-value" style="font-size:.82rem">${l.repaymentMode==='SCHEDULED'?'Scheduled':l.repaymentMode==='FIXED_AMOUNT'?'Fixed Amount: '+money(l.repaymentAmount)+'/cycle '+(l.interestIncluded!==false?'(interest included)':'(+ interest on top)'):l.repaymentMode==='PERCENTAGE_OF_LOAN'?l.repaymentPct+'% of Loan/cycle':l.repaymentMode==='PERCENTAGE_OF_ACCOUNT'?l.repaymentPct+'% of Balance/cycle':'Scheduled'}</div></div>
      </div>
      ${pendingInstallments.length > 0 ? `<div style="padding:10px 14px;border-radius:10px;background:${overdueInstallments.length>0?'var(--danger-dim)':'var(--warn-dim)'};border:1px solid ${overdueInstallments.length>0?'rgba(255,107,134,.2)':'rgba(255,190,105,.2)'};margin-bottom:12px">
        <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:${overdueInstallments.length>0?'var(--danger)':'var(--warn)'};font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;margin-bottom:6px">${overdueInstallments.length>0?'PENDING + OVERDUE INSTALLMENTS':'PENDING INSTALLMENTS'} (${pendingInstallments.length})${DB.loanSchedule.some(s=>s.loanId===l.id && s.interestCapitalized)?' <span style="font-weight:400;color:var(--muted)">(includes capitalized interest)</span>':''}</div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Total Outstanding</span><span class="value" style="color:${overdueInstallments.length>0?'var(--danger)':'var(--warn)'};font-weight:700">${money(totalPendingAmount)}</span></div>
        ${overdueInstallments.length>0?`<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Overdue Count</span><span class="value" style="color:var(--danger)">${overdueInstallments.length} installment(s)</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Penalty Rate</span><span class="value" style="color:var(--danger)">${penaltyPct}% per overdue cycle</span></div>`:''}
        ${pendingInstallments.slice(0,3).map(i=>{
          const isOverdue = i.status==='MISSED'||i.status==='PARTIALLY_PAID';
          const due = i.principal+i.interest-i.paid;
          return `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:4px 0;font-size:.82rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)"><span style="color:${isOverdue?'var(--danger)':'var(--warn)'}">#${i.installment} · ${i.due} ${isOverdue?'(OVERDUE)':''} ${i.interestCapitalized?'<span style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--danger);font-weight:400">[+CAP]</span>':''}</span><span style="font-weight:600">${money(due)} ${i.paid>0?'(paid:'+money(i.paid)+')':''}</span></div>`;
        }).join('')}
        ${pendingInstallments.length>3?`<div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);padding-top:4px">+${pendingInstallments.length-3} more installment(s)...</div>`:''}
      </div>` : ''}
      <div class="detail-grid" style="margin-top:10px">
        <div class="detail-item" style="grid-column:1/-1"><div class="di-label">Repayment Strategy</div><div class="di-value" style="font-size:.84rem">${debitAcct?'Primary: '+debitAcct.accountNumber+' → Fallback: '+(customerFallbackCount>0?customerFallbackCount+' other account(s)':'none'):'No account configured'}</div></div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-bottom:12px"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px"><span>Repayment progress</span><span>${progress}%</span></div><div class="progress-bar"><div class="progress-fill" style="width:${progress}%;background:var(--accent)"></div></div></div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap">
        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="openLoanDrawer(${l.id})">View Details</button>
        ${l.status==='PENDING'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="approveLoanByLoanId(${l.id})">Approve</button>`:''}
        ${l.status==='APPROVED'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="disburseLoanByLoanId(${l.id})">Disburse</button>`:''}
        ${(l.status==='ACTIVE'||l.status==='DELINQUENT')?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="openLoanRepaymentModal(${l.id})">Record Payment</button>`:''}
        ${l.status==='ACTIVE'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-warn" onclick="markDelinquent(${l.id})">Mark Delinquent</button>`:''}
        ${(l.status==='ACTIVE'||l.status==='DELINQUENT')?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="restructureLoan(${l.id})">Restructure</button>`:''}
        ${(l.status==='ACTIVE'||l.status==='DELINQUENT')?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="writeOffLoan(${l.id})" style="background:var(--danger);color:#fff">Write Off</button>`:''}
        ${l.status==='ACTIVE'?`<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="rollbackLoanDisbursement(${l.id},'${l.loanNumber||''}')" style="background:#7c3aed;color:#fff;font-size:.72rem" title="Revert a failed disbursement (fund debit failed but loan was activated)">Rollback</button>`:''}
        ${(l.status==='SETTLED'||l.status==='CLOSED'||l.status==='WRITTEN_OFF'||l.status==='DEFAULTED')?`<span style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);padding:6px 0;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px"><i data-lucide="lock" style="width:13px;height:13px"></i> ${l.status==='SETTLED'?'Loan fully repaid — no further actions':l.status==='CLOSED'?'Loan closed — no further actions':l.status==='WRITTEN_OFF'?'Loan written off — no further actions':'Loan in default — no further actions'}</span>`:''}
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('') || '<div class="empty-state" style="grid-column:1/3"><p>No loans match your filters</p></div>';
}

function renderLoanApps() { renderLoanApplications(); }

function renderLoanApplications() {
  const q = norm($('loanAppSearch')?.value || '');
  // Branch isolation: filter loan applications by current branch selection
  // ★ Show PENDING, UNDER_REVIEW, and APPROVED applications.
  // FIX (LOAN-010): Show ALL APPROVED applications (both real and loans-derived) so they
  // don't fall into a visibility gap. APPROVED loans-derived apps also need a Disburse button.
  const branchBase = filterByUserBranch(DB.loanApplications).filter(la =>
    la.status === 'PENDING' || la.status === 'UNDER_REVIEW' || la.status === 'APPROVED'
  );
  const filtered = q ? branchBase.filter(la => [la.ref,la.customerName,la.purpose,la.branch,la.status].some(v => norm(v).includes(q))) : branchBase;
  $('loanAppTableBody').innerHTML = [...filtered].sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0)).map(la=>`
    <tr>
      <td class="td-mono">${escHtml(la.ref)}</td>
      <td><strong>${escHtml(la.customerName)}</strong></td>
      <td>${money(la.amount)}</td>
      <td>${la.term} months</td>
      <td style="max-width:180px;color:var(--muted);font-size:.84rem">${escHtml(la.purpose)}</td>
      <td><span class="pill ${pillCls(la.status)}">${escHtml(la.status.replace('_',' '))}</span></td>
      <td>${escHtml(la.branch)}</td>
      <td><div class="checklist">${la.checks.map(ch=>{
        const statusIcons={PASSED:'check-circle',FAILED:'x-circle',PENDING:'clock',WAIVED:'alert-triangle'};
        const cls={PASSED:'check-pass',FAILED:'check-fail',PENDING:'check-pending',WAIVED:'check-waived'};
        return `<div class="check-item ${cls[ch.status]||'check-pending'}"><span class="check-icon">${IC(statusIcons[ch.status]||'clock', 14)}</span>${ch.name}</div>`;
      }).join('')}</div></td>
      <td class="td-actions">
        ${la.status==='PENDING'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="reviewLoanApp(${la.id})" title="Complete due diligence review">Review & Due Diligence</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="rejectLoanApp(${la.id})">Reject</button>`:''}
        ${la.status==='UNDER_REVIEW'?`<span style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--accent);font-weight:600">${IC('clock',14)} Awaiting Manager Approval</span>`:''}
        ${la.status==='APPROVED'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="openLoanDisburseModal(${la.id})">Disburse</button>`:''}
        ${la.status!=='PENDING'&&la.status!=='UNDER_REVIEW'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="reviewLoanApp(${la.id})">Review</button>`:''}
      </td>
    </tr>`).join('');
}

function renderLoanScheduleFilter() {
  // Branch isolation: only show loans for the current branch
  const branchLoans = filterByUserBranch(DB.loans);
  $('scheduleLoanFilter').innerHTML = '<option value="">Select loan</option>' + branchLoans.map(l=>`<option value="${l.id}">${l.loanNumber} — ${l.customerName}</option>`).join('');
}

function renderLoanSchedule() {
  const loanId = Number($('scheduleLoanFilter')?.value) || 0;
  // Branch isolation: filter loans by current branch, then derive schedule from branch-filtered loan IDs
  const branchLoans = filterByUserBranch(DB.loans);
  // ★ FIX (LOAN-025): Schedule entries have no 'branch' field, so filterByUserBranch returns empty.
  // Instead, filter schedule by the branch-filtered loan IDs (the parent loans have branch info).
  const branchLoanIds = new Set(branchLoans.map(l=>l.id));
  const branchSchedule = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s => branchLoanIds.has(s.loanId));
  const loan = loanId ? branchLoans.find(l=>l.id===loanId) : null;
  // Summary stats for the selected loan (or all branch loans if none selected)
  const filtered = loanId ? branchSchedule.filter(s=>s.loanId===loanId) : branchSchedule;
  const totalPrincipal = filtered.reduce((s,t)=>s+t.principal,0);
  const totalInterest = filtered.reduce((s,t)=>s+t.interest,0);
  const totalPaid = filtered.reduce((s,t)=>s+t.paid,0);
  const paidCount = filtered.filter(s=>s.status==='PAID').length;
  // Show mode info when a specific loan is selected
  const modeInfo = loan ? `<div style="display:flex;gap:16px;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:8px">
    <span><strong>Mode:</strong> ${loan.repaymentMode==='SCHEDULED'?'Equal Installments':loan.repaymentMode==='FIXED_AMOUNT'?'Fixed '+money(loan.repaymentAmount)+'/cycle '+(loan.interestIncluded!==false?'(interest included)':'(+ interest on top)'):loan.repaymentMode==='PERCENTAGE_OF_LOAN'?loan.repaymentPct+'% of Loan/cycle':loan.repaymentMode==='PERCENTAGE_OF_ACCOUNT'?loan.repaymentPct+'% of Balance/cycle':'Scheduled'}</span>
    <span><strong>Rate:</strong> ${loan.interestRate}%</span>
    <span><strong>Total Due:</strong> ${money(totalPrincipal+totalInterest)} (P: ${money(totalPrincipal)} + I: ${money(totalInterest)})</span>
    <span><strong>Progress:</strong> ${paidCount}/${filtered.length} paid (${money(totalPaid)})</span>
  </div>` : '';
  $('loanScheduleBody').innerHTML = modeInfo + filtered.map(s=>{
    const total = s.principal + s.interest;
    const outstanding = total - s.paid;
    const sLoan = branchLoans.find(l=>l.id===s.loanId);
    return `
    <tr${s.status==='PAID'?' style="opacity:.65"':''}${s.interestCapitalized?' style="background:rgba(255,107,134,.04)"':''}>
      <td>#${s.installment}${s.interestCapitalized?' <span style="font-size:.68rem;color:var(--danger)" title="Missed interest was capitalized into principal">CAP</span>':''}</td>
      <td>${s.due}</td>
      <td class="td-${s.direction||'credit'}">${money(s.principal)}</td>
      <td style="color:var(--warn)">${money(s.interest)}</td>
      <td><strong>${money(total)}</strong></td>
      <td>${s.paid>0?money(s.paid):'—'}</td>
      <td>${outstanding>0?money(outstanding):'<span style="color:var(--success)">0</span>'}</td>
      <td><span class="pill ${pillCls(s.status)}">${s.status.replace('_',' ')}</span></td>
      <td class="td-actions">
        ${(s.status==='DUE'||s.status==='MISSED') && sLoan && (sLoan.status==='ACTIVE'||sLoan.status==='DELINQUENT')?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="openLoanRepaymentModal(${s.loanId})">Pay</button>`:''}
      </td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="9" class="empty-state"><p>Select a loan to view repayment schedule</p></td></tr>';
}

/* ================================================================
   LOAN ELIGIBILITY — Pre-creation checks (banking best practice)
   Rule 1: Customer with ACTIVE loan → BLOCKED (cannot apply)
   Rule 2: Customer with DELINQUENT loan → RESTRICTED (double approval required)
   Rule 3: Customer with WRITTEN_OFF loan → BLOCKED (permanent ban)
   ================================================================ */

/**
 * Check a customer's loan eligibility before creating a new application.
 * @param {number} customerId - The customer ID
 * @returns {{ eligible: boolean, reason: string, level: 'OK'|'BLOCKED'|'RESTRICTED', activeLoan: object|null, delinquentLoan: object|null, writtenOffLoan: object|null }}
 */
function checkLoanEligibility(customerId) {
  const customerLoans = DB.loans.filter(l => l.customerId === customerId);
  const activeLoan = customerLoans.find(l => l.status === 'ACTIVE');
  const delinquentLoan = customerLoans.find(l => l.status === 'DELINQUENT');
  const writtenOffLoan = customerLoans.find(l => l.status === 'WRITTEN_OFF');

  // Rule 1: Active loan — absolute block
  if (activeLoan) {
    return {
      eligible: false,
      reason: `This customer has an active loan (${activeLoan.loanNumber}) with outstanding balance of ${money(activeLoan.outstanding)}. No new loans can be granted until the existing loan is fully settled.`,
      level: 'BLOCKED',
      activeLoan, delinquentLoan: null, writtenOffLoan: null
    };
  }

  // Rule 3: Written-off loan — permanent ban
  if (writtenOffLoan) {
    return {
      eligible: false,
      reason: `This customer has a written-off loan (${writtenOffLoan.loanNumber}). Per banking policy, customers with written-off loans are permanently ineligible for new credit facilities.`,
      level: 'BLOCKED',
      activeLoan: null, delinquentLoan: null, writtenOffLoan
    };
  }
  // ★ FIX (LOAN-009): Defaulted loan — also permanent ban (matches backend loan-applications.php enforcement)
  const defaultedLoan = customerLoans.find(l => l.status === 'DEFAULTED');
  if (defaultedLoan) {
    return {
      eligible: false,
      reason: `This customer has a defaulted loan (${defaultedLoan.loanNumber}). Per banking policy, customers with defaulted loans are permanently ineligible for new credit facilities.`,
      level: 'BLOCKED',
      activeLoan: null, delinquentLoan: null, writtenOffLoan: null, defaultedLoan
    };
  }

  // Rule 2: Delinquent loan — restricted (double approval required)
  if (delinquentLoan) {
    return {
      eligible: true,
      reason: `This customer has a delinquent loan (${delinquentLoan.loanNumber}) with outstanding ${money(delinquentLoan.outstanding)}. New loan requires double approval (ADMIN + MANAGER).`,
      level: 'RESTRICTED',
      activeLoan: null, delinquentLoan, writtenOffLoan: null
    };
  }

  // No restrictions
  return {
    eligible: true,
    reason: '',
    level: 'OK',
    activeLoan: null, delinquentLoan: null, writtenOffLoan: null
  };
}

function openLoanModal() {
  // Branch isolation: only show customers for current branch
  const branchCustomers = filterByUserBranch(DB.customers).filter(c=>c.status==='ACTIVE');
  $('clCustomer').innerHTML = '<option value="">Select customer</option>' + branchCustomers.map(c=>`<option value="${c.id}">${c.fullName} (${c.customerNumber})</option>`).join('');
  $('clDebitAccount').innerHTML = '<option value="">Select customer first</option>';
  $('clDisbursementAccount').innerHTML = '<option value="">Select customer first</option>';
  $('clInterestRate').value = '';
  $('clInterestNote').textContent = '';
  // Credit Union mode: adapt form fields
  const isCU = getLoanModule() === 'CREDIT_UNION';
  const cuFields = $('clCreditUnionFields');
  const insGroup = $('clInsuranceFeeGroup');
  const rateLabel = $('clInterestRateLabel');
  const rateInput = $('clInterestRate');
  const useDefaultBtn = rateInput?.parentElement?.querySelector('.btn-ghost');
  if (cuFields) cuFields.style.display = isCU ? 'grid' : 'none';
  if (insGroup) insGroup.style.display = isCU ? 'grid' : 'none';
  if (isCU) {
    if (rateLabel) rateLabel.textContent = 'Annual Interest Rate (%)';
    if (rateInput) { rateInput.placeholder = 'e.g. 12'; rateInput.min = '6'; rateInput.max = '18'; }
    if (useDefaultBtn) useDefaultBtn.style.display = 'none';
    if ($('clInterestNote')) $('clInterestNote').innerHTML = '<span style="color:var(--accent)">COBAC regulated: 6% – 18% per annum.</span> Rate is expressed as annual (monthly = annual ÷ 12 per standard EMI formula).';
    if ($('clInsuranceFee')) $('clInsuranceFee').value = '0';
  } else {
    if (rateLabel) rateLabel.textContent = 'Interest Rate (%)';
    if (rateInput) { rateInput.placeholder = 'e.g. 5.50'; rateInput.min = '0.01'; rateInput.max = '30'; }
    if (useDefaultBtn) useDefaultBtn.style.display = '';
  }
  openModal('createLoanModal');
  // ★ Wire real-time repayment sufficiency hints to form inputs
  ['clAmount','clTerm','clInterestRate','clFixedAmount','clRepaymentPct'].forEach(id => {
    const el = $(id);
    if (el) el.oninput = updateRepaymentHint;
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('input[name="interestMethod"]').forEach(r => r.onchange = updateRepaymentHint);
}

function fillDefaultInterestRate() {
  const s = DB.settings.find(x=>x.key==='loan.default_interest_rate');
  if(s) {
    $('clInterestRate').value = s.value;
    $('clInterestNote').textContent = 'Bank default rate: ' + s.value + '%';
  } else {
    showToast('info','Default Rate','No default interest rate configured in Settings.');
  }
}

function onLoanCustomerChange() {
  const customerId = Number($('clCustomer').value);
  const banner = $('clEligibilityBanner');
  const submitBtn = $('createLoanForm')?.querySelector('[type="submit"]');
  // ★ Reset banner and enable form when no customer selected
  if(!customerId) {
    $('clDebitAccount').innerHTML = '<option value="">Select customer first</option>';
    $('clDisbursementAccount').innerHTML = '<option value="">Select customer first</option>';
    $('clBranch').value = '';
    if(banner) banner.style.display = 'none';
    if(submitBtn) { submitBtn.disabled = false; submitBtn.textContent = 'Submit Application'; }
    // Reset all form fields to enabled state
    const form = $('createLoanForm');
    if(form) form.querySelectorAll('input,select,textarea').forEach(el => el.disabled = false);
    return;
  }
  // ★ ELIGIBILITY CHECK — run before anything else
  const eligibility = checkLoanEligibility(customerId);
  if(banner) {
    if(eligibility.level === 'BLOCKED') {
      banner.style.display = 'block';
      banner.style.background = 'rgba(239,68,68,.08)';
      banner.style.border = '1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.25)';
      banner.innerHTML = `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px"><strong style="color:var(--danger)">Loan Application Blocked</strong></div><div style="color:var(--danger)">${eligibility.reason}</div>`;
      // ★ DISABLE the entire form — customer cannot apply
      const form = $('createLoanForm');
      if(form) form.querySelectorAll('input,select,textarea:not(#clCustomer)').forEach(el => el.disabled = true);
      if(submitBtn) { submitBtn.disabled = true; submitBtn.textContent = 'Application Blocked'; }
    } else if(eligibility.level === 'RESTRICTED') {
      banner.style.display = 'block';
      banner.style.background = 'rgba(245,158,11,.08)';
      banner.style.border = '1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.25)';
      banner.innerHTML = `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px"><strong style="color:#d97706">Restricted — Double Approval Required</strong></div><div style="color:#d97706">${eligibility.reason}</div><div style="margin-top:6px;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--soft)">This application will require both ADMIN and MANAGER approval before disbursement.</div>`;
      if(submitBtn) { submitBtn.disabled = false; submitBtn.textContent = 'Submit (Requires Double Approval)'; }
    } else {
      banner.style.display = 'none';
      if(submitBtn) { submitBtn.disabled = false; submitBtn.textContent = 'Submit Application'; }
    }
  }
  // Store eligibility level on the form for use during submission
  if($('createLoanForm')) $('createLoanForm').dataset.eligibilityLevel = eligibility.level;

  // Auto-set branch from the customer's home branch
  const customer = DB.customers.find(c => c.id === customerId);
  if (customer && customer.branch) {
    $('clBranch').value = customer.branch;
  } else {
    $('clBranch').value = 'Unknown';
  }
  const accounts = DB.accounts.filter(a=>a.customerId===customerId && a.status==='ACTIVE');
  const options = '<option value="">Select account</option>' + accounts.map(a=>`<option value="${a.id}">${a.accountNumber} — ${a.productType} (${money(a.availableBalance)})</option>`).join('');
  $('clDebitAccount').innerHTML = options;
  /* Disbursement dropdown: show customer accounts + indicate internal Loan Fund destination */
  const loanFundNote = `<option value="" disabled style="color:var(--accent);font-weight:600">── Internal Bank Accounts ──</option>`
    + `<option value="LOAN_FUND" style="color:var(--accent)">BANK-LF-0001 — Loans & Advances Fund (Bank-side, bal: ${money(DB.loanFundAccount.balance)})</option>`
    + `<option value="LOAN_INTEREST" disabled style="color:var(--muted)">BANK-LI-0001 — Loan Interest Income (receives interest only)</option>`;
  $('clDisbursementAccount').innerHTML = loanFundNote + options;
}

/* ★ REPAYMENT SUFFICIENCY VALIDATION ★
   Ensures the chosen repayment mode can fully repay principal + interest within the loan term.
   Returns { sufficient, minPerCycle, actualPerCycle, shortfall, totalInterest, message } */
function calculateMinRepayment(principal, annualRate, termMonths, loanModule) {
  const monthlyRate = (annualRate || 0) / 100 / 12;
  const n = termMonths || 1;
  if (principal <= 0 || n <= 0) return { sufficient: true, minPerCycle: 0, totalInterest: 0, message: '' };
  if (monthlyRate <= 0) {
    // Zero interest: any amount that covers principal/n is sufficient
    return { sufficient: true, minPerCycle: Math.ceil(principal / n), totalInterest: 0, message: '' };
  }
  // Calculate total interest for equal amortization (same method as generateLoanSchedule)
  let totalInterest, minPerCycle;
  if (loanModule === 'CREDIT_UNION') {
    // CU: Standard EMI — PMT = P × [r(1+r)^n] / [(1+r)^n - 1]
    const factor = Math.pow(1 + monthlyRate, n);
    const emi = principal * (monthlyRate * factor) / (factor - 1);
    minPerCycle = Math.ceil(emi * 100) / 100;
    totalInterest = Math.round((emi * n - principal) * 100) / 100;
  } else {
    // Bank: Equal principal — total interest = P × r × (n+1)/2
    totalInterest = Math.round(principal * monthlyRate * (n + 1) / 2 * 100) / 100;
    const totalRepayment = principal + totalInterest;
    minPerCycle = Math.ceil(totalRepayment / n * 100) / 100;
  }
  return { sufficient: false, minPerCycle, totalInterest: Math.max(0, totalInterest), message: '' };
}

/* ★ Real-time repayment sufficiency check — shows hint below the input ★ */
function updateRepaymentHint() {
  const amount = Number($('clAmount')?.value) || 0;
  const rate = Number($('clInterestRate')?.value) || 0;
  const term = Number($('clTerm')?.value) || 0;
  const mode = $('clRepaymentMode')?.value || 'SCHEDULED';
  const loanModule = getLoanModule();
  const hintEl = $('clRepaymentHint');
  if (!hintEl || amount <= 0 || rate <= 0 || term <= 0) { if (hintEl) hintEl.innerHTML = ''; return; }
  const calc = calculateMinRepayment(amount, rate, term, loanModule);
  if (mode === 'SCHEDULED') {
    hintEl.innerHTML = `<div style="padding:8px 10px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.08);border:1px solid rgba(103,232,181,.2);font-size:.78rem;color:var(--accent)">
      System will calculate equal installments automatically. Min monthly payment: <strong>${money(calc.minPerCycle)}</strong> (covers principal + ${money(calc.totalInterest)} interest over ${term} months).</div>`;
    return;
  }
  let actualPerCycle = 0, label = '';
  if (mode === 'FIXED_AMOUNT') {
    actualPerCycle = Number($('clFixedAmount')?.value) || 0;
    const intInc = document.querySelector('input[name="interestMethod"]:checked')?.value === 'INCLUDED';
    label = intInc ? `${money(actualPerCycle)} (interest included)` : `${money(actualPerCycle)} principal + interest on top`;
    if (!intInc) {
      // On top mode: need actualPerCycle >= ceil(principal/term) to cover principal
      const minPrincipal = Math.ceil(amount / term);
      if (actualPerCycle > 0 && actualPerCycle < minPrincipal) {
        hintEl.innerHTML = `<div style="padding:8px 10px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,107,134,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,107,134,.2);font-size:.78rem;color:var(--danger)">
          <strong>Insufficient:</strong> At ${money(actualPerCycle)}/month principal, this loan requires ${Math.ceil(amount / actualPerCycle)} months to repay — but the term is only ${term} months. Minimum principal per cycle: <strong>${money(minPrincipal)}</strong>. You'll fall short by <strong>${money(amount - actualPerCycle * term)}</strong> FCFA of principal.</div>`;
        return;
      }
    }
  } else if (mode === 'PERCENTAGE_OF_LOAN') {
    const pct = Number($('clRepaymentPct')?.value) || 0;
    actualPerCycle = amount * pct / 100;
    label = `${pct}% of ${money(amount)} = ${money(actualPerCycle)}/cycle`;
  } else if (mode === 'PERCENTAGE_OF_ACCOUNT') {
    const pct = Number($('clRepaymentPct')?.value) || 0;
    const customerId = Number($('clCustomer')?.value);
    const acct = customerId ? DB.accounts.find(a => a.id === Number($('clDebitAccount')?.value)) : null;
    actualPerCycle = acct ? acct.availableBalance * pct / 100 : 0;
    label = `${pct}% of account balance = ${money(actualPerCycle)}/cycle`;
  }
  const intInc = mode === 'FIXED_AMOUNT' ? (document.querySelector('input[name="interestMethod"]:checked')?.value === 'INCLUDED') : true;
  if (actualPerCycle <= 0) {
    hintEl.innerHTML = `<div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)">Enter a value to check repayment sufficiency. Min required: <strong>${money(calc.minPerCycle)}</strong>/cycle (${money(calc.totalInterest)} total interest over ${term}mo).</div>`;
    return;
  }
  if (intInc && actualPerCycle < calc.minPerCycle) {
    const shortfall = calc.minPerCycle - actualPerCycle;
    const monthsNeeded = Math.ceil(amount / actualPerCycle);
    hintEl.innerHTML = `<div style="padding:8px 10px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,107,134,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,107,134,.2);font-size:.78rem;color:var(--danger)">
      <strong>Insufficient:</strong> ${label} cannot repay this loan in ${term} months. At this rate, it would take ~${monthsNeeded} months. Minimum per cycle: <strong>${money(calc.minPerCycle)}</strong>. You're short by <strong>${money(shortfall)}</strong>/cycle.</div>`;
  } else if (!intInc && actualPerCycle < Math.ceil(amount / term) && mode === 'FIXED_AMOUNT') {
    hintEl.innerHTML = `<div style="padding:8px 10px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,107,134,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,107,134,.2);font-size:.78rem;color:var(--danger)">
      <strong>Insufficient.</strong></div>`;
  } else {
    hintEl.innerHTML = `<div style="padding:8px 10px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.08);border:1px solid rgba(103,232,181,.2);font-size:.78rem;color:var(--accent)">
      <strong>Sufficient.</strong> ${label} will repay the loan within ${term} months. Total cost: ${money(amount + calc.totalInterest)} (principal ${money(amount)} + interest ${money(calc.totalInterest)}).</div>`;
  }
}

function onRepaymentModeChange() {
  const mode = $('clRepaymentMode')?.value || 'SCHEDULED';
  const fixedGroup = $('clFixedAmountGroup');
  const pctGroup = $('clRepaymentPctGroup');
  const pctNote = $('clRepaymentPctNote');
  if(fixedGroup) fixedGroup.style.display = mode==='FIXED_AMOUNT'?'grid':'none';
  const intIncGroup = $('clInterestIncludedGroup');
  if(intIncGroup) intIncGroup.style.display = mode==='FIXED_AMOUNT'?'grid':'none';
  if(pctGroup) pctGroup.style.display = (mode==='PERCENTAGE_OF_LOAN'||mode==='PERCENTAGE_OF_ACCOUNT')?'grid':'none';
  if(pctNote) pctNote.textContent = mode==='PERCENTAGE_OF_LOAN'
    ? 'Percentage of loan principal to be paid each cycle.'
    : 'Percentage of the current debit account balance to be deducted each cycle.';
  updateRepaymentHint();
}

async function handleCreateLoan(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const customerId = Number($('clCustomer').value);
  const amount = Number($('clAmount').value);
  const interestRate = Number($('clInterestRate').value);
  const term = Number($('clTerm').value);
  const purpose = $('clPurpose').value.trim();
  const branch = $('clBranch').value;
  const debitAccountId = Number($('clDebitAccount').value);
  const disbursementRaw = $('clDisbursementAccount').value;
  const disbursementAccountId = disbursementRaw === 'LOAN_FUND' ? 'LOAN_FUND' : Number(disbursementRaw);
  const repaymentMode = $('clRepaymentMode').value || 'SCHEDULED';
  const repaymentAmount = repaymentMode==='FIXED_AMOUNT' ? Number($('clFixedAmount').value)||0 : 0;
  const repaymentPct = (repaymentMode==='PERCENTAGE_OF_LOAN'||repaymentMode==='PERCENTAGE_OF_ACCOUNT') ? Number($('clRepaymentPct').value)||0 : 0;
  const autoDeduct = $('clAutoDeduct').checked;
  const interestIncluded = repaymentMode==='FIXED_AMOUNT' ? (document.querySelector('input[name="interestMethod"]:checked')?.value === 'INCLUDED') : true;
  const loanModule = getLoanModule();
  const insuranceFee = loanModule === 'CREDIT_UNION' ? (Number($('clInsuranceFee')?.value) || 0) : 0;
  if(repaymentMode==='FIXED_AMOUNT' && repaymentAmount<=0) { showToast('error','Validation Error','Please enter a valid fixed amount per cycle.'); return false; }
  if((repaymentMode==='PERCENTAGE_OF_LOAN'||repaymentMode==='PERCENTAGE_OF_ACCOUNT') && repaymentPct<=0) { showToast('error','Validation Error','Please enter a valid repayment percentage.'); return false; }
  // ★ REPAYMENT SUFFICIENCY VALIDATION: Ensure the chosen mode can repay loan + interest within the term
  if (repaymentMode !== 'SCHEDULED') {
    const calc = calculateMinRepayment(amount, interestRate, term, loanModule);
    if (repaymentMode === 'FIXED_AMOUNT') {
      if (interestIncluded) {
        // Fixed amount covers P+I — must be >= minimum EMI
        if (repaymentAmount < calc.minPerCycle) {
          showToast('error','Insufficient Repayment Amount',
            `The fixed amount of ${money(repaymentAmount)}/cycle is too low to repay ${money(amount)} + ${money(calc.totalInterest)} interest in ${term} months. ` +
            `Minimum required: ${money(calc.minPerCycle)}/cycle. You are short by ${money(calc.minPerCycle - repaymentAmount)} per cycle. ` +
            `Increase the fixed amount or extend the loan term.`);
          return false;
        }
      } else {
        // Interest on top — fixed amount is principal only, must cover full principal in term
        const minPrincipal = Math.ceil(amount / term);
        if (repaymentAmount < minPrincipal) {
          showToast('error','Insufficient Principal Payment',
            `At ${money(repaymentAmount)}/cycle principal-only, this loan requires ${Math.ceil(amount / repaymentAmount)} months to repay the principal — but the term is only ${term} months. ` +
            `Minimum principal per cycle: ${money(minPrincipal)}. Shortfall: ${money(amount - repaymentAmount * term)} FCFA. ` +
            `Increase the fixed amount or extend the term.`);
          return false;
        }
      }
    } else if (repaymentMode === 'PERCENTAGE_OF_LOAN') {
      const pctPerCycle = amount * repaymentPct / 100;
      if (pctPerCycle < calc.minPerCycle) {
        showToast('error','Insufficient Repayment Percentage',
          `${repaymentPct}% of ${money(amount)} = ${money(pctPerCycle)}/cycle is too low to repay ${money(amount)} + ${money(calc.totalInterest)} interest in ${term} months. ` +
          `Minimum required: ${money(calc.minPerCycle)}/cycle (at least ${Math.ceil(calc.minPerCycle / amount * 10000) / 100}%). ` +
          `Increase the percentage or extend the term.`);
        return false;
      }
    } else if (repaymentMode === 'PERCENTAGE_OF_ACCOUNT') {
