      const acct = DB.accounts.find(a=>a.id===debitAccountId);
      if (acct) {
        const pctPerCycle = acct.availableBalance * repaymentPct / 100;
        if (pctPerCycle < calc.minPerCycle) {
          showToast('error','Insufficient Repayment Percentage',
            `${repaymentPct}% of current balance ${money(acct.availableBalance)} = ${money(pctPerCycle)}/cycle is below the minimum ${money(calc.minPerCycle)}/cycle needed to repay this loan in ${term} months. ` +
            `Increase the percentage, fund the account more, or choose a different repayment mode.`);
          return false;
        }
      }
    }
  }
  if (!customerId||!amount||!interestRate||!purpose||!branch||branch==='Unknown'||!debitAccountId||!disbursementAccountId) { showToast('error','Validation Error','Please fill in all required fields. Branch is auto-set from the customer.'); return false; }
  if (loanModule === 'CREDIT_UNION' && (interestRate < 6 || interestRate > 18)) { showToast('error','Validation Error','Credit Union annual rate must be between 6% and 18% per COBAC regulations (monthly equivalent: 0.5% – 1.5%).'); return false; }
  if (insuranceFee > 2500000) { showToast('error','Validation Error','Insurance/protection fee cannot exceed 2,500,000 FCFA.'); return false; }
  const maxAmountSetting = DB.settings.find(x=>x.key==='loan.max_amount');
  if(maxAmountSetting && amount > Number(maxAmountSetting.value)) { showToast('error','Amount Exceeds Limit','Requested amount exceeds the maximum loan amount of '+money(Number(maxAmountSetting.value))+'.'); return false; }

  // ★ ELIGIBILITY GATE: Re-check customer eligibility at submission time (defense-in-depth)
  const eligibility = checkLoanEligibility(customerId);
  if (!eligibility.eligible) {
    showToast('error', 'Loan Application Blocked', eligibility.reason);
    addAuditEntry('LOAN_ELIGIBILITY_BLOCKED', 'Loan Application', '', `Blocked loan application for customer ID ${customerId} by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Reason: ${eligibility.reason}`);
    return false;
  }
  const requiresDoubleApproval = eligibility.level === 'RESTRICTED';

  const customer = DB.customers.find(c=>c.id===customerId);
  const debitAccount = DB.accounts.find(a=>a.id===debitAccountId);
  const newRef = `LA-${new Date().getFullYear()}-${String(DB.loanApplications.length+21).padStart(4,'0')}`; // ★ FIX (LOAN-001): Was hardcoded 2026
  const newLaId = DB.loanApplications.length + 1;
  // Create loan application — PENDING status, NO approval yet (approval created after due diligence review)
  DB.loanApplications.push({
    id: newLaId, ref: newRef, customerId, customerName: customer?.fullName||'Unknown',
    amount, term, purpose, status: 'PENDING', branch, appliedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    interestRate, debitAccountId, debitAccountNumber: debitAccount?.accountNumber||'', disbursementAccountId,
    repaymentMode, repaymentAmount, repaymentPct, autoDeduct, interestIncluded,
    loanModule, insuranceFee,
    requiresDoubleApproval, // ★ True if customer has a delinquent loan (needs ADMIN + MANAGER)
    checks:[{code:'KYC',name:'KYC Verification',status:'PASSED'},{code:'CREDIT',name:'Credit Bureau Check',status:'PENDING'},{code:'HOLDING',name:'Minimum Holding Rule (120 days)',status:'PENDING'},{code:'AFFORDABILITY',name:'Affordability Assessment',status:'PENDING'}]
  });
  // Sync loan to backend — status stays PENDING (not visible in Active Loans until approved)
  const refreshed1 = await refreshCsrfToken();
  if (!refreshed1) {
    console.warn('[Loan Create] CSRF token refresh failed before loan POST — proceeding with existing token.');
  }
  const loanResult = await API.post('loans', {
    customer_id: customerId, customer_name: customer?.fullName, principal: amount,
    interest_rate: interestRate, term_months: term, branch: branch,
    product_type: $('clProductType')?.value || '',
    debit_account_id: debitAccountId,
    repayment_mode: $('clRepaymentMode')?.value || 'SCHEDULED',
    repayment_amount: repaymentAmount,
    repayment_pct: repaymentPct,
    auto_deduct: autoDeduct,
    interest_included: interestIncluded ? 1 : 0,
    loan_module: loanModule,
    insurance_fee: insuranceFee
  });
  if (loanResult?.id) {
    const dbLoanId = loanResult.id;
    const loanRef = loanResult.loan_number || '';
    DB.loanApplications[DB.loanApplications.length-1]._dbId = dbLoanId;
    // ★ FIXED: Also create a record in the real loan_applications table
    try {
      await refreshCsrfToken();
      const appResult = await API.post('loan-applications', {
        customer_id: customerId, amount, term, interest_rate: interestRate,
        purpose, branch, product_type: $('clProductType')?.value || '',
        repayment_mode: $('clRepaymentMode')?.value || 'SCHEDULED',
        debit_account_number: debitAccount?.accountNumber || '',
        debit_account_id: debitAccountId
      });
      if (appResult?.id) {
        DB.loanApplications[DB.loanApplications.length-1]._isRealApplication = true;
        DB.loanApplications[DB.loanApplications.length-1].id = appResult.id;
        DB.loanApplications[DB.loanApplications.length-1].ref = appResult.ref || newRef;
        // ★ Store loan_id and disbursement_account_id back to the application for cross-reference on refresh
        try {
          await refreshCsrfToken();
          await API.put('loan-applications/' + appResult.id, {
            loan_id: dbLoanId,
            disbursement_account_id: disbursementAccountId === 'LOAN_FUND' ? null : disbursementAccountId
          });
        } catch(e2) { console.warn('[handleCreateLoan] Failed to link loan_id to application:', e2); }
      }
    } catch (e) { console.warn('[handleCreateLoan] loan_applications backend sync failed:', e); }
    // Also add to DB.loans with PENDING status (hidden from Active Loans tab until after full approval)
    DB.loans.push({
      id: dbLoanId, loanNumber: loanRef, customerId, customerName: customer?.fullName||'',
      branch, status: 'PENDING', principal: amount, outstanding: amount, accruedInterest: 0,
      interestRate, termMonths: term, repaymentFreq: 'Monthly',
      disbursedAt: null, maturityDate: null, nextDue: null,
      debitAccountId, debitAccountNumber: debitAccount?.accountNumber||'',
      source: 'Loan application ' + newRef, productType: $('clProductType')?.value || '',
      repaymentMode: $('clRepaymentMode')?.value || 'SCHEDULED',
      repaymentAmount, repaymentPct, autoDeduct: autoDeduct, interestIncluded,
      loanModule, insuranceFee
    });
  }
  closeModal('createLoanModal');
  $('createLoanForm').reset();
  $('clBranch').value = '';
  const doubleApprovalNote = requiresDoubleApproval
    ? ' This application requires DOUBLE APPROVAL (ADMIN + MANAGER) due to an existing delinquent loan.'
    : '';
  showToast(requiresDoubleApproval ? 'warning' : 'success', 'Application Submitted',
    `Loan application ${newRef} for ${money(amount)} at ${interestRate}% has been submitted.${doubleApprovalNote} Complete due diligence review in the Applications tab to proceed.`);
  addAuditEntry('LOAN_APP_CREATE','Loan Application',newRef,`New loan application submitted by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName} for ${customer?.fullName}. Rate: ${interestRate}%. Double approval: ${requiresDoubleApproval?'YES (delinquent loan)':'No'}. Debit: ${debitAccount?.accountNumber}. Destination: ${disbursementAccountId==='LOAN_FUND'?'BANK-LF-0001 (Loans & Advances Fund)':(DB.accounts.find(a=>a.id===disbursementAccountId)?.accountNumber||'N/A')}. Branch: ${branch}.`);
  renderLoanApplications();
  updateBadges();
  return false;
}

function openLoanDrawer(id) {
  const l = DB.loans.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!l) return;
  const schedule = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s=>s.loanId===id);
  const progress = ((l.principal - l.outstanding) / l.principal * 100).toFixed(0);
  const debitAcct = DB.accounts.find(a=>a.id===l.debitAccountId);
  const nextInstallment = schedule.find(s=>s.status==='DUE'||s.status==='MISSED');
  const isCU = l.loanModule === 'CREDIT_UNION';
  const scheduleTypeLabel = isCU ? 'Reducing Balance (Equal Monthly Payments)' : 'Equal Principal Payments';
  const rateLabel = isCU ? `${l.interestRate}% annual (CU · ${Math.round(l.interestRate/12*100)/100}%/month)` : `${l.interestRate}% annual`;
  openDrawer('Loan: '+l.loanNumber, `
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Loan Information</h4>
      <div class="detail-grid">
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Loan Number</div><div class="di-value">${l.loanNumber}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Status</div><div class="di-value"><span class="pill ${pillCls(l.status)}">${l.status}</span></div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Module</div><div class="di-value"><span class="pill ${isCU?'pill-active':'pill-review'}" style="font-size:.82rem">${isCU?'<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px">'+IC("building-2", 14)+' Credit Union</span> (OHADA/COBAC)':'<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px"><i data-lucide="building-2" style="width:14px;height:14px;stroke-width:2"></i> Bank</span>'}</span></div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Schedule Type</div><div class="di-value" style="font-size:.84rem">${scheduleTypeLabel}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Customer</div><div class="di-value">${l.customerName}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Branch</div><div class="di-value">${l.branch}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Principal</div><div class="di-value">${money(l.principal)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Outstanding</div><div class="di-value">${money(l.outstanding)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Accrued Interest</div><div class="di-value">${money(l.accruedInterest)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Interest Rate</div><div class="di-value">${rateLabel}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Term</div><div class="di-value">${l.termMonths} months</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Frequency</div><div class="di-value">${l.repaymentFreq}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Disbursed</div><div class="di-value">${shortDate(l.disbursedAt)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Maturity</div><div class="di-value">${shortDate(l.maturityDate)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Next Due</div><div class="di-value">${l.nextDue || '—'}</div></div>
        ${isCU && l.insuranceFee > 0 ? `<div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Insurance Fee</div><div class="di-value" style="color:var(--warn)">${money(l.insuranceFee)} <span style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--soft)">(deducted at disbursement)</span></div></div>` : ''}
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Debit Account</div><div class="di-value" style="font-size:.84rem">${debitAcct?debitAcct.accountNumber+' ('+debitAcct.productType+') <br>Balance: '+money(debitAcct.availableBalance):'Not configured'}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Repayment Mode</div><div class="di-value" style="font-size:.84rem">${l.repaymentMode==='SCHEDULED'?(isCU?'Scheduled (Equal Monthly — CU Reducing Balance)':'Scheduled (Equal Installments)'):l.repaymentMode==='FIXED_AMOUNT'?'Fixed Amount: '+money(l.repaymentAmount)+' per cycle '+(l.interestIncluded!==false?'(interest included)':'(+ interest on top)'):l.repaymentMode==='PERCENTAGE_OF_LOAN'?l.repaymentPct+'% of Loan Principal per cycle':l.repaymentMode==='PERCENTAGE_OF_ACCOUNT'?l.repaymentPct+'% of Account Balance per cycle':'Scheduled'}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Auto Deduction</div><div class="di-value"><label class="toggle-switch"><input type="checkbox" ${l.autoDeduct!==false?'checked':''} onchange="toggleLoanAutoDeduct(${l.id})"><span class="toggle-slider"></span></label> <span style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${l.autoDeduct!==false?'Enabled':'Disabled'}</span></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    ${isCU?`<div class="drawer-section" style="padding:10px 14px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.06);border:1px solid rgba(103,232,181,.15);font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5">
      <strong style="color:var(--accent)"><span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px">'+IC("building-2", 14)+' Credit Union</span> Mode</strong> — Uses the Reducing Balance Method per COBAC regulations. Monthly installments are equal (standard amortization). Interest is calculated on the outstanding balance.${l.insuranceFee > 0 ? ' Insurance/protection fee of '+money(l.insuranceFee)+' was deducted at disbursement.' : ''}
    </div>`:''}
    ${nextInstallment?`<div class="drawer-section" style="padding:12px 14px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--warn-dim);border:1px solid rgba(255,190,105,.2)">
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">
        <div><strong style="color:var(--warn);font-size:.88rem">Next Installment Due</strong><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px">#${nextInstallment.installment} · Due ${nextInstallment.due} · ${money(nextInstallment.principal + nextInstallment.interest)}</div></div>
        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="closeDrawer();openLoanRepaymentModal(${l.id})">Pay Now</button>
      </div>
    </div>`:''}
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Repayment Progress</h4>
      <div style="margin-bottom:8px"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px"><span>Principal repaid</span><span>${progress}%</span></div><div class="progress-bar"><div class="progress-fill" style="width:${progress}%;background:var(--accent)"></div></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Repayment Schedule (${schedule.length})</h4>
      ${schedule.length?`<div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px">${l.repaymentMode==='SCHEDULED'?(isCU?'Equal Monthly Payments (CU Amortization)':'Equal Principal (Bank)'):l.repaymentMode==='FIXED_AMOUNT'?'Fixed '+money(l.repaymentAmount)+'/cycle '+(l.interestIncluded!==false?'(interest included)':'(+ interest on top)'):l.repaymentMode==='PERCENTAGE_OF_LOAN'?l.repaymentPct+'% of Loan/cycle':l.repaymentMode==='PERCENTAGE_OF_ACCOUNT'?l.repaymentPct+'% of Balance/cycle':'Scheduled'} · Rate: ${rateLabel} · Total: ${money(schedule.reduce((s,t)=>s+t.principal+t.interest,0))}</div>`:''}
      ${schedule.map(s=>`<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">#${s.installment} · ${s.due}</span><span class="value"><span class="pill ${pillCls(s.status)}" style="margin-right:6px">${s.status.replace('_',' ')}</span><strong>${money(s.totalPayment || (s.principal+s.interest))}</strong> <span style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)">(P:${money(s.principal)}</span> + <span style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--warn)">I:${money(s.interest)})</span></span></div>`).join('')||'<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.86rem">No schedule found</p>'}
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:12px;flex-wrap:wrap">
      ${(l.status==='ACTIVE'||l.status==='DELINQUENT')?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="closeDrawer();openLoanRepaymentModal(${l.id})">Record Payment</button>`:''}
      ${l.status==='ACTIVE'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-warn" onclick="closeDrawer();markDelinquent(${l.id})">Mark Delinquent</button>`:''}
      ${(l.status==='ACTIVE'||l.status==='DELINQUENT')?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="closeDrawer();restructureLoan(${l.id})">Restructure</button>`:''}
      ${l.status==='ACTIVE'?`<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="closeDrawer();rollbackLoanDisbursement(${l.id},'${l.loanNumber||''}')" style="background:#7c3aed;color:#fff;font-size:.72rem" title="Revert a failed disbursement (fund debit failed but loan was activated)">Rollback</button>`:''}
      ${(l.status==='SETTLED'||l.status==='CLOSED'||l.status==='WRITTEN_OFF'||l.status==='DEFAULTED')?`<span style="font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);padding:8px 12px;background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px"><i data-lucide="lock" style="width:14px;height:14px"></i> ${l.status==='SETTLED'?'Fully repaid — no further actions permitted':l.status==='CLOSED'?'Closed — no further actions permitted':l.status==='WRITTEN_OFF'?'Written off — no further actions permitted':'Defaulted — no further actions permitted'}</span>`:''}
      ${l.customerId?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="closeDrawer();openCustomerDrawer(${l.customerId})">View Customer</button>`:''}
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="closeDrawer()">Close</button>
    </div>`);
}

function markDelinquent(id) {
  const l = DB.loans.find(x=>x.id===id);
  if(!l) return;
  // ★ BLOCK: Terminal-status loans cannot be marked delinquent (best practice)
  const terminalStatuses = ['SETTLED','CLOSED','WRITTEN_OFF','DEFAULTED'];
  if(terminalStatuses.includes(l.status)) {
    showToast('error','Action Blocked',`Loan ${l.loanNumber} is already ${l.status}. A ${l.status} loan cannot be marked as delinquent.`);
    return;
  }
  // ★ BLOCK: Loan must be ACTIVE to be marked delinquent (not RESTRUCTURED, not already DELINQUENT)
  if(l.status !== 'ACTIVE') {
    showToast('error','Action Blocked',`Only ACTIVE loans can be marked as delinquent. This loan is currently ${l.status}.`);
    return;
  }
  showConfirm('Mark Delinquent','This will flag the loan as delinquent and trigger collection procedures. This action is irreversible.',async (reason)=>{
    const loan = DB.loans.find(x=>x.id===id);
    if(!loan) return;
    // Double-check status hasn't changed during confirmation dialog
    if(loan.status !== 'ACTIVE') {
      showToast('error','Action Blocked',`Loan status changed to ${loan.status} during confirmation. Action cancelled.`);
      return;
    }
    loan.status = 'DELINQUENT';
    showToast('warning','Loan Flagged',`${loan.loanNumber} has been marked as delinquent.`);
    addAuditEntry('LOAN_DELINQUENT','Loan',loan.loanNumber,`Loan marked delinquent by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}`);
    renderLoans();
    // Persist status change to backend
    if(API_CONNECTED) {
      await refreshCsrfToken();
      API.put('loans/' + id, { status: 'DELINQUENT' }).catch(err => console.warn('[MarkDelinquent] Failed to sync:', err));
    }
  }, true);
}

/* ★ Write Off Loan — moves NPA to written-off status, debits provision from loan fund ★ */
function writeOffLoan(id) {
  const l = DB.loans.find(x=>x.id===id);
  if(!l) return;
  // ★ BLOCK: Terminal-status loans cannot be written off (best practice)
  const blockedStatuses = ['SETTLED','CLOSED','WRITTEN_OFF','DEFAULTED','PENDING','APPROVED'];
  if(blockedStatuses.includes(l.status)) {
    showToast('error','Action Blocked',`A ${l.status} loan cannot be written off. Write-off is only applicable to ACTIVE or DELINQUENT loans with outstanding balance.`);
    return;
  }
  showConfirm('Write Off Loan',
    `Write off <strong>${l.loanNumber}</strong> (${l.customerName})?<br><br>` +
    `<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;font-size:.84rem;margin-bottom:8px">` +
    `<div><span style="color:var(--muted)">Outstanding:</span> <strong>${money(l.outstanding)}</strong></div>` +
    `<div><span style="color:var(--muted)">Principal:</span> <strong>${money(l.principal)}</strong></div>` +
    `<div><span style="color:var(--muted)">Accrued Interest:</span> <strong>${money(l.accruedInterest)}</strong></div>` +
    `<div><span style="color:var(--muted)">Status:</span> <span class="pill ${pillCls(l.status)}">${l.status}</span></div></div>` +
    `<span style="color:var(--danger);font-size:.82rem"><i data-lucide="alert-triangle" style="width:14px;height:14px;stroke-width:2;vertical-align:-2px;color:var(--danger)"></i> This action writes off the outstanding balance as a loss. It requires approval.</span>`,
    false, true,
    async (reason) => {
      // Create approval for write-off (requires maker-checker)
      const approval = {
        id: -(DB.approvals.length + 1),
        entityType: 'Loan',
        entityId: id,
        scopeCode: 'loans.writeoff',
        submittedBy: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
        branch: l.branch,
        status: 'PENDING',
        value: 'Write off ' + l.loanNumber + ' — ' + money(l.outstanding) + ' outstanding',
        submittedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        _writeoffDetails: { loanId: id, loanNumber: l.loanNumber, outstanding: l.outstanding, principal: l.principal, accruedInterest: l.accruedInterest, customerName: l.customerName, reason: reason }
      };
      DB.approvals.push(approval);
      // Sync approval to backend
      if(API_CONNECTED) {
        await refreshCsrfToken();
        const result = await API.post('approvals', {
          entity_type: 'Loan', entity_id: String(id),
          scope_code: 'loans.writeoff', value: approval.value,
          branch: l.branch,
          details: JSON.stringify(approval._writeoffDetails)
        });
        if(result?.data?.id) approval.id = result.data.id;
      }
      addAuditEntry('LOAN_WRITEOFF_REQUEST','Loan',l.loanNumber,`Write-off requested by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Outstanding: ${money(l.outstanding)}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}`);
      showToast('info','Write-Off Submitted',`Write-off for ${l.loanNumber} requires approval before execution.`);
      renderApprovals(); renderLoans(); updateBadges();
    }, true);
}

/* ================================================================
   APPROVALS
   ================================================================ */
function renderApprovals() {
  const filter = STATE.approvalFilter;
  const q = norm($('approvalSearch')?.value || '');
  // Branch isolation: filter approvals by current branch selection
  const branchBase = filterByUserBranch(DB.approvals);
  const filtered = branchBase.filter(a => {
    const matchStatus = !filter || a.status === filter;
    const matchQ = !q || [a.entityType,String(a.entityId),a.scopeCode,a.submittedBy,a.branch,a.value].some(v => norm(v).includes(q));
    return matchStatus && matchQ;
  }).sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0));
  const pending = branchBase.filter(a=>a.status==='PENDING').length;
  // ★ FIX (RA-APPR-001): Added summary bar to Approvals panel for UX parity with Loans panel.
  // Previously, the `pending` variable was computed but never displayed. Users had to
  // manually count items in each tab to understand the approval queue status.
  const approvedCount = branchBase.filter(a=>a.status==='APPROVED').length;
  const rejectedCount = branchBase.filter(a=>a.status==='REJECTED').length;
  const approvalSummaryEl = $('approvalSummary');
  if (approvalSummaryEl) {
    approvalSummaryEl.innerHTML = `<div class="summary-item"><strong>${branchBase.length}</strong> total</div><div class="summary-item"><strong style="color:var(--warn)">${pending}</strong> pending</div><div class="summary-item"><strong style="color:var(--success)">${approvedCount}</strong> approved</div><div class="summary-item"><strong style="color:var(--danger)">${rejectedCount}</strong> rejected</div>`;
  }
  // ★ FIX (APPR-004): Check if current user submitted the approval — self-approval is blocked by backend
  const currentUserName = STATE.currentUser?.fullName || '';
  $('approvalTableBody').innerHTML = filtered.map(a=>{
    const isOwnRequest = a.submittedBy === currentUserName;
    return `<tr>
      <td><strong>${escHtml(a.entityType)}</strong><span class="td-sub">${escHtml(a.entityId)}</span></td>
      <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.78rem">${escHtml(a.scopeCode)}</td>
      <td>${escHtml(a.submittedBy)}</td>
      <td><span class="pill ${pillCls(a.status)}">${escHtml(a.status)}</span></td>
      <td>${escHtml(a.branch)}</td>
      <td>${escHtml(a.value)}</td>  <!-- ★ FIX (APPR-005): Escape value to prevent XSS -->
      <td>${dateFmt(a.submittedAt)}</td>
      <td class="td-actions">
        ${a.status==='PENDING'?`
          ${isOwnRequest?`<span style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--warn);font-style:italic" title="You submitted this request — dual-control prevents self-approval">Your request</span>`:`
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="approveItem(${a.id})">Approve</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="rejectItem(${a.id})">Reject</button>`}
        `:`<span style="font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted)">${escHtml(a.decidedBy||'')}</span>`}
      </td>
    </tr>`;}).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="8" class="empty-state"><p>No approvals match your filter</p></td></tr>';
}

function filterApprovals(btn, status) {
  btn.closest('.tabs').querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  STATE.approvalFilter = status;
  renderApprovals();
}

function approveItem(id) {
  const item = DB.approvals.find(a=>a.id===id);
  if(!item) return;
  // ★ FIX (APPR-006): Check approval limit before proceeding — prevent users from approving
  // amounts beyond their authority. The backend also enforces this, but the frontend check
  // provides a better UX (no confusing 403 error after confirmation).
  const userLimit = STATE.currentUser?.approvalLimit || 0;
  if (userLimit > 0) {
    let approvalAmount = 0;
    // Extract amount from structured details
    if (item._reversalDetails) approvalAmount = item._reversalDetails.netAmount || item._reversalDetails.grossAmount || 0;
    else if (item._writeoffDetails) approvalAmount = item._writeoffDetails.outstanding || item._writeoffDetails.principal || 0;
    else if (item._settingDetails) approvalAmount = 0; // Settings don't have a monetary amount
    // Fallback: parse amount from value string
    if (approvalAmount <= 0 && item.value) {
      const match = item.value.match(/([\d,]+(?:\.\d+)?)/);
      if (match) approvalAmount = parseFloat(match[1].replace(/,/g, ''));
    }
    if (approvalAmount > userLimit) {
      showToast('error', 'Approval Limit Exceeded', `Your approval limit is ${money(userLimit)}, but this item involves ${money(approvalAmount)}. A higher-authority approver is required.`);
      return;
    }
  }
  showConfirm('Approve','Are you sure you want to approve this item? This action will be recorded in the audit trail.', async ()=>{

    // ── Sync to backend: API methods return null on failure, not throw ──
    await refreshCsrfToken();
    let backendOk = false;
    // Skip PUT if the ID is a temporary negative number (never persisted to backend)
    const isTempId = !id || id <= 0;
    if (!isTempId) {
      const putResult = await API.put('approvals/' + id, { status: 'APPROVED', reason: '' });
      if (putResult) backendOk = true;
    }
    if (!backendOk) {
      // Approval was never persisted (temp ID) or PUT failed — create it first, then approve
      await refreshCsrfToken();
      const created = await API.post('approvals', {
        entity_type: item.entityType, entity_id: String(item.entityId),
        scope_code: item.scopeCode, value: item.value,
        branch: item.branch,
        details: JSON.stringify(item._reversalDetails || item._writeoffDetails || item._settingDetails || null)
      });
      if (created?.data?.id) {
        item.id = created.data.id;
        await refreshCsrfToken();
        const put2 = await API.put('approvals/' + created.data.id, { status: 'APPROVED', reason: '' });
        if (put2) backendOk = true;
      }
    }
    if (!backendOk) {
      console.warn('[Approval] Backend sync failed for approval #'+id+', proceeding locally');
    }

    // Update local state after backend sync
    item.status='APPROVED';
    item.decidedBy=STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System';
    item.decidedAt=new Date().toISOString();
    // Update underlying entity status
    if(item.entityType==='Transaction Reversal'){
      // ── APPROVE REVERSAL: Execute the actual reversal (balance, status, children) ──
      await executeApprovedReversal(item);
    } else if(item.entityType==='Transaction'){
      const txn = DB.transactions.find(t=>t.id===item.entityId);
      if(txn && txn.status==='PENDING_APPROVAL') txn.status='POSTED';
    } else if(item.entityType==='Loan Application'){
      // ★ Try direct ID match first, then fallback to _dbId (handles page reload where IDs differ)
      let la = DB.loanApplications.find(l=>l.id===item.entityId);
      if (!la) la = DB.loanApplications.find(l=>l._dbId===item.entityId);
      if(la && (la.status==='PENDING'||la.status==='UNDER_REVIEW')) la.status='APPROVED';
      // ★ FIXED: Update the real loan_applications table for real applications
      if (la && la._isRealApplication) {
        try {
          await refreshCsrfToken();
          await API.put('loan-applications/' + la.id, { status: 'APPROVED', decision_reason: 'Approved by ' + (STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System') });
        } catch (e) { console.warn('[approveItem] loan_applications backend sync failed:', e); }
      }
      // ── Also update the loan in DB.loans + sync to backend ──
      // Primary match: via _dbId on the loan application
      let matchedLoan = null;
      if (la && la._dbId) {
        matchedLoan = DB.loans.find(l => l.id === la._dbId && (l.status === 'PENDING' || l.status === 'UNDER_REVIEW'));
      }
      // Fallback match: by customer + amount + PENDING/UNDER_REVIEW (for locally-created loans without _dbId)
      if (!matchedLoan && la) {
        matchedLoan = DB.loans.find(l => l.customerId === la.customerId && l.principal === la.amount && (l.status === 'PENDING' || l.status === 'UNDER_REVIEW'));
      }
      if (matchedLoan) {
        matchedLoan.status = 'APPROVED';
        // Sync loan status to backend
        await refreshCsrfToken();
        await API.put('loans/' + matchedLoan.id, { status: 'APPROVED' });
      } else if (la && la._dbId) {
        // Loan not in DB.loans yet (e.g. created this session, push didn't happen) — add it as APPROVED
        DB.loans.push({
          id: la._dbId, loanNumber: la.ref, customerId: la.customerId,
          customerName: la.customerName, branch: la.branch, status: 'APPROVED',
          principal: la.amount, outstanding: la.amount, accruedInterest: 0,
          interestRate: la.interestRate, termMonths: la.term, repaymentFreq: 'Monthly',
          disbursedAt: null, maturityDate: null, nextDue: null,
          debitAccountId: la.debitAccountId, debitAccountNumber: la.debitAccountNumber,
          source: 'Loan application ' + la.ref,
          repaymentMode: la.repaymentMode, repaymentAmount: la.repaymentAmount,
          repaymentPct: la.repaymentPct, autoDeduct: la.autoDeduct,
          interestIncluded: la.interestIncluded, loanModule: la.loanModule,
          insuranceFee: la.insuranceFee
        });
        await refreshCsrfToken();
        await API.put('loans/' + la._dbId, { status: 'APPROVED' });
      }
    } else if(item.entityType==='Setting'){
      // ── APPROVE SETTING: Extract new value + effective_from from structured details, persist to DB ──
      let setting = DB.settings.find(s=>s.id===item.entityId);
      // Fallback: find by settingKey if ID mismatch (e.g. after page reload)
      if(!setting && item._settingDetails && item._settingDetails.settingKey) {
        setting = DB.settings.find(s=>s.key===item._settingDetails.settingKey);
      }
      // Fallback: find by parsing entity_id as key if still not found
      if(!setting && item.entityId && typeof item.entityId === 'string' && !Number(item.entityId)) {
        setting = DB.settings.find(s=>s.key===item.entityId);
      }
      if(setting){
        let approvedValue = null;
        let approvedEffectiveFrom = null;
        // Method A: Use structured _settingDetails (new approvals with details JSON)
        if(item._settingDetails){
          approvedValue = item._settingDetails.newValue;
          approvedEffectiveFrom = item._settingDetails.effectiveFrom || null;
        }
        // Method B: Fallback — parse from value string (legacy approvals without details)
        if(!approvedValue){
          const match = (item.value||'').match(/→\s*([^\s(]+?)(?:\s*\(eff\.\s*([^)]+)\))?\s*$/);
          if(match) {
            approvedValue = match[1].trim();
            approvedEffectiveFrom = match[2] ? match[2].trim() : null;
          }
        }
        if(approvedValue){
          setting.value = approvedValue;
          setting.effectiveFrom = approvedEffectiveFrom;
          // ★ CRITICAL: Persist the approved setting to the backend database ★
          await refreshCsrfToken();
          const putPayload = { key: setting.key, value: setting.value };
          if(approvedEffectiveFrom) putPayload.effective_from = approvedEffectiveFrom;
          await API.put('settings', putPayload);
        }
      }
      if(!setting) {
        console.warn('[Approval] Setting not found for approval #'+id+', entityId:', item.entityId, 'details:', item._settingDetails);
      }
    } else if(item.entityType==='Loan'){
      // ★ Handle loan-type approvals (write-off, restructure) ★
      const loan = DB.loans.find(l => l.id === item.entityId);
      if (!loan) return;
      const details = item._writeoffDetails || {};
      if (item.scopeCode === 'loans.writeoff' && details.outstanding > 0) {
        // ── EXECUTE WRITE-OFF ──
        loan.status = 'WRITTEN_OFF';
        loan.outstanding = 0;
        loan.accruedInterest = 0;
        // Mark all remaining installments as WAIVED
        DB.loanSchedule.filter(s => s.loanId === loan.id && s.status !== 'PAID').forEach(s => { s.status = 'WAIVED'; });
        // Sync loan status to backend
        await refreshCsrfToken();
        await API.put('loans/' + loan.id, { status: 'WRITTEN_OFF', outstanding: 0, accrued_interest: 0 });
        await syncLoanScheduleToDB(loan);
        // ★ FIX (APPR-009): Use a single consistent write-off reference for both the loan fund
        // debit and the transaction entry — previously used different indices causing ref collision.
        const woRef = 'WO-' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'') + '-' + String(Date.now()).slice(-4);
        // Record write-off as a loss provision (debit loan fund)
        await syncLoanFundToDB('BANK-LF-0001', 'DEBIT', details.outstanding,
          'Loan write-off — ' + details.loanNumber + ' (' + (details.customerName || '') + '). Loss provision for ' + money(details.outstanding),
          loan.id, woRef);
        // Record write-off transaction for audit trail
        DB.transactions.push({
          id: Date.now(), ref: woRef,
          type: 'LOAN_WRITEOFF', status: 'POSTED', branch: loan.branch, account: '',
          accountType: '', customerName: details.customerName || loan.customerName || '',
          description: 'Loan write-off — ' + details.loanNumber,
          category: 'Loan Write-Off', direction: 'debit', amount: details.outstanding,
          memo: 'Loan ' + details.loanNumber + ' written off. Principal: ' + money(details.principal) + ', Interest: ' + money(details.accruedInterest) + '. Reason: ' + (details.reason || 'N/A'),
          module: 'Loans', timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
        });
        await syncTransactionToBackend(DB.transactions[DB.transactions.length - 1]);
        showToast('success', 'Loan Written Off', `${details.loanNumber} for ${money(details.outstanding)} has been written off as a loss.`);
      } else if (item.scopeCode === 'loans.restructure') {
        // ── MARK LOAN AS RESTRUCTURED ──
        loan.status = 'RESTRUCTURED';
        await refreshCsrfToken();
        await API.put('loans/' + loan.id, { status: 'RESTRUCTURED' });
        showToast('success', 'Loan Restructured', `${loan.loanNumber} has been marked as restructured. New terms can now be applied.`);
      }
    }
    showToast('success','Approved',`${item.entityType} has been approved.`);
    addAuditEntry('APPROVAL_DECISION',item.entityType||'Item',String(item.id),`${item.entityType} approved by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}`);
    renderApprovals(); renderTransactions(); renderAccounts();
    renderLoans(); renderLoanApplications();
    renderSystemSettingsCards(); renderDashboard(); updateBadges();
  });
}

function rejectItem(id) {
  $('confirmTitle').textContent = 'Reject Item';
  $('confirmMessage').textContent = 'Provide a reason for rejecting this item. The submitter will be notified.';
  $('confirmReasonGroup').style.display = 'grid';
  $('confirmReason').value = '';
  $('confirmActionBtn').textContent = 'Reject';
  $('confirmActionBtn').className = 'btn btn-danger';
  STATE.pendingConfirmAction = async (reason) => {
    const item = DB.approvals.find(a=>a.id===id);
    if(!item) return;

    // ── Sync to backend: API methods return null on failure, not throw ──
    await refreshCsrfToken();
    let backendOk = false;
    // Skip PUT if the ID is a temporary negative number (never persisted to backend)
    const isTempId = !id || id <= 0;
    if (!isTempId) {
      const putResult = await API.put('approvals/' + id, { status: 'REJECTED', reason: reason||'No reason provided' });
      if (putResult) backendOk = true;
    }
    if (!backendOk) {
      // Approval was never persisted (temp ID) or PUT failed — create it first, then reject
      await refreshCsrfToken();
      const created = await API.post('approvals', {
        entity_type: item.entityType, entity_id: String(item.entityId),
        scope_code: item.scopeCode, value: item.value,
        branch: item.branch,
        details: JSON.stringify(item._reversalDetails || item._writeoffDetails || item._settingDetails || null)
      });
      if (created?.data?.id) {
        item.id = created.data.id;
        await refreshCsrfToken();
        const put2 = await API.put('approvals/' + created.data.id, { status: 'REJECTED', reason: reason||'No reason provided' });
        if (put2) backendOk = true;
      }
    }
    if (!backendOk) {
      console.warn('[Approval] Backend sync failed for rejection #'+id+', proceeding locally');
    }

    // Update local state after backend sync
    item.status='REJECTED';
    item.decidedBy=STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System';
    item.decidedAt=new Date().toISOString();
    item.reason=reason||'No reason provided';
    // Update underlying entity status
    if(item.entityType==='Transaction Reversal'){
      // ── REJECT REVERSAL: Cancel the reversal, restore original ──
      const details = item._reversalDetails || {};
      const revTxn = DB.transactions.find(t=>t.id===details.reversalId);
      if(revTxn) revTxn.status = 'REJECTED';
      const origTxn = DB.transactions.find(t=>t.id===details.originalId);
      if(origTxn) { origTxn.status = 'POSTED'; origTxn._pendingReversal = false; }
      // Mark reversal as REJECTED on backend
      if(revTxn) {
        await refreshCsrfToken();
        await API.put('transactions/'+revTxn.id, {status:'REJECTED'});
      }
    } else if(item.entityType==='Transaction'){
      const txn = DB.transactions.find(t=>t.id===item.entityId);
      if(txn && txn.status==='PENDING_APPROVAL') txn.status='REJECTED';
    } else if(item.entityType==='Loan Application'){
      let la = DB.loanApplications.find(l=>l.id===item.entityId);
      if (!la) la = DB.loanApplications.find(l=>l._dbId===item.entityId);
      if(la && (la.status==='PENDING'||la.status==='UNDER_REVIEW')) {
        la.status='REJECTED';
        // ★ FIXED: Update the real loan_applications table for real applications
        if (la._isRealApplication) {
          try {
            await refreshCsrfToken();
            await API.put('loan-applications/' + la.id, { status: 'REJECTED', decision_reason: reason || 'Rejected by ' + (STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System') });
          } catch (e) { console.warn('[rejectItem] loan_applications backend sync failed:', e); }
        }
        // ★ Also update the matching loan in DB.loans and sync to backend ★
        const loan = DB.loans.find(l => l.id === (la._dbId || la.id));
        if (loan) {
          loan.status = 'REJECTED';
          if (loan.id > 0) {
            await refreshCsrfToken();
            await API.put('loans/' + loan.id, { status: 'REJECTED' });
          }
        }
      }
    } else if(item.entityType==='Loan'){
      // Handle loan restructure/other loan-type approvals
      const loan = DB.loans.find(l => l.id === item.entityId);
      if (loan && (loan.status === 'PENDING' || loan.status === 'ACTIVE')) {
        loan.status = 'REJECTED';
        if (loan.id > 0) {
          await refreshCsrfToken();
          await API.put('loans/' + loan.id, { status: 'REJECTED' });
        }
      }
    }
    showToast('error','Rejected',`${item.entityType} has been rejected.`);
    addAuditEntry('APPROVAL_DECISION',item.entityType||'Item',String(item.id),`${item.entityType} rejected by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}`);
    closeConfirm();
    renderApprovals(); renderTransactions(); renderAccounts();
    renderLoans(); renderLoanApplications();
    renderSystemSettingsCards(); renderDashboard(); updateBadges();
  };
  openModal('confirmModal');
}

function handleApprovalAction(id, action) {
  if (action === 'approve') approveItem(id);
  else rejectItem(id);
}

/* === Loan Approve/Disburse by Loan ID (from Loans panel) === */
function approveLoanByLoanId(loanId) {
  // Find the matching loan application approval and approve it
  const loan = DB.loans.find(l => l.id === loanId);
  if (!loan) return;
  // Find a pending approval linked to this loan
  let approval = DB.approvals.find(a => a.entityType === 'Loan Application' && a.status === 'PENDING'
    && DB.loanApplications.some(la => la.id === a.entityId && la._dbId === loanId));
  // Fallback: match by customer + amount
  if (!approval) {
    approval = DB.approvals.find(a => a.entityType === 'Loan Application' && a.status === 'PENDING'
      && DB.loanApplications.some(la => la.id === a.entityId && la.customerId === loan.customerId && la.amount === loan.principal));
  }
  if (approval) {
    approveItem(approval.id);
  } else {
    // No approval record exists — directly update loan status
    showConfirm('Approve Loan', 'Approve loan ' + loan.loanNumber + ' for ' + money(loan.principal) + '?', async () => {
      loan.status = 'APPROVED';
      await refreshCsrfToken();
      await API.put('loans/' + loan.id, { status: 'APPROVED' });
      addAuditEntry('LOAN_APPROVE', 'Loan', loan.loanNumber, 'Loan ' + loan.loanNumber + ' approved by ' + (STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System'));
      renderLoans(); renderLoanApplications(); renderApprovals(); updateBadges();
      showToast('success', 'Loan Approved', loan.loanNumber + ' has been approved and is ready for disbursement.');
    });
  }
}

function disburseLoanByLoanId(loanId) {
  // Find matching loan application and open disbursement modal
  const loan = DB.loans.find(l => l.id === loanId);
  if (!loan) return;
  const la = DB.loanApplications.find(la => la._dbId === loanId && (la.status === 'APPROVED' || la.status === 'DISBURSED'));
  if (la && la.status === 'APPROVED') {
    openLoanDisburseModal(la.id);
  } else {
    // Direct disbursement from the Loans panel (no loan application)
    openDirectDisburseModal(loanId);
  }
}

function openDirectDisburseModal(loanId) {
  const loan = DB.loans.find(l => l.id === loanId);
  if (!loan) return;
  if (loan.status !== 'APPROVED') {
    showToast('error', 'Cannot Disburse', 'Only approved loans can be disbursed. Pending loans must complete the review and approval workflow first.');
    return;
  }
  const customerAccounts = DB.accounts.filter(a => a.customerId === loan.customerId && a.status === 'ACTIVE');
  if (customerAccounts.length === 0) {
    showToast('error', 'No Account', 'Customer has no active account to credit.');
    return;
  }
  $('ddLoanId').value = loanId;
  $('ddLoanInfo').innerHTML = `
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;font-size:.86rem">
      <div><span style="color:var(--soft)">Loan:</span> <strong>${loan.loanNumber}</strong></div>
      <div><span style="color:var(--soft)">Customer:</span> <strong>${loan.customerName}</strong></div>
      <div><span style="color:var(--soft)">Amount:</span> <strong>${money(loan.principal)}</strong></div>
      <div><span style="color:var(--soft)">Term:</span> <strong>${loan.termMonths} months</strong></div>
      ${loan.interestRate?`<div><span style="color:var(--soft)">Rate:</span> <strong>${loan.interestRate}%</strong></div>`:''}
      <div><span style="color:var(--soft)">Repayment:</span> <strong>${loan.repaymentMode==='SCHEDULED'?'Equal Installments':loan.repaymentMode==='FIXED_AMOUNT'?'Fixed '+money(loan.repaymentAmount)+'/cycle '+(loan.interestIncluded!==false?'(interest included)':'(+ interest on top)'):loan.repaymentPct+'% '+((loan.repaymentMode||'').includes('ACCOUNT')?'of Balance':'of Loan')+'/cycle'}</strong></div>
    </div>`;
  $('ddCreditAccount').innerHTML = customerAccounts.map(a => `<option value="${a.id}">${a.accountNumber} — ${a.productType} (${money(a.availableBalance)})</option>`).join('');
  openModal('directDisburseModal');
}

async function handleDirectDisburse(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const loanId = Number($('ddLoanId').value);
  const loan = DB.loans.find(l => l.id === loanId);
  if (!loan) return false;
  // ★ FIXED: Pre-flight check — never proceed if loan ID is corrupted
  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(loan.id)) {
    showToast('error', 'Data Error', 'Loan has a corrupted database ID (' + loan.id + '). This must be fixed in the database before disbursement. Contact the administrator.');
    return false;
  }
  const creditAccountId = Number($('ddCreditAccount').value);
  const creditAccount = DB.accounts.find(a => a.id === creditAccountId);
  if (!creditAccount) { showToast('error', 'Error', 'Please select a valid credit account.'); return false; }
  const now = new Date();
  const maturityDate = new Date(now);
  maturityDate.setMonth(maturityDate.getMonth() + loan.termMonths);
  loan.status = 'ACTIVE';
  loan.disbursedAt = now.toISOString();
  loan.maturityDate = maturityDate.toISOString();
  loan.nextDue = getNextDueDate(now);
  // ★ Auto-set repayment account to the disbursement credit account
  loan.debitAccountId = creditAccountId;
  loan.debitAccountNumber = creditAccount.accountNumber;
  // Remove from loan applications since it's now active
  DB.loanApplications = DB.loanApplications.filter(la => la.id !== loan.id && la._dbId !== loan.id);
  // Generate repayment schedule (local only — no backend call here)
  generateLoanSchedule(loan);
  // ★ SERIALIZED BACKEND SYNC — all operations await sequentially to prevent CSRF race ★
  await refreshCsrfToken();
  // 1) Update loan status in backend
  await API.put('loans/' + loan.id, {
    status: 'ACTIVE',
    disbursed_at: now.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
    maturity_date: maturityDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
    next_due: getNextDueDate(now),
    repayment_mode: loan.repaymentMode || 'SCHEDULED',
    repayment_amount: loan.repaymentAmount || 0,
    repayment_pct: loan.repaymentPct || 0,
    auto_deduct: loan.autoDeduct !== false ? 1 : 0,
    interest_included: loan.interestIncluded !== false ? 1 : 0,
    debit_account_id: loan.debitAccountId,
    debit_account_number: loan.debitAccountNumber
  });
  // 2) Persist repayment schedule to backend
  await syncLoanScheduleToDB(loan);
  // ★ FIX (LOAN-011): Handle CU insurance fee in direct disburse (matching handleLoanDisburse flow)
  // For CU loans, the customer receives principal - insuranceFee (net), while the fund is debited the full principal.
  const directInsuranceFee = loan.loanModule === 'CREDIT_UNION' ? (loan.insuranceFee || 0) : 0;
  const directNetDisbursement = loan.principal - directInsuranceFee;
  // Credit customer account (local) — net of insurance fee for CU
  creditAccount.ledgerBalance += directNetDisbursement;
  creditAccount.availableBalance += directNetDisbursement;
  // Debit loan fund (local)
  DB.loanFundAccount.balance -= loan.principal;
  const disburseRef = 'TXN-' + now.toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'') + '-' + String(DB.transactions.length + 1).padStart(4,'0');
  // 3) Sync loan fund debit to backend — ★ FIXED: Check result and rollback on failure
  const directFundResult = await syncLoanFundToDB('BANK-LF-0001', 'DEBIT', loan.principal,
    'Loan disbursement — ' + loan.loanNumber + ' to ' + creditAccount.accountNumber + ' (' + (loan.customerName || '') + ')',
    loan.id, disburseRef);
  if (directFundResult === null || directFundResult === undefined) {
    // Fund sync failed — rollback the entire disbursement
    console.error('[handleDirectDisburse] Fund sync failed — rolling back disbursement for ' + loan.loanNumber);
    showToast('error', 'Fund Sync Failed', 'Failed to debit the Loans & Advances Fund. The disbursement has been rolled back. Check fund balance: ' + money(DB.loanFundAccount.balance));
    loan.status = 'APPROVED';
    loan.disbursedAt = null;
    loan.maturityDate = null;
    loan.nextDue = null;
    creditAccount.ledgerBalance -= directNetDisbursement;
    creditAccount.availableBalance -= directNetDisbursement;
    DB.loanFundAccount.balance += loan.principal;
    DB.loanSchedule = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s => s.loanId !== loan.id);
    if (loan.id > 0 && Number.isSafeInteger(loan.id)) {
      try { await API.put('loans/' + loan.id, { status: 'APPROVED' }); } catch(e) {}
    }
    renderLoans(); renderLoanFundPanel(); renderAccounts();
    closeModal('directDisburseModal');
    return false;
  }
  // Create disbursement transaction on customer account (local)
  DB.transactions.push({
    id: DB.transactions.length + 1, ref: disburseRef, type: 'LOAN_DISBURSEMENT',
    status: 'POSTED', branch: loan.branch, account: creditAccount.accountNumber,
    accountType: creditAccount.productType, customerName: loan.customerName || '',
    description: 'Loan disbursement — ' + loan.loanNumber,
    category: 'Loan Disbursement', direction: 'credit', amount: directNetDisbursement,
    memo: 'Loan ' + loan.loanNumber + ' disbursed to ' + creditAccount.accountNumber + '. Fund source: BANK-LF-0001 (Loans & Advances Fund). Rate: ' + loan.interestRate + '%. Term: ' + loan.termMonths + 'mo. Net amount: ' + money(directNetDisbursement) + (directInsuranceFee > 0 ? '. Insurance fee deducted: ' + money(directInsuranceFee) : '') + '.',
    module: 'Loans', timestamp: now.toISOString()
  });
  // 4) Sync disbursement transaction to backend (updates account balance atomically)
  await syncTransactionToBackend(DB.transactions[DB.transactions.length - 1]);
  addAuditEntry('LOAN_DISBURSEMENT', 'Loan', loan.loanNumber,
    'Loan ' + loan.loanNumber + ' disbursed to ' + creditAccount.accountNumber + '. Amount: ' + money(loan.principal));
  closeModal('directDisburseModal');
  showToast('success', 'Loan Disbursed', loan.loanNumber + ' for ' + money(loan.principal) + ' credited to ' + creditAccount.accountNumber + (directInsuranceFee > 0 ? ' (net: ' + money(directNetDisbursement) + ', insurance fee: ' + money(directInsuranceFee) + ')' : ''));
  renderLoans(); renderLoanApplications(); renderAccounts(); renderTransactions();
  renderDashboard(); renderLoanFundPanel(); renderLoanScheduleFilter(); updateBadges();
  return false;
}

/* === Loan Application Approve/Reject by LA ID === */
function findLoanApproval(laId, _dbId) {
  return DB.approvals.find(a => a.entityType === 'Loan Application' && a.entityId === laId && a.status === 'PENDING')
    || DB.approvals.find(a => a.entityType === 'Loan Application' && a.entityId === _dbId && a.status === 'PENDING');
}
function approveLoanApp(laId) {
  const la = DB.loanApplications.find(x => x.id === laId);
  const approval = findLoanApproval(laId, la?._dbId);
  if (approval) { closeDrawer(); approveItem(approval.id); }
  else { showToast('error','Error','No pending approval found for this loan application.'); }
}
async function rejectLoanApp(laId) {
  const la = DB.loanApplications.find(x => x.id === laId);
  if (!la) return;
  const approval = findLoanApproval(laId, la._dbId);
  if (approval) {
    closeDrawer();
    rejectItem(approval.id);
  } else {
    // No approval record yet — reject directly (PENDING application, no due diligence started)
    la.status = 'REJECTED';
    // ★ FIXED: Update the real loan_applications table for real applications
    if (la._isRealApplication) {
      try {
        await refreshCsrfToken();
        await API.put('loan-applications/' + la.id, { status: 'REJECTED', decision_reason: 'Rejected by ' + (STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System') });
      } catch (e) { console.warn('[rejectLoanApp] Backend sync for loan_applications failed:', e); }
    }
    if (la._dbId) {
      const loan = DB.loans.find(l => l.id === la._dbId);
      if (loan) {
        loan.status = 'REJECTED';
        await refreshCsrfToken();
        await API.put('loans/' + loan.id, { status: 'REJECTED' });
      }
    }
    closeDrawer();
    showToast('error', 'Application Rejected', `Loan application ${la.ref} has been rejected.`);
    addAuditEntry('LOAN_APP_REJECT', 'Loan Application', la.ref, `Loan application ${la.ref} rejected by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}.`);
    renderLoanApplications(); renderLoans(); updateBadges();
  }
}

/* ================================================================
   LOAN APPLICATION REVIEW — Interactive Due Diligence
   ================================================================ */
function reviewLoanApp(id) {
  const la = DB.loanApplications.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!la) return;
  const customer = DB.customers.find(c=>c.id===la.customerId);
  const debitAcct = la.debitAccountId ? DB.accounts.find(a=>a.id===la.debitAccountId) : null;
  const disbAcct = la.disbursementAccountId ? (la.disbursementAccountId === 'LOAN_FUND' ? null : DB.accounts.find(a=>a.id===la.disbursementAccountId)) : null;
  const isPending = la.status === 'PENDING';
  const allChecksPassed = la.checks.every(ch => ch.status === 'PASSED' || ch.status === 'WAIVED');

  openDrawer('Loan Application: '+la.ref, `
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Application Details</h4>
      <div class="detail-grid">
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Reference</div><div class="di-value td-mono">${escHtml(la.ref)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Status</div><div class="di-value"><span class="pill ${pillCls(la.status)}">${escHtml(la.status.replace('_',' '))}</span></div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Customer</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(la.customerName)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Amount</div><div class="di-value">${money(la.amount)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Interest Rate</div><div class="di-value">${la.interestRate?la.interestRate+'%':'Not set (will use default)'}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Term</div><div class="di-value">${la.term} months</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Branch</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(la.branch)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Applied</div><div class="di-value">${dateFmt(la.appliedAt)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Customer Status</div><div class="di-value">${customer?`<span class="pill ${pillCls(customer.status)}">${escHtml(customer.status.replace('_',' '))}</span>`:'N/A'}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Customer Risk</div><div class="di-value">${customer?`<span class="pill ${pillCls(customer.riskRating)}">${escHtml(customer.riskRating)}</span>`:'N/A'}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Debit Account</div><div class="di-value" style="font-size:.84rem">${debitAcct?escHtml(debitAcct.accountNumber+' ('+debitAcct.productType+')'):'Not set'}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Disbursement Account</div><div class="di-value" style="font-size:.84rem">${la.disbursementAccountId==='LOAN_FUND'?'BANK-LF-0001 (Loans & Advances Fund)':disbAcct?escHtml(disbAcct.accountNumber+' ('+disbAcct.productType+')'):'Not set'}</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Purpose</h4><p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.6">${escHtml(la.purpose)}</p></div>
    <div class="drawer-section">
      <h4>Due Diligence Checks ${isPending ? '<span style="color:var(--danger);font-size:.78rem;font-weight:400">&mdash; All checks must be completed before recommending approval</span>' : ''}</h4>
      <div id="ddChecksContainer" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-top:8px">
        ${la.checks.map((ch, idx) => {
          const isPassed = ch.status === 'PASSED' || ch.status === 'WAIVED';
          return `<div class="check-item ${isPassed?'check-pass':'check-pending'}" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:${isPending?'pointer':'default'};transition:all .15s" ${isPending?`onclick="toggleDdCheck(${la.id},${idx})"`:''} data-la-id="${la.id}" data-ch-idx="${idx}">
            <span style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;${isPassed?'background:rgba(16,185,129,.15);color:#10b981':'background:rgba(245,158,11,.1);color:#f59e0b'}">${IC(isPassed?'check-circle':'clock',18)}</span>
            <div style="flex:1">
              <div style="font-weight:600;font-size:.86rem;color:${isPassed?'var(--success)':'var(--warn)'}">${escHtml(ch.name)}</div>
              <div style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px">${isPending?'Click to mark as completed':ch.status}</div>
            </div>
            ${isPassed?`<span class="pill pill-active" style="font-size:.72rem">${ch.status}</span>`:''}
          </div>`;
        }).join('')}
      </div>
      <div id="ddCheckProgress" style="margin-top:10px;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--soft)">
        ${la.checks.filter(ch=>ch.status==='PASSED'||ch.status==='WAIVED').length} of ${la.checks.length} checks completed
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:12px;flex-wrap:wrap">
      ${isPending?`<button id="ddRecommendBtn" class="btn btn-sm ${allChecksPassed?'btn-primary':'btn-secondary'}" style="${allChecksPassed?'':'opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed'}" onclick="${allChecksPassed?`recommendLoanApproval(${la.id})`:'ddWarn()'}">Recommend for Approval</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="rejectLoanApp(${la.id})">Reject</button>`:''}
      ${la.status==='UNDER_REVIEW'?`<span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:.84rem;color:var(--accent);font-weight:600;padding:6px 0">${IC('clock',16)} This application has been recommended and is awaiting manager approval in the Approval Panel.</span>`:''}
      ${la.status==='APPROVED'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="closeDrawer();openLoanDisburseModal(${la.id})">Disburse</button>`:''}
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="closeDrawer()">Close</button>
    </div>
  `);
}

/* Warn user that due diligence is not complete */
function ddWarn(){showToast('warning','Due Diligence Incomplete','Please complete all due diligence checks before recommending this loan for approval.')}

/* Toggle a single due diligence check — marks it as PASSED when clicked */
async function toggleDdCheck(laId, chIdx) {
  const la = DB.loanApplications.find(x => x.id === laId);
  if (!la || la.status !== 'PENDING') return;
  const ch = la.checks[chIdx];
  if (!ch) return;
  ch.status = (ch.status === 'PASSED') ? 'PENDING' : 'PASSED';
  // ★ FIXED: Persist check status to the real loan_application_checks table for real applications
  if (la._isRealApplication) {
    try {
      await refreshCsrfToken();
      await API.put('loan-applications/' + la.id, { checks: la.checks.map(c => ({ code: c.code, status: c.status })) });
    } catch (e) { console.warn('[toggleDdCheck] Backend sync failed:', e); }
  }
  reviewLoanApp(laId);
}

/* Recommend loan for approval — completes due diligence step and creates approval for the Approval Panel */
async function recommendLoanApproval(laId) {
  const la = DB.loanApplications.find(x => x.id === laId);
  if (!la || la.status !== 'PENDING') return;
  // ★ Duplicate guard: check if an approval already exists for this loan application
  const existingApproval = DB.approvals.find(a =>
    a.entityType === 'Loan Application' && a.status === 'PENDING' &&
    (a.entityId === laId || a.entityId === la._dbId));
  if (existingApproval) {
    showToast('warning', 'Already Submitted', `This loan application already has a pending approval in the Approval Panel (ID: ${existingApproval.id}). A manager must approve or reject it before a new recommendation can be made.`);
    la.status = 'UNDER_REVIEW';
    la.checks.forEach(ch => ch.status = 'PASSED');
    renderLoanApplications();
    return;
  }
  const allPassed = la.checks.every(ch => ch.status === 'PASSED' || ch.status === 'WAIVED');
  if (!allPassed) {
    showToast('warning', 'Due Diligence Incomplete', 'Please complete all due diligence checks before recommending this loan for approval.');
    return;
  }
  la.status = 'UNDER_REVIEW';
  const approvalEntityId = la._dbId || laId; // ★ Always use backend loan ID for approval cross-reference (survives page reload)
  const approvalIdx = DB.approvals.length;

  // ★ DOUBLE APPROVAL: If customer has delinquent loan, tag the approval as requiring two sign-offs
  const needsDoubleApproval = la.requiresDoubleApproval === true;
  const approvalScopeCode = needsDoubleApproval ? 'loans.double_approve' : 'loans.approve';
  const doubleApprovalNote = needsDoubleApproval
    ? ` [DOUBLE APPROVAL REQUIRED — customer has delinquent loan. Needs both ADMIN and MANAGER sign-off.]`
    : '';

  DB.approvals.push({
    id: -Date.now(), entityType: 'Loan Application', entityId: approvalEntityId,
    scopeCode: approvalScopeCode, status: 'PENDING',
    submittedBy: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
    branch: la.branch,
    value: `${money(la.amount)} loan application for ${la.customerName} at ${la.interestRate}% (Branch: ${la.branch})${doubleApprovalNote}`,
    submittedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    decidedBy: null, decidedAt: null, reason: null,
    _dueDiligencePassed: true,
    _requiresDoubleApproval: needsDoubleApproval // ★ Flag for double-approval enforcement
  });
  await refreshCsrfToken();
  const approvalResult = await API.post('approvals', {
    entity_type: 'Loan Application', entity_id: approvalEntityId,
    scope_code: approvalScopeCode,
    value: money(la.amount) + ' loan application for ' + la.customerName + ' at ' + la.interestRate + '% (Branch: ' + la.branch + ')' + doubleApprovalNote,
    branch: la.branch
  });
  if (approvalResult?.data?.id) DB.approvals[approvalIdx].id = approvalResult.data.id;
  if (la._dbId) {
    await refreshCsrfToken();
    await API.put('loans/' + la._dbId, { status: 'UNDER_REVIEW' });
    const dbLoan = DB.loans.find(l => l.id === la._dbId);
    if (dbLoan) dbLoan.status = 'UNDER_REVIEW';
  }
  // ★ FIXED: Also update the real loan_applications table for real applications
  if (la._isRealApplication) {
    try {
      await refreshCsrfToken();
      await API.put('loan-applications/' + la.id, {
        status: 'UNDER_REVIEW',
        requires_double_approval: needsDoubleApproval ? 1 : 0,
        checks: la.checks.map(c => ({ code: c.code, status: c.status }))
      });
    } catch (e) { console.warn('[recommendLoanApproval] Backend sync for loan_applications failed:', e); }
  }
  closeDrawer();
  if (needsDoubleApproval) {
    showToast('warning', 'Recommended — Double Approval Required',
      `${la.ref} sent to Approval Panel with DOUBLE APPROVAL flag. Both ADMIN and MANAGER must sign off before disbursement. Customer has an existing delinquent loan.`);
  } else {
    showToast('success', 'Recommended for Approval', `${la.ref} has been sent to the Approval Panel. A manager must approve it before disbursement.`);
  }
  addAuditEntry('LOAN_DUE_DILIGENCE_COMPLETE', 'Loan Application', la.ref, `Due diligence completed by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. All checks passed. Application ${la.ref} recommended for approval.${needsDoubleApproval ? ' DOUBLE APPROVAL required (delinquent customer).' : ''}`);
  renderLoanApplications(); renderApprovals(); renderLoans(); updateBadges();
}

/* ================================================================
   STAFF
   ================================================================ */
function openStaffDrawer(id) {
  const s = DB.staff.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!s) return;
  // ★ FIX (SP-008): Sanitize profilePicture to prevent CSS injection.
  // Previously used raw URL in background-image:url() — vulnerable to CSS injection.
  // Now validate it starts with data:image/ before rendering.
  const safeAvatarHtml = s.profilePicture && s.profilePicture.length > 50 && s.profilePicture.startsWith('data:image/')
    ? `<div class="user-avatar" style="width:44px;height:44px;font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:8px;background-image:url('${s.profilePicture.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}');background-size:cover;background-position:center"></div>`
    : '';
  openDrawer('Staff: '+s.fullName, `
    ${safeAvatarHtml}
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Staff Information</h4>
      <div class="detail-grid">
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Full Name</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(s.fullName)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Username</div><div class="di-value td-mono">${escHtml(s.username)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Role</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(s.role)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Department</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(s.department)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Status</div><div class="di-value"><span class="pill ${pillCls(s.employmentStatus)}">${escHtml(s.employmentStatus)}</span></div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Approval Limit</div><div class="di-value">${money(s.approvalLimit)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">MFA</div><div class="di-value">${s.mfaRequired?'Enabled':'Disabled'}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Last Login</div><div class="di-value">${s.lastLogin?dateFmt(s.lastLogin):'Never'}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Email</div><div class="di-value" style="font-size:.84rem">${escHtml(s.email||'N/A')}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Phone</div><div class="di-value" style="font-size:.84rem">${escHtml(s.phone||'N/A')}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Position</div><div class="di-value" style="font-size:.84rem">${escHtml(s.position||'N/A')}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">IP Restrictions</div><div class="di-value" style="font-size:.84rem">${escHtml(s.ipRestrictions)}</div></div>
      </div>
      ${s.suspensionReason ? `<div style="margin-top:8px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(239,68,68,.08);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.2);font-size:.84rem"><strong style="color:#ef4444">Suspension Reason:</strong> ${escHtml(s.suspensionReason)}</div>` : ''}
      ${s.deactivationReason ? `<div style="margin-top:8px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(234,179,8,.08);border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,.2);font-size:.84rem"><strong style="color:#eab308">Deactivation Reason:</strong> ${escHtml(s.deactivationReason)}</div>` : ''}
    </div>
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Branch Access (${s.branches.length})</h4>
      ${s.branches.map(b=>`<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">${escHtml(b)}</span><span class="value pill pill-active">Granted</span></div>`).join('')}
    </div>
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Module Access (${s.modules.length})</h4>
      ${s.modules.map(m=>{const mName=typeof m==='string'?m:(m?.name||m?.module_name||'');const mAccess=typeof m==='string'?'FULL':(m?.access||'FULL');return`<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">${moduleDisplayName(mName)}</span><span class="value pill ${mAccess==='VIEW_ONLY'?'pill-pending':'pill-active'}">${mAccess==='VIEW_ONLY'?'View Only':'Full'}</span></div>`;}).join('')}
    </div>
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Staff Audit Trail</h4>
      <div id="staffAuditTrail_${s.id}" style="font-size:.84rem;color:var(--muted)">Loading...</div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:12px;flex-wrap:wrap">
      ${isUserAdmin()?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="closeDrawer();openStaffModal(${s.id})">Edit</button>`:''}
      ${isUserAdmin()?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-warn" onclick="closeDrawer();resetPasswordByManager(${s.id})">Reset Password</button>`:''}
      ${isUserAdmin()&&(s.employmentStatus==='ACTIVE')?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="closeDrawer();suspendStaff(${s.id})">Suspend</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="closeDrawer();deactivateStaff(${s.id})">Deactivate</button>`:''}
      ${isUserAdmin()&&(s.employmentStatus==='INACTIVE')?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="closeDrawer();deactivateStaff(${s.id})">Reactivate</button>`:''}
      ${isUserAdmin()&&(s.employmentStatus==='SUSPENDED')?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="closeDrawer();unsuspendStaff(${s.id})">Unsuspend</button>`:''}
      ${isUserAdmin()?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" style="opacity:.7" onclick="closeDrawer();deleteStaff(${s.id})">Delete</button>`:''}
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="closeDrawer()">Close</button>
    </div>
  `);
  // Load audit trail for this staff member from database
  // Search by BOTH fullName and username since audit logs may store either
  loadStaffAuditTrail(s.id, s.fullName, s.username);
}

function renderStaff() {
  const q = norm($('staffSearch')?.value || '');
  const role = $('staffRoleFilter')?.value || '';
  const status = $('staffStatusFilter')?.value || '';
  // Branch isolation: filter staff by current branch selection (handles branches array)
  let baseStaff = filterByUserBranch(DB.staff);
  const filtered = baseStaff.filter(s =>
    (!q || norm(s.fullName).includes(q) || norm(s.username).includes(q)) &&
    (!role || s.role === role) &&
    (!status || s.employmentStatus === status)
  ).sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0));
  const total = filtered.length;
  const activeCount = filtered.filter(s=>s.employmentStatus==='ACTIVE').length;
  const inactiveCount = filtered.filter(s=>s.employmentStatus==='INACTIVE').length;
  const suspendedCount = filtered.filter(s=>s.employmentStatus==='SUSPENDED').length;
  // ★ FIX (SP-014): Show base count (branch-filtered) alongside filtered count for context.
  // Previously showed only filtered total — misleading when filters are active.
  const baseTotal = baseStaff.length;
  const summaryTotal = total === baseTotal ? `<strong>${total}</strong> staff` : `<strong>${total}</strong> of ${baseTotal} staff`;
  $('staffSummary').innerHTML = `<div class="summary-item">${summaryTotal}</div><div class="summary-item"><strong>${activeCount}</strong> active</div><div class="summary-item"><strong>${inactiveCount}</strong> inactive</div><div class="summary-item"><strong>${suspendedCount}</strong> suspended</div><div class="summary-item"><strong>${filtered.filter(s=>s.mfaRequired).length}</strong> MFA enabled</div>`;

  // Pagination
  const PAGE_SIZE = 20;
  if (!STATE.staffPage) STATE.staffPage = 1;
  const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(total / PAGE_SIZE));
  if (STATE.staffPage > totalPages) STATE.staffPage = totalPages;
  const start = (STATE.staffPage - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;
  const pageItems = filtered.slice(start, start + PAGE_SIZE);

  $('staffCards').innerHTML = pageItems.map(s=>`
    <div class="card" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="openStaffDrawer(${s.id})">
      <div class="card-header">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px">
          <div class="user-avatar" style="width:44px;height:44px;font-size:.9rem;${s.profilePicture && s.profilePicture.length > 50 && s.profilePicture.startsWith('data:image/') ? 'background-image:url(\''+s.profilePicture.replace(/'/g, "\\'")+'\');background-size:cover;background-position:center' : ''}">${s.profilePicture && s.profilePicture.length > 50 && s.profilePicture.startsWith('data:image/') ? '' : escHtml(s.initials)}</div>
          <div><h3>${escHtml(s.fullName)}</h3><p style="margin-top:2px">${escHtml(s.role)} · ${escHtml(s.department)}</p></div>
        </div>
        <span class="pill ${pillCls(s.employmentStatus)}">${escHtml(s.employmentStatus)}</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;font-size:.86rem">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Username</span><span class="value td-mono" style="font-size:.82rem">${escHtml(s.username)}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Approval Limit</span><span class="value">${money(s.approvalLimit)}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">MFA Required</span><span class="value">${s.mfaRequired ? IC('check-circle', 14) + ' Yes' : IC('x-circle', 14) + ' No'}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Last Login</span><span class="value">${s.lastLogin?dateFmt(s.lastLogin):'Never'}</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:12px">
        <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--soft);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;margin-bottom:6px">Branch Access</div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap">${s.branches.map(b=>`<span class="pill pill-pending">${escHtml(b)}</span>`).join('')}</div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:10px">
        <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--soft);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;margin-bottom:6px">Module Access (${s.modules.length})</div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap">${s.modules.slice(0,6).map(m=>`<span style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:6px;font-size:.74rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid var(--line);color:var(--muted)">${moduleDisplayName(m)}</span>`).join('')}${s.modules.length>6?`<span style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:6px;font-size:.74rem;background:rgba(59,130,246,.1);border:1px solid rgba(59,130,246,.3);color:#3b82f6">+${s.modules.length-6} more</span>`:''}</div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:10px;font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted)">
        <strong>IP Restrictions:</strong> ${s.ipRestrictions}
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:6px;font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted)">
        <strong>Position:</strong> ${escHtml(s.position||'N/A')} &nbsp;|&nbsp; <strong>Phone:</strong> ${escHtml(s.phone||'N/A')}${s.email?' &nbsp;|&nbsp; <strong>Email:</strong> '+escHtml(s.email):''}
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:12px;flex-wrap:wrap" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openStaffModal(${s.id})">${isUserAdmin()?'Edit':'View'}</button>
        ${isUserAdmin()?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-warn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();resetPasswordByManager(${s.id})">Reset Password</button>`:''}
        ${isUserAdmin()&&(s.employmentStatus==='ACTIVE')?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="event.stopPropagation();suspendStaff(${s.id})">Suspend</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="event.stopPropagation();deactivateStaff(${s.id})">Deactivate</button>`:''}
        ${isUserAdmin()&&(s.employmentStatus==='INACTIVE')?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="event.stopPropagation();deactivateStaff(${s.id})">Reactivate</button>`:''}
        ${isUserAdmin()&&(s.employmentStatus==='SUSPENDED')?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="event.stopPropagation();unsuspendStaff(${s.id})">Unsuspend</button>`:''}
        ${isUserAdmin()?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" style="opacity:.7" onclick="event.stopPropagation();deleteStaff(${s.id})">Delete</button>`:''}
      </div>
    </div>`).join('') || '<div class="empty-state" style="grid-column:1/3"><p>No staff match your filters</p></div>';

  // Render pagination
  renderPagination('staffPagination', STATE.staffPage, totalPages, (p) => { STATE.staffPage = p; renderStaff(); });
}

/* ================================================================
   AUDIT & COMPLIANCE
   ================================================================ */
function auditCategoryBadge(cat) {
  const colors = {
    'AUTH': {bg:'rgba(139,92,246,.12)', color:'#a78bfa'},
    'TRANSACTION': {bg:'rgba(88,183,255,.12)', color:'#58b7ff'},
    'CUSTOMER': {bg:'rgba(103,232,181,.12)', color:'#67e8b5'},
    'ACCOUNT': {bg:'rgba(255,190,105,.12)', color:'#ffbe69'},
    'STAFF': {bg:'rgba(251,146,60,.12)', color:'#fb923c'},
    'LOAN': {bg:'rgba(244,114,182,.12)', color:'#f472b6'},
    'EXPENSE': {bg:'rgba(250,204,21,.12)', color:'#facc15'},
    'APPROVAL': {bg:'rgba(74,222,128,.12)', color:'#4ade80'},
    'POLICY': {bg:'rgba(167,139,250,.12)', color:'#a78bfa'},
    'SETTINGS': {bg:'rgba(148,163,184,.12)', color:'#94a3b8'},
    'BRANCH': {bg:'rgba(56,189,248,.12)', color:'#38bdf8'},
    'REPORT': {bg:'rgba(196,181,253,.12)', color:'#c4b5fd'},
    'DOCUMENT': {bg:'rgba(253,186,116,.12)', color:'#fdba74'},
    'OPERATING_FUND': {bg:'rgba(134,239,172,.12)', color:'#86efac'},
    'SYSTEM': {bg:'rgba(148,163,184,.12)', color:'#94a3b8'}
  };
  const c = colors[cat] || colors['SYSTEM'];
  return `<span style="display:inline-block;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:6px;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;background:${c.bg};color:${c.color}">${cat || '—'}</span>`;
}

function renderAuditLogs() {
  const q = norm($('auditSearch')?.value || '');
  const result = $('auditResultFilter')?.value || '';
  const branch = $('auditBranchFilter')?.value || '';
  const category = $('auditCategoryFilter')?.value || '';
  const entityFilter = ($('auditEntityFilter')?.value || '').toUpperCase();
  const dateFrom = $('auditDateFrom')?.value || '';
  const dateTo = $('auditDateTo')?.value || '';
  // Branch isolation: filter by current branch selection first
