  const branchBase = filterByUserBranch(DB.auditLogs);
  const filtered = branchBase.filter(a => {
    if (q && !norm(a.action).includes(q) && !norm(a.actor).includes(q) && !norm(a.entity).includes(q) && !norm(a.details).includes(q)) return false;
    if (result && a.result !== result) return false;
    if (branch && a.actorBranch !== branch) return false;
    if (category && (a.category || classifyAuditCategory(a.action)) !== category) return false;
    if (entityFilter && (a.entity || '').toUpperCase() !== entityFilter) return false;
    if (dateFrom && a.timestamp && a.timestamp < dateFrom + 'T00:00:00') return false;
    if (dateTo && a.timestamp && a.timestamp > dateTo + 'T23:59:59') return false;
    return true;
  }).sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0));

  // Summary stats
  const now = new Date();
  const todayStr = now.toISOString().slice(0,10);
  const weekAgo = new Date(now); weekAgo.setDate(weekAgo.getDate() - 7);
  const weekAgoStr = weekAgo.toISOString().slice(0,10);
  const totalCount = branchBase.length;
  const todayCount = branchBase.filter(a => a.timestamp && a.timestamp.slice(0,10) === todayStr).length;
  const weekCount = branchBase.filter(a => a.timestamp && a.timestamp.slice(0,10) >= weekAgoStr).length;
  const failedCount = branchBase.filter(a => a.result === 'FAILURE' || a.result === 'DENIED').length;
  const summaryEl = $('auditSummary');
  if (summaryEl) {
    summaryEl.innerHTML = `
      <div class="summary-item"><span class="summary-value">${totalCount}</span><span class="summary-label">Total Entries</span></div>
      <div class="summary-item"><span class="summary-value">${todayCount}</span><span class="summary-label">Today</span></div>
      <div class="summary-item"><span class="summary-value">${weekCount}</span><span class="summary-label">This Week</span></div>
      <div class="summary-item"><span class="summary-value" style="color:var(--danger)">${failedCount}</span><span class="summary-label">Failed/Denied</span></div>`;
  }

  const {items, total} = paginate(filtered, STATE.auditPage, STATE.auditPageSize);
  $('auditTableBody').innerHTML = items.map(a=>{
    const cat = a.category || classifyAuditCategory(a.action);
    const mod = a.module || classifyModule(a.action);
    // Make document references in details clickable
    let detailsHtml = escHtml(a.details);
    const docMatch = detailsHtml.match(/(DOC-[A-Z]+-\d{8}-\d{4}\d{3}|EXP-STM-\d{8}-\d{4})/);
    if (docMatch) {
      detailsHtml = detailsHtml.replace(docMatch[1], '<a href="#" onclick="event.preventDefault();lookupDocument(\'' + docMatch[1] + '\')" style="color:var(--primary);font-weight:600;text-decoration:underline">' + docMatch[1] + '</a>');
    }
    const uaShort = a.userAgent ? (a.userAgent.length > 40 ? a.userAgent.substring(0,40) + '…' : a.userAgent) : '—';
    return `<tr>
      <td style="white-space:nowrap">${dateFmt(a.timestamp)}</td>
      <td><strong>${escHtml(a.actor)}</strong><span class="td-sub">${escHtml(a.actorBranch||'')}</span></td>
      <td>${escHtml(a.action.replace(/_/g,' '))}</td>
      <td>${auditCategoryBadge(cat)}</td>
      <td>${escHtml(a.entity)} ${a.entityId ? '#'+escHtml(String(a.entityId)) : ''}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);white-space:nowrap">${escHtml(mod)}</td>
      <td><span class="pill ${pillCls(a.result)}">${escHtml(a.result)}</span></td>
      <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.8rem">${escHtml(a.ip||'')}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted);max-width:180px" title="${escHtml(a.userAgent||'')}">${escHtml(uaShort)}</td>
      <td style="max-width:220px;color:var(--muted);font-size:.82rem">${detailsHtml}</td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="10" class="empty-state"><p>No audit events match your filters</p></td></tr>';
  renderPagination('auditPagination', STATE.auditPage, total, 'goAuditPage', STATE.auditPageSize);
}
function goAuditPage(p) { STATE.auditPage = p; renderAuditLogs(); }

function switchAuditTab(btn, tabId) {
  btn.closest('.tabs').querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  ['audit-events','login-history'].forEach(id=>{
    const el = $(id);
    if (el) el.style.display = id===tabId ? 'block' : 'none';
  });
  if (tabId==='audit-events') renderAuditLogs();
  else if (tabId==='login-history') renderLoginHistory();
}

function renderLoginHistory() {
  // Branch isolation: filter login history by current branch selection
  const branchBase = filterByUserBranch(DB.loginHistory);
  $('loginHistoryBody').innerHTML = [...branchBase].sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0)).map(l=>`
    <tr>
      <td style="white-space:nowrap">${dateFmt(l.timestamp)}</td>
      <td><strong>${l.user}</strong></td>
      <td><span class="pill ${pillCls(l.result)}">${l.result}</span></td>
      <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.8rem">${l.ip}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${l.ua}</td>
      <td>${l.risk!=='NONE'?`<span class="pill ${l.risk==='HIGH'?'pill-high':'pill-medium'}">${l.risk}</span>`:'—'}</td>
    </tr>`).join('');
}

function exportAuditLogs() {
  const q = norm($('auditSearch')?.value || '');
  const result = $('auditResultFilter')?.value || '';
  const branch = $('auditBranchFilter')?.value || '';
  const category = $('auditCategoryFilter')?.value || '';
  const entityFilter = ($('auditEntityFilter')?.value || '').toUpperCase();
  const dateFrom = $('auditDateFrom')?.value || '';
  const dateTo = $('auditDateTo')?.value || '';
  // Branch isolation: same filter as renderAuditLogs
  const branchBase = filterByUserBranch(DB.auditLogs);
  const filtered = branchBase.filter(a => {
    if (q && !norm(a.action).includes(q) && !norm(a.actor).includes(q) && !norm(a.entity).includes(q) && !norm(a.details).includes(q)) return false;
    if (result && a.result !== result) return false;
    if (branch && a.actorBranch !== branch) return false;
    if (category && (a.category || classifyAuditCategory(a.action)) !== category) return false;
    if (entityFilter && (a.entity || '').toUpperCase() !== entityFilter) return false;
    if (dateFrom && a.timestamp && a.timestamp < dateFrom + 'T00:00:00') return false;
    if (dateTo && a.timestamp && a.timestamp > dateTo + 'T23:59:59') return false;
    return true;
  });
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('Audit Trail Export');
  const header = 'Timestamp,Actor,Actor Branch,Action,Category,Entity,Entity ID,Module,Result,IP Address,User Agent,Details\n';
  const rows = filtered.map(a => {
    const cat = a.category || classifyAuditCategory(a.action);
    const mod = a.module || classifyModule(a.action);
    return `${csv(dateFmt(a.timestamp))},${csv(a.actor)},${csv(a.actorBranch)},${csv(a.action)},${csv(cat)},${csv(a.entity)},${csv(a.entityId)},${csv(mod)},${csv(a.result)},${csv(a.ip)},${csv(a.userAgent)},${csv(a.details)}`;
  }).join('\n');
  const footer = csvFooter(filtered.length);
  downloadCSV(meta + header + rows + footer, 'audit-log-export.csv');
  showToast('success','Export Complete',`${filtered.length} audit records exported as CSV.`);
}

/* ================================================================
   BANK BRANDING SETTINGS
   ================================================================ */
/**
 * escHtml — Escapes a string for safe insertion into innerHTML contexts.
 * Uses textContent→innerHTML approach which correctly escapes <, >, &, ", and '
 * to their HTML entity equivalents, preventing XSS from user-controlled data.
 * Fallback to DOMPurify.sanitize() with ALLOWED_TAGS=[] if textContent fails.
 */
function escHtml(s) {
  if (s === null || s === undefined || s === '') return '';
  const str = String(s);
  try {
    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.textContent = str;
    return d.innerHTML;
  } catch(e) {
    // Fallback: manual entity escaping
    return str.replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;').replace(/'/g,'&#39;');
  }
}

/**
 * Sanitize loan numbers loaded from the backend.
 * Detects and masks corrupted loan numbers containing scientific notation
 * (e.g., "LN-2026-9.2233720368548E+18-65") which were caused by JS
 * Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER overflow in previous _dbId bugs.
 * The backend migration in loan-fund-accounts.php auto-fixes these on first load,
 * but this guard provides defense-in-depth for any that slip through.
 */
function sanitizeLoanNumber(loanNumber) {
  if (!loanNumber || typeof loanNumber !== 'string') return loanNumber || 'LN-????';
  // Detect scientific notation patterns like E+, e+, E-, e- in the number portion
  if (/E[+-]\d+/i.test(loanNumber)) {
    // Extract year if possible, otherwise use current year
    const yearMatch = loanNumber.match(/LN-(\d{4})-/);
    const yr = yearMatch ? yearMatch[1] : new Date().getFullYear();
    // Generate a placeholder — the backend migration will fix the real one
    return 'LN-' + yr + '-FIX';
  }
  return loanNumber;
}
/**
 * escAttr — Escapes a string for safe insertion into HTML attribute values.
 * Prevents attribute-injection XSS (e.g., breaking out of onclick="...").
 */
function escAttr(s) {
  if (s === null || s === undefined || s === '') return '';
  return String(s).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;').replace(/'/g,'&#39;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/`/g,'&#96;');
}
/**
 * escUrl — Sanitizes a URL for safe use in src/href attributes.
 * Rejects javascript: and data: (except data:image) schemes.
 */
function escUrl(s) {
  if (!s) return '#';
  const trimmed = String(s).trim();
  const lower = trimmed.toLowerCase();
  if (lower.startsWith('javascript:') || lower.startsWith('data:') && !lower.startsWith('data:image/')) return '#';
  return trimmed;
}

function renderBankBranding() {
  const b = DB.bankBranding;
  $('brandingSettingsArea').innerHTML = `
    <!-- Live Letterhead Preview -->
    <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:18px">
      <div class="card-header"><h3>Live Letterhead Preview</h3><p style="margin-top:4px">This preview shows how your branding appears on generated documents.</p></div>
      <div class="branding-preview" id="brandingPreview">
        <div class="bp-letterhead">
          <div class="bp-logo" id="previewLogo">${b.logo ? '<img src="'+escUrl(b.logo)+'" alt="Logo">' : b.bankName.charAt(0)}</div>

            <div class="bp-bank-name" id="previewBankName">${escHtml(b.bankName)}</div>

          </div>

          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="branding-form-grid" style="margin-bottom:24px">
        <div class="form-group full-width">
          <label>Head Office Address</label>
          <input type="text" id="bb_headOfficeAddress" value="${escHtml(b.headOfficeAddress)}" placeholder="Full address of head office" oninput="updateBrandingPreview()">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Primary Phone</label>
          <input type="text" id="bb_phone" value="${escHtml(b.phone)}" placeholder="+237 233 42 18 00" oninput="updateBrandingPreview()">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Alternative Phone</label>
          <input type="text" id="bb_phoneAlt" value="${escHtml(b.phoneAlt)}" placeholder="+237 699 000 000">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>General Email</label>
          <input type="text" id="bb_email" value="${escHtml(b.email)}" placeholder="info@atlasbank.cm" oninput="updateBrandingPreview()">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Website</label>
          <input type="text" id="bb_website" value="${escHtml(b.website)}" placeholder="www.atlasbank.cm" oninput="updateBrandingPreview()">
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="branding-section-title"><i data-lucide="scroll-text" style="width:16px;height:16px;stroke-width:1.8"></i> Regulatory & Registration</div>
      <div class="branding-form-grid" style="margin-bottom:24px">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>SWIFT Code</label>
          <input type="text" id="bb_swiftCode" value="${escHtml(b.swiftCode)}" placeholder="e.g. ATLSCMCM" style="text-transform:uppercase" oninput="updateBrandingPreview()">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>BEAC Approval Number</label>
          <input type="text" id="bb_cbnLicenseNumber" value="${escHtml(b.cbnLicenseNumber)}" placeholder="BEAC-2025-CM-0047" oninput="updateBrandingPreview()">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>RCCM Number</label>
          <input type="text" id="bb_registrationNumber" value="${escHtml(b.registrationNumber)}" placeholder="RCCM-DL-2025-A-1234" oninput="updateBrandingPreview()">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Tax Identification Number (NIF)</label>
          <input type="text" id="bb_taxIdentificationNumber" value="${escHtml(b.taxIdentificationNumber)}" placeholder="NIF-1234567890A" oninput="updateBrandingPreview()">
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)">
        <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" onclick="resetBrandingToDefault()">Reset to Defaults</button>
        <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveBankBranding()"><i data-lucide="save" style="width:15px;height:15px;stroke-width:2;vertical-align:-2px"></i> Save Branding Settings</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
  refreshIcons($('brandingSettingsArea'));
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   LIVE BRANDING PREVIEW — updates every form field change
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function updateBrandingPreview() {
  const $ = id => document.getElementById(id);
  const val = id => $(id)?.value?.trim() || '';

  // Text fields → preview text
  const setText = (fieldId, previewId, transform) => {
    const el = $(previewId);
    if (!el) return;
    const v = val(fieldId);
    el.textContent = transform ? transform(v) : v;
  };

  setText('bb_bankName', 'previewBankName');
  setText('bb_tagline', 'previewTagline');
  setText('bb_swiftCode', 'previewSwift');

  // BEAC license shown as "BEAC: {value}"
  const licEl = $('previewLicense');
  if (licEl) { const v = val('bb_cbnLicenseNumber'); licEl.textContent = 'BEAC: ' + v; }

  setText('bb_headOfficeAddress', 'previewAddress');
  setText('bb_phone', 'previewPhone');
  setText('bb_email', 'previewEmail');
  setText('bb_website', 'previewWebsite');
  setText('bb_registrationNumber', 'previewReg');
  setText('bb_taxIdentificationNumber', 'previewTax');

  // Colors → update the preview letterhead top bar and logo gradient
  const primary = val('bb_primaryColor') || '#58b7ff';
  const accent  = val('bb_accentColor')  || '#67e8b5';
  const preview = $('brandingPreview');
  if (preview) {
    // Update the ::before pseudo-element gradient via a CSS variable or inline style on wrapper
    preview.style.setProperty('--lh-primary', primary);
    preview.style.setProperty('--lh-accent', accent);
    // Update the top bar pseudo-element via a live child element
    let topBar = preview.querySelector('.bp-top-bar');
    if (!topBar) {
      topBar = document.createElement('div');
      topBar.className = 'bp-top-bar';
      topBar.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:6px;z-index:2;border-radius:var(--radius-lg) var(--radius-lg) 0 0';
      preview.prepend(topBar);
    }
    topBar.style.background = 'linear-gradient(90deg,' + primary + ',' + accent + ')';
  }

  // Update preview logo gradient
  const previewLogo = $('previewLogo');
  if (previewLogo && !previewLogo.querySelector('img')) {
    previewLogo.style.background = 'linear-gradient(135deg,' + primary + ',' + accent + ')';
  }

  // Update document bar color
  const docBar = preview?.querySelector('.bp-doc-bar');
  if (docBar) {
    docBar.style.background = hexToRgba(primary, 0.08);
    docBar.style.color = primary;
  }
}

function hexToRgba(hex, alpha) {
  hex = hex.replace('#', '');
  if (hex.length === 3) hex = hex[0]+hex[0]+hex[1]+hex[1]+hex[2]+hex[2];
  const r = parseInt(hex.substring(0,2),16);
  const g = parseInt(hex.substring(2,4),16);
  const b = parseInt(hex.substring(4,6),16);
  return 'rgba('+r+','+g+','+b+','+alpha+')';
}

function handleLogoUpload(event) {
  // ★ FIX (ST-084): Added RBAC gate — only admins can upload branding assets.
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can modify branding.'); return; }
  const file = event.target.files[0];
  if (!file) return;
  if (file.size > 512000) { showToast('error','File Too Large','Logo must be under 500KB. Please compress and try again.'); return; }
  const reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = function(e) {
    DB.bankBranding.logo = e.target.result;
    const previewThumb = document.getElementById('logoPreviewThumb');
    if (previewThumb) previewThumb.innerHTML = '<img src="'+escUrl(e.target.result)+'" alt="Logo">';
    const previewLogo = document.getElementById('previewLogo');
    if (previewLogo) previewLogo.innerHTML = '<img src="'+escUrl(e.target.result)+'" alt="Logo">';
    showToast('success','Logo Uploaded','Preview updated. Click Save to persist changes.');
  };
  reader.readAsDataURL(file);
}

function removeLogo() {
  // ★ FIX (ST-083): Added RBAC gate — only admins can remove branding assets.
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can modify branding.'); return; }
  DB.bankBranding.logo = '';
  renderBankBranding();
  showToast('info','Logo Removed','Logo has been cleared. Click Save to persist.');
}

async function saveBankBranding() {
  // ★ FIX (ST-001): Added RBAC gate — only admins can modify branding.
  // Previously, non-admin users saw false "Branding Saved" toast and local UI changes
  // that silently reverted on next page load since the backend rejects non-admin PUT.
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can modify branding.'); return; }
  DB.bankBranding.bankName = document.getElementById('bb_bankName')?.value?.trim() || 'ATLAS BANK';
  DB.bankBranding.bankNameShort = document.getElementById('bb_bankNameShort')?.value?.trim() || 'Atlas Bank';
  DB.bankBranding.tagline = document.getElementById('bb_tagline')?.value?.trim() || 'Enterprise Operations Console';
  DB.bankBranding.slogan = document.getElementById('bb_slogan')?.value?.trim() || '';
  DB.bankBranding.primaryColor = document.getElementById('bb_primaryColor')?.value || '#58b7ff';
  DB.bankBranding.accentColor = document.getElementById('bb_accentColor')?.value || '#67e8b5';
  DB.bankBranding.headOfficeAddress = document.getElementById('bb_headOfficeAddress')?.value?.trim() || '';
  DB.bankBranding.phone = document.getElementById('bb_phone')?.value?.trim() || '';
  DB.bankBranding.phoneAlt = document.getElementById('bb_phoneAlt')?.value?.trim() || '';
  DB.bankBranding.email = document.getElementById('bb_email')?.value?.trim() || '';
  DB.bankBranding.website = document.getElementById('bb_website')?.value?.trim() || '';
  DB.bankBranding.swiftCode = document.getElementById('bb_swiftCode')?.value?.trim()?.toUpperCase() || '';
  DB.bankBranding.cbnLicenseNumber = document.getElementById('bb_cbnLicenseNumber')?.value?.trim() || '';
  DB.bankBranding.registrationNumber = document.getElementById('bb_registrationNumber')?.value?.trim() || '';
  DB.bankBranding.taxIdentificationNumber = document.getElementById('bb_taxIdentificationNumber')?.value?.trim() || '';

  // Apply branding across the app
  applyBranding();
  // ★ Cache branding for instant loader display on next page refresh
  Loader.cacheBranding(DB.bankBranding);
  
  // ★ FIX (ST-059): Await the API call BEFORE showing success toast. Previously showed
  // success toast immediately, then if the API failed, showed a second error toast —
  // misleading the user into thinking the save was confirmed when it wasn't.
  const brandingPayload = {
    bank_name: DB.bankBranding.bankName, bank_name_short: DB.bankBranding.bankNameShort,
    tagline: DB.bankBranding.tagline, logo: DB.bankBranding.logo,
    primary_color: DB.bankBranding.primaryColor, accent_color: DB.bankBranding.accentColor,
    head_office_address: DB.bankBranding.headOfficeAddress, phone: DB.bankBranding.phone,
    phone_alt: DB.bankBranding.phoneAlt, email: DB.bankBranding.email,
    website: DB.bankBranding.website, swift_code: DB.bankBranding.swiftCode,
    cbn_license_number: DB.bankBranding.cbnLicenseNumber,
    registration_number: DB.bankBranding.registrationNumber,
    tax_identification_number: DB.bankBranding.taxIdentificationNumber,
    slogan: DB.bankBranding.slogan
  };
  try {
    await API.put('branding', brandingPayload);
    showToast('success','Branding Saved','All branding settings have been saved and applied across the system.');
    addAuditEntry('SETTINGS_UPDATE','Setting','Bank Branding','Bank branding configuration updated by '+STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
  } catch(err) {
    console.warn('[Branding] Failed to persist to backend:', err);
    showToast('error', 'Persist Error', 'Branding was applied locally but failed to save to the database. Changes may revert on next login.');
  }
}

async function resetBrandingToDefault() {
  // ★ FIX (ST-001): Added RBAC gate — only admins can reset branding.
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can modify branding.'); return; }
  if (!confirm('Reset all branding settings to default values? This cannot be undone.')) return;
  const defaults = {
    bankName: 'ATLAS BANK', bankNameShort: 'Atlas Bank', tagline: 'Enterprise Operations Console',
    logo: '', primaryColor: '#58b7ff', accentColor: '#67e8b5',
    headOfficeAddress: 'Avenue Ahmadou Ahidjo, Immeuble Atlas, Centre-Ville, Douala, Cameroun',
    phone: '+237 233 42 18 00', phoneAlt: '+237 699 000 000', email: 'info@atlasbank.cm',
    website: 'www.atlasbank.cm', swiftCode: 'ATLSCMCM', cbnLicenseNumber: 'BEAC-2025-CM-0047',
    registrationNumber: 'RCCM-DL-2025-A-1234', taxIdentificationNumber: 'NIF-1234567890A',
    slogan: 'Your Trusted Financial Partner'
  };
  Object.assign(DB.bankBranding, defaults);
  applyBranding();
  Loader.cacheBranding(DB.bankBranding);
  renderBankBranding();
  // ★ FIX (ST-065): Await the API call before confirming reset. Previously fire-and-forget —
  // if the API failed, user saw "Branding Reset" toast but the backend still had old values.
  const resetPayload = {
    bank_name: defaults.bankName, bank_name_short: defaults.bankNameShort,
    tagline: defaults.tagline, logo: defaults.logo,
    primary_color: defaults.primaryColor, accent_color: defaults.accentColor,
    head_office_address: defaults.headOfficeAddress, phone: defaults.phone,
    phone_alt: defaults.phoneAlt, email: defaults.email,
    website: defaults.website, swift_code: defaults.swiftCode,
    cbn_license_number: defaults.cbnLicenseNumber,
    registration_number: defaults.registrationNumber,
    tax_identification_number: defaults.taxIdentificationNumber,
    slogan: defaults.slogan
  };
  try {
    await API.put('branding', resetPayload);
    showToast('info','Branding Reset','All branding settings have been restored to defaults.');
    addAuditEntry('SETTINGS_UPDATE','Setting','Bank Branding','Bank branding reset to defaults by '+STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
  } catch(err) {
    console.warn('[Branding Reset] Failed to persist to backend:', err);
    showToast('error', 'Persist Error', 'Branding was reset locally but failed to save to the database. Changes may revert on next login.');
  }
}

function loadSavedBranding() {
  // Branding is loaded from the database via API.get('branding') in loadAllData()
  // DB is the source of truth — no localStorage override
}

function applyBranding() {
  const b = DB.bankBranding;
  
  // Update CSS variables
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--primary', b.primaryColor);
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent', b.accentColor);
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--primary-dim', b.primaryColor + '1f');
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent-dim', b.accentColor + '1f');
  
  // Update page title
  document.title = b.bankNameShort + ' Enterprise Operations Console';
  
  // Update login screen
  const loginH1 = document.querySelector('#loginScreen h1');
  if (loginH1) loginH1.textContent = b.bankNameShort + ' Enterprise';
  const loginFooter = document.querySelector('.login-footer');
  if (loginFooter) loginFooter.textContent = b.bankNameShort + ' Enterprise Operations Console v10.0 · Session requires MFA for privileged roles';
  const loginMark = document.querySelector('#loginScreen .brand-mark');
  if (loginMark && !b.logo) loginMark.textContent = b.bankName.charAt(0);
  
  // Update sidebar brand
  const sidebarMark = document.querySelector('.sidebar-brand .mark');
  if (sidebarMark) {
    if (b.logo) sidebarMark.innerHTML = '<img src="'+escUrl(b.logo)+'" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:14px" alt="Logo">';
    else sidebarMark.textContent = b.bankName.charAt(0);
  }
  const sidebarH1 = document.querySelector('.sidebar-brand h1');
  if (sidebarH1) sidebarH1.textContent = b.bankNameShort;
  const sidebarSmall = document.querySelector('.sidebar-brand small');
  if (sidebarSmall) sidebarSmall.textContent = b.tagline;
  
  // Update breadcrumb
  const bcSpan = document.querySelector('#breadcrumb > span:first-child');
  if (bcSpan) bcSpan.textContent = b.bankNameShort;
}

function getBankBrandingLetterhead() {
  const b = DB.bankBranding;
  return {
    bankName: b.bankName,
    bankNameShort: b.bankNameShort,
    logo: b.logo,
    address: b.headOfficeAddress,
    phone: b.phone,
    phoneAlt: b.phoneAlt,
    email: b.email,
    website: b.website,
    swiftCode: b.swiftCode,
    cbnLicense: b.cbnLicenseNumber,
    regNumber: b.registrationNumber,
    tin: b.taxIdentificationNumber,
    slogan: b.slogan
  };
}

/** Universal enterprise document footer — used by ALL documents for consistency */
function buildEnterpriseFooter(docNumber, docType) {
  const b = DB.bankBranding || {};
  const genDate = dateFmt(new Date().toISOString());
  const operator = STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System';
  return '<div class="ent-doc-footer">' +
    '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px">' +
      '<span>' + escHtml(b.bankName || 'Atlas Bank') + '</span>' +
      '<span>Document Ref: ' + escHtml(docNumber || '') + '</span>' +
      '<span>Generated: ' + genDate + ' by ' + escHtml(operator) + '</span>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">' +
      '<span>' + escHtml(b.headOfficeAddress || '') + '</span>' +
      '<span>SWIFT: ' + escHtml(b.swiftCode || 'N/A') + ' &middot; BEAC: ' + escHtml(b.cbnLicenseNumber || 'N/A') + '</span>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div style="margin-top:6px;padding-top:6px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)">' +
      '<strong>CONFIDENTIAL:</strong> This ' + (docType || 'document') + ' contains privileged financial information intended solely for authorized personnel. Unauthorized use, disclosure, copying, or distribution is strictly prohibited. This document is system-generated and does not require a manual signature. If you have received this document in error, please notify ' + escHtml(b.bankNameShort || b.bankName || 'Atlas Bank') + ' immediately at compliance@' + escHtml(b.website || 'atlasbank.com') + '.' +
    '</div>' +
  '</div>';
}

    ${lh.website ? '<span>' + IC('globe', 14) + ' ' + escHtml(lh.website) + '</span>' : ''}
    ${lh.tin ? '<span>TIN: '+escHtml(lh.tin)+'</span>' : ''}
  </div>`;
}
