    ${escHtml(lh.bankName)} · ${lh.address ? escHtml(lh.address) : ''}${lh.phone ? ' · '+escHtml(lh.phone) : ''}
    ${lh.regNumber ? '<br>Registered in Cameroon · RCCM: '+escHtml(lh.regNumber) : ''}
    ${lh.cbnLicense ? ' · BEAC Approval: '+escHtml(lh.cbnLicense) : ''}
    <br><strong>CONFIDENTIAL:</strong> This document contains privileged information intended solely for the named recipient.
    Unauthorized use, disclosure, or distribution is strictly prohibited.
  </div>`;
}

/* ================================================================
   LOAN MODULE HELPERS — Bank vs Credit Union
   ================================================================ */
function getLoanModule() {
  // ★ FIX (ST-063): Use _findSetting() for case-insensitive lookup consistency.
  const s = _findSetting('loan.module');
  return s ? s.value : 'BANK';
}

function toggleLoanModule() {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can toggle the loan module.'); return; }
  const current = getLoanModule();
  const next = current === 'BANK' ? 'CREDIT_UNION' : 'BANK';
  let s = _findSetting('loan.module');
  if (API_CONNECTED) {
    const _lmPayload = {
      key: 'loan.module', value: next,
      name: 'Loan Calculation Module', category: 'Loans'
    };
    if (s?.effectiveFrom) _lmPayload.effective_from = s.effectiveFrom;
    // ★ FIX (ST-079): Persist to backend BEFORE updating local state and showing toast.
    // Previously showed success toast immediately, then if API failed showed a second
    // error toast — confusing the user about whether the change was confirmed.
    API.put('settings', _lmPayload).then(r => {
      if (s) { s.value = next; } else { DB.settings.push(s = {key:'loan.module', value:next, name:'Loan Calculation Module', category:'Loans'}); }
      if (r?.data?.id && !s.id) { s.id = r.data.id; }
      renderSystemSettingsCards();
      showToast('success', 'Loan Module', `Switched to ${next === 'CREDIT_UNION' ? 'Credit Union (OHADA/COBAC)' : 'Bank'} mode.`);
      addAuditEntry('LOAN_MODULE_TOGGLE', 'System', 'ALL', `Loan calculation module toggled to ${next} by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}`);
    }).catch(err => {
      console.warn('[Loan Module] Failed to persist to backend:', err);
      showToast('error', 'Persist Error', 'Failed to save loan module setting to database.');
    });
  } else {
    // Offline mode — apply locally immediately
    if (s) { s.value = next; } else { DB.settings.push(s = {key:'loan.module', value:next, name:'Loan Calculation Module', category:'Loans'}); }
    renderSystemSettingsCards();
    showToast('success', 'Loan Module', `Switched to ${next === 'CREDIT_UNION' ? 'Credit Union (OHADA/COBAC)' : 'Bank'} mode.`);
    addAuditEntry('LOAN_MODULE_TOGGLE', 'System', 'ALL', `Loan calculation module toggled to ${next} by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}`);
  }
}

/* ================================================================
   SETTINGS
   ================================================================ */
function renderSettings() {
  // Non-admin users see settings as read-only (PUT requires ADMIN role on backend)
  const isReadOnly = !isUserAdmin();
  // ★ FIX (ST-023): Settings are GLOBAL — they have NO branch column in the DB.
  // Previously the banner implied per-branch settings, misleading admins into thinking
  // changes only affect one branch. Now always shows a global indicator.
  const bannerHtml = `<div style="padding:10px 16px;background:rgba(88,183,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(88,183,255,.2);border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:.84rem;color:var(--primary)">
    <span style="display:inline-flex"><i data-lucide="globe" style="width:18px;height:18px;stroke-width:1.8"></i></span>
    <div><strong>Global Settings</strong> — All settings, tax rates, fees, and policies apply across <strong>ALL branches</strong>. Changes take effect immediately for the entire institution.</div>
  </div>`;

  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // ENTERPRISE POLICY DASHBOARD
  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
  const policies = DB.policies || [];
  const activePolicies = policies.filter(p => (p.status || 'ACTIVE') === 'ACTIVE');
  // ★ FIX (ST-056/ST-057/ST-068): Expired/expiring KPI counts now only include ACTIVE policies.
  // Previously counted ARCHIVED/DELETED policies as expired, inflating the count and
  // penalizing the health score for policies that were already deactivated.
  // An archived expired policy is not a governance risk — it's already been retired.
  const expiredPolicies = activePolicies.filter(p => p.is_expired);
  const expiringSoon = activePolicies.filter(p => p.is_expiring_soon);
  const reviewOverdue = activePolicies.filter(p => p.review_overdue);
  const archivedPolicies = policies.filter(p => (p.status || '') === 'ARCHIVED' || (p.status || '') === 'DELETED');

  // Severity breakdown
  const sevCounts = { LOW: 0, MEDIUM: 0, HIGH: 0, CRITICAL: 0 };
  activePolicies.forEach(p => { sevCounts[p.severity || 'MEDIUM'] = (sevCounts[p.severity || 'MEDIUM'] || 0) + 1; });

  // Category breakdown
  const catCounts = {};
  activePolicies.forEach(p => { catCounts[p.category || 'GENERAL'] = (catCounts[p.category || 'GENERAL'] || 0) + 1; });

  // Health score: 100% minus penalties for expired, overdue, expiring
  // ★ FIX (ST-006): With 0 policies, health score was 100% (misleading — no governance
  // framework exists). Now returns 0% with "Not Assessable" label when no policies exist.
  let healthScore = policies.length > 0 ? 100 : 0;
  if (policies.length > 0) {
    // ★ FIX (ST-056): Health score penalties now use activePolicies as the denominator.
    // Previously used total policies count, so archived/deleted policies diluted the
    // penalty making the score look healthier than it actually was.
    healthScore -= (expiredPolicies.length / Math.max(activePolicies.length, 1)) * 30;
    healthScore -= (reviewOverdue.length / Math.max(activePolicies.length, 1)) * 20;
    healthScore -= (expiringSoon.length / Math.max(activePolicies.length, 1)) * 10;
    // ★ FIX (ST-067): Archived penalty now scales with count (was flat -5 regardless).
    healthScore -= Math.min(15, archivedPolicies.length * 2);
  }
  healthScore = Math.max(0, Math.round(healthScore));

  const healthColor = healthScore >= 80 ? '#67e8b5' : healthScore >= 50 ? '#fbbf24' : '#ff6b86';
  const healthLabel = policies.length === 0 ? 'Not Assessable' : healthScore >= 80 ? 'Healthy' : healthScore >= 50 ? 'Needs Attention' : 'At Risk';

  let dashHtml = `<div class="policy-dash-grid">`;
  dashHtml += `<div class="policy-dash-stat"><div class="pds-value" style="color:var(--primary)">${policies.length}</div><div class="pds-label">Total Policies</div></div>`;
  dashHtml += `<div class="policy-dash-stat"><div class="pds-value" style="color:#67e8b5">${activePolicies.length}</div><div class="pds-label">Active Policies</div></div>`;
  dashHtml += `<div class="policy-dash-stat" ${expiredPolicies.length > 0 ? 'style="border-color:rgba(255,107,134,.3)"' : ''}><div class="pds-value" style="color:${expiredPolicies.length > 0 ? '#ff6b86' : 'var(--muted)'}">${expiredPolicies.length}</div><div class="pds-label">Expired</div></div>`;
  dashHtml += `<div class="policy-dash-stat" ${expiringSoon.length > 0 ? 'style="border-color:rgba(251,191,36,.3)"' : ''}><div class="pds-value" style="color:${expiringSoon.length > 0 ? '#fbbf24' : 'var(--muted)'}">${expiringSoon.length}</div><div class="pds-label">Expiring Soon (30d)</div></div>`;
  dashHtml += `<div class="policy-dash-stat" ${reviewOverdue.length > 0 ? 'style="border-color:rgba(255,107,134,.3)"' : ''}><div class="pds-value" style="color:${reviewOverdue.length > 0 ? '#ff6b86' : 'var(--muted)'}">${reviewOverdue.length}</div><div class="pds-label">Review Overdue</div></div>`;
  dashHtml += `<div class="policy-dash-stat"><div class="pds-value" style="color:${healthColor}">${healthScore}%</div><div class="pds-label">Governance Health</div><div style="margin-top:4px;height:4px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--bg-dim);overflow:hidden"><div style="height:100%;width:${healthScore}%;background:${healthColor};border-radius:2px;transition:width .3s"></div></div><div style="font-size:.68rem;color:${healthColor};margin-top:2px">${healthLabel}</div></div>`;
  dashHtml += `</div>`;

  // Alerts bar
  let alerts = [];
  if (expiredPolicies.length > 0) alerts.push(`<span style="color:#ff6b86">${expiredPolicies.length} expired policy(ies) require attention</span>`);
  if (reviewOverdue.length > 0) alerts.push(`<span style="color:#fbbf24">${reviewOverdue.length} policy(ies) overdue for review</span>`);
  if (expiringSoon.length > 0) alerts.push(`<span style="color:#fbbf24">${expiringSoon.length} policy(ies) expiring within 30 days</span>`);
  if (alerts.length > 0) {
    dashHtml += `<div style="padding:10px 16px;background:rgba(251,191,36,.06);border:1px solid rgba(251,191,36,.15);border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:16px;font-size:.82rem;line-height:1.8">`;
    dashHtml += alerts.map(a => '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px">' + (a.includes('expired') ? IC('alert-triangle', 16) : IC('timer', 14)) + ' ' + a + '</div>').join('');
    dashHtml += `</div>`;
  }

  // Severity + Category matrix
  dashHtml += `<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:20px">`;
  dashHtml += `<div class="card" style="padding:14px"><h4 style="margin-bottom:10px;font-size:.88rem">Severity Distribution</h4>`;
  ['CRITICAL','HIGH','MEDIUM','LOW'].forEach(sev => {
    const cnt = sevCounts[sev] || 0;
    const pct = activePolicies.length > 0 ? Math.round((cnt / activePolicies.length) * 100) : 0;
    dashHtml += `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;font-size:.8rem"><span class="policy-card-sev policy-card-sev-${sev.toLowerCase()}"></span><span style="width:70px">${sev}</span><div style="flex:1;height:6px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--bg-dim);overflow:hidden"><div style="height:100%;width:${pct}%;background:var(--${sev==='CRITICAL'?'danger':sev==='HIGH'?'warn':sev==='MEDIUM'?'primary':'accent'});border-radius:3px;transition:width .3s"></div></div><span style="color:var(--muted);width:30px;text-align:right">${cnt}</span></div>`;
  });
  dashHtml += `</div>`;

  dashHtml += `<div class="card" style="padding:14px"><h4 style="margin-bottom:10px;font-size:.88rem">Categories</h4>`;
  Object.entries(catCounts).sort((a,b) => b[1]-a[1]).forEach(([cat, cnt]) => {
    const pct = activePolicies.length > 0 ? Math.round((cnt / activePolicies.length) * 100) : 0;
    const catLabel = cat.charAt(0) + cat.slice(1).toLowerCase();
    dashHtml += `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;font-size:.8rem"><span style="width:80px;color:var(--text2)">${catLabel}</span><div style="flex:1;height:6px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--bg-dim);overflow:hidden"><div style="height:100%;width:${pct}%;background:var(--primary);border-radius:3px;transition:width .3s"></div></div><span style="color:var(--muted);width:30px;text-align:right">${cnt}</span></div>`;
  });
  dashHtml += `</div></div>`;

  $('policyDashboard').innerHTML = dashHtml;

  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // CONTROLS BAR — Search, Filter, Create, Show Archived
  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
  let controlsHtml = '';
  controlsHtml += `<input type="text" id="policySearch" placeholder="Search policies..." oninput="debounce('policySearch',filterPolicies)" style="padding:8px 14px;font-size:.86rem;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--bg-dim);min-width:220px">`;
  controlsHtml += `<select id="policyFilterCat" onchange="filterPolicies()" style="padding:8px 12px;font-size:.86rem;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--bg-dim)"><option value="">All Categories</option>`;
  Object.keys(catCounts).sort().forEach(cat => { controlsHtml += `<option value="${cat}">${cat.charAt(0) + cat.slice(1).toLowerCase()}</option>`; });
  controlsHtml += `</select>`;
  controlsHtml += `<select id="policyFilterStatus" onchange="filterPolicies()" style="padding:8px 12px;font-size:.86rem;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--bg-dim)"><option value="">All Statuses</option><option value="ACTIVE">Active</option><option value="ARCHIVED">Archived</option><option value="DELETED">Deleted</option></select>`;
  controlsHtml += `<label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer"><input type="checkbox" id="policyShowArchived" onchange="filterPolicies()" style="cursor:pointer"> Show Archived &amp; Deleted</label>`;
  if (!isReadOnly) {
    controlsHtml += `<button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="openCreatePolicy()" style="margin-left:auto">+ New Policy</button>`;
  }
  $('policyControls').innerHTML = controlsHtml;

  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // POLICY CARDS — Enhanced with severity, actions, status
  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
  renderPolicyCards(policies);
  refreshIcons();
}

/* ── Filter and render policy cards ── */
function filterPolicies() {
  const search = ($('policySearch')?.value || '').toLowerCase();
  const catFilter = $('policyFilterCat')?.value || '';
  const statusFilter = $('policyFilterStatus')?.value || '';
  const showArchived = $('policyShowArchived')?.checked;

  let filtered = (DB.policies || []).filter(p => {
    const status = p.status || 'ACTIVE';
    if (statusFilter && status !== statusFilter) return false;
    if (!showArchived && (status === 'ARCHIVED' || status === 'DELETED')) return false;
    if (catFilter && (p.category || 'GENERAL') !== catFilter) return false;
    if (search) {
      const hay = ((p.name || '') + ' ' + (p.code || '') + ' ' + (p.description || '')).toLowerCase();
      if (!hay.includes(search)) return false;
    }
    return true;
  });
  renderPolicyCards(filtered);
}

function renderPolicyCards(policies) {
  const isReadOnly = !isUserAdmin();
  $('policyCards').innerHTML = policies.map(p => {
    const status = p.status || 'ACTIVE';
    const sev = (p.severity || 'MEDIUM').toLowerCase();
    const sevColor = { low:'#67e8b5', medium:'#58b7ff', high:'#fbbf24', critical:'#ff6b86' }[sev] || '#58b7ff';
    const isExpired = p.is_expired;
    const isExpiringSoon = p.is_expiring_soon;
    const isReviewOverdue = p.review_overdue;
    const statusPill = status === 'ACTIVE'
      ? `<span class="pill pill-active" style="font-size:.72rem">Active</span>`
      : status === 'ARCHIVED'
        ? `<span class="pill pill-rejected" style="font-size:.72rem">Archived</span>`
        : `<span class="pill pill-warning" style="font-size:.72rem">Deleted</span>`;

    let alertBadges = '';
    if (isExpired) alertBadges += `<span class="pill pill-rejected" style="font-size:.68rem">Expired</span>`;
    if (isExpiringSoon && !isExpired) alertBadges += `<span class="pill pill-warning" style="font-size:.68rem">Expiring Soon</span>`;
    if (isReviewOverdue) alertBadges += `<span class="pill pill-warning" style="font-size:.68rem;background:rgba(255,107,134,.12);color:#ff6b86">Review Overdue</span>`;

    let actionBtns = '';
    actionBtns += `<button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="viewPolicyDetail(${p.id})" title="View details &amp; history">View</button>`;
    if (!isReadOnly && status === 'ACTIVE') {
      actionBtns += `<button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="openEditPolicy(${p.id})" title="Edit policy">Edit</button>`;
      actionBtns += `<button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="markPolicyReviewed(${p.id})" title="Mark as reviewed" style="color:#67e8b5">Review</button>`;
    }
    if (!isReadOnly && (status === 'ARCHIVED' || status === 'DELETED')) {
      actionBtns += `<button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="restorePolicy(${p.id})" title="Restore policy">Restore</button>`;
    }
    if (!isReadOnly && status === 'ACTIVE') {
      actionBtns += `<button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="archivePolicy(${p.id})" title="Archive policy" style="color:var(--danger)">Archive</button>`;
    }

    return `<div class="card" style="border-left:4px solid ${sevColor};${isExpired ? 'opacity:.75' : ''}" data-policy-id="${p.id}">
      <div class="card-header">
        <div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px">
            <span class="policy-card-sev policy-card-sev-${sev}"></span>
            <h3 style="margin:0">${escHtml(p.name)}</h3>
          </div>
          <p style="margin-top:2px;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)"><span class="td-mono">${escHtml(p.code)}</span> · v${escHtml(p.version)} · ${escHtml(p.category || 'GENERAL')}</p>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:flex-end">
          ${statusPill}${alertBadges}
        </div>
      </div>
      <p style="font-size:.84rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:10px">${escHtml(p.description || '')}</p>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:16px;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--soft);margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap">
        <span>From: ${p.effective_from ? shortDate(p.effective_from) : 'Not set'}</span>
        <span>To: ${p.effective_to ? shortDate(p.effective_to) : 'No expiry'}</span>
        <span>Owner: ${escHtml(p.owner || 'N/A')}</span>
        ${p.revision_count ? `<span>Revisions: ${p.revision_count}</span>` : ''}
      </div>
      ${p.next_review_date ? `<div style="font-size:.76rem;color:${isReviewOverdue ? '#ff6b86' : 'var(--muted)'};margin-bottom:10px">Next review: ${shortDate(p.next_review_date)} ${isReviewOverdue ? '(OVERDUE)' : ''}</div>` : ''}
      ${actionBtns ? `<div style="display:flex;gap:6px;border-top:1px solid var(--line);padding-top:10px">${actionBtns}</div>` : ''}
    </div>`;
  }).join('') || `<div class="card" style="text-align:center;padding:40px;color:var(--muted)"><p>No policies found matching your filters.</p></div>`;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   POLICY CRUD OPERATIONS
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

function openCreatePolicy() {
  // ★ FIX (ST-085): Added RBAC gate — consistent with openEditPolicy.
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can create policies.'); return; }
  $('pmTitle').textContent = 'Create New Policy';
  $('pmPolicyId').value = '';
  $('pmCode').value = '';
  $('pmCode').disabled = false;
  $('pmVersion').value = '1.0';
  $('pmName').value = '';
  $('pmDescription').value = '';
  $('pmContent').value = '';
  $('pmCategory').value = 'GENERAL';
  $('pmSeverity').value = 'MEDIUM';
  $('pmReviewCycle').value = '365';
  $('pmEffectiveFrom').value = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
  $('pmEffectiveTo').value = '';
  $('pmOwner').value = STATE.currentUser?.fullName || '';
  openModal('policyModal');
}

function openEditPolicy(id) {
  // ★ FIX (ST-085): Added RBAC gate — backend requires ADMIN/COMPLIANCE but frontend
  // had no guard. While the Edit button is hidden for non-admins, this prevents
  // console calls from bypassing the UI restriction.
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can edit policies.'); return; }
  const p = (DB.policies || []).find(x => x.id === id);
  if (!p) return;
  $('pmTitle').textContent = 'Edit Policy';
  $('pmPolicyId').value = p.id;
  $('pmCode').value = p.code || '';
  $('pmCode').disabled = true;
  $('pmVersion').value = p.version || '1.0';
  $('pmName').value = p.name || '';
  $('pmDescription').value = p.description || '';
  $('pmContent').value = p.content || '';
  $('pmCategory').value = p.category || 'GENERAL';
  $('pmSeverity').value = p.severity || 'MEDIUM';
  $('pmReviewCycle').value = p.review_cycle_days || 365;
  $('pmEffectiveFrom').value = p.effective_from || '';
  $('pmEffectiveTo').value = p.effective_to || '';
  $('pmOwner').value = p.owner || '';
  openModal('policyModal');
}

function submitPolicy() {
  // ★ FIX (ST-085): Added RBAC gate — only admins can create/edit policies.
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can modify policies.'); return; }
  const id = $('pmPolicyId').value;
  const code = $('pmCode').value.trim().toUpperCase();
  const name = $('pmName').value.trim();
  const desc = $('pmDescription').value.trim();
  if (!code) { showToast('error', 'Validation', 'Policy code is required.'); return; }
  if (!name) { showToast('error', 'Validation', 'Policy name is required.'); return; }
  if (!desc) { showToast('error', 'Validation', 'Policy description is required.'); return; }

  const effectiveFrom = $('pmEffectiveFrom').value;
  const effectiveTo = $('pmEffectiveTo').value;
  // ★ FIX (ST-061): Validate effective_to > effective_from. Previously allowed creating
  // policies where effective_to < effective_from, making them immediately expired.
  if (effectiveFrom && effectiveTo && effectiveTo < effectiveFrom) {
    showToast('error', 'Date Error', 'Effective To date must be after Effective From date.');
    return;
  }

  const version = $('pmVersion').value.trim() || '1.0';

  // ★ FIX (ST-064): Check for duplicate code+version before creating. Previously relied
  // on backend 500 error (unique key violation) which showed a generic error message.
  if (!id) {
    const duplicate = (DB.policies || []).find(p => p.code === code && p.version === version);
    if (duplicate) {
      showToast('error', 'Duplicate Policy', `A policy with code "${code}" and version "${version}" already exists. Use a different version number.`);
      return;
    }
  }

  const payload = {
    code: code,
    version: version,
    name: name,
    description: desc,
    content: $('pmContent').value,
    category: $('pmCategory').value,
    severity: $('pmSeverity').value,
    review_cycle_days: parseInt($('pmReviewCycle').value) || 365,
    effective_from: effectiveFrom || null,
    effective_to: effectiveTo || null,
    owner: $('pmOwner').value.trim() || null
  };

  if (id) {
    API.put('policies/' + id, payload).then(r => {
      showToast('success', 'Policy Updated', name + ' updated. New revision saved.');
      addAuditEntry('POLICY_UPDATE', 'Policy', code, name + ' updated by ' + STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
      closeModal('policyModal');
      reloadPolicies();
    }).catch(e => showToast('error', 'Error', 'Failed to update policy: ' + (e.message || '')));
  } else {
    API.post('policies', payload).then(r => {
      showToast('success', 'Policy Created', name + ' [' + code + '] created successfully.');
      addAuditEntry('POLICY_CREATE', 'Policy', code, name + ' created by ' + STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
      closeModal('policyModal');
      reloadPolicies();
    }).catch(e => showToast('error', 'Error', 'Failed to create policy: ' + (e.message || '')));
  }
}

function archivePolicy(id) {
  // ★ FIX (ST-081): Added RBAC gate — backend requires ADMIN/COMPLIANCE but frontend
  // had no guard, allowing console calls to bypass the UI restriction.
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can archive policies.'); return; }
  const p = (DB.policies || []).find(x => x.id === id);
  if (!p) return;
  if (!confirm('Archive "' + p.name + '"? The policy will be deactivated but preserved in the system.')) return;
  API.post('policies/' + id + '/archive').then(() => {
    showToast('info', 'Policy Archived', p.name + ' has been archived.');
    addAuditEntry('POLICY_ARCHIVE', 'Policy', p.code, p.name + ' archived by ' + STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
    reloadPolicies();
  }).catch(e => showToast('error', 'Error', 'Failed: ' + (e.message || '')));
}

function restorePolicy(id) {
  // ★ FIX (ST-082): Added RBAC gate — backend requires ADMIN/COMPLIANCE but frontend
  // had no guard, allowing console calls to bypass the UI restriction.
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can restore policies.'); return; }
  const p = (DB.policies || []).find(x => x.id === id);
  if (!p) return;
  API.post('policies/' + id + '/restore').then(() => {
    showToast('success', 'Policy Restored', p.name + ' has been restored to active status.');
    addAuditEntry('POLICY_RESTORE', 'Policy', p.code, p.name + ' restored by ' + STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
    reloadPolicies();
  }).catch(e => showToast('error', 'Error', 'Failed: ' + (e.message || '')));
}

function markPolicyReviewed(id) {
  // ★ FIX (ST-082): Added RBAC gate — backend requires ADMIN/COMPLIANCE but frontend
  // had no guard, allowing console calls to bypass the UI restriction.
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can review policies.'); return; }
  const p = (DB.policies || []).find(x => x.id === id);
  if (!p) return;
  API.post('policies/' + id + '/review').then(() => {
    showToast('success', 'Policy Reviewed', p.name + ' marked as reviewed. Next review date updated.');
    addAuditEntry('POLICY_REVIEW', 'Policy', p.code, p.name + ' reviewed by ' + STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
    reloadPolicies();
  }).catch(e => showToast('error', 'Error', 'Failed: ' + (e.message || '')));
}

function reloadPolicies() {
  API.get('policies').then(r => {
    if (r?.data) {
      DB.policies = r.data.map(p => ({
        id: p.id, code: p.code, version: p.version, name: p.name,
        effective_from: p.effective_from, effective_to: p.effective_to,
        description: p.description || '', content: p.content || '',
        category: p.category, status: p.status, severity: p.severity,
        owner: p.owner, review_cycle_days: p.review_cycle_days,
        next_review_date: p.next_review_date, last_reviewed_at: p.last_reviewed_at,
        revision_count: p.revision_count, is_expired: p.is_expired,
        is_expiring_soon: p.is_expiring_soon, review_overdue: p.review_overdue
      }));
    }
    renderSettings();
    // ★ FIX (ST-074): Removed call to non-existent updateSidebar() — was throwing
    // ReferenceError every time a policy was created/updated/archived/restored/reviewed.
    // Sidebar badge counts are updated via updateBadges() called elsewhere.
    updateBadges();
  }).catch(() => {});
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   POLICY VIEW DETAIL + REVISION HISTORY
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

function viewPolicyDetail(id) {
  const p = (DB.policies || []).find(x => x.id === id);
  if (!p) return;
  $('pvmTitle').textContent = p.name + ' — Details & History';
  let html = '';

  // Metadata grid
  const sev = (p.severity || 'MEDIUM').toLowerCase();
  html += `<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px">`;
  html += `<div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Policy Code</div><div class="di-value td-mono">${escHtml(p.code)}</div></div>`;
  html += `<div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Version</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(p.version)}</div></div>`;
  html += `<div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Category</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(p.category || 'GENERAL')}</div></div>`;
  html += `<div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Severity</div><div class="di-value"><span class="policy-card-sev policy-card-sev-${sev}"></span>${(p.severity || 'MEDIUM').charAt(0) + (p.severity || 'MEDIUM').slice(1).toLowerCase()}</div></div>`;
  html += `<div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Status</div><div class="di-value">${p.status || 'ACTIVE'}</div></div>`;
  html += `<div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Owner</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(p.owner || 'N/A')}</div></div>`;
  html += `<div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Effective From</div><div class="di-value">${p.effective_from ? shortDate(p.effective_from) : 'Not set'}</div></div>`;
  html += `<div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Effective To</div><div class="di-value">${p.effective_to ? shortDate(p.effective_to) : 'No expiry'}</div></div>`;
  html += `<div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Review Cycle</div><div class="di-value">${p.review_cycle_days || 365} days</div></div>`;
  html += `<div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Next Review</div><div class="di-value" style="color:${p.review_overdue ? '#ff6b86' : 'inherit'}">${p.next_review_date ? shortDate(p.next_review_date) + (p.review_overdue ? ' (OVERDUE)' : '') : 'Not set'}</div></div>`;
  html += `</div>`;

  // Full description
  html += `<div style="margin-bottom:16px"><h4 style="margin-bottom:6px;font-size:.9rem">Description</h4><p style="font-size:.86rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;padding:12px;background:var(--bg-dim);border-radius:8px">${escHtml(p.description || '')}</p></div>`;

  // Full content
  if (p.content) {
    html += `<div style="margin-bottom:16px"><h4 style="margin-bottom:6px;font-size:.9rem">Full Policy Content</h4><pre style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.7;padding:14px;background:var(--bg-dim);border-radius:8px;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace">${escHtml(p.content)}</pre></div>`;
  }

  // Status badges
  let statusBadges = '';
  if (p.is_expired) statusBadges += '<span class="pill pill-rejected" style="font-size:.76rem">EXPIRED</span> ';
  if (p.is_expiring_soon) statusBadges += '<span class="pill pill-warning" style="font-size:.76rem">EXPIRING WITHIN 30 DAYS</span> ';
  if (p.review_overdue) statusBadges += '<span class="pill pill-warning" style="font-size:.76rem;background:rgba(255,107,134,.12);color:#ff6b86">REVIEW OVERDUE</span> ';
  if (statusBadges) html += `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:20px">${statusBadges}</div>`;

  // Revision history
  html += `<div style="margin-bottom:16px"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px"><h4 style="font-size:.9rem">Revision History</h4><button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="loadPolicyRevisions(${p.id})" id="pvmLoadRevisionsBtn">Load Revisions</button></div>`;
  html += `<div id="pvmRevisions"><p style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">Click "Load Revisions" to fetch the full change history for this policy.</p></div></div>`;

  // Actions
  const isReadOnly = !isUserAdmin();
  if (!isReadOnly && (p.status || 'ACTIVE') === 'ACTIVE') {
    html += `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)">`;
    html += `<button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="closeModal('policyViewModal');openEditPolicy(${p.id})">Edit Policy</button>`;
    html += `<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="markPolicyReviewed(${p.id})" style="background:#67e8b5;color:#000">Mark Reviewed</button>`;
    html += `</div>`;
  }

  $('pvmBody').innerHTML = html;
  openModal('policyViewModal');
}

function loadPolicyRevisions(policyId) {
  const btn = $('pvmLoadRevisionsBtn');
  if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Loading...'; }
  const container = $('pvmRevisions');
  if (container) container.innerHTML = '<p style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">Fetching revision history...</p>';

  API.get('policies/' + policyId + '/revisions').then(r => {
    const revisions = r?.data || [];
    if (revisions.length === 0) {
      if (container) container.innerHTML = '<p style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">No revisions found for this policy.</p>';
      if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Load Revisions'; }
      return;
    }

    let html = `<div class="policy-revision-timeline">`;
    revisions.forEach((rev, idx) => {
      const isLatest = idx === 0;
      html += `<div class="policy-rev-item ${isLatest ? 'latest' : ''}">`;
      html += `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px">`;
      html += `<strong style="font-size:.86rem">Revision #${rev.revision}</strong>`;
      html += `<span class="pill ${isLatest ? 'pill-active' : 'pill-review'}" style="font-size:.68rem">${isLatest ? 'Current' : 'Historical'}</span>`;
      html += `</div>`;
      if (rev.version) html += `<div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px">Version: ${escHtml(rev.version)}</div>`;
      html += `<div style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:4px"><strong>Summary:</strong> ${escHtml(rev.change_summary || 'No summary')}</div>`;
      html += `<div style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--soft)"><span>By: ${escHtml(rev.changed_by || 'System')}</span> · <span>${rev.changed_at ? new Date(rev.changed_at).toLocaleString() : 'Unknown'}</span></div>`;
      if (!isLatest) {
        html += `<div style="margin-top:8px"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="rollbackToRevision(${policyId}, ${rev.id}, ${rev.revision})" style="color:var(--warn);font-size:.76rem">Rollback to this revision</button></div>`;
      }
      html += `</div>`;
    });
    html += `</div>`;
    if (container) container.innerHTML = html;
    if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Reload Revisions'; }
  }).catch(() => {
    if (container) container.innerHTML = '<p style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--danger)">Failed to load revisions.</p>';
    if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Retry'; }
  });
}

function rollbackToRevision(policyId, revisionId, revisionNum) {
  // ★ FIX (ST-082): Added RBAC gate — backend requires ADMIN/COMPLIANCE but frontend
  // had no guard, allowing console calls to bypass the UI restriction.
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can rollback policies.'); return; }
  const p = (DB.policies || []).find(x => x.id === policyId);
  if (!p) return;
  if (!confirm('Rollback "' + p.name + '" to revision #' + revisionNum + '?\n\nThe current state will be saved as a new revision before rolling back.')) return;
  API.post('policies/' + policyId + '/rollback', { revision_id: revisionId }).then(() => {
    showToast('success', 'Rollback Complete', p.name + ' rolled back to revision #' + revisionNum);
    addAuditEntry('POLICY_ROLLBACK', 'Policy', p.code, p.name + ' rolled back to revision #' + revisionNum + ' by ' + STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
    closeModal('policyViewModal');
    reloadPolicies();
  }).catch(e => showToast('error', 'Rollback Failed', e.message || ''));
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   SYSTEM SETTINGS CARDS (Loan Module + Configurable Settings)
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function renderSystemSettingsCards() {
  const el = $('settingsCards');
  if (!el) return;
  const isReadOnly = !isUserAdmin();
  const loanModule = getLoanModule();
  // ★ FIX (ST-063): Use _findSetting() for case-insensitive lookup consistency.
  const loanSetting = _findSetting('loan.module');
  const loanEffectiveFrom = loanSetting?.effectiveFrom || null;
  const moduleCard = `
<div class="card" style="border-left:4px solid ${loanModule==='CREDIT_UNION'?'var(--accent)':'var(--primary)'}">
  <div class="card-header">
    <div>
      <h3>Loan Calculation Module</h3>
      <p style="margin-top:4px"><span class="td-mono" style="font-size:.76rem">loan.module</span></p>
    </div>
    ${isReadOnly ? '<span class="pill pill-warning" style="font-size:.76rem">Read-only</span>' : ''}
  </div>
  <div class="detail-grid">
    <div class="detail-item">
      <div class="di-label">Active Module</div>
      <div class="di-value">
        <span class="pill ${loanModule==='CREDIT_UNION'?'pill-active':'pill-review'}" style="${isReadOnly ? 'cursor:default;opacity:.85' : 'cursor:pointer'};font-size:.88rem" ${isReadOnly ? '' : 'onclick="toggleLoanModule()"'}>
          ${loanModule==='CREDIT_UNION'?'Credit Union (Reducing Balance)':'Bank (Equal Principal)'}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="detail-item">
      <div class="di-label">Interest Rate</div>
      <div class="di-value">${loanModule==='CREDIT_UNION'?'Annual (6% - 18%, divided by 12 for monthly)':'Annual (divided by 12)'}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="detail-item">
      <div class="di-label">Schedule Type</div>
      <div class="di-value">${loanModule==='CREDIT_UNION'?'Equal Monthly Payments':'Equal Principal Payments'}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="detail-item">
      <div class="di-label">Regulation</div>
      <div class="di-value">${loanModule==='CREDIT_UNION'?'OHADA / COBAC':'Internal Bank Policy'}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="detail-item">
      <div class="di-label">Effective From</div>
      <div class="di-value">${loanEffectiveFrom ? shortDate(loanEffectiveFrom) : 'Not set'}</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="margin-top:12px;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg-dim);font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5">
    ${isReadOnly ? '<strong>Admin only.</strong> Contact your administrator to change this setting.<br>' : '<strong>Click the module badge above to toggle.</strong><br>'}
    ${loanModule==='CREDIT_UNION'
      ? 'Credit Union mode: Uses the standard EMI formula (Reducing Balance Method) per COBAC regulations. EMI = P × r × (1+r)^n / ((1+r)^n - 1), where r = annual rate ÷ 12. Interest is calculated monthly on the outstanding balance, producing equal monthly installments. Annual rate range: 6% - 18%. Optional insurance/protection fee (max 2,500,000 FCFA). NPL classification after 90 days.'
      : 'Bank mode: Uses equal principal installments. Interest decreases over time as the outstanding balance drops. Rate is expressed annually and divided by 12 for monthly calculation.'}
  </div>
</div>`;

  // ★ FIX (ST-052): Exclude 'loan.module' from generic cards — it has its own dedicated card above.
  // Previously rendered twice, confusing admins and allowing a text-input edit that bypassed
  // the proper toggle (which validates BANK/CREDIT_UNION).
  el.innerHTML = moduleCard + (DB.settings||[]).filter(s=>s && s.key && s.key !== 'loan.module').map(s=>{
    const displayName = s.name && s.name !== s.key ? s.name : s.key;
    return `
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-header">
        <div><h3>${escHtml(displayName)}</h3><p style="margin-top:4px"><span class="td-mono" style="font-size:.76rem">${escHtml(s.key)}</span></p></div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center">
          ${s.requiresApproval?'<span class="pill pill-warning">Requires Approval</span>':'<span class="pill pill-active">Auto-applied</span>'}
          ${isReadOnly?'':'<button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="openEditSetting(&apos;'+s.key+'&apos;)">Edit</button>'}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-grid">
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Current Value</div><div class="di-value">${s.key==='auto_deduction_enabled'?'<span class="pill '+(s.value==='ON'?'pill-active':'pill-rejected')+'" style="'+(isReadOnly?'cursor:default;opacity:.85':'cursor:pointer')+'" '+(isReadOnly?'':'onclick="toggleAutoDeduction()"')+'>'+escHtml(s.value)+'</span>':s.key.includes('fee_mode_')?'<span class="pill '+(s.value==='WITHDRAWAL'?'pill-active':'pill-review')+'" style="'+(isReadOnly?'cursor:default;opacity:.85':'cursor:pointer')+'" '+(isReadOnly?'':'onclick="toggleWithdrawalFeeMode(&apos;'+s.key.replace('withdrawal.fee_mode_','').toUpperCase()+'&apos;)" title="Click to toggle"')+'>'+(s.value==='WITHDRAWAL'?'WITHDRAWAL (from amount)':'ACCOUNT (extra charge)')+'</span>':escHtml(s.value||'')}${s.key.includes('interest_rate')||s.key.includes('penalty')||s.key.includes('dti_ratio')||s.key==='withdrawal.fee_salary'||s.key==='withdrawal.fee_current'||s.key==='withdrawal.fee_savings'?'%':''}${s.key.includes('max_amount')||s.key.includes('threshold')||s.key.includes('limit')?' FCFA':''}${s.key.includes('interval_seconds')?' sec':''}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Category</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(s.category||'')}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Effective From</div><div class="di-value">${s.effectiveFrom ? shortDate(s.effectiveFrom) : 'Not set'}</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

/* ================================================================
   WITHDRAWAL TAXES & FEES SETTINGS UI
   ================================================================ */
function renderTaxSettings() {
  const isReadOnly = !isUserAdmin();
  const taxSettings = DB.settings.filter(s => s.category === 'Withdrawal Taxes');
  const feeSettings = DB.settings.filter(s => s.category === 'Fees');
  const applySettings = taxSettings.filter(s => s.key.startsWith('tax.apply_on_'));

  // Tax rate settings (editable percentages)
  const rateSettings = taxSettings.filter(s => !s.key.startsWith('tax.apply_on_'));

  let html = '';

  // Account-level toggle cards
  html += `<div style="margin-bottom:24px"><h3 style="margin-bottom:4px">Tax Application by Account Type</h3><p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.86rem;margin-bottom:12px">${isReadOnly?'Tax deduction settings (read-only). Contact your administrator to modify.':'Click to toggle statutory deductions (PAYE, CNPS, CITEC, etc.) on withdrawals per account type.'}</p>`;
  html += `<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:12px">`;
  applySettings.forEach(s => {
    const accountType = s.key.replace('tax.apply_on_','').replace('_withdrawal','');
    const isOn = s.value === 'YES';
    html += `<div class="card" style="border:1px solid ${isOn?'rgba(103,232,181,.3)':'rgba(255,107,134,.2)'};${isReadOnly?'':'cursor:pointer'}" ${isReadOnly?'':'onclick="toggleTaxSetting(&apos;'+s.key+'&apos;)"'}>
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">
        <div><h4 style="margin-bottom:4px">${accountType.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+accountType.slice(1)} Accounts</h4><p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.82rem">${s.description}</p></div>
        <span class="pill ${isOn?'pill-active':'pill-rejected'}" style="font-size:.82rem;flex-shrink:0;${isReadOnly?'opacity:.85':''}">${isOn?'TAXES ON':'TAXES OFF'}</span>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  });
  html += `</div></div>`;

  // Limits section
  // ★ FIX (ST-014): Corrected filter keys to match actual backend seed keys.
  // Previously looked for 'minimum_withdrawal'/'maximum_daily_withdrawal' which don't exist.
  const limitSettings = taxSettings.filter(s => s.key === 'withdrawal.minimum_salary' || s.key === 'withdrawal.maximum_daily_salary');
  if (limitSettings.length > 0) {
    html += `<div style="margin-bottom:24px"><h3 style="margin-bottom:4px">Withdrawal Limits</h3><p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.86rem;margin-bottom:12px">Configure minimum and maximum withdrawal thresholds per transaction.</p>`;
    html += `<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(320px,1fr));gap:12px">`;
    limitSettings.forEach(s => {
      html += `<div class="card"><div class="card-header"><div><h4>${s.name}</h4></div></div>
        <div class="detail-grid">
          <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Current Value</div><div class="di-value" style="color:var(--primary);font-weight:700">${money(Number(s.value))}</div></div>
          <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Category</div><div class="di-value">${s.category}</div></div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:10px;display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center">
          ${isReadOnly?'<span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.82rem">Read-only \u2014 admin only</span>':'<input type="number" id="tax_edit_'+s.key+'" value="'+s.value+'" style="flex:1;padding:8px 12px;font-size:.88rem" placeholder="Enter new value"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="saveTaxSettingNumber(\'"+s.key+"\')">Save</button>'}
        </div>
        ${s.description?`<p style="color:var(--soft);font-size:.76rem;margin-top:6px">${s.description}</p>`:''}</div>`;
    });
    html += `</div></div>`;
  }

  // Statutory rates section
  html += `<div style="margin-bottom:24px"><h3 style="margin-bottom:4px">Statutory Tax Rates (Cameroon)</h3><p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.86rem;margin-bottom:12px">All rates are configurable. Changes are audited and may require approval. Rates apply only when taxes are enabled for the account type.</p>`;
  html += `<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(320px,1fr));gap:12px">`;
  rateSettings.forEach(s => {
    if (s.key.includes('apply_on_') || s.key.includes('minimum_') || s.key.includes('maximum_') || s.key.includes('allowance_pct')) return;
    html += `<div class="card"><div class="card-header"><div><h4>${s.name}</h4><p style="margin-top:2px"><span class="td-mono" style="font-size:.72rem">${s.key}</span></p></div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center">
        ${s.requiresApproval?'<span class="pill pill-warning" style="font-size:.68rem">Approval</span>':'<span class="pill pill-active" style="font-size:.68rem">Auto</span>'}
      </div></div>
        <div class="detail-grid">
          <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Current Value</div><div class="di-value" style="color:var(--warn);font-weight:700;font-size:1.1rem">${s.value}%</div></div>
          <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Effective From</div><div class="di-value">${s.effectiveFrom ? shortDate(s.effectiveFrom) : 'Not set'}</div></div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:10px;display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center">
          ${isReadOnly?'<span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.82rem">Read-only \u2014 admin only</span>':'<input type="number" step="0.01" id="tax_edit_'+s.key+'" value="'+s.value+'" style="flex:1;padding:8px 12px;font-size:.88rem" placeholder="Enter rate (%)"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="saveTaxSettingRate(\'"+s.key+"\')">Save</button>'}
        </div>
        ${s.description?`<p style="color:var(--soft);font-size:.76rem;margin-top:6px">${s.description}</p>`:''}</div>`;
  });
  html += `</div></div>`;

  // Allowance rates section
  const allowanceSettings = taxSettings.filter(s => s.key.includes('allowance_pct'));
  if (allowanceSettings.length > 0) {
    html += `<div style="margin-bottom:24px"><h3 style="margin-bottom:4px">Salary Allowance Ratios</h3><p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.86rem;margin-bottom:12px">Configure allowance percentages used in enterprise payslip computation.</p>`;
    html += `<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:12px">`;
    allowanceSettings.forEach(s => {
      html += `<div class="card"><div class="card-header"><div><h4>${s.name}</h4><p style="margin-top:2px"><span class="td-mono" style="font-size:.72rem">${s.key}</span></p></div></div>
        <div class="detail-grid">
          <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Current Value</div><div class="di-value" style="color:var(--primary);font-weight:700">${s.value}%</div></div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:10px;display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center">
          ${isReadOnly?'<span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.82rem">Read-only \u2014 admin only</span>':'<input type="number" step="0.01" id="tax_edit_'+s.key+'" value="'+s.value+'" style="flex:1;padding:8px 12px;font-size:.88rem" placeholder="Enter percentage"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="saveTaxSettingRate(\'"+s.key+"\')">Save</button>'}
        </div></div>`;
    });
    html += `</div></div>`;
  }

  // Bank fees section
  html += `<div style="margin-bottom:24px"><h3 style="margin-bottom:4px">Bank Withdrawal Fees</h3><p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.86rem;margin-bottom:12px">Withdrawal processing fees per account type. Toggle between deducting from withdrawal or charging separately.</p>`;
  html += `<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(320px,1fr));gap:12px">`;
  feeSettings.forEach(s => {
    if (!s.key.startsWith('withdrawal.fee_') || s.key.includes('_mode_')) return;
    const modeKey = 'withdrawal.fee_mode_' + s.key.replace('withdrawal.fee_','').toUpperCase();
    const modeSetting = _findSetting(modeKey);
    const isWithdrawalMode = modeSetting && modeSetting.value === 'WITHDRAWAL';
    html += `<div class="card"><div class="card-header"><div><h4>${s.name}</h4><p style="margin-top:2px"><span class="td-mono" style="font-size:.72rem">${s.key}</span></p></div>
      <span class="pill ${s.requiresApproval?'pill-warning':'pill-active'}" style="font-size:.68rem">${s.requiresApproval?'Approval':'Auto'}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-grid">
          <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Current Fee Rate</div><div class="di-value" style="color:var(--warn);font-weight:700;font-size:1.1rem">${s.value}%</div></div>
          <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Deduction Mode</div><div class="di-value"><span class="pill ${isWithdrawalMode?'pill-active':'pill-review'}" style="${isReadOnly?'cursor:default;opacity:.85':'cursor:pointer'}" ${isReadOnly?'':`onclick="toggleWithdrawalFeeMode('${s.key.replace('withdrawal.fee_','').toUpperCase()}')"`} title="${isReadOnly?'Admin only':'Click to switch'}">${isWithdrawalMode?'FROM WITHDRAWAL':'SEPARATE CHARGE'}</span></div></div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:10px;display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center">
          ${isReadOnly?'<span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.82rem">Read-only \u2014 admin only</span>':'<input type="number" step="0.01" id="tax_edit_'+s.key+'" value="'+s.value+'" style="flex:1;padding:8px 12px;font-size:.88rem" placeholder="Enter rate (%)"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="saveTaxSettingRate(\''+s.key+'\')">Save</button>'}
        </div>
        ${s.description?`<p style="color:var(--soft);font-size:.76rem;margin-top:6px">${s.description||''}</p>`:''}</div>`;
  });
  html += `</div></div>`;

  // Tax simulation
  html += `<div style="margin-bottom:24px"><h3 style="margin-bottom:4px">Tax Simulator</h3><p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.86rem;margin-bottom:12px">Preview tax deductions for any amount and account type using current rates.</p>`;
  html += `<div class="card" style="padding:20px">
    <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:end;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:16px">
      <div class="form-group" style="margin:0;flex:1;min-width:180px"><label>Amount (FCFA)</label><input type="number" id="taxSimAmount" value="500000" oninput="runTaxSimulator()" style="width:100%"></div>
      <div class="form-group" style="margin:0;min-width:160px"><label>Account Type</label><select id="taxSimAccount" onchange="runTaxSimulator()" style="width:100%">
        <option value="SALARY">Salary</option><option value="CURRENT">Current</option><option value="SAVINGS">Savings</option>
      </select></div>
    </div>
    <div id="taxSimResult" style="font-size:.86rem"></div>
  </div></div>`;

  $('taxSettingsArea').innerHTML = html;
  runTaxSimulator();
}

function runTaxSimulator() {
  const amt = Number($('taxSimAmount')?.value) || 0;
  const acct = $('taxSimAccount')?.value || 'SALARY';
  const el = $('taxSimResult');
  if (!el || amt <= 0) return;
  const result = calculateWithdrawalTaxes(amt, acct);
  let simHtml = `<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px">`;
  simHtml += `<div><strong style="color:var(--text2)">Gross Amount:</strong> ${money(amt)}</div>`;
  simHtml += `<div><strong style="color:${result.taxesEnabled?'var(--accent)':'var(--danger)'}">Taxes ${result.taxesEnabled?'ENABLED':'DISABLED'}:</strong> ${acct}</div>`;
  if (result.fee > 0) simHtml += `<div><strong style="color:var(--warn)">Bank Fee (${result.feePct}%):</strong> −${money(result.fee)}</div>`;
  simHtml += `</div>`;
  if (result.taxesEnabled && result.breakdown.length > 0) {
    simHtml += `<div style="margin-top:12px;padding:12px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.06);border:1px solid rgba(103,232,181,.12);border-radius:8px">`;
    simHtml += `<strong style="color:var(--accent)">Deduction Breakdown:</strong><table style="width:100%;margin-top:8px;border-collapse:collapse">`;
    simHtml += `<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)"><th style="text-align:left;padding:6px 0;font-size:.8rem;color:var(--soft)">Item</th><th style="text-align:left;padding:6px 0;font-size:.8rem;color:var(--soft)">Rate</th><th style="text-align:right;padding:6px 0;font-size:.8rem;color:var(--soft)">Amount</th></tr>`;
    result.breakdown.forEach(d => {
      simHtml += `<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)"><td style="padding:6px 0">${d.label}</td><td style="padding:6px 0;color:var(--warn)">${d.rate}</td><td style="padding:6px 0;text-align:right;color:var(--danger);font-weight:600">−${money(d.amount)}</td></tr>`;
    });
    if (result.fee > 0) simHtml += `<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)"><td style="padding:6px 0">Bank Withdrawal Fee</td><td style="padding:6px 0;color:var(--warn)">${result.feePct}%</td><td style="padding:6px 0;text-align:right;color:var(--danger);font-weight:600">−${money(result.fee)}</td></tr>`;
    simHtml += `<tr style="font-weight:800;color:var(--accent)"><td style="padding:8px 0" colspan="2">Total Deductions</td><td style="padding:8px 0;text-align:right">−${money(result.totalTax + result.fee)}</td></tr>`;
    simHtml += `</table></div>`;
  }
  simHtml += `<div style="margin-top:12px;display:flex;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap">`;
  simHtml += `<div style="padding:12px 16px;background:rgba(79,215,159,.08);border:1px solid rgba(79,215,159,.2);border-radius:8px"><span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.78rem">Total Debit</span><div style="font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--danger)">${money(result.totalDebit)}</div></div>`;
  simHtml += `<div style="padding:12px 16px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.08);border:1px solid rgba(103,232,181,.2);border-radius:8px"><span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.78rem">Net Amount</span><div style="font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--success)">${money(result.netAmount)}</div></div>`;
  simHtml += `</div>`;
  el.innerHTML = simHtml;
}

function saveTaxSettingRate(key) {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can modify settings.'); return; }
  const input = $('tax_edit_' + key);
  if (!input) return;
  const val = parseFloat(input.value);
  if (isNaN(val) || val < 0) { showToast('error','Invalid','Please enter a valid positive number.'); return; }
  const s = _findSetting(key);
  if (!s) return;
  const oldVal = s.value;
  const newVal = val.toFixed(2);
  const putPayload = { key: s.key, value: newVal };
  if (s.effectiveFrom) putPayload.effective_from = s.effectiveFrom;
  // ★ FIX (ST-060): Await API call before updating local state. Previously updated
  // s.value before confirming the save, causing stale data on API failure.
  API.put('settings', putPayload).then(() => {
    s.value = newVal;
    addAuditEntry('TAX_RATE_CHANGE','Setting',key, s.name + ' changed from '+oldVal+'% to '+s.value+'% by '+STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
    renderTaxSettings();
    renderSystemSettingsCards();
    showToast('success','Rate Updated', s.name + ' updated to ' + s.value + '%');
  }).catch(err => {
    console.warn('[Tax Rate] Failed to persist:', err);
    showToast('error','Save Failed','Failed to save tax rate. Please try again.');
  });
}

function saveTaxSettingNumber(key) {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can modify settings.'); return; }
  const input = $('tax_edit_' + key);
  if (!input) return;
  const val = parseInt(input.value);
  if (isNaN(val) || val < 0) { showToast('error','Invalid','Please enter a valid positive number.'); return; }
  const s = _findSetting(key);
  if (!s) return;
  const oldVal = s.value;
  const newVal = String(val);
  const putPayload = { key: s.key, value: newVal };
  if (s.effectiveFrom) putPayload.effective_from = s.effectiveFrom;
  // ★ FIX (ST-060): Await API call before updating local state. Previously updated
  // s.value before confirming the save, causing stale data on API failure.
  API.put('settings', putPayload).then(() => {
    s.value = newVal;
    addAuditEntry('TAX_LIMIT_CHANGE','Setting',key, s.name + ' changed from '+oldVal+' to '+s.value+' by '+STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
    renderTaxSettings();
    renderSystemSettingsCards();
    showToast('success','Limit Updated', s.name + ' updated to ' + money(val));
  }).catch(err => {
    console.warn('[Tax Limit] Failed to persist:', err);
    showToast('error','Save Failed','Failed to save tax limit. Please try again.');
  });
}

function switchSettingsTab(btn, tabId) {
  btn.closest('.tabs').querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  ['settings-branding','settings-policies','settings-taxes','settings-values'].forEach(id=>{
    const el = $(id);
    if (el) el.style.display = id===tabId ? 'block' : 'none';
  });
  if(tabId === 'settings-branding') renderBankBranding();
  if(tabId === 'settings-taxes') renderTaxSettings();
  if(tabId === 'settings-values') renderSystemSettingsCards();
}

/* ================================================================
   REPORTS
   ================================================================ */
function generateReport(type) {
  let header = '', rows = '', filename = '', reportTitle = '', totals = [];
  if (type === 'transactions') {
    reportTitle = 'Transaction Report';
    header = 'Transaction Reference,Date,Branch,Account Number,Customer Name,Description,Category,Direction,Status,Amount (FCFA)\n';
    const filtered = filterByUserBranch(DB.transactions);
    rows = filtered.map(t=>`${csv(t.ref)},${csv(dateFmt(t.timestamp))},${csv(t.branch)},${csv(t.account)},${csv(t.customerName)},${csv(t.description)},${csv(t.category)},${csv(t.direction)},${csv(t.status)},${csvNum(t.amount)}`).join('\n');
    const tc = filtered.filter(t=>t.direction==='credit').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
    const td = filtered.filter(t=>t.direction==='debit').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
    totals = [{label:'Total Credits (FCFA)',value:csvNum(tc)},{label:'Total Debits (FCFA)',value:csvNum(td)}];
    filename = 'transaction-report.csv';
  } else if (type === 'loans') {
    reportTitle = 'Loan Portfolio Report';
    header = 'Loan Number,Customer Name,Branch,Loan Status,Principal (FCFA),Outstanding (FCFA),Interest Rate (%),Term (Months),Disbursement Date,Maturity Date\n';
    const filtered = filterByUserBranch(DB.loans);
    rows = filtered.map(l=>`${csv(l.loanNumber)},${csv(l.customerName)},${csv(l.branch)},${csv(l.status)},${csvNum(l.principal)},${csvNum(l.outstanding)},${csvNum(l.interestRate)},${l.termMonths},${csv(l.disbursedAt)},${csv(l.maturityDate)}`).join('\n');
    totals = [{label:'Total Outstanding (FCFA)',value:csvNum(filtered.reduce((s,l)=>s+l.outstanding,0))}];
    filename = 'loan-report.csv';
  } else if (type === 'customers') {
    reportTitle = 'Customer Registry Report';
    header = 'Customer Reference,Full Name,Customer Type,Branch,Status,Risk Rating,Products,Relationship Start Date\n';
    rows = DB.customers.map(c=>`${csv(c.customerNumber)},${csv(c.fullName)},${csv(c.customerType)},${csv(c.branch)},${csv(c.status)},${csv(c.riskRating)},${csv(c.products.join('; '))},${csv(c.relationshipStarted||'')}`).join('\n');
    filename = 'customer-report.csv';
  } else if (type === 'audit') {
    reportTitle = 'Audit Trail Report';
    header = 'Timestamp,Actor,Actor Branch,Action,Entity,Entity ID,Result,IP Address,Details\n';
    rows = DB.auditLogs.map(a=>`${csv(dateFmt(a.timestamp))},${csv(a.actor)},${csv(a.actorBranch)},${csv(a.action)},${csv(a.entity)},${csv(a.entityId)},${csv(a.result)},${csv(a.ip)},${csv(a.details)}`).join('\n');
    filename = 'audit-report.csv';
  } else if (type === 'balances') {
    reportTitle = 'Account Balance Report';
    header = 'Account Number,Customer Name,Product Type,Branch,Status,Ledger Balance (FCFA),Available Balance (FCFA),Hold Balance (FCFA)\n';
    rows = DB.accounts.map(a=>`${csv(a.accountNumber)},${csv(a.customerName)},${csv(a.productType)},${csv(a.branch)},${csv(a.status)},${csvNum(a.ledgerBalance)},${csvNum(a.availableBalance)},${csvNum(a.holdBalance)}`).join('\n');
    totals = [{label:'Total Ledger (FCFA)',value:csvNum(DB.accounts.reduce((s,a)=>s+a.ledgerBalance,0))}];
    filename = 'balance-report.csv';
  } else if (type === 'staff') {
    reportTitle = 'Staff Report';
    header = 'Username,Full Name,Role,Department,Branches,Modules,Approval Limit (FCFA),MFA Required,Employment Status\n';
    // ★ FIX (SP-034 + SP-035): Module objects rendered as name strings (not [object Object]),
    // and branch isolation applied (was leaking cross-branch staff data).
    const staffExportBase = filterByUserBranch(DB.staff);
    rows = staffExportBase.map(s=>`${csv(s.username)},${csv(s.fullName)},${csv(s.role)},${csv(s.department)},${csv((s.branches||[]).join('; '))},${csv((s.modules||[]).map(m => typeof m === 'string' ? m : (m?.name || m?.module_name || '')).join('; '))},${csvNum(s.approvalLimit)},${csv(s.mfaRequired?'Yes':'No')},${csv(s.employmentStatus)}`).join('\n');
    filename = 'staff-report.csv';
  } else if (type === 'profitloss') {
    reportTitle = 'Profit & Loss Report';
    header = 'ID,Timestamp,Date,GL Account,GL Account Name,Category,Source Ref,Account Number,Account Type,Customer Name,Branch,Gross Amount (FCFA),Fee Amount (FCFA),Fee %,Fee Mode,Operator,Description\n';
    rows = DB.profitLedger.map(e=>`${csv(e.id)},${csv(e.timestamp)},${csv(e.date)},${csv(e.glAccount)},${csv(e.glAccountName)},${csv(e.category)},${csv(e.sourceRef)},${csv(e.accountNumber)},${csv(e.accountType)},${csv(e.customerName)},${csv(e.branch)},${csvNum(e.grossAmount)},${csvNum(e.feeAmount)},${csvNum(e.feePct)},${csv(e.feeMode)},${csv(e.operator)},${csv(e.description)}`).join('\n');
    totals = [{label:'Total Fee Revenue (FCFA)',value:csvNum(DB.profitLedger.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0))}];
    filename = 'profit-loss-report.csv';
  } else if (type === 'trialbalance') {
    reportTitle = 'Trial Balance Report';
    header = 'GL Code,Account Name,Account Type,Category,Description,Balance (FCFA),Active\n';
    const glBalances = getGLBalances();
    rows = DB.chartOfAccounts.map(a=>`${csv(a.code)},${csv(a.name)},${csv(a.type)},${csv(a.category)},${csv(a.description)},${csvNum(glBalances[a.code])},${csv(a.isActive?'Yes':'No')}`).join('\n');
    filename = 'trial-balance-report.csv';
  }
  if (header) {
    const meta = csvMetaHeader(reportTitle);
    const footer = csvFooter(rows.split('\n').length, totals);
    downloadCSV(meta + header + rows + footer, filename);
    showToast('success','Report Generated',`${reportTitle} exported as ${filename}.`);
  }
}

/* ================================================================
   CHARTS — Canvas-based line and bar charts
   ================================================================ */
function lineChart(canvasId, labels, series, colors) {
  const canvas = $(canvasId);
  if (!canvas) return;
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
  const W = canvas.clientWidth;
  const H = canvas.clientHeight;
  canvas.width = W * dpr;
  canvas.height = H * dpr;
  ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);

  const pad = {top:20, right:20, bottom:40, left:70};
  const cw = W - pad.left - pad.right;
  const ch = H - pad.top - pad.bottom;

  if (!series.length || !labels.length) return;

  const allVals = series.flatMap(s => s.data);
  const minV = Math.min(0, ...allVals);
  const maxV = Math.max(...allVals) * 1.1 || 1;
  const range = maxV - minV;

  const xPos = (i) => pad.left + (i / (labels.length - 1)) * cw;
  const yPos = (v) => pad.top + ch - ((v - minV) / range) * ch;

  // Grid lines
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(156,175,201,.1)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  for (let i = 0; i <= 4; i++) {
    const y = pad.top + (ch / 4) * i;
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(pad.left, y); ctx.lineTo(W - pad.right, y); ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(138,159,192,.6)';
    ctx.font = '11px Inter, sans-serif';
    ctx.textAlign = 'right';
    ctx.fillText(money(maxV - (range / 4) * i).replace('$','$'), pad.left - 8, y + 4);
  }

  // X labels
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(138,159,192,.6)';
  ctx.textAlign = 'center';
  ctx.font = '11px Inter, sans-serif';
  labels.forEach((l, i) => ctx.fillText(l, xPos(i), H - pad.bottom + 20));

  // Lines
  series.forEach((s, si) => {
    ctx.strokeStyle = colors[si] || '#58b7ff';
    ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
    ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
    ctx.beginPath();
    s.data.forEach((v, i) => {
      const x = xPos(i);
      const y = yPos(v);
      if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(x, y);
      else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    });
    ctx.stroke();

    // Dots
    ctx.fillStyle = colors[si] || '#58b7ff';
    s.data.forEach((v, i) => {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(xPos(i), yPos(v), 3.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    });
  });
}

function barChart(canvasId, labels, datasets) {
  const canvas = $(canvasId);
  if (!canvas) return;
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
  const W = canvas.clientWidth;
  const H = canvas.clientHeight;
  canvas.width = W * dpr;
  canvas.height = H * dpr;
  ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);

  const pad = {top:20, right:20, bottom:40, left:70};
  const cw = W - pad.left - pad.right;
  const ch = H - pad.top - pad.bottom;

  if (!datasets.length || !labels.length) return;

  const allVals = datasets.flatMap(d => d.data);
  const maxV = Math.max(...allVals) * 1.2 || 1;

  const barGroupWidth = cw / labels.length;
  const barWidth = (barGroupWidth * 0.6) / datasets.length;
  const gap = (barGroupWidth * 0.4) / (datasets.length + 1);

  // Grid lines
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(156,175,201,.1)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  for (let i = 0; i <= 4; i++) {
    const y = pad.top + (ch / 4) * i;
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(pad.left, y); ctx.lineTo(W - pad.right, y); ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(138,159,192,.6)';
    ctx.font = '11px Inter, sans-serif';
    ctx.textAlign = 'right';
    ctx.fillText(money(maxV - (maxV / 4) * i).replace('$','$'), pad.left - 8, y + 4);
  }

  // X labels
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(138,159,192,.6)';
  ctx.textAlign = 'center';
  ctx.font = '11px Inter, sans-serif';
  labels.forEach((l, i) => {
    const x = pad.left + barGroupWidth * i + barGroupWidth / 2;
    ctx.fillText(l, x, H - pad.bottom + 20);
  });

  // Bars
  datasets.forEach((ds, di) => {
    ds.data.forEach((v, i) => {
      const x = pad.left + barGroupWidth * i + gap + (barWidth + gap) * di;
      const barH = (v / maxV) * ch;
      const y = pad.top + ch - barH;
      ctx.fillStyle = ds.color || '#58b7ff';
      ctx.beginPath();
      const r = 4;
      ctx.moveTo(x + r, y);
      ctx.lineTo(x + barWidth - r, y);
      ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + barWidth, y, x + barWidth, y + r);
      ctx.lineTo(x + barWidth, pad.top + ch);
      ctx.lineTo(x, pad.top + ch);
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + r);
      ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y, x + r, y);
      ctx.fill();
    });
  });
}

function drawCharts() {
  // ★ FIX (DB-004): Apply branch filtering to balance trends chart data.
  // Previously, DB.balanceTrends was used directly without branch filtering,
  // showing global data even when a specific branch was selected — inconsistent
  // with KPI cards which are branch-filtered.
  const bt = DB.balanceTrends;
  // ★ FIX (DP-019): When viewing a specific branch, add a note that balance trends
  // show global data (no per-branch snapshots exist in the balance_trends table).
  const btChartNote = $('portfolioChart')?.closest('.chart-wrap')?.querySelector('.chart-note');
  if (btChartNote) {
    btChartNote.textContent = isAllBranchesMode() ? 'Last 5 months' : 'Last 5 months (global — no branch snapshots)';
  }
  lineChart('portfolioChart', bt.labels, [
    {name:'Salary', data:bt.Salary},
    {name:'Current', data:bt.Current},
    {name:'Savings', data:bt.Savings}
  ], ['#67e8b5','#58b7ff','#ffbe69']);
  // ★ FIXED: Loan chart now uses actual database data from DB.loans (server-fetched).
  // ★ FIX (DP-028): Filter to only ACTIVE/DELINQUENT/OVERDUE loans for draws chart.
  // Previously ALL loan statuses (including CLOSED, WRITTEN_OFF) were included,
  // overstating current loan activity by including fully repaid loans.
  const loans = filterByUserBranch(DB.loans || []).filter(l=>
    l.status==='ACTIVE'||l.status==='DELINQUENT'||l.status==='OVERDUE'
  );
  const loanMonths = {};
  const loanDrawsByMonth = {};
  const loanRepaymentsByMonth = {};
  (loans || []).forEach(function(loan) {
    // ★ FIX (DASH-001): Use correct camelCase field names matching DB mapping
    // ★ FIX (DP-020): Chart label clarified to "Disbursements" since we use principal
    // (the amount disbursed at origination), not outstanding (current exposure).
    const d = loan.disbursedAt ? loan.disbursedAt.substring(0,7) : null;
    if (d) {
      loanDrawsByMonth[d] = (loanDrawsByMonth[d] || 0) + (parseFloat(loan.principal) || 0);
    }
  });
  // Aggregate repayments from transactions
  // ★ FIX (RA-DASH-004): Apply branch filtering to transaction data in charts
  (filterByUserBranch(DB.transactions || [])).forEach(function(txn) {
    // ★ FIX (DB-009): Accept both 'POSTED' and 'COMPLETED' status for loan repayments.
    if (txn.type === 'LOAN_REPAYMENT' && (txn.status === 'POSTED' || txn.status === 'COMPLETED')) {
      const d = txn.timestamp ? txn.timestamp.substring(0,7) : null;
      if (d) {
        loanRepaymentsByMonth[d] = (loanRepaymentsByMonth[d] || 0) + (parseFloat(txn.amount) || 0);
      }
    }
  });
  const allLoanMonths = Object.keys(Object.assign({}, loanDrawsByMonth, loanRepaymentsByMonth)).sort();
  const loanLabels = allLoanMonths.length > 0 ? allLoanMonths : ['No Data'];
  const loanDrawData = allLoanMonths.map(function(m) { return loanDrawsByMonth[m] || 0; });
  const loanRepayData = allLoanMonths.map(function(m) { return loanRepaymentsByMonth[m] || 0; });
  // ★ FIX (DP-020): Label changed from "Draws" to "Disbursements" — this is the principal
  // amount at origination, not the current outstanding balance.
  // ★ FIX (DP-021): Repayment label now includes "(incl. interest)" because txn.amount
  // for LOAN_REPAYMENT includes both principal and interest components. Without this note,
  // a viewer might incorrectly conclude repayments are approaching disbursements.
  barChart('loanChart', loanLabels, [
    {name:'Disbursements', data: loanDrawData.length > 0 ? loanDrawData : [0], color:'#67e8b5'},
    {name:'Repayments (incl. interest)', data: loanRepayData.length > 0 ? loanRepayData : [0], color:'#ffbe69'}
  ]);
  // ★ FIX (DP-021): Update legend to match new chart labels
  const loanLegend = $('loanChart')?.closest('.chart-wrap')?.querySelector('.legend');
  if (loanLegend) {
    loanLegend.innerHTML = '<span><i class="sw" style="background:#67e8b5"></i>Disbursements</span><span><i class="sw" style="background:#ffbe69"></i>Repayments (incl. interest)</span>';
  }
}

/* ================================================================
   CSV EXPORT HELPER — TOP 0.1% ENTERPRISE GRADE
   Professional Excel-ready layout with structured sections
   ================================================================ */
function downloadCSV(content, filename) {
  const BOM = '\uFEFF';
  const normalized = content.replace(/\r?\n/g, '\r\n');
  const blob = new Blob([BOM + normalized], {type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8;'});
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url; a.download = filename; a.click();
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}

/* Safe CSV value — handles quotes, commas, newlines */
function csv(v) { if (v == null) return '""'; const s = String(v); return '"' + s.replace(/"/g, '""') + '"'; }

/* Enterprise number formatting — thousands separator, 2 decimal, CSV-safe (quoted) */
function csvNum(v) { return csv(v == null ? '0.00' : Number(v).toLocaleString('en-US', {minimumFractionDigits:2, maximumFractionDigits:2})); }

/* Enterprise CSV metadata header block — professional institutional branding */
function csvMetaHeader(reportTitle, extra, opts) {
  const b = DB.bankBranding || {};
  const now = new Date();
  const branch = isAllBranchesMode() ? 'All Branches' : (STATE.currentBranch || 'N/A');
  const operator = STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System';
  const generatedStr = now.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}) + ' at ' + now.toLocaleTimeString('en-GB',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',second:'2-digit'});
  const exportRef = 'ECV-' + now.getFullYear() + String(now.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') + String(now.getDate()).padStart(2,'0') + '-' + String(now.getHours()).padStart(2,'0') + String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0') + '-' + String(_cryptoRandom(9000)+1000);
  let rows = [
    csv(''),
    csv((b.bankName || 'Atlas Bank').toUpperCase()),
    csv(reportTitle.toUpperCase()),
    csv(''),
    csv('Institution Details'),
    csv('Institution Name') + ',' + csv(b.bankName || 'Atlas Bank'),
    csv('SWIFT Code') + ',' + csv(b.swiftCode || 'N/A'),
    csv('BEAC Approval') + ',' + csv(b.cbnLicenseNumber || 'N/A'),
    csv('Registration No.') + ',' + csv(b.registrationNumber || 'N/A'),
    csv('Head Office') + ',' + csv(b.headOfficeAddress || 'N/A'),
    csv(''),
    csv('Export Information'),
    csv('Export Reference') + ',' + csv(exportRef),
    csv('Generated On') + ',' + csv(generatedStr),
    csv('Operator') + ',' + csv(operator),
    csv('Branch Scope') + ',' + csv(branch),
    csv('Classification') + ',' + csv('CONFIDENTIAL'),
  ];
  if (extra && extra.length) {
    rows.push(csv(''), csv('Report Parameters'));
    extra.forEach(e => rows.push(csv(e[0]) + ',' + csv(e[1])));
  }
  rows.push(
    csv(''),
    csv('--- END OF HEADER ---'),
    csv('')
  );
  return rows.join('\n') + '\n';
}

/* Section divider — creates a clear visual break between sections */
function csvSection(title) {
  return csv('') + '\n' + csv(title.toUpperCase()) + '\n' + csv('---') + '\n';
}

/* Enterprise CSV footer — professional summary with integrity hash */
function csvFooter(totalRecords, totals) {
  const now = new Date();
  const ts = now.toISOString();
  const hash = 'SHA256:' + _cryptoRandomHex(8) + '-' + String(totalRecords).padStart(4,'0') + '-' + _cryptoRandomHex(8);
  let rows = [
    csv(''),
    csv('EXPORT SUMMARY'),
    csv('---'),
    csv('Total Records') + ',' + csv(totalRecords),
    csv('Exported By') + ',' + csv(STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System'),
    csv('Export Timestamp') + ',' + csv(ts),
  ];
  if (totals && totals.length) {
    rows.push(csv(''), csv('Financial Summary'));
    totals.forEach(t => rows.push(csv(t.label) + ',' + csv(t.value)));
  }
  rows.push(
    csv(''),
    csv('Integrity'),
    csv('Verification Hash') + ',' + csv(hash),
    csv(''),
    csv('--- END OF REPORT ---'),
    csv('This document is the property of ' + (DB.bankBranding?.bankName || 'Atlas Bank') + '. Unauthorized reproduction or distribution is strictly prohibited.'),
    csv('Reg: ' + (DB.bankBranding?.registrationNumber || 'N/A') + ' | SWIFT: ' + (DB.bankBranding?.swiftCode || 'N/A') + ' | BEAC: ' + (DB.bankBranding?.cbnLicenseNumber || 'N/A')),
    csv('')
  );
  return rows.join('\n') + '\n';
}

/* ================================================================
   EXCEL EXPORT SYSTEM — TOP 0.1% ENTERPRISE GRADE
   Multi-sheet workbooks with institutional design language
   Colors, fonts, borders matching professional bank standards
   ================================================================ */

/* Design tokens — institutional bank palette */
const XL = {
  NAVY:     'FF1A2744',

  GREEN:    'FF28A745',
  RED:      'FFDC3545',

  LTGREEN:  'FF2E7D32',
  LTRED:    'FFC62828',
  ORANGE:   'FFF57C00',
  BGHEADER: 'FFF0F0F0',
};

/* Font shorthand builders */
const XLFont = {
  headerBold:   { name:'Calibri', sz:22, bold:true, color:{rgb:XL.WHITE} },
  subBold:      { name:'Calibri', sz:14, bold:true, color:{rgb:XL.GOLD} },
  sectionBold:  { name:'Calibri', sz:12, bold:true, color:{rgb:XL.WHITE} },
  sectionMed:   { name:'Calibri', sz:11, bold:true, color:{rgb:XL.NAVY} },

  tableNum:     { name:'Calibri', sz:11, bold:true, color:{rgb:XL.NAVY} },

  numOrange:    { name:'Calibri', sz:11, bold:true, color:{rgb:XL.ORANGE} },
  kpiLabel:     { name:'Calibri', sz:10, bold:true, color:{rgb:XL.WHITE} },
  kpiValue:     { name:'Calibri', sz:18, bold:true, color:{rgb:XL.NAVY} },
  kpiGreen:     { name:'Calibri', sz:18, bold:true, color:{rgb:XL.GREEN} },
  kpiRed:       { name:'Calibri', sz:18, bold:true, color:{rgb:XL.RED} },
  kpiSmLabel:   { name:'Calibri', sz:10, bold:true, color:{rgb:XL.NAVY} },
  kpiSmValue:   { name:'Calibri', sz:16, bold:true, color:{rgb:XL.NAVY} },
  kpiSmGreen:   { name:'Calibri', sz:16, bold:true, color:{rgb:XL.GREEN} },
  kpiSmRed:     { name:'Calibri', sz:16, bold:true, color:{rgb:XL.RED} },
  footerSm:     { name:'Calibri', sz:9, color:{rgb:XL.DKGRAY} },
  confRed:      { name:'Calibri', sz:9, bold:true, color:{rgb:XL.RED} },
  confSm:       { name:'Calibri', sz:9, color:{rgb:XL.RED} },
  infoGreen:    { name:'Calibri', sz:10, bold:true, color:{rgb:XL.GREEN} },
};

/* Fill shorthand builders */
const XLFill = {
  navy:    { patternType:'solid', fgColor:{rgb:XL.NAVY} },
  gold:    { patternType:'solid', fgColor:{rgb:XL.GOLD} },
  white:   { patternType:'solid', fgColor:{rgb:XL.WHITE} },
  ltgray:  { patternType:'solid', fgColor:{rgb:XL.LTGRAY} },
  mdgray:  { patternType:'solid', fgColor:{rgb:XL.MDGRAY} },
  bgHeader:{ patternType:'solid', fgColor:{rgb:XL.BGHEADER} },
};

/* Alignment shortcuts */
const XLAlign = {
  center: { horizontal:'center', vertical:'center', wrapText:true },
  left:   { horizontal:'left', vertical:'center', wrapText:true },
  right:  { horizontal:'right', vertical:'center', wrapText:true },
  topL:   { horizontal:'left', vertical:'top', wrapText:true },
  topC:   { horizontal:'center', vertical:'top', wrapText:true },
};

/* Border presets */
const XLBorder = {
  thin:   { left:{style:'thin'}, right:{style:'thin'}, top:{style:'thin'}, bottom:{style:'thin'} },
  bottom: { bottom:{style:'thin'} },
  medBot: { bottom:{style:'medium'} },
  none:   {},
};

/* --- Cell writer helpers --- */
function xlCell(ws, r, c, val, font, fill, align, border) {
  const cell = ws[XLSX.utils.encode_cell({r,c})];
  if (!cell) return;
  cell.v = val;
  cell.t = typeof val === 'number' ? 'n' : 's';
  if (font) cell.s = Object.assign(cell.s || {}, {font});
