  if (fill) cell.s = Object.assign(cell.s || {}, {fill});
  if (align) cell.s = Object.assign(cell.s || {}, {alignment:align});
  if (border) cell.s = Object.assign(cell.s || {}, {border:border});
}

function xlMerge(ws, r1, c1, r2, c2) {
  ws['!merges'] = ws['!merges'] || [];
  ws['!merges'].push({s:{r:r1,c:c1}, e:{r:r2,c:c2}});
}

/* Full-width navy header bar (A1 across all cols) */
function xlNavyTitle(ws, row, title, maxCol, sub) {
  if (typeof title === 'number') { const tmp = title; title = maxCol; maxCol = tmp; }
  xlMerge(ws, row, 0, row, maxCol);
  xlCell(ws, row, 0, title, XLFont.headerBold, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  if (sub) {
    xlMerge(ws, row+1, 0, row+1, maxCol);
    xlCell(ws, row+1, 0, sub, XLFont.subBold, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
    return row + 2;
  }
  return row + 1;
}

/* Section title row */
function xlSectionTitle(ws, row, col, endCol, title, opts) {
  if (typeof endCol === 'string') { title = endCol; endCol = col - 1; col = 0; }
  xlMerge(ws, row, col, row, endCol);
  xlCell(ws, row, col, title, XLFont.sectionMed, null, null, XLBorder.medBot);
  return row + 1;
}

/* Navy section header bar */
function xlNavySection(ws, row, col, endCol, title) {
  xlMerge(ws, row, col, row, endCol);
  xlCell(ws, row, col, title, XLFont.sectionBold, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  return row + 1;
}

/* Info grid: pairs of [label, value] in two-column layout at (row, labelCol) */
function xlInfoGrid(ws, startRow, labelCol, valueCol, pairs, opts) {
  let r = startRow;
  pairs.forEach(([label, value], i) => {
    const isAlt = i % 2 === 1;
    const fill = isAlt ? XLFill.ltgray : XLFill.white;
    xlCell(ws, r, labelCol, label, XLFont.labelSm, fill, XLAlign.right, XLBorder.bottom);
    const vBold = typeof value === 'string' && value.charAt(0) === '+' ? XLFont.numGreen :
                  typeof value === 'string' && value.charAt(0) === '-' ? XLFont.numRed :
                  XLFont.valueBold;
    xlCell(ws, r, valueCol, value, vBold, fill, XLAlign.left, XLBorder.bottom);
    r++;
  });
  return r;
}

/* Two-column info grid (left section + right section) */
function xlDualInfoGrid(ws, startRow, lLabelCol, lValueCol, rLabelCol, rValueCol, leftPairs, rightPairs) {
  let r = startRow;
  const max = Math.max(leftPairs.length, rightPairs.length);
  for (let i = 0; i < max; i++) {
    const fill = i % 2 === 1 ? XLFill.ltgray : XLFill.white;
    if (i < leftPairs.length) {
      xlCell(ws, r, lLabelCol, leftPairs[i][0], XLFont.labelSm, fill, XLAlign.right, XLBorder.bottom);
      xlCell(ws, r, lValueCol, leftPairs[i][1], XLFont.valueBold, fill, XLAlign.left, XLBorder.bottom);
    }
    if (i < rightPairs.length) {
      xlCell(ws, r, rLabelCol, rightPairs[i][0], XLFont.labelSm, fill, XLAlign.right, XLBorder.bottom);
      xlCell(ws, r, rValueCol, rightPairs[i][1], XLFont.valueBold, fill, XLAlign.left, XLBorder.bottom);
    }
    r++;
  }
  return r;
}

/* Styled table header row */
function xlTableHeader(ws, row, startCol, headers) {
  if (Array.isArray(startCol)) { headers = startCol; startCol = 0; }
  headers.forEach((h, i) => xlCell(ws, row, startCol + i, h, XLFont.tableHeader, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center));
  return row + 1;
}

/* Data row (alternating colors) */
function xlDataRow(ws, row, startCol, values, fonts, aligns) {
  if (Array.isArray(startCol)) { aligns = fonts; fonts = values; values = startCol; startCol = 0; }
  const isAlt = row % 2 === 0;
  const fill = isAlt ? XLFill.white : XLFill.ltgray;
  values.forEach((v, i) => {
    const f = fonts ? (fonts[i] || XLFont.tableCell) : XLFont.tableCell;
    const a = aligns ? (aligns[i] || XLAlign.left) : XLAlign.left;
    xlCell(ws, row, startCol + i, v, f, fill, a, XLBorder.thin);
  });
  return row + 1;
}

/* Totals row */
function xlTotalsRow(ws, row, startCol, label, values, endCol) {
  xlCell(ws, row, startCol, label, XLFont.sectionMed, XLFill.mdgray, null, {top:{style:'medium'},bottom:{style:'medium'}});
  values.forEach((v, i) => {
    xlCell(ws, row, startCol + 1 + i, v, XLFont.sectionMed, XLFill.mdgray, XLAlign.right, {top:{style:'medium'},bottom:{style:'medium'}});
  });
  return row + 1;
}

/* Footer row */
function xlFooterRow(ws, row, startCol, endCol, text, font) {
  xlMerge(ws, row, startCol, row, endCol);
  xlCell(ws, row, startCol, text, font || XLFont.footerSm, null, XLAlign.center);
  return row + 1;
}

/* Download workbook */
function downloadWorkbook(wb, filename) {
  XLSX.writeFile(wb, filename);
}

/* Set column widths */
function xlSetWidths(ws, widths) {
  ws['!cols'] = widths.map(w => ({wch: w}));
}

/* Format FCFA amount string */
function fcfa(n) { return 'FCFA ' + Number(n).toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:0,maximumFractionDigits:0}); }

/* Format FCFA amount string with decimals */
function fcfaDec(n) { return 'FCFA ' + Number(n).toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2}); }

/* Create a blank sheet of given size */
function xlMakeSheet(rows, cols) {
  const aoa = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < rows; i++) aoa.push(new Array(cols).fill(''));
  const ws = XLSX.utils.aoa_to_sheet(aoa);
  ws['!cols'] = [];
  ws['!merges'] = [];
  return ws;
}
function exportCustomers() {
  const filtered = getFilteredCustomers();
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('Customer Registry Export');
  // ★ FIX: Added Phone, Email, Next Action columns to export — they exist in the data model.
  const header = 'Customer Reference,Full Name,Customer Type,Branch,Status,Risk Rating,Products,Phone,Email,Next Action,Relationship Start Date\n';
  const rows = filtered.map(c=>`${csv(c.customerNumber)},${csv(c.fullName)},${csv(c.customerType)},${csv(c.branch)},${csv(c.status)},${csv(c.riskRating)},${csv((c.products||[]).join('; '))},${csv(c.phone||'')},${csv(c.email||'')},${csv(c.nextAction||'')},${csv(c.relationshipStarted)}`).join('\n');
  const footer = csvFooter(filtered.length);
  downloadCSV(meta + header + rows + footer, 'customers-export.csv');
  showToast('success','Export Complete',`${filtered.length} customers exported as CSV.`);
}

function exportAccounts() {
  const filtered = getFilteredAccounts();
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('Account Portfolio Export');
  const header = 'Account Number,Customer Name,Product Type,Branch,Account Status,Ledger Balance (FCFA),Available Balance (FCFA),Hold Balance (FCFA),Currency,Date Opened\n';
  const rows = filtered.map(a=>`${csv(a.accountNumber)},${csv(a.customerName)},${csv(a.productType)},${csv(a.branch)},${csv(a.status)},${csvNum(a.ledgerBalance)},${csvNum(a.availableBalance)},${csvNum(a.holdBalance)},${csv(a.currency)},${csv(a.openedAt ? dateFmt(a.openedAt) : '')}`).join('\n');
  const totalLedger = filtered.reduce((s,a)=>s+a.ledgerBalance,0);
  const footer = csvFooter(filtered.length, [{label:'Total Ledger Balance (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalLedger)}]);
  downloadCSV(meta + header + rows + footer, 'accounts-export.csv');
  showToast('success','Export Complete',`${filtered.length} accounts exported as CSV.`);
}

function exportLoans() {
  // ★ FIX (LOAN-015): Match the Active Loans tab filter — exclude PENDING/UNDER_REVIEW
  // (they live in the Applications tab until fully approved)
  const filtered = filterByUserBranch(DB.loans).filter(l => l.status !== 'PENDING' && l.status !== 'UNDER_REVIEW');
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('Loan Portfolio Export');
  const header = 'Loan Number,Customer Name,Branch,Loan Status,Principal (FCFA),Outstanding Balance (FCFA),Interest Rate (%),Term (Months),Disbursement Date,Maturity Date,Next Payment Due,Days Past Due\n';
  const rows = filtered.map(l=>`${csv(l.loanNumber)},${csv(l.customerName)},${csv(l.branch)},${csv(l.status)},${csvNum(l.principal)},${csvNum(l.outstanding)},${csvNum(l.interestRate)},${l.termMonths},${csv(l.disbursedAt)},${csv(l.maturityDate)},${csv(l.nextDue)},${csv(l.daysPastDue||0)}`).join('\n');
  const totalOutstanding = filtered.reduce((s,l)=>s+l.outstanding,0);
  const footer = csvFooter(filtered.length, [{label:'Total Outstanding (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalOutstanding)}]);
  downloadCSV(meta + header + rows + footer, 'loans-export.csv');
  showToast('success','Export Complete',`${filtered.length} loans exported as CSV.`);
}

function exportApprovals() {
  // ★ FIX (APPR-001): Apply branch isolation to export — was leaking cross-branch data
  const branchBase = filterByUserBranch(DB.approvals);
  const filtered = STATE.approvalFilter ? branchBase.filter(a=>a.status===STATE.approvalFilter) : branchBase;
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('Approval Queue Export');
  const header = 'Approval ID,Entity Type,Scope Code,Submitted By,Approval Status,Branch,Entity Value (FCFA),Submitted At,Decided By,Decided At,Reason\n';
  const rows = filtered.map(a=>`${csv(a.id)},${csv(a.entityType)},${csv(a.scopeCode)},${csv(a.submittedBy)},${csv(a.status)},${csv(a.branch)},${csv(a.value)},${csv(dateFmt(a.submittedAt))},${csv(a.decidedBy||'')},${csv(a.decidedAt?dateFmt(a.decidedAt):'')},${csv(a.reason||'')}`).join('\n');
  const footer = csvFooter(filtered.length);
  downloadCSV(meta + header + rows + footer, 'approvals-export.csv');
  showToast('success','Export Complete',`${filtered.length} approvals exported as CSV.`);
}

function exportStaff() {
  const q = norm($('staffSearch')?.value || '');
  const role = $('staffRoleFilter')?.value || '';
  const status = $('staffStatusFilter')?.value || '';
  const baseStaff = filterByUserBranch(DB.staff);
  const filtered = baseStaff.filter(s =>
    (!q || norm(s.fullName).includes(q) || norm(s.username).includes(q)) &&
    (!role || s.role === role) &&
    (!status || s.employmentStatus === status)
  );
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('Staff Access & Scope Export');
  const header = 'Username,Full Name,Role,Department,Branches,Modules,Approval Limit (FCFA),MFA Required,Employment Status,IP Restrictions,Email,Phone,Position,Last Login\n';
  const rows = filtered.map(s=>`${csv(s.username)},${csv(s.fullName)},${csv(s.role)},${csv(s.department)},${csv((s.branches||[]).join('; '))},${csv((s.modules||[]).map(m => typeof m === 'string' ? m : (m?.name || m?.module_name || '')).join('; '))},${csvNum(s.approvalLimit)},${csv(s.mfaRequired?'Yes':'No')},${csv(s.employmentStatus)},${csv(s.ipRestrictions||'')},${csv(s.email||'')},${csv(s.phone||'')},${csv(s.position||'')},${csv(s.lastLogin||'Never')}`).join('\n');
  const footer = csvFooter(filtered.length);
  downloadCSV(meta + header + rows + footer, 'staff-export.csv');
  showToast('success','Export Complete',`${filtered.length} staff exported as CSV.`);
}

/* ================================================================
   EXPORT & REFRESH
   ================================================================ */
function handleExport() {
  const view = STATE.currentView;
  if (view === 'transactions') exportTransactions();
  else if (view === 'audit') exportAuditLogs();
  else if (view === 'profitloss') exportProfitCSV();
  else if (view === 'expenses') exportExpensesCSV();
  else if (view === 'operating') exportOperatingCSV();
  else if (view === 'glaccounts') exportGLCSV();
  else if (view === 'balancesheet') exportBalanceSheetCSV();
  else if (view === 'cashflow') exportCashFlowCSV();
  else if (view === 'ratios') exportRatiosCSV();
  else if (view === 'staff') exportStaff();
  else if (view === 'reports') showToast('info','Export','Select a report type from the Financial Report Center.');
  else showToast('info','Export',`Export for ${view} view will be available in a future release.`);
}

function exportTransactions() {
  const filtered = getFilteredTransactions();
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('Transaction Ledger Export');
  // ★ FIX (TXN-003): Added Fee, Fee%, Net Amount, Fee Mode, Total Tax, Module columns
  // for enterprise reconciliation. Previously only basic columns were exported.
  const header = 'Transaction Reference,Date,Branch,Account Number,Customer Name,Description,Category,Direction,Status,Amount (FCFA),Fee (FCFA),Fee %,Net Amount (FCFA),Fee Mode,Total Tax (FCFA),Module\n';
  const rows = filtered.map(t=>`${csv(t.ref)},${csv(dateFmt(t.timestamp))},${csv(t.branch)},${csv(t.account)},${csv(t.customerName)},${csv(t.description)},${csv(t.category)},${csv(t.direction)},${csv(t.status)},${csvNum(t.amount)},${csvNum(t.fee||0)},${csv(t.feePct?String(t.feePct)+'%':'0%')},${csvNum(t.netAmount!=null?t.netAmount:t.amount)},${csv(t.feeMode||'')},${csvNum(t.totalTax||0)},${csv(t.module||'')}`).join('\n');
  // ★ FIX (TXN-010): Make export totals consistent with UI summary (exclude FEE/TAX_DEDUCTION/REVERSAL)
  const totalCredits = filtered.filter(t=>t.direction==='credit' && t.type!=='FEE' && t.type!=='TAX_DEDUCTION' && t.type!=='REVERSAL').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const totalDebits = filtered.filter(t=>t.direction==='debit' && t.type!=='FEE' && t.type!=='TAX_DEDUCTION' && t.type!=='REVERSAL').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const footer = csvFooter(filtered.length, [{label:'Total Credits (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalCredits)},{label:'Total Debits (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalDebits)},{label:'Net Movement (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalCredits-totalDebits)}]);
  downloadCSV(meta + header + rows + footer, 'transactions-export.csv');
  showToast('success','Export Complete',`${filtered.length} transactions exported as CSV.`);
}

function resetTxnFilters() {
  ['txnDate','txnBranch','txnAccount','txnDirection','txnStatus','txnCategory','txnModule'].forEach(id=>{if($(id))$(id).value=''});
  if($('txnFromHour')) $('txnFromHour').value='';
  if($('txnToHour')) $('txnToHour').value='';
  if($('txnSearch')) $('txnSearch').value='';
  STATE.txnPage = 1;
  renderTransactions();
  showToast('info','Filters Reset','All transaction filters have been cleared.');
}

async function refreshData() {
  await loadAllData();
  initApp();
  showToast('success','Refreshed','All data reloaded from server.');
}

function resetStaffFilters() {
  if($('staffSearch')) $('staffSearch').value = '';
  if($('staffRoleFilter')) $('staffRoleFilter').value = '';
  if($('staffStatusFilter')) $('staffStatusFilter').value = '';
  STATE.staffPage = 1;
  renderStaff();
  showToast('info','Filters Reset','All staff filters have been cleared.');
}

function resetAuditFilters() {
  if($('auditSearch')) $('auditSearch').value = '';
  if($('auditResultFilter')) $('auditResultFilter').value = '';
  if($('auditBranchFilter')) $('auditBranchFilter').value = '';
  if($('auditCategoryFilter')) $('auditCategoryFilter').value = '';
  if($('auditEntityFilter')) $('auditEntityFilter').value = '';
  if($('auditDateFrom')) $('auditDateFrom').value = '';
  if($('auditDateTo')) $('auditDateTo').value = '';
  STATE.auditPage = 1;
  renderAuditLogs();
}

function resetLoanFilters() {
  if($('loanSearch')) $('loanSearch').value = '';
  if($('loanStatusFilter')) $('loanStatusFilter').value = '';
  if($('loanBranchFilter')) $('loanBranchFilter').value = '';
  renderLoans();
}

/* ================================================================
   AUDIT ENTRY HELPER
   ================================================================ */
function classifyAuditCategory(action) {
  if (!action) return 'SYSTEM';
  const a = action.toUpperCase();
  if (a.startsWith('LOGIN') || a.startsWith('LOGOUT') || a.startsWith('MFA') || a.startsWith('SESSION') || a.startsWith('PASSWORD')) return 'AUTH';
  if (a.startsWith('TXN_') || a.startsWith('RECEIPT') || a.startsWith('STATEMENT_PRINT') || a.startsWith('STATEMENT_GENERAT') || a.startsWith('STATEMENT_EXPORT')) return 'TRANSACTION';
  if (a.includes('CUSTOMER')) return 'CUSTOMER';
  if (a.includes('ACCOUNT') || a.includes('TAX_EXEMPTION') || a.includes('FEE_MODE')) return 'ACCOUNT';
  if (a.startsWith('STAFF') || a.startsWith('PROFILE') || a.startsWith('PROFILE_PICTURE')) return 'STAFF';
  if (a.startsWith('LOAN') || a.startsWith('AUTO_DEDUCTION')) return 'LOAN';
  if (a.startsWith('EXPENSE')) return 'EXPENSE';
  if (a.startsWith('APPROVAL')) return 'APPROVAL';
  if (a.startsWith('POLICY')) return 'POLICY';
  if (a.startsWith('SETTINGS') || a.startsWith('BRANDING') || a.includes('TOGGLE') || a.includes('SETTING')) return 'SETTINGS';
  if (a.startsWith('BRANCH')) return 'BRANCH';
  if (a.startsWith('REPORT') || a.startsWith('TRIAL_BALANCE') || a.startsWith('BALANCE_SHEET') || a.startsWith('CASHFLOW') || a.startsWith('RATIOS') || a.startsWith('PNL') || a.startsWith('OPERATING_STATEMENT') || a.startsWith('AUDIT_REPORT')) return 'REPORT';
  if (a.startsWith('DOCUMENT') || a.startsWith('PAYSLIP')) return 'DOCUMENT';
  if (a.startsWith('OP_FUND')) return 'OPERATING_FUND';
  return 'SYSTEM';
}

function classifyModule(action) {
  if (!action) return 'SYSTEM';
  const a = action.toUpperCase();
  if (a.startsWith('LOGIN') || a.startsWith('LOGOUT') || a.startsWith('MFA') || a.startsWith('SESSION') || a.startsWith('PASSWORD')) return 'AUTH';
  if (a.startsWith('TXN_') || a.startsWith('RECEIPT') || a.startsWith('STATEMENT_PRINT') || a.startsWith('STATEMENT_GENERAT') || a.startsWith('STATEMENT_EXPORT')) return 'TRANSACTIONS';
  if (a.includes('CUSTOMER')) return 'CUSTOMERS';
  if (a.includes('ACCOUNT') || a.includes('TAX_EXEMPTION') || a.includes('FEE_MODE')) return 'ACCOUNTS';
  if (a.startsWith('STAFF') || a.startsWith('PROFILE') || a.startsWith('PROFILE_PICTURE')) return 'STAFF';
  if (a.startsWith('LOAN') || a.startsWith('AUTO_DEDUCTION')) return 'LOANS';
  if (a.startsWith('EXPENSE')) return 'EXPENSES';
  if (a.startsWith('APPROVAL')) return 'APPROVALS';
  if (a.startsWith('POLICY')) return 'POLICIES';
  if (a.startsWith('SETTINGS') || a.startsWith('BRANDING') || a.includes('TOGGLE') || a.includes('SETTING')) return 'SETTINGS';
  if (a.startsWith('BRANCH')) return 'BRANCHES';
  if (a.startsWith('REPORT') || a.startsWith('TRIAL_BALANCE') || a.startsWith('BALANCE_SHEET') || a.startsWith('CASHFLOW') || a.startsWith('RATIOS') || a.startsWith('PNL') || a.startsWith('OPERATING_STATEMENT') || a.startsWith('AUDIT_REPORT')) return 'REPORTS';
  if (a.startsWith('DOCUMENT') || a.startsWith('PAYSLIP')) return 'DOCUMENTS';
  if (a.startsWith('OP_FUND')) return 'OPERATING_FUND';
  return 'AUDIT';
}

function addAuditEntry(action, entity, entityId, details, category) {
  const entry = {
    id: DB.auditLogs.length + 1,
    uuid: 'AUD-' + String(DB.auditLogs.length + 1).padStart(3,'0'),
    actor: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || STATE.currentUser?.username || 'SYSTEM',
    actorBranch: STATE.currentUser?.branches?.[0] || 'System',
    action, entity, entityId,
    result: 'SUCCESS',
    ip: '',
    details,
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    category: category || classifyAuditCategory(action),
    module: classifyModule(action),
    userAgent: navigator.userAgent
  };
  DB.auditLogs.unshift(entry);
  // Fire-and-forget API call to persist audit log
  API.post('audit', {
    actor: entry.actor, actor_branch: entry.actorBranch, action: entry.action,
    entity: entry.entity, entity_id: String(entry.entityId), result: 'SUCCESS',
    ip: '', details: entry.details,
    module: classifyModule(entry.action),
    category: category || classifyAuditCategory(entry.action),
    user_agent: navigator.userAgent
  });
}

/* ================================================================
   INIT — Called after successful login
   ================================================================ */
function initApp() {
  loadSavedBranding();
  applyBranding();
  backfillProfitLedger();
  setupTxnFilters();
  renderDashboard();
  renderCustomers();
  renderAccounts();
  renderTransactions();
  renderLoans();
  renderLoanApplications();
  renderLoanScheduleFilter();
  renderLoanSchedule();
  renderApprovals();
  populateStaffRoleFilter();
  populateAuditBranchFilter();
  renderStaff();
  renderAuditLogs();
  renderLoginHistory();
  renderSettings();
  renderNotifications();
  updateBadges();
  // ★ drawCharts() moved to completeLogin() AFTER appShell is visible,
  // because canvas.clientWidth/clientHeight returns 0 inside display:none parent.
  // Restore saved view/panel from localStorage (persists across page refresh)
  try {
    const savedView = localStorage.getItem('atlas_view');
    if (savedView && savedView !== 'dashboard') {
      navigate(savedView);
    }
  } catch(e) {}
}

/* ================================================================
   NEW FEATURE FUNCTIONS
   ================================================================ */

/* === FEATURE 1: Edit Customer === */
function openEditCustomer(id) {
  const c = DB.customers.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!c) return;
  $('ecId').value = c.id;
  $('ecName').value = c.fullName;
  $('ecBranch').value = c.branch;
  $('ecRisk').value = c.riskRating;
  $('ecPhone').value = c.phone || '';
  $('ecEmail').value = c.email || '';
  // ★ FIX (CUST-007): Populate notes field when opening edit modal
  $('ecNotes').value = c.notes || '';
  openModal('editCustomerModal');
}

function handleEditCustomer(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const id = Number($('ecId').value);
  const c = DB.customers.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!c) return false;
  c.fullName = $('ecName').value.trim();
  c.branch = $('ecBranch').value;
  c.riskRating = $('ecRisk').value;
  c.phone = $('ecPhone').value.trim();
  c.email = $('ecEmail').value.trim();
  // ★ FIX (CUST-007): Also persist notes to local object
  c.notes = $('ecNotes')?.value || '';
  closeModal('editCustomerModal');
  showToast('success','Customer Updated',`${c.fullName} has been updated.`);
  addAuditEntry('CUSTOMER_UPDATE','Customer',c.customerNumber,`Customer updated by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}`);
  renderCustomers();
  // Persist to database
  // ★ FIX (CUST-007): Send notes to API backend — was previously discarded.
  API.put('customers/' + id, {
    full_name: c.fullName, branch: c.branch, risk_rating: c.riskRating,
    phone: c.phone, email: c.email,
    notes: $('ecNotes')?.value || ''
  }).catch(err => console.warn('[Customer] Failed to persist update:', err));
  return false;
}

/* === FEATURE 2: Create Account === */
function openCreateAccount(customerId) {
  const c = DB.customers.find(x=>x.id===customerId); if(!c) return;
  $('caCustomerId').value = c.id;
  $('caCustomerName').value = `${c.fullName} (${c.customerNumber})`;
  // Always lock the branch to the customer's own branch — an account must belong
  // to the same branch as its customer, regardless of the user's branch selector
  const branchSelect = $('caBranch');
  const branchLocked = $('caBranchLocked');
  branchSelect.innerHTML = `<option value="${c.branch}">${c.branch}</option>`;
  branchSelect.value = c.branch;
  branchSelect.disabled = true;
  branchLocked.style.display = 'block';
  openModal('createAccountModal');
}

function handleCreateAccount(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const customerId = Number($('caCustomerId').value);
  const type = $('caType').value;
  const branch = $('caBranch').value;
  // Initial deposit removed — accounts open with zero balance; use Accounts panel to deposit funds
  const deposit = 0;
  const customer = DB.customers.find(c=>c.id===customerId);
  if(!customer||!branch) { showToast('error','Validation Error','Please fill in all required fields.'); return false; }
  const newAccNum = 'ACC-200100' + String(DB.accounts.length + 13).padStart(2,'0');
  DB.accounts.push({
    id: DB.accounts.length + 1, accountNumber: newAccNum, customerId, customerName: customer.fullName,
    productType: type, branch, status: 'ACTIVE', currency: 'XAF',
    ledgerBalance: deposit, availableBalance: deposit, holdBalance: 0,
    openedAt: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)
  });
  // ★ FIX (CUST-010): Products are stored UPPERCASE in the backend
  // (saveCustomerProducts does strtoupper). Keep the frontend consistent —
  // never push Title Case ('Salary') when the convention is 'SALARY'.
  if(!customer.products.includes(type)) customer.products.push(type);
  closeModal('createAccountModal');
  $('createAccountForm').reset();
  $('caBranch').disabled = false;
  $('caBranchLocked').style.display = 'none';
  showToast('success','Account Opened',`${newAccNum} (${type}) created for ${customer.fullName}.`);
  addAuditEntry('ACCOUNT_CREATE','Account',newAccNum,`New ${type} account opened by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}`);
  renderAccounts();
  // Persist to database
  API.post('accounts', {
    customer_id: customerId, product_type: type, branch: branch,
    currency: 'XAF', status: 'ACTIVE'
  }).then(res => {
    if (res?.data?.id) {
      const idx = DB.accounts.length - 1;
      DB.accounts[idx].id = res.data.id;
      DB.accounts[idx].accountNumber = res.data.account_number;
      renderAccounts();
    }
  }).catch(err => console.warn('[Account] Failed to persist:', err));
  return false;
}

/* === FEATURE 3: Close Account === */
function closeAccount(id) {
  const a = DB.accounts.find(x=>x.id===id);
  // ★ FIX (ACC-008): Warn if account has non-zero balance — closing an account
  // with funds is a significant operation that should not be done casually.
  const balanceWarning = a && a.ledgerBalance > 0
    ? ` WARNING: This account has a balance of ${money(a.ledgerBalance)} FCFA. These funds will be placed on hold.`
    : '';
  showConfirm('Close Account',`This will permanently close the account. This action is irreversible and requires a reason.${balanceWarning}`,(reason)=>{
    if(a){
      a.status='CLOSED';
      a.availableBalance=0;
      a.holdBalance=0;
    }
    showToast('warning','Account Closed',`${a?.accountNumber} has been permanently closed.`);
    addAuditEntry('ACCOUNT_CLOSE','Account',a?.accountNumber,`Account closed by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}${a?.ledgerBalance>0?' Balance at close: '+money(a.ledgerBalance)+' FCFA':''}`);
    // ★ FIX (ACC-003): Persist balance changes (availableBalance=0, holdBalance=0)
    // to the backend — previously only status was sent, so the database still
    // showed the old available_balance after closing the account.
    renderAccounts();
    API.put('accounts/' + id, {
      status: 'CLOSED',
      hold_balance: 0
    }).catch(err => console.warn('[Account] Failed to persist close:', err));
  }, true);
}

/* === FEATURE 4: Close Customer === */
function closeCustomer(id) {
  showConfirm('Close Customer Relationship','This will permanently close the customer relationship and freeze all associated accounts.',(reason)=>{
    const c = DB.customers.find(x=>x.id===id);
    if(c){
      c.status='CLOSED';
      c.nextAction='Relationship closed';
      // ★ FIX (CUST-001): Close ALL non-closed accounts (ACTIVE, FROZEN, DORMANT,
      // PENDING_OPENING), not just ACTIVE ones. A closed customer must not have
      // any operable accounts remaining.
      // ★ FIX (CUST-003): Persist each account status change to the backend API,
      // not just the customer status — otherwise the database still shows the
      // accounts as ACTIVE/FROZEN after the customer is closed.
      const affectedAccounts = DB.accounts.filter(a=>a.customerId===id&&a.status!=='CLOSED');
      affectedAccounts.forEach(a=>{
        a.status='CLOSED';
        a.availableBalance=0;
        a.holdBalance=0;
        // Persist to backend
        API.put('accounts/' + a.id, { status: 'CLOSED' }).catch(err => console.warn('[Customer] Failed to persist account close:', err));
      });
    }
    showToast('warning','Customer Closed',`${c?.fullName} relationship has been closed.`);
    addAuditEntry('CUSTOMER_CLOSE','Customer',c?.customerNumber,`Customer relationship closed by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}`);
    renderCustomers();
    API.put('customers/' + id, { status: 'CLOSED', next_action: 'Relationship closed' }).catch(err => console.warn('[Customer] Failed to persist close:', err));
  }, true);
}

/* === FEATURE 5: Staff Management — 100% Database-Driven === */

/** Populate role filter dynamically from DB.staff (database-loaded roles) */
function populateStaffRoleFilter() {
  const sel = $('staffRoleFilter');
  if (!sel) return;
  const roles = [...new Set(DB.staff.map(s => s.role).filter(Boolean))].sort();
  sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">All Roles</option>' + roles.map(r => `<option>${escHtml(r)}</option>`).join('');
}

/** Populate audit branch filter dynamically from DB.branches */
function populateAuditBranchFilter() {
  const sel = $('auditBranchFilter');
  if (!sel) return;
  const branches = [...new Set(DB.branches.map(b => b.name).filter(Boolean))].sort();
  sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">All</option>' + branches.map(b => `<option>${b}</option>`).join('');
}

/** Refresh staff data from database — replaces entire local cache with server data */
async function refreshStaff() {
  showToast('info', 'Refreshing', 'Loading staff from database…');
  try {
    const res = await API.get('staff', { pageSize: 2000 });
    if (res?.data) {
      const items = Array.isArray(res.data) ? res.data : (res.data.items || []);
      DB.staff = items.map(s => ({
        id: s.id, username: s.username, fullName: s.full_name, initials: s.initials || '',
        role: s.role, department: s.department || '', email: s.email || '', phone: s.phone || '',
        position: s.position || '', branches: s.branches || [], modules: s.modules || [],
        approvalLimit: parseFloat(s.approval_limit || 0), ipRestrictions: s.ip_restrictions || '',
        mfaRequired: !!s.mfa_required, employmentStatus: s.employment_status || 'ACTIVE',
        lastLogin: s.last_login, profilePicture: s.profile_picture || '',
        deactivationReason: s.deactivation_reason || '', suspensionReason: s.suspension_reason || '',
        password: ''
      }));
      populateStaffRoleFilter();
      renderStaff();
      showToast('success', 'Synced', `${DB.staff.length} staff members loaded from database.`);
    }
  } catch (err) { showToast('error', 'Error', 'Failed to refresh staff data.'); }
}

function openStaffModal(existingId) {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can manage staff.'); return; }
  // Build branch checkboxes dynamically — admin sees all branches
  const branchContainer = $('sfBranchesContainer');
  const allBranches = DB.branches.map(b => b.name || b.branch_name || b);
  if (branchContainer) {
    branchContainer.innerHTML = allBranches.map(b =>
      '<label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:.86rem;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer"><input type="checkbox" value="' + escHtml(b) + '" class="sfBranch"> ' + escHtml(b) + '</label>'
    ).join('');
  }
  $('sfPwStrength').innerHTML = '';
  $('sfNewPwStrength').innerHTML = '';
  
  if(existingId) {
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    // EDIT MODE: Fetch fresh data from server to guarantee accuracy.
    // Never rely on local cache — always load the exact current state
    // from the database so checkboxes reflect what's actually stored.
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    openModal('staffModal');
    $('staffModalTitle').textContent = 'Edit Staff Member';
    $('sfId').value = existingId;
    // Clear all fields while loading
    $('sfName').value = 'Loading…';
    $('sfUsername').value = 'Loading…';
    $('sfPassword').value = '';
    $('sfNewPassword').value = '';
    // ★ FIX (SP-040): Hide sfPassword in edit mode (its value was never used for updates —
    // only sfNewPassword drives password reset). Showing both fields confused admins into
    // thinking typing in sfPassword would reset the password, when it was silently ignored.
    $('sfPasswordGroup').style.display = 'none';
    $('sfNewPasswordGroup').style.display = 'block';
    // Uncheck ALL branches and modules while loading
    $$('.sfBranch').forEach(cb => { cb.checked = false; });
    $$('.sfModule').forEach(cb => { cb.checked = false; });
    // Fetch the staff member's CURRENT data directly from the database
    API.get('staff/' + existingId).then(res => {
      if (!res?.data) {
        showToast('error','Error','Failed to load staff data from server.');
        closeModal('staffModal');
        return;
      }
      const d = res.data;
      $('sfId').value = d.id;
      $('sfName').value = d.full_name || '';
      $('sfUsername').value = d.username || '';
      $('sfRole').value = d.role || 'Operations Staff';
      $('sfDept').value = d.department || 'Operations';
      $('sfLimit').value = d.approval_limit || 0;
      $('sfMfa').value = String(!!d.mfa_required);
      $('sfEmail').value = d.email || '';
      $('sfPhone').value = d.phone || '';
      $('sfPosition').value = d.position || '';
      $('sfIp').value = d.ip_restrictions || '';
      $('sfStatus').value = (d.employment_status||'').toUpperCase();
      // Branch checkboxes: check only the branches from the server response
      const serverBranches = (d.branches||[]).map(b=>(b||'').toUpperCase());
      $$('.sfBranch').forEach(cb => {
        cb.checked = serverBranches.includes(cb.value.toUpperCase());
      });
      // Module checkboxes: use reverse mapping from DB values to checkbox names.
      // This handles BOTH legacy RBAC keys (e.g. 'ACCOUNTS', 'OPERATING') and
      // new display names (e.g. 'Accounts', 'Operating Fund') stored in the DB.
      // No more false positives from overlapping multi-key expansion.
      // ★ FIX (SP-032): Backend returns modules as objects [{name, access}, ...],
      // not plain strings. Must extract name string before calling .toUpperCase().
      const serverModules = d.modules || [];
      const checkboxNames = new Set();
      serverModules.forEach(key => {
        const strKey = typeof key === 'string' ? key : (key?.name || key?.module_name || '');
        if (!strKey) return;
        const upper = strKey.toUpperCase();
        const mapped = RBAC_KEY_TO_CHECKBOX[upper];
        if (mapped) {
          checkboxNames.add(mapped);
        } else {
          // No reverse mapping found — treat as display name already
          checkboxNames.add(strKey);
        }
      });
      $$('.sfModule').forEach(cb => {
        cb.checked = checkboxNames.has(cb.value);
      });
      // Also update the local cache so it stays in sync
      const idx = DB.staff.findIndex(x=>x.id===existingId);
      if (idx >= 0) {
        DB.staff[idx] = { id:d.id, username:d.username, fullName:d.full_name, initials:d.initials||'',
          role:d.role, department:d.department||'', email:d.email||'', phone:d.phone||'',
          position:d.position||'', branches:d.branches||[], modules:d.modules||[],
          approvalLimit:parseFloat(d.approval_limit||0), ipRestrictions:d.ip_restrictions||'',
          mfaRequired:!!d.mfa_required, employmentStatus:d.employment_status||'ACTIVE',
          lastLogin:d.last_login, profilePicture:d.profile_picture||'',
          deactivationReason:d.deactivation_reason||'', suspensionReason:d.suspension_reason||'',
          password:'' };
      }
    }).catch(err => {
      console.error('[openStaffModal] Failed to fetch staff:', err);
      showToast('error','Error','Could not load staff member data.');
      closeModal('staffModal');
    });
  } else {
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    // NEW MODE: Apply safe defaults for a new staff member
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    $('staffModalTitle').textContent = 'Add Staff Member';
    $('sfId').value = '';
    $('sfName').value = '';
    $('sfUsername').value = '';
    $('sfRole').value = 'Operations Staff';
    $('sfDept').value = 'Operations';
    $('sfLimit').value = '0';
    $('sfMfa').value = 'true';
    $('sfEmail').value = '';
    $('sfPhone').value = '';
    $('sfPosition').value = '';
    $('sfIp').value = '';
    $('sfStatus').value = 'ACTIVE';
    $('sfPassword').value = '';
    $('sfNewPassword').value = '';
    $('sfPasswordGroup').style.display = 'block';
    $('sfPasswordLabel').textContent = 'Initial Password';
    $('sfNewPasswordGroup').style.display = 'none';
    // Default: no branches checked, non-admin module defaults
    $$('.sfBranch').forEach(cb => { cb.checked = false; });
    $$('.sfModule').forEach(cb => { cb.checked = ['Dashboard','Customers','Accounts'].includes(cb.value); });
    openModal('staffModal');
  }
}

/** Handle staff form submit — 100% API-driven CRUD */
async function handleStaffSubmit(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const existingId = Number($('sfId').value);
  const name = $('sfName').value.trim();
  const username = $('sfUsername').value.trim();
  const role = $('sfRole').value;
  const dept = $('sfDept').value;
  const branches = [...$$('.sfBranch:checked')].map(c=>c.value);
  const limit = Number($('sfLimit').value) || 0;
  const mfa = $('sfMfa').value === 'true';
  const email = $('sfEmail').value.trim();
  const phone = $('sfPhone').value.trim();
  const position = $('sfPosition').value.trim();
  const ip = $('sfIp').value.trim() || 'Any';
  const status = $('sfStatus').value;
  if(!name||!username||!branches.length) { showToast('error','Validation Error','Name, username, and at least one branch are required.'); return false; }
  // ★ FIX (SP-033): Preserve existing access levels when editing staff.
  // Previously sent modules as plain strings ["Dashboard","Accounts"] which caused
  // backend syncModules() to default ALL to FULL — silently escalating VIEW_ONLY to FULL.
  // Now sends as [{name, access}] objects, preserving existing access levels.
  const checkedModuleNames = [...$$('.sfModule:checked')].map(c=>c.value);
  if(!checkedModuleNames.length) { showToast('error','Validation Error','At least one module must be selected.'); return false; }
  const existingStaffForModules = existingId ? DB.staff.find(x=>x.id===existingId) : null;
  const existingModules = existingStaffForModules?.modules || [];
  const modules = checkedModuleNames.map(name => {
    const existing = existingModules.find(m => {
      const mName = typeof m === 'string' ? m : (m?.name || m?.module_name || '');
      return mName.toUpperCase() === name.toUpperCase();
    });
    const access = (existing && typeof existing !== 'string') ? (existing.access || 'FULL') : 'FULL';
    return { name, access };
  });

  // Username uniqueness check against database
  const duplicate = DB.staff.find(s => s.username.toLowerCase() === username.toLowerCase() && s.id !== existingId);
  if (duplicate) { showToast('error','Validation Error','Username "'+username+'" is already taken by '+duplicate.fullName+'. Please choose a different username.'); return false; }

  // Password complexity validation
  const password = $('sfPassword').value.trim();
  const newPassword = $('sfNewPassword').value.trim();

  const btn = $('staffForm')?.querySelector('[type=submit]') || e.target.querySelector('[type=submit]');
  if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Saving…'; }

  try {
    if (existingId) {
      // ── UPDATE: call API first, then update local cache from response ──
      if (newPassword.length > 0) {
        const pwErr = validatePasswordComplexity(newPassword);
        if (pwErr) { showToast('error','Password Policy',pwErr); if(btn){btn.disabled=false;btn.textContent='Save';} return false; }
      }
      const payload = { full_name: name, username, email, role, department: dept, phone, position, employment_status: status, branches, modules, approval_limit: limit, mfa_required: mfa, ip_restrictions: ip };
      const res = await API.put('staff/' + existingId, payload);
      if (!res) { showToast('error','Error','Failed to update staff on server.'); return false; }
      // Update local cache from server response
      if (res?.data) {
        const idx = DB.staff.findIndex(x=>x.id===existingId);
        if (idx >= 0) {
          const d = res.data;
          DB.staff[idx] = { id:d.id, username:d.username, fullName:d.full_name, initials:d.initials||'',
            role:d.role, department:d.department||'', email:d.email||'', phone:d.phone||'',
            position:d.position||'', branches:d.branches||[], modules:d.modules||[],
            approvalLimit:parseFloat(d.approval_limit||0), ipRestrictions:d.ip_restrictions||'',
            mfaRequired:!!d.mfa_required, employmentStatus:d.employment_status||'ACTIVE',
            lastLogin:d.last_login, profilePicture:d.profile_picture||'',
            deactivationReason:d.deactivation_reason||'', suspensionReason:d.suspension_reason||'',
            password:'' };
        }
      }
      // Reset password via separate endpoint if provided
      if (newPassword.length >= 8) {
        await API.put('staff/' + existingId + '/password', { password: newPassword });
        showToast('info','Password Reset','Password has been changed for '+name+'.');
      }
      // ★ FIX (SP-044): Build diff of changed fields for audit trail — previously
      // only logged generic "Staff member updated by X" with no change details.
      // Banking compliance requires knowing WHAT changed (role, approval limit, etc.).
      const prevStaff = DB.staff.find(x=>x.id===existingId);
      if (prevStaff) {
        const changes = [];
        if (prevStaff.fullName !== name) changes.push('name');
        if (prevStaff.role !== role) changes.push('role: '+prevStaff.role+'→'+role);
        if (prevStaff.department !== dept) changes.push('dept: '+prevStaff.department+'→'+dept);
        if (prevStaff.employmentStatus !== status) changes.push('status: '+prevStaff.employmentStatus+'→'+status);
        if (prevStaff.approvalLimit !== limit) changes.push('approval_limit: '+prevStaff.approvalLimit+'→'+limit);
        if (prevStaff.mfaRequired !== mfa) changes.push('mfa: '+(prevStaff.mfaRequired?'on':'off')+'→'+(mfa?'on':'off'));
        const prevBranchStr = (prevStaff.branches||[]).slice().sort().join(',');
        const newBranchStr = branches.slice().sort().join(',');
        if (prevBranchStr !== newBranchStr) changes.push('branches changed');
        const prevModStr = (prevStaff.modules||[]).map(m=>typeof m==='string'?m:(m?.name||'')).slice().sort().join(',');
        const newModStr = modules.map(m=>m.name).slice().sort().join(',');
        if (prevModStr !== newModStr) changes.push('modules changed');
        const changeDetail = changes.length ? changes.join('; ') : 'no material changes';
        addAuditEntry('STAFF_UPDATE','Staff',username,'Updated by '+STATE.currentUser?.fullName+': '+changeDetail);
      } else {
        addAuditEntry('STAFF_UPDATE','Staff',username,'Staff member updated by '+STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
      }
      showToast('success','Staff Updated',name+' has been updated in the database.');
      // If user edited their own record, update STATE.currentUser from server response
      // (not from form checkboxes, which use display names) and re-apply sidebar RBAC
      if (STATE.currentUser && (STATE.currentUser.username === username || STATE.currentUser.staff_id === existingId)) {
        const updatedSelf = DB.staff.find(x=>x.id===existingId);
        if (updatedSelf) {
          STATE.currentUser.modules = updatedSelf.modules;
          STATE.currentUser.role = updatedSelf.role;
          STATE.currentUser.department = updatedSelf.department;
          STATE.currentUser.branches = updatedSelf.branches;
        }
        applyRoleAccess();
      }
    } else {
      // ── CREATE: call API first, then add to local cache from response ──
      if(password.length < 8) { showToast('error','Validation Error','Password must be at least 8 characters.'); return false; }
      const pwErr = validatePasswordComplexity(password);
      if (pwErr) { showToast('error','Password Policy',pwErr); if(btn){btn.disabled=false;btn.textContent='Save';} return false; }
      const res = await API.post('staff', { username, full_name: name, email, role, department: dept, phone, position, password, branches, modules, approval_limit: limit, mfa_required: mfa, ip_restrictions: ip });
      if (!res) { showToast('error','Error','Failed to create staff on server.'); return false; }
      // Add to local cache from server response
      if (res?.data) {
        const d = res.data;
        DB.staff.unshift({ id:d.id, username:d.username, fullName:d.full_name, initials:d.initials||'',
          role:d.role, department:d.department||'', email:d.email||'', phone:d.phone||'',
          position:d.position||'', branches:d.branches||[], modules:d.modules||[],
          approvalLimit:parseFloat(d.approval_limit||0), ipRestrictions:d.ip_restrictions||'',
          mfaRequired:!!d.mfa_required, employmentStatus:d.employment_status||'ACTIVE',
          lastLogin:null, profilePicture:d.profile_picture||'',
          deactivationReason:d.deactivation_reason||'', suspensionReason:d.suspension_reason||'',
          password:'' });
      }
      addAuditEntry('STAFF_CREATE','Staff',username,'New staff member created by '+STATE.currentUser?.fullName+'. Modules: '+modules.map(m=>typeof m==='string'?m:m.name).join(', '));
      // Show the actual initial password (either the one admin provided or auto-generated by backend)
      const initPw = res?.data?.initial_password || '';
      if (initPw) {
        showToast('success','Staff Added',
          name+' ('+username+') created. Initial password: <span style="font-family:monospace;user-select:all;letter-spacing:1px">'+escHtml(initPw)+'</span>. Communicate it securely.', 8000);
      } else {
        showToast('success','Staff Added',name+' ('+username+') has been added with access to '+modules.length+' modules.');
      }
    }
    closeModal('staffModal');
    populateStaffRoleFilter();
    renderStaff();
  } catch(err) {
    console.error('[handleStaffSubmit]', err);
    showToast('error','Error','Staff operation failed: '+(err?.message||'Unknown'));
  } finally {
    if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Save'; }
  }
  return false;
}

/** Deactivate/reactivate staff — async with server confirmation */
async function deactivateStaff(id) {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can modify staff status.'); return; }
  const s = DB.staff.find(x=>x.id===id);
  if(!s) return;
  if (s.employmentStatus === 'SUSPENDED') {
    showToast('error','Cannot Deactivate','Please unsuspend '+s.fullName+' before deactivating.');
    return;
  }
  const isDeactivating = s.employmentStatus === 'ACTIVE';
  showConfirm(
    isDeactivating ? 'Deactivate Staff Member' : 'Reactivate Staff Member',
    isDeactivating ? 'Deactivate '+s.fullName+'? This will revoke all system access immediately. The staff member will not be able to log in.' : 'Reactivate '+s.fullName+'? This will restore their system access based on their current role and module assignments.',
    async (reason) => {
      const newStatus = isDeactivating ? 'INACTIVE' : 'ACTIVE';
      const res = await API.put('staff/' + id, { employment_status: newStatus, deactivation_reason: reason || '' });
      if (res === null) {
        showToast('error','Error','Failed to update staff status on server.');
        return;
      }
      // Update local cache from server response or fallback
      if (res?.data) {
        const idx = DB.staff.findIndex(x=>x.id===id);
        if (idx >= 0) {
          DB.staff[idx].employmentStatus = res.data.employment_status || newStatus;
        }
      } else {
        const idx = DB.staff.findIndex(x=>x.id===id);
        if (idx >= 0) DB.staff[idx].employmentStatus = newStatus;
      }
      showToast('warning','Staff Updated',s.fullName+' is now '+(isDeactivating?'INACTIVE':'ACTIVE')+'.');
      addAuditEntry('STAFF_STATUS_CHANGE','Staff',s.username,'Staff '+(isDeactivating?'deactivated':'reactivated')+' by '+STATE.currentUser?.fullName+'. Reason: '+(reason||'N/A'));
      populateStaffRoleFilter();
      renderStaff();
    }, true
  );
}

/** Suspend staff — temporary access revocation */
async function suspendStaff(id) {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can suspend staff.'); return; }
  const s = DB.staff.find(x=>x.id===id);
  if(!s || s.employmentStatus !== 'ACTIVE') return;
  showConfirm(
    'Suspend Staff Member',
    'Suspend '+s.fullName+'? Their access will be immediately revoked until an administrator unsuspends them. This is typically used for security investigations or policy violations.',
    async (reason) => {
      const res = await API.put('staff/' + id, { employment_status: 'SUSPENDED', suspension_reason: reason || '' });
      if (res === null) { showToast('error','Error','Failed to suspend staff on server.'); return; }
      if (res?.data) {
        const idx = DB.staff.findIndex(x=>x.id===id);
        if (idx >= 0) DB.staff[idx].employmentStatus = res.data.employment_status || 'SUSPENDED';
      } else {
        const idx = DB.staff.findIndex(x=>x.id===id);
        if (idx >= 0) DB.staff[idx].employmentStatus = 'SUSPENDED';
      }
      showToast('warning','Staff Suspended',s.fullName+' has been suspended. All access revoked immediately.');
      addAuditEntry('STAFF_SUSPENDED','Staff',s.username,'Staff suspended by '+STATE.currentUser?.fullName+'. Reason: '+(reason||'N/A'));
      populateStaffRoleFilter();
      renderStaff();
    }, true
  );
}

/** Unsuspend staff — restore from suspension */
async function unsuspendStaff(id) {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can unsuspend staff.'); return; }
  const s = DB.staff.find(x=>x.id===id);
  if(!s || s.employmentStatus !== 'SUSPENDED') return;
  showConfirm(
    'Unsuspend Staff Member',
    'Unsuspend '+s.fullName+'? This will restore their ACTIVE status and system access.',
    async (reason) => {
      const res = await API.put('staff/' + id, { employment_status: 'ACTIVE' });
      if (res === null) { showToast('error','Error','Failed to unsuspend staff on server.'); return; }
      if (res?.data) {
        const idx = DB.staff.findIndex(x=>x.id===id);
        if (idx >= 0) DB.staff[idx].employmentStatus = res.data.employment_status || 'ACTIVE';
      } else {
        const idx = DB.staff.findIndex(x=>x.id===id);
        if (idx >= 0) DB.staff[idx].employmentStatus = 'ACTIVE';
      }
      showToast('success','Staff Unsuspended',s.fullName+' is now ACTIVE with restored access.');
      addAuditEntry('STAFF_UNSUSPENDED','Staff',s.username,'Staff unsuspended by '+STATE.currentUser?.fullName+'. Reason: '+(reason||'N/A'));
      populateStaffRoleFilter();
      renderStaff();
    }
  );
}

/** Delete staff member — permanent removal with confirmation */
async function deleteStaff(id) {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can delete staff.'); return; }
  const s = DB.staff.find(x=>x.id===id);
  if(!s) return;
  // Prevent self-deletion
  if (STATE.currentUser && (STATE.currentUser.id === id || STATE.currentUser.username === s.username)) {
    showToast('error','Cannot Delete','You cannot delete your own account.');
    return;
  }
  showConfirm(
    'Delete Staff Member — Permanent Action',
    'WARNING: This will permanently delete '+s.fullName+' ('+s.username+') and ALL associated records including access history, audit entries attributed to them, and role assignments. This action CANNOT be undone.\n\nType "DELETE" in the reason field to confirm.',
    async (reason) => {
      if ((reason || '').trim().toUpperCase() !== 'DELETE') {
        showToast('error','Deletion Cancelled','You must type "DELETE" in the reason field to confirm permanent deletion.');
        return;
      }
      const res = await API.del('staff/' + id);
      if (res === null) { showToast('error','Error','Failed to delete staff on server.'); return; }
      // Remove from local cache
      DB.staff = DB.staff.filter(x => x.id !== id);
      showToast('success','Staff Deleted',s.fullName+' ('+s.username+') has been permanently deleted from the database.');
      addAuditEntry('STAFF_DELETED','Staff',s.username,'Staff permanently deleted by '+STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
      populateStaffRoleFilter();
      renderStaff();
    }, true
  );
}

/** Generate a cryptographically random temporary password */
function generateRandomPassword(length) {
  length = length || 16;
  const upper = 'ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ';
  const lower = 'abcdefghjkmnpqrstuvwxyz';
  const digits = '23456789';
  const special = '!@#$%&*?';
  const all = upper + lower + digits + special;
  let pw = '';
  // Guarantee at least one of each type using crypto-secure random
  pw += upper[_cryptoRandom(upper.length)];
  pw += lower[_cryptoRandom(lower.length)];
  pw += digits[_cryptoRandom(digits.length)];
  pw += special[_cryptoRandom(special.length)];
  for (let i = pw.length; i < length; i++) pw += all[_cryptoRandom(all.length)];
  // Fisher-Yates shuffle with crypto-secure random
  const pArr = pw.split('');
  for (let i = pArr.length - 1; i > 0; i--) { const j = _cryptoRandom(i + 1); [pArr[i], pArr[j]] = [pArr[j], pArr[i]]; }
  return pArr.join('');
}

/** Validate password against enterprise complexity policy */
function validatePasswordComplexity(pw) {
  // ★ FIX (SP-024): Removed redundant pw.length < 8 check (already covered by first line)
  if (!pw || pw.length < 8) return 'Password must be at least 8 characters long.';
  if (!/[A-Z]/.test(pw)) return 'Password must contain at least one uppercase letter (A-Z).';
  if (!/[a-z]/.test(pw)) return 'Password must contain at least one lowercase letter (a-z).';
  if (!/[0-9]/.test(pw)) return 'Password must contain at least one digit (0-9).';
  if (!/[!@#$%^&*()_+\-=\[\]{}|;:,.<>?]/.test(pw)) return 'Password must contain at least one special character (!@#$%^&* etc.).';
  if (/(.)\1{2,}/.test(pw)) return 'Password must not contain three or more repeated characters in a row.';
  return null; // valid
}

/** Update password strength meter UI */
function updatePasswordStrength(pw, containerId) {
  const el = $(containerId);
  if (!el) return;
  if (!pw) { el.innerHTML = ''; return; }
  let score = 0;
  if (pw.length >= 8) score++;
  if (pw.length >= 12) score++;
  if (/[A-Z]/.test(pw)) score++;
  if (/[a-z]/.test(pw)) score++;
  if (/[0-9]/.test(pw)) score++;
  if (/[^A-Za-z0-9]/.test(pw)) score++;
  const pct = Math.round((score / 6) * 100);
  let label = '', color = '';
  if (pct <= 33) { label = 'Weak'; color = '#dc2626'; }
  else if (pct <= 66) { label = 'Fair'; color = '#f59e0b'; }
  else { label = 'Strong'; color = '#16a34a'; }
  const err = validatePasswordComplexity(pw);
  if (err && pw.length >= 1) { label = 'Does not meet policy'; color = '#dc2626'; }
  el.innerHTML = `<div style="width:100%;height:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden"><div style="width:${pct}%;height:100%;background:${color};border-radius:3px;transition:width .2s"></div></div><span style="font-size:.72rem;color:${color};margin-top:2px;display:block">${label}</span>`;
}

/** Update real-time password policy checks display for profile modal */
function updatePasswordPolicyChecks(pw) {
  const el = $('profPwChecks');
  if (!el) return;
  if (!pw) { el.innerHTML = ''; return; }
  const checks = [
    { label: 'At least 8 characters', ok: pw.length >= 8 },
    { label: 'Contains uppercase letter (A-Z)', ok: /[A-Z]/.test(pw) },
    { label: 'Contains lowercase letter (a-z)', ok: /[a-z]/.test(pw) },
    { label: 'Contains a digit (0-9)', ok: /[0-9]/.test(pw) },
    { label: 'Contains special character (!@#$%^&* etc.)', ok: /[!@#$%^&*()_+\-=\[\]{}|;:,.<>?]/.test(pw) },
    { label: 'No 3+ repeated characters', ok: !/(.)\1{2,}/.test(pw) }
  ];
  el.innerHTML = checks.map(function(c) {
    return '<div style="color:' + (c.ok ? 'var(--success)' : 'var(--muted)') + '">' +
      (c.ok ? IC('check',14) + ' ' : IC('circle',14) + ' ') + c.label + '</div>';
  }).join('');
}

/** Check if new password and confirm password match in profile modal */
function checkPasswordMatch() {
  const el = $('profPwMatch');
  if (!el) return;
  const pw = $('profNewPass').value;
  const cpw = $('profConfirmPass').value;
  if (!cpw) { el.innerHTML = ''; return; }
  if (pw === cpw) {
    el.innerHTML = '<span style="color:var(--success)">' + IC('check',14) + ' Passwords match</span>';
  } else {
    el.innerHTML = '<span style="color:var(--danger)">' + IC('x',14) + ' Passwords do not match</span>';
  }
}

/** Reset password — generates a random secure temporary password and calls dedicated API endpoint */
function resetPasswordByManager(id) {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can reset passwords.'); return; }
  const s = DB.staff.find(x=>x.id===id);
  if(!s) return;
  const tempPass = generateRandomPassword(16);
  showConfirm('Reset Password for '+s.fullName,'This will generate a secure random temporary password for '+s.fullName+'. The temporary password will be shown to you once. Communicate it via a secure channel (not email). The staff member should change it immediately on next login.',async (reason)=>{
    const res = await API.put('staff/' + id + '/password', { password: tempPass, force_password_change: true });
    if (res === null) {
      showToast('error','Error','Failed to reset password on server.');
      return;
    }
    // Show the generated password in a special toast/modal — do NOT log it
    showConfirm('Temporary Password Generated',
      '<div style="text-align:center;padding:16px 0"><div style="font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:8px">Temporary password for <strong>'+escHtml(s.fullName)+'</strong> ('+escHtml(s.username)+'):</div><div style="font-family:monospace;font-size:1.3rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);padding:12px 16px;border-radius:8px;letter-spacing:1px;user-select:all;border:1px solid var(--line)">'+escHtml(tempPass)+'</div><div style="font-size:.76rem;color:#f59e0b;margin-top:12px">Copy this password now. It will not be shown again. Communicate it securely.</div></div>',
      () => {
        showToast('success','Password Reset','Password for '+escHtml(s.fullName)+' has been reset. Temporary password was shown.');
        addAuditEntry('PASSWORD_RESET_BY_MANAGER','Staff',s.username,'Password reset with random temporary password by '+STATE.currentUser?.fullName+'. Force change: enabled. Reason: '+(reason||'N/A'));
      },
      false, true
    );
  }, true);
}

/** Load staff audit trail from database for the detail drawer.
 *  Searches by BOTH fullName and username since audit_logs may store
 *  either format as the actor field (backend logAudit uses full_name,
 *  frontend addAuditEntry previously used username).
 */
async function loadStaffAuditTrail(staffId, fullName, username) {
  const container = $('staffAuditTrail_' + staffId);
  if (!container) return;
  container.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--muted);font-style:italic;padding:8px 0">Loading audit trail...</div>';
  try {
    // Fetch by fullName first (backend logAudit stores full_name)
    // Also fetch by username (frontend addAuditEntry may have stored username)
    const [resName, resUser] = await Promise.all([
      fullName ? API.get('audit', { actor: fullName, pageSize: 50 }) : Promise.resolve(null),
      (username && username !== fullName) ? API.get('audit', { actor: username, pageSize: 50 }) : Promise.resolve(null)
    ]);

    // Merge results from both searches, deduplicate by id
    const seen = new Set();
    const entries = [];
    const addEntries = (res) => {
      const items = Array.isArray(res?.data) ? res.data : (res?.data?.items || []);
      items.forEach(e => {
        const eid = e.id || e.uuid || (e.action + e.timestamp);
        if (!seen.has(eid)) { seen.add(eid); entries.push(e); }
      });
    };
    if (resName) addEntries(resName);
    if (resUser) addEntries(resUser);

    // Sort by timestamp descending
    entries.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.timestamp || 0) - new Date(a.timestamp || 0));

    // Limit to 50 most recent
    const display = entries.slice(0, 50);

    if (display.length === 0) {
      container.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--muted);font-style:italic;padding:8px 0">No audit entries found for this staff member.</div>';
      return;
    }
    container.innerHTML = display.map(e => `
      <div style="padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:baseline">
        <span class="pill ${pillCls(e.result || e.severity || 'PASS')}" style="font-size:.68rem;white-space:nowrap">${e.action || e.type || 'EVENT'}</span>
        <span style="flex:1;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--text2)">${e.details || e.description || '—'}</span>
        <span style="font-size:.74rem;color:var(--muted);white-space:nowrap">${e.timestamp ? dateFmt(e.timestamp) : ''}</span>
      </div>
    `).join('');
    if (entries.length > 50) {
      container.innerHTML += '<div style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.78rem;padding:6px 0;font-style:italic">Showing 50 of ' + entries.length + ' entries</div>';
    }
  } catch (err) {
    console.warn('[loadStaffAuditTrail] Error:', err);
    container.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--muted);font-style:italic;padding:8px 0">Could not load audit trail from database.</div>';
  }
}

/* === FEATURE 6: Settings Editing === */
let editingSettingKey = null;

function openEditSetting(key) {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can edit settings.'); return; }
  // ★ FIX (ST-063): Use _findSetting() for case-insensitive lookup consistency.
  const s = _findSetting(key); if(!s) return;
  editingSettingKey = key;
  $('seTitle').textContent = s.name;
  // ★ FIX (ST-053): Show the setting's actual description (what it controls) instead of
  // just the category. Previously users couldn't see what a setting does when editing.
  $('seDescription').textContent = s.description || `Category: ${s.category}`;
  $('seKey').textContent = s.key;
  $('seCategory').textContent = s.category;
  $('seCurrentValue').textContent = s.value;
  $('seValue').value = s.value;
  $('seEffectiveFrom').value = s.effectiveFrom || '';
  $('seReason').value = '';
  $('seApprovalNote').style.display = s.requiresApproval ? 'block' : 'none';
  $('seChangePreview').style.display = 'none';

  // Load related audit trail for this setting key
  const historyEl = $('seSettingHistory');
  if (historyEl) {
    const historyEntries = (DB.auditLogs || []).filter(a => a.entity === 'Setting' && a.entityId === key).slice(-5).reverse();
    if (historyEntries.length > 0) {
      historyEl.innerHTML = `<div style="margin-top:8px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)"><h4 style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:8px">Recent Change History</h4>` +
        historyEntries.map(h => `<div style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--soft);padding:4px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bg-dim)"><span style="color:var(--text2)">${h.details || h.action}</span><br><span style="color:var(--muted)">${h.actor} · ${h.timestamp ? new Date(h.timestamp).toLocaleString() : ''}</span></div>`).join('') +
        `</div>`;
    } else {
      historyEl.innerHTML = '';
    }
  }
  openModal('settingsEditModal');
}

function updateSettingPreview() {
  const preview = $('seChangePreview');
  if (!preview) return;
  // ★ FIX (ST-063): Use _findSetting() for case-insensitive lookup consistency.
  const s = _findSetting(editingSettingKey);
  if (!s) return;
  const newVal = $('seValue')?.value?.trim();
  if (newVal && newVal !== s.value) {
    preview.style.display = 'block';
    preview.innerHTML = `<strong style="color:var(--primary)">Change Preview:</strong><br><span style="color:var(--danger);text-decoration:line-through">${escHtml(s.value)}</span> <span style="color:var(--accent)">→</span> <span style="color:#67e8b5;font-weight:600">${escHtml(newVal)}</span>`;
  } else {
    preview.style.display = 'none';
  }
}

function submitSettingEdit() {
  // ★ FIX (ST-063): Use _findSetting() for case-insensitive lookup consistency.
  const s = _findSetting(editingSettingKey); if(!s) return;
  const newVal = $('seValue').value.trim();
  const newEffectiveFrom = $('seEffectiveFrom').value || null;
  const reason = $('seReason').value.trim();
  if(!newVal) { showToast('error','Validation Error','Value cannot be empty.'); return; }
  closeModal('settingsEditModal');
  if(s.requiresApproval) {
    const approvalIdx = DB.approvals.length;
    const settingApprovalDetails = { settingKey: s.key, settingId: s.id, settingName: s.name, oldValue: s.value, newValue: newVal, effectiveFrom: newEffectiveFrom };
    DB.approvals.push({
      id: -Date.now(), entityType:'Setting', entityId:s.id,
      scopeCode:'settings.manage', status:'PENDING',
      submittedBy: STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System',
      branch:'System', value:`${s.name}: ${s.value} → ${newVal}` + (newEffectiveFrom ? ` (eff. ${newEffectiveFrom})` : ''),
      submittedAt: new Date().toISOString(), decidedBy:null, decidedAt:null, reason:reason||'Setting change request',
      _settingDetails: settingApprovalDetails
    });
    // Sync approval to backend and save real ID
    API.post('approvals', {
      entity_type:'Setting', entity_id: s.id,
      scope_code:'settings.manage', value: s.name+': '+s.value+' → '+newVal,
      branch: 'System',
      details: JSON.stringify(settingApprovalDetails)
    }).then(r => { if(r?.data?.id) DB.approvals[approvalIdx].id = r.data.id; }).catch(()=>{});
    showToast('info','Approval Required','Setting change submitted for approval.');
    updateBadges();
    renderApprovals();
  } else {
    // ★ FIX (ST-066): Persist to backend BEFORE updating local state and showing toast.
    // Previously updated s.value immediately then fire-and-forget the API call, causing
    // stale local data on API failure (changes reverted on next page load).
    const putPayload = { key: s.key, value: newVal };
    if (newEffectiveFrom) putPayload.effective_from = newEffectiveFrom;
    API.put('settings', putPayload).then(() => {
      s.value = newVal;
      s.effectiveFrom = newEffectiveFrom;
      showToast('success','Setting Updated',`${s.name} updated to ${newVal}.` + (newEffectiveFrom ? ` Effective: ${shortDate(newEffectiveFrom)}` : ''));
      renderSystemSettingsCards();
    }).catch(err => {
      console.warn('[Setting] Failed to persist to backend:', err);
      showToast('error','Save Failed','Failed to save setting change. Please try again.');
    });
  }
  // ★ FIX (ST-019): Use different audit action for approval-required settings.
  // Previously logged SETTINGS_UPDATE even when change was only requested, not applied,
  // misleading auditors into thinking the change already went through.
  const auditAction = s.requiresApproval ? 'SETTINGS_CHANGE_REQUESTED' : 'SETTINGS_UPDATE';
  addAuditEntry(auditAction,'Setting',s.key,`${s.name}: ${s.value} → ${newVal}. Effective: ${newEffectiveFrom || 'immediately'}. ${s.requiresApproval ? 'Pending approval. ' : ''}Requested by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}`);
  renderSystemSettingsCards();
}

/* === FEATURE 7: Transaction Reverse === */

// Execute a reversal after it has been approved through the Approvals tab
async function executeApprovedReversal(approvalItem) {
  let details = approvalItem._reversalDetails || {};
  let revTxn = null, origTxn = null;

  // ── Resolve transactions from multiple possible sources ──
  // Method A: From persisted _reversalDetails (new approvals)
  if(details.reversalId && details.originalId) {
    revTxn = DB.transactions.find(t=>t.id===details.reversalId);
    origTxn = DB.transactions.find(t=>t.id===details.originalId);
  }
  // Method B: Fallback — find reversal by entityId from approval, find original from reversal's description
  if(!revTxn && approvalItem.entityId) {
    revTxn = DB.transactions.find(t=>t.id===approvalItem.entityId && t.type==='REVERSAL');
  }
  if(!origTxn && revTxn) {
    // Extract original ref from reversal description/memo (e.g., "Reversal of TXN-0023: ...")
    const match = (revTxn.description||'').match(/Reversal of (\S+?):/) || (revTxn.memo||'').match(/Original: (\S+?)[\s,\.]/);
    if(match) {
      origTxn = DB.transactions.find(t=>t.ref===match[1] && isWithdrawalTxn(t));
    }
  }
  // Method C: Last resort — search for any reversal on the same account
  if(!revTxn && approvalItem.value) {
    const refMatch = approvalItem.value.match(/^(TXN-\d+)/);
    if(refMatch) {
      origTxn = DB.transactions.find(t=>t.ref===refMatch[1] && isWithdrawalTxn(t));
      if(origTxn) {
        revTxn = DB.transactions.find(t=>t.type==='REVERSAL' && t.account===origTxn.account && (t.status==='PENDING_APPROVAL') && t.description && t.description.includes(origTxn.ref));
      }
    }
  }

  if(!revTxn) { console.error('[Reverse] Missing reversal transaction. Approval entityId:', approvalItem.entityId, 'details:', details); showToast('error','Reversal Failed','Could not find the reversal transaction in the system. The original transaction may have already been reversed.'); return; }
  if(!origTxn) { console.error('[Reverse] Missing original transaction. Reversal:', revTxn.ref, 'details:', details); showToast('error','Reversal Failed','Could not find the original transaction for reversal '+revTxn.ref); return; }

  // ── Determine net amount for balance credit ──
  let netAmount = details.netAmount || revTxn.netAmount || revTxn.amount;
  const retainedTotal = (details.retainedFee||0) + (details.retainedTax||0);

  // If no details were loaded (old approval without persisted details), recalculate net amount now
  if(!details.netAmount && isWithdrawalTxn(origTxn) && (origTxn.feeMode === 'WITHDRAWAL' || origTxn.netAmount != null)) {
    if(origTxn.netAmount != null && origTxn.netAmount > 0 && origTxn.netAmount < origTxn.amount) {
      netAmount = origTxn.netAmount;
    } else {
      // Try to find fee children for the original
      const feeChildren = DB.transactions.filter(t =>
        (t.type === 'FEE' || t.type === 'TAX_DEDUCTION') &&
        (t.status === 'POSTED') &&
        (t.account === origTxn.account) &&
        (t.memo && (t.memo.includes(origTxn.ref) || t.memo.includes('[Parent: '+origTxn.ref+']'))) ||
        (t._parentId === origTxn.id)
      );
      const totalChildFees = feeChildren.reduce((s,t)=>s+Math.abs(t.amount),0);
      if(totalChildFees > 0) {
        netAmount = origTxn.amount - totalChildFees;
      }
    }
    console.log('[Reverse] Recalculated net amount for old approval:', netAmount, '(original:', origTxn.amount, ')');
  }

  const origRef = details.originalRef || origTxn.ref;

  // ── 1. Mark reversal as POSTED on backend (this triggers balance credit) ──
  await refreshCsrfToken();
  const putResult = await API.put('transactions/'+revTxn.id, {status:'POSTED',
    memo:`Approved reversal. Original: ${origRef}. Net amount credited: ${money(netAmount)}. Fees retained: ${money(retainedTotal)}.`
  });
  if(putResult) console.log('[Reverse] Reversal '+revTxn.ref+' marked POSTED on backend (balance credited)');

  // ── 2. Mark original as REVERSED on backend ──
  await refreshCsrfToken();
  await API.put('transactions/'+origTxn.id, {status:'REVERSED',
    memo:(origTxn.memo||'')+' [Reversed via approval]'
  });

  // ── 3. Mark fee children as ABSORBED ──
  const children = DB.transactions.filter(t =>
    (t.type === 'FEE' || t.type === 'TAX_DEDUCTION') &&
    t.status === 'POSTED' &&
    (t.account === origTxn.account) &&
    (
      (t.memo && (t.memo.includes(origRef) || t.memo.includes('[Parent: '+origRef+']'))) ||
      (t._parentId === origTxn.id) ||
      (t.description && t.description.includes('Withdrawal fee') && Math.abs(t.timestamp - new Date(origTxn.timestamp||0).getTime()) < 60000)
    )
  );
  for(const child of children) {
    child.status = 'ABSORBED';
    child.memo = (child.memo || '') + ' [Absorbed on reversal of ' + origRef + ']';
    await refreshCsrfToken();
    await API.put('transactions/'+child.id, {status:'ABSORBED', memo:child.memo});
  }

  // ── 4. Update in-memory states ──
  revTxn.status = 'POSTED';
  origTxn.status = 'REVERSED';
  origTxn._pendingReversal = false;

  // ── 5. Restore account balance in-memory — credit back the NET amount only ──
  const a = DB.accounts.find(x=>x.accountNumber===origTxn.account);
  if(a && origTxn.direction==='debit') {
    a.ledgerBalance += netAmount;
    a.availableBalance += netAmount;
  } else if(a && origTxn.direction==='credit') {
    a.ledgerBalance -= netAmount;
    a.availableBalance -= netAmount;
  }
  // Account balance restored — backend atomically updated via PUT handler reversal logic
  showToast('success','Reversal Executed',`${origRef} reversed. Net ${money(netAmount)} credited to ${origTxn.account}. Fees ${money(retainedTotal)} retained by bank.`);
  addAuditEntry('TXN_REVERSE_APPROVED','Transaction',origRef,
    `Reversal approved and executed by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Net credited: ${money(netAmount)}. Fees retained: ${money(retainedTotal)}.`);
}

async function reverseTransaction(id) {
  showConfirm('Reverse Transaction','This will submit a reversal request for approval. Original: '+DB.transactions.find(t=>t.id===id)?.ref+'. The reversal will only take effect once approved.',async (reason)=>{
    const orig = DB.transactions.find(t=>t.id===id); if(!orig) return;

    // ── Determine reversal amount (always use NET for WITHDRAWAL fee mode) ──
    let reversalAmount = orig.amount;
    let retainedFee = 0;
    let retainedTax = 0;
    let feeFound = false;

    if(isWithdrawalTxn(orig) && (orig.feeMode === 'WITHDRAWAL' || orig.fee > 0 || orig.netAmount != null)) {
      // Priority 1: Use stored netAmount (most reliable — set at creation time)
      if(orig.netAmount != null && orig.netAmount > 0 && orig.netAmount < orig.amount) {
        reversalAmount = orig.netAmount;
        retainedFee = orig.fee || 0;
        retainedTax = orig.totalTax || 0;
        feeFound = true;
        console.log('[Reverse] Net amount from stored netAmount:', reversalAmount, 'fee:', retainedFee, 'tax:', retainedTax);
      }

      // Priority 2: Calculate from stored fee/totalTax fields on the parent transaction
      if(!feeFound && ((orig.fee||0) > 0 || (orig.totalTax||0) > 0)) {
        const computedNet = orig.amount - (orig.fee||0) - (orig.totalTax||0);
        if(computedNet > 0 && computedNet < orig.amount) {
          reversalAmount = computedNet;
          retainedFee = orig.fee || 0;
          retainedTax = orig.totalTax || 0;
          feeFound = true;
          console.log('[Reverse] Net amount from stored fee/tax:', reversalAmount);
        }
      }

      // Priority 3: Look for FEE/TAX child transactions (by memo containing parent ref, OR by _parentId)
      if(!feeFound) {
        const feeChildren = DB.transactions.filter(t =>
          (t.type === 'FEE' || t.type === 'TAX_DEDUCTION') &&
          (t.status === 'POSTED' || t.status === 'ABSORBED') &&
          (t.account === orig.account) &&
          (Math.abs(t.amount) > 0) &&
          // Match by: memo contains parent ref, OR _parentId matches, OR same account+type+timestamp proximity
          (
            (t.memo && (t.memo.includes(orig.ref) || t.memo.includes('[Parent: '+orig.ref+']'))) ||
            (t._parentId === orig.id) ||
            (t.description && t.description.includes('Withdrawal fee'))
          )
        );
        // For description-only matches, further filter by account
        const childFee = feeChildren.filter(t=>t.type==='FEE').reduce((s,t)=>s+Math.abs(t.amount),0);
        const childTax = feeChildren.filter(t=>t.type==='TAX_DEDUCTION').reduce((s,t)=>s+Math.abs(t.amount),0);
        if(childFee > 0 || childTax > 0) {
          retainedFee = childFee;
          retainedTax = childTax;
          reversalAmount = orig.amount - childFee - childTax;
          feeFound = true;
          console.log('[Reverse] Net amount from child transactions:', reversalAmount, '(fee children found:', feeChildren.length, ')');
        }
      }

      // Priority 4: Any FEE transactions on same account near the same timestamp (catch-all for legacy data)
      if(!feeFound) {
        const origTime = new Date(orig.timestamp || orig.created_at || 0).getTime();
        const accountFees = DB.transactions.filter(t =>
          t.type === 'FEE' &&
          t.account === orig.account &&
          t.status === 'POSTED' &&
          t.id !== orig.id
        );
        // Find the closest fee transaction by timestamp
        let closestFee = null;
        let closestDiff = Infinity;
        for(const ft of accountFees) {
          const ftTime = new Date(ft.timestamp || ft.created_at || 0).getTime();
          const diff = Math.abs(ftTime - origTime);
          if(diff < closestDiff && diff < 60000) { // within 60 seconds of the withdrawal
            closestDiff = diff;
            closestFee = ft;
          }
        }
        if(closestFee) {
          retainedFee = Math.abs(closestFee.amount);
          reversalAmount = orig.amount - retainedFee;
          feeFound = true;
          console.log('[Reverse] Net amount from closest fee txn:', reversalAmount, '(fee ref:', closestFee.ref, ')');
        }
      }

      // Priority 5: Recalculate from current withdrawal fee settings
      if(!feeFound) {
        const feePct = getWithdrawalFeePct(orig.accountType);
        if(feePct > 0) {
          const calcFee = orig.amount * feePct / 100;
          if(calcFee > 0) {
            retainedFee = calcFee;
            reversalAmount = orig.amount - calcFee;
            feeFound = true;
            console.log('[Reverse] Net amount recalculated from settings:', reversalAmount, '(fee pct:', feePct, '%)');
          }
        }
      }

      if(feeFound) {
        console.log('[Reverse] FINAL reversal amount:', reversalAmount, '(gross:', orig.amount, ', retained fee:', retainedFee, ', retained tax:', retainedTax, ')');
      } else {
        console.warn('[Reverse] No fee found for withdrawal', orig.ref, '- using full amount:', orig.amount);
      }
    }

    const revDirection = orig.direction==='credit'?'debit':'credit';
    const retainedTotal = retainedFee + retainedTax;

    // ── Mark original as PENDING_REVERSAL (visual indicator, NOT REVERSED yet) ──
    orig._pendingReversal = true; // internal flag for rendering

    // ── Refresh CSRF token ──
    await refreshCsrfToken();

    // ── 1. Create reversal entry as PENDING_APPROVAL (needs approval before balance changes) ──
    const revRef = 'TXN-REV-' + String(DB.transactions.length+1).padStart(4,'0');
    const revEntry = {
      id: DB.transactions.length+1, ref: revRef, type: 'REVERSAL',
      status: 'PENDING_APPROVAL', branch: orig.branch, account: orig.account,
