      accountType: orig.accountType, customerName: orig.customerName,
      description: `Reversal of ${orig.ref}: ${orig.description}`,
      category: 'Reversal', direction: revDirection,
      amount: reversalAmount, fee: 0, feePct: 0, feeMode: orig.feeMode || 'WITHDRAWAL',
      netAmount: reversalAmount, totalTax: 0,
      memo: `Pending reversal. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}. Original: ${orig.ref}. Net amount to credit: ${money(reversalAmount)}. Fees retained by bank: ${money(retainedTotal)}.`,
      module: orig.module, timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      _reversalOf: orig.id, _reversalOfRef: orig.ref, _retainedFee: retainedFee, _retainedTax: retainedTax, _reason: reason||'N/A'
    };
    DB.transactions.push(revEntry);

    // Persist to backend as PENDING_APPROVAL (backend won't touch balance until status changes to POSTED)
    const postResult = await API.post('transactions', {
      type:'REVERSAL', direction:revDirection, amount:reversalAmount,
      account:orig.account, account_type:orig.accountType,
      customer_name:orig.customerName, description:`Reversal of ${orig.ref}: ${orig.description}`,
      category:'Reversal', branch:orig.branch, module:orig.module,
      fee:0, fee_pct:0, fee_mode:orig.feeMode||'WITHDRAWAL',
      net_amount:reversalAmount, total_tax:0,
      total_debit:reversalAmount,
      memo:revEntry.memo,
      status:'PENDING_APPROVAL'
    });
    if(postResult?.data?.id) {
      revEntry.id = postResult.data.id;
      console.log('[Reverse] Reversal entry created as PENDING_APPROVAL, id='+postResult.data.id);
    } else {
      console.warn('[Reverse] POST reversal entry failed (backend may be offline)');
    }

    // ── 2. Create approval queue entry ──
    await refreshCsrfToken();
    const reversalDetails = {
      originalId: orig.id, originalRef: orig.ref, reversalId: revEntry.id,
      netAmount: reversalAmount, grossAmount: orig.amount, retainedFee, retainedTax,
      reason: reason||'N/A'
    };
    const approvalEntry = {
      id: 0, // will be set from backend response
      entityType:'Transaction Reversal', entityId: revEntry.id,
      scopeCode:'TXN_REVERSE', value:`${orig.ref} → Net ${money(reversalAmount)} (gross ${money(orig.amount)}, fees ${money(retainedTotal)})`,
      status:'PENDING', submittedBy: STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System',
      branch: orig.branch, submittedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      _reversalDetails: reversalDetails
    };

    // Persist approval to backend — MUST succeed for the workflow to work
    const apprResult = await API.post('approvals', {
      entity_type:'Transaction Reversal', entity_id: String(revEntry.id),
      scope_code:'TXN_REVERSE',
      value:approvalEntry.value,
      branch:orig.branch,
      details: reversalDetails
    });
    if(apprResult?.data?.id) {
      approvalEntry.id = apprResult.data.id;
      approvalEntry._reversalDetails.reversalId = revEntry.id; // ensure DB-sourced reversalId
      DB.approvals.push(approvalEntry);
      console.log('[Reverse] Approval entry persisted, id='+apprResult.data.id);
    } else {
      console.error('[Reverse] FAILED to persist approval entry to backend');
      showToast('error','Approval Failed','The reversal request could not be submitted for approval. The reversal transaction was created but may need manual approval.');
      // Still push locally so the UI shows it, but flag it
      approvalEntry.id = DB.approvals.length+1;
      approvalEntry._syncFailed = true;
      DB.approvals.push(approvalEntry);
    }

    renderTransactions(); renderAccounts(); renderApprovals(); renderDashboard(); updateBadges();
    showToast('warning','Reversal Submitted',`${orig.ref} reversal for net ${money(reversalAmount)} submitted for approval. Fees ${money(retainedTotal)} retained by bank.`);
    addAuditEntry('TXN_REVERSE_REQUEST','Transaction',orig.ref,`Reversal requested by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Net amount: ${money(reversalAmount)}. Gross: ${money(orig.amount)}. Fees retained: ${money(retainedTotal)}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}`);
  }, true);
}

/* === FEATURE 9: Global Search (Industry-Grade) === */
function openSearchOverlay() {
  const overlay = $('searchOverlay');
  if (!overlay) return;
  overlay.classList.add('open');
  const input = $('searchOverlayInput');
  input.value = $('globalSearch')?.value || '';
  setTimeout(() => input.focus(), 100);
  renderSearchRecent();
  STATE.searchActiveIndex = -1;
}

function closeSearchOverlay() {
  const overlay = $('searchOverlay');
  if (overlay) overlay.classList.remove('open');
  STATE.searchActiveIndex = -1;
}

function highlightMatch(text, query) {
  if (!query || query.length < 2) return escHtml(text);
  const nText = norm(text);
  const idx = nText.indexOf(query);
  if (idx < 0) return escHtml(text);
  return escHtml(text.slice(0, idx)) + '<span class="search-highlight">' + escHtml(text.slice(idx, idx + query.length)) + '</span>' + escHtml(text.slice(idx + query.length));
}

/* escHtml is defined above (near BANK BRANDING SETTINGS) — no duplicate needed */

function addRecentSearch(q) {
  if (!q || q.length < 2) return;
  STATE.recentSearches = STATE.recentSearches.filter(s => s !== q);
  STATE.recentSearches.unshift(q);
  if (STATE.recentSearches.length > 10) STATE.recentSearches = STATE.recentSearches.slice(0, 10);
}

function renderSearchRecent() {
  const area = $('searchRecentArea');
  if (!area) return;
  const searches = STATE.recentSearches;
  if (!searches || searches.length === 0) { area.innerHTML = ''; return; }
  area.innerHTML = '<div class="search-recent">' + searches.map((s, i) => `<span class="search-recent-tag" data-sidx="${i}">${escHtml(s)}</span>`).join('') + '</div>';
  area.querySelectorAll('.search-recent-tag').forEach(tag => {
    tag.addEventListener('click', function() {
      const idx = parseInt(this.dataset.sidx);
      const q = STATE.recentSearches[idx];
      if (q) { $('searchOverlayInput').value = q; executeSearch(q); }
    });
  });
}

function executeSearch(rawQuery) {
  const q = norm(rawQuery);
  if (!q || q.length < 2) { $('searchResultsArea').innerHTML = ''; return; }
  addRecentSearch(rawQuery);

  const results = [];
  const limit = 8;

  // Smart type detection
  const upperQ = (rawQuery || '').toUpperCase();

  // Branch isolation: search only within current branch data
  const branchCustomers = filterByUserBranch(DB.customers);
  const branchAccounts = filterByUserBranch(DB.accounts);
  const branchTransactions = filterByUserBranch(DB.transactions);
  const branchLoans = filterByUserBranch(DB.loans);
  const branchLoanApps = filterByUserBranch(DB.loanApplications);
  const branchDocs = filterByUserBranch(DB.generatedDocuments);
  const branchStaff = filterByUserBranch(DB.staff);

  // Customers
  const custRes = branchCustomers.filter(c => norm(c.fullName).includes(q) || norm(c.customerNumber).includes(q) || norm(c.email||'').includes(q) || norm(c.phone||'').includes(q)).slice(0, limit);
  if (custRes.length) results.push({ category: 'Customers', icon: 'users', iconBg: 'var(--primary-dim)', iconColor: 'var(--primary)', items: custRes.map(c => ({ id: c.id, title: c.fullName, sub: c.customerNumber + ' · ' + (c.customerType||''), meta: c.status, actionFn: () => _searchNavigateTo('customers', openCustomerDrawer, c.id) })) });

  // Accounts
  const accRes = branchAccounts.filter(a => norm(a.accountNumber).includes(q) || norm(a.customerName).includes(q)).slice(0, limit);
  if (accRes.length) results.push({ category: 'Accounts', icon: 'wallet', iconBg: 'var(--accent-dim)', iconColor: 'var(--accent)', items: accRes.map(a => ({ id: a.id, title: a.accountNumber, sub: a.customerName + ' · ' + a.productType, meta: money(a.ledgerBalance), actionFn: () => _searchNavigateTo('accounts', openAccountDrawer, a.id) })) });

  // Transactions
  const txnRes = branchTransactions.filter(t => [t.ref,t.description,t.customerName,t.account,t.category,t.module,t.memo||''].some(v => norm(v).includes(q))).slice(0, limit);
  if (txnRes.length) results.push({ category: 'Transactions', icon: 'arrow-left-right', iconBg: 'var(--warn-dim)', iconColor: 'var(--warn)', items: txnRes.map(t => ({ id: t.id, title: t.ref, sub: t.description + ' · ' + t.customerName, meta: (t.direction==='credit'?'+':'−') + money(t.amount) + ' · ' + t.status, actionFn: () => _searchNavigateTo('transactions') })) });

  // Loans
  const loanRes = branchLoans.filter(l => norm(l.loanNumber).includes(q) || norm(l.customerName).includes(q)).slice(0, limit);
  if (loanRes.length) results.push({ category: 'Loans', icon: 'landmark', iconBg: 'rgba(167,139,250,.12)', iconColor: '#a78bfa', items: loanRes.map(l => ({ id: l.id, title: l.loanNumber, sub: l.customerName + ' · ' + l.productType, meta: money(l.outstanding) + ' · ' + l.status, actionFn: () => _searchNavigateTo('loans') })) });

  // Loan Applications
  const laRes = branchLoanApps.filter(la => norm(la.applicationNumber||'').includes(q) || norm(la.customerName||'').includes(q)).slice(0, limit);
  if (laRes.length) results.push({ category: 'Loan Applications', icon: 'file-check', iconBg: 'rgba(251,146,60,.12)', iconColor: '#fb923c', items: laRes.map(la => ({ id: la.id, title: la.applicationNumber || 'LA-' + la.id, sub: (la.customerName||'N/A') + ' · ' + (la.purpose||''), meta: money(la.amount) + ' · ' + (la.status||''), actionFn: () => _searchNavigateTo('loans') })) });

  // Documents
  const docRes = branchDocs.filter(d => norm(d.documentNumber).includes(q) || norm(d.customerName).includes(q) || norm(d.accountNumber).includes(q)).slice(0, limit);
  if (docRes.length) results.push({ category: 'Documents', icon: 'file-text', iconBg: 'rgba(56,189,248,.12)', iconColor: '#38bdf8', items: docRes.map(d => ({ id: d.id, title: d.documentNumber, sub: d.customerName + ' · ' + d.type, meta: d.periodFrom + ' · ' + d.status, actionFn: () => { closeSearchOverlay(); reprintDocument(d.id); } })) });

  // Staff
  const staffRes = branchStaff.filter(s => norm(s.fullName).includes(q) || norm(s.username).includes(q) || norm(s.role||'').includes(q) || norm(s.department||'').includes(q)).slice(0, limit);
  if (staffRes.length) results.push({ category: 'Staff', icon: 'user-cog', iconBg: 'rgba(52,211,153,.12)', iconColor: '#34d399', items: staffRes.map(s => ({ id: s.id, title: s.fullName, sub: s.role + ' · ' + s.department, meta: s.username, actionFn: () => _searchNavigateTo('staff', openStaffDrawer, s.id) })) });

  // Branches
  const branchRes = DB.branches.filter(b => norm(b.name).includes(q) || norm(b.code).includes(q)).slice(0, limit);
  if (branchRes.length) results.push({ category: 'Branches', icon: 'building', iconBg: 'rgba(251,191,36,.12)', iconColor: '#fbbf24', items: branchRes.map(b => ({ id: b.id, title: b.name, sub: b.code + ' · ' + (b.region||''), meta: b.status || 'ACTIVE', actionFn: () => _searchNavigateTo('settings') })) });

  // Audit Logs
  const auditRes = (DB.auditLogs || []).filter(e => norm(e.action||'').includes(q) || norm(e.entityType||'').includes(q) || norm(e.entityId||'').includes(q) || norm(e.details||'').includes(q)).slice(0, limit);
  if (auditRes.length) results.push({ category: 'Audit Logs', icon: 'file-search', iconBg: 'rgba(244,114,182,.12)', iconColor: '#f472b6', items: auditRes.map(e => ({ id: e.id, title: e.action, sub: (e.entityType||'') + ' · ' + (e.entityId||''), meta: shortDate(e.timestamp), actionFn: () => _searchNavigateTo('audit') })) });

  // Settings
  const settRes = DB.settings.filter(s => norm(s.name).includes(q) || norm(s.key).includes(q) || norm(s.value).includes(q)).slice(0, limit);
  if (settRes.length) results.push({ category: 'Settings', icon: 'settings', iconBg: 'rgba(148,163,184,.12)', iconColor: '#94a3b8', items: settRes.map(s => ({ id: s.key, title: s.name, sub: s.key + ' = ' + s.value, meta: s.category || '', actionFn: () => _searchNavigateTo('settings') })) });

  // Policies
  const polRes = (DB.policies || []).filter(p => norm(p.name||'').includes(q) || norm(p.type||'').includes(q)).slice(0, limit);
  if (polRes.length) results.push({ category: 'Policies', icon: 'scroll-text', iconBg: 'rgba(129,140,248,.12)', iconColor: '#818cf8', items: polRes.map(p => ({ id: p.id, title: p.name || 'Policy', sub: (p.type||'') + ' · ' + (p.description||'').slice(0,60), meta: p.status || 'ACTIVE', actionFn: () => _searchNavigateTo('settings') })) });

  // Expenses
  const expRes = DB.expenses.filter(e => norm(e.category||'').includes(q) || norm(e.vendor||'').includes(q) || norm(e.description||'').includes(q)).slice(0, limit);
  if (expRes.length) results.push({ category: 'Expenses', icon: 'receipt', iconBg: 'rgba(251,113,133,.12)', iconColor: '#fb7185', items: expRes.map(e => ({ id: e.id, title: e.vendor || e.category, sub: e.description ? e.description.slice(0,60) : e.category, meta: money(e.amount) + ' · ' + (e.status||''), actionFn: () => _searchNavigateTo('expenses') })) });

  // Operating Fund Transactions
  const opTxnRes = (DB.operatingFund && DB.operatingFund.transactions || []).filter(t => norm(t.ref||'').includes(q) || norm(t.description||'').includes(q)).slice(0, limit);
  if (opTxnRes.length) results.push({ category: 'Operating Fund', icon: 'building-2', iconBg: 'rgba(45,212,191,.12)', iconColor: '#2dd4bf', items: opTxnRes.map(t => ({ id: t.id, title: t.ref, sub: t.description, meta: money(t.amount) + ' · ' + (t.type||''), actionFn: () => _searchNavigateTo('settings') })) });

  // Amount search (if query is numeric)
  const numQ = parseFloat(q);
  if (!isNaN(numQ) && numQ > 0) {
    const amtTxn = DB.transactions.filter(t => t.amount === numQ).slice(0, 5);
    if (amtTxn.length) results.push({ category: 'Amount Match ($' + numQ.toLocaleString() + ')', icon: 'coins', iconBg: 'var(--success-dim)', iconColor: 'var(--success)', items: amtTxn.map(t => ({ id: t.id, title: t.ref, sub: t.customerName + ' · ' + t.direction, meta: money(t.amount) + ' · ' + shortDate(t.timestamp), actionFn: () => _searchNavigateTo('transactions') })) });
  }

  // Prioritize by smart prefix
  let orderedResults = results;
  if (upperQ.startsWith('CUST-')) orderedResults.sort((a,b) => a.category==='Customers'?-1:b.category==='Customers'?1:0);
  else if (upperQ.startsWith('ACC-')) orderedResults.sort((a,b) => a.category==='Accounts'?-1:b.category==='Accounts'?1:0);
  else if (upperQ.startsWith('TXN-')) orderedResults.sort((a,b) => a.category==='Transactions'?-1:b.category==='Transactions'?1:0);
  else if (upperQ.startsWith('LOAN-')) orderedResults.sort((a,b) => a.category==='Loans'?-1:b.category==='Loans'?1:0);
  else if (upperQ.startsWith('DOC-')) orderedResults.sort((a,b) => a.category==='Documents'?-1:b.category==='Documents'?1:0);
  else if (upperQ.startsWith('LA-')) orderedResults.sort((a,b) => a.category==='Loan Applications'?-1:b.category==='Loan Applications'?1:0);

  const totalItems = orderedResults.reduce((s,r) => s + r.items.length, 0);
  STATE.searchActiveIndex = -1;
  STATE._flatResults = [];
  STATE._actionFns = [];

  if (totalItems === 0) {
    $('searchResultsArea').innerHTML = '<div class="search-empty"><div class="se-icon">'+IC("search-x", 28)+'</div><div style="font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:6px">No results found</div><div style="font-size:.88rem">Try a different search term or check the spelling.</div></div>';
    return;
  }

  let html = '';
  orderedResults.forEach(cat => {
    html += `<div class="search-category">`;
    html += `<div class="search-category-header">${IC(cat.icon, 22)} ${cat.category} <span class="search-category-count">${cat.items.length}</span></div>`;
    cat.items.forEach(item => {
      const flatIdx = STATE._flatResults.length;
      item.__fnIdx = flatIdx;
      STATE._flatResults.push(item);
      STATE._actionFns[flatIdx] = item.actionFn || (() => dispatchSearchAction(item.action));
      html += `<div class="search-result-item" data-idx="${flatIdx}">`;
      html += `<div class="search-result-icon" style="background:${cat.iconBg};color:${cat.iconColor}">${IC(cat.icon, 22)}</div>`;
      html += `<div class="search-result-body"><div class="search-result-title">${highlightMatch(item.title, q)}</div><div class="search-result-sub">${highlightMatch(item.sub, q)}</div></div>`;
      html += `<div class="search-result-meta">${item.meta}</div>`;
      html += `</div>`;
    });
    html += `</div>`;
  });

  $('searchResultsArea').innerHTML = html;
  /* Event delegation for search results — replaces inline onclick */
  $('searchResultsArea').querySelectorAll('.search-result-item').forEach(el => {
    el.addEventListener('click', function() {
      const idx = parseInt(this.dataset.idx);
      if (STATE._actionFns[idx]) STATE._actionFns[idx]();
    });
  });
}

function performGlobalSearch() {
  const q = $('globalSearch')?.value || '';
  if (!q || norm(q).length < 2) return;
  openSearchOverlay();
  $('searchOverlayInput').value = q;
  executeSearch(q);
}

/* === FEATURE: Profile Picture Upload === */

/** Set an avatar element — uses background-image (never child <img>) */
function setAvatarImage(avatarEl, imgSrc, initials) {
  if (!avatarEl) return;
  if (imgSrc && imgSrc.length > 50) {
    avatarEl.style.backgroundImage = 'url(' + imgSrc + ')';
    avatarEl.style.backgroundSize = 'cover';
    avatarEl.style.backgroundPosition = 'center';
    avatarEl.textContent = '';
  } else {
    avatarEl.style.backgroundImage = 'none';
    avatarEl.style.backgroundSize = '';
    avatarEl.style.backgroundPosition = '';
    avatarEl.textContent = initials || '?';
  }
}

/** Set the profile modal avatar — uses background-image on the single div element */
function setProfileModalAvatar(profilePicture, initials) {
  const avatarEl = $('profAvatar');
  const removeEl = $('profRemovePic');
  if (!avatarEl) return;
  if (profilePicture && profilePicture.length > 50) {
    avatarEl.style.backgroundImage = 'url(' + profilePicture + ')';
    avatarEl.style.backgroundSize = 'cover';
    avatarEl.style.backgroundPosition = 'center';
    avatarEl.textContent = '';
    if (removeEl) removeEl.style.display = 'block';
  } else {
    avatarEl.style.backgroundImage = 'none';
    avatarEl.style.background = 'linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary),var(--accent))';
    avatarEl.style.backgroundSize = '';
    avatarEl.style.backgroundPosition = '';
    avatarEl.textContent = initials || '?';
    if (removeEl) removeEl.style.display = 'none';
  }
}

/** Handle profile picture file upload from the profile modal */
async function handleProfilePictureUpload(event) {
  const file = event.target.files[0];
  if (!file) return;

  // Validate file type
  if (!['image/jpeg','image/png','image/gif','image/webp'].includes(file.type)) {
    showToast('error', 'Invalid File', 'Only JPG, PNG, GIF, and WebP images are allowed.');
    event.target.value = ''; // Reset file input
    return;
  }
  // Validate file size (max 2MB)
  if (file.size > 2 * 1024 * 1024) {
    showToast('error', 'File Too Large', 'Profile picture must be under 2MB.');
    event.target.value = '';
    return;
  }

  // Read as base64
  const reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = async function(e) {
    const base64 = e.target.result;
    // Immediately update the preview using background-image on the avatar div
    const avatarEl = $('profAvatar');
    if (avatarEl) {
      avatarEl.style.backgroundImage = 'url(' + base64 + ')';
      avatarEl.style.backgroundSize = 'cover';
      avatarEl.style.backgroundPosition = 'center';
      avatarEl.textContent = '';
    }
    if ($('profRemovePic')) $('profRemovePic').style.display = 'block';

    // Save to server
    const id = $('profId')?.value;
    if (!id) { showToast('error', 'Error', 'Staff ID not found.'); return; }

    try {
      await API.put('staff/' + id, { profile_picture: base64 });
      // Update local caches
      if (STATE.currentUser) STATE.currentUser.profilePicture = base64;
      const idx = DB.staff.findIndex(x => x.id === Number(id));
      if (idx >= 0) DB.staff[idx].profilePicture = base64;
      // Update header/dropdown avatars
      const initials = STATE.currentUser?.initials || '';
      setAvatarImage($('headerAvatar'), base64, initials);
      setAvatarImage($('udAvatar'), base64, initials);
      addAuditEntry('PROFILE_PICTURE_UPLOAD', 'Staff', STATE.currentUser?.username, 'Profile picture uploaded by ' + STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
      showToast('success', 'Photo Updated', 'Your profile picture has been saved.');
    } catch (err) {
      showToast('error', 'Upload Failed', 'Could not save profile picture: ' + (err?.message || 'Unknown'));
      // Revert preview to initials
      const avatarEl = $('profAvatar');
      if (avatarEl) {
        avatarEl.style.backgroundImage = 'none';
        avatarEl.style.background = 'linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary),var(--accent))';
        avatarEl.style.backgroundSize = '';
        avatarEl.style.backgroundPosition = '';
        avatarEl.textContent = STATE.currentUser?.initials || '?';
      }
      if ($('profRemovePic')) $('profRemovePic').style.display = 'none';
    }
  };
  reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  // Reset the file input so the same file can be re-selected
  event.target.value = '';
}

/** Remove profile picture — sends null to server to clear it */
async function handleRemoveProfilePicture(event) {
  event.preventDefault();
  event.stopPropagation();
  const id = $('profId')?.value;
  if (!id) return;

  showConfirm('Remove Photo', 'Are you sure you want to remove your profile picture?', async () => {
    try {
      await API.put('staff/' + id, { profile_picture: null });
      if (STATE.currentUser) STATE.currentUser.profilePicture = null;
      const idx = DB.staff.findIndex(x => x.id === Number(id));
      if (idx >= 0) DB.staff[idx].profilePicture = null;
      // Update all avatar locations back to initials
      const initials = STATE.currentUser?.initials || '?';
      setProfileModalAvatar(null, initials);
      setAvatarImage($('headerAvatar'), null, initials);
      setAvatarImage($('udAvatar'), null, initials);
      addAuditEntry('PROFILE_PICTURE_REMOVE', 'Staff', STATE.currentUser?.username, 'Profile picture removed by ' + STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
      showToast('success', 'Photo Removed', 'Your profile picture has been removed.');
    } catch (err) {
      showToast('error', 'Error', 'Could not remove profile picture: ' + (err?.message || 'Unknown'));
    }
  });
}

/* === FEATURE 10: Profile Modal — 100% Database-Driven === */
/** Switch profile modal tabs — enterprise tab navigation */
function switchProfileTab(tab, btn) {
  // Hide all tabs
  ['profTabProfile','profTabSecurity','profTabSessions','profTabActivity'].forEach(id => {
    const el = $(id);
    if (el) el.style.display = 'none';
  });
  // Reset all tab button styles
  document.querySelectorAll('.prof-tab').forEach(b => {
    b.style.color = 'var(--muted)';
    b.style.borderBottom = 'none';
  });
  // Show selected tab
  const tabMap = { profile:'profTabProfile', security:'profTabSecurity', sessions:'profTabSessions', activity:'profTabActivity' };
  const tabEl = $(tabMap[tab]);
  if (tabEl) tabEl.style.display = 'block';
  if (btn) { btn.style.color = 'var(--primary)'; btn.style.borderBottom = '2px solid var(--primary)'; }
  // Lazy-load tab data
  if (tab === 'sessions') loadProfileSessions();
  if (tab === 'activity') { loadProfileActivity(); loadProfileLoginHistory(); }
}

async function openProfileModal(activeTab) {
  const u = STATE.currentUser;
  if (!u) return;
  closeUserMenu();

  // Try to load fresh profile from database using staff/me endpoint
  try {
    const res = await API.get('staff/me');
    if (res?.data) {
      const d = res.data;
      $('profId').value = d.id || '';
      $('profName').value = d.full_name || '';
      $('profUsername').textContent = d.username || '';
      $('profLimit').textContent = money(parseFloat(d.approval_limit || 0));
      $('profMfa').innerHTML = d.mfa_required ? IC('check-circle',14)+' Enabled' : IC('x-circle',14)+' Disabled';
      $('profLastLogin').textContent = d.last_login ? dateFmt(d.last_login) : 'Never';
      $('profLastIp').textContent = d.last_login_ip || '—';
      $('profLockStatus').innerHTML = d.account_locked ? '<span style="color:var(--danger);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px">' + IC('lock', 14) + ' Locked</span>' : '<span style="color:var(--success);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px">' + IC('check-circle', 14) + ' Active</span>';
      $('profFailedAttempts').textContent = d.failed_login_attempts || 0;
      $('profEmail').value = d.email || '';
      $('profPhone').value = d.phone || '';
      $('profPosition').value = d.position || '';

      // Timezone & notifications
      const tzSel = $('profTimezone');
      if (tzSel) tzSel.value = d.timezone || 'Africa/Douala';
      const notifCb = $('profNotifications');
      if (notifCb) notifCb.checked = d.notifications_enabled != 0;

      // Profile completeness calculation
      calcProfileCompleteness(d);

      // Security summary enhancements
      const ipEl = $('profSecIpRestrictions');
      if (ipEl) ipEl.textContent = d.ip_restrictions || 'Any';
      const pwEl = $('profSecPwChanged');
      if (pwEl) pwEl.textContent = d.password_changed_at ? shortDate(d.password_changed_at) : 'Never';

      // Avatar banner
      const initials = d.initials || (d.full_name || '').split(' ').map(w=>w[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0,2);
      setProfileModalAvatar(d.profile_picture, initials);
      $('profDisplayName').textContent = d.full_name || '—';
      $('profDisplayRole').textContent = d.role || '—';
      $('profDisplayDept').textContent = d.department || '—';
      $('profDisplayBranch').textContent = (d.branches || []).join(' · ') || '—';
      $('profStatusBadge').innerHTML = '<span class="pill ' + pillCls(d.employment_status || 'ACTIVE') + '">' + (d.employment_status || 'ACTIVE') + '</span>';

      // Employee ID
      $('profEmpId').textContent = 'EMP-' + String(d.id || '').padStart(4, '0');
      $('profCreated').textContent = d.created_at ? shortDate(d.created_at) : '—';
      $('profUpdated').textContent = d.updated_at ? shortDate(d.updated_at) : '—';

      // MFA section
      $('profMfaLabel').textContent = 'MFA Status: ' + (d.mfa_required ? 'Enabled' : 'Disabled');
      $('profMfaDesc').textContent = d.mfa_required
        ? 'Two-factor authentication is active on your account. Contact your administrator to disable it.'
        : 'Two-factor authentication is not enabled. Contact your administrator to enable it for enhanced security.';
      $('profMfaBadge').textContent = d.mfa_required ? 'Enabled' : 'Disabled';
      $('profMfaBadge').className = 'pill ' + (d.mfa_required ? 'pill-approved' : 'pill-pending');

      // Security summary
      $('profSecFailedAttempts').textContent = d.failed_login_attempts || 0;

      // Force password change banner
      $('profForceBanner').style.display = d.force_password_change ? 'block' : 'none';
    } else {
      throw new Error('API returned no data');
    }
  } catch (err) {
    // Fallback to STATE.currentUser + DB.staff
    console.warn('[Profile] API fetch failed, using local cache:', err);
    const localStaff = DB.staff.find(x => x.id === (u.id || u.staff_id));
    const src = localStaff || u;
    $('profId').value = src.id || src.staff_id || '';
    $('profName').value = src.fullName || src.full_name || '';
    $('profUsername').textContent = src.username || '';
    $('profLimit').textContent = money(parseFloat(src.approvalLimit || 0));
    $('profMfa').innerHTML = (src.mfaRequired || src.mfa_required) ? IC('check-circle',14)+' Enabled' : IC('x-circle',14)+' Disabled';
    $('profLastLogin').textContent = src.lastLogin || src.last_login ? dateFmt(src.lastLogin || src.last_login) : 'Never';
    $('profLastIp').textContent = src.last_login_ip || src.lastLoginIp || '—';
    $('profLockStatus').innerHTML = IC('check-circle',14)+' Active';
    $('profFailedAttempts').textContent = 0;
    $('profSecFailedAttempts').textContent = 0;
    $('profEmail').value = src.email || '';
    $('profPhone').value = src.phone || '';
    $('profPosition').value = src.position || '';
    $('profForceBanner').style.display = 'none';

    // Timezone & notifications fallback
    const tzSel = $('profTimezone');
    if (tzSel) tzSel.value = 'Africa/Douala';
    const notifCb = $('profNotifications');
    if (notifCb) notifCb.checked = true;
    calcProfileCompleteness(src);

    const initials = (src.fullName || src.full_name || '').split(' ').map(w=>w[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0,2);
    setProfileModalAvatar(src.profilePicture || null, initials);
    $('profDisplayName').textContent = src.fullName || src.full_name || '—';
    $('profDisplayRole').textContent = src.role || '—';
    $('profDisplayDept').textContent = src.department || '—';
    $('profDisplayBranch').textContent = (src.branches || []).join(' · ') || '—';
    $('profStatusBadge').innerHTML = '<span class="pill pill-active">' + (src.employmentStatus || 'ACTIVE') + '</span>';
    $('profEmpId').textContent = 'EMP-' + String(src.id || '').padStart(4, '0');
    $('profCreated').textContent = '—';
    $('profUpdated').textContent = '—';
    $('profMfaLabel').textContent = 'MFA Status: ' + ((src.mfaRequired || src.mfa_required) ? 'Enabled' : 'Disabled');
    $('profMfaBadge').textContent = (src.mfaRequired || src.mfa_required) ? 'Enabled' : 'Disabled';
  }

  $('profCurrentPass').value = '';
  $('profNewPass').value = '';
  $('profConfirmPass').value = '';
  $('profPwStrength').innerHTML = '';
  $('profPwChecks').innerHTML = '';
  $('profPwMatch').innerHTML = '';

  openModal('profileModal');

  // Switch to the requested tab
  switchProfileTab(activeTab || 'profile', document.querySelector('.prof-tab'));
}

/** Calculate and display profile completeness percentage */
function calcProfileCompleteness(d) {
  const fields = [
    !!(d.full_name || d.fullName),       // Name
    !!(d.email),                          // Email
    !!(d.phone),                          // Phone
    !!(d.position),                       // Position
    !!(d.timezone && d.timezone !== 'Africa/Douala'), // Timezone (bonus if customized)
    !!(d.profile_picture && d.profile_picture.length > 50), // Profile picture
    true,                                  // Username (always set)
  ];
  const filled = fields.filter(Boolean).length;
  const pct = Math.round((filled / fields.length) * 100);
  const barEl = $('profCompletenessBar');
  const pctEl = $('profCompletenessPct');
  if (barEl) barEl.style.width = pct + '%';
  if (pctEl) pctEl.textContent = pct + '%';
  if (barEl) barEl.style.background = pct >= 80 ? 'linear-gradient(90deg,#67e8b5,#3b82f6)' :
    pct >= 50 ? 'linear-gradient(90deg,#f59e0b,#3b82f6)' : 'linear-gradient(90deg,#ef4444,#f59e0b)';
}

/** Parse browser/device info from user agent string */
function parseUserAgent(ua) {
  if (!ua) return { browser: 'Unknown', os: 'Unknown', icon: 'monitor' };
  let browser = 'Unknown', os = 'Unknown', icon = 'monitor';
  // Browser
  if (ua.includes('Edg/')) { browser = 'Edge'; icon = 'globe'; }
  else if (ua.includes('Chrome/')) { browser = 'Chrome'; icon = 'globe'; }
  else if (ua.includes('Firefox/')) { browser = 'Firefox'; icon = 'compass'; }
  else if (ua.includes('Safari/') && !ua.includes('Chrome')) { browser = 'Safari'; icon = 'compass'; }
  else if (ua.includes('Opera') || ua.includes('OPR/')) { browser = 'Opera'; icon = 'circle'; }
  // OS
  if (ua.includes('Windows')) os = 'Windows';
  else if (ua.includes('Mac OS')) os = 'macOS';
  else if (ua.includes('Linux')) os = 'Linux';
  else if (ua.includes('Android')) { os = 'Android'; icon = 'smartphone'; }
  else if (ua.includes('iPhone') || ua.includes('iPad')) { os = 'iOS'; icon = 'smartphone'; }
  return { browser, os, icon };
}

/** Revoke a single specific session — 100% database driven */
async function revokeSingleSession(sessionId) {
  try {
    await API.del('staff/me/sessions?session_id=' + encodeURIComponent(sessionId));
    showToast('success', 'Session Revoked', 'The selected session has been terminated.');
    loadProfileSessions();
  } catch (err) {
    showToast('error', 'Error', 'Failed to revoke session: ' + (err?.message || 'Unknown'));
  }
}

/** Export activity log to CSV — downloads a file */
function exportActivityCSV() {
  const el = $('profActivityLog');
  if (!el) return;
  const rows = el.querySelectorAll('div[data-action]');
  if (!rows.length) { showToast('info', 'Export', 'No activity data to export.'); return; }
  let csv = 'Timestamp,Action,Entity,Details,IP,Result\n';
  rows.forEach(row => {
    csv += [
      '"' + (row.dataset.timestamp || '') + '"',
      '"' + (row.dataset.action || '') + '"',
      '"' + (row.dataset.entity || '') + '"',
      '"' + (row.dataset.details || '').replace(/"/g, '""') + '"',
      '"' + (row.dataset.ip || '') + '"',
      '"' + (row.dataset.result || '') + '"'
    ].join(',') + '\n';
  });
  const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url; a.download = 'atlas_activity_' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10) + '.csv';
  document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); document.body.removeChild(a);
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  showToast('success', 'Export Complete', 'Activity log exported as CSV.');
}

/** Load active sessions for the Sessions tab — 100% database driven */
async function loadProfileSessions() {
  const el = $('profSessionInfo');
  if (!el) return;
  try {
    const res = await API.get('staff/me/sessions');
    if (res?.data && res.data.length > 0) {
      el.innerHTML = res.data.map(function(s) {
        const isCurrent = s.is_current;
        const ua = s.user_agent || 'Unknown';
        const parsed = parseUserAgent(ua);
        const border = isCurrent ? 'border:1px solid rgba(103,232,181,.3);background:rgba(103,232,181,.04)' : 'border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--bg-dim)';
        const isExpired = s.expires_at && new Date(s.expires_at) < new Date();
        return '<div style="padding:12px;border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:8px;' + border + '">' +
          '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px">' +
            '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">' +
              IC(parsed.icon, 20) +
              '<span style="font-weight:600;font-size:.84rem">' + (isCurrent ? IC('map-pin', 16) + ' Current Session' : IC('laptop', 16) + ' Remote Device') + '</span>' +
            '</div>' +
            '<div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center">' +
              (isCurrent ? '<span class="pill pill-approved" style="font-size:.68rem">Active</span>' :
                (isExpired ? '<span class="pill pill-pending" style="font-size:.68rem">Expired</span>' :
                '<button class="btn btn-sm btn-warn" style="font-size:.72rem;padding:2px 8px" onclick="revokeSingleSession(\'' + (s.id || '') + '\')">Revoke</button>')) +
            '</div>' +
          '</div>' +
          '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4px;font-size:.78rem">' +
            '<div><span style="color:var(--muted)">IP:</span> <span class="td-mono">' + escHtml(s.ip_address || '—') + '</span></div>' +
            '<div><span style="color:var(--muted)">Browser:</span> ' + escHtml(parsed.browser) + '</div>' +
            '<div><span style="color:var(--muted)">OS:</span> ' + escHtml(parsed.os) + '</div>' +
            '<div><span style="color:var(--muted)">Created:</span> ' + (s.created_at ? shortDate(s.created_at) : '—') + '</div>' +
            '<div style="grid-column:1/-1"><span style="color:var(--muted)">Expires:</span> ' + (s.expires_at ? dateFmt(s.expires_at) : '—') + '</div>' +
          '</div></div>';
      }).join('');
      // Update security summary
      const activeCount = res.data.length;
      const secEl = $('profSecActiveSessions');
      if (secEl) secEl.textContent = activeCount;
    } else {
      el.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--muted)"><p>No active sessions found.</p></div>';
      const secEl = $('profSecActiveSessions');
      if (secEl) secEl.textContent = '0';
    }
  } catch (err) {
    el.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--muted);font-style:italic">Could not load sessions.</div>';
  }
}

/** Revoke all other active sessions — database driven */
async function revokeOtherSessions() {
  showConfirm('Revoke Other Sessions', 'This will immediately terminate all other active sessions. Any other devices using your account will be signed out. Continue?', async function() {
    try {
      const res = await API.put('staff/me/sessions');
      if (res?.data) {
        showToast('success', 'Sessions Revoked', res.data.revoked + ' other session(s) terminated.');
        loadProfileSessions();
      } else {
        showToast('info', 'Sessions', 'No other sessions to revoke.');
      }
    } catch (err) {
      showToast('error', 'Error', 'Failed to revoke sessions: ' + (err?.message || 'Unknown'));
    }
  });
}

/** Load own audit trail — 100% database driven via GET staff/me/activity */
async function loadProfileActivity(offset) {
  const el = $('profActivityLog');
  if (!el) return;
  const offsetVal = offset || 0;
  const filter = $('profActivityFilter')?.value || '';
  const dateFrom = $('profActivityFrom')?.value || '';
  const dateTo = $('profActivityTo')?.value || '';

  try {
    const params = { limit: 20, offset: offsetVal };
    if (filter) params.action = filter;
    if (dateFrom) params.date_from = dateFrom;
    if (dateTo) params.date_to = dateTo;
    const res = await API.get('staff/me/activity', params);
    if (res?.data && res.data.items && res.data.items.length > 0) {
      el.innerHTML = res.data.items.map(function(entry) {
        const isOk = (entry.result || '') === 'SUCCESS';
        const dotColor = isOk ? 'var(--success)' : 'var(--danger)';
        const iconName = (entry.action || '').startsWith('LOGIN') ? 'log-in' :
                     (entry.action || '').startsWith('LOGOUT') ? 'log-out' :
                     (entry.action || '').startsWith('PASSWORD') ? 'key-round' :
                     (entry.action || '').startsWith('PROFILE') ? 'user' :
                     (entry.action || '').startsWith('TRANSFER') ? 'send' :
                     (entry.action || '').startsWith('LOAN') ? 'landmark' :
                     (entry.action || '').startsWith('SESSION') ? 'monitor' :
                     (entry.action || '').startsWith('APPROVAL') ? 'check-circle' : 'file-pen';
        const cat = entry.category || classifyAuditCategory(entry.action);
        const mod = entry.module || classifyModule(entry.action);
        return '<div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)"' +
          ' data-action="' + (entry.action || '') + '"' +
          ' data-entity="' + (entry.entity || '') + '"' +
          ' data-details="' + (entry.details || '').replace(/"/g, '&quot;') + '"' +
          ' data-ip="' + (entry.ip || '') + '"' +
          ' data-result="' + (entry.result || '') + '"' +
          ' data-timestamp="' + (entry.created_at || '') + '">' +
          IC(iconName, 20) +
          '<div style="flex:1;min-width:0">' +
            '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap">' +
              '<span style="font-weight:600;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--text2)">' + (entry.action || '—') + '</span>' +
              '<span style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted);white-space:nowrap">' + (entry.created_at ? shortDate(entry.created_at) : '—') + '</span>' +
            '</div>' +
            '<div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;margin-top:3px;flex-wrap:wrap">' +
              auditCategoryBadge(cat) +
              '<span style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);background:var(--line);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px">' + mod + '</span>' +
            '</div>' +
            '<div style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px">' +
              (entry.entity ? (entry.entity + (entry.entity_id ? ' #' + entry.entity_id : '')) : '') +
              (entry.ip ? ' · IP: ' + entry.ip : '') +
            '</div>' +
            (entry.details ? '<div style="font-size:.74rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;font-style:italic">' + (entry.details.length > 80 ? entry.details.substring(0,80) + '...' : entry.details) + '</div>' : '') +
          '</div>' +
          '<div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:' + dotColor + ';margin-top:8px;flex-shrink:0"></div>' +
          '</div>';
      }).join('');

      // Pagination
      const total = res.data.total || 0;
      const pgEl = $('profActivityPagination');
      if (pgEl && total > 20) {
        const pages = Math.ceil(total / 20);
        const curPage = Math.floor(offsetVal / 20) + 1;
        let html = '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:4px;font-size:.78rem">';
        if (offsetVal > 0) html += '<button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="loadProfileActivity(' + (offsetVal-20) + ')">Prev</button>';
        html += '<span style="padding:4px 10px;color:var(--muted)">Page ' + curPage + ' of ' + pages + ' (' + total + ' entries)</span>';
        if (offsetVal + 20 < total) html += '<button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="loadProfileActivity(' + (offsetVal+20) + ')">Next</button>';
        html += '</div>';
        pgEl.innerHTML = html;
      } else if (pgEl) {
        pgEl.innerHTML = '';
      }
    } else {
      el.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--muted)"><p>No activity found.</p></div>';
      const pgEl = $('profActivityPagination');
      if (pgEl) pgEl.innerHTML = '';
    }
  } catch (err) {
    el.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:12px;text-align:center;color:var(--muted)">Could not load activity from server.</div>';
  }
}

/** Load login history for the profile modal — database driven */
async function loadProfileLoginHistory() {
  const el = $('profLoginHistory');
  if (!el) return;
  try {
    const res = await API.get('staff/me/login-history', { limit: 15 });
    if (res?.data && res.data.items && res.data.items.length > 0) {
      el.innerHTML = res.data.items.map(function(entry) {
        const isOk = entry.result === 'SUCCESS';
        const isLocked = entry.result === 'LOCKED';
        const dotColor = isOk ? 'var(--success)' : isLocked ? 'var(--danger)' : 'var(--warn)';
        const label = isOk ? 'Success' : isLocked ? 'Locked' : entry.result || 'Failure';
        const riskBadge = entry.risk && entry.risk !== 'NONE' ?
          '<span style="font-size:.66rem;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;background:' +
          (entry.risk === 'CRITICAL' ? 'rgba(239,68,68,.15);color:#ef4444' :
           entry.risk === 'HIGH' ? 'rgba(245,158,11,.15);color:#f59e0b' :
           entry.risk === 'MEDIUM' ? 'rgba(59,130,246,.15);color:#3b82f6' :
           'rgba(107,114,128,.15);color:var(--muted)') + '">' + entry.risk + '</span>' : '';
        return '<div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)">' +
          '<div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:' + dotColor + ';margin-top:5px;flex-shrink:0"></div>' +
          '<div style="flex:1;min-width:0">' +
            '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">' +
              '<span style="font-weight:500;color:var(--text2)">' + label + '</span>' +
              '<span style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted);white-space:nowrap">' + (entry.created_at ? dateFmt(entry.created_at) : '—') + '</span>' +
            '</div>' +
            '<div style="font-size:.74rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px">IP: ' + (entry.ip || '—') + ' ' + riskBadge + '</div>' +
          '</div></div>';
      }).join('');
    } else {
      el.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--muted);font-style:italic">No login history found.</div>';
    }
  } catch (err) {
    el.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--muted);font-style:italic">Could not load login history.</div>';
  }
}

/** Save profile changes — calls PUT staff/me endpoint */
async function handleSaveProfile(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const id = $('profId').value;
  if (!id) { showToast('error', 'Error', 'Staff ID not found.'); return false; }

  const payload = {
    full_name: $('profName').value.trim(),
    email: $('profEmail').value.trim(),
    phone: $('profPhone').value.trim(),
    position: $('profPosition').value.trim(),
    timezone: ($('profTimezone')?.value || 'Africa/Douala'),
    notifications_enabled: ($('profNotifications')?.checked) ? 1 : 0
  };

  if (!payload.full_name) { showToast('error', 'Validation Error', 'Full name is required.'); return false; }

  try {
    const res = await API.put('staff/' + id, payload);
    if (!res && res !== null) {
      showToast('error', 'Error', 'Failed to save profile on server.');
      return false;
    }

    // Update STATE.currentUser
    if (STATE.currentUser) {
      STATE.currentUser.fullName = payload.full_name;
      STATE.currentUser.email = payload.email;
      STATE.currentUser.phone = payload.phone;
      STATE.currentUser.position = payload.position;
      // Update header display
      $('headerName').textContent = payload.full_name;
      $('udName').textContent = payload.full_name;
    }

    // Update local DB.staff cache
    const idx = DB.staff.findIndex(x => x.id === Number(id));
    if (idx >= 0) {
      DB.staff[idx].fullName = payload.full_name;
      DB.staff[idx].email = payload.email;
      DB.staff[idx].phone = payload.phone;
      DB.staff[idx].position = payload.position;
    }

    addAuditEntry('PROFILE_UPDATE', 'Staff', STATE.currentUser?.username, 'Profile updated by ' + STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
    showToast('success', 'Profile Saved', 'Your profile has been updated in the database.');
  } catch (err) {
    showToast('error', 'Error', 'Failed to save profile: ' + (err?.message || 'Unknown'));
  }
  return false;
}

/** Change own password — verifies current password against server */
async function handleChangePassword(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const currentPass = $('profCurrentPass').value;
  const newPass = $('profNewPass').value;
  const confirmPass = $('profConfirmPass').value;

  if (newPass.length < 8) { showToast('error', 'Password Error', 'New password must be at least 8 characters.'); return false; }
  const pwErr = validatePasswordComplexity(newPass);
  if (pwErr) { showToast('error', 'Password Policy', pwErr); return false; }
  if (newPass !== confirmPass) { showToast('error', 'Password Error', 'New passwords do not match.'); return false; }
  if (!currentPass) { showToast('error', 'Password Error', 'Current password is required.'); return false; }

  const id = $('profId').value;
  if (!id) { showToast('error', 'Error', 'Staff ID not found.'); return false; }

  try {
    const res = await API.put('staff/me/password', {
      current_password: currentPass,
      new_password: newPass
    });
    if (!res && res !== null) {
      showToast('error', 'Password Error', 'Failed to change password. Verify your current password is correct.');
      return false;
    }
    addAuditEntry('PASSWORD_CHANGE', 'Staff', STATE.currentUser?.username, 'Password changed by ' + STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
    showToast('success', 'Password Updated', 'Your password has been changed successfully.');
    $('profCurrentPass').value = '';
    $('profNewPass').value = '';
    $('profConfirmPass').value = '';
    // Clear the force password change flag — backend already set force_password_change = 0
    STATE._forcePasswordChange = false;
    STATE._passwordChangeModalShown = false; // ★ FIX: Reset guard so future 403s don't suppress legitimately
    // Refresh session data from backend to pick up cleared flag
    try {
      const refreshRes = await API.get('auth');
      if (refreshRes?.data) {
        STATE.currentUser.requiresPasswordChange = false;
      }
    } catch(e) {}
    // Close the modal and refresh the force banner
    $('profForceBanner').style.display = 'none';
    closeModal('profileModal');
    showToast('info', 'Password Changed', 'You may now use all features normally.');
    // ★ FIX: Restart background engines that were skipped during force_password_change state.
    // These are needed for normal operation (auto-repayments, auto-deduction, notification polling).
    processAutoRepayments().catch(() => {});
    startAutoDeductionEngine();
    startNotificationPolling();
  } catch (err) {
    showToast('error', 'Password Error', 'Failed to change password: ' + (err?.message || 'Unknown'));
  }
  return false;
}

/* === FEATURE 11: Loan Restructure === */
function restructureLoan(id) {
  const l = DB.loans.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!l) return;
  // ★ BLOCK: Terminal-status loans cannot be restructured (best practice)
  const blockedStatuses = ['SETTLED','CLOSED','WRITTEN_OFF','DEFAULTED','PENDING','APPROVED'];
  if(blockedStatuses.includes(l.status)) {
    showToast('error','Action Blocked',`A ${l.status} loan cannot be restructured. Only ACTIVE or DELINQUENT loans are eligible for restructuring.`);
    return;
  }
  // ★ BLOCK: Already RESTRUCTURED loans need special handling — prevent duplicate restructure
  if(l.status === 'RESTRUCTURED') {
    showToast('error','Action Blocked',`Loan ${l.loanNumber} has already been restructured. Further restructuring requires admin review.`);
    return;
  }
  showConfirm('Restructure Loan',`This will initiate restructuring for ${l.loanNumber} (${money(l.outstanding)} outstanding). This creates a new approval request.`,(reason)=>{
    const approvalIdx = DB.approvals.length;
    DB.approvals.push({
      id: -Date.now(), entityType:'Loan', entityId:id,
      scopeCode:'loans.restructure', status:'PENDING',
      submittedBy: STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System',
      branch:l.branch, value:`${l.loanNumber} restructure (${money(l.outstanding)})`,
      submittedAt: new Date().toISOString(), decidedBy:null, decidedAt:null, reason:reason||'Restructure request'
    });
    // ★ FIX (APPR-011): Await the API POST instead of fire-and-forget — notify on failure
    (async () => {
      try {
        await refreshCsrfToken();
        const r = await API.post('approvals', {
          entity_type:'Loan', entity_id: id,
          scope_code:'loans.restructure', value: l.loanNumber+' restructure ('+money(l.outstanding)+')',
          branch: l.branch
        });
        if(r?.data?.id) DB.approvals[approvalIdx].id = r.data.id;
      } catch(e) {
        console.warn('[restructureLoan] Backend sync failed:', e);
        showToast('warning', 'Sync Issue', 'The restructure request was created locally but may not have synced to the server. Verify in the Approval panel.');
      }
    })();
    showToast('info','Restructure Requested',`Restructure request for ${l.loanNumber} submitted for approval.`);
    addAuditEntry('LOAN_RESTRUCTURE_REQUEST','Loan',l.loanNumber,`Loan restructure requested by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}`);
    updateBadges();
  }, true);
}

/* ================================================================
   LOAN DISBURSEMENT — Convert approved application → active loan
   ================================================================ */
function openLoanDisburseModal(appId) {
  const la = DB.loanApplications.find(x=>x.id===appId);
  if(!la) return;
  if(la.status!=='APPROVED') { showToast('error','Cannot Disburse','Only approved loan applications can be disbursed.'); return; }
  const accounts = DB.accounts.filter(a=>a.customerId===la.customerId && a.status==='ACTIVE');
  $('ldAppId').value = appId;
  $('ldAppInfo').innerHTML = `
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;font-size:.86rem">
      <div><span style="color:var(--soft)">Reference:</span> <strong>${la.ref}</strong></div>
      <div><span style="color:var(--soft)">Customer:</span> <strong>${la.customerName}</strong></div>
      <div><span style="color:var(--soft)">Amount:</span> <strong>${money(la.amount)}</strong></div>
      <div><span style="color:var(--soft)">Term:</span> <strong>${la.term} months</strong></div>
      ${la.interestRate?`<div><span style="color:var(--soft)">Rate:</span> <strong>${la.interestRate}%</strong></div>`:''}
      <div><span style="color:var(--soft)">Branch:</span> <strong>${la.branch}</strong></div>
    </div>`;
  $('ldCreditAccount').innerHTML = accounts.map(a=>`<option value="${a.id}" ${a.id===la.disbursementAccountId?'selected':''}>${a.accountNumber} — ${a.productType} (${money(a.availableBalance)})</option>`).join('');
  $('ldReference').value = '';
  openModal('loanDisburseModal');
}

async function handleLoanDisburse(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const appId = Number($('ldAppId').value);
  const la = DB.loanApplications.find(x=>x.id===appId);
  if(!la) return false;
  const creditAccountId = Number($('ldCreditAccount').value);
  const creditAccount = DB.accounts.find(a=>a.id===creditAccountId);
  if(!creditAccount) { showToast('error','Error','Please select a valid credit account.'); return false; }
  const interestRate = la.interestRate || Number(DB.settings.find(x=>x.key==='loan.default_interest_rate')?.value || 5.5);
  // ★ FIXED: Pre-flight check — never proceed if loan ID is corrupted (JS safe integer overflow)
  // Corrupted IDs like 9.2233720368548E+18 indicate a data integrity issue that must be resolved first.
  if (la._dbId && !Number.isSafeInteger(la._dbId)) {
    showToast('error', 'Data Error', 'Loan application has a corrupted database ID (' + la._dbId + '). This must be fixed in the database before disbursement. Contact the administrator.');
    return false;
  }
  // Create the loan — ★ FIX (LOAN-002): Use existing loan number if available to prevent collision
  const existingLoanForNumber = la._dbId ? DB.loans.find(l => l.id === la._dbId) : null;
  const loanNumber = (existingLoanForNumber && existingLoanForNumber.loanNumber) ? existingLoanForNumber.loanNumber : ('LN-' + new Date().getFullYear() + '-' + String(DB.loans.length + 1).padStart(3, '0'));
  const now = new Date();
  const maturityDate = new Date(now);
  maturityDate.setMonth(maturityDate.getMonth() + la.term);
  const debitAccountId = la.debitAccountId || creditAccountId;
  const debitAccount = DB.accounts.find(a=>a.id===debitAccountId);
  // Find existing loan (created during application) — must be PENDING or APPROVED (approved via Approval Panel)
  let existingLoan = null;
  if (la._dbId) {
    existingLoan = DB.loans.find(l => l.id === la._dbId && (l.status === 'PENDING' || l.status === 'APPROVED'));
  }
  if (!existingLoan) {
    existingLoan = DB.loans.find(l => l.customerId === la.customerId && l.principal === la.amount && (l.status === 'PENDING' || l.status === 'APPROVED'));
  }
  const newLoan = existingLoan || {
    id: DB.loans.length + 1, loanNumber, customerId: la.customerId,
    customerName: la.customerName, branch: la.branch, status: 'PENDING',
    principal: la.amount, outstanding: la.amount, accruedInterest: 0,
    interestRate, termMonths: la.term, repaymentFreq: 'Monthly',
    disbursedAt: null, maturityDate: null, nextDue: null,
    debitAccountId: creditAccountId, debitAccountNumber: creditAccount.accountNumber,
    source: 'Loan disbursement from ' + la.ref, productType: creditAccount.productType,
    repaymentMode: la.repaymentMode || 'SCHEDULED', repaymentAmount: la.repaymentAmount || 0,
    repaymentPct: la.repaymentPct || 0, autoDeduct: la.autoDeduct !== false,
    interestIncluded: la.interestIncluded !== false,
    loanModule: la.loanModule || 'BANK', insuranceFee: la.insuranceFee || 0
  };
  if (!existingLoan) DB.loans.push(newLoan);
  // Ensure loanModule and insuranceFee are set (from application or current setting)
  newLoan.loanModule = newLoan.loanModule || la.loanModule || getLoanModule();
  newLoan.insuranceFee = newLoan.insuranceFee || la.insuranceFee || 0;
  // ★ Auto-set repayment account to the disbursement credit account
  newLoan.debitAccountId = creditAccountId;
  newLoan.debitAccountNumber = creditAccount.accountNumber;
  // Activate the loan
  newLoan.status = 'ACTIVE';
  newLoan.loanNumber = newLoan.loanNumber || loanNumber;
  newLoan.disbursedAt = now.toISOString();
  newLoan.maturityDate = maturityDate.toISOString();
  newLoan.nextDue = getNextDueDate(now);
  la.status = 'DISBURSED';
  // Remove from loan applications since it's now active
  DB.loanApplications = DB.loanApplications.filter(la2 => la2.id !== la.id);
  // Generate repayment schedule (local only)
  generateLoanSchedule(newLoan);

  /* ★ Sync loan activation to backend (create or update) ★ */
  await refreshCsrfToken();
  if (existingLoan) {
    // Loan already exists in backend — just update status
    await API.put('loans/' + newLoan.id, {
      status: 'ACTIVE', disbursed_at: now.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      maturity_date: maturityDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10), next_due: getNextDueDate(now),
      repayment_mode: newLoan.repaymentMode, repayment_amount: newLoan.repaymentAmount,
      repayment_pct: newLoan.repaymentPct, auto_deduct: newLoan.autoDeduct ? 1 : 0,
      interest_included: newLoan.interestIncluded !== false ? 1 : 0,
      loan_module: newLoan.loanModule || 'BANK',
      insurance_fee: newLoan.insuranceFee || 0,
      debit_account_id: newLoan.debitAccountId,
      debit_account_number: newLoan.debitAccountNumber
    });
  } else {
    // Loan was only local — persist to backend
    const lResult = await API.post('loans', {
      customer_id: newLoan.customerId, customer_name: newLoan.customerName,
      principal: newLoan.principal, interest_rate: newLoan.interestRate,
      term_months: newLoan.termMonths, branch: newLoan.branch,
      product_type: newLoan.productType, debit_account_id: newLoan.debitAccountId,
      debit_account_number: newLoan.debitAccountNumber,
      repayment_mode: newLoan.repaymentMode, repayment_amount: newLoan.repaymentAmount,
      repayment_pct: newLoan.repaymentPct, auto_deduct: newLoan.autoDeduct ? 1 : 0,
      loan_module: newLoan.loanModule || 'BANK',
      insurance_fee: newLoan.insuranceFee || 0
    });
    if (lResult?.id) newLoan.id = lResult.id;
  }

  /* ★★★ DEBIT FUND FIRST — GATE CHECK ★★★
     RESTRUCTURED: The fund debit MUST succeed BEFORE the schedule is persisted to the database.
     Previously, the schedule was synced first (line ~12656), then the fund debit. If the fund debit
     returned 400 (insufficient balance), the installments were already in loan_schedule — orphaned.
     Now: loan status → ACTIVE (backend), then fund debit (gate), then schedule (only on success).
     If the fund debit fails, the schedule has NOT been written — no orphaned entries to clean up.
     The loan status reversion (ACTIVE → APPROVED) is the only backend rollback needed. */
  const insuranceFee = newLoan.insuranceFee || 0;
  const netDisbursement = la.amount - insuranceFee;
  const disburseRef = 'TXN-' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'') + '-' + String(DB.transactions.length + 1).padStart(4,'0');

  const fundSyncResult = await syncLoanFundToDB('BANK-LF-0001', 'DEBIT', la.amount,
    `Loan disbursement — ${loanNumber} to ${creditAccount.accountNumber} (${la.customerName})${insuranceFee > 0 ? ' [CU insurance fee: '+money(insuranceFee)+']' : ''}`,
    newLoan.id, disburseRef);

  if (fundSyncResult === null || fundSyncResult === undefined) {
    // ★ Fund debit FAILED — abort immediately.
    // At this point: loan status = ACTIVE in backend, but schedule NOT synced.
    // Only revert loan status — no schedule cleanup needed.
    console.error('[handleLoanDisburse] Fund debit failed — aborting disbursement for ' + loanNumber);
    showToast('error', 'Insufficient Fund Balance',
      `Cannot disburse ${money(la.amount)} from the Loans & Advances Fund. Insufficient balance. ` +
      `The loan activation has been reverted. Please fund the account before retrying.`);
    // Revert backend loan status to APPROVED (clear disbursed dates)
    if (newLoan.id > 0 && Number.isSafeInteger(newLoan.id)) {
      try { await API.put('loans/' + newLoan.id, { status: 'APPROVED', disbursed_at: null, maturity_date: null, next_due: null }); } catch(e) { console.warn('[Rollback] Failed to revert loan status:', e); }
    }
    // Revert local state
    newLoan.status = 'APPROVED';
    newLoan.disbursedAt = null;
    newLoan.maturityDate = null;
    newLoan.nextDue = null;
    la.status = 'APPROVED';
    DB.loanApplications.push(la);
    DB.loanSchedule = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s => s.loanId !== newLoan.id);
    renderLoans(); renderLoanApplications(); renderLoanFundPanel(); renderAccounts();
    closeModal('loanDisburseModal');
    return false;
  }

  // ★ Fund debit SUCCEEDED — now safe to persist schedule to backend ★
  await syncLoanScheduleToDB(newLoan);

  // Update local fund account state (for UI display)
  DB.loanFundAccount.balance -= la.amount;
  const lfTxn = {
    id: DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.length+1,
    ref: 'LF-'+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'')+'-'+String(DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.length+1).padStart(3,'0'),
    date: now.toISOString().slice(0,10), type:'DEBIT',
    description: `Loan disbursement — ${loanNumber} to ${creditAccount.accountNumber} (${la.customerName})${insuranceFee > 0 ? ' [CU insurance fee: '+money(insuranceFee)+']' : ''}`,
    amount: la.amount, balance: DB.loanFundAccount.balance,
    operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System', timestamp: now.toISOString()
  };
  DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.push(lfTxn);
  // Credit the customer disbursement account (local) — net of insurance fee for CU
  creditAccount.ledgerBalance += netDisbursement;
  creditAccount.availableBalance += netDisbursement;
  // Create disbursement transaction on customer account (local)
  DB.transactions.push({
    id: DB.transactions.length + 1, ref: disburseRef, type: 'LOAN_DISBURSEMENT',
    status: 'POSTED', branch: la.branch, account: creditAccount.accountNumber,
    accountType: creditAccount.productType, customerName: la.customerName,
    description: `Loan disbursement — ${loanNumber} (${la.purpose})`,
    category: 'Loan Disbursement', direction: 'credit', amount: netDisbursement,
    memo: `Approved loan application ${la.ref} disbursed to ${creditAccount.accountNumber}. Fund source: BANK-LF-0001 (Loans & Advances Fund). Rate: ${interestRate}%. Term: ${la.term}mo. Net amount: ${money(netDisbursement)}${insuranceFee > 0 ? '. Insurance fee deducted: '+money(insuranceFee) : ''}. Reference: ${$('ldReference').value||'N/A'}`,
    module: 'Loans', timestamp: now.toISOString()
  });
  /* ★ SERIALIZED: Sync disbursement transaction to backend (updates account balance atomically) ★ */
  await syncTransactionToBackend(DB.transactions[DB.transactions.length - 1]);
  closeModal('loanDisburseModal');
  showToast('success','Loan Disbursed',`${loanNumber} for ${money(la.amount)} disbursed from Loans & Advances Fund to ${creditAccount.accountNumber}.${insuranceFee > 0 ? ' Net credited: '+money(netDisbursement)+' (insurance fee: '+money(insuranceFee)+').' : ' '}Repayment principal returns to Loan Fund; interest to Loan Interest Income.`);
  addAuditEntry('LOAN_DISBURSEMENT','Loan',loanNumber,`Loan ${loanNumber} disbursed by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Amount: ${money(la.amount)}. Net: ${money(netDisbursement)}. Fund source: BANK-LF-0001 (Loans & Advances Fund). Credited to ${creditAccount.accountNumber}. Debit account: ${debitAccount?.accountNumber||'N/A'}. Rate: ${interestRate}%.${insuranceFee > 0 ? ' Insurance fee: '+money(insuranceFee)+'.' : ''} Module: ${newLoan.loanModule || 'BANK'}.`);
  renderLoans();
  renderLoanApplications();
  renderLoanScheduleFilter();
  renderAccounts();
  renderTransactions();
  renderDashboard();
  renderLoanFundPanel();
  return false;
}

function getNextDueDate(fromDate) {
  const next = new Date(fromDate);
  next.setMonth(next.getMonth() + 1);
  return next.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
}

/* ================================================================
   LOAN SCHEDULE GENERATOR — Enterprise-grade amortization engine
   Supports 4 repayment modes with proper declining-balance interest.
   Clears any existing schedule for the loan before generating.
   Persists the generated schedule to the backend database.
   ================================================================ */

function generateLoanSchedule(loan) {
  // ── Clear any existing schedule for this loan (prevent duplicates on re-generation) ──
  DB.loanSchedule = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s => s.loanId !== loan.id);

  if (!loan.disbursedAt) { console.warn('[Schedule] Cannot generate schedule — loan not disbursed.'); return; }
  // ★ FIX (LOAN-012): Determine installment status based on due date vs today.
  // DUE = due date has arrived or passed; UPCOMING = future installment not yet due.
  // Previously ALL entries were created as 'DUE', causing future installments to appear
  // as currently due in the UI and triggering incorrect auto-pay deductions.
  const _today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  function _instStatus(dueDate) { return dueDate <= _today ? 'DUE' : 'UPCOMING'; }
  // ★ FIXED: Both Credit Union and Bank modes treat the stored rate as ANNUAL.
  // Per the standard EMI formula: r (monthly) = annual_rate / 12 / 100.
  // Previously, CU mode incorrectly treated the rate as already monthly (no ÷12),
  // causing massive overcharges. Now consistent: all rates are annual, divided by 12.
  const isCreditUnion = loan.loanModule === 'CREDIT_UNION';
  const rate = (loan.interestRate || 0) / 100;
  const monthlyRate = rate / 12;
  const mode = loan.repaymentMode || 'SCHEDULED';
  const interestIncluded = loan.interestIncluded !== false; // default: interest IS included in fixed amount

  if (mode === 'FIXED_AMOUNT' && loan.repaymentAmount > 0) {
    /* ── FIXED_AMOUNT: Reducing balance method ──
       Two sub-modes:
         interestIncluded=true  → Fixed TOTAL payment per cycle (interest deducted from it)
         interestIncluded=false → Fixed PRINCIPAL per cycle (interest added on top)

       Example (included): 10M loan, 5% rate, 1M/month → 11 months, total interest 226,942.67
       Each cycle: interest = remaining × monthlyRate
                   If included: principal = fixedAmount - interest, total = fixedAmount
                   If on top:   principal = fixedAmount, total = fixedAmount + interest  */
    const fixedAmount = loan.repaymentAmount;
    let remaining = loan.principal;
    let installment = 0;
    const MAX_INSTALLMENTS = (loan.termMonths || 360) * 2; // Safety: prevent infinite loops

    while (remaining > 0.01 && installment < MAX_INSTALLMENTS) {
      installment++;
      const interest = Math.round(remaining * monthlyRate * 100) / 100;

      if (interestIncluded) {
        // Interest is INCLUDED in the fixed amount
        let principal = Math.round((fixedAmount - interest) * 100) / 100;
        // Last installment: pay whatever remains (principal only, interest on remaining)
        if (principal >= remaining) {
          principal = Math.round(remaining * 100) / 100;
          const totalPayment = Math.round((principal + interest) * 100) / 100;
          const dueDate = new Date(loan.disbursedAt);
          dueDate.setMonth(dueDate.getMonth() + installment);
          DB.loanSchedule.push({
            id: DB.loanSchedule.length + 1, loanId: loan.id, installment,
            due: dueDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
            principal, interest, paid: 0, status: _instStatus(dueDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10)),
            totalPayment: Math.round((principal + interest) * 100) / 100
          });
          remaining = 0;
        } else {
          const dueDate = new Date(loan.disbursedAt);
          dueDate.setMonth(dueDate.getMonth() + installment);
          DB.loanSchedule.push({
            id: DB.loanSchedule.length + 1, loanId: loan.id, installment,
            due: dueDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
            principal, interest, paid: 0, status: _instStatus(dueDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10)),
            totalPayment: fixedAmount
          });
          remaining = Math.round((remaining - principal) * 100) / 100;
        }
      } else {
        // Interest ON TOP: fixed amount is pure principal, interest added
        const principal = Math.min(Math.round(fixedAmount * 100) / 100, Math.round(remaining * 100) / 100);
        const dueDate = new Date(loan.disbursedAt);
        dueDate.setMonth(dueDate.getMonth() + installment);
        DB.loanSchedule.push({
          id: DB.loanSchedule.length + 1, loanId: loan.id, installment,
          due: dueDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
          principal: Math.round(principal * 100) / 100,
          interest: Math.round(interest * 100) / 100,
          paid: 0, status: _instStatus(dueDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10)),
          totalPayment: Math.round((principal + interest) * 100) / 100
        });
        remaining -= principal;
      }
    }
  } else if (mode === 'PERCENTAGE_OF_LOAN' && loan.repaymentPct > 0) {
    /* ── PERCENTAGE_OF_LOAN: Fixed % of original principal per cycle ──
       Uses reducing balance: interest = remaining × monthlyRate
       Principal paid = loan.principal × (pct/100)
       If interestIncluded: total payment = principal portion, interest deducted from it
       If interestIncluded=false (on top): total = principal + interest */
    const pctPrincipal = Math.round(loan.principal * (loan.repaymentPct / 100) * 100) / 100;
    let remaining = loan.principal;
    let installment = 0;
    const MAX_INSTALLMENTS = (loan.termMonths || 360) * 2;

    while (remaining > 0.01 && installment < MAX_INSTALLMENTS) {
      installment++;
      const interest = Math.round(remaining * monthlyRate * 100) / 100;
      const principal = Math.min(Math.round(pctPrincipal * 100) / 100, Math.round(remaining * 100) / 100);
      const dueDate = new Date(loan.disbursedAt);
      dueDate.setMonth(dueDate.getMonth() + installment);
      DB.loanSchedule.push({
        id: DB.loanSchedule.length + 1, loanId: loan.id, installment,
        due: dueDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
        principal: Math.round(principal * 100) / 100,
        interest: Math.round(interest * 100) / 100,
        paid: 0, status: _instStatus(dueDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10)),
        totalPayment: Math.round((principal + interest) * 100) / 100
      });
      remaining = Math.round((remaining - principal) * 100) / 100;
    }
  } else if (mode === 'PERCENTAGE_OF_ACCOUNT') {
    /* ── PERCENTAGE_OF_ACCOUNT: Placeholder schedule (actual amounts computed at deduction time) ──
       Generates equal-principal placeholders for the full term.
       The auto-deduction engine recalculates actual amounts from live account balance. */
    const monthlyPrincipal = loan.principal / (loan.termMonths || 12);
    let remaining = loan.principal;
    for (let i = 1; i <= (loan.termMonths || 12); i++) {
      const interest = Math.round(remaining * monthlyRate * 100) / 100;
      const principal = Math.min(Math.round(monthlyPrincipal * 100) / 100, Math.round(remaining * 100) / 100);
      const dueDate = new Date(loan.disbursedAt);
      dueDate.setMonth(dueDate.getMonth() + i);
      DB.loanSchedule.push({
        id: DB.loanSchedule.length + 1, loanId: loan.id, installment: i,
        due: dueDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
        principal: Math.round(principal * 100) / 100,
        interest: Math.round(interest * 100) / 100,
        paid: 0, status: _instStatus(dueDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10)),
        isPercentOfAccount: true,
        totalPayment: Math.round((principal + interest) * 100) / 100
      });
      remaining = Math.round((remaining - principal) * 100) / 100; // ★ FIX (LOAN-006): Round remaining to prevent floating-point drift
      if (remaining <= 0.01) break;
    }
  } else if (isCreditUnion) {
    /* ── CREDIT UNION SCHEDULED: Standard Amortization (Equal Monthly Payments) ──
       Per COBAC regulations — EMI formula:
       PMT = P × [r(1+r)^n] / [(1+r)^n - 1]
       where r = annual_rate / 12, n = term in months
       Each month: interest = remaining × r (decreasing)
                   principal = PMT - interest (increasing)
                   total = PMT (constant) */
    const n = loan.termMonths || 12;
    let pmt;
    if (monthlyRate === 0) {
      pmt = loan.principal / n;
    } else {
      const factor = Math.pow(1 + monthlyRate, n);
      pmt = loan.principal * (monthlyRate * factor) / (factor - 1);
    }
    pmt = Math.round(pmt * 100) / 100;
    let remaining = loan.principal;
    for (let i = 1; i <= n && remaining > 0.01; i++) {
      const interest = Math.round(remaining * monthlyRate * 100) / 100;
      let principal = Math.round((pmt - interest) * 100) / 100;
      // Last installment: adjust for rounding
      if (i === n || principal >= remaining) {
        principal = Math.round(remaining * 100) / 100;
      }
      const totalPayment = Math.round((principal + interest) * 100) / 100;
      const dueDate = new Date(loan.disbursedAt);
      dueDate.setMonth(dueDate.getMonth() + i);
      DB.loanSchedule.push({
        id: DB.loanSchedule.length + 1, loanId: loan.id, installment: i,
        due: dueDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
        principal: Math.round(principal * 100) / 100,
        interest: Math.round(interest * 100) / 100,
        paid: 0, status: _instStatus(dueDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10)),
        totalPayment,
        isCreditUnion: true
      });
      remaining = Math.round((remaining - principal) * 100) / 100;
    }
  } else {
    /* ── SCHEDULED (default/Bank): Equal principal installments over the term ──
       Standard declining-balance: each month the same principal is paid,
       interest decreases as the outstanding balance drops. */
    const termMonths = loan.termMonths || 12;
    const monthlyPrincipal = loan.principal / termMonths;
    let remaining = loan.principal;
    for (let i = 1; i <= termMonths; i++) {
      const interest = Math.round(remaining * monthlyRate * 100) / 100;
      const principal = Math.min(Math.round(monthlyPrincipal * 100) / 100, Math.round(remaining * 100) / 100);
      const dueDate = new Date(loan.disbursedAt);
      dueDate.setMonth(dueDate.getMonth() + i);
      DB.loanSchedule.push({
        id: DB.loanSchedule.length + 1, loanId: loan.id, installment: i,
        due: dueDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
        principal: Math.round(principal * 100) / 100,
        interest: Math.round(interest * 100) / 100,
        paid: 0, status: _instStatus(dueDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10)),
        totalPayment: Math.round((principal + interest) * 100) / 100
      });
      remaining = Math.round((remaining - principal) * 100) / 100; // ★ FIX (LOAN-005): Round remaining to prevent floating-point drift
      if (remaining <= 0.01) break;
    }
  }

  console.log(`[Schedule] Generated ${DB.loanSchedule.filter(s=>s.loanId===loan.id).length} installments for loan ${loan.loanNumber} (mode: ${mode}, rate: ${loan.interestRate}%, principal: ${loan.principal}, interestIncluded: ${loan.interestIncluded})`);

  // Note: Caller is responsible for calling syncLoanScheduleToDB(loan) if backend sync is needed.
  // This allows callers to await the sync and prevent CSRF race conditions.
}

/* Helper: persist the generated schedule for a loan to the backend.
   Returns a Promise so callers can await it for serialized DB operations. */
function syncLoanScheduleToDB(loan) {
  if (!API_CONNECTED || !loan.id) return Promise.resolve();
  const entries = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s => s.loanId === loan.id);
  if (entries.length === 0) return Promise.resolve();
  const schedulePayload = entries.map(s => ({
    installment: s.installment, due: s.due,
    principal: s.principal, interest: s.interest,
    paid: s.paid || 0, status: s.status || 'DUE',
    totalPayment: s.totalPayment || (s.principal + s.interest)
  }));
  return refreshCsrfToken().then(() => {
    return API.put('loans/' + loan.id, { schedule: schedulePayload }).then(result => {
      if (result) console.log(`[Schedule] Synced ${schedulePayload.length} entries for loan ${loan.loanNumber}`);
    });
  });
}

/* ================================================================
   LOAN REPAYMENT — Record payment, debit account, update schedule
   ================================================================ */
let STATE_LR = { payType: 'full' };

function openLoanRepaymentModal(loanId) {
  const l = DB.loans.find(x=>x.id===loanId);
  if(!l) return;
  // ★ BLOCK: Only ACTIVE and DELINQUENT loans can accept payments (best practice)
  // SETTLED = fully paid, CLOSED = manually closed, WRITTEN_OFF = loss recognized,
  // DEFAULTED = beyond recovery, RESTRUCTURED = under new terms, PENDING/APPROVED = not yet disbursed
  if(l.status !== 'ACTIVE' && l.status !== 'DELINQUENT') {
    const label = l.status === 'SETTLED' ? 'fully paid' : l.status === 'CLOSED' ? 'closed' :
      l.status === 'WRITTEN_OFF' ? 'written off' : l.status === 'DEFAULTED' ? 'in default' :
      l.status === 'RESTRUCTURED' ? 'under restructuring' : l.status.toLowerCase();
    showToast('error','Cannot Record Payment',`This loan is ${label} and cannot accept further payments.`);
    return;
  }
  const schedule = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s=>s.loanId===loanId && (s.status==='DUE'||s.status==='MISSED'));
  const nextInstallment = schedule[0];
  // ★ Allow opening modal even without due installments if loan has outstanding balance (for early payoff)
  if(!nextInstallment && l.outstanding <= 0) {
    showToast('info','No Due Installments','There are no outstanding installments for this loan.');
    return;
  }
  // ★ Store original debit account for change tracking (persist to backend if changed)
  l._originalDebitAccountId = l.debitAccountId;
  $('lrLoanId').value = loanId;
  // Loan info
  $('lrLoanInfo').innerHTML = `
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;font-size:.86rem">
      <div><span style="color:var(--soft)">Loan:</span> <strong>${l.loanNumber}</strong></div>
      <div><span style="color:var(--soft)">Customer:</span> <strong>${l.customerName}</strong></div>
      <div><span style="color:var(--soft)">Outstanding:</span> <strong>${money(l.outstanding)}</strong></div>
