      <div><span style="color:var(--soft)">Rate:</span> <strong>${l.interestRate}%</strong></div>
    </div>`;
  // Populate debit account dropdown with all customer's active accounts
  const customerAccounts = DB.accounts.filter(a=>a.customerId===l.customerId && a.status==='ACTIVE');
  $('lrDebitAccount').innerHTML = customerAccounts.map(a=>
    `<option value="${a.id}" ${a.id===l.debitAccountId?'selected':''}>${a.accountNumber} — ${a.productType} (${money(a.availableBalance)})</option>`
  ).join('');
  if(customerAccounts.length === 0) {
    $('lrDebitAccount').innerHTML = '<option value="">No active accounts found</option>';
  }
  // Installment info — only show if there are due installments
  if(nextInstallment) {
    $('lrInstallmentInfo').innerHTML = `
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px">
      <span>Installment #${nextInstallment.installment}</span>
      <span>Due: ${nextInstallment.due}</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px">
      <span>Principal due:</span>
      <strong>${money(nextInstallment.principal)}</strong>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px">
      <span>Interest due:</span>
      <strong>${money(nextInstallment.interest)}</strong>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;border-top:1px solid var(--line);padding-top:6px;margin-top:6px">
      <strong>Total due:</strong>
      <strong style="color:var(--primary)">${money(nextInstallment.principal + nextInstallment.interest)}</strong>
    </div>`;
  } else {
    $('lrInstallmentInfo').innerHTML = `<div style="color:var(--soft)">No current installment due. Use "Pay Off Loan" to settle the remaining balance of ${money(l.outstanding)}.</div>`;
  }
  // ★ Initialize payoff button state
  const payoffBtn = $('lrPayoffBtn');
  if(payoffBtn) payoffBtn.className = 'txn-type-btn';
  $('lrPayoffInfo').style.display = 'none';
  STATE_LR.payType = 'full';
  $('lrPayType').value = 'full';
  $('lrAmount').value = '';
  $('lrAmountGroup').style.display = 'none';
  $('lrFullPayBtn').className = 'txn-type-btn active-deposit';
  $('lrPartialPayBtn').className = 'txn-type-btn';
  $('lrMemo').value = '';
  $('lrModalTitle').textContent = 'Record Repayment — ' + l.loanNumber;
  updateLoanRepaymentPreview();
  openModal('loanRepaymentModal');
}

function setLoanPayType(type) {
  STATE_LR.payType = type;
  $('lrPayType').value = type;
  $('lrFullPayBtn').className = 'txn-type-btn' + (type==='full'?' active-deposit':'');
  $('lrPartialPayBtn').className = 'txn-type-btn' + (type==='partial'?' active-withdraw':'');
  $('lrPayoffBtn').className = 'txn-type-btn' + (type==='payoff'?' active-deposit':'');
  $('lrAmountGroup').style.display = type==='partial'?'grid':'none';
  // Show/hide payoff info panel
  $('lrPayoffInfo').style.display = type==='payoff'?'block':'none';
  $('lrInstallmentInfo').style.display = type==='payoff'?'none':'block';
  updateLoanRepaymentPreview();
}

function updateLoanRepaymentPreview() {
  const debitAcctId = Number($('lrDebitAccount')?.value);
  const debitAcct = DB.accounts.find(a=>a.id===debitAcctId);
  if(debitAcct) {
    $('lrDebitBalance').textContent = money(debitAcct.availableBalance);
  }
  // Calculate payment amount
  const loanId = Number($('lrLoanId').value);
  const l = DB.loans.find(x=>x.id===loanId);
  if(!l) return;
  const nextInstallment = DB.loanSchedule.find(s=>s.loanId===loanId && (s.status==='DUE'||s.status==='MISSED'));
  if(!nextInstallment && STATE_LR.payType !== 'payoff') return;
  let payAmount = 0;
  if(STATE_LR.payType === 'full') {
    payAmount = nextInstallment.principal + nextInstallment.interest - nextInstallment.paid;
  } else if(STATE_LR.payType === 'payoff') {
    // Early payoff: remaining principal + interest on overdue/current installments only
    payAmount = calculateEarlyPayoffAmount(l);
  } else {
    payAmount = Number($('lrAmount').value) || 0;
  }
  // ★ OVERPAYMENT GUARD: Show max hint for partial payments
  if(STATE_LR.payType === 'partial' && nextInstallment) {
    const totalDue = Math.round((nextInstallment.principal + nextInstallment.interest - nextInstallment.paid) * 100) / 100;
    $('lrMaxPayHint').textContent = 'Maximum allowed: ' + money(totalDue) + ' (current installment total due)';
    const lrAmountEl = $('lrAmount');
    if(lrAmountEl) lrAmountEl.max = totalDue;
  } else {
    const hint = $('lrMaxPayHint');
    if(hint) hint.textContent = '';
  }
  // ★ PAYOFF INFO: Calculate and display payoff breakdown
  if(STATE_LR.payType === 'payoff') {
    const payoffBreakdown = calculatePayoffBreakdown(l);
    $('lrPayoffInfo').innerHTML = payoffBreakdown;
  }
  const after = debitAcct ? debitAcct.availableBalance - payAmount : 0;
  $('lrAfterBalance').innerHTML = payAmount > 0
    ? `Balance after: <span style="color:${after<0?'var(--danger)':'var(--success)'}">${money(after)}</span>`
    : '—';
}

/* ================================================================
   EARLY LOAN PAYOFF — Calculate total amount to settle a loan early.
   Banking best practice: Charge remaining principal + interest accrued
   on overdue/current installments only. Future installments beyond the
   current cycle only require their principal portion (no future interest).
   ================================================================ */

/**
 * Calculate the total early payoff amount for a loan.
 * @param {Object} loan - The loan object
 * @returns {number} Total payoff amount
 */
function calculateEarlyPayoffAmount(loan) {
  const allSchedule = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s => s.loanId === loan.id);
  const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  let totalPayoff = 0;

  for (const inst of allSchedule) {
    if (inst.status === 'PAID') continue; // Already paid — skip
    const instDueDate = inst.due || inst.due_date || '';
    const totalDue = Math.round((inst.principal + inst.interest - (inst.paid || 0)) * 100) / 100;
    if (totalDue <= 0) continue;

    if (instDueDate && instDueDate <= today) {
      // ★ OVERDUE or CURRENT cycle: Full amount due (principal + interest + penalties)
      totalPayoff += totalDue;
    } else {
      // ★ FUTURE installments: Only principal portion (no future interest — borrower benefit)
      // Interest on future months hasn't been earned by the bank yet
      const remainingPrincipal = Math.max(0, inst.principal - Math.max(0, (inst.paid || 0) - inst.interest));
      totalPayoff += Math.round(remainingPrincipal * 100) / 100;
    }
  }

  return Math.round(totalPayoff * 100) / 100;
}

/**
 * Generate a detailed HTML breakdown of the early payoff amount.
 * @param {Object} loan - The loan object
 * @returns {string} HTML string for the payoff info panel
 */
function calculatePayoffBreakdown(loan) {
  const allSchedule = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s => s.loanId === loan.id);
  const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  let overduePrincipal = 0, overdueInterest = 0, futurePrincipal = 0;
  let overdueCount = 0, futureCount = 0;

  for (const inst of allSchedule) {
    if (inst.status === 'PAID') continue;
    const instDueDate = inst.due || inst.due_date || '';
    const remainingInterest = Math.max(0, inst.interest - Math.min(inst.paid || 0, inst.interest));
    const remainingPrincipal = Math.max(0, inst.principal - Math.max(0, (inst.paid || 0) - inst.interest));

    if (instDueDate && instDueDate <= today) {
      overduePrincipal += remainingPrincipal;
      overdueInterest += remainingInterest;
      overdueCount++;
    } else {
      futurePrincipal += remainingPrincipal;
      futureCount++;
    }
  }

  const totalPayoff = Math.round((overduePrincipal + overdueInterest + futurePrincipal) * 100) / 100;
  const interestSaved = Math.round(futurePrincipal * 0) ; // Display placeholder for savings note

  return `
    <div style="margin-bottom:8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--primary)">Early Loan Settlement</div>
    ${overdueCount > 0 ? `
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px">
      <span>Overdue principal (${overdueCount} installment${overdueCount>1?'s':''}):</span>
      <strong style="color:var(--danger)">${money(overduePrincipal)}</strong>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px">
      <span>Overdue interest + penalties:</span>
      <strong style="color:var(--danger)">${money(overdueInterest)}</strong>
    </div>` : ''}
    ${futureCount > 0 ? `
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px">
      <span>Remaining principal (${futureCount} future installment${futureCount>1?'s':''}):</span>
      <strong>${money(futurePrincipal)}</strong>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--success);margin-bottom:6px">
      Future interest waived — borrower saves on ${futureCount} month${futureCount>1?'s':''} of interest
    </div>` : ''}
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;border-top:1px solid var(--line);padding-top:6px;margin-top:6px">
      <strong>Total payoff amount:</strong>
      <strong style="color:var(--primary);font-size:1rem">${money(totalPayoff)}</strong>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--soft);margin-top:4px">
      Loan ${loan.loanNumber} — Outstanding: ${money(loan.outstanding)}. 
      ${loan.status === 'DELINQUENT' ? '<span style="color:var(--danger)">Delinquent loan — all overdue amounts included.</span>' : ''}
    </div>`;
}

/**
 * Process an early loan payoff — settles the entire remaining balance.
 * Pays all remaining installments (overdue at full, future at principal only).
 * Sets loan status to SETTLED and creates comprehensive audit trail.
 */
async function handleEarlyPayoff(loan, debitAccount, memo) {
  const allSchedule = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s => s.loanId === loan.id);
  const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  let totalPrincipalPayment = 0;
  let totalInterestPayment = 0;
  let totalPayment = 0;
  const installmentCount = { overdue: 0, future: 0 };

  // ★ STEP 1: Calculate exact amounts and validate
  // ★ INTEREST POLICY: Interest for a cycle must ALWAYS be paid if:
  //   (a) The installment status is DUE, MISSED, or PARTIALLY_PAID (cycle has clocked), OR
  //   (b) The installment's due_date has arrived (due_date <= today), OR
  //   (c) The installment number is <= months elapsed since disbursement (cycle mathematically reached)
  // Interest is ONLY waived for installments where NONE of the above apply — i.e., truly future
  // cycles that haven't started yet.
  const disbursedDate = loan.disbursedAt ? loan.disbursedAt.slice(0,10) : null;
  const monthsElapsed = disbursedDate ? Math.max(0, Math.round((new Date(today) - new Date(disbursedDate)) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 30.44))) : 0;

  for (const inst of allSchedule) {
    if (inst.status === 'PAID') continue;
    const instDueDate = inst.due || inst.due_date || '';
    const totalDue = Math.round((inst.principal + inst.interest - (inst.paid || 0)) * 100) / 100;
    if (totalDue <= 0) continue;

    const remainingInterest = Math.max(0, inst.interest - Math.min(inst.paid || 0, inst.interest));
    const remainingPrincipal = Math.max(0, inst.principal - Math.max(0, (inst.paid || 0) - inst.interest));

    // ★ TRIPLE CHECK: cycle clocked? (status-based, date-based, or math-based)
    const statusClock = ['DUE','MISSED','PARTIALLY_PAID'].includes(inst.status);
    const dateClock = instDueDate && instDueDate <= today;
    const mathClock = monthsElapsed >= inst.installment; // installment #1 = 1 month elapsed, etc.
    const cycleClocked = statusClock || dateClock || mathClock;

    if (cycleClocked) {
      // Cycle has clocked — FULL interest must be paid, no waiver
      totalPrincipalPayment += remainingPrincipal;
      totalInterestPayment += remainingInterest;
      installmentCount.overdue++;
    } else {
      // Truly future cycle — interest waived (principal only)
      totalPrincipalPayment += remainingPrincipal;
      installmentCount.future++;
    }
  }

  totalPrincipalPayment = Math.round(totalPrincipalPayment * 100) / 100;
  totalInterestPayment = Math.round(totalInterestPayment * 100) / 100;
  totalPayment = Math.round((totalPrincipalPayment + totalInterestPayment) * 100) / 100;

  if (totalPayment <= 0) {
    showToast('info', 'Nothing to Pay', 'This loan has no remaining balance.');
    return false;
  }

  // ★ STEP 2: Validate sufficient funds
  if (debitAccount.availableBalance < totalPayment) {
    showToast('error', 'Insufficient Funds',
      `Early payoff requires ${money(totalPayment)} but account ${debitAccount.accountNumber} only has ${money(debitAccount.availableBalance)}.`);
    return false;
  }

  // ★ STEP 3: Debit the account
  debitAccount.ledgerBalance -= totalPayment;
  debitAccount.availableBalance -= totalPayment;

  // ★ STEP 4: Update loan — SETTLED
  const prevOutstanding = loan.outstanding;
  loan.outstanding = 0;
  loan.accruedInterest = 0;
  loan.nextDue = '—';
  loan.status = 'SETTLED';
  loan.settledAt = new Date().toISOString();
  loan._modified = true;

  // ★ STEP 5: Mark all remaining installments as PAID
  for (const inst of allSchedule) {
    if (inst.status === 'PAID') continue;
    const totalDue = Math.round((inst.principal + inst.interest - (inst.paid || 0)) * 100) / 100;
    if (totalDue <= 0) continue;
    inst.paid = inst.principal + inst.interest;
    inst.status = 'PAID';
    inst.settledVia = 'EARLY_PAYOFF';
  }

  // ★ STEP 6: Create comprehensive transaction record
  const txnRef = 'TXN-' + today.replace(/-/g, '') + '-' + String(DB.transactions.length + 1).padStart(4, '0');
  DB.transactions.push({
    id: DB.transactions.length + 1, ref: txnRef, type: 'LOAN_EARLY_PAYOFF',
    status: 'POSTED', branch: loan.branch,
    account: debitAccount.accountNumber,
    accountType: debitAccount.productType, customerName: loan.customerName,
    description: `Early loan payoff — ${loan.loanNumber}. Previous outstanding: ${money(prevOutstanding)}`,
    category: 'Loan Early Payoff', direction: 'debit', amount: totalPayment,
    memo: `${memo || 'Early settlement'}. Principal settled: ${money(totalPrincipalPayment)}, Interest paid: ${money(totalInterestPayment)}. ${installmentCount.overdue} cycle(s) with full interest (P+I), ${installmentCount.future} future cycle(s) at principal only (interest waived). Account ${debitAccount.accountNumber} debited.`,
    module: 'Loans', timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
  });
  await syncTransactionToBackend(DB.transactions[DB.transactions.length - 1]);

  // ★ STEP 7: Record interest as profit
  if (totalInterestPayment > 0 && typeof recordProfitEntry === 'function') {
    await recordProfitEntry({
      glAccount: '4200', glAccountName: 'Loan Interest Income',
      category: 'LOAN_INTEREST', sourceRef: txnRef, sourceType: 'LOAN_EARLY_PAYOFF',
      accountNumber: debitAccount.accountNumber, accountType: debitAccount.productType,
      customerName: loan.customerName, branch: loan.branch,
      grossAmount: totalPayment, feeAmount: totalInterestPayment, feePct: loan.interestRate,
      feeMode: 'INTEREST',
      operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
      description: 'Loan interest from early payoff of ' + loan.loanNumber + '. Total: ' + money(totalPayment) + '. Principal: ' + money(totalPrincipalPayment) + ', Interest: ' + money(totalInterestPayment) + '.'
    });
  }

  // ★ STEP 8: Credit Loan Fund (principal)
  if (totalPrincipalPayment > 0) {
    DB.loanFundAccount.balance += totalPrincipalPayment;
    DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.push({
      id: DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.length + 1,
      ref: 'LF-' + today.replace(/-/g, '') + '-' + String(DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.length + 1).padStart(3, '0'),
      date: today, type: 'CREDIT',
      description: `Principal from early payoff — ${loan.loanNumber} from ${debitAccount.accountNumber}`,
      amount: totalPrincipalPayment, balance: DB.loanFundAccount.balance,
      operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System', timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    });
    await syncLoanFundToDB('BANK-LF-0001', 'CREDIT', totalPrincipalPayment,
      `Principal from early payoff — ${loan.loanNumber} from ${debitAccount.accountNumber}`,
      loan.id, txnRef);
  }

  // ★ STEP 9: Credit Loan Interest Income (interest)
  if (totalInterestPayment > 0) {
    DB.loanInterestAccount.balance += totalInterestPayment;
    DB.loanInterestAccount.transactions.push({
      id: DB.loanInterestAccount.transactions.length + 1,
      ref: 'LI-' + today.replace(/-/g, '') + '-' + String(DB.loanInterestAccount.transactions.length + 1).padStart(3, '0'),
      date: today, type: 'CREDIT',
      description: `Interest from early payoff — ${loan.loanNumber} from ${debitAccount.accountNumber}`,
      amount: totalInterestPayment, balance: DB.loanInterestAccount.balance,
      operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System', timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    });
    await syncLoanFundToDB('BANK-LI-0001', 'CREDIT', totalInterestPayment,
      `Interest from early payoff — ${loan.loanNumber} from ${debitAccount.accountNumber}`,
      loan.id, txnRef);
  }

  // ★ STEP 10: Sync to backend
  if (API_CONNECTED) {
    try {
      await refreshCsrfToken();
      // Sync schedule — all installments now PAID
      const entries = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s => s.loanId === loan.id);
      if (entries.length > 0) {
        const schedulePayload = entries.map(s => ({
          installment: s.installment, due: s.due,
          principal: s.principal, interest: s.interest,
          paid: s.paid || 0, status: s.status || 'DUE'
        }));
        await API.put('loans/' + loan.id, { schedule: schedulePayload });
      }
      await refreshCsrfToken();
      await API.put('loans/' + loan.id, {
        outstanding: 0,
        accrued_interest: 0,
        status: 'SETTLED',
        next_due: null // ★ FIX (LOAN-008): Was '—' which is not a valid DATE for MySQL
      });
    } catch (err) { console.warn('[EarlyPayoff] Failed to sync:', err); }
  }

  // ★ STEP 11: Audit + toast + re-render
  showToast('success', 'Loan Paid Off',
    `${loan.loanNumber} settled early. ${money(totalPayment)} debited from ${debitAccount.accountNumber}. ` +
    `Principal: ${money(totalPrincipalPayment)}, Interest: ${money(totalInterestPayment)}. ` +
    `${installmentCount.overdue} cycle(s) paid with full interest (P+I), ${installmentCount.future} future cycle(s) at principal only.`);
  addAuditEntry('LOAN_EARLY_PAYOFF', 'Loan', loan.loanNumber,
    `Early payoff of ${money(totalPayment)} for ${loan.loanNumber} by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. ` +
    `Previous outstanding: ${money(prevOutstanding)}. Principal: ${money(totalPrincipalPayment)}, Interest: ${money(totalInterestPayment)}. ` +
    `${installmentCount.overdue} clocked cycle(s) paid P+I, ${installmentCount.future} future cycle(s) at principal only. Debit: ${debitAccount.accountNumber}.`);

  return true;
}

async function handleLoanRepayment(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const loanId = Number($('lrLoanId').value);
  const l = DB.loans.find(x=>x.id===loanId);
  if(!l) return false;
  // ★ BLOCK: Re-verify loan is still payable (status may have changed between modal open and submit)
  if(l.status !== 'ACTIVE' && l.status !== 'DELINQUENT') {
    showToast('error','Action Blocked',`Loan ${l.loanNumber} is now ${l.status} and cannot accept payments.`);
    closeModal('loanRepaymentModal');
    renderLoans();
    return false;
  }
  const debitAccountId = Number($('lrDebitAccount').value);
  const debitAccount = DB.accounts.find(a=>a.id===debitAccountId);
  if(!debitAccount) { showToast('error','Error','Please select a valid debit account.'); return false; }

  // ★ ROUTE: Early payoff delegates to dedicated handler
  if(STATE_LR.payType === 'payoff') {
    const memo = $('lrMemo').value.trim() || ('Early loan payoff — ' + l.loanNumber);
    const success = await handleEarlyPayoff(l, debitAccount, memo);
    if(success) {
      closeModal('loanRepaymentModal');
      renderLoans(); renderLoanSchedule(); renderAccounts(); renderTransactions();
      renderDashboard(); renderLoanFundPanel();
    }
    return false;
  }

  const nextInstallment = DB.loanSchedule.find(s=>s.loanId===loanId && (s.status==='DUE'||s.status==='MISSED'));
  if(!nextInstallment) { showToast('error','Error','No due installment found.'); return false; }
  const totalDue = Math.round((nextInstallment.principal + nextInstallment.interest - nextInstallment.paid) * 100) / 100;
  let paymentAmount = 0;
  let principalPayment = 0;
  let interestPayment = 0;
  if(STATE_LR.payType === 'full') {
    paymentAmount = totalDue;
    // ★ Correctly account for prior partial payments (interest-first allocation) ★
    const priorPaid = nextInstallment.paid || 0;
    if(priorPaid <= nextInstallment.interest) {
      // All prior payments went to interest — remaining interest still owed
      interestPayment = nextInstallment.interest - priorPaid;
      principalPayment = nextInstallment.principal;
    } else {
      // Interest fully paid — some principal already paid
      interestPayment = 0;
      principalPayment = nextInstallment.principal - (priorPaid - nextInstallment.interest);
    }
  } else {
    paymentAmount = Number($('lrAmount').value) || 0;
    if(paymentAmount <= 0) { showToast('error','Validation Error','Please enter a valid payment amount.'); return false; }
    // ★ OVERPAYMENT GUARD: Cannot pay more than current installment total due
    if(paymentAmount > totalDue) {
      showToast('error','Overpayment Blocked',
        `Payment of ${money(paymentAmount)} exceeds the current installment total due of ${money(totalDue)}. ` +
        `Maximum allowed for this installment: ${money(totalDue)}. ` +
        `To settle the entire loan, use the "Pay Off Loan" option.`);
      return false;
    }
    // Apply payment: interest first, then principal
    interestPayment = Math.min(nextInstallment.interest - Math.min(nextInstallment.paid || 0, nextInstallment.interest), paymentAmount);
    principalPayment = Math.min(nextInstallment.principal, paymentAmount - interestPayment);
  }
  if(paymentAmount > debitAccount.availableBalance) {
    showToast('error','Insufficient Funds','Payment of '+money(paymentAmount)+' exceeds available balance of '+money(debitAccount.availableBalance)+' in '+debitAccount.accountNumber+'.');
    return false;
  }
  const memo = $('lrMemo').value.trim() || ('Loan repayment — Installment #'+nextInstallment.installment+' of '+l.loanNumber);
  // Debit the account
  debitAccount.ledgerBalance -= paymentAmount;
  debitAccount.availableBalance -= paymentAmount;
  // Update loan outstanding
  l.outstanding = Math.max(0, l.outstanding - principalPayment);
  l.accruedInterest = Math.max(0, l.accruedInterest - interestPayment);
  // Update schedule
  nextInstallment.paid += paymentAmount;
  const totalInstallment = nextInstallment.principal + nextInstallment.interest;
  if(nextInstallment.paid >= totalInstallment) {
    nextInstallment.status = 'PAID';
    nextInstallment.paid = totalInstallment;
  } else {
    nextInstallment.status = 'PARTIALLY_PAID';
  }
  // Update loan next due date
  const remainingSchedule = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s=>s.loanId===loanId && (s.status==='DUE'||s.status==='MISSED'));
  if(remainingSchedule.length > 0) {
    l.nextDue = remainingSchedule[0].due;
  } else if(l.outstanding <= 0) {
    l.nextDue = null; // ★ FIX (LOAN-007): Use null instead of '—' — backend expects DATE or NULL, not a dash string
    l.status = 'SETTLED';
  }
  // Check if loan is fully settled
  if(l.outstanding <= 0) {
    l.outstanding = 0;
    l.accruedInterest = 0;
    l.status = 'SETTLED';
    l.nextDue = l.nextDue || null; // ★ FIX (LOAN-007): Ensure nextDue is null, never '—'
  }
  // Update the loan's debit account if changed
  if(debitAccountId !== l.debitAccountId) {
    l.debitAccountId = debitAccountId;
    l.debitAccountNumber = debitAccount.accountNumber;
  }
  // ★ Track if debit account changed — must sync to backend
  const debitAccountChanged = debitAccountId !== (l._originalDebitAccountId ?? l.debitAccountId);
  // Create repayment transaction
  const txnRef = 'TXN-' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'') + '-' + String(DB.transactions.length + 1).padStart(4,'0');
  DB.transactions.push({
    id: DB.transactions.length + 1, ref: txnRef, type: 'LOAN_REPAYMENT',
    status: 'POSTED', branch: l.branch, account: debitAccount.accountNumber,
    accountType: debitAccount.productType, customerName: l.customerName,
    description: `Scheduled repayment — ${l.loanNumber} Installment #${nextInstallment.installment}`,
    category: 'Loan Repayment', direction: 'debit', amount: paymentAmount,
    memo: `${memo}. Principal: ${money(principalPayment)}, Interest: ${money(interestPayment)}. ${debitAccount.accountNumber} debited.`,
    module: 'Loans', timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
  });
  /* ★ Sync repayment transaction to backend — sequential ★ */
  await syncTransactionToBackend(DB.transactions[DB.transactions.length - 1]);
  /* Record loan interest as profit */
  if(interestPayment > 0 && typeof recordProfitEntry === 'function') {
    await recordProfitEntry({
      glAccount: '4200', glAccountName: 'Loan Interest Income',
      category: 'LOAN_INTEREST', sourceRef: txnRef, sourceType: 'LOAN_INTEREST',
      accountNumber: debitAccount.accountNumber, accountType: debitAccount.productType,
      customerName: l.customerName, branch: l.branch,
      grossAmount: paymentAmount, feeAmount: interestPayment, feePct: l.interestRate,
      feeMode: 'INTEREST',
      operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
      description: 'Loan interest from repayment of '+l.loanNumber+' #'+nextInstallment.installment+'. Principal: '+money(principalPayment)+', Interest: '+money(interestPayment)+'.'
    });
  }
  /* ★ CREDIT Loan Fund (principal portion) ★ */
  if(principalPayment > 0) {
    DB.loanFundAccount.balance += principalPayment;
    DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.push({
      id: DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.length+1,
      ref: 'LF-'+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'')+'-'+String(DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.length+1).padStart(3,'0'),
      date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), type:'CREDIT',
      description: `Principal repayment — ${l.loanNumber} Installment #${nextInstallment.installment} from ${debitAccount.accountNumber}`,
      amount: principalPayment, balance: DB.loanFundAccount.balance,
      operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System', timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    });
    await syncLoanFundToDB('BANK-LF-0001', 'CREDIT', principalPayment,
      `Principal repayment — ${l.loanNumber} Installment #${nextInstallment.installment} from ${debitAccount.accountNumber}`,
      l.id, txnRef);
  }
  /* ★ CREDIT Loan Interest Income (interest portion) ★ */
  if(interestPayment > 0) {
    DB.loanInterestAccount.balance += interestPayment;
    DB.loanInterestAccount.transactions.push({
      id: DB.loanInterestAccount.transactions.length+1,
      ref: 'LI-'+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'')+'-'+String(DB.loanInterestAccount.transactions.length+1).padStart(3,'0'),
      date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), type:'CREDIT',
      description: `Interest received — ${l.loanNumber} Installment #${nextInstallment.installment} from ${debitAccount.accountNumber}`,
      amount: interestPayment, balance: DB.loanInterestAccount.balance,
      operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System', timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    });
    await syncLoanFundToDB('BANK-LI-0001', 'CREDIT', interestPayment,
      `Interest received — ${l.loanNumber} Installment #${nextInstallment.installment} from ${debitAccount.accountNumber}`,
      l.id, txnRef);
  }
  closeModal('loanRepaymentModal');
  // Sync loan outstanding/status and schedule to backend — sequential to avoid CSRF conflict
  if (API_CONNECTED) {
    try {
      await refreshCsrfToken();
      // First sync schedule
      const entries = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s => s.loanId === l.id);
      if (entries.length > 0) {
        const schedulePayload = entries.map(s => ({
          installment: s.installment, due: s.due,
          principal: s.principal, interest: s.interest,
          paid: s.paid || 0, status: s.status || 'DUE'
        }));
        await API.put('loans/' + l.id, { schedule: schedulePayload });
      }
      // Then sync loan status — refresh CSRF between calls
      await refreshCsrfToken();
      const loanUpdatePayload = {
        outstanding: l.outstanding,
        accrued_interest: l.accruedInterest,
        status: l.status,
        next_due: l.nextDue === '—' ? null : l.nextDue // ★ FIX (LOAN-007): Never send '—' as a date to backend
      };
      // ★ Sync debit account change to backend (persist repayment strategy)
      if (debitAccountChanged) {
        loanUpdatePayload.debit_account_id = l.debitAccountId;
        loanUpdatePayload.debit_account_number = l.debitAccountNumber;
      }
      await API.put('loans/' + l.id, loanUpdatePayload);
    } catch(err) { console.warn('[LoanRepayment] Failed to sync:', err); }
  }
  const isFullPay = nextInstallment.status === 'PAID';
  showToast('success', isFullPay ? 'Installment Paid in Full' : 'Partial Payment Recorded',
    `${money(paymentAmount)} debited from ${debitAccount.accountNumber} for ${l.loanNumber} #${nextInstallment.installment}. Principal: ${money(principalPayment)}, Interest: ${money(interestPayment)}. Loan outstanding: ${money(l.outstanding)}.`);
  addAuditEntry('LOAN_REPAYMENT','Loan',l.loanNumber,
    `Repayment of ${money(paymentAmount)} for ${l.loanNumber} installment #${nextInstallment.installment} by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Debit: ${debitAccount.accountNumber}. Principal: ${money(principalPayment)}, Interest: ${money(interestPayment)}. ${isFullPay?'Paid in full.':'Partial payment.'}`);
  renderLoans();
  renderLoanSchedule();
  renderAccounts();
  renderTransactions();
  renderDashboard();
  renderLoanFundPanel();
  return false;
}

/* ================================================================
   AUTO LOAN REPAYMENT — Continuous engine with penalty interest
   Runs on a timer. Deducts immediately when funds become available.
   Accumulates penalty interest on overdue installments.
   ================================================================ */

function isAutoDeductionEnabled() {
  // ★ FIX (ST-063): Use _findSetting() for case-insensitive lookup consistency.
  return _findSetting('auto_deduction_enabled')?.value === 'ON';
}

function toggleAutoDeduction() {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can toggle auto deduction.'); return; }
  // ★ FIX (ST-063): Use _findSetting() for case-insensitive lookup consistency.
  const s = _findSetting('auto_deduction_enabled');
  if(!s) return;
  const oldVal = s.value;
  const newVal = oldVal === 'ON' ? 'OFF' : 'ON';
  const _adPayload = { key: s.key, value: newVal };
  if (s.effectiveFrom) _adPayload.effective_from = s.effectiveFrom;
  // ★ FIX (ST-077): Persist to backend BEFORE updating local state. Previously updated
  // s.value immediately, so on API failure the engine state was inconsistent.
  API.put('settings', _adPayload).then(() => {
    s.value = newVal;
    if(s.value === 'ON') startAutoDeductionEngine();
    else stopAutoDeductionEngine();
    renderSystemSettingsCards();
    showToast(s.value==='ON'?'success':'info','Auto Deduction', 'Auto loan deduction has been turned ' + s.value + '.');
    addAuditEntry('AUTO_DEDUCTION_TOGGLE','System','ALL','Auto deduction toggled to '+s.value+' by '+STATE.currentUser?.fullName);
  }).catch(err => {
    console.warn('[Auto Deduction] Failed to persist to backend:', err);
    showToast('error', 'Persist Error', 'Failed to save auto deduction setting.');
  });
}

function toggleLoanAutoDeduct(loanId) {
  const l = DB.loans.find(x=>x.id===loanId);
  if(!l) return;
  const isCurrentlyOn = l.autoDeduct !== false;
  l.autoDeduct = !isCurrentlyOn;
  showToast(l.autoDeduct?'success':'info','Auto Deduction', `${l.loanNumber}: auto deduction turned ${l.autoDeduct?'ON':'OFF'}.`);
  addAuditEntry('LOAN_AUTO_DEDUCT_TOGGLE','Loan',l.loanNumber,`Per-loan auto deduction toggled to ${l.autoDeduct?'ON':'OFF'} by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}`);
  renderLoans();
  // Persist to backend so the toggle survives page refresh
  API.put('loans/' + l.id, { auto_deduct: l.autoDeduct ? 1 : 0 }).catch(err => {
    console.warn('[Loan Auto Deduct] Failed to persist to backend:', err);
  });
}

function startAutoDeductionEngine() {
  stopAutoDeductionEngine();
  // ★ On engine start, trigger a backend auto-pay sweep first (catches payments that
  // came due while the app was not running). The frontend tick handles ongoing auto-pay,
  // but the backend sweep ensures database consistency and processes any missed installments.
  triggerBackendAutoPay();
  const intervalSec = Number(DB.settings.find(x=>x.key==='auto_deduction_interval_seconds')?.value || 10);
  STATE.autoDeductInterval = setInterval(()=>{ autoDeductTick(); }, intervalSec * 1000);
}

/* ★ Trigger backend auto-pay endpoint — processes all due installments server-side.
   This is 100% database-driven and ensures auto-payment follows scheduled dates even
   when the frontend is not running. Called on engine start and can be triggered by cron. */
async function triggerBackendAutoPay() {
  if(!API_CONNECTED || !STATE.currentUser) return;
  try {
    await refreshCsrfToken();
    const result = await API.post('loans/auto-pay', {});
    if(result && (result.full > 0 || result.partial > 0 || result.settled > 0)) {
      console.log('[AutoPay] Backend sweep:', result.full, 'full,', result.partial, 'partial,', result.settled, 'settled');
      // Refresh data from backend to sync local state with database changes
      await reloadLoansFromBackend();
      await reloadAccountsFromBackend();
      try { renderLoans(); renderAccounts(); renderTransactions(); renderDashboard(); renderLoanFundPanel(); } catch(e) {}
    }
  } catch(err) {
    console.warn('[AutoPay] Backend sweep failed (non-fatal):', err);
  }
}

/* ★ Reload loans and accounts from backend after auto-pay sweep to sync local state */
async function reloadLoansFromBackend() {
  if(!API_CONNECTED) return;
  try {
    const data = await API.get('loans?pageSize=500');
    if(data && Array.isArray(data.data)) {
      // Merge backend data into local DB — update existing, don't lose frontend-only state
      for(const bLoan of data.data) {
        const existing = DB.loans.find(l => l.id === bLoan.id);
        if(existing) {
          existing.outstanding = Number(bLoan.outstanding) || 0;
          existing.accruedInterest = Number(bLoan.accrued_interest) || 0;
          existing.status = bLoan.status;
          existing.nextDue = bLoan.next_due || '—';
          // Sync schedule if present
          if(bLoan.schedule && Array.isArray(bLoan.schedule)) {
            for(const bSch of bLoan.schedule) {
              const existingSch = DB.loanSchedule.find(s => s.loanId === bLoan.id && s.installment === Number(bSch.installment));
              if(existingSch) {
                existingSch.paid = Number(bSch.paid) || 0;
                existingSch.status = bSch.status || 'DUE';
                existingSch.principal = Number(bSch.principal) || 0;
                existingSch.interest = Number(bSch.interest) || 0;
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  } catch(e) { console.warn('[AutoPay] reloadLoansFromBackend failed:', e); }
}

async function reloadAccountsFromBackend() {
  if(!API_CONNECTED) return;
  try {
    const data = await API.get('accounts?pageSize=500');
    if(data && Array.isArray(data.data)) {
      for(const bAcct of data.data) {
        const existing = DB.accounts.find(a => a.id === bAcct.id);
        if(existing) {
          existing.ledgerBalance = Number(bAcct.ledger_balance) || 0;
          existing.availableBalance = Number(bAcct.available_balance) || 0;
        }
      }
    }
  } catch(e) { console.warn('[AutoPay] reloadAccountsFromBackend failed:', e); }
}

function stopAutoDeductionEngine() {
  if(STATE.autoDeductInterval) { clearInterval(STATE.autoDeductInterval); STATE.autoDeductInterval = null; }
}

/* ====================================================================
   INTEREST CAPITALIZATION — Credit Union (and all) loans
   When a borrower fails to pay, the missed interest is added to the
   outstanding principal (capitalized). Future installments are then
   calculated on the new, higher balance. This compounds each month
   until payments resume.

   Mechanics:
     1. Missed interest for installment = inst.interest - inst.paid
     2. l.outstanding += missedInterest  (interest becomes principal)
     3. l.accruedInterest += missedInterest (track total capitalized)
     4. Remaining installments recalculated with new outstanding + remaining term
     5. New EMI computed: EMI = P × r(1+r)^n / ((1+r)^n - 1)

   This only runs ONCE per installment (tracked by inst.interestCapitalized flag).
   ==================================================================== */

/**
 * Capitalize the missed interest for a single installment and recalculate remaining schedule.
 * @param {Object} loan - The loan object from DB.loans
 * @param {Object} installment - The MISSED installment from DB.loanSchedule
 * @returns {boolean} true if capitalization was applied, false if already done or N/A
 */
function capitalizeMissedInterest(loan, installment) {
  if (!loan || !installment) return false;
  if (installment.interestCapitalized) return false; // Already capitalized — skip

  const missedInterest = Math.round((installment.interest - (installment.paid || 0)) * 100) / 100;
  if (missedInterest <= 0) return false; // Nothing to capitalize (fully paid interest or zero)

  const isCU = loan.loanModule === 'CREDIT_UNION';

  // ★ STEP 1: Add missed interest to outstanding principal (capitalization)
  loan.outstanding = Math.round((loan.outstanding + missedInterest) * 100) / 100;
  loan.accruedInterest = Math.round((loan.accruedInterest + missedInterest) * 100) / 100;
  installment.interestCapitalized = true; // Mark as done — prevents double capitalization

  // ★ STEP 2: Audit trail
  const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  addAuditEntry('INTEREST_CAPITALIZATION', 'Loan', loan.loanNumber,
    `Missed interest of ${money(missedInterest)} for installment #${installment.installment} ` +
    `capitalized into principal. New outstanding: ${money(loan.outstanding)}. ` +
    `${isCU ? '(Credit Union — compound interest per EMI formula)' : ''}`);

  // ★ STEP 3: Record capitalization transaction for audit
  const debitAccount = DB.accounts.find(a => a.id === loan.debitAccountId);
  DB.transactions.push({
    id: DB.transactions.length + 1,
    ref: 'CAP-' + today.replace(/-/g, '') + '-' + String(DB.transactions.length + 1).padStart(4, '0'),
    type: 'INTEREST_CAPITALIZATION',
    status: 'POSTED', branch: loan.branch,
    account: debitAccount?.accountNumber || loan.debitAccountNumber || 'N/A',
    accountType: debitAccount?.productType || 'N/A',
    customerName: loan.customerName,
    description: `Interest capitalization — ${loan.loanNumber} Installment #${installment.installment}`,
    category: 'Loan Interest', direction: 'debit', amount: missedInterest,
    memo: `MISSED interest of ${money(missedInterest)} added to principal. ` +
          `Previous outstanding: ${money(loan.outstanding - missedInterest)}. ` +
          `New outstanding: ${money(loan.outstanding)}. Installment #${installment.installment} was not paid.`,
    module: 'Loans', timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
  });

  // ★ STEP 4: Recalculate remaining installments based on new outstanding
  // Get all remaining installments (DUE, MISSED, PARTIALLY_PAID) after this one
  const allSchedule = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s => s.loanId === loan.id);
  const remainingSchedule = allSchedule.filter(s =>
    s.installment > installment.installment &&
    (s.status === 'DUE' || s.status === 'MISSED' || s.status === 'PARTIALLY_PAID')
  );

  if (remainingSchedule.length === 0) return true; // No remaining installments to recalculate

  // Calculate monthly rate
  const annualRate = (loan.interestRate || 0) / 100;
  const monthlyRate = annualRate / 12;
  const remainingTerm = remainingSchedule.length;
  let newPmt;

  if (monthlyRate === 0) {
    // Zero-rate edge case: equal principal
    newPmt = loan.outstanding / remainingTerm;
  } else {
    // ★ EMI formula: PMT = P × r(1+r)^n / ((1+r)^n - 1)
    const factor = Math.pow(1 + monthlyRate, remainingTerm);
    newPmt = loan.outstanding * (monthlyRate * factor) / (factor - 1);
  }
  newPmt = Math.round(newPmt * 100) / 100;

  // Recalculate each remaining installment with the new EMI on the increasing balance
  let remaining = loan.outstanding;
  for (const inst of remainingSchedule) {
    const interest = Math.round(remaining * monthlyRate * 100) / 100;
    let principal;
    if (monthlyRate === 0) {
      principal = Math.round(newPmt * 100) / 100;
    } else {
      principal = Math.round((newPmt - interest) * 100) / 100;
    }
    // Safety: don't exceed remaining balance (last installment adjustment)
    if (principal >= remaining) {
      principal = Math.round(remaining * 100) / 100;
    }
    inst.principal = Math.round(principal * 100) / 100;
    inst.interest = Math.round(interest * 100) / 100;
    inst.totalPayment = Math.round((principal + interest) * 100) / 100;
    remaining = Math.max(0, Math.round((remaining - principal) * 100) / 100);
  }

  console.log(`[Capitalization] ${loan.loanNumber}: ${money(missedInterest)} capitalized. New outstanding: ${money(loan.outstanding)}. Remaining installments recalculated with new EMI: ${money(newPmt)}`);
  return true;
}

/**
 * Run capitalization for ALL missed installments of a loan.
 * Called from the auto-deduction engines after MISSED detection.
 * @param {Object} loan - The loan object
 * @returns {number} Number of installments capitalized
 */
async function runCapitalizationForLoan(loan) {
  if (!loan) return 0;
  const missedInstallments = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s =>
    s.loanId === loan.id &&
    (s.status === 'MISSED' || s.status === 'PARTIALLY_PAID') &&
    !s.interestCapitalized
  );

  if (missedInstallments.length === 0) return 0;

  let capitalizedCount = 0;
  for (const inst of missedInstallments) {
    if (capitalizeMissedInterest(loan, inst)) {
      capitalizedCount++;
    }
  }

  if (capitalizedCount > 0) {
    // Sync capitalization transaction(s) to backend
    const lastTxn = DB.transactions[DB.transactions.length - 1];
    if (lastTxn && lastTxn.type === 'INTEREST_CAPITALIZATION') {
      await syncTransactionToBackend(lastTxn);
    }

    // Sync updated loan outstanding and schedule to backend
    if (API_CONNECTED) {
      try {
        await refreshCsrfToken();
        // Sync loan status (outstanding increased)
        await API.put('loans/' + loan.id, {
          outstanding: loan.outstanding,
          accrued_interest: loan.accruedInterest,
          capitalized_interest: loan.accruedInterest, // Track total capitalized interest for reporting
          status: loan.status,
          next_due: loan.nextDue
        });
        // Sync recalculated schedule
        await refreshCsrfToken();
        const entries = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s => s.loanId === loan.id);
        if (entries.length > 0) {
          const schedulePayload = entries.map(s => ({
            installment: s.installment, due: s.due,
            principal: s.principal, interest: s.interest,
            paid: s.paid || 0, status: s.status || 'DUE'
          }));
          await API.put('loans/' + loan.id, { schedule: schedulePayload });
        }
      } catch (err) {
        console.warn('[Capitalization] Failed to sync to backend:', err);
      }
    }
  }

  return capitalizedCount;
}

/* Guard flag to prevent overlapping auto-deduction ticks */
let _autoDeductTickRunning = false;

/* Main tick — runs every N seconds. Silent unless deductions occur.
   Converted to async to serialize all backend sync calls and prevent CSRF token cascade. */
async function autoDeductTick() {
  if(!STATE.currentUser || !isAutoDeductionEnabled()) return;
  if(_autoDeductTickRunning) return; // Prevent overlapping ticks
  _autoDeductTickRunning = true;
  try {
  const activeLoans = DB.loans.filter(l=>l.status==='ACTIVE'||l.status==='DELINQUENT');
  if(activeLoans.length === 0) return;

  let anyAction = false;
  let results = { full:0, partial:0, penalty:0 };

  for (const l of activeLoans) {
    // Check per-loan auto deduct setting (in addition to global)
    if(l.autoDeduct === false) continue;
    // Step 1: Apply penalty interest to all overdue installments (MISSED or PARTIALLY_PAID past due)
    const penaltyPct = Number(DB.settings.find(x=>x.key==='loan.late_payment_penalty')?.value || 2) / 100;
    const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
    const overdueInstallments = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s => s.loanId===l.id && (s.status==='MISSED'||s.status==='PARTIALLY_PAID'));
    for (const inst of overdueInstallments) {
      // Apply penalty on interest component: penalty = penaltyPct * remainingInterest per overdue cycle
      const remainingInterest = Math.max(0, inst.interest - inst.paid);
      if(remainingInterest > 0 && !inst.lastPenaltyDate) {
        inst.lastPenaltyDate = inst.due; // Track first penalty from due date
      }
      // Apply penalty if not already applied for this cycle
      if(!inst.penaltyAppliedDate || inst.penaltyAppliedDate < today) {
        const penaltyAmount = Math.round(remainingInterest * penaltyPct * 100) / 100;
        if(penaltyAmount > 0) {
          inst.interest = Math.round((inst.interest + penaltyAmount) * 100) / 100;
          inst.penaltyAppliedDate = today;
          l.accruedInterest += penaltyAmount;
          l._modified = true;
          results.penalty++;
          anyAction = true;
          // Record penalty transaction
          const txnRef = 'TXN-' + today.replace(/-/g,'') + '-' + String(DB.transactions.length+1).padStart(4,'0');
          const debitAccount = DB.accounts.find(a=>a.id===l.debitAccountId);
          DB.transactions.push({
            id: DB.transactions.length+1, ref: txnRef, type:'LOAN_INTEREST',
            status:'POSTED', branch:l.branch, account:debitAccount?.accountNumber||l.debitAccountNumber||'N/A',
            accountType:debitAccount?.productType||'N/A', customerName:l.customerName,
            description:'Late payment penalty — '+l.loanNumber+' Installment #'+inst.installment,
            category:'Loan Interest', direction:'debit', amount:penaltyAmount,
            memo:'AUTO-PENALTY '+penaltyPct*100+'% on overdue interest of '+money(remainingInterest)+' for installment #'+inst.installment+'. Balance insufficient — penalty accrued.',
            module:'Loans', timestamp:new Date().toISOString()
          });
          await syncTransactionToBackend(DB.transactions[DB.transactions.length - 1]);
          /* Record penalty as profit */
          if(typeof recordProfitEntry === 'function') {
            await recordProfitEntry({
              glAccount: '4300', glAccountName: 'Late Penalty Income',
              category: 'LATE_PENALTY', sourceRef: txnRef, sourceType: 'LATE_PENALTY',
              accountNumber: debitAccount?.accountNumber||'N/A', accountType: debitAccount?.productType||'N/A',
              customerName: l.customerName, branch: l.branch,
              grossAmount: remainingInterest, feeAmount: penaltyAmount, feePct: penaltyPct*100,
              feeMode: 'PENALTY',
              operator: 'AUTO-DEDUCT',
              description: 'Late payment penalty '+penaltyPct*100+'% on '+money(remainingInterest)+' for '+l.loanNumber+' #'+inst.installment
            });
          }
        }
      }
    }

    // Step 2: Try to collect ALL pending installments (DUE + MISSED + PARTIALLY_PAID)
    const pendingInstallments = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s => s.loanId===l.id && (s.status==='DUE'||s.status==='MISSED'||s.status==='PARTIALLY_PAID'));
    if(pendingInstallments.length === 0) continue;

    // Build account chain: primary first, then fallback sorted by balance desc
    const customerAccounts = DB.accounts.filter(a=>a.customerId===l.customerId && a.status==='ACTIVE');
    const primaryAccount = customerAccounts.find(a=>a.id===l.debitAccountId);
    const fallbackAccounts = customerAccounts.filter(a=>a.id!==l.debitAccountId).sort((a,b)=>b.availableBalance-a.availableBalance);
    const accountChain = [];
    if(primaryAccount) accountChain.push(primaryAccount);
    accountChain.push(...fallbackAccounts);

    for (const inst of pendingInstallments) {
      const totalDue = Math.round((inst.principal + inst.interest - inst.paid) * 100) / 100;
      if(totalDue <= 0) continue;
      // ★ FIX: Only attempt collection for installments whose due date has arrived.
      // Future installments marked as DUE at schedule generation must NOT be collected
      // on page refresh. This prevents "random pay on refresh" behavior.
      const instDueDate = inst.due || inst.due_date || '';
      if(instDueDate && instDueDate > today) continue; // Skip future installments

      // For PERCENTAGE_OF_ACCOUNT mode, recalculate the amount based on current account balance
      if(inst.isPercentOfAccount && l.repaymentPct > 0) {
        const debitAcct = DB.accounts.find(a=>a.id===l.debitAccountId);
        const actualBalance = debitAcct ? debitAcct.availableBalance : 0;
        const desiredAmount = Math.round(actualBalance * (l.repaymentPct / 100) * 100) / 100;
        // Override the installment amounts with the actual percentage calculation
        if(desiredAmount > 0 && desiredAmount <= actualBalance) {
          inst.principal = Math.min(desiredAmount * 0.7, inst.principal + l.outstanding);
          inst.interest = desiredAmount - inst.principal;
        }
      }

      // ★ Try each account in the chain — PRIMARY (disbursement) first, then ALL fallback accounts.
      // Critical: do NOT break on PARTIAL — continue draining other accounts for the remaining balance.
      // Only stop when either: (a) installment fully paid, or (b) ALL accounts exhausted.
      let instPaid = false;
      let instFullyPaid = false;
      for(const acct of accountChain) {
        if(acct.availableBalance <= 0 || acct.status !== 'ACTIVE') continue;
        // Re-check remaining due (may have decreased from prior partial payment in this chain)
        const remainingDue = Math.round((inst.principal + inst.interest - inst.paid) * 100) / 100;
        if(remainingDue <= 0) { instFullyPaid = true; break; }
        const r = await autoDeductFromAccount(l, inst, acct);
        if(r.success === true) {
          instFullyPaid = true; break;  // Full payment — done with this installment
        } else if(r.success === 'PARTIAL') {
          instPaid = true; // Partial — CONTINUE to next account for remaining balance
        }
      }
      // Determine outcome after ALL accounts have been tried
      const finalRemaining = Math.round((inst.principal + inst.interest - inst.paid) * 100) / 100;
      if(finalRemaining <= 0) {
        instFullyPaid = true; // Fully covered across multiple accounts
      }
      if(instFullyPaid) {
        results.full++; anyAction = true;
      } else if(instPaid) {
        results.partial++; anyAction = true;
      }
      // ★ If no account could pay ANYTHING, mark as MISSED and flag loan as DELINQUENT
      if(!instPaid && !instFullyPaid && inst.status === 'DUE') {
        inst.status = 'MISSED';
        anyAction = true;
        l._modified = true;
        if(l.status === 'ACTIVE') {
          l.status = 'DELINQUENT';
          addAuditEntry('LOAN_DELINQUENT_AUTO','Loan',l.loanNumber,'Loan auto-flagged as DELINQUENT by timer engine. Installment #'+inst.installment+' could not be collected from any customer account.');
        }
        // ★ CAPITALIZE: Missed interest added to principal (compounds until payments resume)
        await runCapitalizationForLoan(l);
      }
    }

    // Update loan nextDue and auto-settle
    // ★ FIX: Only update nextDue from schedule if loan is still active (not SETTLED/CLOSED)
    if(l.status === 'ACTIVE' || l.status === 'DELINQUENT') {
      const stillPending = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s=>s.loanId===l.id && (s.status==='DUE'||s.status==='MISSED'||s.status==='PARTIALLY_PAID'));
      if(stillPending.length > 0) {
        l.nextDue = stillPending[0].due;
      } else if(l.outstanding <= 0) {
        l.nextDue = '—';
        l.status = 'SETTLED';
        l._modified = true;
      }
      if(l.outstanding <= 0) {
        l.outstanding = 0; l.accruedInterest = 0; l.nextDue = '—'; l.status = 'SETTLED';
        l._modified = true;
      }
    }
  }

  // Only refresh UI and show toast if something happened
  if(anyAction) {
    // Sync all modified loans to backend — serialized through mutation queue
    // ★ FIX: Removed refreshCsrfToken() here — the mutation queue (enqueueMutation) now
    // handles CSRF refresh before each mutation automatically. Calling it here created
    // race conditions and extra unnecessary GET requests.
    const modifiedLoans = DB.loans.filter(l => l._modified);
    if (modifiedLoans.length > 0 && API_CONNECTED) {
      for (const l of modifiedLoans) {
        try {
          await API.put('loans/' + l.id, {
            outstanding: l.outstanding,
            accrued_interest: l.accruedInterest,
            status: l.status,
            next_due: l.nextDue
          });
          delete l._modified;
        } catch(err) {
          console.warn('[AutoDeduct] Failed to sync loan ' + l.loanNumber + ':', err);
        }
      }
    }

    addAuditEntry('AUTO_DEDUCTION_TICK','System','ALL',
      'Auto deduction tick: '+results.full+' full, '+results.partial+' partial, '+results.penalty+' penalties applied.');
    try {
      renderLoans(); renderLoanSchedule(); renderAccounts(); renderTransactions(); renderDashboard(); renderLoanFundPanel();
      // ★ FIX: Also refresh Operating Fund and GL panels — auto-deductions modify operating fund balance
      // and create GL entries, so these panels must be re-rendered too.
      try { renderOperatingFund(); } catch(e) {}
      try { renderGLAccounts(); } catch(e) {}
    } catch(e) {}
    const total = results.full + results.partial + results.penalty;
    if(results.full > 0 && results.penalty > 0) {
      showToast('warning','Auto Deduction', results.full+' paid, '+results.partial+' partial, '+results.penalty+' penalty(ies) accrued.');
    } else if(results.full > 0) {
      showToast('success','Auto Deduction', results.full+' installment(s) auto-deducted successfully.');
    } else if(results.penalty > 0) {
      showToast('error','Auto Deduction', results.penalty+' late penalty(ies) accrued. Funds still insufficient.');
    } else if(results.partial > 0) {
      showToast('warning','Auto Deduction', results.partial+' partial payment(s) made. Insufficient for full payment.');
    }
  }
  } finally { _autoDeductTickRunning = false; }
}

/* Core function: attempt to pay a single installment from a given account.
   Returns { success, accountId, amount, principalPaid, interestPaid, reason } */
async function autoDeductFromAccount(loan, installment, account) {
  // ★ BLOCK: SETTLED/CLOSED/WRITTEN_OFF/DEFAULTED loans cannot be auto-debited (defense-in-depth)
  if(loan.status !== 'ACTIVE' && loan.status !== 'DELINQUENT') {
    return { success:false, reason:'Loan '+loan.loanNumber+' is '+loan.status+' — auto-deduction blocked' };
  }
  const totalDue = installment.principal + installment.interest - installment.paid;
  if(totalDue <= 0) return { success:false, reason:'Already paid', amount:0 };

  if(account.status !== 'ACTIVE') {
    return { success:false, accountId:account.id, amount:0, reason:'Account '+account.accountNumber+' is '+account.status };
  }
  if(account.availableBalance < totalDue) {
    /* Partial: pay what we can — interest first, then principal */
    if(account.availableBalance <= 0) {
      return { success:false, accountId:account.id, amount:0, reason:'Zero balance in '+account.accountNumber };
    }
    let interestPayment = Math.min(installment.interest, account.availableBalance);
    let principalPayment = Math.min(installment.principal, account.availableBalance - interestPayment);
    if(principalPayment < 0) principalPayment = 0;
    const paymentAmount = interestPayment + principalPayment;

    /* Debit the account */
    account.ledgerBalance -= paymentAmount;
    account.availableBalance -= paymentAmount;

    /* Update loan */
    loan.outstanding = Math.max(0, loan.outstanding - principalPayment);
    loan.accruedInterest = Math.max(0, loan.accruedInterest - interestPayment);

    /* Update schedule */
    installment.paid += paymentAmount;
    installment.status = 'PARTIALLY_PAID';
    loan._modified = true;
    try { await syncLoanScheduleToDB(loan); } catch(e) { console.warn('[AutoDeduct] Schedule sync failed (non-fatal):', e); }

    /* Transaction */
    const txnRef = 'TXN-' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'') + '-' + String(DB.transactions.length + 1).padStart(4,'0');
    DB.transactions.push({
      id: DB.transactions.length+1, ref: txnRef, type:'LOAN_REPAYMENT',
      status:'POSTED', branch:loan.branch, account:account.accountNumber,
      accountType:account.productType, customerName:loan.customerName,
      description:'Auto partial repayment — '+loan.loanNumber+' Installment #'+installment.installment,
      category:'Loan Repayment', direction:'debit', amount:paymentAmount,
      memo:'AUTO-DEDUCT partial. Insufficient funds in '+account.accountNumber+' for full installment of '+money(totalDue)+'. Paid: '+money(paymentAmount)+' (P:'+money(principalPayment)+' I:'+money(interestPayment)+').',
      module:'Loans', timestamp:new Date().toISOString()
    });
    // Sync to backend — non-fatal: local deduction already succeeded
    try { await syncTransactionToBackend(DB.transactions[DB.transactions.length - 1]); } catch(e) { console.warn('[AutoDeduct] Transaction sync failed (non-fatal):', e); }

    /* Record interest portion as profit for partial payment — non-fatal */
    if(interestPayment > 0 && typeof recordProfitEntry === 'function') {
      try { await recordProfitEntry({
        glAccount: '4200', glAccountName: 'Loan Interest Income',
        category: 'LOAN_INTEREST', sourceRef: txnRef, sourceType: 'LOAN_INTEREST',
        accountNumber: account.accountNumber, accountType: account.productType,
        customerName: loan.customerName, branch: loan.branch,
        grossAmount: paymentAmount, feeAmount: interestPayment, feePct: loan.interestRate,
        feeMode: 'INTEREST',
        operator: 'AUTO-DEDUCT',
        description: 'Auto-deducted loan interest from '+loan.loanNumber+' #'+installment.installment
      }); } catch(e) { console.warn('[AutoDeduct] Profit entry failed (non-fatal):', e); }
    }

    /* ★ CREDIT Loan Fund (principal) and Loan Interest Income (interest) — AUTO-DEDUCT partial ★ */
    if(principalPayment > 0) {
      DB.loanFundAccount.balance += principalPayment;
      DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.push({
        id: DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.length+1,
        ref: 'LF-'+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'')+'-'+String(DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.length+1).padStart(3,'0'),
        date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), type:'CREDIT',
        description: `AUTO-DEDUCT principal — ${loan.loanNumber} #${installment.installment} from ${account.accountNumber}`,
        amount: principalPayment, balance: DB.loanFundAccount.balance,
        operator: 'AUTO-DEDUCT', timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      });
      await syncLoanFundToDB('BANK-LF-0001', 'CREDIT', principalPayment,
        `AUTO-DEDUCT principal — ${loan.loanNumber} #${installment.installment} from ${account.accountNumber}`,
        loan.id, txnRef);
    }
    if(interestPayment > 0) {
      DB.loanInterestAccount.balance += interestPayment;
      DB.loanInterestAccount.transactions.push({
        id: DB.loanInterestAccount.transactions.length+1,
        ref: 'LI-'+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'')+'-'+String(DB.loanInterestAccount.transactions.length+1).padStart(3,'0'),
        date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), type:'CREDIT',
        description: `AUTO-DEDUCT interest — ${loan.loanNumber} #${installment.installment} from ${account.accountNumber}`,
        amount: interestPayment, balance: DB.loanInterestAccount.balance,
        operator: 'AUTO-DEDUCT', timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      });
      await syncLoanFundToDB('BANK-LI-0001', 'CREDIT', interestPayment,
        `AUTO-DEDUCT interest — ${loan.loanNumber} #${installment.installment} from ${account.accountNumber}`,
        loan.id, txnRef);
    }

    return { success:'PARTIAL', accountId:account.id, amount:paymentAmount, principalPaid:principalPayment, interestPaid:interestPayment, reason:'Partial — insufficient funds' };
  }

  /* Full payment — correctly account for any prior partial payments */
  const remainingInterest = Math.max(0, installment.interest - Math.min(installment.paid, installment.interest));
  const remainingPrincipal = Math.max(0, installment.principal - Math.max(0, installment.paid - installment.interest));
  const interestPayment = remainingInterest;
  const principalPayment = remainingPrincipal;
  const paymentAmount = totalDue;

  account.ledgerBalance -= paymentAmount;
  account.availableBalance -= paymentAmount;

  loan.outstanding = Math.max(0, loan.outstanding - principalPayment);
  loan.accruedInterest = Math.max(0, loan.accruedInterest - interestPayment);

  installment.paid = installment.principal + installment.interest;
  installment.status = 'PAID';
  loan._modified = true;
  try { await syncLoanScheduleToDB(loan); } catch(e) { console.warn('[AutoDeduct] Schedule sync failed (non-fatal):', e); }

  /* Update next due */
  const remaining = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s=>s.loanId===loan.id && (s.status==='DUE'||s.status==='MISSED'));
  if(remaining.length > 0) {
    loan.nextDue = remaining[0].due;
  } else {
    loan.nextDue = '—';
  }
  /* Auto-settle */
  if(loan.outstanding <= 0) {
    loan.outstanding = 0;
    loan.accruedInterest = 0;
    loan.nextDue = '—';
    loan.status = 'SETTLED';
    loan._modified = true;
  }

  const txnRef = 'TXN-' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'') + '-' + String(DB.transactions.length + 1).padStart(4,'0');
  DB.transactions.push({
    id: DB.transactions.length+1, ref: txnRef, type:'LOAN_REPAYMENT',
    status:'POSTED', branch:loan.branch, account:account.accountNumber,
    accountType:account.productType, customerName:loan.customerName,
    description:'Auto repayment — '+loan.loanNumber+' Installment #'+installment.installment,
    category:'Loan Repayment', direction:'debit', amount:paymentAmount,
    memo:'AUTO-DEDUCT full installment from '+account.accountNumber+'. Principal: '+money(principalPayment)+', Interest: '+money(interestPayment)+'.',
    module:'Loans', timestamp:new Date().toISOString()
  });
  // Sync to backend — non-fatal: local deduction already succeeded
  try { await syncTransactionToBackend(DB.transactions[DB.transactions.length - 1]); } catch(e) { console.warn('[AutoDeduct] Transaction sync failed (non-fatal):', e); }

  /* Record interest portion as profit for full payment — non-fatal */
  if(interestPayment > 0 && typeof recordProfitEntry === 'function') {
    try { await recordProfitEntry({
      glAccount: '4200', glAccountName: 'Loan Interest Income',
      category: 'LOAN_INTEREST', sourceRef: txnRef, sourceType: 'LOAN_INTEREST',
      accountNumber: account.accountNumber, accountType: account.productType,
      customerName: loan.customerName, branch: loan.branch,
      grossAmount: paymentAmount, feeAmount: interestPayment, feePct: loan.interestRate,
      feeMode: 'INTEREST',
      operator: 'AUTO-DEDUCT',
      description: 'Auto-deducted loan interest from '+loan.loanNumber+' #'+installment.installment
    }); } catch(e) { console.warn('[AutoDeduct] Profit entry failed (non-fatal):', e); }
  }

  /* ★ CREDIT Loan Fund (principal) and Loan Interest Income (interest) — AUTO-DEDUCT full ★ */
  if(principalPayment > 0) {
    DB.loanFundAccount.balance += principalPayment;
    DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.push({
      id: DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.length+1,
      ref: 'LF-'+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'')+'-'+String(DB.loanFundAccount.transactions.length+1).padStart(3,'0'),
      date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), type:'CREDIT',
      description: `AUTO-DEDUCT principal — ${loan.loanNumber} #${installment.installment} from ${account.accountNumber}`,
      amount: principalPayment, balance: DB.loanFundAccount.balance,
      operator: 'AUTO-DEDUCT', timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    });
    await syncLoanFundToDB('BANK-LF-0001', 'CREDIT', principalPayment,
      `AUTO-DEDUCT principal — ${loan.loanNumber} #${installment.installment} from ${account.accountNumber}`,
      loan.id, txnRef);
  }
  if(interestPayment > 0) {
    DB.loanInterestAccount.balance += interestPayment;
    DB.loanInterestAccount.transactions.push({
      id: DB.loanInterestAccount.transactions.length+1,
      ref: 'LI-'+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'')+'-'+String(DB.loanInterestAccount.transactions.length+1).padStart(3,'0'),
      date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), type:'CREDIT',
      description: `AUTO-DEDUCT interest — ${loan.loanNumber} #${installment.installment} from ${account.accountNumber}`,
      amount: interestPayment, balance: DB.loanInterestAccount.balance,
      operator: 'AUTO-DEDUCT', timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    });
    await syncLoanFundToDB('BANK-LI-0001', 'CREDIT', interestPayment,
      `AUTO-DEDUCT interest — ${loan.loanNumber} #${installment.installment} from ${account.accountNumber}`,
      loan.id, txnRef);
  }

  return { success:true, accountId:account.id, amount:paymentAmount, principalPaid:principalPayment, interestPaid:interestPayment, reason:'Paid in full' };
}

/* Process all DUE/MISSED installments across all active/delinquent loans.
   Strategy:
     1. Try the loan's configured debit account first
     2. If insufficient funds, fall back to the customer's other active accounts (sorted by balance descending)
     3. If all fail, mark the installment as MISSED (if was DUE) and log a FAILED transaction
   */
async function processAutoRepayments() {
  const activeLoans = DB.loans.filter(l=>(l.status==='ACTIVE'||l.status==='DELINQUENT') && l.autoDeduct !== false);
  if(activeLoans.length === 0) { showToast('info','Auto Deductions','No active or delinquent loans with auto deduction enabled.'); return; }

  let results = { full:0, partial:0, failed:0, skipped:0, details:[] };

  for (const l of activeLoans) {
    const dueInstallments = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s=>s.loanId===l.id && (s.status==='DUE'||s.status==='MISSED'||s.status==='PARTIALLY_PAID'));
    if(dueInstallments.length === 0) continue;

    /* Build fallback account list: primary debit account first, then other active customer accounts sorted by balance desc */
    const customerAccounts = DB.accounts.filter(a=>a.customerId===l.customerId && a.status==='ACTIVE');
    const primaryAccount = customerAccounts.find(a=>a.id===l.debitAccountId);
    const fallbackAccounts = customerAccounts
      .filter(a=>a.id !== l.debitAccountId)
      .sort((a,b)=>b.availableBalance - a.availableBalance);
    const accountChain = [];
    if(primaryAccount) accountChain.push(primaryAccount);
    accountChain.push(...fallbackAccounts);

    for (const inst of dueInstallments) {
      // ★ FIX: Only attempt collection for installments whose due date has arrived.
      // Future installments must NOT be collected on page refresh — 100% database-driven.
      const todayStr = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
      const instDueDate = inst.due || inst.due_date || '';
      if(instDueDate && instDueDate > todayStr) {
        results.skipped++;
        results.details.push({ loan:l.loanNumber, inst:inst.installment, status:'SKIPPED', reason:'Installment due date '+instDueDate+' is in the future' });
        continue;
      }

      let paid = false;
      for(const acct of accountChain) {
        const r = await autoDeductFromAccount(l, inst, acct);
        if(r.success === true) {
          results.full++;
          results.details.push({ loan:l.loanNumber, inst:inst.installment, status:'PAID', account:acct.accountNumber, amount:r.amount });
          paid = true;
          break;
        } else if(r.success === 'PARTIAL') {
          results.partial++;
          results.details.push({ loan:l.loanNumber, inst:inst.installment, status:'PARTIAL', account:acct.accountNumber, amount:r.amount, reason:r.reason });
          paid = true;
          break;
        }
      }
      if(!paid) {
        /* All accounts exhausted — mark as missed if was DUE */
        if(inst.status === 'DUE') inst.status = 'MISSED';
        results.failed++;
        results.details.push({ loan:l.loanNumber, inst:inst.installment, status:'FAILED', reason:'Insufficient funds across all accounts' });

        /* Record a FAILED transaction for audit trail */
        const txnRef = 'TXN-' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'') + '-' + String(DB.transactions.length + 1).padStart(4,'0');
        const totalDue = inst.principal + inst.interest - inst.paid;
        DB.transactions.push({
          id: DB.transactions.length+1, ref: txnRef, type:'LOAN_REPAYMENT',
          status:'FAILED', branch:l.branch, account:l.debitAccountNumber||'N/A',
          accountType:'Auto', customerName:l.customerName,
          description:'Auto repayment FAILED — '+l.loanNumber+' Installment #'+inst.installment,
          category:'Loan Repayment', direction:'debit', amount:totalDue,
          memo:'AUTO-DEDUCT failed. Insufficient funds across all customer accounts for '+money(totalDue)+'.',
          module:'Loans', timestamp:new Date().toISOString()
        });

        /* Flag loan as delinquent if not already */
        if(l.status === 'ACTIVE') {
          l.status = 'DELINQUENT';
          addAuditEntry('LOAN_DELINQUENT_AUTO','Loan',l.loanNumber,'Loan auto-flagged as DELINQUENT. Installment #'+inst.installment+' could not be collected from any account.');
        }
        // ★ CAPITALIZE: Missed interest added to principal (compounds until payments resume)
        await runCapitalizationForLoan(l);
      }
    }
  }

  /* Audit */
  addAuditEntry('AUTO_REPAYMENT_RUN','System','ALL',
    'Auto deduction run completed. Full: '+results.full+', Partial: '+results.partial+', Failed: '+results.failed+', Skipped: '+results.skipped+'. Operated by: '+STATE.currentUser?.fullName);

  /* Refresh all views */
  renderLoans();
  renderLoanSchedule();
  renderAccounts();
  renderTransactions();
  renderDashboard();

  /* Show result summary */
  if(results.failed === 0 && results.partial === 0) {
    showToast('success','Auto Deductions Complete',
      results.full + ' installment(s) paid in full from customer accounts. No failures.');
  } else if(results.failed === 0) {
    showToast('warning','Auto Deductions Complete',
      results.full + ' paid in full, ' + results.partial + ' partial payment(s). All accounts had some funds.');
  } else {
    showToast('error','Auto Deductions Complete',
      results.full + ' paid, ' + results.partial + ' partial, ' + results.failed + ' FAILED. Review delinquent loans.');
    /* Open a summary drawer */
    let detailHtml = '<div class="drawer-section"><h4>Deduction Results</h4>';
    detailHtml += '<div class="detail-grid"><div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Paid in Full</div><div class="di-value" style="color:var(--success)">'+results.full+'</div></div>';
    detailHtml += '<div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Partial Payments</div><div class="di-value" style="color:var(--warn)">'+results.partial+'</div></div>';
    detailHtml += '<div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Failed</div><div class="di-value" style="color:var(--danger)">'+results.failed+'</div></div></div></div>';
    detailHtml += '<div class="drawer-section"><h4>Details</h4>';
    results.details.forEach(d => {
      const color = d.status==='PAID'?'var(--success)':d.status==='PARTIAL'?'var(--warn)':'var(--danger)';
      detailHtml += '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">'+d.loan+' #'+d.inst+'</span><span class="value" style="color:'+color+'">'+d.status+(d.account?' from '+d.account:'')+(d.amount?' — '+money(d.amount):'')+'</span></div>';
    });
    detailHtml += '</div>';
    openDrawer('Auto Deduction Report', detailHtml);
  }
}

/* ================================================================
   PROFIT & LOSS SYSTEM — v9
   ================================================================ */

/* Record a profit entry into the ledger */
function recordProfitEntry(entry, skipSync) {
  entry.id = DB.profitLedger.length + 1;
  entry.timestamp = entry.timestamp || new Date().toISOString();
  entry.date = entry.timestamp.slice(0,10);
  DB.profitLedger.push(entry);
  // Sync profit entry to backend (skip during backfill to avoid CSRF flood)
  if (skipSync || !API_CONNECTED) return Promise.resolve();
  return refreshCsrfToken().then(() => {
    return API.post('reports', {
    type: 'profit_loss',
    gl_code: entry.glAccount || entry.glAccountCode || '',
    gl_account_name: entry.glAccountName || '',
    category: entry.category || '',
    source_ref: entry.sourceRef || '',
    source_type: entry.sourceType || '',
    account_number: entry.accountNumber || '',
    account_type: entry.accountType || '',
    customer_name: entry.customerName || '',
    branch: entry.branch || '',
    gross_amount: entry.grossAmount || entry.amount || 0,
    fee_amount: entry.feeAmount || entry.amount || 0,
    fee_pct: entry.feePct || 0,
    fee_mode: entry.feeMode || '',
    operator: entry.operator || '',
    description: entry.description || ''
  });
  }).catch(err => { console.warn('[ProfitLedger] Failed to persist entry:', err); });
}

/* Backfill profit ledger from existing transactions on startup */
function backfillProfitLedger() {
  // ★ ENTERPRISE FIX: Trigger server-side backfill for ALL fee/interest transactions
  // that were recorded before the backend profit_ledger write was added.
  // This is idempotent (skips duplicates via source_ref matching) and runs once.
  if (STATE._plBackfillDone) return;
  STATE._plBackfillDone = true;

  // Server-side backfill — persists to database (the authoritative source).
  // ★ Only attempt if user has REPORTS module (POST to reports.php requires it).
  // For non-admin users, this silently skips — their withdrawal fees are already
  // recorded server-side by transactions.php POST handler, so no data is lost.
  // ★ FIX (DASH-012): Handle modules as objects [{name,access}] from backend
  const userMods = (STATE.currentUser?.modules || []).map(m => typeof m === 'string' ? m : (m?.name || m?.module_name || ''));
  const hasReports = userMods.includes('ALL') || userMods.includes('REPORTS');
  if (API_CONNECTED && hasReports) {
    refreshCsrfToken().then(() => {
      API.post('reports', { type: 'backfill_profit_ledger' }).then(res => {
        if (res?.data?.backfilled > 0) {
          console.log('[ProfitLedger] Server backfill: ' + res.data.backfilled + ' entries added.');
          showToast('info', 'Profit Ledger Updated', res.data.backfilled + ' historical fee entries synced to P&L panel.');
        }
      }).catch(() => {});
    }).catch(() => {});
  }

  // Also build in-memory cache for immediate frontend access
  DB.transactions.forEach(t => {
    if(t.type === 'FEE' && t.category === 'Withdrawal Fee' && t.amount > 0) {
      const acct = DB.accounts.find(a=>a.accountNumber===t.account);
      recordProfitEntry({
        glAccount:'4100', glAccountName:'Withdrawal Fee Income',
        category:'WITHDRAWAL_FEE', sourceRef:t.ref, sourceType:'WITHDRAWAL_FEE',
        accountNumber:t.account, accountType:t.accountType||acct?.productType||'N/A',
        customerName:t.customerName, branch:t.branch,
        grossAmount:t.amount, feeAmount:t.amount, feePct:t.feePct||0, feeMode:t.feeMode||'WITHDRAWAL',
        operator:'System (backfill)',
        description:'Backfilled withdrawal fee: '+money(t.amount),
        timestamp:t.timestamp
      }, true);
    }
    if(t.type === 'LOAN_INTEREST' && t.category === 'Loan Interest' && t.amount > 0) {
      const acct = DB.accounts.find(a=>a.accountNumber===t.account);
      const loan = DB.loans.find(l=>l.branch===t.branch && l.customerName===t.customerName);
      recordProfitEntry({
        glAccount:'4200', glAccountName:'Loan Interest Income',
        category:'LOAN_INTEREST', sourceRef:t.ref, sourceType:'LOAN_INTEREST',
        accountNumber:t.account, accountType:t.accountType||acct?.productType||'N/A',
        customerName:t.customerName, branch:t.branch,
        grossAmount:t.amount, feeAmount:t.amount, feePct:loan?.interestRate||0, feeMode:'INTEREST',
        operator:'System (backfill)',
        description:'Backfilled loan interest: '+money(t.amount),
        timestamp:t.timestamp
      }, true);
    }
    if(t.type === 'LOAN_REPAYMENT' && t.status === 'POSTED' && t.amount > 0) {
      // Extract interest portion from memo if present
      const interestMatch = (t.memo||'').match(/Interest:\s*([\d,.]+)/);
      if(interestMatch) {
        const intAmt = parseFloat(interestMatch[1].replace(/,/g,''));
        if(intAmt > 0) {
          const acct = DB.accounts.find(a=>a.accountNumber===t.account);
          const loan = DB.loans.find(l=>l.branch===t.branch && l.customerName===t.customerName);
          recordProfitEntry({
            glAccount:'4200', glAccountName:'Loan Interest Income',
            category:'LOAN_INTEREST', sourceRef:t.ref, sourceType:'LOAN_INTEREST',
            accountNumber:t.account, accountType:t.accountType||acct?.productType||'N/A',
