            customerName:t.customerName, branch:t.branch,
            grossAmount:t.amount, feeAmount:intAmt, feePct:loan?.interestRate||0, feeMode:'INTEREST',
            operator:'System (backfill)',
            description:'Backfilled loan interest from repayment: '+money(intAmt),
            timestamp:t.timestamp
          }, true);
        }
      }
    }
    if(t.fee > 0 && isWithdrawalTxn(t)) {
      // Avoid double-counting if already captured as FEE type
      const alreadyCaptured = DB.profitLedger.some(e=>e.sourceRef === t.ref);
      if(!alreadyCaptured) {
        const acct = DB.accounts.find(a=>a.accountNumber===t.account);
        recordProfitEntry({
          glAccount:'4100', glAccountName:'Withdrawal Fee Income',
          category:'WITHDRAWAL_FEE', sourceRef:t.ref, sourceType:'WITHDRAWAL_FEE',
          accountNumber:t.account, accountType:t.accountType||acct?.productType||'N/A',
          customerName:t.customerName, branch:t.branch,
          grossAmount:t.amount, feeAmount:t.fee, feePct:t.feePct||0, feeMode:t.feeMode||'WITHDRAWAL',
          operator:'System (backfill)',
          description:'Backfilled withdrawal fee: '+money(t.fee),
          timestamp:t.timestamp
        }, true);
      }
    }
  });
}

/* Get filtered profit ledger entries based on current filter state */
function getFilteredProfitLedger() {
  const dateFrom = $('plDateFrom')?.value || '';
  const dateTo = $('plDateTo')?.value || '';
  const category = $('plCategory')?.value || '';
  const plQ = norm($('plSearch')?.value || '');
  // Branch filter: use plBranch dropdown if set; otherwise auto-apply current header branch
  let branch = $('plBranch')?.value || '';
  if (!branch && !isAllBranchesMode() && STATE.currentBranch) {
    branch = STATE.currentBranch;
  }
  const acctType = $('plAccountType')?.value || '';
  const base = filterByUserBranch(DB.profitLedger);
  return base.filter(e =>
    (!plQ || [e.glAccount,e.glAccountName,e.description,e.accountNumber,e.customerName,e.branch,e.category,e.sourceRef].some(v => norm(v).includes(plQ))) &&
    (!dateFrom || e.date >= dateFrom) &&
    (!dateTo || e.date <= dateTo) &&
    (!category || e.category === category) &&
    (!branch || e.branch === branch) &&
    (!acctType || e.accountType === acctType)
  );
}

/* Get GL account balances from profit ledger */
function getGLBalances(filtered, branchFilter, dateTo) {
  // ★ FIX (GLA-007): Rewritten to use GL journal entries (debit/credit) as the primary
  // computation method — same logic as renderGLAccounts(). The previous version used
  // profitLedger fee amounts which produced inconsistent numbers across panels.
  // ★ FIX (GLA-002): Added branchFilter parameter so Balance Sheet can pass its
  // branch dropdown selection through.
  // ★ FIX (BS-001): Added dateTo parameter so Balance Sheet "As At Date" filter
  // actually filters GL entries by date. Previously the date filter was cosmetic only.
  const coa = DB.chartOfAccounts || [];
  let allGlEntries = branchFilter
    // ★ FIX (RA-ACC-004): Use case-insensitive branch comparison to match filterByUserBranch()
    ? (DB.generalLedger || []).filter(e => (e.branch || '').toUpperCase() === branchFilter.toUpperCase())
    : filterByUserBranch(DB.generalLedger || []);

  // ★ FIX (BS-001): Filter GL entries by date when dateTo is provided.
  // "As At Date" means: only include entries posted on or before that date.
  // This gives a point-in-time balance (e.g., balances as of 2024-06-30).
  if (dateTo) {
    const dateToStr = dateTo.slice(0, 10); // normalize to YYYY-MM-DD
    allGlEntries = allGlEntries.filter(e => (e.date || '').slice(0, 10) <= dateToStr);
  }

  // Build account type map for correct net balance computation
  const acctTypeMap = {};
  coa.forEach(a => { acctTypeMap[a.code] = a.type; });

  // Compute balances from GL journal entries — identical logic to renderGLAccounts()
  const balances = {};
  coa.forEach(a => { balances[a.code] = 0; });
  allGlEntries.forEach(e => {
    if (balances[e.accountCode] !== undefined) {
      const dr = Number(e.debit || 0);
      const cr = Number(e.credit || 0);
      const eType = acctTypeMap[e.accountCode] || '';
      balances[e.accountCode] += (eType === 'ASSET' || eType === 'EXPENSE') ? (dr - cr) : (cr - dr);
    }
  });

  // Override with key balances from local data (same overrides as renderGLAccounts)
  let branchLoans = branchFilter
    ? (DB.loans || []).filter(l => (l.branch || '') === branchFilter)
    : filterByUserBranch(DB.loans);
  let branchAccounts = branchFilter
    ? (DB.accounts || []).filter(a => (a.branch || '') === branchFilter)
    : filterByUserBranch(DB.accounts);

  // ★ FIX (BS-001): When dateTo is set, filter loans to those disbursed on or before that date.
  // Only include loans that existed as of the as-at date. Current outstanding is used
  // as a proxy since historical outstanding balances are not stored per-date.
  if (dateTo) {
    const dateToStr = dateTo.slice(0, 10);
    branchLoans = branchLoans.filter(l => (l.disbursedAt || l.createdAt || '').slice(0, 10) <= dateToStr);
  }

  // GL 1100 (Customer Loan Portfolio) = sum of outstanding loan principals
  balances['1100'] = branchLoans.reduce((s,l) => s + l.outstanding, 0);
  // GL 1200 (Loans and Advances Fund Pool) = net GL 1200 entries (DR - CR)
  // ★ FIX (BS-001): already date-filtered via allGlEntries above
  balances['1200'] = allGlEntries.filter(e => e.accountCode === '1200').reduce((s,e) => s + Number(e.debit||0) - Number(e.credit||0), 0);
  // GL 1201 (Loans Receivable) = sum of outstanding loan principals
  balances['1201'] = branchLoans.reduce((s,l) => s + l.outstanding, 0);
  // GL 2000 (Customer Deposits) = sum of active account ledger balances
  balances['2000'] = branchAccounts.filter(a => a.status === 'ACTIVE').reduce((s,a) => s + a.ledgerBalance, 0);
  // Operating fund (GL 1400): global balance in all-branches mode, branch net flow otherwise
  let branchOpTxns = branchFilter
    ? (DB.operatingAccount.transactions || []).filter(t => (t.branch || '') === branchFilter)
    : filterByUserBranch(DB.operatingAccount.transactions || []);
  // ★ FIX (BS-001): Filter operating fund transactions by dateTo as well
  if (dateTo) {
    const dateToStr = dateTo.slice(0, 10);
    branchOpTxns = branchOpTxns.filter(t => ((t.date || t.timestamp || '').slice(0, 10)) <= dateToStr);
  }
  const branchOpNet = branchOpTxns.reduce((s,t) => s + (t.type === 'CREDIT' ? Number(t.amount || 0) : -Number(t.amount || 0)), 0);
  balances['1400'] = (branchFilter || !isAllBranchesMode()) ? branchOpNet : DB.operatingAccount.balance;

  // Retained Earnings (GL 3100) = Net Income
  const totalIncome = coa.filter(a => a.type === 'INCOME').reduce((s,a) => s + (balances[a.code] || 0), 0);
  const totalExpense = coa.filter(a => a.type === 'EXPENSE').reduce((s,a) => s + (balances[a.code] || 0), 0);
  balances['3100'] = totalIncome - totalExpense;
  return balances;
}

/* Set quick filter period */
function setPLPeriod(period) {
  const today = new Date();
  const fmt = d => d.toISOString().slice(0,10);
  if(period === 'today') {
    $('plDateFrom').value = fmt(today);
    $('plDateTo').value = fmt(today);
  } else if(period === 'week') {
    const start = new Date(today);
    start.setDate(today.getDate() - today.getDay());
    $('plDateFrom').value = fmt(start);
    $('plDateTo').value = fmt(today);
  } else if(period === 'month') {
    $('plDateFrom').value = today.getFullYear()+'-'+String(today.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-01';
    $('plDateTo').value = fmt(today);
  } else if(period === 'quarter') {
    const qStart = new Date(today.getFullYear(), Math.floor(today.getMonth()/3)*3, 1);
    $('plDateFrom').value = fmt(qStart);
    $('plDateTo').value = fmt(today);
  } else if(period === 'year') {
    $('plDateFrom').value = today.getFullYear()+'-01-01';
    $('plDateTo').value = fmt(today);
  } else if(period === 'all') {
    $('plDateFrom').value = '';
    $('plDateTo').value = '';
  }
  STATE.plPage = 1;
  STATE.plServerData = null;
  renderProfitLoss();
}

function resetPLFilters() {
  $('plDateFrom').value = '';
  $('plDateTo').value = '';
  $('plCategory').value = '';
  // Reset branch filter: for non-admin or specific branch mode, default to current branch;
  // for admin in all-branches mode, clear to see everything
  const plBranchEl = $('plBranch');
  if (plBranchEl) {
    if (!isAllBranchesMode() && STATE.currentBranch) {
      const matchOption = [...plBranchEl.options].find(o => o.value === STATE.currentBranch);
      if (matchOption) plBranchEl.value = STATE.currentBranch;
      else plBranchEl.value = '';
    } else {
      plBranchEl.value = '';
    }
  }
  $('plAccountType').value = '';
  if ($('plSearch')) $('plSearch').value = '';
  STATE.plPage = 1;
  STATE.plServerData = null;
  renderProfitLoss();
}

/* Toggle between detail and daily summary table */
function togglePLTable() {
  const detail = $('plDetailTableWrap');
  const daily = $('plDailySummaryWrap');
  if(detail.style.display === 'none') {
    detail.style.display = 'block';
    daily.style.display = 'none';
  } else {
    detail.style.display = 'none';
    daily.style.display = 'block';
  }
}

/* Toggle trial balance section */
function toggleTrialBalanceSection() {
  const wrap = $('plTrialBalanceWrap');
  const btn = $('toggleTrialBalance');
  if(wrap.style.display === 'none') {
    wrap.style.display = 'block';
    btn.textContent = 'Collapse';
  } else {
    wrap.style.display = 'none';
    btn.textContent = 'Expand';
  }
}

/* ★ REMOVED: Old sync renderProfitLoss() — replaced by async database-driven version below.
   The old version read from stale DB.profitLedger (in-memory cache) which could be empty
   or outdated. The new version (defined later in this file as async function renderProfitLoss)
   fetches ALL data from the server. This placeholder exists only for code clarity — JavaScript
   hoisting ensures the later async declaration wins. All references to this function name
   throughout the codebase call the async version. */

/* Legacy P&L render — DEPRECATED: kept only as documentation reference.
   The active implementation is the async renderProfitLoss() defined at ~line 17985. */
function _renderProfitLoss_legacy_sync() {
  // Branch context indicator
  const bannerHtml = isAllBranchesMode() ? '' : `<div style="padding:10px 16px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.08);border:1px solid rgba(103,232,181,.2);border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:.84rem;color:var(--accent)">
    <span style="display:inline-flex"><i data-lucide="map-pin" style="width:18px;height:18px;stroke-width:1.8"></i></span>
    <div><strong>Branch: ${STATE.currentBranch}</strong> — Financial report shows data for the selected branch only. Switch to "All Branches" in the top menu to see company-wide figures.</div>
  </div>`;
  const filtered = getFilteredProfitLedger();

  // KPIs
  const totalRevenue = filtered.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0);
  const withdrawalFees = filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='WITHDRAWAL_FEE').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0);
  const loanInterest = filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='LOAN_INTEREST').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0);
  const latePenalties = filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='LATE_PENALTY').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0);
  const totalExpenses = filterByUserBranch(DB.expenses).filter(e=>e.status==='APPROVED').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amount,0);
  const netProfit = totalRevenue - totalExpenses;
  const marginPct = totalRevenue > 0 ? ((netProfit / totalRevenue) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0.0';

  $('plKpis').innerHTML = bannerHtml + [
    {label:'Total Revenue',value:money(totalRevenue),sub:`${filtered.length} entries · Margin: ${marginPct}%`,color:'var(--accent)',icon:'coins'},
    {label:'Withdrawal Fees',value:money(withdrawalFees),sub:`${filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='WITHDRAWAL_FEE').length} transactions`,color:'var(--accent)',icon:'credit-card'},
    {label:'Loan Interest',value:money(loanInterest),sub:`${filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='LOAN_INTEREST').length} transactions`,color:'var(--primary)',icon:'landmark'},
    {label:'Late Penalties',value:money(latePenalties),sub:`${filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='LATE_PENALTY').length} transactions`,color:'var(--danger)',icon:'alert-triangle'}
  ].map(k=>`<div class="kpi-card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:start"><span class="kpi-label">${k.label}</span>${IC(k.icon, 22)}</div><div class="kpi-value" style="color:${k.color}">${k.value}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${k.sub}</div></div>`).join('');

  // Revenue Breakdown Cards
  const feeCount = filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='WITHDRAWAL_FEE').length;
  const intCount = filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='LOAN_INTEREST').length;
  const penCount = filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='LATE_PENALTY').length;
  const transferFees = filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='TRANSFER_FEE').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0);

  $('plBreakdown').innerHTML = [
    {label:'Fee Income',amount:withdrawalFees,count:feeCount,avg:feeCount?withdrawalFees/feeCount:0,color:'var(--accent)',icon:'credit-card'},
    {label:'Interest Income',amount:loanInterest,count:intCount,avg:intCount?loanInterest/intCount:0,color:'var(--primary)',icon:'bar-chart-3'},
    {label:'Penalty Income',amount:latePenalties,count:penCount,avg:penCount?latePenalties/penCount:0,color:'var(--danger)',icon:'zap'}
  ].map(c=>`<div class="card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:12px"><h4 style="font-size:.92rem;color:var(--text2)">${c.label}</h4>${IC(c.icon, 22)}</div><div style="font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:800;color:${c.color};margin-bottom:8px">${money(c.amount)}</div><div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px"><div class="detail-item" style="padding:8px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)"><div class="di-label" style="font-size:.7rem">Transactions</div><div class="di-value" style="font-size:.95rem">${c.count}</div></div><div class="detail-item" style="padding:8px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)"><div class="di-label" style="font-size:.7rem">Avg / Txn</div><div class="di-value" style="font-size:.95rem">${money(c.avg)}</div></div></div></div>`).join('');

  // Detail Table
  const {items, total, pages} = paginate([...filtered].sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0)), STATE.plPage, STATE.plPageSize);
  $('plDetailBody').innerHTML = items.map(e=>`<tr>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.78rem">${e.sourceRef}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${e.date}</td>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.78rem">${e.glAccount}</td>
    <td><span class="pill ${e.category==='WITHDRAWAL_FEE'?'pill-salary':e.category==='LOAN_INTEREST'?'pill-current':e.category==='LATE_PENALTY'?'pill-delinquency':'pill-pending'}" style="font-size:.72rem">${e.category.replace(/_/g,' ')}</span></td>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.78rem">${e.accountNumber}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.84rem">${e.customerName}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${e.branch}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.84rem">${money(e.grossAmount)}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--success)">${money(e.feeAmount)}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem">${e.feePct}%</td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${e.operator||'System'}</td>
    <td class="td-actions"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="openProfitDetail(${e.id})">View</button></td>
  </tr>`).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="11" class="empty-state"><p>No profit entries match your filters</p></td></tr>';
  renderPagination('plDetailPagination', STATE.plPage, filtered.length, 'goPLPage', STATE.plPageSize);

  // Daily Summary Table
  const dailyMap = {};
  filtered.forEach(e => {
    if(!dailyMap[e.date]) dailyMap[e.date] = {total:0,fees:0,interest:0,penalties:0,count:0};
    dailyMap[e.date].total += e.feeAmount;
    dailyMap[e.date].count++;
    if(e.category==='WITHDRAWAL_FEE') dailyMap[e.date].fees += e.feeAmount;
    if(e.category==='LOAN_INTEREST') dailyMap[e.date].interest += e.feeAmount;
    if(e.category==='LATE_PENALTY') dailyMap[e.date].penalties += e.feeAmount;
  });
  const dailyEntries = Object.entries(dailyMap).sort((a,b)=>b[0].localeCompare(a[0])).slice(0,30);
  $('plDailyBody').innerHTML = dailyEntries.map(([date,d])=>`<tr>
    <td style="font-size:.86rem;font-weight:600">${date}</td>
    <td style="font-weight:700;color:var(--success)">${money(d.total)}</td>
    <td>${money(d.fees)}</td>
    <td>${money(d.interest)}</td>
    <td style="color:var(--danger)">${money(d.penalties)}</td>
    <td>${d.count}</td>
    <td>${d.total>0?((d.total/(d.fees+d.interest+d.penalties||1))*100).toFixed(1):'0'}%</td>
  </tr>`).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="7" class="empty-state"><p>No data for the selected period</p></td></tr>';

  // Trial Balance
  const glBalances = getGLBalances(filtered);
  $('plTrialBody').innerHTML = DB.chartOfAccounts.map(a=>`<tr>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600">${a.code}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.86rem">${a.name}</td>
    <td><span class="pill ${a.type==='ASSET'?'pill-current':a.type==='LIABILITY'?'pill-delinquency':a.type==='INCOME'?'pill-approved':a.type==='EXPENSE'?'pill-rejected':'pill-salary'}" style="font-size:.72rem">${a.type}</span></td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${a.category}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;color:${(glBalances[a.code]||0)>=0?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${money(glBalances[a.code]||0)}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem">${a.isActive?'<span style="color:var(--success)">Active</span>':'<span style="color:var(--muted)">Inactive</span>'}</td>
  </tr>`).join('');

  // Draw trend chart
  drawProfitTrendChart(filtered);
}

function goPLPage(p) { STATE.plPage = p; STATE.plServerData = null; renderProfitLoss(); }

/* Open profit entry detail in drawer */
function openProfitDetail(id) {
  // ★ FIXED: Try server data cache first (STATE.plServerData), then fall back to local cache.
  // The enterprise P&L is 100% database-driven — entries come from the server, not from
  // the stale in-memory DB.profitLedger array which may be empty or outdated.
  let e = STATE.plServerData?.entries?.items?.find(x => x.id === id);
  if (e) {
    // Map server format to local format
    e = {
      id: e.id, category: e.category||'', sourceRef: e.source_ref||'', sourceType: e.source_type||'',
      accountNumber: e.account_number||'', accountType: e.account_type||'',
      customerName: e.customer_name||'', branch: e.branch||'',
      grossAmount: parseFloat(e.gross_amount||0), feeAmount: parseFloat(e.fee_amount||0),
      feePct: parseFloat(e.fee_pct||0), feeMode: e.fee_mode||'',
      operator: e.operator||'', glAccount: e.gl_code||'', glAccountName: e.gl_account_name||'',
      description: e.description||'', timestamp: e.created_at||e.timestamp||''
    };
  } else {
    // Fallback: try local cache (for backfill entries added during this session)
    e = DB.profitLedger.find(x=>x.id===id);
  }
  if(!e) { showToast('error','Not Found','Profit entry #'+id+' not found. Try refreshing the P&L data.'); return; }
  const debitGL = e.category==='WITHDRAWAL_FEE'?'1300 — Fee Receivable':e.category==='LOAN_INTEREST'?'1200 — Interest Receivable':'1300 — Fee Receivable';
  const creditGL = e.glAccount+' — '+e.glAccountName;
  openDrawer('Profit Entry #'+e.id, `
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Entry Information</h4>
      <div class="detail-grid">
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Entry ID</div><div class="di-value">${e.id}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Category</div><div class="di-value"><span class="pill ${e.category==='WITHDRAWAL_FEE'?'pill-salary':e.category==='LOAN_INTEREST'?'pill-current':'pill-delinquency'}">${e.category.replace(/_/g,' ')}</span></div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Fee Amount</div><div class="di-value" style="color:var(--success);font-size:1.2rem">${money(e.feeAmount)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Gross Amount</div><div class="di-value">${money(e.grossAmount)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Fee Rate</div><div class="di-value">${e.feePct}%</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Fee Mode</div><div class="di-value">${e.feeMode}</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Source Details</h4>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Source Reference</span><span class="value td-mono" style="font-size:.8rem">${e.sourceRef}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Account</span><span class="value">${e.accountNumber} · ${e.accountType}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Customer</span><span class="value">${e.customerName}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Branch</span><span class="value">${e.branch}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Operator</span><span class="value">${e.operator}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Timestamp</span><span class="value">${dateFmt(e.timestamp)}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Double-Entry Reference</h4>
      <div style="padding:12px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--warn-dim);border:1px solid rgba(255,190,105,.2);font-size:.84rem">
        <div style="font-weight:700;color:var(--warn);margin-bottom:8px">Journal Entry</div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label" style="color:var(--muted)">DEBIT</span><span class="value">${debitGL}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label" style="color:var(--muted)">CREDIT</span><span class="value">${creditGL}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label" style="color:var(--muted)">Amount</span><span class="value" style="font-weight:700;color:var(--success)">${money(e.feeAmount)}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Description</h4>
      <p style="font-size:.86rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6">${e.description||'No description provided.'}</p>
    </div>`);
}

/* Draw the 14-day revenue trend chart */
function drawProfitTrendChart(entries) {
  const canvas = $('profitTrendChart');
  if(!canvas) return;
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
  const W = canvas.clientWidth;
  const H = canvas.clientHeight;
  canvas.width = W * dpr;
  canvas.height = H * dpr;
  ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);

  // Build last 14 days
  const days = [];
  const today = new Date();
  for(let i = 13; i >= 0; i--) {
    const d = new Date(today);
    d.setDate(today.getDate() - i);
    days.push(d.toISOString().slice(0,10));
  }

  const feeData = [], intData = [], penData = [];
  days.forEach(day => {
    const dayEntries = entries.filter(e=>e.date===day);
    feeData.push(dayEntries.filter(e=>e.category==='WITHDRAWAL_FEE').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0));
    intData.push(dayEntries.filter(e=>e.category==='LOAN_INTEREST').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0));
    penData.push(dayEntries.filter(e=>e.category==='LATE_PENALTY').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0));
  });

  const allVals = [...feeData,...intData,...penData];
  const maxV = Math.max(...allVals, 1) * 1.15;

  const pad = {top:20,right:20,bottom:40,left:65};
  const cw = W - pad.left - pad.right;
  const ch = H - pad.top - pad.bottom;
  const barGroupW = cw / days.length;
  const barW = Math.max(barGroupW * 0.22, 4);

  // Grid
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(156,175,201,.1)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  for(let i = 0; i <= 4; i++) {
    const y = pad.top + (ch/4)*i;
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(pad.left,y); ctx.lineTo(W-pad.right,y); ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(138,159,192,.6)';
    ctx.font = '11px Inter, sans-serif';
    ctx.textAlign = 'right';
    ctx.fillText('$'+Math.round(maxV - (maxV/4)*i), pad.left - 8, y + 4);
  }

  // Bars
  const yPos = v => pad.top + ch - (v/maxV)*ch;
  days.forEach((day, i) => {
    const x = pad.left + i * barGroupW + barGroupW * 0.1;
    // Fee bar
    ctx.fillStyle = '#67e8b5';
    const fh = Math.max(feeData[i]/maxV*ch, 0);
    ctx.fillRect(x, yPos(feeData[i]), barW, fh);
    // Interest bar
    ctx.fillStyle = '#58b7ff';
    const ih = Math.max(intData[i]/maxV*ch, 0);
    ctx.fillRect(x + barW + 2, yPos(intData[i]), barW, ih);
    // Penalty bar
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b86';
    const ph = Math.max(penData[i]/maxV*ch, 0);
    ctx.fillRect(x + 2*(barW+2), yPos(penData[i]), barW, ph);
    // X label
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(138,159,192,.6)';
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.font = '10px Inter, sans-serif';
    ctx.fillText(day.slice(5), x + (3*barW+4)/2, H - pad.bottom + 16);
  });
}

/* Export filtered profit data as CSV */
function exportProfitCSV() {
  // ★ FIXED: Use server data (STATE.plServerData) instead of stale local DB.profitLedger.
  // The P&L panel is 100% database-driven — exports must reflect the same server data.
  let filtered = [];
  if (STATE.plServerData?.entries?.items?.length) {
    filtered = STATE.plServerData.entries.items.map(e => ({
      id:e.id, timestamp:e.created_at||e.timestamp||'', date:(e.created_at||e.timestamp||'').slice(0,10),
      glAccount:e.gl_code||'', glAccountName:e.gl_account_name||'', category:e.category||'',
      sourceRef:e.source_ref||'', accountNumber:e.account_number||'', accountType:e.account_type||'',
      customerName:e.customer_name||'', branch:e.branch||'',
      grossAmount:parseFloat(e.gross_amount||0), feeAmount:parseFloat(e.fee_amount||0),
      feePct:parseFloat(e.fee_pct||0), feeMode:e.fee_mode||'',
      operator:e.operator||'', description:e.description||''
    }));
  } else {
    // Fallback to local cache if server data not yet loaded
    filtered = getFilteredProfitLedger();
  }
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('Profit & Revenue Ledger Export');
  const header = 'ID,Timestamp,Date,GL Account,GL Account Name,Category,Source Ref,Account Number,Account Type,Customer Name,Branch,Gross Amount (FCFA),Fee Amount (FCFA),Fee %,Fee Mode,Operator,Description\n';
  const rows = filtered.map(e=>`${csv(e.id)},${csv(e.timestamp)},${csv(e.date)},${csv(e.glAccount)},${csv(e.glAccountName)},${csv(e.category)},${csv(e.sourceRef)},${csv(e.accountNumber)},${csv(e.accountType)},${csv(e.customerName)},${csv(e.branch)},${csvNum(e.grossAmount)},${csvNum(e.feeAmount)},${csvNum(e.feePct)},${csv(e.feeMode)},${csv(e.operator)},${csv(e.description)}`).join('\n');
  const totalFees = filtered.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0);
  const footer = csvFooter(filtered.length, [{label:'Total Fee Revenue (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalFees)}]);
  downloadCSV(meta + header + rows + footer, 'profit-ledger-export.csv');
  showToast('success','Export Complete',`${filtered.length} profit entries exported.`);
}

/* Print a professional P&L statement */
function printProfitLossStatement() {
  // ★ FIXED: Use server data (STATE.plServerData) instead of stale local DB.profitLedger.
  let filtered = [];
  if (STATE.plServerData?.entries?.items?.length) {
    filtered = STATE.plServerData.entries.items.map(e => ({
      id:e.id, timestamp:e.created_at||e.timestamp||'', date:(e.created_at||e.timestamp||'').slice(0,10),
      glAccount:e.gl_code||'', glAccountName:e.gl_account_name||'', category:e.category||'',
      sourceRef:e.source_ref||'', accountNumber:e.account_number||'', accountType:e.account_type||'',
      customerName:e.customer_name||'', branch:e.branch||'',
      grossAmount:parseFloat(e.gross_amount||0), feeAmount:parseFloat(e.fee_amount||0),
      feePct:parseFloat(e.fee_pct||0), feeMode:e.fee_mode||'',
      operator:e.operator||'', description:e.description||''
    }));
  } else {
    filtered = getFilteredProfitLedger();
  }
  const dateFrom = $('plDateFrom')?.value || '';
  const dateTo = $('plDateTo')?.value || '';
  const periodLabel = dateFrom && dateTo ? dateFrom + ' to ' + dateTo : 'All Time';

  const withdrawalFees = filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='WITHDRAWAL_FEE');
  const loanInterest = filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='LOAN_INTEREST');
  const latePenalties = filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='LATE_PENALTY');
  const transferFees = filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='TRANSFER_FEE');

  const wfTotal = withdrawalFees.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0);
  const liTotal = loanInterest.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0);
  const lpTotal = latePenalties.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0);
  const tfTotal = transferFees.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0);
  const totalRevenue = wfTotal + liTotal + lpTotal + tfTotal;
  const approvedExpenses = filterByUserBranch(DB.expenses).filter(e=>e.status==='APPROVED');
  const totalExpenses = approvedExpenses.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amount,0);
  const netIncome = totalRevenue - totalExpenses;
  const marginPct = totalRevenue > 0 ? ((netIncome/totalRevenue)*100).toFixed(1) : '0.0';

  // Branch summary
  const branches = {};
  filtered.forEach(e => { branches[e.branch] = (branches[e.branch]||0) + e.feeAmount; });

  // Account type summary
  const acctTypes = {};
  filtered.forEach(e => { acctTypes[e.accountType] = (acctTypes[e.accountType]||0) + e.feeAmount; });

  // Daily breakdown top 10
  const dailyMap = {};
  filtered.forEach(e => {
    if(!dailyMap[e.date]) dailyMap[e.date] = {fees:0,interest:0,penalties:0,total:0};
    dailyMap[e.date].total += e.feeAmount;
    if(e.category==='WITHDRAWAL_FEE') dailyMap[e.date].fees += e.feeAmount;
    if(e.category==='LOAN_INTEREST') dailyMap[e.date].interest += e.feeAmount;
    if(e.category==='LATE_PENALTY') dailyMap[e.date].penalties += e.feeAmount;
  });
  const topDays = Object.entries(dailyMap).sort((a,b)=>b[1].total-a[1].total).slice(0,10);

  // GL summary
  const glBalances = getGLBalances(filtered);

  const branch = isAllBranchesMode() ? 'All Branches' : (STATE.currentBranch || 'All Branches');
  const b = DB.bankBranding || {};
  const stmtRef = generateDocumentNumber('PNL');
  const stmtDate = dateFmt(new Date().toISOString());

  // Expense breakdown by category
  const expByCat = {};
  approvedExpenses.forEach(e=>{expByCat[e.category]=(expByCat[e.category]||0)+e.amount;});
  const expRows = Object.entries(expByCat).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]);

  // Register document for audit trail
  registerDocument({
    documentNumber: stmtRef, type: 'REPORT', subtype: 'PROFIT_LOSS_STATEMENT',
    accountNumber: '', customerId: 0, customerName: '',
    branch: branch, periodFrom: dateFrom, periodTo: dateTo,
    operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
    generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    printCount: 1, lastPrintedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    exportCount: 0, lastExportedAt: null,
    summary: { totalTransactions: filtered.length, openingBalance:0, closingBalance: netIncome, totalCredits: totalRevenue, totalDebits: totalExpenses, grossPay:0, netPay:0, totalDeductions:0, amount:0, transactionRef:'' },
    status: 'ACTIVE'
  });

  const html = `
    <div class="ent-doc">
      <!-- Enterprise Header -->
      <div class="ent-doc-header">
        <div class="edh-left">
          <div class="edh-logo">${b.logo ? '<img src="'+escUrl(b.logo)+'" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:14px" alt="Logo">' : (b.bankName||'A').charAt(0)}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="edh-bank-name">${b.bankName||'Atlas Bank'}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">${b.headOfficeAddress||''}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">SWIFT: ${b.swiftCode||'N/A'} · BEAC Approval: ${b.cbnLicenseNumber||'N/A'}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="edh-right">
          <div class="edh-doc-title">Profit &amp; Loss Statement</div>
          <div>Report Ref: ${stmtRef}</div>
          <div>Period: ${periodLabel}</div>
          <div>Generated: ${stmtDate}</div>
          <div>Operator: ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System'}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ent-doc-body">
        <!-- Report Metadata -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Report Information</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Branch</div><div class="edf-value">${branch}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Currency</div><div class="edf-value">XAF (FCFA)</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Fee Entries</div><div class="edf-value">${filtered.length}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Approved Expenses</div><div class="edf-value">${approvedExpenses.length}</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Executive Summary -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Financial Summary</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Revenue</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:#16a34a">${money(totalRevenue)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Expenses</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:#dc2626">${money(totalExpenses)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Net Income</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:${netIncome>=0?'#16a34a':'#dc2626'};font-weight:800">${money(netIncome)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Net Margin</div><div class="edf-value">${marginPct}%</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- OPERATING REVENUE -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title" style="border-left:3px solid #16a34a;padding-left:10px">Operating Revenue</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Withdrawal Fee Income</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#16a34a">${money(wfTotal)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Loan Interest Income</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#16a34a">${money(liTotal)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Late Penalty Income</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#16a34a">${money(lpTotal)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Transfer Fee Income</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#16a34a">${money(tfTotal)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grand" style="background:#16a34a;color:#fff"><span>Total Operating Revenue</span><span>${money(totalRevenue)}</span></div>
        </div>

        <!-- OPERATING EXPENSES -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title" style="border-left:3px solid #dc2626;padding-left:10px">Operating Expenses</div>
          ${expRows.map(([k,v])=>`<div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">${EXPENSE_CATEGORIES[k]?.name||k}</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#dc2626">${money(v)}</span></div>`).join('')}
          <div class="ent-doc-grand" style="background:#dc2626;color:#fff"><span>Total Operating Expenses</span><span>${money(totalExpenses)}</span></div>
        </div>

        <!-- NET INCOME -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Net Income</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-net" style="background:${netIncome>=0?'#f0fdf4':'#fef2f2'};border-color:${netIncome>=0?'#16a34a':'#dc2626'};color:${netIncome>=0?'#16a34a':'#dc2626'}">
            <span>Net Income (${marginPct}% Margin)</span><span>${money(netIncome)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- SUMMARY BY BRANCH -->
        ${Object.keys(branches).length > 1 ? `
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Revenue by Branch</div>
          <table class="ent-doc-table">
            <thead><tr><th>Branch</th><th style="text-align:right">Revenue (FCFA)</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
              ${Object.entries(branches).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).map(([br,amt])=>`<tr><td>${br}</td><td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:600">${money(amt)}</td></tr>`).join('')}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>` : ''}

        <!-- SUMMARY BY ACCOUNT TYPE -->
        ${Object.keys(acctTypes).length > 1 ? `
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Revenue by Account Type</div>
          <table class="ent-doc-table">
            <thead><tr><th>Account Type</th><th style="text-align:right">Revenue (FCFA)</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
              ${Object.entries(acctTypes).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).map(([t,amt])=>`<tr><td>${t.charAt(0)+t.slice(1).toLowerCase()} Accounts</td><td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:600">${money(amt)}</td></tr>`).join('')}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>` : ''}

        <!-- DAILY BREAKDOWN TOP 10 -->
        ${topDays.length > 0 ? `
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Daily Revenue Breakdown (Top 10 Days)</div>
          <table class="ent-doc-table">
            <thead><tr><th>Date</th><th style="text-align:right">Fees</th><th style="text-align:right">Interest</th><th style="text-align:right">Penalties</th><th style="text-align:right">Total</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
              ${topDays.map(([d,v])=>`<tr><td>${d}</td><td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:right">${money(v.fees)}</td><td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:right">${money(v.interest)}</td><td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:right">${money(v.penalties)}</td><td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:700">${money(v.total)}</td></tr>`).join('')}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>` : ''}

        <!-- GL ACCOUNTS SUMMARY -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Chart of Accounts — Income &amp; Expense</div>
          <table class="ent-doc-table">
            <thead><tr><th>GL Code</th><th>Account Name</th><th>Type</th><th style="text-align:right">Balance (FCFA)</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
              ${DB.chartOfAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='INCOME'||a.type==='EXPENSE').map(a=>`<tr><td class="edt-mono">${a.code}</td><td>${a.name}</td><td>${a.type}</td><td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:600">${money(glBalances[a.code]||0)}</td></tr>`).join('')}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>

        <!-- Certification -->
        <div class="ent-doc-cert">
          <strong>Certification:</strong> This profit and loss statement has been prepared from the profit ledger, expense records, and general ledger of ${b.bankName||'Atlas Bank'}. The figures represent a true and accurate reflection of the bank's revenue and expenses for the stated period. This document is generated electronically and does not require a physical signature. Any discrepancy should be reported to the finance department within 14 days.
        </div>

        <!-- Signatures -->
        <div class="ent-doc-signatures">
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">${STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'Authorized Officer'}</div>
            <div class="eds-role">Prepared By / Branch Operations</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">${branch}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">Chief Financial Officer</div>
            <div class="eds-role">Finance Department</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">Authorized Signatory</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Footer -->
        <div class="ent-doc-footer">
          ${b.bankNameShort||'Atlas Bank'} Limited · Registered in Cameroon · ${b.registrationNumber||'N/A'} · BEAC Approval: ${b.cbnLicenseNumber||'N/A'}<br>
          Registered Office: ${b.headOfficeAddress||'N/A'}<br>
          SWIFT Code: ${b.swiftCode||'N/A'} · Tel: ${b.phone||'N/A'} · Email: ${b.email||'N/A'}<br><br>
          <strong>CONFIDENTIAL:</strong> This document contains privileged financial information intended solely for authorized personnel. Unauthorized use, disclosure, copying, or distribution is strictly prohibited.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;

  printIsolated(html);
  addAuditEntry('PNL_STATEMENT_PRINTED','Report',stmtRef,`P&L statement printed. Period: ${periodLabel}. Branch: ${branch}. Revenue: ${money(totalRevenue)}. Expenses: ${money(totalExpenses)}. Net Income: ${money(netIncome)}.`);
}

/* ================================================================
   EXPENSE MANAGEMENT — v10
   ================================================================ */
const EXPENSE_CATEGORIES = {
  RENT:{glCode:'5100',name:'Rent & Lease Expense',color:'#58b7ff'},
  SALARIES:{glCode:'5200',name:'Salaries & Wages Expense',color:'#67e8b5'},
  UTILITIES:{glCode:'5300',name:'Utilities Expense',color:'#ffbe69'},
  EQUIPMENT:{glCode:'5400',name:'Equipment & Maintenance Expense',color:'#ff6b86'},
  MARKETING:{glCode:'5500',name:'Marketing & Advertising Expense',color:'#a78bfa'},
  PROFESSIONAL:{glCode:'5600',name:'Professional Services Expense',color:'#8a9cff'},
  TECHNOLOGY:{glCode:'5700',name:'Technology & IT Expense',color:'#4fd79f'},
  INSURANCE:{glCode:'5800',name:'Insurance Expense',color:'#f97316'},
  MISCELLANEOUS:{glCode:'5900',name:'Miscellaneous Expense',color:'#8a9fc0'}
};

async function handleRecordExpense(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const cat = $('expCategory').value;
  const amount = parseFloat($('expAmount').value);
  const vendor = $('expVendor').value.trim();
  const desc = $('expDescription').value.trim();
  const branch = $('expBranch').value;
  const notes = $('expNotes').value.trim();
  const catInfo = EXPENSE_CATEGORIES[cat];
  if (!catInfo) { showToast('error','Invalid Category','Please select a valid expense category.'); return; }
  if (amount <= 0) { showToast('error','Invalid Amount','Amount must be greater than zero.'); return; }

  // ★ DATABASE-FIRST: Create via API, server always sets PENDING
  if (API_CONNECTED) {
    try {
      await refreshCsrfToken();
      const res = await API.post('expenses', {
        date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10),
        category: cat,
        amount: amount,
        vendor: vendor,
        description: desc,
        notes: notes,
        branch: branch
      });
      const newId = res?.data?.id || res?.id;
      // Update local state with the server-returned record
      DB.expenses.push({
        id: newId || (DB.expenses.length + 1),
        date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10),
        category: cat, glCode: catInfo.glCode, glAccountName: catInfo.name,
        amount, vendor, description: desc, notes, branch,
        status: 'PENDING',
        approvedBy: null, approvedAt: null,
        operator: STATE.currentUser.fullName, timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      });
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('[Expense] Failed to create on backend:', err);
      showToast('error','Save Failed','Expense could not be saved to the database. Check console for details.');
      return;
    }
  } else {
    // Offline/demo mode
    const expense = {
      id: Date.now(),  // ★ FIX (EXP-003): Use Date.now() to avoid ID collision with server
      date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10),
      category: cat, glCode: catInfo.glCode, glAccountName: catInfo.name,
      amount, vendor, description: desc, notes, branch,
      status: 'PENDING',
      approvedBy: null, approvedAt: null,
      operator: STATE.currentUser.fullName, timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    DB.expenses.push(expense);
  }
  addAuditEntry('EXPENSE_RECORDED','Expense','EXP-'+DB.expenses[DB.expenses.length-1].id,`Recorded ${cat.toLowerCase()} expense of ${money(amount)} from ${vendor} for ${branch}. Status: PENDING.`);
  closeModal('recordExpenseModal');
  $('recordExpenseForm').reset();
  showToast('success','Expense Recorded',`${money(amount)} ${cat.toLowerCase()} expense recorded. Status: PENDING — awaiting approval.`);
  renderExpenses();
  updateBadges();
}

async function approveExpense(id) {
  const exp = DB.expenses.find(e=>e.id===id);
  if(!exp || exp.status !== 'PENDING') return;
  // ★ FIX (EXP-001): Self-approval guard — the operator who recorded the expense
  // cannot approve it. Maker-checker / dual-control principle.
  const currentFullName = STATE.currentUser?.fullName || '';
  if (exp.operator === currentFullName) {
    showToast('error', 'Self-Approval Blocked', 'You cannot approve an expense you recorded yourself. Dual-control requires a different person to approve.');
    return;
  }
  // ★ FIX (EXP-002): Check approval limit — prevent users from approving
  // amounts beyond their authority level
  const userLimit = STATE.currentUser?.approvalLimit || 0;
  if (userLimit > 0 && exp.amount > userLimit) {
    showToast('error', 'Approval Limit Exceeded', `Your approval limit is ${money(userLimit)}, but this expense is ${money(exp.amount)}. A higher-authority approver is required.`);
    return;
  }
  if(DB.operatingAccount.balance < exp.amount) { showToast('error','Insufficient Funds','Operating fund has insufficient balance for this expense.'); return; }

  // ★ DATABASE-FIRST: Approve via API — server atomically handles:
  //   1. Status → APPROVED
  //   2. Operating fund balance debit
  //   3. GL double-entry (CR 1400 / DR {expense gl_code})
  //   We do NOT call debitOperatingAccount() here — that would create
  //   duplicate GL entries and double-debit the operating fund.
  if (API_CONNECTED) {
    try {
      await refreshCsrfToken();
      await API.put('expenses/' + id, { action: 'APPROVE' });
      // Success — update local state
      exp.status = 'APPROVED';
      exp.approvedBy = STATE.currentUser.fullName;
      exp.approvedAt = new Date().toISOString();
      // ★ FIX: Only update local operating account cache — do NOT call
      //   debitOperatingAccount() since the backend already posted GL entries
      DB.operatingAccount.balance -= exp.amount;
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('[Expense] Failed to approve on backend:', err);
      showToast('error','Approval Failed','Could not approve expense on the server. Check console for details.');
      return;
    }
  } else {
    // Offline/demo mode
    exp.status = 'APPROVED';
    exp.approvedBy = STATE.currentUser.fullName;
    exp.approvedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    debitOperatingAccount(exp.amount, exp.description + ' - ' + exp.vendor);
  }
  addAuditEntry('EXPENSE_APPROVED','Expense','EXP-'+id,`Approved expense of ${money(exp.amount)} - ${exp.description}`);
  showToast('success','Expense Approved',`Expense #${id} approved and debited from operating fund.`);
  renderExpenses();
  updateBadges();
}

async function rejectExpense(id) {
  const exp = DB.expenses.find(e=>e.id===id);
  if(!exp || exp.status !== 'PENDING') return;
  showConfirm('Reject Expense',`Reject expense #${id} of ${money(exp.amount)}?`,async (reason)=>{
    // ★ DATABASE-FIRST: Reject via API
    if (API_CONNECTED) {
      try {
        await refreshCsrfToken();
        await API.put('expenses/' + id, { action: 'REJECT', reason: reason || 'No reason provided' });
        // Success — update local state
        exp.status = 'REJECTED';
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('[Expense] Failed to reject on backend:', err);
        showToast('error','Rejection Failed','Could not reject expense on the server.');
        return;
      }
    } else {
      exp.status = 'REJECTED';
    }
    addAuditEntry('EXPENSE_REJECTED','Expense','EXP-'+id,`Rejected expense of ${money(exp.amount)}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}`);
    showToast('warning','Expense Rejected',`Expense #${id} has been rejected.`);
    renderExpenses();
    updateBadges();
  }, true);
}

async function deleteExpense(id) {
  const exp = DB.expenses.find(e=>e.id===id);
  if(!exp || exp.status !== 'PENDING') { showToast('error','Cannot Delete','Only PENDING expenses can be deleted.'); return; }
  showConfirm('Delete Expense',`Permanently delete expense #${id} of ${money(exp.amount)}?`,async ()=>{
    if (API_CONNECTED) {
      try {
        await refreshCsrfToken();
        await API.del('expenses/' + id);
        DB.expenses = DB.expenses.filter(e=>e.id!==id);
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('[Expense] Failed to delete on backend:', err);
        showToast('error','Delete Failed','Could not delete expense on the server.');
        return;
      }
    } else {
      DB.expenses = DB.expenses.filter(e=>e.id!==id);
    }
    addAuditEntry('EXPENSE_DELETED','Expense','EXP-'+id,`Deleted pending expense of ${money(exp.amount)}.`);
    showToast('info','Expense Deleted',`Expense #${id} has been deleted.`);
    renderExpenses();
    updateBadges();
  });
}

function getFilteredExpenses() {
  const q = norm($('expSearch')?.value || '');
  const df = $('expDateFrom')?.value||'', dt = $('expDateTo')?.value||'';
  const cat = $('expFilterCategory')?.value||'', st = $('expFilterStatus')?.value||'', br = $('expFilterBranch')?.value||'';
  // Branch isolation
  const base = filterByUserBranch(DB.expenses);
  return base.filter(e=>
    (!q || [e.vendor,e.description,e.glCode,e.category,e.branch].some(v=>norm(v).includes(q))) &&
    (!df||e.date>=df)&&(!dt||e.date<=dt)&&(!cat||e.category===cat)&&(!st||e.status===st)&&(!br||e.branch===br));
}

function resetExpenseFilters() {
  $('expSearch').value=''; $('expDateFrom').value=''; $('expDateTo').value=''; $('expFilterCategory').value='';
  $('expFilterStatus').value=''; $('expFilterBranch').value=''; STATE.expensePage=1;
  renderExpenses();
}

function renderExpenses() {
  // Branch isolation: use branch-filtered expenses for ALL KPIs and displays
  const branchExpenses = filterByUserBranch(DB.expenses);
  const pending = branchExpenses.filter(e=>e.status==='PENDING').length;
  $('expensePendingBadge').textContent = pending; $('expensePendingBadge').style.display = pending>0?'inline':'none';
  const approved = branchExpenses.filter(e=>e.status==='APPROVED');
  const totalApproved = approved.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amount,0);
  const totalPending = branchExpenses.filter(e=>e.status==='PENDING').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amount,0);
  const catSummary = {};
  branchExpenses.filter(e=>e.status==='APPROVED').forEach(e=>{catSummary[e.category]=(catSummary[e.category]||0)+e.amount;});
  const topCat = Object.entries(catSummary).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1])[0];
  const expOpBal = isAllBranchesMode() ? DB.operatingAccount.balance : filterByUserBranch(DB.operatingAccount.transactions||[]).reduce((s,t)=>s+(t.type==='CREDIT'?Number(t.amount||0):-Number(t.amount||0)),0);

  $('expenseSummaryCards').innerHTML = [
    {l:'Total Expenses (Approved)',v:money(totalApproved),s:`${approved.length} transactions`,c:'var(--danger)',i:'trending-down'},
    {l:'Pending Approval',v:money(totalPending),s:`${pending} awaiting approval`,c:'var(--warn)',i:'clock'},
    {l:'Operating Fund',v:money(expOpBal),s:isAllBranchesMode()?DB.operatingAccount.accountNumber:(STATE.currentBranch+' branch'),c:'var(--accent)',i:'landmark'},
    {l:'Top Category',v:topCat?money(topCat[1]):'0 FCFA',s:topCat?topCat[0].charAt(0)+topCat[0].slice(1).toLowerCase():'N/A',c:'var(--primary)',i:'bar-chart-3'}
  ].map(k=>`<div class="kpi-card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:start"><span class="kpi-label">${k.l}</span><span style="font-size:1.3rem">${IC(k.i, 22)}</span></div><div class="kpi-value" style="color:${k.c}">${k.v}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${k.s}</div></div>`).join('');

  const maxCat = Math.max(...Object.values(catSummary),1);
  $('expenseCatBars').innerHTML = Object.entries(EXPENSE_CATEGORIES).map(([k,v])=>{
    const amt = catSummary[k]||0;
    const pct = (amt/maxCat)*100;
    // ★ FIX (EXP-004): Show "(Approved)" suffix in category bar label to clarify the amount scope
    return `<div class="expense-cat-bar"><span class="ecb-label">${v.name.split(' ')[0]} <span style="font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted)">(Approved)</span></span><div class="ecb-track"><div class="ecb-fill" style="width:${pct}%;background:${v.color}\"></div></div><span class="ecb-value">${money(amt)}</span></div>`;
  }).join('');

  // Populate branch filter
  // ★ FIX (DASH-011): Fix operator precedence — was `!length>1` (always false), now `length<=1`
  if($('expFilterBranch').children.length <= 1) {
    DB.branches.forEach(b=>{const o=document.createElement('option');o.value=b.name;o.textContent=b.name;$('expFilterBranch').appendChild(o);});
  }

  const filtered = getFilteredExpenses();
  const {items,total,pages} = paginate([...filtered].sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0)),STATE.expensePage,STATE.expensePageSize);
  $('expenseTableBody').innerHTML = items.map(e=>`<tr>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.78rem">EXP-${String(e.id).padStart(3,'0')}</td>
    <td>${dateFmt(e.date)}</td>  <!-- ★ FIX (EXP-006): Use dateFmt instead of raw ISO date -->
    <td><span class="pill" style="background:${EXPENSE_CATEGORIES[e.category]?.color||'var(--primary)'}22;color:${EXPENSE_CATEGORIES[e.category]?.color||'var(--primary)'};font-size:.72rem">${escHtml(e.category)}</span></td>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.78rem">${e.glCode}</td>
    <td style="font-weight:700">${money(e.amount)}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.84rem">${escHtml(e.vendor)}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${escHtml(e.branch)}</td>
    <td><span class="pill pill-${e.status==='APPROVED'?'approved':e.status==='PENDING'?'pending':'rejected'}" style="font-size:.72rem">${escHtml(e.status)}</span></td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem">${escHtml(e.operator)}</td>
    <td class="td-actions">${e.status==='PENDING'?`
      ${e.operator===(STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'')?`<span style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--warn);font-style:italic" title="You recorded this expense — dual-control prevents self-approval">Your expense</span> <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="deleteExpense(${e.id})" style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.72rem">Delete</button>`:`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="approveExpense(${e.id})">Approve</button> <button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="rejectExpense(${e.id})">Reject</button> <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="deleteExpense(${e.id})" style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.72rem">Delete</button>`}
    `:`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="openExpenseDetail(${e.id})">View</button>`}</td>
  </tr>`).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="10" class="empty-state"><p>No expenses found</p></td></tr>';
  renderPagination('expensePagination',STATE.expensePage,filtered.length,'goExpensePage',STATE.expensePageSize);
}

function goExpensePage(p){STATE.expensePage=p;renderExpenses();}

function openExpenseDetail(id) {
  const e = DB.expenses.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!e) return;
  openDrawer('Expense #EXP-'+String(e.id).padStart(3,'0'),`
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Expense Details</h4>
      <div class="detail-grid">
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Category</div><div class="di-value">${escHtml(EXPENSE_CATEGORIES[e.category]?.name||e.category)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Amount</div><div class="di-value" style="color:var(--danger);font-size:1.2rem">${money(e.amount)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">GL Code</div><div class="di-value td-mono">${escHtml(e.glCode)} — ${escHtml(e.glAccountName)}</div></div>
        <div class="detail-item"><div class="di-label">Status</div><div class="di-value"><span class="pill pill-${e.status==='APPROVED'?'approved':e.status==='PENDING'?'pending':'rejected'}">${escHtml(e.status)}</span></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Vendor & Description</h4>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Vendor</span><span class="value">${escHtml(e.vendor)}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Description</span><span class="value" style="max-width:60%;text-align:right">${escHtml(e.description)}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Branch</span><span class="value">${escHtml(e.branch)}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Approval & Audit</h4>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Operator</span><span class="value">${escHtml(e.operator)}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Approved By</span><span class="value">${escHtml(e.approvedBy||'N/A')}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Approved At</span><span class="value">${e.approvedAt?dateFmt(e.approvedAt):'N/A'}</span></div>
      <div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Recorded</span><span class="value">${dateFmt(e.timestamp)}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="drawer-section"><h4>Double-Entry Reference</h4>
      <div style="padding:12px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--warn-dim);border:1px solid rgba(255,190,105,.2);font-size:.84rem">
        <div style="font-weight:700;color:var(--warn);margin-bottom:8px">Journal Entry</div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label" style="color:var(--muted)">DEBIT</span><span class="value">${e.glCode} — ${e.glAccountName}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label" style="color:var(--muted)">CREDIT</span><span class="value">1400 — Operating Fund - Bank</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="label" style="color:var(--muted)">Amount</span><span class="value" style="font-weight:700;color:var(--danger)">${money(e.amount)}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:18px;display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap">
      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="navigate('expenses');setTimeout(()=>{printExpenseStatement();},200);closeDrawer();"><i data-lucide="printer" style="width:15px;height:15px;stroke-width:2;vertical-align:-2px"></i> Print Expense Statement</button>
      <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="navigate('documents');setTimeout(()=>{switchDocTab('history');},200);closeDrawer();"><i data-lucide="file-text" style="width:15px;height:15px;stroke-width:2;vertical-align:-2px"></i> View Document History</button>
    </div>`);
}

function exportExpensesCSV() {
  const filtered = getFilteredExpenses();
  if (filtered.length === 0) { showToast('warning','No Data','No expenses to export. Adjust filters or clear them.'); return; }
  const filterDateFrom = $('expDateFrom')?.value || '';
  const filterDateTo = $('expDateTo')?.value || '';
  const filterCategory = $('expFilterCategory')?.value || '';
  const filterStatus = $('expFilterStatus')?.value || '';
  const filterBranch = $('expFilterBranch')?.value || '';
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('Operating Expenses Export', [
    ['Filter Period', (filterDateFrom||'All')+' to '+(filterDateTo||'All')],
    ['Filter Category', filterCategory||'All'],['Filter Status', filterStatus||'All'],['Filter Branch', filterBranch||'All']
  ]);
  const header = 'ID,Date,Category,GL Code,GL Account Name,Amount (FCFA),Vendor,Description,Branch,Status,Operator,Timestamp\n';
  const rows = filtered.map(e=>`${csv(e.id)},${csv(e.date)},${csv(e.category)},${csv(e.glCode)},${csv(e.glAccountName)},${csvNum(e.amount)},${csv(e.vendor)},${csv(e.description)},${csv(e.branch)},${csv(e.status)},${csv(e.operator)},${csv(e.timestamp)}`).join('\n');
  const totalAmount = filtered.filter(e=>e.status==='APPROVED').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amount,0);  // ★ FIX (EXP-005): Only sum APPROVED expenses in export total, matching KPI card
  const footer = csvFooter(filtered.length, [{label:'Total Approved Expenses (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalAmount)}]);
  downloadCSV(meta + header + rows + footer, 'atlas-expenses-export-'+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)+'.csv');
  // Save export record to database
  const filterDesc = [filterDateFrom?'From '+filterDateFrom:'',filterDateTo?'To '+filterDateTo:'',filterCategory?'Cat: '+filterCategory:'',filterStatus?'Status: '+filterStatus:'',filterBranch?'Branch: '+filterBranch:''].filter(Boolean).join(' | ');
  registerDocument({
    documentNumber: 'EXP-CSV-' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'') + '-' + String(Date.now() % 10000).padStart(4,'0'),
    type: 'REPORT', subtype: 'EXPENSE_EXPORT_CSV',
    accountNumber: '', accountType: '', customerName: '',
    branch: filterBranch || 'All Branches',
    generatedByName: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
    periodFrom: filterDateFrom || '', periodTo: filterDateTo || '',
    summary: JSON.stringify({ recordCount: filtered.length, filters: filterDesc, format: 'CSV' })
  });
  addAuditEntry('EXPENSE_EXPORT_CSV','Expense','DOC',`Exported ${filtered.length} expense records to CSV. ${filterDesc?'Filters: '+filterDesc:'All expenses'}.`);
  showToast('success','Export Complete',`${filtered.length} expense records exported to CSV.`);
}

function printExpenseStatement() {
  const filtered = getFilteredExpenses();
  if (filtered.length === 0) { showToast('warning','No Data','No expenses match the current filters. Adjust filters or clear them.'); return; }

  // ── Capture active filter state for the printout ──
  const filterDateFrom  = $('expDateFrom')?.value || '';
  const filterDateTo    = $('expDateTo')?.value || '';
  const filterCategory  = $('expFilterCategory')?.value || '';
  const filterStatus    = $('expFilterStatus')?.value || '';
  const filterBranch    = $('expFilterBranch')?.value || '';
  const hasFilters = filterDateFrom || filterDateTo || filterCategory || filterStatus || filterBranch;
  const filterLabel = filterCategory ? (EXPENSE_CATEGORIES[filterCategory]?.name || filterCategory) : '';
  const periodLabel  = filterDateFrom && filterDateTo
    ? filterDateFrom + ' to ' + filterDateTo
    : filterDateFrom ? 'From ' + filterDateFrom : filterDateTo ? 'Until ' + filterDateTo : 'All Time';

  // ── Compute summary ──
  const approved = filtered.filter(e=>e.status==='APPROVED');
  const totalApproved = approved.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amount,0);
  const pending = filtered.filter(e=>e.status==='PENDING');
  const totalPending = pending.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amount,0);
  const rejected = filtered.filter(e=>e.status==='REJECTED');
  const totalRejected = rejected.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amount,0);
  const grandTotal = filtered.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amount,0);
  const byCat = {};
  filtered.forEach(e=>{byCat[e.category]=(byCat[e.category]||0)+e.amount;});
  const byBranch = {};
  filtered.forEach(e=>{byBranch[e.branch]=(byBranch[e.branch]||0)+e.amount;});

  // ── Enterprise branding & metadata ──
  const b = DB.bankBranding || {};
  const docNumber = generateDocumentNumber('EXP');
  const genDate = dateFmt(new Date().toISOString());

  // ── Build category rows ──
  const catEntries = Object.entries(byCat).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]);
  const catRows = catEntries.map(([k,v],i)=>`<tr>
    <td>${i+1}</td>
    <td>${EXPENSE_CATEGORIES[k]?.name||k}</td>
    <td class="edt-mono">${EXPENSE_CATEGORIES[k]?.glCode||''}</td>
    <td style="text-align:right;font-weight:700">${money(v)}</td>
    <td style="text-align:right">${grandTotal>0?((v/grandTotal)*100).toFixed(1):'0.0'}%</td>
  </tr>`).join('');

  // ── Build branch rows ──
  const branchEntries = Object.entries(byBranch).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]);
  const branchRows = branchEntries.map(([k,v],i)=>`<tr>
    <td>${i+1}</td>
    <td>${escHtml(k)}</td>
    <td style="text-align:right;font-weight:700">${money(v)}</td>
    <td style="text-align:right">${grandTotal>0?((v/grandTotal)*100).toFixed(1):'0.0'}%</td>
  </tr>`).join('');

  // ── Build journal rows ──
  const journalRows = catEntries.map(([k,v])=>`<tr>
    <td class="edt-mono">${EXPENSE_CATEGORIES[k]?.glCode||''}</td>
    <td>${EXPENSE_CATEGORIES[k]?.name||k} — Expense</td>
    <td style="text-align:right;font-weight:700">${money(v)}</td>
    <td style="text-align:right;color:var(--muted)">—</td>
  </tr>`).join('');

  // ── Build detail rows ──
  const sorted = [...filtered].sort((a,b)=>b.date.localeCompare(a.date)||b.id-a.id);
  const detailRows = sorted.map((e,i)=>{
    const stClass = (e.status||'').toLowerCase();
    const stColor = stClass==='approved'?'#15803d':stClass==='pending'?'#b45309':'#b91c1c';
    return `<tr>
      <td>${i+1}</td>
      <td class="edt-mono">EXP-${String(e.id).padStart(3,'0')}</td>
      <td>${e.date}</td>
      <td>${EXPENSE_CATEGORIES[e.category]?.name||e.category}</td>
      <td class="edt-mono">${e.glCode||''}</td>
      <td>${escHtml(e.vendor||'')}</td>
      <td style="overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;max-width:120px" title="${escHtml(e.description||'')}">${escHtml(e.description||'')}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted)">${escHtml(e.branch||'')}</td>
      <td style="text-align:right;font-weight:700">${money(e.amount)}</td>
      <td style="color:${stColor};font-weight:700">${e.status||'N/A'}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.75rem">${escHtml(e.operator||'')}</td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');

  // ── Build enterprise HTML (ent-doc format — consistent with P&L, Trial Balance, etc.) ──
  const html = `
    <div class="ent-doc">
      <!-- Enterprise Header -->
      <div class="ent-doc-header">
        <div class="edh-left">
          <div class="edh-logo">${b.logo ? '<img src="'+escUrl(b.logo)+'" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:14px" alt="Logo">' : (b.bankName||'A').charAt(0)}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="edh-bank-name">${b.bankName||'Atlas Bank'}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">${b.headOfficeAddress||''}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">SWIFT: ${b.swiftCode||'N/A'} · BEAC Approval: ${b.cbnLicenseNumber||'N/A'}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="edh-right">
          <div class="edh-doc-title">Expense Statement</div>
          <div>Report Ref: ${docNumber}</div>
          <div>Period: ${periodLabel}</div>
          <div>Generated: ${genDate}</div>
          <div>Operator: ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System'}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ent-doc-body">
        <!-- Report Metadata -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Report Information</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Branch</div><div class="edf-value">${filterBranch || 'All Branches'}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Currency</div><div class="edf-value">XAF (FCFA)</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Records</div><div class="edf-value">${filtered.length}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Approved</div><div class="edf-value">${approved.length}</div></div>
            ${filterCategory ? '<div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Category</div><div class="edf-value">'+escHtml(filterLabel)+'</div></div>' : ''}
            ${filterStatus ? '<div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Status</div><div class="edf-value">'+escHtml(filterStatus)+'</div></div>' : ''}
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Financial Summary (KPIs) -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Financial Summary</div>
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:8px">
            <div class="ent-doc-total-row" style="text-align:center"><div class="edtr-label" style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">Total Expenses</div><div class="edtr-value" style="color:#dc2626;font-size:1.1rem">${money(grandTotal)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-total-row" style="text-align:center"><div class="edtr-label" style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">Approved</div><div class="edtr-value" style="color:#16a34a;font-size:1.1rem">${money(totalApproved)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-total-row" style="text-align:center"><div class="edtr-label" style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">Pending</div><div class="edtr-value" style="color:#f59e0b;font-size:1.1rem">${money(totalPending)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-total-row" style="text-align:center"><div class="edtr-label" style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">Rejected</div><div class="edtr-value" style="color:#dc2626;font-size:1.1rem">${money(totalRejected)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-total-row" style="text-align:center"><div class="edtr-label" style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">Operating Fund</div><div class="edtr-value" style="font-size:1.1rem">${money(DB.operatingAccount?.balance||0)}</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- A. Breakdown by Category -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">A. Breakdown by Category</div>
          <table class="ent-doc-table">
            <thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Category</th><th>GL Code</th><th style="text-align:right">Amount (FCFA)</th><th style="text-align:right">% of Total</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
              ${catRows}
            </tbody>
          </table>
          <div class="ent-doc-grand"><span class="edtr-label">Total</span><span class="edtr-value">${money(grandTotal)} FCFA</span></div>
        </div>

        <!-- B. Breakdown by Branch -->
        ${Object.keys(byBranch).length > 1 ? `
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">B. Breakdown by Branch</div>
          <table class="ent-doc-table">
            <thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Branch</th><th style="text-align:right">Amount (FCFA)</th><th style="text-align:right">% of Total</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
              ${branchRows}
            </tbody>
          </table>
          <div class="ent-doc-grand"><span class="edtr-label">Total</span><span class="edtr-value">${money(grandTotal)} FCFA</span></div>
        </div>` : ''}

        <!-- C. Detailed Expense Records -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">C. Detailed Expense Records (${filtered.length})</div>
          <table class="ent-doc-table">
            <thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Ref</th><th>Date</th><th>Category</th><th>GL</th><th>Vendor</th><th>Description</th><th>Branch</th><th style="text-align:right">Amount (FCFA)</th><th>Status</th><th>Operator</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
              ${detailRows}
            </tbody>
          </table>
          <div class="ent-doc-grand"><span class="edtr-label">Grand Total</span><span class="edtr-value">${money(grandTotal)} FCFA</span></div>
        </div>

        <!-- D. Double-Entry Journal Summary -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">D. Double-Entry Journal Summary</div>
          <table class="ent-doc-table">
            <thead><tr><th>GL Account</th><th>Description</th><th style="text-align:right">Debit (FCFA)</th><th style="text-align:right">Credit (FCFA)</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
              ${journalRows}
              <tr><td class="edt-mono">1400</td><td>Operating Fund — Bank</td><td style="text-align:right;color:var(--muted)">—</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:700">${money(totalApproved)}</td></tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
          <div class="ent-doc-grand"><span class="edtr-label">Balance Check</span><span class="edtr-value">${money(totalApproved)} DR = ${money(totalApproved)} CR</span></div>
        </div>

        <!-- Authorization / Signatures -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Authorization</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-signatures">
            <div class="ent-doc-sig"><div class="eds-line">Prepared By</div><div class="eds-name">${escHtml(STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'')}</div><div class="eds-role">Operations</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-sig"><div class="eds-line">Reviewed By</div><div class="eds-name">Head of Operations</div><div class="eds-role">Management</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-sig"><div class="eds-line">Approved By</div><div class="eds-name">Chief Financial Officer</div><div class="eds-role">Executive</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        ${buildEnterpriseFooter(docNumber, 'expense statement')}
      </div>
    </div>`;

  // ── Render using isolated print pattern (same as Trial Balance, P&L, etc.) ──
  $$('[id$="PrintArea"]').forEach(el => { el.style.display = 'none'; el.classList.remove('printing'); });
  const old = document.getElementById('_isolatedPrintArea'); if (old) old.remove();
  const oldStyle = document.getElementById('_isolatedPrintStyle'); if (oldStyle) oldStyle.remove();
  const s = document.createElement('style');
  s.id = '_isolatedPrintStyle';
  s.className = 'dynamic-print-style';
  s.textContent = '@media print{ body > *:not(#_isolatedPrintArea):not(.dynamic-print-style) { display: none !important; } #_isolatedPrintArea { display: block !important; } @page { size: A4 landscape; margin: 8mm 10mm; } }';
  document.head.appendChild(s);
  const d = document.createElement('div');
  d.id = '_isolatedPrintArea';
  d.style.cssText = 'display:block;padding:20px;font-family:Inter,sans-serif';
  d.innerHTML = html;
  document.body.appendChild(d);
  setTimeout(() => { window.print(); const el = document.getElementById('_isolatedPrintArea'); if (el) el.remove(); const st = document.getElementById('_isolatedPrintStyle'); if (st) st.remove(); }, 300);

  // ── Save to database via document registration (silent, no toast) ──
  const filterDesc = [filterDateFrom?'From '+filterDateFrom:'',filterDateTo?'To '+filterDateTo:'',filterCategory?'Cat: '+filterCategory:'',filterStatus?'Status: '+filterStatus:'',filterBranch?'Branch: '+filterBranch:''].filter(Boolean).join(' | ');
  registerDocument({
    documentNumber: docNumber,
    type: 'REPORT',
    subtype: 'EXPENSE_STATEMENT',
    accountNumber: '',
    accountType: '',
    customerName: '',
    branch: filterBranch || 'All Branches',
    generatedByName: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
    periodFrom: filterDateFrom || '',
    periodTo: filterDateTo || '',
    summary: JSON.stringify({
      totalExpenses: grandTotal, approved: totalApproved, pending: totalPending, rejected: totalRejected,
      recordCount: filtered.length, filters: filterDesc, operatingFundBalance: DB.operatingAccount?.balance||0
    })
  });
  addAuditEntry('EXPENSE_STATEMENT_PRINTED','Expense','DOC','Printed expense statement ' + docNumber + '. ' + filtered.length + ' records, ' + (hasFilters?'Filters: '+filterDesc:'All expenses') + '. Total: ' + money(grandTotal) + '.');
  showToast('success','Statement Printed','Expense statement ' + docNumber + ' sent to printer. ' + filtered.length + ' records.');
}

/* ================================================================
   LOAN FUND PERSISTENCE — Sync loan fund transactions to backend DB
   ================================================================ */
function syncLoanFundToDB(accountNumber, type, amount, description, loanId, txnRef) {
  if (!API_CONNECTED) return Promise.resolve(null); // Skip in offline/demo mode
  return refreshCsrfToken().then(() => {
    return API.post('loan-fund-accounts', {
      account_number: accountNumber,
      type: type,           // 'CREDIT' or 'DEBIT'
      amount: amount,
      description: description,
      loan_id: loanId || null,
      transaction_ref: txnRef || null
    }).then(result => {
      // API.post returns null on HTTP errors — result is the parsed JSON on success
      if (result === null || result === undefined) {
        console.warn('[LoanFund] Sync returned null (possible HTTP error)');
        return null;
      }
      return result;
    }).catch(e => {
      console.warn('[LoanFund] Sync failed:', e);
      return null;
    });
  });
}

/* ================================================================
   LOAN DISBURSEMENT ROLLBACK — Clean up orphaned failed disbursements
   For loans that were marked ACTIVE + schedule persisted, but fund
   debit failed (insufficient balance). Calls backend endpoint that
   atomically: reverts loan to APPROVED, deletes schedule entries,
   reverses any LOAN_DISBURSEMENT transactions.
   ================================================================ */
async function rollbackLoanDisbursement(loanId, loanNumber) {
  if (!loanId || !Number.isSafeInteger(loanId)) {
    showToast('error', 'Invalid Loan', 'Cannot rollback — loan ID is invalid.');
    return false;
  }
  // ★ BLOCK: Only ACTIVE loans can be rolled back (best practice)
  const l = DB.loans.find(x=>x.id===loanId);
  if(l && l.status !== 'ACTIVE') {
    showToast('error','Action Blocked',`Only ACTIVE loans can have their disbursement rolled back. This loan is currently ${l.status}.`);
    return false;
  }
  showConfirm(
    'Rollback Disbursement',
    `This will atomically revert loan ${loanNumber} (ID: ${loanId}) from ACTIVE back to APPROVED. ` +
    `All schedule entries will be deleted and any disbursement transactions will be reversed. ` +
    `The Loans & Advances Fund will NOT be credited (it was never debited). Continue?`,
    async () => {
      try {
        const result = await API.post('loans/' + loanId + '/rollback-disbursement', {});
        if (result && result.success !== false) {
          const rb = result.data || result;
          showToast('success', 'Disbursement Rolled Back',
            `Loan ${loanNumber} reverted to APPROVED. Schedule entries deleted: ${rb.schedule_entries_deleted || 0}. ` +
            `Transactions reversed: ${rb.transactions_reversed || 0}.`);
          addAuditEntry('LOAN_ROLLBACK', 'Loan', loanNumber,
            `Admin rolled back disbursement for ${loanNumber} (ID: ${loanId}). Schedule entries deleted: ${rb.schedule_entries_deleted || 0}.`);
          // Refresh all loan-related panels
          renderLoans();
          renderLoanApplications();
          renderLoanScheduleFilter();
          renderLoanFundPanel();
          renderAccounts();
          renderTransactions();
          renderDashboard();
        } else {
          showToast('error', 'Rollback Failed', result?.error || 'Unknown error occurred during rollback.');
        }
      } catch (e) {
        console.error('[Rollback] Failed:', e);
