        showToast('error', 'Rollback Failed', 'An error occurred during rollback. Check the console for details.');
      }
    },
    true
  );
}

/* ================================================================
   OPERATING FUND — v10
   ================================================================ */

// ★ FIX (OPFUND-002): Made async with balance check, error revert, and proper API-first flow.
// Previous version modified DB BEFORE API call, leaving wrong data on failure.
// Now: API-first → update DB on success → revert on failure.

async function debitOperatingAccount(amount, description) {
  // ★ FIX (OPFUND-003): Balance check before debiting
  if (amount <= 0) { showToast('error','Invalid Amount','Amount must be greater than zero.'); return false; }
  if (DB.operatingAccount.balance < amount) {
    showToast('error','Insufficient Funds',`Operating fund balance (${money(DB.operatingAccount.balance)}) is insufficient for ${money(amount)} debit.`);
    return false;
  }
  const prevBalance = DB.operatingAccount.balance;
  const newBalance = prevBalance - amount;
  const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
  const branch = STATE.currentBranch || (STATE.currentUser?.branches?.[0]) || '';
  try {
    const result = await API.post('operating-account', { type: 'DEBIT', amount: amount, description: description });
    if (result && (result.success || result.data)) {
      const data = result.data || result;
      DB.operatingAccount.balance = data.balanceAfter ?? data.balance ?? newBalance;
      const txn = {
        id: data.id || Date.now(), ref: data.ref || 'OP-'+today.replace(/-/g,'')+'-'+String(DB.operatingAccount.transactions.length+1).padStart(3,'0'),
        date: today, type:'DEBIT', description, amount, balance: DB.operatingAccount.balance,
        operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System', branch, timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      };
      DB.operatingAccount.transactions.unshift(txn);
      return true;
    } else {
      // Revert not needed — DB wasn't modified yet on API failure
      showToast('error','Debit Failed', result?.error || 'Unknown error from server.');
      return false;
    }
  } catch(err) {
    console.error('[OperatingAccount] Debit failed:', err);
    showToast('error','Debit Error','Failed to debit operating fund. Please try again.');
    return false;
  }
}

async function creditOperatingAccount(amount, description) {
  if (amount <= 0) { showToast('error','Invalid Amount','Amount must be greater than zero.'); return false; }
  const prevBalance = DB.operatingAccount.balance;
  const newBalance = prevBalance + amount;
  const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
  const branch = STATE.currentBranch || (STATE.currentUser?.branches?.[0]) || '';
  try {
    const result = await API.post('operating-account', { type: 'CREDIT', amount: amount, description: description });
    if (result && (result.success || result.data)) {
      const data = result.data || result;
      DB.operatingAccount.balance = data.balanceAfter ?? data.balance ?? newBalance;
      const txn = {
        id: data.id || Date.now(), ref: data.ref || 'OP-'+today.replace(/-/g,'')+'-'+String(DB.operatingAccount.transactions.length+1).padStart(3,'0'),
        date: today, type:'CREDIT', description, amount, balance: DB.operatingAccount.balance,
        operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System', branch, timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      };
      DB.operatingAccount.transactions.unshift(txn);
      return true;
    } else {
      showToast('error','Credit Failed', result?.error || 'Unknown error from server.');
      return false;
    }
  } catch(err) {
    console.error('[OperatingAccount] Credit failed:', err);
    showToast('error','Credit Error','Failed to credit operating fund. Please try again.');
    return false;
  }
}

function openTopUpModal() {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can credit the operating fund.'); return; }
  $('opCurrentBalance').textContent = money(DB.operatingAccount.balance);
  $('opAfterBalance').textContent = '—';
  $('opTopUpAmount').value = '';
  $('opTopUpDesc').value = '';
  openModal('topUpOperatingModal');
}

function updateOpTopUpPreview() {
  const amt = parseFloat($('opTopUpAmount').value)||0;
  $('opAfterBalance').textContent = amt > 0 ? money(DB.operatingAccount.balance + amt) : '—';
}

async function handleTopUpOperating(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const amount = parseFloat($('opTopUpAmount').value);
  const desc = $('opTopUpDesc').value.trim();
  // ★ FIX (OPFUND-004): Frontend validation before API call
  if (!amount || amount <= 0 || isNaN(amount)) { showToast('error','Invalid Amount','Enter a valid amount greater than zero.'); return; }
  if (!desc) { showToast('error','Missing Description','Provide a description for this credit.'); return; }
  const ok = await creditOperatingAccount(amount, desc);
  if (ok) {
    addAuditEntry('OP_FUND_CREDIT','Operating Fund',DB.operatingAccount.accountNumber,`Credited ${money(amount)} to operating fund: ${desc}`);
    closeModal('topUpOperatingModal');
    showToast('success','Fund Credited',`${money(amount)} credited to operating fund. New balance: ${money(DB.operatingAccount.balance)}`);
    renderOperatingFund();
    renderExpenses();
  }
}

function getFilteredOperatingTxns() {
  const q = norm($('opSearch')?.value || '');
  const df=$('opDateFrom')?.value||'', dt=$('opDateTo')?.value||'', tp=$('opFilterType')?.value||'';
  // Branch-filter transactions first, then apply date/type/search filters
  return filterByUserBranch(DB.operatingAccount.transactions).filter(t=>
    (!q || [t.ref,t.description,t.type].some(v=>norm(v).includes(q))) &&
    (!df||t.date>=df)&&(!dt||t.date<=dt)&&(!tp||t.type===tp));
}

/* ================================================================
   GL ACCOUNTS — Chart of Accounts + General Ledger Journal
   ================================================================ */
function renderGLAccounts() {
  const coa = DB.chartOfAccounts || [];
  const glEntries = DB.generalLedger || [];

  // Branch context banner — admin sees individual or company-wide based on selection
  const bannerHtml = isAllBranchesMode() ? '' : `<div style="padding:10px 16px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.08);border:1px solid rgba(103,232,181,.2);border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:.84rem;color:var(--accent)">
    <span style="display:inline-flex"><i data-lucide="map-pin" style="width:18px;height:18px;stroke-width:1.8"></i></span>
    <div><strong>Branch: ${STATE.currentBranch}</strong> — GL Accounts show journal entries for the selected branch only. Switch to &quot;All Branches&quot; to see the full company-wide ledger.</div>
  </div>`;

  // Branch isolation: filter GL entries by current branch selection
  const branchGlEntries = filterByUserBranch(glEntries);

  // ── Populate category filter ──
  const cats = [...new Set(coa.map(c => c.category).filter(Boolean))];
  const catSel = $('glFilterCat');
  const prevCat = catSel.value;
  catSel.innerHTML = '<option value="">All</option>' + cats.map(c => `<option${c===prevCat?' selected':''}>${c}</option>`).join('');

  // ── GL balances: branch-filtered computation ──
  const glBalances = {};
  const glCounts = {};
  const glTotalDebits = {};  // Per-account debit total (branch-filtered)
  const glTotalCredits = {}; // Per-account credit total (branch-filtered)
  // ★ BUG FIX (GL Balance Inversion): Compute balances correctly per account type.
  // ASSET and EXPENSE accounts have normal DEBIT balance: net = debit - credit
  // LIABILITY, EQUITY, and INCOME accounts have normal CREDIT balance: net = credit - debit
  // Previous code used uniform "debit - credit" which INVERTED all non-asset/non-expense balances.
  const acctTypeMap = {};
  coa.forEach(a => { acctTypeMap[a.code] = a.type; });
  coa.forEach(a => { glBalances[a.code] = 0; glCounts[a.code] = 0; glTotalDebits[a.code] = 0; glTotalCredits[a.code] = 0; });
  branchGlEntries.forEach(e => {
    if (glBalances[e.accountCode] !== undefined) {
      const dr = Number(e.debit || 0);
      const cr = Number(e.credit || 0);
      const eType = acctTypeMap[e.accountCode] || '';
      // ASSET/EXPENSE: debit increases balance; LIABILITY/EQUITY/INCOME: credit increases balance
      glBalances[e.accountCode] += (eType === 'ASSET' || eType === 'EXPENSE') ? (dr - cr) : (cr - dr);
      glCounts[e.accountCode]++;
      glTotalDebits[e.accountCode] += dr;
      glTotalCredits[e.accountCode] += cr;
    }
  });
  // ★ FIX (GLA-001): REMOVED expense overlay — expenses are already posted to GL on approval
  // (DR expense_gl_code / CR 1400 in expenses.php). Adding DB.expenses amounts here would
  // DOUBLE-COUNT the expense balances. GL journal entries are the single source of truth.
  // Override with key balances from branch-filtered local data
  // GL 1100 (Customer Loan Portfolio) = sum of outstanding loan principals
  glBalances['1100'] = filterByUserBranch(DB.loans).reduce((s,l)=>s+l.outstanding,0);
  // GL 1200 (Loans and Advances Fund Pool) = net GL balance from GL 1200 entries (DR - CR).
  //   This is the fund POOL balance — money allocated to the loan fund minus disbursed.
  //   It is NOT the same as outstanding loans. Source of truth = GL journal entries for code 1200.
  glBalances['1200'] = branchGlEntries.filter(e=>e.accountCode==='1200').reduce((s,e)=>s+Number(e.debit||0)-Number(e.credit||0),0);
  // GL 1201 (Loans Receivable) = sum of outstanding loan principals
  glBalances['1201'] = filterByUserBranch(DB.loans).reduce((s,l)=>s+l.outstanding,0);
  // GL 2000 (Customer Deposits) = sum of active account ledger balances
  glBalances['2000'] = filterByUserBranch(DB.accounts).filter(a=>a.status==='ACTIVE').reduce((s,a)=>s+a.ledgerBalance,0);
  // Operating Fund (1400): per-branch — compute from branch-filtered operating fund transactions
  // When viewing a specific branch, show only that branch's net operating fund flow
  // When viewing All Branches, show the global operating account balance
  const branchOpTxns = filterByUserBranch(DB.operatingAccount.transactions || []);
  const branchOpNet = branchOpTxns.reduce((s,t)=>s + (t.type==='CREDIT'?Number(t.amount||0):-Number(t.amount||0)),0);
  glBalances['1400'] = isAllBranchesMode() ? DB.operatingAccount.balance : branchOpNet;

  // ── Filter ──
  const filterType = $('glFilterType')?.value || '';
  const filterCat = $('glFilterCat')?.value || '';
  const filtered = coa.filter(a =>
    (!filterType || a.type === filterType) &&
    (!filterCat || a.category === filterCat)
  );

  // ── KPI Cards ──
  const totalAssets = coa.filter(a=>a.type==='ASSET').reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBalances[a.code]||0),0);
  const totalLiabilities = coa.filter(a=>a.type==='LIABILITY').reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBalances[a.code]||0),0);
  const totalEquity = coa.filter(a=>a.type==='EQUITY').reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBalances[a.code]||0),0);
  const totalIncome = coa.filter(a=>a.type==='INCOME').reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBalances[a.code]||0),0);
  const totalExpense = coa.filter(a=>a.type==='EXPENSE').reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBalances[a.code]||0),0);
  // Use trial balance from API if available (covers full DB), otherwise compute from local entries
  // Branch-filtered trial balance: use branchGlEntries for fallback computation
  const tbDebits = (DB.trialBalance && DB.trialBalance.total_debits != null && isAllBranchesMode()) ? DB.trialBalance.total_debits : branchGlEntries.reduce((s,e)=>s+Number(e.debit||0),0);
  const tbCredits = (DB.trialBalance && DB.trialBalance.total_credits != null && isAllBranchesMode()) ? DB.trialBalance.total_credits : branchGlEntries.reduce((s,e)=>s+Number(e.credit||0),0);
  const tbBalanced = Math.abs(tbDebits - tbCredits) < 0.01;
  const tbUnbalanced = (DB.trialBalance && DB.trialBalance.unbalanced_count) ? DB.trialBalance.unbalanced_count : 0;

  $('glKpiCards').innerHTML = bannerHtml + `
    <div class="kpi-card"><span class="kpi-label">Total Assets</span><div class="kpi-value" style="color:var(--primary)">${money(totalAssets)}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${coa.filter(a=>a.type==='ASSET').length} accounts</div></div>
    <div class="kpi-card"><span class="kpi-label">Total Liabilities</span><div class="kpi-value" style="color:var(--warn)">${money(totalLiabilities)}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${coa.filter(a=>a.type==='LIABILITY').length} accounts</div></div>
    <div class="kpi-card"><span class="kpi-label">Net Income</span><div class="kpi-value" style="color:${totalIncome-totalExpense>=0?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${money(totalIncome-totalExpense)}</div><div class="kpi-sub">Rev: ${money(totalIncome)} / Exp: ${money(totalExpense)}</div></div>
    <div class="kpi-card"><span class="kpi-label">Trial Balance</span><div class="kpi-value" style="color:${tbBalanced?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${tbBalanced ? IC('check-circle',14)+' Balanced' : IC('x-circle',14)+' Imbalance'}</div><div class="kpi-sub">DR: ${money(tbDebits)} / CR: ${money(tbCredits)}${tbUnbalanced>0?' · <span style="color:var(--danger)">'+tbUnbalanced+' unbalanced</span>':''}</div></div>`;

  // ── Chart of Accounts Table ──
  const typePills = {ASSET:'pill-pending',LIABILITY:'pill-warning',EQUITY:'pill-approved',INCOME:'pill-approved',EXPENSE:'pill-rejected'};
  $('glCoaBody').innerHTML = filtered.length ? filtered.map(a => `<tr>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-weight:700">${a.code}</td>
    <td>${a.name}</td>
    <td><span class="pill ${typePills[a.type]||''}" style="font-size:.72rem">${a.type}</span></td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${a.category||'—'}</td>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-weight:600;color:${(glBalances[a.code]||0)>=0?'var(--text)':'var(--danger)'}">${money(glBalances[a.code]||0)}</td>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--success)">${glTotalDebits[a.code]>0?money(glTotalDebits[a.code]):'—'}</td>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--danger)">${glTotalCredits[a.code]>0?money(glTotalCredits[a.code]):'—'}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem;text-align:center">${glCounts[a.code]||0}</td>
    <td><span class="pill ${a.isActive!==false?'pill-approved':'pill-rejected'}" style="font-size:.7rem">${a.isActive!==false?'Active':'Inactive'}</span></td>
  </tr>`).join('') : '<tr><td colspan="9" class="empty-state"><p>No chart of accounts loaded. Connect to the backend.</p></td></tr>';

  // ── General Ledger Journal — branch-filtered with text search ──
  const glJournalQ = norm($('glJournalSearch')?.value || '');
  let glFiltered = [...branchGlEntries].sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0));
  if (glJournalQ) {
    glFiltered = glFiltered.filter(e => [e.reference,e.accountCode,e.accountName,e.description,e.transactionType,e.contraAccount].some(v => norm(v).includes(glJournalQ)));
  }
  const {items, total: glTotal} = paginate(glFiltered, STATE.glPage||1, 50);
  if (!STATE.glPage) STATE.glPage = 1;
  $('glJournalBody').innerHTML = items.length ? items.map(e => `<tr>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem">${e.date||''}</td>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.78rem">${e.reference||''}</td>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-weight:700">${e.accountCode}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem">${e.accountName||''}</td>
    <td class="td-mono" style="color:var(--success);font-weight:600">${e.debit>0?money(e.debit):''}</td>
    <td class="td-mono" style="color:var(--danger);font-weight:600">${e.credit>0?money(e.credit):''}</td>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)">${e.contraAccount||''}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.72rem"><span class="pill pill-pending" style="font-size:.68rem">${e.transactionType||''}</span></td>
    <td style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);max-width:200px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap" title="${(e.description||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')}">${e.description||''}</td>
  </tr>`).join('') : '<tr><td colspan="9" class="empty-state"><p>No general ledger entries yet. Entries are created automatically when crediting or debiting the operating fund.</p></td></tr>';
  renderPagination('glJournalPagination', STATE.glPage, glFiltered.length, p => { STATE.glPage = p; renderGLAccounts(); }, 50);
  refreshIcons();
}

function goGLPage(p) { STATE.glPage = p; renderGLAccounts(); }

function exportGLCSV() {
  // ★ Branch-filtered export — use getGLBalances as base, overlay GL debit/credit totals
  const coa = DB.chartOfAccounts || [];
  const glBalances = getGLBalances();
  const branchGlEntries = filterByUserBranch(DB.generalLedger || []);
  const glTD = {};
  const glTC = {};
  const glCts = {};
  coa.forEach(a => { glTD[a.code] = 0; glTC[a.code] = 0; glCts[a.code] = 0; });
  branchGlEntries.forEach(e => {
    if (glBalances[e.accountCode] !== undefined) {
      const dr = Number(e.debit || 0), cr = Number(e.credit || 0);
      glTD[e.accountCode] += dr;
      glTC[e.accountCode] += cr;
      glCts[e.accountCode]++;
    }
  });

  const branchLabel = isAllBranchesMode() ? 'All Branches' : 'Branch: ' + STATE.currentBranch;
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('General Ledger Export', [['Branch Scope', branchLabel]]);
  const h = 'GL Code,Account Name,Account Type,Category,GL Balance (FCFA),Total Debit (FCFA),Total Credit (FCFA),Journal Entries,Active\n';
  const rows = coa.map(a => `${csv(a.code)},${csv(a.name)},${csv(a.type)},${csv(a.category||'')},${csvNum(glBalances[a.code])},${csvNum(glTD[a.code])},${csvNum(glTC[a.code])},${glCts[a.code]||0},${csv(a.isActive!==false?'Yes':'No')}`).join('\n');
  const totalDR = coa.reduce((s,a)=>s+(glTD[a.code]||0),0);
  const totalCR = coa.reduce((s,a)=>s+(glTC[a.code]||0),0);
  const footer = csvFooter(coa.length, [{label:'Total Debits (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalDR)},{label:'Total Credits (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalCR)},{label:'Variance',value:csvNum(totalDR-totalCR)}]);
  downloadCSV(meta + h + rows + footer, 'atlas-gl-accounts-' + (isAllBranchesMode()?'all':'branch') + '.csv');
  showToast('success','Export Complete', `${coa.length} GL accounts exported for ${branchLabel}.`);
}

/* Shared: isolated print — hides all existing print areas, prints only the given HTML, then cleans up */
function printIsolated(html) {
  $$('[id$="PrintArea"]').forEach(el => { el.style.display = 'none'; el.classList.remove('printing'); });
  const old = document.getElementById('_isolatedPrintArea'); if (old) old.remove();
  const oldStyle = document.getElementById('_isolatedPrintStyle'); if (oldStyle) oldStyle.remove();
  // Inject dynamic print CSS to guarantee only this div prints
  const s = document.createElement('style');
  s.id = '_isolatedPrintStyle';
  s.className = 'dynamic-print-style';
  s.textContent = '@media print{ body > *:not(#_isolatedPrintArea):not(.dynamic-print-style) { display: none !important; } #_isolatedPrintArea { display: block !important; } }';
  document.head.appendChild(s);
  const d = document.createElement('div');
  d.id = '_isolatedPrintArea';
  d.style.cssText = 'display:block;padding:20px;font-family:Inter,sans-serif';
  d.innerHTML = html;
  document.body.appendChild(d);
  setTimeout(() => { window.print(); const el = document.getElementById('_isolatedPrintArea'); if (el) el.remove(); const st = document.getElementById('_isolatedPrintStyle'); if (st) st.remove(); }, 300);
}

function printTrialBalance() {
  // Branch-filtered trial balance — use getGLBalances as base, overlay GL entry counts
  const coa = DB.chartOfAccounts || [];
  const glBalances = getGLBalances();
  const branchGlEntries = filterByUserBranch(DB.generalLedger || []);
  const glCounts = {};
  coa.forEach(a => { glCounts[a.code] = 0; });
  branchGlEntries.forEach(e => {
    if (glBalances[e.accountCode] !== undefined) { glCounts[e.accountCode]++; }
  });
  const totalDebits = branchGlEntries.reduce((s,e)=>s+Number(e.debit||0),0);
  const totalCredits = branchGlEntries.reduce((s,e)=>s+Number(e.credit||0),0);
  const balanceCheck = Math.abs(totalDebits - totalCredits);
  const isBalanced = balanceCheck < 0.01;
  const activeAccounts = coa.filter(a=>(glBalances[a.code]||0)!==0);
  const totalAssets = activeAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='ASSET').reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBalances[a.code]||0),0);
  const totalLiabilities = activeAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='LIABILITY').reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBalances[a.code]||0),0);
  const totalEquity = activeAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='EQUITY').reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBalances[a.code]||0),0);
  const totalIncome = activeAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='INCOME'||a.type==='REVENUE').reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBalances[a.code]||0),0);
  const totalExpenses = activeAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='EXPENSE').reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBalances[a.code]||0),0);
  const branch = isAllBranchesMode() ? 'All Branches' : STATE.currentBranch;
  const b = DB.bankBranding || {};
  const stmtRef = generateDocumentNumber('TB');
  const stmtDate = dateFmt(new Date().toISOString());
  const currency = 'XAF (FCFA)';

  // Register document for audit trail
  registerDocument({
    documentNumber: stmtRef, type: 'REPORT', subtype: 'TRIAL_BALANCE',
    accountNumber: '', customerId: 0, customerName: '',
    branch: branch, periodFrom: null, periodTo: null,
    operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
    generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    printCount: 1, lastPrintedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    exportCount: 0, lastExportedAt: null,
    summary: { totalTransactions: branchGlEntries.length, openingBalance:0, closingBalance: totalCredits-totalDebits, totalCredits, totalDebits, grossPay:0, netPay:0, totalDeductions:0, amount:0, transactionRef:'' },
    status: 'ACTIVE'
  });

  const html = `
    <div class="ent-doc">
      <!-- Enterprise Header -->
      <div class="ent-doc-header">
        <div class="edh-left">
          <div class="edh-logo">${b.logo ? '<img src="'+escUrl(b.logo)+'" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:14px" alt="Logo">' : (b.bankName||'A').charAt(0)}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="edh-bank-name">${b.bankName||'Atlas Bank'}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">${b.headOfficeAddress||''}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">SWIFT: ${b.swiftCode||'N/A'} · BEAC Approval: ${b.cbnLicenseNumber||'N/A'}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="edh-right">
          <div class="edh-doc-title">Trial Balance</div>
          <div>Report Ref: ${stmtRef}</div>
          <div>Generated: ${stmtDate}</div>
          <div>Operator: ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System'}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ent-doc-body">
        <!-- Report Metadata -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Report Information</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Branch</div><div class="edf-value">${branch}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Currency</div><div class="edf-value">${currency}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Active GL Accounts</div><div class="edf-value">${activeAccounts.length} of ${coa.length}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Journal Entries</div><div class="edf-value">${branchGlEntries.length}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Debits</div><div class="edf-value">${money(totalDebits)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Credits</div><div class="edf-value">${money(totalCredits)}</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Balance Summary -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Classification Summary</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Assets</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:${totalAssets>=0?'#1a365d':'#dc2626'}">${money(totalAssets)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Liabilities</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:${totalLiabilities>=0?'#dc2626':'#16a34a'}">${money(totalLiabilities)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Equity</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:${totalEquity>=0?'#1a365d':'#dc2626'}">${money(totalEquity)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Income / Revenue</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:#16a34a">${money(totalIncome)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Expenses</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:#dc2626">${money(totalExpenses)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Balance Check</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:${isBalanced?'#16a34a':'#dc2626'};font-weight:800">${isBalanced?'BALANCED':'Variance: '+money(balanceCheck)}</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Trial Balance Table -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">General Ledger — Trial Balance Detail (${activeAccounts.length} accounts)</div>
          <table class="ent-doc-table">
            <thead><tr><th>GL Code</th><th>Account Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Entries</th><th style="text-align:right">Debit</th><th style="text-align:right">Credit</th><th style="text-align:right">Net Balance</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
              ${activeAccounts.map(a=>`<tr>
                <td class="edt-mono">${a.code}</td>
                <td>${a.name}</td>
                <td><span style="display:inline-block;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;background:${a.type==='ASSET'?'#dbeafe':a.type==='LIABILITY'?'#fef3c7':a.type==='EQUITY'?'#d1fae5':a.type==='INCOME'||a.type==='REVENUE'?'#dcfce7':'#fee2e2'};color:${a.type==='ASSET'?'#1e40af':a.type==='LIABILITY'?'#92400e':a.type==='EQUITY'?'#065f46':a.type==='INCOME'||a.type==='REVENUE'?'#166534':'#991b1b'}">${a.type}</span></td>
                <td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:center">${glCounts[a.code]||0}</td>
                <td class="edt-mono edt-debit" style="text-align:right">${(glBalances[a.code]||0)>0?money(glBalances[a.code]):'—'}</td>
                <td class="edt-mono edt-credit" style="text-align:right">${(glBalances[a.code]||0)<0?money(Math.abs(glBalances[a.code])):'—'}</td>
                <td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:700">${money(glBalances[a.code]||0)}</td>
              </tr>`).join('')}
            </tbody>
            <tfoot>
              <tr style="font-weight:800;background:#f8fafc">
                <td colspan="3" style="text-align:center;font-weight:800">TOTALS</td>
                <td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:center">${branchGlEntries.length}</td>
                <td class="edt-mono edt-debit" style="text-align:right">${money(totalDebits)}</td>
                <td class="edt-mono edt-credit" style="text-align:right">${money(totalCredits)}</td>
                <td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:800;color:${isBalanced?'#16a34a':'#dc2626'}">${isBalanced?'BALANCED':money(totalDebits-totalCredits)}</td>
              </tr>
            </tfoot>
          </table>
        </div>

        <!-- Certification -->
        <div class="ent-doc-cert">
          <strong>Certification:</strong> This trial balance has been prepared from the general ledger of ${b.bankName||'Atlas Bank'} and is a true and accurate reflection of all account balances as at the date of generation. The debit and credit columns have been verified to ensure arithmetic accuracy. This document is generated electronically and does not require a physical signature. Any discrepancy should be reported to the finance department within 7 business days.
        </div>

        <!-- Signatures -->
        <div class="ent-doc-signatures">
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">${STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'Authorized Officer'}</div>
            <div class="eds-role">Prepared By / Branch Operations</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">${branch}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">Chief Financial Officer</div>
            <div class="eds-role">Finance Department</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">Authorized Signatory</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Footer -->
        <div class="ent-doc-footer">
          ${b.bankNameShort||'Atlas Bank'} Limited · Registered in Cameroon · ${b.registrationNumber||'N/A'} · BEAC Approval: ${b.cbnLicenseNumber||'N/A'}<br>
          Registered Office: ${b.headOfficeAddress||'N/A'}<br>
          SWIFT Code: ${b.swiftCode||'N/A'} · Tel: ${b.phone||'N/A'} · Email: ${b.email||'N/A'}<br><br>
          <strong>CONFIDENTIAL:</strong> This document contains privileged financial information intended solely for authorized personnel. Unauthorized use, disclosure, copying, or distribution is strictly prohibited.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;

  printIsolated(html);
  addAuditEntry('TRIAL_BALANCE_PRINTED','Report',stmtRef,`Trial balance printed. Branch: ${branch}. Accounts: ${activeAccounts.length}. Debits: ${money(totalDebits)}. Credits: ${money(totalCredits)}. Balanced: ${isBalanced?'Yes':'No'}.`);
}

/* ================================================================
   GL ENTERPRISE FEATURES — Fund Transfer & Journal Entry Modals
   ================================================================ */

// ── Helper: Populate GL account dropdowns from DB.chartOfAccounts ──
// excludeCode:  single GL code to exclude (e.g. '1400')
// excludeTypes: array of account types to exclude (e.g. ['EXPENSE','INCOME'])
function populateGLAccountDropdown(selectId, excludeCode, excludeTypes) {
  const sel = $(selectId);
  const prev = sel.value;
  const coa = (DB.chartOfAccounts || []).filter(a => {
    if (a.isActive === false) return false;
    if (a.code === excludeCode) return false;
    if (excludeTypes && excludeTypes.length > 0 && excludeTypes.includes(a.type)) return false;
    return true;
  });
  sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">— Select GL Account —</option>' +
    coa.map(a => `<option value="${a.code}"${a.code===prev?' selected':''}>${a.code} — ${a.name} (${a.type})</option>`).join('');
  return sel;
}

// ── Helper: Populate both dropdowns for Journal Entry modal ──
function populateGLJournalDropdowns() {
  const debitSel = populateGLAccountDropdown('glJEDebit');
  const creditSel = populateGLAccountDropdown('glJECredit');
  // When one changes, prevent the other from matching
  debitSel.onchange = function() {
    creditSel.querySelectorAll('option').forEach(o => { o.disabled = (o.value === debitSel.value); });
    updateGLJESummary();
  };
  creditSel.onchange = function() {
    debitSel.querySelectorAll('option').forEach(o => { o.disabled = (o.value === creditSel.value); });
    updateGLJESummary();
  };
}

// ── Fund Transfer Modal: Open ──
function openGLFundTransferModal() {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can perform fund transfers.'); return; }
  // ★ FIX: Exclude GL code 1400 (Operating Fund) from the target dropdown.
  // Fund transfers go FROM Operating Fund (1400) TO another GL account (or vice versa).
  // Allowing 1400 as target would mean transferring Operating Fund to itself — invalid.
  // ★ FIX: Also exclude EXPENSE and INCOME accounts from the fund transfer dropdown.
  // These are nominal (temporary) accounts that accumulate costs/revenues — they do NOT
  // hold "funds" or "budgets." Transferring to an expense account causes double-charging:
  // the operating fund gets debited on transfer AND again on expense approval.
  populateGLAccountDropdown('glFTAccount', '1400', ['EXPENSE', 'INCOME']);
  $('glFTAmount').value = '';
  $('glFTReference').value = '';
  $('glFTDescription').value = '';
  $('glFTDirection').value = 'TO_GL';
  updateGLFTLabels();
  openModal('glFundTransferModal');
}

// ── Fund Transfer: Update labels based on direction ──
function updateGLFTLabels() {
  const dir = $('glFTDirection').value;
  const acctLabel = $('glFTAccountLabel');
  if (dir === 'TO_GL') {
    acctLabel.textContent = 'GL Account to Receive Funds (Debit)';
  } else {
    acctLabel.textContent = 'GL Account to Send Funds (Credit)';
  }
  updateGLFTSummary();
}

// ── Fund Transfer: Live summary ──
function updateGLFTSummary() {
  const dir = $('glFTDirection').value;
  const acctCode = $('glFTAccount').value;
  const amt = parseFloat($('glFTAmount').value) || 0;
  const acct = (DB.chartOfAccounts || []).find(a => a.code === acctCode);
  const summary = $('glFTSummary');

  if (!acct) {
    summary.innerHTML = '<span style="color:var(--muted)">Select a GL account to see the entry breakdown.</span>';
    return;
  }

  const bal = acct.netBalance || 0;
  // ★ FIX (OPFUND-010): Compute "After Transfer" balance correctly per account type.
  // ASSET/EXPENSE accounts have normal DEBIT balance → debit increases, credit decreases.
  // LIABILITY/EQUITY/INCOME accounts have normal CREDIT balance → credit increases, debit decreases.
  // Previous code always showed `bal - amt` for FROM_GL direction, which is wrong for
  // LIABILITY/EQUITY accounts (credit increases their balance, not decreases).
  const isDebitNormal = acct.type === 'ASSET' || acct.type === 'EXPENSE';
  const opBal = DB.operatingAccount?.balance || 0;

  if (dir === 'TO_GL') {
    // TO_GL: DR target (debit increases target) + CR 1400 (credit decreases op fund)
    const targetAfter = isDebitNormal ? (bal + amt) : (bal - amt);
    const opAfter = opBal - amt;
    summary.innerHTML = `
      <div style="margin-bottom:6px"><span style="color:var(--success);font-weight:700">DR</span> ${acctCode} — ${escHtml(acct.name)}: <strong>${money(amt)}</strong></div>
      <div style="margin-bottom:6px"><span style="color:var(--danger);font-weight:700">CR</span> 1400 — Operating Fund - Bank: <strong>${money(amt)}</strong></div>
      <div style="margin-top:8px;padding-top:6px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)">
        <div>Operating Fund Balance: ${money(opBal)}</div>
        <div style="color:${opAfter<0?'var(--danger)':'var(--warn)'}">After Transfer: ${money(opAfter)}</div>
        <div>Target GL Current Balance: ${money(bal)}</div>
        <div style="color:var(--success)">After Transfer: ${money(targetAfter)}</div>
      </div>`;
  } else {
    // FROM_GL: DR 1400 (debit increases op fund) + CR target (credit changes target)
    const targetAfter = isDebitNormal ? (bal - amt) : (bal + amt);
    const opAfter = opBal + amt;
    summary.innerHTML = `
      <div style="margin-bottom:6px"><span style="color:var(--success);font-weight:700">DR</span> 1400 — Operating Fund - Bank: <strong>${money(amt)}</strong></div>
      <div style="margin-bottom:6px"><span style="color:var(--danger);font-weight:700">CR</span> ${acctCode} — ${escHtml(acct.name)}: <strong>${money(amt)}</strong></div>
      <div style="margin-top:8px;padding-top:6px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)">
        <div>GL ${acctCode} Current Balance: ${money(bal)}</div>
        <div style="color:${targetAfter<0?'var(--danger)':'var(--warn)'}">After Transfer: ${money(targetAfter)}</div>
        <div>Operating Fund Balance: ${money(opBal)}</div>
        <div style="color:var(--success)">After Transfer: ${money(opAfter)}</div>
      </div>`;
  }
}

// Listen for amount changes on the Fund Transfer form
document.addEventListener('input', function(e) {
  if (e.target.id === 'glFTAmount') updateGLFTSummary();
  if (e.target.id === 'glFTAccount') updateGLFTSummary();
});

// ── Fund Transfer: Submit Handler ──
async function handleGLFundTransfer(event) {
  event.preventDefault();
  const btn = $('glFTSubmitBtn');
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.innerHTML = IC('loader', 16) + ' Processing...';

  try {
    // CSRF token refresh is handled automatically by the mutation queue in API.post()
    const result = await API.post('general-ledger', {
      action: 'FUND_TRANSFER',
      direction: $('glFTDirection').value,
      gl_account: $('glFTAccount').value,
      amount: parseFloat($('glFTAmount').value),
      description: $('glFTDescription').value,
      reference: $('glFTReference').value
    });

    if (result && (result.success || result.data?.success)) {
      const data = result.data || result;
      const dir = $('glFTDirection').value;
      const amt = data.amount || parseFloat($('glFTAmount').value);
      const glCode = $('glFTAccount').value;
      const ref = data.reference || '—';
      const opStaff = STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System';
      const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);

      showToast('success', 'Fund Transfer Posted',
        `${dir === 'TO_GL' ? 'TO' : 'FROM'} GL ${glCode} — ${money(amt)} XAF. Ref: ${ref}`);
      closeModal('glFundTransferModal');

      // ★ FIX: Immediately update the UI from the transfer result BEFORE server refresh.
      // This guarantees the user sees changes instantly even if the refresh fails.
      if (data.operating_balance_after !== undefined) {
        console.log('[FundTransfer] Immediate UI update — new balance:', data.operating_balance_after);
        DB.operatingAccount.balance = parseFloat(data.operating_balance_after) || DB.operatingAccount.balance;
        // Prepend the new transaction to the history
        const newTxn = {
          id: Date.now(), ref: ref, date: today,
          type: dir === 'TO_GL' ? 'DEBIT' : 'CREDIT',
          description: $('glFTDescription').value || ('Fund Transfer ' + (dir === 'TO_GL' ? 'to' : 'from') + ' ' + glCode),
          amount: amt,
          balance: parseFloat(data.operating_balance_after) || 0,
          operator: opStaff,
          contraAccount: glCode,
          transactionType: 'FUND_TRANSFER'
        };
        DB.operatingAccount.transactions.unshift(newTxn);
        renderOperatingFund();
      }

      // Then do a full server refresh to get authoritative database data
      console.log('[FundTransfer] Starting server refresh...');
      await refreshGLData();
    } else {
      showToast('error', 'Transfer Failed', result?.error || result?.message || 'Unknown error');
    }
  } catch (err) {
    showToast('error', 'Transfer Error', err.message || 'Network error');
  } finally {
    btn.disabled = false;
    btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="send" style="width:15px;height:15px;stroke-width:2;vertical-align:-2px"></i> Execute Transfer';
    refreshIcons(btn);
  }
}

// ── Journal Entry Modal: Open ──
function openGLJournalModal() {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can create journal entries.'); return; }
  populateGLJournalDropdowns();
  $('glJEAmount').value = '';
  $('glJEReference').value = '';
  $('glJEDescription').value = '';
  updateGLJESummary();
  openModal('glJournalModal');
}

// ── Journal Entry: Live Summary ──
function updateGLJESummary() {
  const drCode = $('glJEDebit').value;
  const crCode = $('glJECredit').value;
  const amt = parseFloat($('glJEAmount').value) || 0;
  const drAcct = (DB.chartOfAccounts || []).find(a => a.code === drCode);
  const crAcct = (DB.chartOfAccounts || []).find(a => a.code === crCode);
  const summary = $('glJESummary');

  if (!drAcct && !crAcct) {
    summary.innerHTML = '<span style="color:var(--muted)">Select debit and credit accounts to see the entry breakdown.</span>';
    return;
  }

  summary.innerHTML = `
    <div style="margin-bottom:6px"><span style="color:var(--success);font-weight:700">DR</span> ${drCode ? drCode + ' — ' + (drAcct?.name||'') : '—'}: <strong>${money(amt)}</strong> ${drAcct ? '(' + drAcct.type + ')' : ''}</div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:6px"><span style="color:var(--danger);font-weight:700">CR</span> ${crCode ? crCode + ' — ' + (crAcct?.name||'') : '—'}: <strong>${money(amt)}</strong> ${crAcct ? '(' + crAcct.type + ')' : ''}</div>
    ${drCode && crCode && drCode === crCode ? '<div style="color:var(--danger);font-weight:700;margin-top:6px">'+IC('alert-triangle',14)+' Debit and Credit accounts cannot be the same!</div>' : ''}
    ${drAcct ? '<div style="margin-top:8px;padding-top:6px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)">DR Account Balance: ' + money(drAcct.netBalance || 0) + '</div>' : ''}
    ${crAcct ? '<div>CR Account Balance: ' + money(crAcct.netBalance || 0) + '</div>' : ''}`;
}

// ── Journal Entry: Submit Handler ──
async function handleGLJournalEntry(event) {
  event.preventDefault();
  const drCode = $('glJEDebit').value;
  const crCode = $('glJECredit').value;

  if (drCode === crCode) {
    showToast('error', 'Validation Error', 'Debit and Credit accounts must be different.');
    return false;
  }

  const btn = $('glJESubmitBtn');
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.innerHTML = IC('loader', 16) + ' Posting...';

  try {
    // CSRF token refresh is handled automatically by the mutation queue in API.post()
    const result = await API.post('general-ledger', {
      action: 'JOURNAL_ENTRY',
      debit_account: drCode,
      credit_account: crCode,
      amount: parseFloat($('glJEAmount').value),
      description: $('glJEDescription').value,
      reference: $('glJEReference').value
    });

    if (result && (result.success || result.data?.success)) {
      const data = result.data || result;
      const drAcct = (DB.chartOfAccounts || []).find(a => a.code === drCode);
      const crAcct = (DB.chartOfAccounts || []).find(a => a.code === crCode);
      showToast('success', 'Journal Entry Posted',
        `DR ${drCode} → CR ${crCode} — ${money(data.amount || parseFloat($('glJEAmount').value))} XAF. Ref: ${data.reference || '—'}`);
      closeModal('glJournalModal');
      addAuditEntry('GL_JOURNAL_ENTRY','General Ledger',(data.reference||'JE'),'Posted journal entry: DR ' + drCode + ' (' + (drAcct?.name||'') + ') / CR ' + crCode + ' (' + (crAcct?.name||'') + ') — ' + money(data.amount || parseFloat($('glJEAmount').value)) + ' XAF');
      // Immediately re-render GL accounts from existing DB data (shows any local changes)
      try { renderGLAccounts(); } catch(e) {}
      // Then do a full server refresh to get authoritative database data
      console.log('[JournalEntry] Starting server refresh...');
      await refreshGLData();
    } else {
      showToast('error', 'Journal Entry Failed', result?.error || result?.message || 'Unknown error');
    }
  } catch (err) {
    showToast('error', 'Journal Entry Error', err.message || 'Network error');
  } finally {
    btn.disabled = false;
    btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="book-open" style="width:15px;height:15px;stroke-width:2;vertical-align:-2px"></i> Post Journal Entry';
    refreshIcons(btn);
  }
}

// ── Refresh GL data from server after a POST ──
// ★ This function fetches ALL data fresh from the database and re-renders both panels.
// ★ FIX: Each API call is wrapped individually so one failure doesn't block the others.
// ★ FIX: operating-account response is properly handled as an array.
// ★ Added console logging for diagnosis.
async function refreshGLData() {
  let glOk = false, entriesOk = false, opOk = false;

  try {
    // 1. Re-fetch GL accounts with computed balances
    try {
      const glRes = await API.get('general-ledger');
      if (glRes?.data && glRes.data.accounts) {
        DB.chartOfAccounts = glRes.data.accounts.map(a => ({
          code: a.code, name: a.name, type: a.type, category: a.category||'',
          description: a.description||'', isActive: !!a.is_active,
          totalDebit: parseFloat(a.total_debit)||0, totalCredit: parseFloat(a.total_credit)||0,
          netBalance: parseFloat(a.net_balance)||0, entryCount: a.entry_count||0,
          lastEntryDate: a.last_entry_date||''
        }));
        DB.trialBalance = glRes.data.trial_balance || {};
        glOk = true;
        console.log('[GL Refresh] GL accounts loaded:', DB.chartOfAccounts.length, 'accounts');
      } else {
        console.warn('[GL Refresh] GL accounts fetch returned unexpected format:', glRes);
      }
    } catch(e) { console.error('[GL Refresh] GL accounts fetch error:', e); }

    // 2. Re-fetch GL journal entries
    try {
      const entriesRes = await API.get('general-ledger/entries', {pageSize:1000});
      if (entriesRes?.data) {
        // paginatedResponse wraps data as an array directly
        const entries = Array.isArray(entriesRes.data) ? entriesRes.data : (entriesRes.data.data || []);
        DB.generalLedger = entries.map(e => ({
          id: e.id, date: e.date||'', reference: e.reference||'',
          accountCode: e.account_code||'', accountName: e.account_name||'',
          debit: parseFloat(e.debit)||0, credit: parseFloat(e.credit)||0,
          contraAccount: e.contra_account||'', transactionType: e.transaction_type||'',
          description: e.description||'', postedBy: e.posted_by_name||'',
          branch: e.branch||''
        }));
        entriesOk = true;
        console.log('[GL Refresh] GL entries loaded:', DB.generalLedger.length, 'entries');
      } else {
        console.warn('[GL Refresh] GL entries fetch returned unexpected format:', entriesRes);
      }
    } catch(e) { console.error('[GL Refresh] GL entries fetch error:', e); }

    // 3. Re-fetch operating account (balance may have changed)
    try {
      const opRes = await API.get('operating-account');
      if (opRes?.data) {
        // ★ FIX: operating-account API returns an ARRAY of account objects.
        // ★ FIX: Specifically find BANK-OP-0001 — NOT blindly op[0].
        // If OPS-000001 and BANK-OP-0001 both exist, op[0] picks wrong one.
        const op = opRes.data;
        const src = Array.isArray(op) && op.length > 0
          ? (op.find(a => a.account_number === 'BANK-OP-0001') || op[0])
          : (op && typeof op === 'object' && !Array.isArray(op) ? op : null);
        if (src) {
          const txns = (src.transactions || []).map(t => ({
            id: t.id, ref: t.ref || '', date: t.date || '', type: t.type || '',
            description: t.description || '', amount: parseFloat(t.amount) || 0,
            balance: parseFloat(t.balance_after || t.balance) || 0,
            operator: t.operator || '', contraAccount: t.contra_account || '',
            transactionType: t.transaction_type || '', timestamp: t.created_at || ''
          }));
          const newBalance = parseFloat(src.balance || src.ledger_balance || 0);
          console.log('[GL Refresh] Operating account loaded: balance=' + newBalance + ', transactions=' + txns.length + ', accountNumber=' + (src.account_number || 'N/A'));
          DB.operatingAccount = {
            accountNumber: src.account_number || 'BANK-OP-0001',
            accountName: src.account_name || 'Atlas Bank Operating Fund',
            balance: newBalance,
            currency: src.currency || 'XAF',
            transactions: txns
          };
          opOk = true;
        } else {
          console.warn('[GL Refresh] Operating account data could not be extracted. Raw data type:', typeof op, Array.isArray(op) ? 'array[' + op.length + ']' : '');
        }
      } else {
        console.warn('[GL Refresh] Operating account fetch returned null/undefined. opRes:', opRes);
      }
    } catch(e) { console.error('[GL Refresh] Operating account fetch error:', e); }

    // 4. Re-render both panels (even if some fetches failed, render with whatever data we have)
    console.log('[GL Refresh] Rendering — GL ok:' + glOk + ' entries ok:' + entriesOk + ' op ok:' + opOk);
    try { renderGLAccounts(); } catch(e) { console.error('[GL Refresh] renderGLAccounts error:', e); }
    try { renderOperatingFund(); } catch(e) { console.error('[GL Refresh] renderOperatingFund error:', e); }

  } catch (err) {
    console.error('[GL Refresh] Fatal error:', err);
    // Still try to render with whatever data we have
    try { renderGLAccounts(); } catch(e) {}
    try { renderOperatingFund(); } catch(e) {}
  }
}

function resetOpFilters(){$('opSearch').value='';$('opDateFrom').value='';$('opDateTo').value='';$('opFilterType').value='';STATE.opTxnPage=1;renderOperatingFund();}

function renderOperatingFund() {
  // Branch context: When viewing a specific branch (not "All Branches"), show branch info
  // ★ FIX (OPFUND-005): Show branch context for ALL users, not just admins.
  // Previously `showBranch = !isAllBranchesMode() && isUserAdmin()` which meant
  // non-admin users viewing a specific branch saw the GLOBAL balance — a data leakage bug.
  const showBranch = !isAllBranchesMode();
  const bannerHtml = showBranch ? `<div style="padding:10px 16px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.08);border:1px solid rgba(103,232,181,.2);border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:.84rem;color:var(--accent)">
    <span style="display:inline-flex"><i data-lucide="map-pin" style="width:18px;height:18px;stroke-width:1.8"></i></span>
    <div><strong>Branch: ${escHtml(STATE.currentBranch)}</strong> — Operating Fund shows transactions and net balance for ${escHtml(STATE.currentBranch)} only. Switch to &quot;All Branches&quot; to see the full company-wide fund.</div>
  </div>` : '';
  const allTxns = DB.operatingAccount.transactions;
  // Branch-filter transactions (entries created by branch staff have branch field)
  const txns = filterByUserBranch(allTxns);
  const totalCredits = txns.filter(t=>t.type==='CREDIT').reduce((s,t)=>s+Number(t.amount||0),0);
  const totalDebits = txns.filter(t=>t.type==='DEBIT').reduce((s,t)=>s+Number(t.amount||0),0);
  // Branch-specific net balance: compute from branch-filtered transactions
  // All Branches: show the global operating account balance
  // ★ FIX (OPFUND-005): Use showBranch (now applies to ALL users) for balance display.
  const displayBalance = showBranch ? (totalCredits - totalDebits) : DB.operatingAccount.balance;
  const balanceLabel = showBranch ? `Net Balance (${escHtml(STATE.currentBranch)})` : 'Current Fund Balance';
  $('opKpiCards').innerHTML = bannerHtml + `
    <div class="op-balance-box"><div class="ob-label">${balanceLabel}</div><div class="ob-value" style="color:${displayBalance>=0?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${money(displayBalance)}</div><div class="ob-sub">${showBranch ? escHtml(STATE.currentBranch) + ' branch' : escHtml(DB.operatingAccount.accountNumber)}</div></div>
    <div class="kpi-card"><span class="kpi-label">Total Credits (Inflows)</span><div class="kpi-value" style="color:var(--success)">${money(totalCredits)}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${txns.filter(t=>t.type==='CREDIT').length} transactions</div></div>
    <div class="kpi-card"><span class="kpi-label">Total Debits (Outflows)</span><div class="kpi-value" style="color:var(--danger)">${money(totalDebits)}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${txns.filter(t=>t.type==='DEBIT').length} transactions</div></div>`;

  const filtered = getFilteredOperatingTxns();
  const {items,total,pages} = paginate([...filtered].sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0)),STATE.opTxnPage,STATE.opTxnPageSize);
  // ★ FIX (OPFUND-006): XSS fix — escape description, ref, operator in transaction table.
  // Also add branch column for admin/multi-branch users.
  const isAdminOrMulti = isUserAdmin() || (STATE.currentUser?.branches?.length > 1);
  // Update table header to include/exclude branch column
  const thead = $('opTxnTableHead');
  if (thead) {
    thead.innerHTML = isAdminOrMulti
      ? '<tr><th>Reference</th><th>Date</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Amount</th><th>Balance After</th><th>Operator</th><th>Branch</th></tr>'
      : '<tr><th>Reference</th><th>Date</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Amount</th><th>Balance After</th><th>Operator</th></tr>';
  }
  $('opTxnTableBody').innerHTML = items.map(t=>`<tr>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.78rem">${escHtml(t.ref)}</td><td style="font-size:.84rem">${escHtml(t.date)}</td>
    <td><span class="pill ${t.type==='CREDIT'?'pill-approved':'pill-rejected'}" style="font-size:.72rem">${t.type}</span></td>
    <td style="font-size:.84rem">${escHtml(t.description)}</td>
    <td style="font-weight:700;color:${t.type==='CREDIT'?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${t.type==='CREDIT'?'+':'−'}${money(t.amount)}</td>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.84rem">${money(t.balance)}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${escHtml(t.operator||'')}</td>
    ${isAdminOrMulti ? `<td style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${escHtml(t.branch||'')}</td>` : ''}
  </tr>`).join('') || `<tr><td colspan="${isAdminOrMulti?8:7}" class="empty-state"><p>No transactions found</p></td></tr>`;
  renderPagination('opTxnPagination',STATE.opTxnPage,filtered.length,'goOpTxnPage',STATE.opTxnPageSize);
  refreshIcons();
}

function goOpTxnPage(p){STATE.opTxnPage=p;renderOperatingFund();}

function exportOperatingCSV() {
  const filtered = getFilteredOperatingTxns();
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('Operating Fund Transaction Export', [['Operating Account', DB.operatingAccount.accountNumber]]);
  // ★ FIX (OPFUND-007): Add Branch column to CSV export for multi-branch traceability
  const h = 'Reference,Date,Transaction Type,Description,Amount (FCFA),Balance (FCFA),Operator,Branch,Timestamp\n';
  const rows = filtered.map(t=>`${csv(t.ref)},${csv(t.date)},${csv(t.type)},${csv(t.description)},${csvNum(t.amount)},${csvNum(t.balance||0)},${csv(t.operator||'')},${csv(t.branch||'')},${csv(t.timestamp||'')}`).join('\n');
  const totalCredits = filtered.filter(t=>t.type==='CREDIT').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const totalDebits = filtered.filter(t=>t.type==='DEBIT').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const footer = csvFooter(filtered.length, [{label:'Total Inflows (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalCredits)},{label:'Total Outflows (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalDebits)}]);
  downloadCSV(meta + h + rows + footer, 'atlas-operating-fund-export.csv');
  showToast('success','Export Complete',`${filtered.length} operating fund transactions exported.`);
}

function printOperatingStatement() {
  const filtered = getFilteredOperatingTxns();
  const branchTxns = filterByUserBranch(DB.operatingAccount.transactions);
  const totalCredits = branchTxns.filter(t=>t.type==='CREDIT').reduce((s,t)=>s+Number(t.amount||0),0);
  const totalDebits = branchTxns.filter(t=>t.type==='DEBIT').reduce((s,t)=>s+Number(t.amount||0),0);
  const branch = isAllBranchesMode() ? 'All Branches' : STATE.currentBranch;
  const printBalance = isAllBranchesMode() ? DB.operatingAccount.balance : (totalCredits - totalDebits);
  const balanceLabel = isAllBranchesMode() ? 'CURRENT BALANCE' : 'NET BALANCE (' + STATE.currentBranch + ')';
  const netChange = totalCredits - totalDebits;
  const b = DB.bankBranding || {};
  const stmtRef = generateDocumentNumber('OPS');
  const stmtDate = dateFmt(new Date().toISOString());

  // Register document for audit trail
  registerDocument({
    documentNumber: stmtRef, type: 'REPORT', subtype: 'OPERATING_FUND_STATEMENT',
    accountNumber: DB.operatingAccount?.accountNumber || '', customerId: 0, customerName: '',
    branch: branch, periodFrom: null, periodTo: null,
    operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
    generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    printCount: 1, lastPrintedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    exportCount: 0, lastExportedAt: null,
    summary: { totalTransactions: filtered.length, openingBalance:0, closingBalance: printBalance, totalCredits, totalDebits, grossPay:0, netPay:0, totalDeductions:0, amount:0, transactionRef:'' },
    status: 'ACTIVE'
  });

  const html = `
    <div class="ent-doc">
      <!-- Enterprise Header -->
      <div class="ent-doc-header">
        <div class="edh-left">
          <div class="edh-logo">${b.logo ? '<img src="'+escUrl(b.logo)+'" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:14px" alt="Logo">' : (b.bankName||'A').charAt(0)}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="edh-bank-name">${b.bankName||'Atlas Bank'}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">${b.headOfficeAddress||''}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">SWIFT: ${b.swiftCode||'N/A'} · BEAC Approval: ${b.cbnLicenseNumber||'N/A'}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="edh-right">
          <div class="edh-doc-title">Operating Fund Statement</div>
          <div>Report Ref: ${stmtRef}</div>
          <div>Account: ${DB.operatingAccount?.accountNumber || 'N/A'}</div>
          <div>Generated: ${stmtDate}</div>
          <div>Operator: ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System'}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ent-doc-body">
        <!-- Report Metadata -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Report Information</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Branch</div><div class="edf-value">${branch}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Currency</div><div class="edf-value">XAF (FCFA)</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Displayed Transactions</div><div class="edf-value">${filtered.length}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Account Number</div><div class="edf-value">${DB.operatingAccount?.accountNumber || 'N/A'}</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Balance Summary -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Fund Position Summary</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">${balanceLabel}</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:#1a365d;font-weight:800">${money(printBalance)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Inflows (Credits)</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:#16a34a">${money(totalCredits)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Outflows (Debits)</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:#dc2626">${money(totalDebits)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Net Change</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:${netChange>=0?'#16a34a':'#dc2626'};font-weight:800">${netChange>=0?'+':''}${money(netChange)}</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Transaction Detail Table -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Operating Fund Transactions (${filtered.length} entries)</div>
          <table class="ent-doc-table">
            <thead><tr><th>Reference</th><th>Date</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th style="text-align:right">Amount (FCFA)</th><th style="text-align:right">Balance</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
              ${filtered.map(t=>`<tr>
                <td class="edt-mono">${escHtml(t.ref||'—')}</td>
                <td>${escHtml(t.date||'N/A')}</td>
                <td><span style="display:inline-block;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;background:${t.type==='CREDIT'?'#dcfce7':'#fee2e2'};color:${t.type==='CREDIT'?'#166534':'#991b1b'}">${t.type}</span></td>
                <td>${escHtml(t.description||'N/A')}</td>
                <td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:${t.type==='CREDIT'?'#16a34a':'#dc2626'}">${t.type==='CREDIT'?'+':'-'}${money(t.amount)}</td>
                <td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:right">${money(t.balance)}</td>
              </tr>`).join('')}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>

        <!-- Certification -->
        <div class="ent-doc-cert">
          <strong>Certification:</strong> This operating fund statement has been prepared from the operating fund transactions of ${b.bankName||'Atlas Bank'} and is a true and accurate reflection of all fund inflows and outflows. This document is generated electronically and does not require a physical signature. Any discrepancy should be reported to the finance department within 7 business days.
        </div>

        <!-- Signatures -->
        <div class="ent-doc-signatures">
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">${STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'Authorized Officer'}</div>
            <div class="eds-role">Prepared By / Branch Operations</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">${branch}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">Chief Financial Officer</div>
            <div class="eds-role">Finance Department</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">Authorized Signatory</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Footer -->
        <div class="ent-doc-footer">
          ${b.bankNameShort||'Atlas Bank'} Limited · Registered in Cameroon · ${b.registrationNumber||'N/A'} · BEAC Approval: ${b.cbnLicenseNumber||'N/A'}<br>
          Registered Office: ${b.headOfficeAddress||'N/A'}<br>
          SWIFT Code: ${b.swiftCode||'N/A'} · Tel: ${b.phone||'N/A'} · Email: ${b.email||'N/A'}<br><br>
          <strong>CONFIDENTIAL:</strong> This document contains privileged financial information intended solely for authorized personnel. Unauthorized use, disclosure, copying, or distribution is strictly prohibited.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;

  printIsolated(html);
  addAuditEntry('OPERATING_STATEMENT_PRINTED','Report',stmtRef,`Operating fund statement printed. Branch: ${branch}. Balance: ${money(printBalance)}. Credits: ${money(totalCredits)}. Debits: ${money(totalDebits)}.`);
}

/* ================================================================
   BRANCH MANAGEMENT — Enterprise v10
   100% database-driven CRUD with search, filter, pagination, stats
   Real-time auto-refresh, CSV export, dynamic selectors
   ================================================================ */
STATE.branchPage = STATE.branchPage || 1;
STATE.branchPageSize = STATE.branchPageSize || 25;
STATE._branchAutoRefreshInterval = null;
STATE._branchLastDataHash = '';

/** Open the branch modal for create or edit */
function openBranchModal(id) {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can manage branches.'); return; }
  $('bfId').value='';
  $('bfName').value='';$('bfCode').value='';$('bfRegion').value='';$('bfCountry').value='CM';
  $('bfAddress').value='';$('bfPhone').value='';$('bfManager').value='';$('bfOpenedDate').value='';
  $('bfStatus').value='ACTIVE';$('bfCode').disabled=false;
  $('branchModalTitle').textContent='Add Branch';
  $('branchSubmitBtn').textContent='Create Branch';
  if(id) {
    const b=DB.branches.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!b) return;
    $('bfId').value=b.id;$('bfName').value=b.name;$('bfCode').value=b.code;$('bfRegion').value=b.region;
    $('bfCountry').value=b.country;$('bfAddress').value=b.address||'';$('bfPhone').value=b.phone||'';
    $('bfManager').value=b.manager||'';$('bfOpenedDate').value=b.openedDate||'';
    $('bfStatus').value=b.status;$('branchModalTitle').textContent='Edit Branch';
    $('branchSubmitBtn').textContent='Update Branch';
  }
  openModal('createBranchModal');
}

/** Handle branch form submit — async DB-driven CRUD */
async function handleBranchSubmit(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const id=$('bfId').value;
  const data = {
    name: $('bfName').value.trim(),
    code: $('bfCode').value.trim().toUpperCase(),
    region: $('bfRegion').value.trim(),
    country: $('bfCountry').value.trim().toUpperCase() || 'CM',
    address: $('bfAddress').value.trim(),
    phone: $('bfPhone').value.trim(),
    manager: $('bfManager').value.trim(),
    opened_date: $('bfOpenedDate').value || '',
    status: $('bfStatus').value
  };
  // Basic front-end validation
  if(!data.name||!data.code||!data.region) { showToast('error','Validation','Name, code, and region are required.'); return false; }
  if(!/^[A-Z0-9\-]+$/.test(data.code)) { showToast('error','Validation','Code must be alphanumeric (A-Z, 0-9, -).'); return false; }

  const btn=$('branchSubmitBtn'); btn.disabled=true; btn.textContent='Saving…';

  try {
    if(id) {
      // UPDATE
      const res = await API.put('branches/' + id, data);
      if(res?.data) {
        const idx=DB.branches.findIndex(x=>x.id==id);
        if(idx>=0) {
          DB.branches[idx] = { id:res.data.id, code:res.data.code, name:res.data.name,
            region:res.data.region, country:res.data.country, status:res.data.status,
            address:res.data.address||'', phone:res.data.phone||'', manager:res.data.manager||'',
            openedDate:res.data.opened_date||'', createdAt:res.data.created_at, updatedAt:res.data.updated_at };
        }
        addAuditEntry('BRANCH_UPDATED','Branch',data.code,'Branch '+data.name+' updated.');
        showToast('success','Branch Updated',data.name+' has been updated in the database.');
        populateAllBranchSelectors();
      }
    } else {
      // CREATE
      const res = await API.post('branches', data);
      if(res?.data) {
        DB.branches.push({ id:res.data.id, code:res.data.code, name:res.data.name,
          region:res.data.region, country:res.data.country, status:res.data.status,
          address:res.data.address||'', phone:res.data.phone||'', manager:res.data.manager||'',
          openedDate:res.data.opened_date||'', createdAt:res.data.created_at, updatedAt:res.data.updated_at });
        addAuditEntry('BRANCH_CREATED','Branch',data.code,'New branch '+data.name+' created.');
        showToast('success','Branch Created',data.name+' ('+data.code+') has been added to the database.');
        populateAllBranchSelectors();
      } else {
        showToast('error','Create Failed','Could not create branch. Check if code already exists.');
      }
    }
    closeModal('createBranchModal');
    renderBranches();
  } catch(err) {
    console.error('[Branch] Submit error:', err);
    showToast('error','Error','Failed to save branch. '+((err?.message)||''));
  } finally { btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent=id?'Update Branch':'Create Branch'; }
  return false;
}

/** Deactivate a branch — async with server validation */
async function deleteBranch(id) {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can deactivate branches.'); return; }
  const b=DB.branches.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!b) return;
  showConfirm('Deactivate Branch','Deactivate branch "'+b.name+'" ('+b.code+')? This will only proceed if the branch has zero active accounts.',async ()=>{
    const res = await API.del('branches/' + id);
    if(res?.data) {
      b.status = 'INACTIVE';
      STATE.branches = DB.branches.filter(x=>x.status==='ACTIVE').map(x=>x.name);
      addAuditEntry('BRANCH_DEACTIVATED','Branch',b.code,'Branch '+b.name+' deactivated.');
      showToast('warning','Branch Deactivated',b.name+' has been deactivated.');
      renderBranches();
      populateAllBranchSelectors();
    } else {
      // API.del returns null on error — the API._doRequest already showed the error toast
      // Refresh to get fresh state from server
      refreshBranches();
    }
  });
}

/** Reactivate a branch */
async function reactivateBranch(id) {
  if (!isUserAdmin()) { showToast('error','Access Denied','Only administrators can reactivate branches.'); return; }
  const b=DB.branches.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!b) return;
  showConfirm('Reactivate Branch','Reactivate branch "'+b.name+'" ('+b.code+')?',async ()=>{
    const res = await API.post('branches/' + id + '/activate');
    if(res?.data) {
      b.status = 'ACTIVE';
      STATE.branches = DB.branches.filter(x=>x.status==='ACTIVE').map(x=>x.name);
      addAuditEntry('BRANCH_REACTIVATED','Branch',b.code,'Branch '+b.name+' reactivated.');
      showToast('success','Branch Reactivated',b.name+' is now active.');
      renderBranches();
      populateAllBranchSelectors();
    } else {
      refreshBranches();
    }
  });
}

/** View branch detail — fetches from API with financials and staff */
async function viewBranchDetail(id) {
  const b=DB.branches.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!b) { showToast('error','Not Found','Branch ID '+id+' not found in local cache.'); return; }
  showToast('info','Loading','Fetching detail for '+b.name+'…');
  try {
    const res = await API.get('branches/' + id);
    if(!res?.data) { showToast('error','Error','Failed to load branch detail from server.'); return; }
    const d = res.data;
    const f = d.financials || {};
    const staff = d.staff || [];
    const isActive = d.status === 'ACTIVE';
    const acctCount = parseInt(f.account_count)||0;
    const custCount = parseInt(f.customer_count)||0;
    const loanCount = parseInt(f.active_loans)||0;
    const txnCount  = parseInt(f.transaction_count)||0;
    const deposits  = parseFloat(f.total_deposits)||0;
    const loanBal   = parseFloat(f.loan_portfolio)||0;
    const ldr       = deposits > 0 ? ((loanBal/deposits)*100).toFixed(1) : '0.0';
    // Computed risk indicator for the branch
    const riskColor = acctCount === 0 && custCount === 0 ? 'var(--muted)' : deposits > 50000000 ? 'var(--success)' : deposits > 10000000 ? 'var(--warn)' : 'var(--danger)';
    const riskLabel = acctCount === 0 && custCount === 0 ? 'No Activity' : deposits > 50000000 ? 'Healthy' : deposits > 10000000 ? 'Moderate' : 'Low Balance';
    const html = `
      <!-- Branch Header -->
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px">
        <div style="width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:12px;background:${isActive?'rgba(0,200,120,.12)':'rgba(255,80,80,.12)'};display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.4rem">${isActive ? IC('building', 22) : IC('circle-x', 22)}</div>
        <div>
          <div style="font-weight:800;font-size:1.05rem">${d.name}</div>
          <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)">${d.code} · ${d.region||'—'}, ${d.country||'—'}${d.manager?' · Managed by '+d.manager:''}</div>
        </div>
        <span class="pill ${isActive?'pill-approved':'pill-rejected'}" style="margin-left:auto;font-size:.75rem;padding:4px 10px">${d.status}</span>
      </div>
      <!-- Info Grid -->
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1px;background:var(--line);border-top:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden">
        <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:12px 14px"><div style="font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:3px">Branch Code</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;font-family:monospace">${d.code}</div></div>
        <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:12px 14px"><div style="font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:3px">Region / Country</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem">${d.region||'—'}, ${d.country||'—'}</div></div>
        <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:12px 14px"><div style="font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:3px">Phone</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem">${d.phone||'—'}</div></div>
        <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:12px 14px"><div style="font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:3px">Opening Date</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem">${d.opened_date||'—'}</div></div>
        <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:12px 14px;grid-column:span 2"><div style="font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:3px">Address</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem">${d.address||'No address on file'}</div></div>
        <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:12px 14px"><div style="font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:3px">Created</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${d.created_at||'—'}</div></div>
        <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:12px 14px"><div style="font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:3px">Last Updated</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${d.updated_at||'—'}</div></div>
      </div>
      <!-- Financial Summary -->
      <div style="margin-top:16px;font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px"><span>${IC("coins", 18)} Financial Summary</span><span style="font-size:.7rem;color:${riskColor};background:${riskColor}15;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;font-weight:600">${riskLabel}</span></div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:var(--line);border-top:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden">
        <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:14px;text-align:center"><div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px">Accounts</div><div style="font-weight:800;font-size:1.15rem">${acctCount.toLocaleString()}</div></div>
        <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:14px;text-align:center"><div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px">Total Deposits</div><div style="font-weight:800;font-size:1.15rem;color:var(--primary)">${money(deposits)}</div></div>
        <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:14px;text-align:center"><div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px">Active Loans</div><div style="font-weight:800;font-size:1.15rem;color:var(--warn)">${loanCount.toLocaleString()}</div></div>
        <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:14px;text-align:center"><div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px">Loan Portfolio</div><div style="font-weight:800;font-size:1.15rem">${money(loanBal)}</div></div>
        <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:14px;text-align:center"><div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px">Customers</div><div style="font-weight:800;font-size:1.15rem">${custCount.toLocaleString()}</div></div>
        <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:14px;text-align:center"><div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px">Transactions</div><div style="font-weight:800;font-size:1.15rem">${txnCount.toLocaleString()}</div></div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:8px;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted);text-align:center">L/D Ratio: <span style="font-weight:700;color:${parseFloat(ldr)>90?'var(--danger)':parseFloat(ldr)>=30?'var(--success)':'var(--warn)'}">${ldr}%</span></div>
      <!-- Assigned Staff -->
      ${staff.length ? `<div style="margin-top:16px;font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:8px">${IC("users", 18)} Assigned Staff (${staff.length})</div>
      <div class="table-container" style="border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden"><table style="font-size:.8rem"><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Role</th><th>Position</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead><tbody>
      ${staff.map(s=>`<tr><td style="font-weight:600">${s.full_name||'—'}</td><td>${s.role||'—'}</td><td>${s.position||'—'}</td>
        <td><span class="pill ${s.employment_status==='ACTIVE'?'pill-approved':'pill-rejected'}" style="font-size:.7rem">${s.employment_status||'—'}</span></td></tr>`).join('')}
      </tbody></table></div>` : '<div style="margin-top:16px;padding:16px;text-align:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:.84rem;background:var(--panel);border-radius:8px">No staff currently assigned to this branch.</div>'}
      <!-- Action Buttons -->
      <div style="margin-top:16px;display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)">
        <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="closePanelModal();openBranchModal(${d.id})">${IC("pencil", 16)} Edit Branch</button>
        ${isActive
          ? `<button class="btn btn-danger" style="font-size:.84rem" onclick="closePanelModal();deleteBranch(${d.id})">Deactivate</button>`
          : `<button class="btn" style="font-size:.84rem;color:var(--success);border:1px solid var(--success)" onclick="closePanelModal();reactivateBranch(${d.id})">Reactivate</button>`}
      </div>`;
    showInPanelModal('Branch Detail', html);
  } catch(err) { console.error('[viewBranchDetail]', err); showToast('error','Error','Failed to load branch detail: '+(err?.message||'Unknown error')); }
}

/** Show content in a panel modal with Escape key + click-outside-to-close support */
function showInPanelModal(title, bodyHtml) {
  // Remove any existing panel modal
  closePanelModal();
  const el = document.createElement('div');
  el.className = 'modal-overlay';
  el.id = 'activePanelModal';
  el.style.zIndex = '10000';
  el.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" style="max-width:720px;max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;border-radius:var(--radius)">
    <div class="modal-header" style="position:sticky;top:0;background:var(--panel);z-index:1;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);padding:14px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between">
      <h3 style="margin:0;font-size:1rem">${title}</h3>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:4px">
        <button class="btn-icon btn-ghost" onclick="closePanelModal()" title="Close (Esc)" style="width:32px;height:32px"><i data-lucide="x" style="width:18px;height:18px;stroke-width:2"></i></button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:0 18px 18px">${bodyHtml}</div></div>`;
  document.body.appendChild(el);
  refreshIcons(el);
  // ★ CRITICAL: trigger the CSS transition — .modal-overlay starts at opacity:0 / pointer-events:none
  // Adding 'open' class makes it visible (opacity:1 / pointer-events:auto).
  // requestAnimationFrame ensures the browser paints the initial state first so the transition animates.
  requestAnimationFrame(() => { el.classList.add('open'); });
  // Click outside to close
  el.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === el) closePanelModal(); });
  // Escape key to close
  el._escHandler = function(e) { if (e.key === 'Escape') closePanelModal(); };
  document.addEventListener('keydown', el._escHandler);
}
/** Close the active panel modal */
function closePanelModal() {
  const el = document.getElementById('activePanelModal');
  if (!el) return;
  if (el._escHandler) document.removeEventListener('keydown', el._escHandler);
  el.remove();
}

/** Compute branch financials from local DB cache */
function getBranchFinancials(branchName) {
