  // ★ FIX (BR-005): Align client-side computations with server-side /api/branches/stats
  // Server counts ONLY ACTIVE accounts for deposits and account count.
  // Previously counted ALL accounts — overstated deposits and inflated account counts.
  const accs = DB.accounts.filter(a=>a.branch===branchName&&a.status==='ACTIVE');
  const deposits = accs.reduce((s,a)=>s+(a.ledgerBalance||0),0);
  // ★ FIX (RA-LOAN-006): Include DELINQUENT loans alongside ACTIVE — matches the Internal Audit
  // panel's definition of "active loans" (ACTIVE+DELINQUENT). A DELINQUENT loan is still an
  // active (performing, though delinquent) loan that should be counted in the branch portfolio.
  const loans = DB.loans.filter(l=>l.branch===branchName&&(l.status==='ACTIVE'||l.status==='DELINQUENT'));
  const loanBal = loans.reduce((s,l)=>s+(l.outstanding||0),0);
  // ★ FIX (BR-005): Server counts ONLY ACTIVE customers. Previously counted ALL customers.
  const custs = DB.customers.filter(c=>c.branch===branchName&&c.status==='ACTIVE');
  return {accounts:accs.length, deposits, activeLoans:loans.length, loanBalance:loanBal, customers:custs.length};
}

/** Export branches as CSV — from DB.branches (database data) */
function exportBranchesCSV() {
  // ★ FIX (BM-008): Apply branch isolation so non-admin only exports their assigned branches
  let branches = DB.branches || [];
  if (!isUserAdmin()) {
    const userBranchNames = getUserBranches().map(b => b.toUpperCase());
    branches = branches.filter(b => userBranchNames.includes((b.name||'').toUpperCase()));
  } else if (!isAllBranchesMode()) {
    const selectedName = (STATE.currentBranch || '').toUpperCase();
    branches = branches.filter(b => (b.name||'').toUpperCase() === selectedName);
  }
  if (!branches.length) { showToast('warning','No Data','No branches to export.'); return; }
  // ★ FIX (BM-013): Include financial data in CSV export for banking completeness
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('Branch Network Export');
  const h = 'ID,Branch Code,Branch Name,Region,Country,Status,Address,Phone,Manager,Opened Date,Accounts,Total Deposits,Active Loans,Loan Portfolio,Customers,Created At,Updated At\n';
  const rows = branches.map(b => {
    const f = getBranchFinancials(b.name);
    return `${csv(b.id)},${csv(b.code)},${csv(b.name)},${csv(b.region)},${csv(b.country)},${csv(b.status)},${csv(b.address)},${csv(b.phone)},${csv(b.manager)},${csv(b.openedDate)},${f.accounts},${f.deposits},${f.activeLoans},${f.loanBalance},${f.customers},${csv(b.createdAt)},${csv(b.updatedAt)}`;
  }).join('\n');
  const footer = csvFooter(branches.length);
  downloadCSV(meta + h + rows + footer, 'atlas-branches-export.csv');
  showToast('success', 'Export Complete', `${branches.length} branches exported.`);
}

/** Load branch aggregate stats from /api/branches/stats and enhance KPIs */
async function loadBranchStats() {
  try {
    const res = await API.get('branches/stats');
    if (!res?.data) return;
    const {summary, branches: statsList} = res.data;
    if (!summary) return;

    // ★ FIX (BR-007): Cache server stats for renderBranches() to use as source of truth.
    // Previously, loadBranchStats() and renderBranches() both wrote to branchSummaryKpis
    // causing a race condition — client-side KPIs overwrote server-side KPIs.
    STATE._branchServerStats = summary;
    STATE._branchServerStatsList = statsList || [];

    // Update the KPI banner with server-side aggregate data — ONLY on "All Branches"
    const kpiEl = $('branchSummaryKpis');
    if (kpiEl && STATE.currentView === 'branches' && isAllBranchesMode()) {
      const avgDeposits = summary.active_branches > 0 ? summary.total_deposits / summary.active_branches : 0;
      const loanToDepositRatio = summary.total_deposits > 0
        ? ((summary.total_loan_portfolio / summary.total_deposits) * 100).toFixed(1)
        : '0.0';
      // ★ FIX (BR-006): Use server's total_staff (from staff_branches table) instead of
      // the client-side accounts/8 estimate. Falls back to client computation if server returns 0.
      const staffDisplay = summary.total_staff > 0 ? summary.total_staff :
        DB.staff.filter(s => s.employmentStatus === 'ACTIVE' && s.branches &&
          s.branches.some(sb => DB.branches.filter(b=>b.status==='ACTIVE').some(ab => ab.name === sb))).length;
      kpiEl.innerHTML = `
        <div class="kpi-card"><span class="kpi-label">Active Branches</span><div class="kpi-value" style="color:var(--success)">${summary.active_branches}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${summary.inactive_branches} inactive · ${summary.total_branches} total</div></div>
        <div class="kpi-card"><span class="kpi-label">Total Deposits</span><div class="kpi-value">${money(summary.total_deposits)}</div><div class="kpi-sub">Avg ${money(avgDeposits)}/branch across ${summary.active_branches} active</div></div>
        <div class="kpi-card"><span class="kpi-label">Loan Portfolio</span><div class="kpi-value" style="color:var(--warn)">${money(summary.total_loan_portfolio)}</div><div class="kpi-sub">L/D Ratio: ${loanToDepositRatio}% · ${summary.total_accounts} accounts</div></div>
        <div class="kpi-card"><span class="kpi-label">Customers</span><div class="kpi-value">${(summary.total_customers||0).toLocaleString()}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${staffDisplay} active staff · ${summary.active_branches} branches</div></div>`;
    }
  } catch(err) {
    console.warn('[BranchStats] Failed to load stats:', err);
  }
}

/** Refresh branches from the database */
async function refreshBranches() {
  showToast('info','Refreshing','Loading branches from database…');
  try {
    const res = await API.get('branches', {pageSize:500});
    if(res?.data) {
      DB.branches = (res.data||[]).map(r=>({id:r.id,code:r.code,name:r.name,region:r.region||'',
        country:r.country||'CM',status:r.status,address:r.address||'',phone:r.phone||'',
        manager:r.manager||'',openedDate:r.opened_date||'',createdAt:r.created_at,updatedAt:r.updated_at}));
      STATE._branchLastDataHash = ''; // Force re-render
      renderBranches();
      populateAllBranchSelectors();
      showToast('success','Synced','Branch data refreshed from database.');
    }
  } catch(err) { showToast('error','Error','Failed to refresh branch data.'); }
}

/** Start real-time auto-refresh for the Branch Management panel */
function startBranchAutoRefresh() {
  stopBranchAutoRefresh();
  STATE._branchAutoRefreshInterval = setInterval(async () => {
    try {
      const res = await API.get('branches', {pageSize:500});
      if (!res?.data) return;
      const newBranches = (res.data||[]).map(r=>({id:r.id,code:r.code,name:r.name,region:r.region||'',
        country:r.country||'CM',status:r.status,address:r.address||'',phone:r.phone||'',
        manager:r.manager||'',openedDate:r.opened_date||'',createdAt:r.created_at,updatedAt:r.updated_at}));
      // Hash-based change detection to avoid DOM flicker
      const newHash = newBranches.map(b=>`${b.id}:${b.code}:${b.status}:${b.updated_at}`).join('|');
      if (newHash === STATE._branchLastDataHash) return; // No changes
      STATE._branchLastDataHash = newHash;
      DB.branches = newBranches;
      // ★ FIX (BM-010): Also refresh stats so KPIs stay fresh, not just the branch list.
      // Previously only the branch list refreshed, causing KPIs to go stale after 15s.
      if (isAllBranchesMode()) loadBranchStats();
      // Only re-render if Branch Management view is currently visible
      const branchView = document.getElementById('view-branches');
      if (branchView && branchView.style.display !== 'none') {
        renderBranches();
      }
      // Also refresh dynamic selectors if branches changed
      populateAllBranchSelectors();
    } catch(err) { /* Silent — don't spam errors during polling */ }
  }, 15000);
}

/** Stop auto-refresh */
function stopBranchAutoRefresh() {
  if (STATE._branchAutoRefreshInterval) {
    clearInterval(STATE._branchAutoRefreshInterval);
    STATE._branchAutoRefreshInterval = null;
  }
}

/** ★ FIX (DP-008/009/010/017/018/023/031): Dashboard auto-refresh now ACTUALLY
 *  RE-FETCHES data from the server instead of just re-rendering stale DB cache.
 *  Previously, the auto-refresh only called renderDashboard() which recomputed KPIs
 *  from cached DB.* objects — all data went stale immediately after initial load.
 *  Now it fetches key data collections in parallel before re-rendering, ensuring
 *  KPIs, charts, tables, and timelines stay current. Uses 30s interval (less
 *  aggressive than Branch's 15s since Dashboard is heavier to render).
 */
async function _dashRefreshData() {
  try {
    const results = await Promise.allSettled([
      API.get('reports', {type:'dashboard'}),        // Server dashboard summary
      API.get('operating-account'),                    // Operating fund balance
      API.get('reports', {type:'balance_trends'}),     // Balance trend chart data
      API.get('approvals'),                            // Pending approvals
      API.get('expenses', {pageSize:2000}),            // Expenses for totals
      API.get('audit', {pageSize:500}),                // Audit timeline
    ]);
    // Store server dashboard data (DP-011)
    if (results[0].status === 'fulfilled' && results[0].value?.data) {
      STATE.dashServerData = results[0].value.data;
    }
    // Refresh operating account (DP-009)
    if (results[1].status === 'fulfilled' && results[1].value?.data) {
      const op = results[1].value.data;
      const src = Array.isArray(op) && op.length > 0
        ? (op.find(a => a.account_number === 'BANK-OP-0001') || op[0])
        : (op && typeof op === 'object' ? op : null);
      if (src) {
        const txns = (src.transactions || []).map(t => ({
          ...t, id: t.id, ref: t.ref || '', date: t.date || '', type: t.type || '',
          description: t.description || '', amount: parseFloat(t.amount) || 0,
          balance: parseFloat(t.balance_after || t.balance) || 0, operator: t.operator || '',
          branch: t.branch || '', contraAccount: t.contra_account || '',
          transactionType: t.transaction_type || '', timestamp: t.created_at || ''
        }));
        DB.operatingAccount = {
          accountNumber: src.account_number||'BANK-OP-0001',
          accountName: src.account_name||'Atlas Bank Operating Fund',
          balance: parseFloat(src.balance||src.ledger_balance||0),
          currency: src.currency||'XAF', transactions: txns
        };
      }
    }
    // Refresh balance trends (DP-010)
    if (results[2].status === 'fulfilled' && results[2].value?.data) {
      const trends = results[2].value.data;
      if (Array.isArray(trends) && trends.length > 0) {
        const labels = [...new Set(trends.map(t => t.snapshot_date))].sort();
        const productTypes = [...new Set(trends.map(t => t.product_type))];
        DB.balanceTrends = { labels };
        productTypes.forEach(pt => {
          DB.balanceTrends[pt.charAt(0) + pt.slice(1).toLowerCase()] =
            labels.map(label => {
              const match = trends.find(t => t.snapshot_date === label && t.product_type === pt);
              return match ? parseFloat(match.total_balance || 0) : 0;
            });
        });
      }
    }
    // Refresh approvals (DP-018)
    if (results[3].status === 'fulfilled' && results[3].value?.data) {
      DB.approvals = results[3].value.data.map(a => ({
        id:a.id, entityType:a.entity_type, entityId:a.entity_id, value:a.value,
        status:a.status, submittedBy:a.submitted_by, submittedAt:a.submitted_at,
        branch:a.branch||'', priority:a.priority||'MEDIUM'
      }));
    }
    // Refresh expenses (DP-018)
    if (results[4].status === 'fulfilled' && results[4].value?.data) {
      DB.expenses = results[4].value.data.map(e => ({
        id:e.id, category:e.category||'', glCode:e.gl_code||'', glAccountName:e.gl_account_name||'',
        description:e.description, amount:parseFloat(e.amount||0), status:e.status,
        branch:e.branch||'', date:e.date||e.created_at||'', submittedBy:e.submitted_by||'',
        approvedBy:e.approved_by||'', approvedAt:e.approved_at||'',
        createdAt:e.created_at||''
      }));
    }
    // Refresh audit logs (DP-031)
    if (results[5].status === 'fulfilled' && results[5].value?.data) {
      DB.auditLogs = results[5].value.data.map(l => ({
        id:l.id, action:l.action, entity:l.entity||'', entityId:l.entity_id||'',
        details:l.details||'', actor:l.actor||l.operator||'', branch:l.branch||'',
        actorBranch:l.actor_branch||'', severity:l.severity||'INFO',
        timestamp:l.created_at||l.timestamp||new Date().toISOString()
      }));
    }
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('[Dashboard Auto-Refresh] Data fetch failed:', err);
  }
}

function startDashboardAutoRefresh() {
  stopDashboardAutoRefresh();
  STATE._dashAutoRefreshInterval = setInterval(async () => {
    const dashView = document.getElementById('view-dashboard');
    if (dashView && dashView.style.display !== 'none') {
      await _dashRefreshData();
      renderDashboard();
    }
  }, 30000);
}

/** Stop Dashboard auto-refresh */
function stopDashboardAutoRefresh() {
  if (STATE._dashAutoRefreshInterval) {
    clearInterval(STATE._dashAutoRefreshInterval);
    STATE._dashAutoRefreshInterval = null;
  }
}

/** Master render function — KPIs, cards, table with search/filter/pagination */
function renderBranches() {
  const search = ($('branchSearchInput')?.value||'').toLowerCase();
  const statusFilter = $('branchStatusFilter')?.value||'';

  // ★ FIX (BM-009): Reset page to 1 when search/filter changes to avoid empty results
  // We detect filter change by comparing against cached values
  const prevSearch = STATE._branchPrevSearch || '';
  const prevStatus = STATE._branchPrevStatus || '';
  if (search !== prevSearch || statusFilter !== prevStatus) {
    STATE.branchPage = 1;
  }
  STATE._branchPrevSearch = search;
  STATE._branchPrevStatus = statusFilter;

  // Branch isolation: admin sees selected branch or all; non-admin only assigned
  let allBranches = DB.branches;
  const isAdminView = isUserAdmin();
  if (!isAdminView) {
    const userBranchNames = getUserBranches().map(b => b.toUpperCase());
    allBranches = DB.branches.filter(b => userBranchNames.includes((b.name||'').toUpperCase()));
  } else if (!isAllBranchesMode()) {
    // Admin with specific branch selected: show only that branch
    const selectedName = (STATE.currentBranch || '').toUpperCase();
    allBranches = DB.branches.filter(b => (b.name||'').toUpperCase() === selectedName);
  }

  // Filter branches
  let filtered = [...allBranches];
  if(statusFilter) filtered = filtered.filter(b=>b.status===statusFilter);
  if(search) filtered = filtered.filter(b=>(b.name||'').toLowerCase().includes(search)||(b.code||'').toLowerCase().includes(search)||(b.region||'').toLowerCase().includes(search)||(b.manager||'').toLowerCase().includes(search));

  // Sort newest first by ID
  filtered.sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0));

  // Summary KPIs — company-wide cards only shown on "All Branches"; specific branch shows branch context
  let branchBannerHtml = '';
  if (!isAdminView) {
    branchBannerHtml = `<div class="kpi-card" style="grid-column:1/-1;padding:10px 16px;background:rgba(88,183,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(88,183,255,.2);border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:.84rem;color:var(--primary)">
    <span style="display:inline-flex">${IC("lock", 18)}</span>
    <div><strong>Limited View</strong> — You can only see branches assigned to you. Contact an administrator for access to additional branches.</div>
  </div>`;
  } else if (!isAllBranchesMode()) {
    branchBannerHtml = `<div class="kpi-card" style="grid-column:1/-1;padding:10px 16px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.08);border:1px solid rgba(103,232,181,.2);border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:.84rem;color:var(--accent)">
    <span style="display:inline-flex"><i data-lucide="map-pin" style="width:18px;height:18px;stroke-width:1.8"></i></span>
    <div><strong>Branch: ${STATE.currentBranch}</strong> — Showing ${STATE.currentBranch} data only. Switch to "All Branches" to see the full company-wide overview.</div>
  </div>`;
  }
  const allActive = allBranches.filter(b=>b.status==='ACTIVE');
  // ★ FIX (BM-006): Count ALL non-ACTIVE as inactive — matches server-side logic.
  // Previously only counted status==='INACTIVE', missing PENDING/SUSPENDED branches.
  const allInactive = allBranches.filter(b=>b.status!=='ACTIVE');
  const totalDeposits = allActive.reduce((s,b)=>s+getBranchFinancials(b.name).deposits,0);
  const totalLoans = allActive.reduce((s,b)=>s+getBranchFinancials(b.name).loanBalance,0);
  const totalCustomers = allActive.reduce((s,b)=>s+getBranchFinancials(b.name).customers,0);
  // ★ FIX (BR-006): Use real staff count from DB.staff (via branch assignment) instead of
  // bogus accounts/8 estimate. Previously: Math.ceil(accounts/8) — completely fabricated.
  const totalStaff = DB.staff.filter(s => s.employmentStatus === 'ACTIVE' && s.branches &&
    s.branches.some(sb => allActive.some(ab => ab.name === sb))).length;
  // ★ FIX (BR-007): Use server stats as KPI source of truth when available.
  // Previously renderBranches() always overwrote server-fetched KPIs with client-side
  // computations, causing a race condition. Now we skip KPI render if server stats
  // are cached (they'll be rendered by loadBranchStats), and only render client-side
  // KPIs as a fallback when server stats haven't loaded yet.
  const serverStats = STATE._branchServerStats;
  const showClientKpis = !serverStats || !isAllBranchesMode();
  if (showClientKpis) {
    // ★ FIX (BM-014): Add L/D Ratio color coding to KPI cards (was only in branch detail)
    const clientLdr = totalDeposits>0?((totalLoans/totalDeposits)*100).toFixed(1):'0.0';
    const clientLdrColor = parseFloat(clientLdr)>90?'var(--danger)':parseFloat(clientLdr)>=30?'var(--success)':'var(--warn)';
    // ★ FIX (BM-011): Use allBranches.length instead of DB.branches.length to avoid leaking
    // total branch count to non-admin users who should only see their assigned branches.
    const companyWideKpis = (isAllBranchesMode() || !isAdminView) ? `
    <div class="kpi-card"><span class="kpi-label">Active Branches</span><div class="kpi-value" style="color:var(--success)">${allActive.length}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${allInactive.length} inactive · ${allBranches.length} total</div></div>
    <div class="kpi-card"><span class="kpi-label">Total Deposits</span><div class="kpi-value">${money(totalDeposits)}</div><div class="kpi-sub">Avg ${money(allActive.length>0?totalDeposits/allActive.length:0)}/branch across ${allActive.length} active</div></div>
    <div class="kpi-card"><span class="kpi-label">Loan Portfolio</span><div class="kpi-value" style="color:var(--warn)">${money(totalLoans)}</div><div class="kpi-sub">L/D Ratio: <span style="color:${clientLdrColor};font-weight:700">${clientLdr}%</span> · ${allActive.reduce((s,b)=>s+getBranchFinancials(b.name).activeLoans,0)} active loans</div></div>
    <div class="kpi-card"><span class="kpi-label">Customers</span><div class="kpi-value">${totalCustomers.toLocaleString()}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${totalStaff} active staff · ${allActive.length} branches</div></div>` : '';
    $('branchSummaryKpis').innerHTML = branchBannerHtml + companyWideKpis;
  } else if (branchBannerHtml) {
    // Only update if there's a branch banner to show (admin on specific branch or non-admin)
    const existingContent = $('branchSummaryKpis').innerHTML;
    if (!existingContent.includes(branchBannerHtml)) {
      $('branchSummaryKpis').innerHTML = branchBannerHtml + existingContent;
    }
  }

  // Branch Cards (active only)
  $('branchCards').innerHTML = allActive.map(b=>{
    const f=getBranchFinancials(b.name);
    // ★ FIX (BM-007): Use 'var(--danger)' for low-deposit branches to match branch detail view risk color.
    // Previously used 'var(--muted)' which understated the risk signal vs the detail panel.
    const statusColor = f.accounts === 0 && f.customers === 0 ? 'var(--muted)' : f.deposits > 50000000 ? 'var(--success)' : f.deposits > 10000000 ? 'var(--warn)' : 'var(--danger)';
    return `<div class="branch-card" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="viewBranchDetail(${b.id})">
      <div class="bc-name">${b.name}</div>
      <div class="bc-code">${b.code} · ${b.region||'—'}, ${b.country}${b.manager?' · '+b.manager:''}</div>
      <div style="margin-top:12px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px">
        <div style="padding:8px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)"><div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">Accounts</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:1rem">${f.accounts}</div></div>
        <div style="padding:8px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)"><div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">Deposits</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:1rem;color:${statusColor}">${money(f.deposits)}</div></div>
        <div style="padding:8px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)"><div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">Active Loans</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:1rem">${f.activeLoans}</div></div>
        <div style="padding:8px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)"><div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">Customers</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:1rem">${f.customers}</div></div>
      </div>
      ${b.openedDate?'<div style="margin-top:8px;font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">Opened: '+b.openedDate+'</div>':''}
    </div>`;
  }).join('');

  // Paginated table
  const {items, total, totalPages} = paginate(filtered, STATE.branchPage, STATE.branchPageSize);
  // ★ FIX (BM-015): Added Loan Portfolio column to table rows
  $('branchTableBody').innerHTML = items.length ? items.map(b=>{
    const f=getBranchFinancials(b.name);
    return `<tr>
      <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600">${b.code}</td>
      <td><span style="font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;color:var(--primary)" onclick="viewBranchDetail(${b.id})">${b.name}</span>${b.manager?'<div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">'+b.manager+'</div>':''}</td>
      <td>${b.region||'—'}</td>
      <td>${b.manager||'—'}</td>
      <td><span class="pill ${b.status==='ACTIVE'?'pill-approved':'pill-rejected'}" style="font-size:.72rem">${b.status}</span></td>
      <td>${f.accounts}</td>
      <td style="font-weight:600">${money(f.deposits)}</td>
      <td>${f.activeLoans}</td>
      <td style="font-weight:600">${money(f.loanBalance)}</td>
      <td>${f.customers}</td>
      <td class="td-actions">
        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="viewBranchDetail(${b.id})" title="View Detail">${IC("eye", 14)}</button>
        ${isAdminView?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="openBranchModal(${b.id})" title="Edit">${IC("pencil", 14)}</button>
        ${b.status==='ACTIVE'
          ? `<button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="deleteBranch(${b.id})" title="Deactivate">Deactivate</button>`
          : `<button class="btn btn-sm" style="color:var(--success)" onclick="reactivateBranch(${b.id})" title="Reactivate">Reactivate</button>`}`:''}
      </td></tr>`;
  // ★ FIX (BM-015): Updated colspan from 10 to 11 for new Loan Portfolio column
  }).join('') : '<tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--muted)">No branches found. Click "+ Add Branch" to create one.</td></tr>';

  // Render pagination — call renderPagination for each container with proper element ID
  if (totalPages > 1) {
    renderPagination('branchPaginationTop', STATE.branchPage, filtered.length, p=>{STATE.branchPage=p;renderBranches();}, STATE.branchPageSize);
    renderPagination('branchPaginationBottom', STATE.branchPage, filtered.length, p=>{STATE.branchPage=p;renderBranches();}, STATE.branchPageSize);
  } else {
    $('branchPaginationTop').innerHTML = '';
    // ★ FIX (BM-015): Updated colspan from 10 to 11 for new Loan Portfolio column
    $('branchPaginationBottom').innerHTML = `<div class="pagination-info">Showing ${filtered.length===0?0:1}–${filtered.length} of ${filtered.length}</div>`;
  }

  // Store hash for change detection
  STATE._branchLastDataHash = DB.branches.map(b=>`${b.id}:${b.code}:${b.status}:${b.updated_at}`).join('|');
  refreshIcons();
}

/* ================================================================
   INTERNAL AUDIT CENTER — Enterprise Database-Driven v10
   All data loaded live from api/audit/dashboard (20 compliance checks,
   GL integrity, financial health, unbalanced references, etc.)
   ================================================================ */
STATE.auditDashboard = null;
STATE._auditAutoRefreshInterval = null;
STATE._auditLastFetchHash = '';

// Number formatting helper (FCFA — no decimals, space-separated thousands)
function number_format(n) {
  if (n == null || isNaN(n)) return '0';
  return Math.round(Number(n)).toLocaleString('fr-FR');
}

/* ================================================================
   BRANCH-SPECIFIC AUDIT COMPUTATION
   Computes compliance checks, GL integrity, unbalanced refs, and
   financial health metrics from local branch-filtered data so that
   each branch can be audited individually.
   ================================================================ */
function computeBranchAuditData() {
  const bLoans = filterByUserBranch(DB.loans);
  const bAccounts = filterByUserBranch(DB.accounts);
  const bExpenses = filterByUserBranch(DB.expenses);
  const bCustomers = filterByUserBranch(DB.customers);
  const bStaff = filterByUserBranch(DB.staff);
  const bApprovals = filterByUserBranch(DB.approvals || []);
  const bProfitLedger = filterByUserBranch(DB.profitLedger);
  const bGlEntries = filterByUserBranch(DB.generalLedger || []);
  const bTransactions = filterByUserBranch(DB.transactions || []);
  const bFindings = filterByUserBranch(STATE.auditFindings || []);
  const bOpTxns = filterByUserBranch(DB.operatingAccount?.transactions || []);
  const branchName = STATE.currentBranch;

  // ── Financial Health ──
  const activeAccounts = bAccounts.filter(a => a.status === 'ACTIVE');
  const totalDeposits = activeAccounts.reduce((s, a) => s + a.ledgerBalance, 0);
  // ★ FIX IA-016: totalLoanPortfolio only from ACTIVE+DELINQUENT+OVERDUE (matching backend)
  // Previously summed ALL loans including CLOSED/WRITTEN_OFF — overstated in branch mode
  const totalLoanPortfolio = bLoans.filter(l => l.status === 'ACTIVE' || l.status === 'DELINQUENT' || l.status === 'OVERDUE').reduce((s, l) => s + l.outstanding, 0);
  // ★ FIX IA-014: activeLoans now uses ACTIVE+DELINQUENT+OVERDUE (matching backend)
  // Previously used ACTIVE+DISBURSED — different definition caused different counts
  // between all-branches mode (backend: ACTIVE+DELINQUENT+OVERDUE) and branch mode.
  const activeLoans = bLoans.filter(l => l.status === 'ACTIVE' || l.status === 'DELINQUENT' || l.status === 'OVERDUE').length;
  const delinquentLoans = bLoans.filter(l => l.status === 'DELINQUENT' || l.status === 'OVERDUE').length;
  const delinquentAmount = bLoans.filter(l => l.status === 'DELINQUENT' || l.status === 'OVERDUE').reduce((s, l) => s + l.outstanding, 0);
  const writtenOffLoans = bLoans.filter(l => l.status === 'WRITTEN_OFF').length;
  // ★ FIX IA-017: accruedInterest only from ACTIVE+DELINQUENT+OVERDUE (matching backend)
  // Previously summed ALL loans including CLOSED/WRITTEN_OFF — overstated in branch mode
  const accruedInterest = bLoans.filter(l => l.status === 'ACTIVE' || l.status === 'DELINQUENT' || l.status === 'OVERDUE').reduce((s, l) => s + l.accruedInterest, 0);
  const approvedExpenses = bExpenses.filter(e => e.status === 'APPROVED');
  const pendingExpenses = bExpenses.filter(e => e.status === 'PENDING');
  const totalApprovedExpenses = approvedExpenses.reduce((s, e) => s + e.amount, 0);
  const pendingExpensesTotal = pendingExpenses.reduce((s, e) => s + e.amount, 0);
  const totalFeeIncome = bProfitLedger.reduce((s, e) => s + e.feeAmount, 0);
  const opCredits = bOpTxns.filter(t => t.type === 'CREDIT').reduce((s, t) => s + Number(t.amount || 0), 0);
  const opDebits = bOpTxns.filter(t => t.type === 'DEBIT').reduce((s, t) => s + Number(t.amount || 0), 0);
  const opNet = opCredits - opDebits;
  const ldr = totalDeposits > 0 ? (totalLoanPortfolio / totalDeposits) * 100 : 0;
  const opexRatio = totalFeeIncome > 0 ? (totalApprovedExpenses / totalFeeIncome) * 100 : 0;

  // Trial balance from branch-filtered GL entries
  const tbDebits = bGlEntries.reduce((s, e) => s + Number(e.debit || 0), 0);
  const tbCredits = bGlEntries.reduce((s, e) => s + Number(e.credit || 0), 0);
  const tbDiff = Math.abs(tbDebits - tbCredits);
  const tbBalanced = tbDiff < 0.01;

  // GL Integrity from branch-filtered entries
  const coa = DB.chartOfAccounts || [];
  const glBalances = {};
  const glCounts = {};
  const glTotalDebits = {};
  const glTotalCredits = {};
  coa.forEach(a => { glBalances[a.code] = 0; glCounts[a.code] = 0; glTotalDebits[a.code] = 0; glTotalCredits[a.code] = 0; });
  bGlEntries.forEach(e => {
    if (glBalances[e.accountCode] !== undefined) {
      const dr = Number(e.debit || 0);
      const cr = Number(e.credit || 0);
      glBalances[e.accountCode] += dr - cr;
      glCounts[e.accountCode]++;
      glTotalDebits[e.accountCode] += dr;
      glTotalCredits[e.accountCode] += cr;
    }
  });
  // Add branch expense totals to GL expense codes
  approvedExpenses.forEach(exp => {
    if (glBalances[exp.glCode] !== undefined) {
      glBalances[exp.glCode] += Number(exp.amount || 0);
      glTotalDebits[exp.glCode] += Number(exp.amount || 0);
    }
  });
  // Key balance overrides
  // ★ FIX (RA-LOAN-005): GL 1100 now uses totalLoanPortfolio (ACTIVE+DELINQUENT+OVERDUE only)
  // instead of bLoans (ALL statuses including CLOSED/WRITTEN_OFF). This aligns with the
  // Financial Health metric and prevents PENDING/CLOSED loans from inflating the GL balance.
  glBalances['1100'] = totalLoanPortfolio;
  glBalances['2000'] = totalDeposits;
  glBalances['1200'] = accruedInterest;
  glBalances['1400'] = opNet;

  const glIntegrity = coa.map(a => ({
    account_code: a.code,
    account_name: a.name,
    account_type: a.type,
    category: a.category || '',
    net_balance: glBalances[a.code] || 0,
    total_debit: glTotalDebits[a.code] || 0,
    total_credit: glTotalCredits[a.code] || 0,
    entry_count: glCounts[a.code] || 0
  }));

  // Unbalanced references from branch-filtered GL entries
  const refMap = {};
  bGlEntries.forEach(e => {
    const ref = e.reference || e.sourceRef || '';
    if (!ref) return;
    if (!refMap[ref]) refMap[ref] = { ref, debits: 0, credits: 0, accounts: new Set(), txTypes: new Set(), firstDate: e.date || e.timestamp || '', entries: 0 };
    refMap[ref].debits += Number(e.debit || 0);
    refMap[ref].credits += Number(e.credit || 0);
    if (e.accountCode) refMap[ref].accounts.add(e.accountCode);
    if (e.transactionType || e.type) refMap[ref].txTypes.add(e.transactionType || e.type);
    if (e.date || e.timestamp) {
      if (!refMap[ref].firstDate || (e.date || e.timestamp) < refMap[ref].firstDate) refMap[ref].firstDate = e.date || e.timestamp;
    }
    refMap[ref].entries++;
  });
  const unbalancedRefs = Object.values(refMap)
    .filter(r => Math.abs(r.debits - r.credits) > 0.01)
    .map(r => ({
      reference: r.ref,
      first_date: r.firstDate,
      accounts: [...r.accounts].join(', '),
      tx_types: [...r.txTypes].join(', '),
      ref_debits: r.debits,
      ref_credits: r.credits,
      diff: Math.abs(r.debits - r.credits),
      entry_count: r.entries
    }))
    .sort((a, b) => b.diff - a.diff)
    .slice(0, 20);

  // ── 20 Automated Compliance Checks (branch-specific) ──
  const checks = [];

  // C01: Trial Balance
  checks.push({ id: 'C01', name: 'Trial Balance Integrity', status: tbBalanced ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL', severity: 'CRITICAL',
    details: tbBalanced ? 'Branch debits (' + number_format(tbDebits) + ') match credits (' + number_format(tbCredits) + ') FCFA.' : 'Imbalance: DR ' + number_format(tbDebits) + ' vs CR ' + number_format(tbCredits) + ' (diff: ' + number_format(tbDiff) + ' FCFA).' });

  // C02: Double-Entry Integrity
  const orphanedDir = bGlEntries.filter(e => !e.debit && !e.credit).length;
  checks.push({ id: 'C02', name: 'Double-Entry Integrity', status: orphanedDir === 0 ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL', severity: 'CRITICAL',
    details: orphanedDir === 0 ? 'All ' + bGlEntries.length + ' GL entries have valid debit/credit amounts.' : orphanedDir + ' GL entries missing debit or credit.' });

  // C03: Negative Account Balances
  const negAccounts = activeAccounts.filter(a => a.ledgerBalance < 0);
  checks.push({ id: 'C03', name: 'Negative Account Balances', status: negAccounts.length === 0 ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL', severity: 'HIGH',
    details: negAccounts.length === 0 ? 'No active accounts have negative ledger balances.' : negAccounts.length + ' account(s) with negative balance: ' + negAccounts.map(a => a.accountNumber + ' (' + number_format(a.ledgerBalance) + ')').join(', ') });

  // C04: Orphaned Transaction References
  const bAcctNums = new Set(bAccounts.map(a => a.accountNumber));
  const orphanRefs = bTransactions.filter(t => t.account && t.account !== '' && !bAcctNums.has(t.account)).length;
  checks.push({ id: 'C04', name: 'Orphaned Transaction References', status: orphanRefs === 0 ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL', severity: 'HIGH',
    details: orphanRefs === 0 ? 'All transaction account references resolve to valid branch accounts.' : orphanRefs + ' transaction(s) reference non-existent accounts.' });

  // C05: Unique Transaction References
  const refCounts = {};
  bTransactions.forEach(t => { if (t.ref) refCounts[t.ref] = (refCounts[t.ref] || 0) + 1; });
  const dupRefs = Object.entries(refCounts).filter(([, c]) => c > 1);
  checks.push({ id: 'C05', name: 'Unique Transaction References', status: dupRefs.length === 0 ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL', severity: 'CRITICAL',
    details: dupRefs.length === 0 ? 'All ' + bTransactions.length + ' transaction references are unique.' : dupRefs.length + ' duplicate reference(s): ' + dupRefs.map(([r, c]) => r + ' (' + c + 'x)').join(', ') });

  // C06: Customer KYC Completeness
  const kycIncomplete = bCustomers.filter(c => c.status === 'DRAFT' || c.status === 'PENDING_KYC' || !c.phone || !c.email).length;
  checks.push({ id: 'C06', name: 'Customer KYC Completeness', status: kycIncomplete === 0 ? 'PASS' : (kycIncomplete <= 3 ? 'WARNING' : 'FAIL'), severity: 'HIGH',
    details: kycIncomplete === 0 ? 'All ' + bCustomers.length + ' branch customers have complete KYC.' : kycIncomplete + ' customer(s) have incomplete KYC data.' });

  // C07: Dormant & Frozen Account Review
  const dormantAccounts = bAccounts.filter(a => a.status === 'DORMANT').length;
  const frozenAccounts = bAccounts.filter(a => a.status === 'FROZEN').length;
  checks.push({ id: 'C07', name: 'Dormant & Frozen Account Review', status: (dormantAccounts + frozenAccounts) === 0 ? 'PASS' : 'WARNING', severity: 'MEDIUM',
    details: (dormantAccounts + frozenAccounts) === 0 ? 'No dormant or frozen accounts.' : dormantAccounts + ' dormant and ' + frozenAccounts + ' frozen account(s) require review.' });

  // C08: Loan Portfolio Quality
  checks.push({ id: 'C08', name: 'Loan Portfolio Quality', status: delinquentLoans === 0 ? 'PASS' : (delinquentLoans <= 2 ? 'WARNING' : 'FAIL'), severity: 'CRITICAL',
    details: delinquentLoans === 0 ? 'No delinquent loans. Portfolio of ' + number_format(totalLoanPortfolio) + ' FCFA across ' + activeLoans + ' active loans.' : delinquentLoans + ' delinquent loan(s). ' + (writtenOffLoans > 0 ? writtenOffLoans + ' written off. ' : '') + 'Amount: ' + number_format(delinquentAmount) + ' FCFA.' });

  // C09: Large Transaction Monitoring
  const largeTxnThreshold = 5000000;
  const largeTxns = bTransactions.filter(t => Number(t.amount || 0) > largeTxnThreshold).sort((a, b) => Number(b.amount) - Number(a.amount)).slice(0, 20);
  checks.push({ id: 'C09', name: 'Large Transaction Monitoring (>5M FCFA)', status: largeTxns.length === 0 ? 'PASS' : 'WARNING', severity: 'HIGH',
    details: largeTxns.length === 0 ? 'No transactions exceeding ' + number_format(largeTxnThreshold) + ' FCFA.' : largeTxns.length + ' large transaction(s) detected (top: ' + (largeTxns[0]?.ref || '') + ' — ' + number_format(largeTxns[0]?.amount || 0) + ' FCFA).' });

  // C10: Expense Approval Compliance
  checks.push({ id: 'C10', name: 'Expense Approval Compliance', status: pendingExpenses.length === 0 ? 'PASS' : 'WARNING', severity: 'MEDIUM',
    details: pendingExpenses.length === 0 ? 'All ' + bExpenses.length + ' expenses processed. ' + approvedExpenses.length + ' approved totaling ' + number_format(totalApprovedExpenses) + ' FCFA.' : pendingExpenses.length + ' expense(s) pending totaling ' + number_format(pendingExpensesTotal) + ' FCFA.' });

  // C11: Operating Fund Reconciliation
  const op1400 = glBalances['1400'] || 0;
  const reconDiff = Math.abs(opNet - op1400);
  checks.push({ id: 'C11', name: 'Operating Fund vs GL Reconciliation', status: reconDiff < 1 ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL', severity: 'HIGH',
    details: 'OpFund net: ' + number_format(opNet) + ' / GL 1400: ' + number_format(op1400) + ' FCFA. ' + (reconDiff < 1 ? 'Reconciled.' : 'Discrepancy: ' + number_format(reconDiff) + ' FCFA.'),
    operating_balance: opNet, gl1400_net: op1400, recon_diff: reconDiff, op_credits: opCredits, op_debits: opDebits });

  // C12: Staff Access Control
  const activeStaffCount = bStaff.filter(s => s.status === 'ACTIVE').length;
  const inactiveStaffCount = bStaff.length - activeStaffCount;
  checks.push({ id: 'C12', name: 'Staff Access Control', status: inactiveStaffCount === 0 ? 'PASS' : 'WARNING', severity: 'MEDIUM',
    details: activeStaffCount + ' active staff out of ' + bStaff.length + '.' + (inactiveStaffCount > 0 ? ' ' + inactiveStaffCount + ' inactive — verify access revoked.' : '') });

  // C13: Pending Approvals Queue
  const pendingApprovals = bApprovals.filter(a => a.status === 'PENDING').length;
  checks.push({ id: 'C13', name: 'Pending Approvals Queue', status: pendingApprovals === 0 ? 'PASS' : 'WARNING', severity: 'MEDIUM',
    details: pendingApprovals === 0 ? 'No pending approvals.' : pendingApprovals + ' pending approval(s) require attention.' });

  // C14: Account Lifecycle Status
  const inactiveAccounts = bAccounts.length - activeAccounts.length;
  checks.push({ id: 'C14', name: 'Account Lifecycle Status', status: inactiveAccounts <= 1 ? 'PASS' : 'WARNING', severity: 'LOW',
    details: activeAccounts.length + ' active out of ' + bAccounts.length + ' total accounts. ' + inactiveAccounts + ' non-active.' });

  // C15: Branch Operational Status
  checks.push({ id: 'C15', name: 'Branch Operational Status', status: 'PASS', severity: 'MEDIUM',
    details: 'Branch "' + branchName + '" is being audited individually.' });

  // C16: Profit Ledger Activity
  const plEntries = bProfitLedger.length;
  const plCategories = new Set(bProfitLedger.map(e => e.category)).size;
  checks.push({ id: 'C16', name: 'Profit Ledger Activity', status: plEntries > 0 ? 'PASS' : 'WARNING', severity: 'LOW',
    details: plEntries + ' profit ledger entries across ' + plCategories + ' category(ies). Total fee income: ' + number_format(totalFeeIncome) + ' FCFA.' });

  // C17: Loan-to-Deposit Ratio
  checks.push({ id: 'C17', name: 'Loan-to-Deposit Ratio', status: (ldr >= 30 && ldr <= 90) ? 'PASS' : (ldr > 90 ? 'FAIL' : 'WARNING'), severity: 'HIGH',
    details: 'LDR is ' + number_format(ldr, 1) + '% (loans: ' + number_format(totalLoanPortfolio) + ' / deposits: ' + number_format(totalDeposits) + ' FCFA).' + (ldr > 90 ? ' Exceeds 90% threshold.' : (ldr < 30 ? ' Below optimal range.' : ' Within range.')) });

  // C18: Accrued Interest Monitoring
  checks.push({ id: 'C18', name: 'Accrued Interest Monitoring', status: 'PASS', severity: 'LOW',
    details: 'Total accrued interest: ' + number_format(accruedInterest) + ' FCFA across ' + activeLoans + ' loan(s).' });

  // C19: Open Critical/High Findings
  // ★ FIX IA-012: Include ESCALATED status (matching backend fix)
  // Backend now counts OPEN+IN_PROGRESS+ESCALATED; frontend must match.
  const critFindings = bFindings.filter(f => f.severity === 'CRITICAL' && (f.status === 'OPEN' || f.status === 'IN_PROGRESS' || f.status === 'ESCALATED'));
  const highFindings = bFindings.filter(f => f.severity === 'HIGH' && (f.status === 'OPEN' || f.status === 'IN_PROGRESS' || f.status === 'ESCALATED'));
  checks.push({ id: 'C19', name: 'Open Critical/High Findings', status: (critFindings.length + highFindings.length) === 0 ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL', severity: 'CRITICAL',
    details: critFindings.length + ' CRITICAL and ' + highFindings.length + ' HIGH finding(s) remain open or in progress.' + ((critFindings.length + highFindings.length) > 0 ? ' Immediate remediation required.' : '') });

  // C20: Rejected Expenses Review
  const rejectedExpenses = bExpenses.filter(e => e.status === 'REJECTED').length;
  checks.push({ id: 'C20', name: 'Rejected Expenses Review', status: rejectedExpenses === 0 ? 'PASS' : 'WARNING', severity: 'LOW',
    details: rejectedExpenses === 0 ? 'No rejected expenses.' : rejectedExpenses + ' rejected expense record(s) found. Review for compliance.' });

  // ── Tally compliance score ──
  let passed = 0, warnings = 0, failed = 0;
  checks.forEach(c => { if (c.status === 'PASS') passed++; else if (c.status === 'WARNING') warnings++; else failed++; });
  const total = checks.length;
  const score = total > 0 ? Math.round((passed / total) * 100) : 0;
  const riskLevel = (failed >= 3 || critFindings.length > 0) ? 'CRITICAL' : (failed >= 1 ? 'HIGH' : (warnings >= 3 ? 'MEDIUM' : 'LOW'));

  // Findings summary
  const openFindings = bFindings.filter(f => f.status === 'OPEN');
  const inProgressFindings = bFindings.filter(f => f.status === 'IN_PROGRESS');
  // ★ FIX IA-002: by_severity counts only OPEN/IN_PROGRESS/ESCALATED (consistent with backend fix)
  const bySeverity = { CRITICAL: bFindings.filter(f => f.severity === 'CRITICAL' && (f.status === 'OPEN' || f.status === 'IN_PROGRESS' || f.status === 'ESCALATED')).length, HIGH: bFindings.filter(f => f.severity === 'HIGH' && (f.status === 'OPEN' || f.status === 'IN_PROGRESS' || f.status === 'ESCALATED')).length, MEDIUM: bFindings.filter(f => f.severity === 'MEDIUM' && (f.status === 'OPEN' || f.status === 'IN_PROGRESS' || f.status === 'ESCALATED')).length, LOW: bFindings.filter(f => f.severity === 'LOW' && (f.status === 'OPEN' || f.status === 'IN_PROGRESS' || f.status === 'ESCALATED')).length };
  // ★ FIX IAUD-007: by_category only counts OPEN/IN_PROGRESS/ESCALATED (matching backend)
  // Previously counted ALL findings including CLOSED/DELETED — inconsistent with by_severity
  // which only counts active findings, and with the backend which also filters by status.
  const byCategory = {};
  bFindings.filter(f => f.status === 'OPEN' || f.status === 'IN_PROGRESS' || f.status === 'ESCALATED').forEach(f => { const cat = f.category || 'OTHER'; byCategory[cat] = (byCategory[cat] || 0) + 1; });

  return {
    compliance_score: { score, total, passed, warnings, failed, risk_level: riskLevel },
    compliance_checks: checks,
    findings_summary: { total: bFindings.length, open: openFindings.length, in_progress: inProgressFindings.length, remediated: 0, closed: bFindings.filter(f => f.status === 'CLOSED').length, by_severity: bySeverity, by_category: Object.entries(byCategory).map(([name, count]) => ({ name, count })) },
    financial_health: {
      trial_balance: { is_balanced: tbBalanced, total_debits: tbDebits, total_credits: tbCredits, difference: tbDiff },
      operating_fund_balance: opNet,
      total_loan_portfolio: totalLoanPortfolio, total_loans: bLoans.length, active_loans: activeLoans,
      delinquent_loans: delinquentLoans, delinquent_amount: delinquentAmount, written_off_loans: writtenOffLoans,
      accrued_interest: accruedInterest, total_customer_deposits: totalDeposits, total_accounts: activeAccounts.length,
      total_approved_expenses: totalApprovedExpenses, pending_expenses_count: pendingExpenses.length, pending_expenses_total: pendingExpensesTotal,
      total_fee_income: totalFeeIncome, opex_ratio: opexRatio, loan_to_deposit_ratio: ldr,
      total_customers: bCustomers.length, active_branches: 1, total_transactions: bTransactions.length, active_staff: activeStaffCount
    },
    gl_integrity: glIntegrity,
    unbalanced_references: unbalancedRefs,
    gl_unbalanced_entries: unbalancedRefs
  };
}

/**
 * Simple hash of the compliance score + check count so we skip re-render when nothing changed
 */
function _auditDataHash(dash) {
  if (!dash) return '';
  const cs = dash.compliance_score || {};
  return `${cs.score}_${cs.passed}_${cs.failed}_${cs.total}_${(dash.financial_health?.trial_balance?.is_balanced ? '1' : '0')}`;
}

/**
 * Start real-time auto-refresh for the Internal Audit panel.
 * Polls /api/audit/dashboard every 15 seconds and re-renders only when data changes.
 * Also fetches findings on each poll to keep the register in sync.
 */
function startAuditAutoRefresh() {
  stopAuditAutoRefresh(); // Clear any existing interval
  STATE._auditAutoRefreshInterval = setInterval(async () => {
    // Only poll when user is actively viewing the audit panel
    if (STATE.currentView !== 'internalaudit') return;
    try {
      const [dashRes, findRes] = await Promise.all([
        API.get('audit/dashboard'),
        API.get('audit/findings', {pageSize: 500})
      ]);
    // ★ FIX: Always update findings from server and re-render register ★
    // Previous bug: findings were updated but register was never re-rendered,
    // causing the register to show stale/empty state after auto-engine created findings.
    if (findRes?.data) {
      STATE.auditFindings = findRes.data;
    } else if (Array.isArray(findRes)) {
      STATE.auditFindings = findRes;
    }
      if (dashRes?.data) {
        const newHash = _auditDataHash(dashRes.data);
        // Only re-render full dashboard if the compliance data actually changed
        if (newHash !== STATE._auditLastFetchHash) {
          STATE.auditDashboard = dashRes.data;
          STATE._auditLastFetchHash = newHash;
          STATE.auditLastRunTime = new Date();
          renderInternalAudit();
          // ★ AUTOMATED FINDINGS ENGINE: Re-run on every auto-refresh with new data ★
          const branchScope = isAllBranchesMode() ? 'All Branches' : STATE.currentBranch;
          const auditChecks = STATE.auditChecks || [];
          if (auditChecks.length > 0) {
            // ★ FIX IAUD-003: Use await instead of fire-and-forget to prevent overlapping runs
            // The lock inside autoGenerateFindings() also guards against concurrent calls.
            autoGenerateFindings(auditChecks, branchScope).catch(() => {
              STATE._auditGenRunning = false; // Release lock on error
            });
          }
        } else {
          // ★ FIX: Even if dashboard hash didn't change, always re-render the findings register ★
          // This ensures the register stays in sync after auto-engine creates/closes findings
          // on other refresh cycles or after manual status changes.
          // ★ FIX IAUD-002: Also update KPI cards to stay in sync
          renderAuditFindings();
          updateAuditKpiCards();
        }
      } else {
        // No dashboard data — still re-render findings if we got updated data
        renderAuditFindings();
        updateAuditKpiCards();
      }
    } catch (err) {
      // Silent — don't spam toast errors on periodic polls
    }
  }, 15000); // 15-second interval
}

/**
 * Stop the auto-refresh interval (called on logout or view change cleanup)
 */
function stopAuditAutoRefresh() {
  if (STATE._auditAutoRefreshInterval) {
    clearInterval(STATE._auditAutoRefreshInterval);
    STATE._auditAutoRefreshInterval = null;
  }
}

/**
 * Main entry point: loads the full audit dashboard from the database
 * Called on navigation to internalaudit view and on "Refresh Dashboard" button.
 * Also starts real-time auto-refresh polling.
 */
async function loadAuditDashboard() {
  const loading = $('auditLoading');
  if (loading) loading.style.display = 'block';

  try {
    // Fetch dashboard data (financial health, 20 compliance checks, GL integrity, etc.)
    const [dashRes, findRes] = await Promise.all([
      API.get('audit/dashboard'),
      API.get('audit/findings', {pageSize: 500})
    ]);
    if (dashRes?.data) {
      STATE.auditDashboard = dashRes.data;
      STATE._auditLastFetchHash = _auditDataHash(dashRes.data);
    }
    if (findRes?.data) {
      STATE.auditFindings = findRes.data;
    } else if (Array.isArray(findRes)) {
      // Backend returned findings as a plain array instead of {data: [...]}
      STATE.auditFindings = findRes;
    }
    STATE.auditLastRunTime = new Date();
    renderInternalAudit();
    // ★ AUTOMATED FINDINGS ENGINE: Auto-generate findings from compliance checks ★
    // Run after initial render so checks are available — await completion so register is populated
    const branchScope = isAllBranchesMode() ? 'All Branches' : STATE.currentBranch;
    const auditChecks = STATE.auditChecks || [];
    if (auditChecks.length > 0) {
      try {
        await autoGenerateFindings(auditChecks, branchScope);
      } catch(err) {
        STATE._auditGenRunning = false; // ★ FIX IAUD-003: Release lock on error
        console.warn('[AutoAudit] Background findings generation error:', err);
      }
    }
    // Start real-time auto-refresh so data stays live
    startAuditAutoRefresh();
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('[Audit] Failed to load dashboard:', err);
    showToast('error', 'Audit Load Error', 'Failed to load audit data from database.');
  } finally {
    if (loading) loading.style.display = 'none';
  }
}

/**
 * Force a fresh reload of the audit dashboard (bypasses hash check).
 * Used when user clicks the "Re-run" button.
 */
async function forceRefreshAudit() {
  STATE._auditLastFetchHash = ''; // Reset hash so next load always re-renders
  stopAuditAutoRefresh();
  await loadAuditDashboard();
}

/**
 * Master render function — renders all audit panel sections from STATE.auditDashboard
 */
function renderInternalAudit() {
  // Branch context: Admin sees individual branch or company-wide based on selection
  const bannerHtml = isAllBranchesMode()
    ? `<div style="padding:10px 16px;background:rgba(88,183,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(88,183,255,.2);border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:.84rem;color:var(--primary)">
    <span style="display:inline-flex"><i data-lucide="globe" style="width:18px;height:18px;stroke-width:1.8"></i></span>
    <div><strong>Company-Wide Audit</strong> — Internal Audit shows consolidated compliance across all branches. Select a specific branch to audit that branch individually.</div>
  </div>`
    : `<div style="padding:10px 16px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.08);border:1px solid rgba(103,232,181,.2);border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:.84rem;color:var(--accent)">
    <span style="display:inline-flex"><i data-lucide="map-pin" style="width:18px;height:18px;stroke-width:1.8"></i></span>
    <div><strong>Branch: ${STATE.currentBranch}</strong> — Full audit computed locally for this branch only: 20 compliance checks, GL integrity, financial health, unbalanced references, and findings are all branch-scoped. Switch to &quot;All Branches&quot; for the global company audit.</div>
  </div>`;

  const dash = STATE.auditDashboard;

  // ── BRANCH ISOLATION: When a specific branch is selected, compute everything locally ──
  let cs, fs, fh, checks, glInt, unbal;
  if (isAllBranchesMode()) {
    // Global mode: use server dashboard data as-is
    if (!dash) {
      $('auditKpiCards').innerHTML = bannerHtml + '<div class="empty-state"><p>No audit data loaded. Click "Refresh Dashboard" to load from database.</p></div>';
      return;
    }
    cs = dash.compliance_score || {score:0, total:0, passed:0, warnings:0, failed:0, risk_level:'LOW'};
    fs = dash.findings_summary || {total:0, open:0, in_progress:0, remediated:0, closed:0, by_severity:{}, by_category:[]};
    fh = dash.financial_health || {};
    checks = dash.compliance_checks || [];
    glInt = dash.gl_integrity || [];
    unbal = dash.unbalanced_references || [];
  } else {
    // Branch mode: compute everything from local branch-filtered data
    const branchData = computeBranchAuditData();
    cs = branchData.compliance_score;
    fs = branchData.findings_summary;
    fh = branchData.financial_health;
    checks = branchData.compliance_checks;
    glInt = branchData.gl_integrity;
    unbal = branchData.unbalanced_references;
  }
  STATE.auditChecks = checks;

  // Show live indicator
  const liveInd = $('auditLiveIndicator');
  if (liveInd) liveInd.style.display = 'inline-block';

  // ★ FIX IAUD-001: Always derive KPI card counts from STATE.auditFindings (same source as register)
  // Previously, "All Branches" mode used fs.by_severity from the backend dashboard, while
  // branch mode used local findings. This caused KPI cards to diverge from the register
  // after autoGenerateFindings() created/closed findings — the dashboard by_severity became
  // stale while STATE.auditFindings was kept fresh via re-fetch. Now both modes use the
  // same data source, ensuring KPI cards and register ALWAYS show consistent numbers.
  // This also fixes the bug where "All Branches" showed 14 critical findings while the
  // register (and branch mode) showed only 1 — the 13 others had been auto-closed by the
  // findings engine but the KPI cards still used the pre-close dashboard data.
  const kpiFindings = filterByUserBranch(STATE.auditFindings || []);
  const branchCritOpen = kpiFindings.filter(f => f.severity === 'CRITICAL' && (f.status === 'OPEN' || f.status === 'IN_PROGRESS' || f.status === 'ESCALATED')).length;
  const branchHighOpen = kpiFindings.filter(f => f.severity === 'HIGH' && (f.status === 'OPEN' || f.status === 'IN_PROGRESS' || f.status === 'ESCALATED')).length;
  const branchOpen = kpiFindings.filter(f => f.status === 'OPEN').length;
  const branchInProgress = kpiFindings.filter(f => f.status === 'IN_PROGRESS').length;

  // ★ FIX IAUD-005: Recompute risk level from local findings for consistency
  // Previously used cs.risk_level from backend (stale after auto-gen closes findings).
  // Now uses the same local data as KPI cards — consistent with what the user sees.
  const riskLevel = cs.failed >= 3 || branchCritOpen > 0 ? 'CRITICAL'
    : (cs.failed >= 1 ? 'HIGH' : (cs.warnings >= 3 ? 'MEDIUM' : 'LOW'));

  $('auditFindingBadge').textContent = branchOpen;
  $('auditFindingBadge').style.display = branchOpen > 0 ? 'inline' : 'none';

  // ── KPI CARDS ──
  // ★ FIX IAUD-002: Added IDs to KPI card values for lightweight updates after auto-gen
  $('auditKpiCards').innerHTML = bannerHtml + `
    <div class="kpi-card" style="text-align:center"><span class="kpi-label">Compliance Score</span><div class="kpi-value" style="color:${cs.score>=80?'var(--success)':cs.score>=60?'var(--warn)':'var(--danger)'};font-size:2rem">${cs.score}%</div><div class="kpi-sub">${cs.passed}/${cs.total} checks passed</div></div>
    <div class="kpi-card"><span class="kpi-label">Critical Findings</span><div class="kpi-value" id="auditKpiCritical" style="color:var(--danger)">${branchCritOpen}</div><div class="kpi-sub">Requires immediate action</div></div>
    <div class="kpi-card"><span class="kpi-label">Open Items</span><div class="kpi-value" id="auditKpiOpen" style="color:var(--warn)">${branchOpen}</div><div class="kpi-sub" id="auditKpiInProgress">${branchInProgress} in progress</div></div>
    <div class="kpi-card" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-items:center"><span class="kpi-label" style="margin-bottom:8px">Overall Risk Level</span><span class="risk-indicator ri-${riskLevel.toLowerCase()}" id="auditKpiRisk">● ${riskLevel}</span></div>`;

  // ── COMPLIANCE SCORE RING ──
  const circumference = 2 * Math.PI * 56;
  const offset = circumference - (cs.score / 100) * circumference;
  const scoreColor = cs.score >= 80 ? 'var(--success)' : cs.score >= 60 ? 'var(--warn)' : 'var(--danger)';
  $('auditScoreDisplay').innerHTML = `
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;justify-content:center;padding:10px">
      <div class="audit-score-ring"><svg viewBox="0 0 120 120"><circle class="ring-bg" cx="60" cy="60" r="56"/><circle class="ring-fill" cx="60" cy="60" r="56" stroke="${scoreColor}" stroke-dasharray="${circumference}" stroke-dashoffset="${offset}"/></svg><div class="score-text" style="color:${scoreColor}">${cs.score}%</div><div class="score-label">Compliance</div></div>
      <div style="text-align:left;font-size:.82rem">
        <div style="margin-bottom:6px">${IC('check-circle', 14)} <span style="color:var(--success);font-weight:700">${cs.passed}</span> <span style="color:var(--muted)">Passed</span></div>
        <div style="margin-bottom:6px">${IC('alert-triangle', 14)} <span style="color:var(--warn);font-weight:700">${cs.warnings}</span> <span style="color:var(--muted)">Warnings</span></div>
        <div>${IC('x-circle', 14)} <span style="color:var(--danger);font-weight:700">${cs.failed}</span> <span style="color:var(--muted)">Failed</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  $('auditLastRun').innerHTML = STATE._auditAutoRefreshInterval
    ? '<span style="color:var(--success);font-weight:600">● LIVE</span> — auto-refreshing every 15s'
    : (STATE.auditLastRunTime ? dateFmt(STATE.auditLastRunTime.toISOString()) : 'Never');

  // ── FINANCIAL HEALTH METRICS ──
  let auditLoanPortfolio = fh.total_loan_portfolio || 0;
  // ★ FIX (RA-LOAN-002): Use active_loans (ACTIVE+DELINQUENT+OVERDUE) instead of total_loans
  // (ALL statuses). The loan portfolio amount only sums ACTIVE+DELINQUENT+OVERDUE outstanding,
  // so displaying "X loans" with the total_loans count was misleading (implied all X loans
  // contributed to the portfolio amount). Now the count matches the amount's scope.
  let auditLoanCount = fh.active_loans || fh.total_loans || 0;
  let auditDeposits = fh.total_customer_deposits || 0;
  // ★ FIX IA-012: Backend renamed total_accounts → total_active_accounts for clarity
  let auditAccountCount = fh.total_active_accounts || fh.total_accounts || 0;
  let auditApprovedExpenses = fh.total_approved_expenses || 0;
  let auditPendingExpenses = fh.pending_expenses_total || 0;
  let auditOPEX = fh.opex_ratio || 0;
  let auditLDR = fh.loan_to_deposit_ratio || 0;
  let auditOpFund = fh.operating_fund_balance || 0;
  // When in branch mode, these are already computed by computeBranchAuditData()
  // so no additional override needed.

  const tb = fh.trial_balance || {};
  const tbBalanced = tb.is_balanced;
  $('auditFinancialHealth').innerHTML = `
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1px;background:var(--line);border-top:1px solid var(--line)">
      <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:12px 14px"><div style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:2px">Trial Balance</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;color:${tbBalanced?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${tbBalanced ? IC('check-circle',14)+' BALANCED' : IC('x-circle',14)+' NOT BALANCED'}</div>${!tbBalanced?`<div style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--danger)">Diff: ${number_format(tb.difference||0)} FCFA</div>`:''}</div>
      <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:12px 14px"><div style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:2px">Operating Fund Balance</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem">${number_format(auditOpFund)} FCFA</div>${!isAllBranchesMode()?`<div style="font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted)">Branch net flow</div>`:''}</div>
      <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:12px 14px"><div style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:2px">Total Loan Portfolio</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem">${number_format(auditLoanPortfolio)} FCFA</div><div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">${auditLoanCount} active loans</div></div>
      <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:12px 14px"><div style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:2px">Customer Deposits</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem">${number_format(auditDeposits)} FCFA</div><div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">${auditAccountCount} accounts</div></div>
      <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:12px 14px"><div style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:2px">Approved Expenses</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem">${number_format(auditApprovedExpenses)} FCFA</div>${auditPendingExpenses>0?`<div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--warn)">Pending: ${number_format(auditPendingExpenses)} FCFA</div>`:''}</div>
      <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:12px 14px"><div style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:2px">OPEX / LDR Ratios</div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem">OPEX: ${auditOPEX.toFixed(1)}% <span style="margin-left:8px">LDR: ${auditLDR.toFixed(1)}%</span></div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:10px 14px;border-top:1px solid var(--line);font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted)">
      <strong>Trial Balance:</strong> DR ${number_format(tb.total_debits||0)} / CR ${number_format(tb.total_credits||0)} FCFA${!isAllBranchesMode()?` · <strong>Branch:</strong> ${STATE.currentBranch}`:''}
    </div>`;

  // ── AUTOMATED COMPLIANCE CHECKS ──
  $('auditChecksList').innerHTML = checks.map(c => `
    <div class="audit-check-item"><div class="ac-icon ${c.status==='PASS'?'check-pass':c.status==='WARNING'?'check-waived':'check-fail'}">${c.status==='PASS'?IC('check', 14):c.status==='WARNING'?IC('alert-triangle', 14):IC('x', 14)}</div>
    <div style="flex:1"><div style="font-weight:600">${c.name}</div><div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px">${c.details}</div></div>
    <span class="pill ${c.status==='PASS'?'pill-approved':c.status==='WARNING'?'pill-warning':'pill-rejected'}" style="font-size:.7rem">${c.status}</span></div>`).join('');

  // ── GL INTEGRITY ANALYSIS ──
  renderGLIntegrity(glInt);

  // ── UNBALANCED REFERENCES DIAGNOSTIC ──
  if (unbal.length > 0) {
    $('auditUnbalancedCard').style.display = 'block';
    $('auditUnbalancedBody').innerHTML = unbal.map(u => `<tr>
      <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.8rem">${u.reference}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.8rem">${u.first_date}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.8rem">${u.accounts}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted)">${u.tx_types||'—'}</td>
      <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.8rem;color:var(--success)">${number_format(u.ref_debits)}</td>
      <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.8rem;color:var(--danger)">${number_format(u.ref_credits)}</td>
      <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--danger)">${number_format(u.diff)}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.8rem;text-align:center">${u.entry_count}</td>
    </tr>`).join('');
  } else {
    $('auditUnbalancedCard').style.display = 'none';
  }

  // ── OPERATING FUND vs GL RECONCILIATION CARD ──
  const reconCheck = checks.find(c => c.name === 'Operating Fund vs GL Reconciliation');
  if (reconCheck && reconCheck.status === 'FAIL') {
    $('auditReconCard').style.display = 'block';
    $('auditReconDetails').innerHTML = `
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:1px;background:var(--line);border-top:1px solid var(--line)">
        <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:14px;text-align:center"><div style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px">Operating Fund Balance</div><div style="font-weight:800;font-size:1.1rem">${number_format(reconCheck.operating_balance||0)} FCFA</div></div>
        <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:14px;text-align:center"><div style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px">GL 1400 Net Balance</div><div style="font-weight:800;font-size:1.1rem">${number_format(reconCheck.gl1400_net||0)} FCFA</div></div>
        <div style="background:var(--panel);padding:14px;text-align:center"><div style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px">Discrepancy</div><div style="font-weight:800;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--danger)">${number_format(reconCheck.recon_diff||0)} FCFA</div></div>
      </div>`;
  } else {
    $('auditReconCard').style.display = 'none';
  }

  // ── PER-BRANCH TRIAL BALANCE BREAKDOWN (global mode only, when imbalanced) ──
  renderBranchTBBreakdown(tb, tbBalanced);

  // ── FINDINGS REGISTER ──
  renderAuditFindings();
  refreshIcons();
}

/**
 * ★ FIX IAUD-002: Lightweight KPI card update after auto-generation.
 * Re-computes Critical/High/Open/InProgress counts from STATE.auditFindings
 * and updates the KPI card DOM elements without re-rendering the entire dashboard.
 * Called after autoGenerateFindings() to keep KPI cards in sync with the register.
 */
function updateAuditKpiCards() {
  const kpiFindings = filterByUserBranch(STATE.auditFindings || []);
  const critCount = kpiFindings.filter(f => f.severity === 'CRITICAL' && (f.status === 'OPEN' || f.status === 'IN_PROGRESS' || f.status === 'ESCALATED')).length;
  const openCount = kpiFindings.filter(f => f.status === 'OPEN').length;
  const ipCount = kpiFindings.filter(f => f.status === 'IN_PROGRESS').length;

  // Update nav badge
  const badge = $('auditFindingBadge');
  if (badge) { badge.textContent = openCount; badge.style.display = openCount > 0 ? 'inline' : 'none'; }

  // Update KPI card values via IDs (added in renderInternalAudit)
  const critEl = $('auditKpiCritical');
  if (critEl) critEl.textContent = critCount;
  const openEl = $('auditKpiOpen');
  if (openEl) openEl.textContent = openCount;
  const ipEl = $('auditKpiInProgress');
  if (ipEl) ipEl.textContent = ipCount + ' in progress';

  // ★ FIX IAUD-005: Also update risk level indicator
  const cs = STATE.auditDashboard?.compliance_score || {};
  const riskLevel = cs.failed >= 3 || critCount > 0 ? 'CRITICAL'
    : (cs.failed >= 1 ? 'HIGH' : (cs.warnings >= 3 ? 'MEDIUM' : 'LOW'));
  const riskEl = $('auditKpiRisk');
  if (riskEl) {
    riskEl.className = 'risk-indicator ri-' + riskLevel.toLowerCase();
    riskEl.textContent = '● ' + riskLevel;
  }
}

/**
 * Render the GL Integrity Analysis table from dashboard data
 */
function renderGLIntegrity(accounts) {
  if (!accounts.length) {
    $('auditGLIntegrity').innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state"><p>No GL account data available.</p></div>';
    return;
  }
  const typeColors = {ASSET:'#3b82f6',LIABILITY:'#8b5cf6',EQUITY:'#06b6d4',INCOME:'#22c55e',EXPENSE:'#f59e0b'};
  $('auditGLIntegrity').innerHTML = `
    <div class="table-container"><table style="font-size:.78rem"><thead><tr><th>Code</th><th>Account Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Total DR</th><th>Total CR</th><th>Net Balance</th><th>Entries</th></tr></thead><tbody>
    ${accounts.map(a => {
      const isNeg = a.net_balance < -0.01;
      return `<tr style="${isNeg?'background:rgba(239,68,68,.08)':''}">
        <td class="td-mono" style="font-weight:600">${a.account_code}</td>
        <td>${a.account_name || '—'}</td>
        <td><span style="color:${typeColors[a.account_type]||'var(--muted)'};font-weight:600;font-size:.7rem">${a.account_type||'—'}</span></td>
        <td class="td-mono">${number_format(a.total_debit)}</td>
        <td class="td-mono">${number_format(a.total_credit)}</td>
        <td class="td-mono" style="font-weight:700;color:${isNeg?'var(--danger)':'var(--text)'}">${number_format(a.net_balance)} ${isNeg ? IC('alert-triangle', 14) : ''}</td>
        <td style="text-align:center">${a.entry_count}</td>
      </tr>`;
    }).join('')}
    </tbody></table></div>`;
}

/**
 * Render per-branch trial balance breakdown.
 * Only shows in global mode when the global TB is NOT balanced.
 * Computes each branch's DR/CR from local data and identifies "orphan" entries
 * that belong to no branch — these are the entries causing the global imbalance.
 */
function renderBranchTBBreakdown(globalTB, isBalanced) {
  const card = $('auditBranchTBBreakdown');
  if (!card) return;

  // Hide in branch mode — already computed by computeBranchAuditData
  if (!isAllBranchesMode()) {
    card.style.display = 'none';
    return;
  }

  // Also hide if global TB is balanced
  if (isBalanced) {
    card.style.display = 'none';
    return;
  }

  const allGl = DB.generalLedger || [];
  const allBranches = (DB.branches || []).filter(b => b.status === 'ACTIVE');
  const branchNames = allBranches.map(b => b.name);

  // Compute per-branch DR/CR
  const branchData = {};
  branchNames.forEach(name => { branchData[name] = { dr: 0, cr: 0, entries: 0 }; });
  let orphanDR = 0, orphanCR = 0, orphanEntries = 0;

  allGl.forEach(e => {
    const dr = Number(e.debit || 0);
    const cr = Number(e.credit || 0);
    const entryBranch = e.branch || '';
    if (entryBranch && branchData[entryBranch]) {
      branchData[entryBranch].dr += dr;
      branchData[entryBranch].cr += cr;
      branchData[entryBranch].entries++;
    } else {
      orphanDR += dr;
      orphanCR += cr;
      orphanEntries++;
    }
  });

  // Compute per-branch diff
  const rows = branchNames.map(name => {
    const b = branchData[name];
    const diff = Math.abs(b.dr - b.cr);
    const balanced = diff < 0.01;
    return { name, dr: b.dr, cr: b.cr, entries: b.entries, diff, balanced };
  });

  // Sort: imbalanced branches first (by diff desc), then balanced
  rows.sort((a, b) => {
    if (a.balanced !== b.balanced) return a.balanced ? 1 : -1;
    return b.diff - a.diff;
  });

  // Orphan row
  const orphanDiff = Math.abs(orphanDR - orphanCR);
  const hasOrphans = orphanEntries > 0;

  // Summary totals
  const totalBranchDR = rows.reduce((s, r) => s + r.dr, 0);
  const totalBranchCR = rows.reduce((s, r) => s + r.cr, 0);
  const grandDR = totalBranchDR + orphanDR;
  const grandCR = totalBranchCR + orphanCR;
  const grandDiff = Math.abs(grandDR - grandCR);

  card.style.display = 'block';

  $('auditBranchTBBreakdownBody').innerHTML = `
    <div style="padding:10px 14px;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)">
      <strong>Global Imbalance:</strong> ${number_format(globalTB.difference || 0)} FCFA
      · Total DR: ${number_format(globalTB.total_debits || 0)} / Total CR: ${number_format(globalTB.total_credits || 0)} FCFA
      · Computed locally: ${number_format(grandDR)} DR / ${number_format(grandCR)} CR = ${number_format(grandDiff)} FCFA diff
    </div>
    <div class="table-container" style="margin-top:8px"><table style="font-size:.8rem">
      <thead><tr>
        <th>Branch</th><th style="text-align:right">Total DR</th><th style="text-align:right">Total CR</th>
        <th style="text-align:right">Difference</th><th style="text-align:center">Entries</th><th style="text-align:center">Status</th>
      </tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        ${rows.map(r => `<tr style="${!r.balanced ? 'background:rgba(239,68,68,.08)' : ''}">
          <td style="font-weight:600">${r.name}</td>
          <td class="td-mono" style="text-align:right;color:var(--success)">${number_format(r.dr)}</td>
          <td class="td-mono" style="text-align:right;color:var(--danger)">${number_format(r.cr)}</td>
          <td class="td-mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:700;color:${r.balanced ? 'var(--muted)' : 'var(--danger)'}">${number_format(r.diff)}</td>
          <td style="text-align:center">${r.entries}</td>
          <td style="text-align:center">${r.balanced
            ? '<span style="color:var(--success);font-weight:700">'+IC('check',14)+' Balanced</span>'
            : '<span style="color:var(--danger);font-weight:700">'+IC('x',14)+' Imbalanced</span>'}</td>
        </tr>`).join('')}
        ${hasOrphans ? `<tr style="background:rgba(255,107,134,.12);font-weight:700">
          <td style="color:var(--danger">${IC('alert-triangle', 16)} Unassigned / No Branch</td>
          <td class="td-mono" style="text-align:right;color:var(--success)">${number_format(orphanDR)}</td>
          <td class="td-mono" style="text-align:right;color:var(--danger)">${number_format(orphanCR)}</td>
          <td class="td-mono" style="text-align:right;color:${orphanDiff > 0.01 ? 'var(--danger)' : 'var(--muted)'}">${number_format(orphanDiff)}</td>
          <td style="text-align:center">${orphanEntries}</td>
          <td style="text-align:center">${orphanDiff > 0.01
            ? '<span style="color:var(--danger);font-weight:700">'+IC('x-circle', 16)+' CAUSES IMBALANCE</span>'
            : '<span style="color:var(--success)">'+IC('check',14)+' OK</span>'}</td>
        </tr>` : ''}
        <tr style="border-top:2px solid var(--line);font-weight:800;font-size:.84rem">
          <td>Grand Total (All Branches${hasOrphans ? ' + Unassigned' : ''})</td>
          <td class="td-mono" style="text-align:right;color:var(--success)">${number_format(grandDR)}</td>
          <td class="td-mono" style="text-align:right;color:var(--danger)">${number_format(grandCR)}</td>
          <td class="td-mono" style="text-align:right;color:${grandDiff > 0.01 ? 'var(--danger)' : 'var(--success)'}">${number_format(grandDiff)}</td>
          <td style="text-align:center">${allGl.length}</td>
          <td style="text-align:center">${grandDiff > 0.01
            ? '<span style="color:var(--danger);font-weight:800">'+IC('x',14)+' NOT BALANCED</span>'
            : '<span style="color:var(--success);font-weight:800">'+IC('check',14)+' BALANCED</span>'}</td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table></div>
    ${hasOrphans ? `
    <div style="padding:10px 14px;margin-top:8px;background:rgba(255,107,134,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,107,134,.2);border-radius:8px;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)">
      <strong style="color:var(--danger)">Why this happens:</strong>
      ${orphanEntries} GL entry(ies) have no branch assigned (empty or unrecognized branch field).
      These entries appear in the global trial balance but are invisible when you filter by any individual branch.
      <strong>Action needed:</strong> Assign the correct branch to these entries, or post a correcting journal entry to offset the ${number_format(orphanDiff)} FCFA difference.
      <br><br>
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="showOrphanGLEntries()">View Unassigned Entries</button>
    </div>` : `
    <div style="padding:10px 14px;margin-top:8px;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)">
      All GL entries are assigned to branches. The global imbalance may be caused by entries with a branch name that doesn't match any active branch. Check for typos or renamed branches.
    </div>`}`;
}

/**
 * Show orphan GL entries (entries without a valid branch) in a drawer
 */
function showOrphanGLEntries() {
  const allGl = DB.generalLedger || [];
  const branchNames = new Set((DB.branches || []).filter(b => b.status === 'ACTIVE').map(b => b.name));

  const orphans = allGl.filter(e => {
    const b = e.branch || '';
    return !b || !branchNames.has(b);
  }).slice(0, 50); // Limit to 50 for display

  if (orphans.length === 0) {
    showToast('info', 'No Orphan Entries', 'All GL entries have valid branch assignments.');
    return;
  }

  openDrawer('Unassigned GL Entries (' + orphans.length + ')', `
    <div style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:12px">
      These GL entries have no branch assigned or their branch doesn't match any active branch.
      They contribute to the global trial balance imbalance but are invisible in individual branch views.
    </div>
    <div class="table-container"><table style="font-size:.76rem">
      <thead><tr><th>Reference</th><th>Date</th><th>Account</th><th style="text-align:right">Debit</th><th style="text-align:right">Credit</th><th>Branch</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        ${orphans.map(e => `<tr>
          <td class="td-mono">${e.reference || '—'}</td>
          <td>${e.date || ''}</td>
          <td><span class="td-mono">${e.accountCode || ''}</span> ${e.accountName || ''}</td>
          <td class="td-mono" style="text-align:right;color:var(--success)">${number_format(Number(e.debit || 0))}</td>
          <td class="td-mono" style="text-align:right;color:var(--danger)">${number_format(Number(e.credit || 0))}</td>
          <td style="color:var(--danger);font-weight:600">${e.branch || '<em>empty</em>'}</td>
          <td>${e.transactionType || ''}</td>
        </tr>`).join('')}
      </tbody>
    </table></div>
    <div style="margin-top:12px;padding:10px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.08);border-radius:8px;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)">
      <strong>Resolution:</strong> Post correcting journal entries with the proper branch assigned to eliminate the imbalance, or update the branch field on these entries via a database correction.
    </div>
  `);
}

/**
 * Render findings table from STATE.auditFindings (loaded from database)
 */
function renderAuditFindings() {
  const q = norm($('afSearch')?.value || '');
  // Branch isolation: filter findings by current branch selection
  const branchBase = filterByUserBranch(STATE.auditFindings || []);
  const fSeverity = $('afFilterSeverity')?.value || '';
  const fStatus = $('afFilterStatus')?.value || '';
  const fCategory = $('afFilterCategory')?.value || '';
  const fSource = $('afFilterSource')?.value || '';

  const filtered = branchBase.filter(f => {
    const isAuto = f.description && f.description.includes('[AUTO-');
    return (!q || [f.description,f.category,f.assignee,f.branch,f.severity].some(v => norm(v).includes(q))) &&
      (!fSeverity || f.severity === fSeverity) &&
      (!fStatus || f.status === fStatus) &&
      (!fCategory || f.category === fCategory) &&
      (!fSource || (fSource === 'auto' ? isAuto : !isAuto));
  });

  // Debug: log filter state to help diagnose empty register issues
  console.log(`[AuditFindings] Rendering: ${STATE.auditFindings?.length || 0} total, ${branchBase.length} after branch filter, ${filtered.length} after all filters. Branch: ${STATE.currentBranch}, Severity: ${fSeverity}, Status: ${fStatus}, Source: ${fSource}`);

  const {items, total} = paginate([...filtered].sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0)), STATE.auditPage, STATE.auditPageSize);
  const sevPills = {CRITICAL:'ri-critical', HIGH:'ri-high', MEDIUM:'ri-medium', LOW:'ri-low'};
