    if (indicator) indicator.textContent = '— Offline / No server data';
    const plKpis = $('plKpis');
    if (plKpis) plKpis.innerHTML = '<div class="kpi-card" style="grid-column:1/-1;padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--muted)"><p style="font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:8px">Unable to load P&L data from server</p><p style="font-size:.82rem">Check your network connection and try again.</p><button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="refreshPLFromServer()" style="margin-top:12px">Retry</button></div>';
    return;
  }

  if (indicator) indicator.textContent = '— Database driven ' + IC('database', 14) + ' Connected';

  const s = summary.summary;
  const totalRevenue = s.total_income;
  const totalExpenses = s.total_expenses;
  const netProfit = s.net_profit;
  const marginPct = s.margin_pct;

  // ── KPI Cards ──
  $('plKpis').innerHTML = bannerHtml + [
    {label:'Net Profit',value:money(netProfit),sub:`Margin: ${marginPct}% \u00b7 Revenue ${money(totalRevenue)}`,color:netProfit>=0?'var(--accent)':'var(--danger)',icon:'coins'},
    {label:'Total Revenue',value:money(totalRevenue),sub:`${s.income_entries} income entries`,color:'var(--accent)',icon:'trending-up'},
    {label:'Total Expenses',value:money(totalExpenses),sub:`${s.expense_entries} approved expenses`,color:'var(--danger)',icon:'trending-down'},
    {label:'Operating Fund',value:money(s.operating_fund),sub:'BANK-OP-0001',color:'var(--primary)',icon:'building-2'}
  ].map(k=>`<div class="kpi-card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:start"><span class="kpi-label">${k.label}</span>${IC(k.icon, 22)}</div><div class="kpi-value" style="color:${k.color}">${k.value}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${k.sub}</div></div>`).join('');

  // ── Revenue Breakdown Cards ──
  const incCats = summary.income_by_category || [];
  const incCards = incCats.map(c => ({
    label: (c.gl_account_name || c.category || '').replace(/_/g,' '),
    amount: parseFloat(c.total),
    count: parseInt(c.count || 0),
    avg: parseFloat(c.avg_amount || 0),
    icon: c.category==='WITHDRAWAL_FEE'?'\ud83d\udcb3':c.category==='LOAN_INTEREST'?'\ud83c\udfe6':c.category==='LATE_PENALTY'?'\u26a1':'\ud83d\udcb0'
  }));
  const topIncCards = incCards.slice(0, 2);
  // Add net income and expense cards
  $('plBreakdown').innerHTML = [
    {label:'Net Income',amount:netProfit,color:netProfit>=0?'var(--accent)':'var(--danger)',icon:'coins'},
    {label:'Total Expenses',amount:totalExpenses,color:'var(--danger)',icon:'trending-down'}
  ].map(c=>`<div class="card" style="padding:14px"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center"><h4 style="font-size:.88rem;color:var(--text2)">${c.label}</h4>${IC(c.icon, 22)}</div><div style="font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:800;color:${c.color};margin-top:8px">${money(c.amount)}</div></div>`).join('') +
  topIncCards.map(c=>`<div class="card" style="padding:14px"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px"><h4 style="font-size:.88rem;color:var(--text2)">${c.label}</h4>${IC(c.icon, 20)}</div><div style="font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:6px">${money(c.amount)}</div><div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px"><div style="padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.06);font-size:.76rem"><div style="color:var(--muted)">Transactions</div><div style="font-weight:700">${c.count}</div></div><div style="padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.06);font-size:.76rem"><div style="color:var(--muted)">Avg/Txn</div><div style="font-weight:700">${money(c.avg)}</div></div></div></div>`).join('');

  // ── Period Comparison Panel ──
  const compBody = $('plComparisonBody');
  const compLabel = $('plComparisonLabel');
  if (compBody && summary.comparison) {
    const comp = summary.comparison;
    const prev = comp.previous_period;
    const chg = comp.change;
    compLabel.textContent = `${prev.date_from} to ${prev.date_to} (previous)`;
    const chgIcon = (v) => v > 0 ? `<span style="color:var(--success);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:2px">${IC('trending-up',14)} +${v}%</span>` : v < 0 ? `<span style="color:var(--danger);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:2px">${IC('trending-down',14)} ${v}%</span>` : `<span style="color:var(--muted)">0%</span>`;
    compBody.innerHTML = `<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:16px;padding:12px">
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:12px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.06)">
        <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)">Total Income</div>
        <div style="font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent)">${money(totalRevenue)}</div>
        <div style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)">Prev: ${money(prev.total_income)}</div>
        <div style="font-size:.82rem;margin-top:4px">${chgIcon(chg.income)}</div>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:12px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(255,71,87,.06)">
        <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)">Total Expenses</div>
        <div style="font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--danger)">${money(totalExpenses)}</div>
        <div style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)">Prev: ${money(prev.total_expenses)}</div>
        <div style="font-size:.82rem;margin-top:4px">${chgIcon(chg.expenses)}</div>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:12px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(${netProfit>=0?'103,232,181':'255,71,87'},.06)">
        <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)">Net Profit</div>
        <div style="font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:800;color:${netProfit>=0?'var(--accent)':'var(--danger)'}">${money(netProfit)}</div>
        <div style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)">Prev: ${money(prev.net_profit)}</div>
        <div style="font-size:.82rem;margin-top:4px">${chgIcon(chg.net_profit)}</div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  } else if (compBody) {
    const df = $('plDateFrom')?.value;
    const dt = $('plDateTo')?.value;
    if (df && dt) {
      compLabel.textContent = 'No previous period data available';
      compBody.innerHTML = '<p style="padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:.86rem">No data found for the previous equivalent period.</p>';
    } else {
      compLabel.textContent = 'Select a date range to see comparison';
      compBody.innerHTML = '<p style="padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:.86rem">Select a date range to compare against the previous equivalent period.</p>';
    }
  }

  // ── Income Breakdown by Category Table ──
  const incCatTable = $('plIncomeCatTable');
  if (incCatTable) {
    const incRows = (summary.income_by_category || []).map(c => {
      const pct = totalRevenue > 0 ? ((parseFloat(c.total) / totalRevenue) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0.0';
      return `<tr>
        <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600">${c.gl_code || ''}</td>
        <td style="font-size:.86rem">${c.gl_account_name || c.category || ''}</td>
        <td><span class="pill pill-approved" style="font-size:.72rem">${(c.category || '').replace(/_/g,' ')}</span></td>
        <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--success)">${money(parseFloat(c.total || 0))}</td>
        <td style="font-size:.82rem">${parseInt(c.count || 0)}</td>
        <td style="font-size:.82rem">${money(parseFloat(c.avg_amount || 0))}</td>
        <td style="font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600">${pct}%</td>
        <td style="width:120px"><div style="background:var(--border);border-radius:4px;height:8px;overflow:hidden"><div style="background:var(--accent);height:100%;border-radius:4px;width:${pct}%"></div></div></td>
      </tr>`;
    }).join('');
    incCatTable.innerHTML = `<div class="table-container"><table><thead><tr><th>GL Code</th><th>Account Name</th><th>Category</th><th>Total (FCFA)</th><th>Entries</th><th>Avg/Txn</th><th>% of Revenue</th><th>Distribution</th></tr></thead><tbody>${incRows || '<tr><td colspan="8" class="empty-state"><p>No income data for the selected period</p></td></tr>'}</tbody></table></div>`;
  }

  // ── Expense Breakdown by Category Table ──
  const expCatTable = $('plExpenseCatTable');
  if (expCatTable) {
    const expRows = (summary.expenses_by_category || []).map(c => {
      const pct = totalExpenses > 0 ? ((parseFloat(c.total) / totalExpenses) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0.0';
      return `<tr>
        <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600">${c.gl_code || ''}</td>
        <td style="font-size:.86rem">${c.gl_account_name || c.category || ''}</td>
        <td><span class="pill pill-rejected" style="font-size:.72rem">${(c.category || '').replace(/_/g,' ')}</span></td>
        <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--danger)">${money(parseFloat(c.total || 0))}</td>
        <td style="font-size:.82rem">${parseInt(c.count || 0)}</td>
        <td style="font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600">${pct}%</td>
        <td style="width:120px"><div style="background:var(--border);border-radius:4px;height:8px;overflow:hidden"><div style="background:var(--danger);height:100%;border-radius:4px;width:${pct}%"></div></div></td>
      </tr>`;
    }).join('');
    expCatTable.innerHTML = `<div class="table-container"><table><thead><tr><th>GL Code</th><th>Account Name</th><th>Category</th><th>Total (FCFA)</th><th>Entries</th><th>% of Expenses</th><th>Distribution</th></tr></thead><tbody>${expRows || '<tr><td colspan="7" class="empty-state"><p>No expense data for the selected period</p></td></tr>'}</tbody></table></div>`;
  }

  // ── Profit Ledger Detail (paginated from server) ──
  if (entries) {
    const mappedItems = entries.items.map(e => ({
      id: e.id, sourceRef: e.source_ref||'', date: (e.created_at||e.timestamp||'').slice(0,10),
      glAccount: e.gl_code||'', glAccountName: e.gl_account_name||'', category: e.category||'',
      accountNumber: e.account_number||'', customerName: e.customer_name||'', branch: e.branch||'',
      grossAmount: parseFloat(e.gross_amount||0), feeAmount: parseFloat(e.fee_amount||0),
      feePct: parseFloat(e.fee_pct||0), operator: e.operator||''
    }));
    $('plDetailBody').innerHTML = mappedItems.map(e=>`<tr>
      <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.78rem">${e.sourceRef}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${e.date}</td>
      <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.78rem">${e.glAccount}</td>
      <td><span class="pill ${e.category==='WITHDRAWAL_FEE'?'pill-salary':e.category==='LOAN_INTEREST'?'pill-current':e.category==='LATE_PENALTY'?'pill-delinquency':'pill-pending'}" style="font-size:.72rem">${e.category.replace(/_/g,' ')}</span></td>
      <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.78rem">${e.accountNumber}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.84rem">${e.customerName}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${e.branch}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.84rem">${money(e.grossAmount)}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--success)">${money(e.feeAmount)}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.82rem">${e.feePct}%</td>
      <td style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${e.operator||'System'}</td>
      <td class="td-actions"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="openProfitDetail(${e.id})">View</button></td>
    </tr>`).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="11" class="empty-state"><p>No profit entries match your filters</p></td></tr>';
    renderPagination('plDetailPagination', entries.page, entries.total, 'goPLPage', entries.page_size);
    STATE.plPage = entries.page;
  }

  // ── Daily Summary Table (from trend data) ──
  if (trend && trend.trend) {
    const dailyEntries = trend.trend.slice(-30).reverse();
    $('plDailyBody').innerHTML = dailyEntries.map(d=>`<tr>
      <td style="font-size:.86rem;font-weight:600">${d.period}</td>
      <td style="font-weight:700;color:var(--success)">${money(d.income)}</td>
      <td>${money(d.fee_income)}</td>
      <td>${money(d.interest_income)}</td>
      <td style="color:var(--danger)">${money(d.penalty_income)}</td>
      <td>${d.income_entries}</td>
      <td>${d.income>0?((d.net/(d.income))*100).toFixed(1):'0'}%</td>
    </tr>`).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="7" class="empty-state"><p>No trend data for the selected period</p></td></tr>';
  }

  // ── Trial Balance (from local chartOfAccounts cache — static reference data) ──
  const glBalances = getGLBalances(null);
  $('plTrialBody').innerHTML = DB.chartOfAccounts.map(a=>`<tr>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600">${a.code}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.86rem">${a.name}</td>
    <td><span class="pill ${a.type==='ASSET'?'pill-current':a.type==='LIABILITY'?'pill-delinquency':a.type==='INCOME'?'pill-approved':a.type==='EXPENSE'?'pill-rejected':'pill-salary'}" style="font-size:.72rem">${a.type}</span></td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${a.category}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;color:${(glBalances[a.code]||0)>=0?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${money(glBalances[a.code]||0)}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem">${a.isActive?'<span style="color:var(--success)">Active</span>':'<span style="color:var(--muted)">Inactive</span>'}</td>
  </tr>`).join('');

  // ── Financial Ratios ──
  const ratiosBody = $('plRatiosBody');
  if (ratiosBody && summary.ratios) {
    const r = summary.ratios;
    ratiosBody.innerHTML = `<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:12px;padding:12px">
      <div style="padding:12px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(103,232,181,.06);border-left:3px solid var(--accent)">
        <div style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted)">Loan-to-Deposit Ratio</div>
        <div style="font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:800">${r.loan_to_deposit || 0}%</div>
        <div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">Loans: ${money(r.total_loans||0)} / Deposits: ${money(r.total_deposits||0)}</div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding:12px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(88,183,255,.06);border-left:3px solid var(--primary)">
        <div style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted)">Cost-to-Income Ratio</div>
        <div style="font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:800">${r.cost_to_income || 0}%</div>
        <div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">Expenses / Total Revenue</div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding:12px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,190,105,.06);border-left:3px solid var(--warn)">
        <div style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted)">Return on Assets</div>
        <div style="font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:800">${r.return_on_assets || 0}%</div>
        <div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">Net Profit / Total Assets (${money(r.total_assets||0)})</div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding:12px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(${netProfit>=0?'103,232,181':'255,71,87'},.06);border-left:3px solid ${netProfit>=0?'var(--accent)':'var(--danger)'}">
        <div style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted)">OPEX Ratio</div>
        <div style="font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:800">${s.opex_ratio || 0}%</div>
        <div style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted)">Operating Expenses / Revenue</div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }

  // ── Draw Trend Chart ──
  drawEnterprisePLTrendChart(trend);
}

/* Enterprise P&L trend chart — uses server-side trend data */
function drawEnterprisePLTrendChart(trendData) {
  const canvas = $('profitTrendChart');
  if (!canvas || !canvas.getContext) return;
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const W = canvas.width, H = canvas.height;
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);

  if (!trendData || !trendData.trend || trendData.trend.length === 0) {
    ctx.fillStyle = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--muted').trim() || '#888';
    ctx.font = '13px sans-serif';
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillText('No trend data available for the selected period', W/2, H/2);
    return;
  }

  const trend = trendData.trend;
  const trendMode = trendData.trend_mode || 'daily';
  if ($('plTrendTitle')) $('plTrendTitle').textContent = `P&L Trend (${trendMode.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + trendMode.slice(1)})`;

  const pad = {top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 80};
  const chartW = W - pad.left - pad.right;
  const chartH = H - pad.top - pad.bottom;

  // Find max value
  let maxVal = 0;
  trend.forEach(d => { maxVal = Math.max(maxVal, d.income, d.expenses, d.net); });
  if (maxVal === 0) maxVal = 1;
  const yMax = Math.ceil(maxVal * 1.15);
  const ySteps = 5;
  const yStep = yMax / ySteps;

  // Grid lines
  const mutedColor = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--muted').trim() || '#888';
  const borderColor = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--border').trim() || '#333';
  ctx.strokeStyle = borderColor;
  ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
  ctx.fillStyle = mutedColor;
  ctx.font = '10px monospace';
  ctx.textAlign = 'right';
  for (let i = 0; i <= ySteps; i++) {
    const y = pad.top + chartH - (i / ySteps) * chartH;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(pad.left, y);
    ctx.lineTo(pad.left + chartW, y);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillText(formatChartNum(i * yStep), pad.left - 6, y + 4);
  }

  // X labels
  ctx.textAlign = 'center';
  const labelStep = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(trend.length / 15));
  trend.forEach((d, i) => {
    if (i % labelStep === 0) {
      const x = pad.left + (i / Math.max(trend.length - 1, 1)) * chartW;
      const label = trendMode === 'monthly' ? d.period.slice(5) : d.period.slice(5);
      ctx.fillText(label, x, H - pad.bottom + 16);
    }
  });

  // Draw lines
  function drawLine(data, key, color, fillColor) {
    if (data.length < 2) return;
    ctx.beginPath();
    data.forEach((d, i) => {
      const x = pad.left + (i / Math.max(data.length - 1, 1)) * chartW;
      const y = pad.top + chartH - (Math.max(0, d[key] || 0) / yMax) * chartH;
      if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(x, y); else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    });
    ctx.strokeStyle = color;
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    ctx.stroke();

    // Fill area under line
    if (fillColor) {
      const lastI = data.length - 1;
      ctx.lineTo(pad.left + (lastI / Math.max(data.length - 1, 1)) * chartW, pad.top + chartH);
      ctx.lineTo(pad.left, pad.top + chartH);
      ctx.closePath();
      ctx.fillStyle = fillColor;
      ctx.fill();
    }
  }

  drawLine(trend, 'income', '#67e8b5', 'rgba(103,232,181,0.08)');
  drawLine(trend, 'expenses', '#ff4757', 'rgba(255,71,87,0.06)');

  // Income components as thinner lines (no fill)
  function drawThinLine(data, key, color) {
    if (data.length < 2) return;
    ctx.beginPath();
    data.forEach((d, i) => {
      const x = pad.left + (i / Math.max(data.length - 1, 1)) * chartW;
      const y = pad.top + chartH - (Math.max(0, d[key] || 0) / yMax) * chartH;
      if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(x, y); else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    });
    ctx.strokeStyle = color;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
    ctx.setLineDash([4, 3]);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.setLineDash([]);
  }

  drawThinLine(trend, 'fee_income', '#67e8b5');
  drawThinLine(trend, 'interest_income', '#58b7ff');
  drawThinLine(trend, 'penalty_income', '#ff6b86');
  drawThinLine(trend, 'transfer_income', '#ffbe69');
}

/* ================================================================
   BADGES UPDATE
   ================================================================ */
function updateBadges() {
  // Branch isolation: badges should reflect current branch data only
  const pendingExp = filterByUserBranch(DB.expenses).filter(e=>e.status==='PENDING').length;
  $('expensePendingBadge').textContent = pendingExp; $('expensePendingBadge').style.display = pendingExp>0?'inline':'none';
  // ★ FIX (RA-DASH-002): Use STATE.auditFindings (fresh from auto-refresh) instead of DB.auditFindings (stale).
  // This prevents updateBadges() from overwriting the correct badge value set by updateAuditKpiCards().
  // Also include IN_PROGRESS and ESCALATED to match Audit panel convention (IA-011 fix).
  const openFindings = filterByUserBranch(STATE.auditFindings || DB.auditFindings).filter(f=>f.status==='OPEN'||f.status==='IN_PROGRESS'||f.status==='ESCALATED').length;
  $('auditFindingBadge').textContent = openFindings; $('auditFindingBadge').style.display = openFindings>0?'inline':'none';
  // Also update customer, approval, profit badges (merged from first definition)
  const pendingCust = filterByUserBranch(DB.customers).filter(c=>c.status==='PENDING_KYC').length;
  const pendingAppr = filterByUserBranch(DB.approvals).filter(a=>a.status==='PENDING').length;
  $('custBadge').style.display = pendingCust > 0 ? 'inline' : 'none';
  $('custBadge').textContent = pendingCust;
  $('approvalBadge').style.display = pendingAppr > 0 ? 'inline' : 'none';
  $('approvalBadge').textContent = pendingAppr;
  if($('profitBadge')){
    // ★ FIXED: Use server data for sidebar P&L badge. Prefer dashboard server data
    // (STATE.dashServerData — refreshed by dashboard auto-refresh), then P&L server data
    // (STATE.plServerData — refreshed when P&L panel is viewed), then local cache.
    // ★ FIX (DP-029/030): Now also uses dashboard server data which was previously discarded.
    const dashIncome = STATE.dashServerData?.summary?.total_income;
    const dashLoanPortfolio = STATE.dashServerData?.summary?.total_loan_portfolio;
    const serverPLTotal = STATE.plServerData?.summary?.summary?.total_income;
    const serverPLCount = STATE.plServerData?.summary?.summary?.income_entries;
    // Use the most authoritative data source available
    if (dashIncome !== undefined && dashIncome !== null) {
      $('profitBadge').style.display = dashIncome > 0 ? 'inline' : 'none';
      $('profitBadge').textContent = money(dashIncome);
    } else if (serverPLTotal !== undefined && serverPLTotal !== null) {
      $('profitBadge').style.display = serverPLCount > 0 ? 'inline' : 'none';
      $('profitBadge').textContent = money(serverPLTotal);
    } else {
      // ★ FIX (DP-001): Use glType==='INCOME' filter instead of broken direction!=='debit'
      const incomeEntries = filterByUserBranch(DB.profitLedger).filter(e=>e.glType==='INCOME');
      $('profitBadge').style.display = incomeEntries.length > 0 ? 'inline' : 'none';
      $('profitBadge').textContent = money(incomeEntries.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0));
    }
  }
}

/* ================================================================
   EVENT LISTENERS
   ================================================================ */
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key === 'k') {
    e.preventDefault();
    openSearchOverlay();
  }
  if (e.key === 'Escape') {
    closeSearchOverlay();
    closeDrawer();
    closeModal('confirmModal');
    closeModal('createCustomerModal');
    closeModal('createLoanModal');
    closeModal('mfaModal');
    closeModal('editCustomerModal');
    closeModal('createAccountModal');
    closeModal('staffModal');
    closeModal('depositWithdrawModal');
    closeModal('profileModal');
    closeModal('settingsEditModal');
    closeModal('loanRepaymentModal');
    closeModal('loanDisburseModal');
    closeModal('transactionSuccessModal');
    closeNotifications();
    closeUserMenu();
  }
});

document.addEventListener('click', e => {
  if (!e.target.closest('.notif-dropdown') && !e.target.closest('[title="Notifications"]')) {
    closeNotifications();
  }
  if (!e.target.closest('.user-dropdown') && !e.target.closest('.user-menu')) {
    closeUserMenu();
  }
  // Close branch dropdown when clicking outside
  if (!e.target.closest('.branch-selector')) {
    const dd = $('branchDropdown');
    if (dd) dd.classList.remove('open');
  }
});

// Transaction filter change/input events
['txnDate','txnBranch','txnAccount','txnDirection','txnStatus','txnCategory','txnModule'].forEach(id => {
  const el = $(id);
  if (el) el.addEventListener('change', () => { STATE.txnPage = 1; renderTransactions(); });
});
['txnFromHour','txnToHour'].forEach(id => {
  const el = $(id);
  if (el) el.addEventListener('change', () => { STATE.txnPage = 1; renderTransactions(); });
});
const globalSearchInput = $('globalSearch');
if (globalSearchInput) {
  globalSearchInput.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter') { e.preventDefault(); performGlobalSearch(); }
  });
}

// Search overlay event listeners
const searchOverlayInput = $('searchOverlayInput');
if (searchOverlayInput) {
  let searchDebounce = null;
  searchOverlayInput.addEventListener('input', e => {
    clearTimeout(searchDebounce);
    searchDebounce = setTimeout(() => {
      const q = e.target.value;
      if (q && norm(q).length >= 2) { executeSearch(q); $('globalSearch').value = q; }
      else { $('searchResultsArea').innerHTML = ''; renderSearchRecent(); }
    }, 200);
  });
  searchOverlayInput.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter' && STATE._flatResults && STATE._flatResults[STATE.searchActiveIndex]) {
      e.preventDefault();
      dispatchSearchAction(STATE._flatResults[STATE.searchActiveIndex].action);
    }
    if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
      e.preventDefault();
      const total = STATE._flatResults ? STATE._flatResults.length : 0;
      if (total > 0) {
        STATE.searchActiveIndex = (STATE.searchActiveIndex + 1) % total;
        updateSearchActive();
      }
    }
    if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
      e.preventDefault();
      const total = STATE._flatResults ? STATE._flatResults.length : 0;
      if (total > 0) {
        STATE.searchActiveIndex = STATE.searchActiveIndex <= 0 ? total - 1 : STATE.searchActiveIndex - 1;
        updateSearchActive();
      }
    }
  });
}

function updateSearchActive() {
  $$('.search-result-item').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
  const active = document.querySelector(`.search-result-item[data-idx="${STATE.searchActiveIndex}"]`);
  if (active) {
    active.classList.add('active');
    active.scrollIntoView({ block: 'nearest', behavior: 'smooth' });
  }
}

// Customer filter events
['custStatusFilter','custRiskFilter','custBranchFilter','custTypeFilter'].forEach(id => {
  const el = $(id);
  if (el) el.addEventListener('change', () => { STATE.custPage = 1; renderCustomers(); });
});
if ($('custSearch')) $('custSearch').addEventListener('input', () => { debounce('custSearch', () => { STATE.custPage = 1; renderCustomers(); }); });

['accTypeFilter','accStatusFilter','accBranchFilter'].forEach(id => {
  const el = $(id);
  if (el) el.addEventListener('change', () => { STATE.accPage = 1; renderAccounts(); });
});
if ($('accSearch')) $('accSearch').addEventListener('input', () => { debounce('accSearch', () => { STATE.accPage = 1; renderAccounts(); }); });

// P&L filter events
['plDateFrom','plDateTo','plCategory','plBranch','plAccountType'].forEach(id => {
  const el = $(id);
  if (el) el.addEventListener('change', () => { STATE.plPage = 1; STATE.plServerData = null; renderProfitLoss(); });
});
if ($('plSearch')) $('plSearch').addEventListener('input', () => { debounce('plSearch', () => { STATE.plPage = 1; STATE.plServerData = null; renderProfitLoss(); }); });

// Expense filter events
['expDateFrom','expDateTo','expFilterCategory','expFilterStatus','expFilterBranch'].forEach(id => {
  const el = $(id);
  if (el) el.addEventListener('change', () => { STATE.expensePage = 1; renderExpenses(); });
});

// Operating fund filter events
['opDateFrom','opDateTo','opFilterType'].forEach(id => {
  const el = $(id);
  if (el) el.addEventListener('change', () => { STATE.opTxnPage = 1; renderOperatingFund(); });
});

// Audit findings filter events
['afFilterSeverity','afFilterStatus','afFilterCategory','afFilterBranch'].forEach(id => {
  const el = $(id);
  if (el) el.addEventListener('change', () => { STATE.auditPage = 1; renderInternalAudit(); });
});

// Call updateBadges on init
setTimeout(updateBadges, 500);

/* ================================================================
   ENTERPRISE DOCUMENTS — Statements & Payslips
   ================================================================ */
function renderDocuments() {
  // Branch isolation: only show accounts for current branch
  const branchAccounts = filterByUserBranch(DB.accounts).filter(a => a.status === 'ACTIVE');
  const stmtSel = $('docStmtAccount');
  const paySel = $('docPayAccount');
  if (stmtSel) {
    stmtSel.innerHTML = '<option value="">— Select Account —</option>' + branchAccounts.map(a =>
      `<option value="${a.id}">${a.accountNumber} — ${a.customerName} (${a.productType}) · Bal: ${money(a.ledgerBalance)}</option>`
    ).join('');
  }
  if (paySel) {
    const salaryAccounts = branchAccounts.filter(a => a.productType === 'SALARY');
    paySel.innerHTML = '<option value="">— Select Salary Account —</option>' + salaryAccounts.map(a =>
      `<option value="${a.id}">${a.accountNumber} — ${a.customerName} · Bal: ${money(a.ledgerBalance)}</option>`
    ).join('');
  }
  // Default dates
  const now = new Date();
  const threeMonthsAgo = new Date(now); threeMonthsAgo.setMonth(threeMonthsAgo.getMonth() - 3);
  if ($('docStmtFrom')) $('docStmtFrom').value = threeMonthsAgo.toISOString().slice(0,10);
  if ($('docStmtTo')) $('docStmtTo').value = now.toISOString().slice(0,10);
  if ($('docPayPeriod')) $('docPayPeriod').value = now.toISOString().slice(0,7);
  // Clear previews
  if ($('docStatementPreview')) $('docStatementPreview').innerHTML = '<div class="card" style="padding:48px;text-align:center"><div style="margin-bottom:14px">'+IC("file-text", 36)+'</div><h3 style="color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px">No Statement Generated</h3><p style="color:var(--soft);font-size:.88rem">Select an account and date range above, then click "Generate Statement" to produce an enterprise-grade bank statement.</p></div>';
  if ($('docPayslipPreview')) $('docPayslipPreview').innerHTML = '<div class="card" style="padding:48px;text-align:center"><div style="margin-bottom:14px">'+IC("receipt", 36)+'</div><h3 style="color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px">No Payslip Generated</h3><p style="color:var(--soft);font-size:.88rem">Select a salary account and pay period above, then click "Generate Payslip" to produce a detailed salary payslip.</p></div>';
  // Summary bar + badges
  renderDocSummaryBar();
}

function switchDocTab(tab) {
  $$('#docTabs .tab-btn').forEach((b,i) => b.classList.toggle('active', (tab==='statements'?i===0:tab==='payslips'?i===1:i===2)));
  $('docStatementPanel').style.display = tab === 'statements' ? 'block' : 'none';
  $('docPayslipPanel').style.display = tab === 'payslips' ? 'block' : 'none';
  $('docHistoryPanel').style.display = tab === 'history' ? 'block' : 'none';
  $('docGlobalFilters').style.display = tab === 'history' ? 'flex' : 'none';
  if (tab === 'history') renderDocumentHistory();
  renderDocSummaryBar();
}

function renderDocSummaryBar() {
  const docs = filterByUserBranch(DB.generatedDocuments);
  const total = docs.length;
  const stmts = docs.filter(d => d.type === 'STATEMENT').length;
  const payslips = docs.filter(d => d.type === 'PAYSLIP').length;
  const receipts = docs.filter(d => d.type === 'RECEIPT').length;
  const reports = docs.filter(d => d.type === 'REPORT').length;
  const voided = docs.filter(d => d.status === 'VOIDED').length;
  const active = total - voided;
  const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
  const printedToday = docs.filter(d => d.lastPrintedAt && d.lastPrintedAt.slice(0,10) === today).length;
  const totalPrints = docs.reduce((s,d) => s + (d.printCount || 0), 0);

  const bar = $('docSummaryBar');
  if (bar) bar.innerHTML =
    `<div class="sb-item"><div class="sb-label">Total</div><div class="sb-value">${total}</div></div>` +
    `<div class="sb-item"><div class="sb-label">Active</div><div class="sb-value" style="color:var(--success)">${active}</div></div>` +
    `<div class="sb-item"><div class="sb-label">Statements</div><div class="sb-value">${stmts}</div></div>` +
    `<div class="sb-item"><div class="sb-label">Payslips</div><div class="sb-value">${payslips}</div></div>` +
    `<div class="sb-item"><div class="sb-label">Receipts</div><div class="sb-value">${receipts}</div></div>` +
    `<div class="sb-item"><div class="sb-label">Reports</div><div class="sb-value">${reports}</div></div>` +
    `<div class="sb-item"><div class="sb-label">Voided</div><div class="sb-value" style="color:var(--danger)">${voided}</div></div>` +
    `<div class="sb-item"><div class="sb-label">Total Prints</div><div class="sb-value">${totalPrints}</div></div>`;

  // Badges
  const totalBadge = $('docTotalBadge');
  if (totalBadge) totalBadge.textContent = total;
  const printBadge = $('docPendingPrintBadge');
  if (printBadge) {
    if (printedToday > 0) {
      printBadge.textContent = printedToday + ' printed today';
      printBadge.style.display = 'inline';
    } else {
      printBadge.style.display = 'none';
    }
  }
}


function renderDocumentHistory() {
  // Combine local search with global search
  const localSearch = norm($('docHistorySearch')?.value || '');
  const globalSearch = norm($('docGlobalSearch')?.value || '');
  const search = globalSearch || localSearch;
  const typeFilter = $('docHistoryType')?.value || '';
  const fromDate = $('docHistoryFrom')?.value || '';
  const toDate = $('docHistoryTo')?.value || '';

  // Branch isolation: filter document history by current branch selection
  let docs = filterByUserBranch(DB.generatedDocuments);
  docs = [...docs].sort((a,b) => (b.id||0) - (a.id||0));
  if (search) docs = docs.filter(d => norm(d.documentNumber).includes(search) || norm(d.customerName).includes(search) || norm(d.accountNumber).includes(search) || norm(d.branch||'').includes(search) || norm(d.subtype||'').includes(search) || norm(d.operator||'').includes(search));
  if (typeFilter) docs = docs.filter(d => d.type === typeFilter);
  if (fromDate) docs = docs.filter(d => d.generatedAt && d.generatedAt.slice(0,10) >= fromDate);
  if (toDate) docs = docs.filter(d => d.generatedAt && d.generatedAt.slice(0,10) <= toDate);

  const tbody = $('docHistoryTableBody');
  const empty = $('docHistoryEmpty');
  if (!tbody) return;

  if (docs.length === 0) {
    tbody.innerHTML = '';
    empty.style.display = 'block';
    return;
  }
  empty.style.display = 'none';

  const typeLabels = { STATEMENT: '<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px">' + IC('file-text', 14) + '<span>Statement</span></span>', PAYSLIP: '<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px">' + IC('receipt', 14) + '<span>Payslip</span></span>', RECEIPT: '<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px">' + IC('receipt', 14) + '<span>Receipt</span></span>', REPORT: '<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px">' + IC('bar-chart-3', 14) + '<span>Report</span></span>' };
  const subtypeLabels = { EXPENSE_STATEMENT: 'Expense Statement', BANK_STATEMENT: 'Bank Statement', SALARY_PAYSLIP: 'Salary Payslip', TRANSACTION_RECEIPT: 'Transaction Receipt', DEPOSIT_RECEIPT: 'Deposit Receipt', WITHDRAWAL_RECEIPT: 'Withdrawal Receipt', TRANSFER_RECEIPT: 'Transfer Receipt' };
  const statusCls = s => s === 'VOIDED' ? 'background:var(--danger-dim);color:var(--danger)' : 'background:var(--success-dim);color:var(--success)';
  const typeBadge = t => t === 'VOIDED' ? 'pill-rejected' : 'pill-active';

  tbody.innerHTML = docs.map(d => {
    const isReport = d.type === 'REPORT';
    const sum = typeof d.summary === 'string' ? JSON.parse(d.summary || '{}') : (d.summary || {});
    // For REPORT docs, show branch in account column and subtype in customer column
    const acctCol = isReport
      ? '<span style="font-size:.82rem">' + escHtml(d.branch || 'All Branches') + '</span>'
      : '<span style="font-family:\'Courier New\',monospace;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600">' + escHtml(d.accountNumber) + '</span>';
    const custCol = isReport
      ? '<span style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--primary);font-weight:600">' + escHtml(subtypeLabels[d.subtype] || d.subtype || 'Report') + '</span>'
      + (sum.totalExpenses != null ? '<br><span style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--danger);font-weight:700">' + money(sum.totalExpenses) + '</span><span style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)"> (' + sum.recordCount + ' records)</span>' : '')
      : '<div style="font-weight:600;font-size:.84rem">' + escHtml(d.customerName) + '</div>' +
        (d.subtype ? '<span class="pill ' + typeBadge(d.status) + '" style="font-size:.66rem;margin-top:2px">' + escHtml(subtypeLabels[d.subtype] || d.subtype) + '</span>' : '');
    const periodCol = d.periodFrom
      ? (d.periodFrom && d.periodTo && d.periodFrom !== d.periodTo)
        ? '<span style="font-size:.82rem">' + d.periodFrom + '</span><br><span style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)">to ' + d.periodTo + '</span>'
        : '<span style="font-size:.82rem">' + d.periodFrom + '</span>'
      : '<span style="color:var(--muted)">—</span>';
    return `<tr style="cursor:pointer" onclick="reprintDocument(${d.id})">
    <td><span style="font-weight:700;font-family:'Courier New',monospace;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--primary)">${escHtml(d.documentNumber)}</span></td>
    <td>${typeLabels[d.type] || d.type}</td>
    <td>${acctCol}</td>
    <td>${custCol}</td>
    <td>${periodCol}</td>
    <td><div style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:500">${escHtml(d.operator)}</div><div style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)">${d.generatedAt ? dateFmt(d.generatedAt) : ''}</div></td>
    <td style="text-align:center"><span style="font-weight:700;color:var(--primary)">${d.printCount || 0}</span></td>
    <td style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)">${d.lastPrintedAt ? shortDate(d.lastPrintedAt) : '—'}</td>
    <td><span style="padding:3px 10px;border-radius:999px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;${statusCls(d.status)}">${d.status}</span></td>
    <td style="white-space:nowrap">
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="event.stopPropagation();reprintDocument(${d.id})" title="Re-print"><i data-lucide="printer" style="width:14px;height:14px;stroke-width:2"></i></button>
      ${d.status !== 'VOIDED' ? '<button class="btn btn-sm" style="background:var(--danger-dim);color:var(--danger)" onclick="event.stopPropagation();voidDocument(' + d.id + ')" title="Void Document"><i data-lucide="x" style="width:14px;height:14px;stroke-width:2"></i></button>' : '<span style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--danger);font-weight:600">VOID</span>'}
    </td>
  </tr>`;

  }).join('');
  refreshIcons();
}

function lookupDocument(docNumber) {
  const doc = findDocumentByNumber(docNumber);
  if (!doc) { showToast('error','Not Found','Document ' + docNumber + ' not found.'); return; }
  navigate('documents');
  setTimeout(() => {
    switchDocTab('history');
    setTimeout(() => {
      $('docHistorySearch').value = docNumber;
      renderDocumentHistory();
    }, 100);
  }, 200);
}

function reprintDocument(docId) {
  const doc = findDocumentById(docId);
  if (!doc) { showToast('error','Not Found','Document not found.'); return; }
  if (doc.type === 'STATEMENT') {
    navigate('documents');
    setTimeout(() => {
      switchDocTab('statements');
      const opt = Array.from($('docStmtAccount').options).find(o => o.textContent.includes(doc.accountNumber));
      if (opt) $('docStmtAccount').value = opt.value;
      $('docStmtFrom').value = doc.periodFrom;
      $('docStmtTo').value = doc.periodTo;
      generateEnterpriseStatement();
      doc.printCount++;
      doc.lastPrintedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    }, 200);
  } else if (doc.type === 'PAYSLIP') {
    navigate('documents');
    setTimeout(() => {
      switchDocTab('payslips');
      const opt = Array.from($('docPayAccount').options).find(o => o.textContent.includes(doc.accountNumber));
      if (opt) $('docPayAccount').value = opt.value;
      $('docPayPeriod').value = (doc.periodFrom || '').slice(0,7);
      generateEnterprisePayslip();
      doc.printCount++;
      doc.lastPrintedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    }, 200);
  } else if (doc.type === 'RECEIPT') {
    const sum = doc.summary || {};
    const amountLine = sum.amount != null
      ? '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Amount</span><span class="value" style="font-weight:700;color:var(--primary)">' + money(sum.amount) + '</span></div>'
      : '';
    const refLine = sum.transactionRef
      ? '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Transaction Ref</span><span class="value">' + escHtml(sum.transactionRef) + '</span></div>'
      : '';
    const statusPill = '<span class="pill ' + pillCls(doc.status==='VOIDED'?'VOIDED':'ACTIVE') + '">' + escHtml(doc.status) + '</span>';
    openDrawer('Receipt Details',
      '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Document Number</span><span class="value" style="font-family:Courier New,monospace">' + escHtml(doc.documentNumber) + '</span></div>' +
      '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Type</span><span class="value">' + escHtml(doc.subtype || 'RECEIPT') + '</span></div>' +
      '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Account</span><span class="value">' + escHtml(doc.accountNumber) + '</span></div>' +
      '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Customer</span><span class="value">' + escHtml(doc.customerName) + '</span></div>' +
      amountLine + refLine +
      '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Branch</span><span class="value">' + escHtml(doc.branch) + '</span></div>' +
      '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Generated</span><span class="value">' + dateFmt(doc.generatedAt) + '</span></div>' +
      '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Generated By</span><span class="value">' + escHtml(doc.operator) + '</span></div>' +
      '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Print Count</span><span class="value">' + (doc.printCount || 0) + '</span></div>' +
      '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Status</span><span class="value">' + statusPill + '</span></div>'
    );
    doc.printCount = (doc.printCount || 0) + 1;
    doc.lastPrintedAt = new Date().toISOString();
  } else if (doc.type === 'REPORT') {
    // REPORT type — expense statements, audit reports, etc.
    const sum = typeof doc.summary === 'string' ? JSON.parse(doc.summary || '{}') : (doc.summary || {});
    const subtypeLabels = { EXPENSE_STATEMENT: 'Expense Statement' };

    if (doc.subtype === 'EXPENSE_STATEMENT') {
      // Re-print expense statement: navigate to Expenses tab and trigger print
      navigate('expenses');
      setTimeout(() => {
        // Restore filter state from saved document period
        if (doc.periodFrom && $('expDateFrom')) $('expDateFrom').value = doc.periodFrom;
        if (doc.periodTo && $('expDateTo')) $('expDateTo').value = doc.periodTo;
        printExpenseStatement();
        doc.printCount = (doc.printCount || 0) + 1;
        doc.lastPrintedAt = new Date().toISOString();
      }, 300);
    } else {
      // Generic report — show detail drawer with full summary
      const summaryLines = Object.entries(sum).map(([k,v]) => {
        const label = k.replace(/([A-Z])/g, ' $1').replace(/^./, function(s) { return s.toUpperCase(); });
        const value = typeof v === 'number' ? money(v) : String(v || '—');
        return '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">' + label + '</span><span class="value">' + value + '</span></div>';
      }).join('');
      const periodVal = (doc.periodFrom || '—') + (doc.periodFrom && doc.periodTo ? ' — ' + doc.periodTo : '');
      openDrawer(subtypeLabels[doc.subtype] || doc.subtype || 'Report Details',
        '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Document Number</span><span class="value" style="font-family:Courier New,monospace">' + escHtml(doc.documentNumber) + '</span></div>' +
        '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Type</span><span class="value">' + escHtml(doc.subtype || 'REPORT') + '</span></div>' +
        '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Branch</span><span class="value">' + escHtml(doc.branch || 'All Branches') + '</span></div>' +
        '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Period</span><span class="value">' + escHtml(periodVal) + '</span></div>' +
        '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Generated</span><span class="value">' + dateFmt(doc.generatedAt) + '</span></div>' +
        '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Generated By</span><span class="value">' + escHtml(doc.operator) + '</span></div>' +
        '<div class="detail-row"><span class="label">Print Count</span><span class="value">' + (doc.printCount || 0) + '</span></div>' +
        '<div class="drawer-section"><h4>Summary</h4>' + summaryLines + '</div>'
      );
      doc.printCount = (doc.printCount || 0) + 1;
      doc.lastPrintedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    }
  }
  showToast('info','Document Opened', doc.documentNumber + ' — Print count: ' + (doc.printCount || 0));
}

function voidDocument(docId) {
  const doc = findDocumentById(docId);
  if (!doc) return;
  showConfirm('Void Document','Are you sure you want to void document ' + doc.documentNumber + '? This marks it as voided but does not delete the record.',(reason)=>{
    doc.status = 'VOIDED';
    addAuditEntry('DOCUMENT_VOIDED','Document',doc.documentNumber,`Document voided by ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName}. Reason: ${reason||'N/A'}. Original: ${doc.subtype} for ${doc.customerName}.`);
    showToast('warning','Document Voided',`${doc.documentNumber} has been voided.`);
    renderDocumentHistory();
    renderDocSummaryBar();
  }, true);
}

/* ===== ENTERPRISE BANK STATEMENT ===== */
async function generateEnterpriseStatement() {
  const accId = parseInt($('docStmtAccount').value);
  if (!accId) { showToast('error','Error','Please select an account.'); return; }
  const a = DB.accounts.find(x => x.id === accId);
  if (!a) return;
  const from = $('docStmtFrom').value || '';
  const to = $('docStmtTo').value || '';
  if (!from || !to) { showToast('error','Error','Please select both From and To dates.'); return; }

  const customer = DB.customers.find(c => c.id === a.customerId);
  const branch = DB.branches.find(b => b.name === a.branch);

  // Get ALL posted transactions for this account (API fetch bypasses branch filter for consistency)
  const allTxns = (await fetchAccountTransactions(a.accountNumber)).sort((x,y) => new Date(x.timestamp) - new Date(y.timestamp));

  // Compute correct net balance impact per transaction (handles both WITHDRAWAL and ACCOUNT fee modes)
  const allNets = computeTxnNets(allTxns);

  // Correct opening/closing balance computation considering out-of-period transactions
  const afterNet = allTxns.reduce((s,t,i) => t.timestamp.slice(0,10) > to ? s + allNets[i] : s, 0);
  const closingBalance = parseFloat((a.ledgerBalance - afterNet).toFixed(2));
  const periodTxns = allTxns.filter(t => t.timestamp.slice(0,10) >= from && t.timestamp.slice(0,10) <= to);
  const duringNet = periodTxns.reduce((s,t) => {
    const origIdx = allTxns.indexOf(t);
    return s + (origIdx >= 0 ? allNets[origIdx] : 0);
  }, 0);
  const openingBalance = parseFloat((closingBalance - duringNet).toFixed(2));

  const totalCredits = periodTxns.filter(t => t.direction === 'credit' && t.type !== 'FEE' && t.type !== 'TAX_DEDUCTION').reduce((s,t) => s + t.amount, 0);
  // Exclude separate FEE/TAX_DEDUCTION child transactions from totalDebits to avoid double-counting.
  const totalDebits = periodTxns.filter(t => t.direction === 'debit' && t.type !== 'FEE' && t.type !== 'TAX_DEDUCTION').reduce((s,t) => s + t.amount, 0);
  const interestEarned = periodTxns.filter(t => t.category === 'Interest Credit').reduce((s,t) => s + t.amount, 0);
  const feeCharges = periodTxns.filter(t => (t.type === 'FEE' || t.type === 'TAX_DEDUCTION') || t.category === 'Software Expense').reduce((s,t) => s + t.amount, 0);
  const netMovement = totalCredits - totalDebits;
  const averageBalance = periodTxns.length > 0 ? (openingBalance + closingBalance) / 2 : closingBalance;
  const sortCode = branch ? (branch.code + '-001') : 'N/A';
  const stmtDate = dateFmt(new Date().toISOString());
  const stmtRef = generateDocumentNumber('STMT');
  const docRecord = registerDocument({
    documentNumber: stmtRef,
    type: 'STATEMENT',
    subtype: 'BANK_STATEMENT',
    accountNumber: a.accountNumber,
    customerId: a.customerId,
    customerName: a.customerName,
    branch: a.branch,
    periodFrom: from,
    periodTo: to,
    operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
    generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    printCount: 0,
    lastPrintedAt: null,
    exportCount: 0,
    lastExportedAt: null,
    summary: {
      totalTransactions: periodTxns.length,
      openingBalance: openingBalance,
      closingBalance: closingBalance,
      totalCredits: totalCredits,
      totalDebits: totalDebits,
      grossPay: 0, netPay: 0, totalDeductions: 0, amount: 0, transactionRef: ''
    },
    status: 'ACTIVE'
  });
  STATE.lastStatementDocId = docRecord.id;

  let txnRows = '';
  let currentBal = openingBalance;
  if (periodTxns.length === 0) {
    txnRows = '<tr><td colspan="7" style="text-align:center;padding:24px;color:#718096">No transactions recorded in the selected period.</td></tr>';
  } else {
    // Use shared helper to determine which child rows to hide vs show
    const { hideSet, skipBalSet, parentExpandMap } = buildStatementChildSets(periodTxns);
    periodTxns.forEach((t, idx) => {
      const isChild = t.type === 'FEE' || t.type === 'TAX_DEDUCTION';
      if (hideSet.has(idx)) return; // Hide WITHDRAWAL-mode children entirely
      const isParentExpanded = parentExpandMap.has(idx);
      const skipForBal = skipBalSet.has(idx);
      if (!skipForBal) {
        if (t.direction === 'credit') currentBal += t.amount;
        else currentBal -= t.amount;
      }
      const valDate = new Date(t.timestamp);
      valDate.setDate(valDate.getDate() + (t.direction === 'credit' ? 0 : 1));
      // Build inline deduction breakdown
      let expandDesc = '';
      if (isParentExpanded) {
        const ex = parentExpandMap.get(idx);
        let parts = [];
        if (ex.fee > 0) parts.push('Fee '+ex.feePct+'%: −'+money(ex.fee));
        if (ex.taxBreakdown) ex.taxBreakdown.forEach(d => { if(d.amount>0) parts.push(d.label+': −'+money(d.amount)); });
        if (ex.netAmount != null && ex.netAmount !== t.amount) parts.push('Net: '+money(ex.netAmount));
        if (parts.length) expandDesc = '<div style="font-size:10px;color:#b45309;margin-top:2px">'+parts.join(' | ')+'</div>';
      }
      txnRows += `<tr${isChild?' style="opacity:.55"':''}>
        <td style="white-space:nowrap">${new Date(t.timestamp).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'})}</td>
        <td style="white-space:nowrap">${valDate.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'})}</td>
        <td><div style="font-weight:600">${t.description}</div><div class="edt-mono">${t.ref}</div>${expandDesc}</td>
        <td class="edt-mono">${t.category}</td>
        <td class="edt-credit" style="text-align:right">${t.direction==='credit'?money(t.amount):'—'}</td>
        <td class="edt-debit" style="text-align:right">${t.direction==='debit'?money(t.amount):'—'}</td>
        <td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:600">${money(currentBal)}</td>
      </tr>`;
    });
  }

  const html = `
  <div class="card" style="padding:0;overflow:hidden">
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;padding:14px 18px;background:rgba(88,183,255,.06);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)">
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="printEnterpriseStatement()"><i data-lucide="printer" style="width:14px;height:14px;stroke-width:2;vertical-align:-2px"></i> Print Statement</button>
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="exportEnterpriseStatementCSV()"><i data-lucide="file-spreadsheet" style="width:14px;height:14px;stroke-width:2;vertical-align:-2px"></i> Export Excel</button>
      <div style="margin-left:auto;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);align-self:center">${periodTxns.length} transactions · ${from} to ${to}</div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:20px;max-height:70vh;overflow-y:auto">
      <div class="ent-doc" id="entStatementDoc">
        <div class="ent-doc-header">
          <div class="edh-left">
            <div class="edh-logo">${DB.bankBranding.logo ? '<img src="'+escUrl(DB.bankBranding.logo)+'" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:14px" alt="Logo">' : DB.bankBranding.bankName.charAt(0)}</div>
            <div>
              <div class="edh-bank-name">${DB.bankBranding.bankName}</div>
              <div class="edh-bank-sub">${DB.bankBranding.headOfficeAddress}</div>
              <div class="edh-bank-sub">SWIFT: ${DB.bankBranding.swiftCode} · BEAC Approval: ${DB.bankBranding.cbnLicenseNumber}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="edh-right">
            <div class="edh-doc-title">Account Statement</div>
            <div>Statement Ref: ${stmtRef}</div>
            <div>Generated: ${stmtDate}</div>
            <div>Operator: ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System'}</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ent-doc-body">
          <!-- Account Holder Information -->
          <div class="ent-doc-section">
            <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Account Holder Information</div>
            <div class="ent-doc-grid">
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Account Holder</div><div class="edf-value">${a.customerName}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Customer Reference</div><div class="edf-value">${customer?customer.customerNumber:'N/A'}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Account Number</div><div class="edf-value">${a.accountNumber}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Product Type</div><div class="edf-value">${a.productType} Account</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Currency</div><div class="edf-value">${a.currency}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Account Status</div><div class="edf-value">${a.status}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Branch</div><div class="edf-value">${a.branch}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Sort Code</div><div class="edf-value">${sortCode}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Date Opened</div><div class="edf-value">${a.openedAt?new Date(a.openedAt).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}):'N/A'}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Customer Type</div><div class="edf-value">${customer?customer.customerType:'N/A'}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Phone</div><div class="edf-value">${customer?customer.phone||'N/A':'N/A'}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Email</div><div class="edf-value">${customer?customer.email||'N/A':'N/A'}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Risk Rating</div><div class="edf-value">${customer?customer.riskRating:'N/A'}</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Statement Period & Balances -->
          <div class="ent-doc-section">
            <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Statement Period Summary</div>
            <div class="ent-doc-grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr">
              <div class="ent-doc-field" style="background:#eff6ff;border-color:#bfdbfe"><div class="edf-label">Period</div><div class="edf-value" style="font-size:.82rem">${new Date(from).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'})} — ${new Date(to).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'})}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field" style="background:#eff6ff;border-color:#bfdbfe"><div class="edf-label">Days in Period</div><div class="edf-value">${Math.max(1,Math.ceil((new Date(to)-new Date(from))/(1000*60*60*24)))}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field" style="background:#eff6ff;border-color:#bfdbfe"><div class="edf-label">Number of Entries</div><div class="edf-value">${periodTxns.length}</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Balance Summary -->
          <div class="ent-doc-section">
            <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Balance Summary</div>
            <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Opening Balance (as at ${new Date(from).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'})})</span><span class="edtr-value">${money(openingBalance)}</span></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Total Credits</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#16a34a">+${money(totalCredits)}</span></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Total Debits</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#dc2626">−${money(totalDebits)}</span></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Net Movement</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:${netMovement>=0?'#16a34a':'#dc2626'}">${netMovement>=0?'+':''}${money(netMovement)}</span></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Average Balance</span><span class="edtr-value">${money(averageBalance)}</span></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-grand"><span>Closing Balance (as at ${new Date(to).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'})})</span><span>${money(closingBalance)}</span></div>
          </div>

          <!-- Interest & Fees Summary (for savings) -->
          ${a.productType==='SAVINGS'?`<div class="ent-doc-section">
            <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Interest &amp; Charges Summary</div>
            <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Interest Earned in Period</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#16a34a">+${money(interestEarned)}</span></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Savings Rate (p.a.)</span><span class="edtr-value">4.20%</span></div>
          </div>`:''}
          ${feeCharges>0?`<div class="ent-doc-section">
            <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Fees &amp; Charges Summary</div>
            <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Total Fees &amp; Charges in Period</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#dc2626">−${money(feeCharges)}</span></div>
          </div>`:''}

          <!-- Transaction Listing -->
          <div class="ent-doc-section">
            <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Transaction Detail</div>
            <table class="ent-doc-table">
              <thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Value Date</th><th>Description / Reference</th><th>Category</th><th style="text-align:right">Credit</th><th style="text-align:right">Debit</th><th style="text-align:right">Balance</th></tr></thead>
              <tbody>${txnRows}</tbody>
            </table>
          </div>

          <!-- Certification -->
          <div class="ent-doc-cert">
            <strong>Certification:</strong> This statement is a true and complete reflection of all transactions posted to the above-referenced account during the stated period. The balances shown have been verified against ${DB.bankBranding.bankNameShort}'s core banking system records. This document is generated electronically and does not require a physical signature. Any discrepancy should be reported to your branch within 14 days of the statement date.
          </div>

          <!-- Signatures -->
          <div class="ent-doc-signatures">
            <div class="ent-doc-sig">
              <div class="eds-line"></div>
              <div class="eds-name">${STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'Authorized Officer'}</div>
              <div class="eds-role">Account Officer / Branch Operations</div>
              <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">${a.branch}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="ent-doc-sig">
              <div class="eds-line"></div>
              <div class="eds-name">Branch Manager</div>
              <div class="eds-role">${a.branch}</div>
              <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">Authorized Signatory</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Footer -->
          <div class="ent-doc-footer">
            ${DB.bankBranding.bankNameShort} Limited · Registered in Cameroon · ${DB.bankBranding.registrationNumber} · BEAC Approval: ${DB.bankBranding.cbnLicenseNumber}<br>
            Registered Office: ${DB.bankBranding.headOfficeAddress}<br>
            SWIFT Code: ${DB.bankBranding.swiftCode} · Sort Code: ${sortCode}<br>
            Tel: ${DB.bankBranding.phone} · Email: ${DB.bankBranding.email}<br><br>
            <strong>CONFIDENTIAL:</strong> This document contains privileged and confidential information intended solely for the named account holder. Unauthorized use, disclosure, copying, or distribution is strictly prohibited. If you have received this statement in error, please notify ${DB.bankBranding.bankNameShort} immediately at compliance@${DB.bankBranding.website}.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>`;
  $('docStatementPreview').innerHTML = html;
  renderDocSummaryBar();
  renderDocumentHistory();
  refreshIcons($('docStatementPreview'));
  showToast('success','Statement Generated',`Enterprise statement for ${a.accountNumber} with ${periodTxns.length} transactions.`);
  addAuditEntry('STATEMENT_GENERATED','Account',a.accountNumber,`Enterprise statement generated for ${a.customerName}. Period: ${from} to ${to}. Transactions: ${periodTxns.length}.`);
}

function printEnterpriseStatement() {
  const doc = $('entStatementDoc');
  if (!doc) { showToast('error','Error','No statement to print. Generate one first.'); return; }
  // Update document tracking
  const docRecord = findDocumentById(STATE.lastStatementDocId);
  if (docRecord) {
    docRecord.printCount++;
    docRecord.lastPrintedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    addAuditEntry('STATEMENT_PRINTED','Document',docRecord.documentNumber,`Statement printed for ${docRecord.customerName}. Print count: ${docRecord.printCount}.`);
  }
  $('documentPrintArea').innerHTML = doc.outerHTML;
  $('documentPrintArea').style.display = 'block';
  $('documentPrintArea').classList.add('printing');
  setTimeout(() => { window.print(); $$('[id$="PrintArea"]').forEach(el => { el.classList.remove('printing'); el.style.display = 'none'; }); }, 300);
}

async function exportEnterpriseStatementCSV() {
  const accId = parseInt($('docStmtAccount').value);
  if (!accId) return;
  const a = DB.accounts.find(x => x.id === accId);
  if (!a) return;
  const from = $('docStmtFrom').value || '';
  const to = $('docStmtTo').value || '';
  const allTxns = (await fetchAccountTransactions(a.accountNumber)).sort((x,y) => new Date(x.timestamp) - new Date(y.timestamp));
  // Compute correct net balance impact per transaction (handles both WITHDRAWAL and ACCOUNT fee modes)
  const allNets = computeTxnNets(allTxns);
  const afterNet = allTxns.reduce((s,t,i) => (to && t.timestamp.slice(0,10) > to) ? s + allNets[i] : s, 0);
  const closingBalance = parseFloat((a.ledgerBalance - afterNet).toFixed(2));
  const periodTxns = allTxns.filter(t => { if(from && t.timestamp.slice(0,10) < from) return false; if(to && t.timestamp.slice(0,10) > to) return false; return true; });
  const duringNet = periodTxns.reduce((s,t) => {
    const origIdx = allTxns.indexOf(t);
    return s + (origIdx >= 0 ? allNets[origIdx] : 0);
  }, 0);
  const openingBalance = parseFloat((closingBalance - duringNet).toFixed(2));
  const customer = DB.customers.find(c => c.id === a.customerId);
  const docRec = findDocumentById(STATE.lastStatementDocId);
  const stmtRefStr = docRec ? docRec.documentNumber : 'N/A';
  const totalCredits = periodTxns.filter(t=>t.direction==='credit' && t.type!=='FEE' && t.type!=='TAX_DEDUCTION').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const totalDebits = periodTxns.filter(t=>t.direction==='debit' && t.type!=='FEE' && t.type!=='TAX_DEDUCTION').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0);
  const netMovement = totalCredits - totalDebits;
  const avgBalance = (openingBalance + closingBalance) / 2;
  const netFlowRate = openingBalance > 0 ? ((netMovement / openingBalance) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0.0';
  const b = DB.bankBranding || {};
  const now = new Date();
  const genStr = now.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}) + ', ' + now.toLocaleTimeString('en-GB',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});
  const operator = STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System';
  // Use shared helper to determine which child rows to hide vs show
  const { hideSet, skipBalSet, parentExpandMap } = buildStatementChildSets(periodTxns);
  let runBal = openingBalance;
  const txnData = periodTxns.map((t, idx) => {
    const isChild = t.type === 'FEE' || t.type === 'TAX_DEDUCTION';
    if (hideSet.has(idx)) return null; // Hide WITHDRAWAL-mode children entirely
    const isParentExpanded = parentExpandMap.has(idx);
    const skipForBal = skipBalSet.has(idx);
    if(!skipForBal) { if(t.direction==='credit') runBal+=t.amount; else runBal-=t.amount; }
    // Build expanded description for Excel
    let desc = t.description || 'Cash Withdrawal';
    if (isParentExpanded) {
      const ex = parentExpandMap.get(idx);
      let parts = [];
      if (ex.fee > 0) parts.push('Fee '+ex.feePct+'%: -'+money(ex.fee));
      if (ex.taxBreakdown) ex.taxBreakdown.forEach(d => { if(d.amount>0) parts.push(d.label+': -'+money(d.amount)); });
      if (ex.netAmount != null && ex.netAmount !== t.amount) parts.push('Net: '+money(ex.netAmount));
      if (parts.length) desc += ' [' + parts.join(' | ') + ']';
    }
    const vd = new Date(t.timestamp); vd.setDate(vd.getDate()+(t.direction==='credit'?0:1));
    return { date: new Date(t.timestamp).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',year:'numeric'}), valDate: vd.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',year:'numeric'}), ref: t.ref, desc: desc, category: t.category, direction: t.direction.toUpperCase(), credit: t.direction==='credit'?t.amount:0, debit: t.direction==='debit'?t.amount:0, balance: runBal, isChild };
  }).filter(Boolean);
  const creditCount = txnData.filter(t=>t.direction==='CREDIT'&&!t.isChild).length;
  const debitCount = txnData.filter(t=>t.direction==='DEBIT'&&!t.isChild).length;
  let minBal = openingBalance, maxBal = openingBalance;
  txnData.forEach(t => { if(t.balance < minBal) minBal = t.balance; if(t.balance > maxBal) maxBal = t.balance; });
  const catMap = {};
  txnData.forEach(t => { if(t.isChild) return; const cat = t.category || t.desc; if(!catMap[cat]) catMap[cat] = {count:0,credit:0,debit:0}; catMap[cat].count++; if(t.direction==='CREDIT') catMap[cat].credit += t.amount; else catMap[cat].debit += t.amount; });
  const totalVolume = totalCredits + totalDebits;
  const catEntries = Object.entries(catMap).sort((a,b) => (b[1].credit+b[1].debit)-(a[1].credit+a[1].debit));
  const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();

  // === EXECUTIVE DASHBOARD ===
  const ws1 = xlMakeSheet(35, 9);
  xlSetWidths(ws1, [3, 16, 20, 14, 14, 16, 16, 16, 3]);
  let r = 0;
  r = xlNavyTitle(ws1, r, b.bankName || 'Atlas Bank', 8, 'ENTERPRISE ACCOUNT STATEMENT');
  r++;
  xlMerge(ws1, r, 1, r, 8);
  xlCell(ws1, r, 1, 'Statement Reference: ' + stmtRefStr + '  |  Period: ' + from + ' to ' + to, XLFont.labelSm, XLFill.mdgray, XLAlign.center);
  r += 2;
  xlMerge(ws1, r, 1, r, 3); xlCell(ws1, r, 1, 'INSTITUTION DETAILS', XLFont.sectionBold, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  xlMerge(ws1, r, 5, r, 7); xlCell(ws1, r, 5, 'ACCOUNT DETAILS', XLFont.sectionBold, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  r += 2;
  r = xlDualInfoGrid(ws1, r, 1, 2, 5, 6,
    [['Institution:', b.bankName],['SWIFT Code:', b.swiftCode],['BEAC Approval:', b.cbnLicenseNumber],['Registration:', b.registrationNumber],['Head Office:', b.headOfficeAddress],['Branch Scope:', isAllBranchesMode()?'All Branches':STATE.currentBranch]],
    [['Account Number:', a.accountNumber],['Customer Name:', a.customerName],['Product Type:', a.productType],['Customer Ref:', customer?customer.customerNumber:'N/A'],['Branch:', a.branch],['Operator:', operator]]
  );
  r += 2;
  xlMerge(ws1, r, 1, r, 7);
  xlCell(ws1, r, 1, 'KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS', XLFont.sectionMed, null, null, XLBorder.medBot);
  r += 2;
  const kpi1 = [
    {label:'OPENING BALANCE', value: fcfa(openingBalance), font: XLFont.kpiValue},
    {label:'CLOSING BALANCE', value: fcfa(closingBalance), font: XLFont.kpiValue},
    {label:'TOTAL CREDITS', value: fcfa(totalCredits), font: XLFont.kpiGreen},
    {label:'TOTAL DEBITS', value: fcfa(totalDebits), font: XLFont.kpiRed},
  ];
  kpi1.forEach((k, i) => {
    const c = i * 2 + 1;
    xlMerge(ws1, r, c, r, c+1); xlCell(ws1, r, c, k.label, XLFont.kpiLabel, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
    xlMerge(ws1, r+1, c, r+1, c+1); xlCell(ws1, r+1, c, k.value, k.font, XLFill.white, XLAlign.center, XLBorder.thin);
  });
  r += 3;
  const netFlowStr = netMovement >= 0 ? '+' + fcfa(netMovement) : '-' + fcfa(Math.abs(netMovement));
  const netRateStr = Number(netFlowRate) >= 0 ? '+' + netFlowRate + '%' : netFlowRate + '%';
  const kpi2 = [
    {label:'AVERAGE BALANCE', value: fcfa(avgBalance), font: XLFont.kpiSmValue},
    {label:'TOTAL RECORDS', value: String(periodTxns.length), font: XLFont.kpiSmValue},
    {label:'BALANCE CHANGE', value: netFlowStr, font: Number(netMovement)>=0?XLFont.kpiSmGreen:XLFont.kpiSmRed},
    {label:'NET FLOW', value: netRateStr, font: Number(netMovement)>=0?XLFont.kpiSmGreen:XLFont.kpiSmRed},
  ];
  kpi2.forEach((k, i) => {
    const c = i * 2 + 1;
    xlMerge(ws1, r, c, r, c+1); xlCell(ws1, r, c, k.label, XLFont.kpiSmLabel, XLFill.ltgray, XLAlign.center, XLBorder.thin);
    xlMerge(ws1, r+1, c, r+1, c+1); xlCell(ws1, r+1, c, k.value, k.font, XLFill.white, XLAlign.center, XLBorder.thin);
  });
  r += 4;
  xlMerge(ws1, r, 1, r, 7);
  xlCell(ws1, r, 1, 'Generated: ' + genStr + '  |  Exported By: ' + operator, XLFont.labelSm, XLFill.ltgray, XLAlign.center);
  r++;
  xlMerge(ws1, r, 1, r, 7);
  xlCell(ws1, r, 1, 'CONFIDENTIAL \u2014 This document contains privileged financial data', XLFont.confSm, null, XLAlign.center);
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws1, 'Executive_Dashboard');

  // === TRANSACTION LEDGER ===
  const ws2 = xlMakeSheet(Math.max(periodTxns.length + 20, 25), 11);
  xlSetWidths(ws2, [3, 12, 12, 18, 32, 16, 12, 14, 14, 16, 3]);
  r = 0;
  r = xlNavyTitle(ws2, r, 'TRANSACTION LEDGER', 10, 'Account: ' + a.accountNumber + ' | Customer: ' + a.customerName + ' | Period: ' + from + ' to ' + to);
  r += 3;
  r = xlTableHeader(ws2, r, 1, ['DATE','VALUE DATE','REFERENCE','DESCRIPTION','CATEGORY','DIRECTION','CREDIT (FCFA)','DEBIT (FCFA)','BALANCE (FCFA)']);
  txnData.forEach((t) => {
    r = xlDataRow(ws2, r, 1, [t.date, t.valDate, t.ref, t.desc, t.category, t.direction,
      t.credit > 0 ? t.credit : '\u2014', t.debit > 0 ? t.debit : '\u2014', t.balance],
      [XLFont.tableCell, XLFont.tableCell, XLFont.tableCell, XLFont.tableCell, XLFont.tableCell, XLFont.tableCell,
       t.credit > 0 ? XLFont.numGreen : XLFont.tableCell,
       t.debit > 0 ? XLFont.numRed : XLFont.tableCell,
       XLFont.tableNum]);
  });
  r++;
  xlCell(ws2, r, 1, 'TOTALS', XLFont.sectionMed, XLFill.mdgray, null, {top:{style:'medium'},bottom:{style:'medium'}});
  xlCell(ws2, r, 7, totalCredits, XLFont.sectionMed, XLFill.mdgray, XLAlign.right, {top:{style:'medium'},bottom:{style:'medium'}});
  xlCell(ws2, r, 8, totalDebits, XLFont.sectionMed, XLFill.mdgray, XLAlign.right, {top:{style:'medium'},bottom:{style:'medium'}});
  xlCell(ws2, r, 9, closingBalance, XLFont.sectionMed, XLFill.mdgray, XLAlign.right, {top:{style:'medium'},bottom:{style:'medium'}});
  r += 3;
  xlMerge(ws2, r, 1, r, 9);
  xlCell(ws2, r, 1, 'All amounts in Central African CFA Franc (FCFA) | Generated by ' + (b.bankName || 'Atlas Bank'), XLFont.footerSm, null, XLAlign.center);
  r++;
  xlMerge(ws2, r, 1, r, 9);
  xlCell(ws2, r, 1, 'CONFIDENTIAL \u2014 For authorized personnel only', XLFont.confRed, null, XLAlign.center);
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws2, 'Transaction_Ledger');

  // === ACCOUNT SUMMARY ===
  const ws3 = xlMakeSheet(50, 7);
  xlSetWidths(ws3, [3, 22, 24, 3, 20, 22, 3]);
  r = 0;
  r = xlNavyTitle(ws3, r, 'ACCOUNT SUMMARY REPORT', 6, (b.bankName || 'Atlas Bank') + ' \u2014 Comprehensive Statement Analysis');
  r++;
  xlMerge(ws3, r, 1, r, 6);
  xlCell(ws3, r, 1, 'Statement Reference: ' + stmtRefStr + '  |  Period: ' + from + ' to ' + to, XLFont.labelSm, XLFill.mdgray, XLAlign.center);
  r += 3;
  xlMerge(ws3, r, 1, r, 2); xlCell(ws3, r, 1, 'STATEMENT METADATA', XLFont.sectionBold, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.topL);
  xlMerge(ws3, r, 4, r, 5); xlCell(ws3, r, 4, 'ACCOUNT PROFILE', XLFont.sectionBold, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.topL);
  r += 2;
  r = xlDualInfoGrid(ws3, r, 1, 2, 4, 5,
    [['Document Reference:', stmtRefStr],['Statement Period:', from + ' to ' + to],['Generation Date:', genStr],['Generated By:', operator],['Branch Scope:', isAllBranchesMode()?'All Branches':STATE.currentBranch],['System Source:', 'Core Banking System v3.2'],['Export Format:', 'Enterprise Excel'],['Data Integrity:', 'Verified']],
    [['Account Number:', a.accountNumber],['Account Holder:', a.customerName],['Customer Reference:', customer?customer.customerNumber:'N/A'],['Product Type:', a.productType],['Home Branch:', a.branch],['Account Status:', '\u25CF Active'],['Currency:', 'XAF (CFA Franc BEAC)'],['Account Tier:', 'Premium']]
  );
  r += 2;
  xlMerge(ws3, r, 1, r, 5);
  xlCell(ws3, r, 1, 'FINANCIAL SUMMARY', XLFont.sectionMed, null, null, XLBorder.medBot);
  r += 2;
  xlMerge(ws3, r, 1, r, 2); xlCell(ws3, r, 1, 'BALANCE METRICS', XLFont.sectionBold, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  xlMerge(ws3, r, 4, r, 5); xlCell(ws3, r, 4, 'TRANSACTION METRICS', XLFont.sectionBold, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  r += 2;
  const balMetrics = [
    ['Opening Balance', fcfa(openingBalance), 'Total Transactions', String(periodTxns.length)],
    ['Closing Balance', fcfa(closingBalance), 'Credit Transactions', String(creditCount)],
    ['Average Balance', fcfa(avgBalance), 'Debit Transactions', String(debitCount)],
    ['Minimum Balance', fcfa(minBal), 'Total Credits', fcfa(totalCredits)],
    ['Maximum Balance', fcfa(maxBal), 'Total Debits', fcfa(totalDebits)],
    ['Net Change', (netMovement>=0?'+':'')+fcfa(netMovement), 'Net Flow Rate', (Number(netFlowRate)>=0?'+':'')+netFlowRate+'%'],
  ];
  balMetrics.forEach(([l1,v1,l2,v2], i) => {
    const fill = i%2===1 ? XLFill.ltgray : XLFill.white;
    xlCell(ws3, r, 1, l1, XLFont.labelSm, fill, XLAlign.left, XLBorder.bottom);
    xlCell(ws3, r, 2, v1, XLFont.valueBold, fill, XLAlign.right, XLBorder.bottom);
    xlCell(ws3, r, 4, l2, XLFont.labelSm, fill, XLAlign.left, XLBorder.bottom);
    xlCell(ws3, r, 5, v2, XLFont.valueBold, fill, XLAlign.right, XLBorder.bottom);
    r++;
  });
  r += 2;
  xlMerge(ws3, r, 1, r, 5);
  xlCell(ws3, r, 1, 'TRANSACTION CATEGORY BREAKDOWN', XLFont.sectionMed, null, null, XLBorder.medBot);
  r += 2;
  xlCell(ws3, r, 1, 'Category', XLFont.sectionBold, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.left);
  xlCell(ws3, r, 2, 'Count', XLFont.sectionBold, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  xlCell(ws3, r, 4, 'Amount (FCFA)', XLFont.sectionBold, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  xlCell(ws3, r, 5, '% of Total', XLFont.sectionBold, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  r++;
  catEntries.forEach(([cat, data], i) => {
    const fill = i%2===1 ? XLFill.ltgray : XLFill.white;
    const amt = data.credit + data.debit;
    const pct = totalVolume > 0 ? ((amt/totalVolume)*100).toFixed(1) : '0.0';
    xlCell(ws3, r, 1, cat, XLFont.labelSm, fill, XLAlign.left, XLBorder.bottom);
    xlCell(ws3, r, 2, data.count, XLFont.valueSm, fill, XLAlign.center, XLBorder.bottom);
    xlCell(ws3, r, 4, Number(amt).toLocaleString('en-US'), XLFont.valueSm, fill, XLAlign.right, XLBorder.bottom);
    xlCell(ws3, r, 5, pct + '%', XLFont.valueSm, fill, XLAlign.center, XLBorder.bottom);
    r++;
  });
  xlCell(ws3, r, 1, 'TOTAL VOLUME', XLFont.sectionMed, XLFill.ltgray, XLAlign.left);
  xlCell(ws3, r, 2, periodTxns.length, XLFont.sectionMed, XLFill.ltgray, XLAlign.center);
  xlCell(ws3, r, 4, Number(totalVolume).toLocaleString('en-US'), XLFont.sectionMed, XLFill.ltgray, XLAlign.right);
  xlCell(ws3, r, 5, '100%', XLFont.sectionMed, XLFill.ltgray, XLAlign.center);
  r += 3;
  xlMerge(ws3, r, 1, r, 5);
  xlCell(ws3, r, 1, 'CERTIFICATION & COMPLIANCE', XLFont.sectionMed, XLFill.bgHeader, XLAlign.center);
  r++;
  xlMerge(ws3, r, 1, r, 5);
  xlCell(ws3, r, 1, 'This statement has been generated from the official records of ' + (b.bankName || 'Atlas Bank') + '. It constitutes a true and accurate reflection of account transactions for the stated period.', XLFont.footerSm, XLFill.white, XLAlign.center, XLBorder.thin);
  r += 3;
  xlMerge(ws3, r, 1, r, 5);
  xlCell(ws3, r, 1, (b.bankName || 'Atlas Bank') + ' \u2014 SWIFT: ' + (b.swiftCode || 'N/A') + ' \u2014 Reg: ' + (b.registrationNumber || 'N/A'), XLFont.footerSm, null, XLAlign.center);
  r++;
  xlMerge(ws3, r, 1, r, 5);
  xlCell(ws3, r, 1, 'CONFIDENTIAL \u2014 Unauthorized reproduction or distribution is strictly prohibited', XLFont.confSm, null, XLAlign.center);
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws3, 'Account_Summary');

  // === VISUAL ANALYTICS ===
  const ws4 = xlMakeSheet(65, 9);
  xlSetWidths(ws4, [3, 20, 18, 3, 16, 16, 14, 14, 3]);
  r = 0;
  r = xlNavyTitle(ws4, r, 'VISUAL ANALYTICS', 8, 'Account: ' + a.accountNumber + ' | ' + a.customerName + ' | Period: ' + from + ' to ' + to);
  r += 2;
  xlMerge(ws4, r, 1, r, 2); xlCell(ws4, r, 1, 'FLOW ANALYSIS', XLFont.sectionMed, null, null, XLBorder.medBot);
  xlMerge(ws4, r, 4, r, 5); xlCell(ws4, r, 4, 'BALANCE TREND', XLFont.sectionMed, null, null, XLBorder.medBot);
  r += 2;
  xlCell(ws4, r, 1, 'Category', XLFont.tableHeader, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  xlCell(ws4, r, 2, 'Amount (FCFA)', XLFont.tableHeader, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  xlCell(ws4, r, 4, 'Transaction', XLFont.tableHeader, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  xlCell(ws4, r, 5, 'Balance (FCFA)', XLFont.tableHeader, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  r++;
  xlCell(ws4, r, 1, 'Total Credits', XLFont.labelSm, XLFill.mdgray, null, XLBorder.bottom);
