  xlCell(ws4, r, 2, totalCredits, XLFont.numLtGreen, XLFill.mdgray, null, XLBorder.bottom);
  xlCell(ws4, r, 4, 'Opening', XLFont.labelSm, XLFill.mdgray, null, XLBorder.bottom);
  xlCell(ws4, r, 5, openingBalance, XLFont.valueSm, XLFill.mdgray, XLAlign.right, XLBorder.bottom);
  r++;
  xlCell(ws4, r, 1, 'Total Debits', XLFont.labelSm, XLFill.white, null, XLBorder.bottom);
  xlCell(ws4, r, 2, totalDebits, XLFont.numLtRed, XLFill.white, null, XLBorder.bottom);
  txnData.forEach((t, idx) => {
    const fill = idx%2===1 ? XLFill.ltgray : XLFill.white;
    xlCell(ws4, r, 4, 'After ' + t.ref.split('-').pop(), XLFont.labelSm, fill, null, XLBorder.bottom);
    xlCell(ws4, r, 5, t.balance, XLFont.valueSm, fill, XLAlign.right, XLBorder.bottom);
    r++;
  });
  xlCell(ws4, r, 1, 'Net Flow', XLFont.sectionMed, XLFill.mdgray, null, XLBorder.medBot);
  xlCell(ws4, r, 2, netMovement, XLFont.sectionMed, XLFill.mdgray, null, XLBorder.medBot);
  r += 3;
  xlMerge(ws4, r, 1, r, 2); xlCell(ws4, r, 1, 'CATEGORY BREAKDOWN', XLFont.sectionMed, null, null, XLBorder.medBot);
  xlMerge(ws4, r, 4, r, 5); xlCell(ws4, r, 4, 'DIRECTION MIX', XLFont.sectionMed, null, null, XLBorder.medBot);
  r += 2;
  xlCell(ws4, r, 1, 'Category', XLFont.tableHeader, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  xlCell(ws4, r, 2, 'Amount (FCFA)', XLFont.tableHeader, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  xlCell(ws4, r, 4, 'Direction', XLFont.tableHeader, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  xlCell(ws4, r, 5, 'Count', XLFont.tableHeader, XLFill.navy, XLAlign.center);
  r++;
  catEntries.forEach(([cat, data], i) => {
    const fill = i%2===1 ? XLFill.ltgray : XLFill.white;
    const amt = data.credit + data.debit;
    xlCell(ws4, r, 1, cat, XLFont.labelSm, fill, null, XLBorder.bottom);
    xlCell(ws4, r, 2, amt, data.debit>data.credit?XLFont.numLtRed:XLFont.numLtGreen, fill, null, XLBorder.bottom);
    r++;
  });
  xlCell(ws4, r-catEntries.length, 4, 'Credits', XLFont.labelSm, XLFill.mdgray, null, XLBorder.bottom);
  xlCell(ws4, r-catEntries.length, 5, creditCount, XLFont.numLtGreen, XLFill.mdgray, XLAlign.center, XLBorder.bottom);
  xlCell(ws4, r-catEntries.length+1, 4, 'Debits', XLFont.labelSm, XLFill.white, null, XLBorder.bottom);
  xlCell(ws4, r-catEntries.length+1, 5, debitCount, XLFont.numLtRed, XLFill.white, XLAlign.center, XLBorder.bottom);
  r += 2;
  xlMerge(ws4, r, 1, r, 7);
  xlCell(ws4, r, 1, 'KEY INSIGHTS', XLFont.sectionMed, null, null, XLBorder.medBot);
  r += 2;
  const insights = [];
  if (netMovement > 0) insights.push('Balance increased by ' + netFlowRate + '% during the statement period.');
  if (catEntries.length > 0) { const topAmt = catEntries[0][1].credit+catEntries[0][1].debit; const topPct = totalVolume>0?((topAmt/totalVolume)*100).toFixed(1):'0.0'; insights.push(catEntries[0][0] + ' represents ' + topPct + '% of total transaction volume.'); }
  if (debitCount > 0) insights.push(debitCount + ' debit transaction(s) totaling FCFA ' + Number(totalDebits).toLocaleString('en-US') + '.');
  if (insights.length === 0) insights.push(periodTxns.length + ' transactions with net movement of ' + fcfa(netMovement) + '.');
  insights.forEach((text, i) => {
    const fill = i%2===1 ? XLFill.ltgray : XLFill.white;
    xlMerge(ws4, r, 1, r, 7);
    xlCell(ws4, r, 1, text, XLFont.valueSm, fill, XLAlign.left);
    r++;
  });
  r += 2;
  xlMerge(ws4, r, 1, r, 7);
  xlCell(ws4, r, 1, 'Analytics generated on ' + genStr + ' by ' + operator, XLFont.footerSm, null, XLAlign.center);
  r++;
  xlMerge(ws4, r, 1, r, 7);
  xlCell(ws4, r, 1, 'CONFIDENTIAL \u2014 ' + (b.bankName || 'Atlas Bank'), XLFont.confSm, null, XLAlign.center);
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws4, 'Visual_Analytics');

  downloadWorkbook(wb, 'enterprise-statement-' + a.accountNumber + '-' + from + '-to-' + to + '.xlsx');
  const docRecord = findDocumentById(STATE.lastStatementDocId);
  if (docRecord) {
    docRecord.exportCount++;
    docRecord.lastExportedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    addAuditEntry('STATEMENT_EXPORTED','Document',docRecord.documentNumber,'Statement exported for '+docRecord.customerName+'. Export count: '+docRecord.exportCount+'.');
  }
  showToast('success','Statement Exported','Enterprise Excel workbook with ' + periodTxns.length + ' transactions exported.');
}

/* ===== ENTERPRISE SALARY PAYSLIP ===== */
async function generateEnterprisePayslip() {
  const accId = parseInt($('docPayAccount').value);
  if (!accId) { showToast('error','Error','Please select a salary account.'); return; }
  const a = DB.accounts.find(x => x.id === accId);
  if (!a || a.productType !== 'SALARY') { showToast('error','Error','Selected account is not a salary account.'); return; }
  const period = $('docPayPeriod').value;
  if (!period) { showToast('error','Error','Please select a pay period.'); return; }

  // ★ ENTERPRISE FIX: Fetch fresh transactions from the server for this account + period.
  // The in-memory DB.transactions may be stale (paginated load, page refresh, etc.).
  // An enterprise payslip must ALWAYS reflect the latest database reality.
  let monthTxns = [];
  try {
    const [year, month] = period.split('-');
    const dateFrom = `${period}-01`;
    const lastDay = new Date(parseInt(year), parseInt(month), 0).getDate();
    const dateTo = `${period}-${String(lastDay).padStart(2,'0')}`;
    const resp = await API.get('transactions', {
      account: a.accountNumber,
      status: 'POSTED',
      date_from: dateFrom,
      date_to: dateTo + ' 23:59:59',
      pageSize: 5000,
      sortBy: 'created_at',
      sortOrder: 'ASC'
    });
    if (resp && resp.data) {
      monthTxns = resp.data.map(t => ({
        id: t.id, ref: t.ref, type: t.type, status: t.status, branch: t.branch || '',
        account: t.account || '', accountType: t.account_type || '', customerName: t.customer_name || '',
        description: t.description || '', category: t.category || '', direction: t.direction,
        amount: parseFloat(t.amount || 0), memo: t.memo || '', module: t.module || '',
        timestamp: t.created_at, fee: t.fee ? parseFloat(t.fee) : 0, feePct: t.fee_pct ? parseFloat(t.fee_pct) : 0,
        netAmount: t.net_amount != null ? parseFloat(t.net_amount) : null,
        feeMode: t.fee_mode || '', totalTax: t.total_tax ? parseFloat(t.total_tax) : 0
      }));
      console.log('[PAYSLIP] Fetched', monthTxns.length, 'transactions from server for', a.accountNumber, 'period', period);
    }
  } catch (err) {
    console.warn('[PAYSLIP] Server fetch failed, falling back to in-memory DB.transactions:', err);
    // Fallback to in-memory data if API call fails
    monthTxns = DB.transactions.filter(t =>
      t.account === a.accountNumber && t.status === 'POSTED' && t.timestamp && t.timestamp.slice(0,7) === period
    ).sort((x,y) => new Date(x.timestamp) - new Date(y.timestamp));
  }

  // Account-level exemptions (controlled by salary account toggle switches)
  let exemptions = a.taxExemptions || [];

  const customer = DB.customers.find(c => c.id === a.customerId);
  const branch = DB.branches.find(b => b.name === a.branch);
  const [year, month] = period.split('-');
  const payMonthName = new Date(parseInt(year), parseInt(month)-1, 1).toLocaleString('en-US',{month:'long',year:'numeric'});
  const payDate = `${year}-${month}-28`;
  const nextPayDate = new Date(parseInt(year), parseInt(month), 1);
  nextPayDate.setMonth(nextPayDate.getMonth()+1);

  // ── monthTxns is now populated from server fetch above (enterprise-grade) ──
  // Falls back to in-memory DB.transactions only if API call fails.
  // Enterprise model: In real banking, ANY credit to a salary account IS the salary deposit.
  // The category (Cash/Transfer/Cheque/Wire) describes the deposit METHOD, not the purpose.
  // Priority: Payroll Credit/Salary category > any other credit > historical credit.

  // Sum ALL credits to this account in the period — that is the gross salary
  const monthCredits = monthTxns.filter(t => t.direction === 'credit');
  const totalCreditsInPeriod = monthCredits.reduce((s, t) => s + (t.amount || 0), 0);

  // Primary: look for Payroll Credit or Salary category (explicit salary deposits)
  const payrollCredit = monthCredits.find(t => t.category === 'Payroll Credit' || t.category === 'Salary');

  // Fallback: use the total of all credits as salary (any deposit to a salary account is salary)
  // If there are explicit payroll-tagged deposits, use only those; otherwise use all credits
  const salaryCredited = payrollCredit ? payrollCredit.amount : totalCreditsInPeriod;
  const salaryTxnRef = payrollCredit ? payrollCredit.ref : (monthCredits.length > 0 ? monthCredits[monthCredits.length - 1].ref : 'N/A');
  const salaryTxnDate = payrollCredit ? payrollCredit.timestamp : (monthCredits.length > 0 ? monthCredits[monthCredits.length - 1].timestamp : null);
  const salaryPostedDate = salaryTxnDate ? new Date(salaryTxnDate).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'long',year:'numeric'}) : 'N/A';
  const hasSalaryCredit = salaryCredited > 0;

  // ── Compute deductions (controlled by account toggle switches) ──
  const cnpsEmployeeRate = getTaxSetting('tax.cnps_retraite_employee', 4.80) / 100;
  // ★ FIX (ST-010): Fallback corrected from 1.70% to 7.00% to match backend seed.
  // Previously, a missing setting would cause 75.7% under-calculation of this
  // statutory employer contribution — a Cameroon CNPS regulatory violation.
  const cnpsPrestationsRate = getTaxSetting('tax.cnps_prestations', 7.00) / 100;
  const citecEmployeeRate = getTaxSetting('tax.citec_employee', 1.00) / 100;
  const payeRate = getTaxSetting('tax.paye_rate', 7.50) / 100;
  const stampDutyRate = getTaxSetting('tax.stamp_duty_rate', 0.50) / 100;
  const unionRate = getTaxSetting('tax.union_dues_rate', 1.00) / 100;

  const payeTax = exemptions.includes('tax.paye_rate') ? 0 : Math.round(salaryCredited * payeRate);
  const employeePension = exemptions.includes('tax.cnps_retraite_employee') ? 0 : Math.round(salaryCredited * cnpsEmployeeRate);
  const cnpsPrestations = exemptions.includes('tax.cnps_prestations') ? 0 : Math.round(salaryCredited * cnpsPrestationsRate);
  const citec = exemptions.includes('tax.citec_employee') ? 0 : Math.round(salaryCredited * citecEmployeeRate);
  const stampDuty = exemptions.includes('tax.stamp_duty_rate') ? 0 : Math.round(salaryCredited * stampDutyRate);

  // Loan deductions
  const customerLoans = DB.loans.filter(l => l.customerId === a.customerId && (l.status === 'ACTIVE' || l.status === 'DELINQUENT') && l.autoDeduct !== false);
  let loanDeduction = 0;
  let loanDetails = '';
  customerLoans.forEach(l => {
    const dueInst = DB.loanSchedule.filter(s => s.loanId === l.id && (s.status === 'DUE' || s.status === 'MISSED') && s.paid < (s.principal + s.interest));
    dueInst.forEach(inst => {
      const due = inst.principal + inst.interest - inst.paid;
      if (due > 0) { loanDeduction += due; loanDetails += `<div class="ent-doc-deductions-row"><span>Loan Repayment &mdash; ${l.loanNumber} (Inst. #${inst.installment})</span><span class="eddr-value">&minus;${money(due)}</span></div>`; }
    });
  });

  const unionDues2 = exemptions.includes('tax.union_dues_rate') ? 0 : Math.round(salaryCredited * unionRate);
  const totalDeductions = payeTax + employeePension + cnpsPrestations + citec + stampDuty + loanDeduction + unionDues2;
  const netPay = salaryCredited - totalDeductions;

  const pfaName = 'Premium Pension Limited (PFA)';
  const taxCertRef = 'TCC-' + (customer?customer.customerNumber.slice(-6):'000000') + '-' + year;
  const payslipRef = generateDocumentNumber('PAY');
  const payslipDocRecord = registerDocument({
    documentNumber: payslipRef,
    type: 'PAYSLIP',
    subtype: 'SALARY_PAYSLIP',
    accountNumber: a.accountNumber,
    customerId: a.customerId,
    customerName: a.customerName,
    branch: a.branch,
    periodFrom: period + '-01',
    periodTo: period + '-28',
    operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
    generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    printCount: 0,
    lastPrintedAt: null,
    exportCount: 0,
    lastExportedAt: null,
    summary: {
      totalTransactions: monthTxns.length,
      openingBalance: a.availableBalance - monthTxns.filter(t=>t.direction==='credit').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0) + monthTxns.filter(t=>t.direction==='debit').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0),
      closingBalance: a.availableBalance,
      totalCredits: monthTxns.filter(t=>t.direction==='credit').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0),
      totalDebits: monthTxns.filter(t=>t.direction==='debit').reduce((s,t)=>s+t.amount,0),
      grossPay: salaryCredited,
      netPay: netPay,
      totalDeductions: totalDeductions,
      amount: salaryCredited,
      transactionRef: salaryTxnRef
    },
    status: 'ACTIVE'
  });
  STATE.lastPayslipDocId = payslipDocRecord.id;

  const html = `
  <div class="card" style="padding:0;overflow:hidden">
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;padding:14px 18px;background:rgba(88,183,255,.06);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)">
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="printEnterprisePayslip()"><i data-lucide="printer" style="width:14px;height:14px;stroke-width:2;vertical-align:-2px"></i> Print Payslip</button>
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="exportEnterprisePayslipCSV()"><i data-lucide="download" style="width:14px;height:14px;stroke-width:2;vertical-align:-2px"></i> Export CSV</button>
      <div style="margin-left:auto;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);align-self:center">Period: ${payMonthName}</div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:20px;max-height:70vh;overflow-y:auto">
      <div class="ent-doc" id="entPayslipDoc">
        <div class="ent-doc-header">
          <div class="edh-left">
            <div class="edh-logo">${DB.bankBranding.logo ? '<img src="'+escUrl(DB.bankBranding.logo)+'" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:14px" alt="Logo">' : DB.bankBranding.bankName.charAt(0)}</div>
            <div>
              <div class="edh-bank-name">${DB.bankBranding.bankName}</div>
              <div class="edh-bank-sub">${DB.bankBranding.headOfficeAddress}</div>
              <div class="edh-bank-sub">SWIFT: ${DB.bankBranding.swiftCode} &middot; BEAC Approval: ${DB.bankBranding.cbnLicenseNumber}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="edh-right">
            <div class="edh-doc-title">Salary Credit Payslip</div>
            <div>Ref: ${payslipRef}</div>
            <div>Period: ${payMonthName}</div>
            <div>Generated: ${dateFmt(new Date().toISOString())}</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ent-doc-body">
          <!-- Employer Information -->
          <div class="ent-doc-section">
            <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Employer Information</div>
            <div class="ent-doc-grid">
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Employer Name</div><div class="edf-value">${DB.bankBranding.bankNameShort} Limited</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Employer ID / TIN</div><div class="edf-value">${customer?customer.customerNumber:'CUST-000000'}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Employer Address</div><div class="edf-value">${DB.bankBranding.headOfficeAddress}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Industry Sector</div><div class="edf-value">Financial Services &mdash; Banking</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Employee Information -->
          <div class="ent-doc-section">
            <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Employee Information</div>
            <div class="ent-doc-grid">
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Employee Name</div><div class="edf-value">${a.customerName}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Employee / Customer ID</div><div class="edf-value">${customer?customer.customerNumber:'N/A'}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Employee TIN</div><div class="edf-value">TIN-${customer?customer.customerNumber.slice(-6):'000000'}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">CITEC Number</div><div class="edf-value">CITEC-${customer?customer.customerNumber.slice(-8):'00000000'}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Department</div><div class="edf-value">${customer&&customer.customerType==='BUSINESS'?'Corporate Services':'Operations'}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Position</div><div class="edf-value">General Staff</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Branch / Location</div><div class="edf-value">${a.branch}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Payment Method</div><div class="edf-value">Bank Credit &mdash; ${a.accountNumber}</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Salary Credit Details (actual deposit transaction) -->
          <div class="ent-doc-section">
            <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Salary Credit Details</div>
            <div class="ent-doc-grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr">
              <div class="ent-doc-field" style="background:#f0fdf4;border-color:#bbf7d0"><div class="edf-label">Gross Salary Credited</div><div class="edf-value" style="font-size:1.2rem;color:#16a34a;font-weight:800">${money(salaryCredited)}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field" style="background:#f0fdf4;border-color:#bbf7d0"><div class="edf-label">Credit Status</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:#16a34a;font-weight:700">${hasSalaryCredit?'POSTED &mdash; Confirmed':'No Deposit Found for Period'}</div></div>
            </div>
            <div class="ent-doc-grid">
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Transaction Reference</div><div class="edf-value" style="font-family:'Geist Mono',monospace;font-size:.82rem">${salaryTxnRef}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Date Posted</div><div class="edf-value">${salaryPostedDate}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Credit Period</div><div class="edf-value">${payMonthName}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Deposits This Period</div><div class="edf-value">${monthCredits.length} transaction${monthCredits.length!==1?'s':''}</div></div>
              <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Credited To Account</div><div class="edf-value" style="font-family:'Geist Mono',monospace;font-size:.82rem">${a.accountNumber}</div></div>
              ${branch?`<div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Processing Branch</div><div class="edf-value">${branch.name} (${branch.code})</div></div>`:''}
            </div>
            ${monthCredits.length > 0 ? `<div style="margin-top:8px;font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted);padding:6px 10px;background:#f7fafc;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:6px">
              <strong>Deposit${monthCredits.length!==1?'s':''} for ${payMonthName}:</strong><br>
              ${monthCredits.map(t => `${dateFmt(t.timestamp)} &mdash; ${escHtml(t.category||'Deposit')} &mdash; <strong>${money(t.amount)}</strong> FCFA (Ref: ${t.ref})`).join('<br>')}
            </div>` : ''}
          </div>

          <!-- Deductions (controlled by salary account toggle switches) -->
          <div class="ent-doc-section">
            <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Deductions</div>
            <div style="border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:4px">
              <div class="ent-doc-deductions-row" style="background:#f7fafc;font-weight:700;font-size:.76rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:#4a5568"><span style="color:#1a202c">Deduction Item</span><span style="color:#1a202c">Amount (FCFA)</span></div>
              ${payeTax > 0 ? `<div class="ent-doc-deductions-row"><span>PAYE Income Tax (${(payeRate*100).toFixed(2)}%)</span><span class="eddr-value">&minus;${money(payeTax)}</span></div>` : ''}
              ${exemptions.includes('tax.paye_rate') ? `<div class="ent-doc-deductions-row" style="background:#fffbeb"><span>PAYE Income Tax <span style="font-size:.72rem;color:#f59e0b;font-weight:700">[EXEMPT]</span></span><span style="color:#f59e0b">&minus;0</span></div>` : ''}
              ${employeePension > 0 ? `<div class="ent-doc-deductions-row"><span>CNPS Retraite &mdash; Employee (${(cnpsEmployeeRate*100).toFixed(2)}%)</span><span class="eddr-value">&minus;${money(employeePension)}</span></div>` : ''}
              ${exemptions.includes('tax.cnps_retraite_employee') ? `<div class="ent-doc-deductions-row" style="background:#fffbeb"><span>CNPS Retraite &mdash; Employee <span style="font-size:.72rem;color:#f59e0b;font-weight:700">[EXEMPT]</span></span><span style="color:#f59e0b">&minus;0</span></div>` : ''}
              ${cnpsPrestations > 0 ? `<div class="ent-doc-deductions-row"><span>CNPS Prestations Familiales (${(cnpsPrestationsRate*100).toFixed(2)}%)</span><span class="eddr-value">&minus;${money(cnpsPrestations)}</span></div>` : ''}
              ${exemptions.includes('tax.cnps_prestations') ? `<div class="ent-doc-deductions-row" style="background:#fffbeb"><span>CNPS Prestations Familiales <span style="font-size:.72rem;color:#f59e0b;font-weight:700">[EXEMPT]</span></span><span style="color:#f59e0b">&minus;0</span></div>` : ''}
              ${citec > 0 ? `<div class="ent-doc-deductions-row"><span>CITEC Logement &mdash; Employee (${(citecEmployeeRate*100).toFixed(2)}%)</span><span class="eddr-value">&minus;${money(citec)}</span></div>` : ''}
              ${exemptions.includes('tax.citec_employee') ? `<div class="ent-doc-deductions-row" style="background:#fffbeb"><span>CITEC Logement &mdash; Employee <span style="font-size:.72rem;color:#f59e0b;font-weight:700">[EXEMPT]</span></span><span style="color:#f59e0b">&minus;0</span></div>` : ''}
              ${stampDuty>0?`<div class="ent-doc-deductions-row"><span>Stamp Duty / Droit de Timbre (${(stampDutyRate*100).toFixed(2)}%)</span><span class="eddr-value">&minus;${money(stampDuty)}</span></div>`:''}
              ${exemptions.includes('tax.stamp_duty_rate') ? `<div class="ent-doc-deductions-row" style="background:#fffbeb"><span>Stamp Duty / Droit de Timbre <span style="font-size:.72rem;color:#f59e0b;font-weight:700">[EXEMPT]</span></span><span style="color:#f59e0b">&minus;0</span></div>` : ''}
              ${loanDeduction > 0 ? loanDetails : ''}
              ${unionDues2 > 0 ? `<div class="ent-doc-deductions-row"><span>Union / Syndicat Dues (${(unionRate*100).toFixed(2)}%)</span><span class="eddr-value">&minus;${money(unionDues2)}</span></div>` : ''}
              ${exemptions.includes('tax.union_dues_rate') ? `<div class="ent-doc-deductions-row" style="background:#fffbeb"><span>Union / Syndicat Dues <span style="font-size:.72rem;color:#f59e0b;font-weight:700">[EXEMPT]</span></span><span style="color:#f59e0b">&minus;0</span></div>` : ''}
              <div class="ent-doc-deductions-row" style="background:#fef2f2;font-weight:800;color:#dc2626;border-top:2px solid #dc2626"><span>Total Deductions</span><span>&minus;${money(totalDeductions)}</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Net Pay Summary -->
          <div class="ent-doc-section">
            <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Net Pay Summary</div>
            <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Salary Credited</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#16a34a">+${money(salaryCredited)}</span></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Less: Total Deductions</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#dc2626">&minus;${money(totalDeductions)}</span></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-net"><span>NET PAY</span><span>${money(netPay)}</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:8px 14px;background:#f7fafc;border-radius:6px;font-size:.82rem;color:#4a5568;margin-top:8px"><span>Credited To:</span><span style="font-weight:600">${a.accountNumber} (${a.customerName})</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:8px 14px;background:#f7fafc;border-radius:6px;font-size:.82rem;color:#4a5568"><span>Account Balance After Credit:</span><span style="font-weight:600">${money(a.availableBalance)}</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:8px 14px;background:#f7fafc;border-radius:6px;font-size:.82rem;color:#4a5568"><span>Next Expected Pay Date:</span><span style="font-weight:600">${nextPayDate.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'long',year:'numeric'})}</span></div>
          </div>

          <!-- Certification -->
          <div class="ent-doc-cert">
            <strong>Declaration:</strong> This payslip is a true and accurate record of the salary credit deposited into the above-referenced account for the period indicated. The salary credit has been verified against ${DB.bankBranding.bankNameShort}&rsquo;s core banking system records and the payroll instruction from the employer. All deductions shown are as configured on the account and may be toggled by the account administrator. This document is generated electronically by ${DB.bankBranding.bankNameShort} Enterprise Operations Console and does not require a physical signature.
          </div>

          <!-- Signatures -->
          <div class="ent-doc-signatures">
            <div class="ent-doc-sig">
              <div class="eds-line"></div>
              <div class="eds-name">${a.customerName}</div>
              <div class="eds-role">Employee Signature / Acknowledgement</div>
            </div>
            <div class="ent-doc-sig">
              <div class="eds-line"></div>
              <div class="eds-name">${STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'HR Manager'}</div>
              <div class="eds-role">Human Resources / Accounts Department</div>
            </div>
            <div class="ent-doc-sig">
              <div class="eds-line"></div>
              <div class="eds-name">Managing Director / CEO</div>
              <div class="eds-role">${DB.bankBranding.bankNameShort} Limited</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Footer -->
          <div class="ent-doc-footer">
            ${DB.bankBranding.bankNameShort} Limited &middot; Registered in Cameroon &middot; ${DB.bankBranding.registrationNumber} &middot; BEAC Approval: ${DB.bankBranding.cbnLicenseNumber}<br>
            Registered Office: ${DB.bankBranding.headOfficeAddress}<br>
            SWIFT Code: ${DB.bankBranding.swiftCode} | Tax Cert Ref: ${taxCertRef}<br><br>
            <strong>CONFIDENTIAL:</strong> This payslip contains personal financial information protected under the Loi N&deg; 2010/012 du 21 d&eacute;cembre 2010 relative &agrave; la protection des donn&eacute;es personnelles. It is intended solely for the named employee. Unauthorized disclosure, copying, or distribution is a violation of applicable law and may result in disciplinary and/or legal action. If you have received this document in error, please notify HR immediately at hr@${DB.bankBranding.website}.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>`;
  $('docPayslipPreview').innerHTML = html;
  // Store payslip data for CSV export
  STATE._lastPayslipData = { account: a, customer, branch, period, payMonthName, payDate, year, month,
    salaryCredited, salaryTxnRef, salaryPostedDate, hasSalaryCredit,
    payeTax, employeePension, cnpsPrestations, citec, stampDuty, loanDeduction, unionDues2,
    totalDeductions, netPay, exemptions,
    payeRate, cnpsEmployeeRate, cnpsPrestationsRate, citecEmployeeRate, stampDutyRate, unionRate,
    pfaName, taxCertRef, payslipRef };
  renderDocSummaryBar();
  renderDocumentHistory();
  refreshIcons($('docPayslipPreview'));
  showToast('success','Payslip Generated',`Enterprise payslip for ${a.customerName} &mdash; ${payMonthName}.`);
  addAuditEntry('PAYSLIP_GENERATED','Account',a.accountNumber,`Enterprise payslip generated for ${a.customerName}. Period: ${payMonthName}. Salary Credited: ${money(salaryCredited)}. Net Pay: ${money(netPay)}.`);
}

function printEnterprisePayslip() {
  const doc = $('entPayslipDoc');
  if (!doc) { showToast('error','Error','No payslip to print. Generate one first.'); return; }
  const docRecord = findDocumentById(STATE.lastPayslipDocId);
  if (docRecord) {
    docRecord.printCount++;
    docRecord.lastPrintedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    addAuditEntry('PAYSLIP_PRINTED','Document',docRecord.documentNumber,`Payslip printed for ${docRecord.customerName}. Print count: ${docRecord.printCount}.`);
  }
  $$('[id$="PrintArea"]').forEach(el => { el.innerHTML = ''; el.classList.remove('printing'); el.style.display = 'none'; });
  $('documentPrintArea').innerHTML = doc.outerHTML;
  $('documentPrintArea').style.display = 'block';
  $('documentPrintArea').classList.add('printing');
  setTimeout(() => {
    window.print();
    $$('[id$="PrintArea"]').forEach(el => { el.classList.remove('printing'); el.style.display = 'none'; });
  }, 300);
}

function exportEnterprisePayslipCSV() {
  const d = STATE._lastPayslipData;
  if (!d) { showToast('error','Error','No payslip data to export. Generate a payslip first.'); return; }
  const a = d.account;
  const c = d.customer;
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('Enterprise Salary Credit Payslip', [
    ['Employee', a.customerName],['Account Number', a.accountNumber],['Branch', a.branch],
    ['Period', d.payMonthName],['Pay Date', new Date(d.payDate).toLocaleDateString('en-GB')],
    ['Employee ID', c?c.customerNumber:'N/A'],['TIN', 'TIN-'+(c?c.customerNumber.slice(-6):'000000')],
    ['Payslip Reference', d.payslipRef],['Salary Txn Reference', d.salaryTxnRef]
  ]);
  let content = meta;
  content += csvSection('Salary Credit') + 'Item,Amount (FCFA)\n';
  content += `Salary Credited,${csvNum(d.salaryCredited)}\n`;
  content += `Transaction Reference,${d.salaryTxnRef}\n`;
  content += `Date Posted,${d.salaryPostedDate}\n`;
  content += csvSection('Deductions') + 'Item,Rate,Amount (FCFA)\n';
  content += `PAYE Income Tax,${(d.payeRate*100).toFixed(2)}%,${csvNum(d.payeTax)}\n`;
  content += `CNPS Retraite Employee,${(d.cnpsEmployeeRate*100).toFixed(2)}%,${csvNum(d.employeePension)}\n`;
  content += `CNPS Prestations,${(d.cnpsPrestationsRate*100).toFixed(2)}%,${csvNum(d.cnpsPrestations)}\n`;
  content += `CITEC Employee,${(d.citecEmployeeRate*100).toFixed(2)}%,${csvNum(d.citec)}\n`;
  content += `Stamp Duty,${(d.stampDutyRate*100).toFixed(2)}%,${csvNum(d.stampDuty)}\n`;
  content += `Union Dues,${(d.unionRate*100).toFixed(2)}%,${csvNum(d.unionDues2)}\n`;
  if (d.loanDeduction > 0) content += `Loan Deductions,N/A,${csvNum(d.loanDeduction)}\n`;
  content += `Total Deductions,,${csvNum(d.totalDeductions)}\n`;
  content += csvSection('Pay Summary') + 'Item,Amount (FCFA)\n';
  content += `Salary Credited,${csvNum(d.salaryCredited)}\nTotal Deductions,${csvNum(d.totalDeductions)}\nNet Pay,${csvNum(d.netPay)}\n`;
  content += csvFooter(1, [{label:'Net Pay (FCFA)',value:csvNum(d.netPay)},{label:'Salary Credited (FCFA)',value:csvNum(d.salaryCredited)}]);
  downloadCSV(content, `enterprise-payslip-${a.accountNumber}-${d.period}.csv`);
  const docRecord = findDocumentById(STATE.lastPayslipDocId);
  if (docRecord) {
    docRecord.exportCount = (docRecord.exportCount || 0) + 1;
    docRecord.lastExportedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    addAuditEntry('PAYSLIP_EXPORTED','Document',docRecord.documentNumber,`Payslip exported for ${docRecord.customerName}. Export count: ${docRecord.exportCount}.`);
  }
  showToast('success','Payslip Exported',`Enterprise payslip CSV for ${a.customerName} &mdash; ${d.payMonthName}.`);
}

/* ================================================================
   ENTERPRISE LOADING SCREEN CONTROLLER
   Stage-aware loader with progress indication and smooth transitions.
   Reads cached branding from localStorage for instant display on refresh.
   ================================================================ */
const Loader = {
  _el: null, _bar: null, _stage: null, _connDot: null, _connLabel: null,
  _brandMark: null, _brandName: null,
  get el()   { return this._el   || (this._el   = $('atlasLoader')); },
  get bar()  { return this._bar  || (this._bar  = $('loaderBar')); },
  get stage(){ return this._stage|| (this._stage = $('loaderStage')); },
  get dot()  { return this._dot  || (this._dot  = $('loaderConnDot')); },
  get label(){ return this._label|| (this._label= $('loaderConnLabel')); },
  get mark() { return this._mark || (this._mark = document.querySelector('.loader-brand-mark')); },
  get name() { return this._name || (this._name = document.querySelector('.loader-text h1')); },

  /** Apply branding to the loader: logo image or initial letter + bank name */
  applyBranding(b) {
    if (!b) return;
    // Update brand mark — logo image or first letter
    if (this.mark) {
      if (b.logo) {
        this.mark.innerHTML = '<img src="'+b.logo+'" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:16px" alt="Logo">';
      } else {
        this.mark.textContent = (b.bankName || 'A').charAt(0);
      }
    }
    // Update bank name
    if (this.name) {
      this.name.textContent = (b.bankNameShort || b.bankName || 'Atlas Bank') + ' Enterprise';
    }
    // Update gradient colors if custom
    if (b.primaryColor) {
      const mark = this.mark;
      if (mark && !b.logo) {
        mark.style.background = 'linear-gradient(135deg,' + b.primaryColor + ',' + (b.accentColor || '#67e8b5') + ')';
      }
      // Update ring colors
      document.querySelectorAll('.loader-ring').forEach((r, i) => {
        r.style.borderTopColor = i === 0 ? b.primaryColor : (i === 1 ? (b.accentColor || '#67e8b5') : '#ffbe69');
      });
    }
  },

  /** Try to load cached branding from localStorage for instant display */
  applyCachedBranding() {
    try {
      const cached = localStorage.getItem('atlas_branding');
      if (cached) this.applyBranding(JSON.parse(cached));
    } catch(e) {}
  },

  /** Save branding to localStorage for instant loader display on next refresh */
  cacheBranding(b) {
    try {
      localStorage.setItem('atlas_branding', JSON.stringify({
        bankName: b.bankName, bankNameShort: b.bankNameShort,
        logo: b.logo, primaryColor: b.primaryColor, accentColor: b.accentColor
      }));
    } catch(e) {}
  },

  /** Update stage text with a fade transition */
  setStage(text) {
    if (!this.stage) return;
    this.stage.classList.add('changing');
    setTimeout(() => {
      if (this.stage) this.stage.textContent = text;
      if (this.stage) this.stage.classList.remove('changing');
    }, 250);
  },

  /** Switch from indeterminate sweep to determinate progress */
  setProgress(pct) {
    if (!this.bar) return;
    this.bar.classList.remove('indeterminate');
    this.bar.style.width = pct + '%';
  },

  /** Mark connection as established */
  setConnected() {
    if (this.dot) { this.dot.classList.remove('active'); this.dot.classList.add('secure'); }
    if (this.label) this.label.textContent = 'Connected';
  },

  /** Dismiss the loader with a smooth crossfade */
  dismiss() {
    if (!this.el) return;
    this.setProgress(100);
    setTimeout(() => { this.el.classList.add('done'); }, 200);
    // Clean up DOM after transition completes
    setTimeout(() => { if (this.el && this.el.parentNode) this.el.parentNode.removeChild(this.el); }, 900);
  }
};

// ★ Apply cached branding to loader IMMEDIATELY — before any async calls.
// This runs synchronously when the script loads, so the user sees their
// bank's logo/name from the very first frame on page refresh.
Loader.applyCachedBranding();

/* ================================================================
   SESSION RESTORE — Auto-login on page refresh if token exists
   ================================================================ */
(async function restoreSession() {
  const savedToken = localStorage.getItem('atlas_token');
  Loader.setStage('Checking session state');
  if (!savedToken) {
    // No token — dismiss loader and show login screen
    Loader.setStage('Ready');
    setTimeout(() => {
      Loader.dismiss();
      $('loginScreen').style.display = 'flex';
    }, 400);
    return;
  }
  authToken = savedToken;
  API_CONNECTED = true;
  Loader.setStage('Validating credentials');
  try {
    const res = await API.get('auth');
    if (res && res.data) {
      Loader.setConnected();
      Loader.setProgress(30);
      csrfToken = res.data.csrf_token || '';
      const u = res.data;
      const apiUser = {
        id: u.staff_id, username: u.username, fullName: u.full_name,
        initials: u.initials, role: u.role, department: u.department,
        email: u.email, phone: u.phone, position: u.position,
        branches: u.branches, modules: u.modules,
        approvalLimit: u.approval_limit, mfaRequired: !!u.mfa_required,
        employmentStatus: 'ACTIVE', profilePicture: u.profile_picture || ''
      };
      // If MFA not yet verified, show MFA modal instead of completing login
      if (u.mfa_required && !u.mfa_verified) {
        Loader.setStage('Multi-factor verification required');
        STATE.currentUser = apiUser;
        STATE._pendingMfa = true;
        setTimeout(() => {
          Loader.dismiss();
          $('loginScreen').style.display = 'none';
          openModal('mfaModal');
          setTimeout(() => $('mfaCode')?.focus(), 150);
        }, 400);
        return;
      }
      // Check force_password_change on session restore
      if (u.requires_password_change) {
        Loader.setStage('Security policy — password update required');
        STATE._forcePasswordChange = true;
        STATE._passwordChangeModalShown = true;
        STATE._restoring = true;
        completeLogin(apiUser);
        STATE._restoring = false;
        setTimeout(() => {
          openProfileModal('security');
          showToast('warning', 'Password Change Required', 'Your administrator requires you to change your password. Please update it now.');
        }, 500);
        return;
      }
      Loader.setStage('Loading enterprise data');
      STATE._restoring = true;
      completeLogin(apiUser);
      STATE._restoring = false;
    } else {
      // Token invalid or expired — clear it and show login
      Loader.setStage('Session expired');
      authToken = '';
      csrfToken = '';
      localStorage.removeItem('atlas_token');
      try { localStorage.removeItem('atlas_branch'); localStorage.removeItem('atlas_view'); } catch(e) {}
      setTimeout(() => {
        Loader.dismiss();
        $('loginScreen').style.display = 'flex';
      }, 400);
    }
  } catch (e) {
    // API unreachable — fall back, show login
    Loader.setStage('Unable to reach server');
    authToken = '';
    setTimeout(() => {
      Loader.dismiss();
      $('loginScreen').style.display = 'flex';
    }, 400);
  }
})();

/* ================================================================
   ENTERPRISE FINANCIAL REPORT CENTER — RENDER FUNCTIONS
   Balance Sheet, Cash Flow, Financial Ratios, Report Center
   XLSX Exports for all financial views
   ================================================================ */

/* ----- REPORT CENTER: Live KPI Launcher ----- */
function renderReportCenter() {
  const glBal = getGLBalances();
  // ★ FIXED: Use server data (STATE.plServerData) for P&L metrics instead of
  // stale local DB.profitLedger. Falls back to local cache if server data not yet loaded.
  const serverSummary = STATE.plServerData?.summary?.summary;
  const totalRevenue = (serverSummary?.total_income !== undefined && serverSummary?.total_income !== null)
    ? serverSummary.total_income
    : filterByUserBranch(DB.profitLedger).reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0);
  const totalExpenses = (serverSummary?.total_expenses !== undefined && serverSummary?.total_expenses !== null)
    ? serverSummary.total_expenses
    : filterByUserBranch(DB.expenses).filter(e=>e.status==='APPROVED').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amount,0);
  const netProfit = totalRevenue - totalExpenses;
  const incomeEntries = serverSummary?.income_entries || filterByUserBranch(DB.profitLedger).length;
  const opBal = isAllBranchesMode() ? DB.operatingAccount.balance : filterByUserBranch(DB.operatingAccount.transactions||[]).reduce((s,t)=>s+(t.type==='CREDIT'?Number(t.amount||0):-Number(t.amount||0)),0);
  const totalAssets = DB.chartOfAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='ASSET').reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBal[a.code]||0),0);
  const totalLiabilities = DB.chartOfAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='LIABILITY').reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBal[a.code]||0),0);
  const totalDeposits = filterByUserBranch(DB.accounts).filter(a=>a.status==='ACTIVE').reduce((s,a)=>s+a.ledgerBalance,0);
  $('reportCenterKpis').innerHTML = [
    {label:'Net Profit',value:money(netProfit),sub:`Margin: ${totalRevenue>0?((netProfit/totalRevenue)*100).toFixed(1):'0.0'}%`,color:netProfit>=0?'var(--accent)':'var(--danger)',icon:'coins'},
    {label:'Total Revenue',value:money(totalRevenue),sub:`${incomeEntries} entries`,color:'var(--accent)',icon:'trending-up'},
    {label:'Total Deposits',value:money(totalDeposits),sub:`${filterByUserBranch(DB.accounts).filter(a=>a.status==='ACTIVE').length} active accounts`,color:'var(--primary)',icon:'landmark'},
    {label:'Operating Fund',value:money(opBal),sub:DB.operatingAccount.accountNumber,color:'#C9A962',icon:'building-2'}
  ].map(k=>`<div class="kpi-card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:start"><span class="kpi-label">${k.label}</span>${IC(k.icon, 22)}</div><div class="kpi-value" style="color:${k.color}">${k.value}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${k.sub}</div></div>`).join('');
}

/* ----- BALANCE SHEET ----- */
function renderBalanceSheet() {
  // ★ FIX (GLA-002): Apply the branch filter from the dropdown.
  // Previously $('bsBranch') was ignored — the balance sheet always showed
  // filterByUserBranch() data regardless of the user's branch selection.
  // Populate branch filter dynamically from DB (same pattern as Cash Flow and Ratios)
  if($('bsBranch') && $('bsBranch').children.length <= 1) {
    (DB.branches||[]).forEach(b=>{const o=document.createElement('option');o.value=b.name;o.textContent=b.name;$('bsBranch').appendChild(o);});
  }
  const bsBranch = $('bsBranch')?.value || '';
  // ★ FIX (BS-001): Pass the as-at date to getGLBalances() so GL entries are filtered.
  // Previously bsDateTo was only used for the display label — balances were always current.
  const bsDateTo = $('bsDateTo')?.value || '';
  const glBal = getGLBalances(null, bsBranch, bsDateTo);
  const coa = DB.chartOfAccounts;
  const asAtDate = bsDateTo ? new Date(bsDateTo+'T23:59:59').toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}) : new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'});

  const assetAccounts = coa.filter(a=>a.type==='ASSET' && a.isActive!==false).map(a=>({...a,balance:glBal[a.code]||0}));
  const liabilityAccounts = coa.filter(a=>a.type==='LIABILITY' && a.isActive!==false).map(a=>({...a,balance:glBal[a.code]||0}));
  const equityAccounts = coa.filter(a=>a.type==='EQUITY' && a.isActive!==false).map(a=>({...a,balance:glBal[a.code]||0}));
  const totalAssets = assetAccounts.reduce((s,a)=>s+a.balance,0);
  const totalLiabilities = liabilityAccounts.reduce((s,a)=>s+a.balance,0);
  const totalEquity = equityAccounts.reduce((s,a)=>s+a.balance,0);
  const totalLE = totalLiabilities + totalEquity;
  const balanced = Math.abs(totalAssets - totalLE) < 1;
  // ★ FIX (GLA-009): Add Net Income KPI so users can see what feeds Retained Earnings.
  const totalIncome = coa.filter(a=>a.type==='INCOME' && a.isActive!==false).reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBal[a.code]||0),0);
  const totalExpense = coa.filter(a=>a.type==='EXPENSE' && a.isActive!==false).reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBal[a.code]||0),0);
  const netIncome = totalIncome - totalExpense;

  // KPIs
  $('bsKpis').innerHTML = [
    {label:'Total Assets',value:money(totalAssets),sub:`${assetAccounts.length} accounts`,color:'var(--primary)',icon:'bar-chart-3'},
    {label:'Total Liabilities',value:money(totalLiabilities),sub:`${liabilityAccounts.length} accounts`,color:'var(--danger)',icon:'trending-down'},
    {label:'Net Income',value:money(netIncome),sub:`Rev: ${money(totalIncome)} / Exp: ${money(totalExpense)}`,color:netIncome>=0?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)',icon:netIncome>=0?'trending-up':'trending-down'},
    {label:'Balance Check',value:balanced?'BALANCED':'OUT OF BALANCE',sub:`Variance: FCFA ${Math.abs(totalAssets-totalLE).toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:2})}`,color:balanced?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)',icon:balanced?IC('check-circle', 14):IC('alert-triangle', 14)}
  ].map(k=>`<div class="kpi-card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:start"><span class="kpi-label">${k.label}</span>${IC(k.icon, 22)}</div><div class="kpi-value" style="color:${k.color};font-size:${k.label==='Balance Check'?'.95rem':'inherit'}">${k.value}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${k.sub}</div></div>`).join('');

  const bsRow = (code,name,amt,pct) => `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:8px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);font-size:.86rem"><span style="color:var(--text2);min-width:60px;font-family:monospace;font-size:.78rem">${code}</span><span style="flex:1">${name}</span><span style="font-weight:700;color:${amt>=0?'var(--text)':'var(--danger)'}">${money(amt)}</span><span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.78rem;min-width:55px;text-align:right">${pct}%</span></div>`;

  const absTotal = Math.abs(totalAssets) || 1;
  $('bsAssets').innerHTML = assetAccounts.map(a=>bsRow(a.code,a.name,a.balance,((a.balance/absTotal)*100).toFixed(1))).join('') +
    `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 14px;font-weight:800;font-size:.92rem;color:var(--primary);border-top:2px solid var(--primary)"><span>TOTAL ASSETS</span><span>${money(totalAssets)}</span><span>100.0%</span></div>`;

  $('bsLiabilities').innerHTML =
    liabilityAccounts.map(a=>bsRow(a.code,a.name,a.balance,((a.balance/absTotal)*100).toFixed(1))).join('') +
    `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 14px;font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;color:var(--danger);border-top:1px solid var(--line)"><span>TOTAL LIABILITIES</span><span>${money(totalLiabilities)}</span><span>${((totalLiabilities/absTotal)*100).toFixed(1)}%</span></div>` +
    equityAccounts.map(a=>bsRow(a.code,a.name,a.balance,((a.balance/absTotal)*100).toFixed(1))).join('') +
    `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 14px;font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;color:var(--accent);border-top:1px solid var(--line)"><span>TOTAL EQUITY</span><span>${money(totalEquity)}</span><span>${((totalEquity/absTotal)*100).toFixed(1)}%</span></div>` +
    `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 14px;font-weight:800;font-size:.92rem;color:var(--danger);border-top:2px solid var(--danger)"><span>TOTAL LIABILITIES + EQUITY</span><span>${money(totalLE)}</span><span>100.0%</span></div>`;

  // Full table
  const allAccounts = [...assetAccounts,...liabilityAccounts,...equityAccounts];
  $('bsFullTableBody').innerHTML = allAccounts.map(a=>`<tr>
    <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600">${a.code}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.86rem">${a.name}</td>
    <td><span class="pill ${a.type==='ASSET'?'pill-current':a.type==='LIABILITY'?'pill-delinquency':'pill-salary'}" style="font-size:.72rem">${a.type}</span></td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${a.category||''}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;color:${(a.balance||0)>=0?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${money(a.balance)}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem">${absTotal>0?((a.balance/absTotal)*100).toFixed(1):'0.0'}%</td>
  </tr>`).join('');
}

function exportBalanceSheetCSV() {
  renderBalanceSheet();
  // ★ FIX (BS-004): Pass bsDateTo to getGLBalances so export uses date-filtered data
  const bsDateTo = $('bsDateTo')?.value || '';
  const glBal = getGLBalances(null, $('bsBranch')?.value || '', bsDateTo);
  const coa = DB.chartOfAccounts;
  const asAtLabel = bsDateTo ? new Date(bsDateTo+'T23:59:59').toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}) : new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB');
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('Balance Sheet', [['As At', asAtLabel], ['Branch', $('bsBranch')?.value || 'All Branches']]);
  const header = 'GL Code,Account Name,Type,Category,Net Balance (FCFA),% of Total\n';
  const allAccounts = coa.filter(a=>a.isActive!==false).map(a=>({...a,balance:glBal[a.code]||0}));
  // ★ FIX (GLA-008): Use totalAssets as the percentage base (same as display),
  // not sum of Math.abs(all balances) which produced inconsistent percentages.
  const totalAssets = allAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='ASSET').reduce((s,a)=>s+a.balance,0);
  const absTotal = Math.abs(totalAssets) || 1;
  // ★ FIX (BS-012): Use raw a.balance (not Math.abs) for percentage in CSV —
  // consistent with the display which also uses raw a.balance.
  const rows = allAccounts.map(a=>`${csv(a.code)},${csv(a.name)},${csv(a.type)},${csv(a.category||'')},${csvNum(a.balance)},${(a.balance/absTotal*100).toFixed(1)}%`).join('\n');
  const totalLiab = allAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='LIABILITY').reduce((s,a)=>s+a.balance,0);
  const totalEquity = allAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='EQUITY').reduce((s,a)=>s+a.balance,0);
  const footer = csvFooter(allAccounts.length, [
    {label:'Total Assets (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalAssets)},
    {label:'Total Liabilities (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalLiab)},
    {label:'Total Equity (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalEquity)},
    {label:'Balance Check',value:Math.abs(totalAssets-(totalLiab+totalEquity))<1?'BALANCED':'OUT OF BALANCE'}
  ]);
  downloadCSV(meta + header + rows + footer, 'atlas-balance-sheet.csv');
  showToast('success','Export Complete','Balance sheet exported as CSV.');
}

function exportBalanceSheetXLSX() {
  renderBalanceSheet();
  // ★ FIX (BS-004): Pass bsDateTo to getGLBalances so XLSX export uses date-filtered data
  const bsDateTo = $('bsDateTo')?.value || '';
  const glBal = getGLBalances(null, $('bsBranch')?.value || '', bsDateTo);
  const coa = DB.chartOfAccounts;
  const b = DB.bankBranding||{};
  const allAccounts = coa.filter(a=>a.isActive!==false).map(a=>({...a,balance:glBal[a.code]||0}));
  const totalAssets = allAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='ASSET').reduce((s,a)=>s+a.balance,0);
  const totalLiab = allAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='LIABILITY').reduce((s,a)=>s+a.balance,0);
  const totalEquity = allAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='EQUITY').reduce((s,a)=>s+a.balance,0);

  const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
  const ws = xlMakeSheet(50,7);
  let r = 0;
  xlNavyTitle(ws,r,7,(b.bankName||'Atlas Bank').toUpperCase()+' — BALANCE SHEET'); r+=2;
  r = xlDualInfoGrid(ws,r,0,1,4,5,[['As At',new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB')],['Currency','XAF (FCFA)']],[['Classification','CONFIDENTIAL'],['Generated By',STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System']]); r+=3;
  xlSectionTitle(ws,r,4,'ASSETS'); r++;
  xlTableHeader(ws,r,['GL Code','Account Name','Category','Balance (FCFA)']); r++;
  allAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='ASSET').forEach(a=>{ xlDataRow(ws,r,[a.code,a.name,a.category||'',a.balance],r%2===0?XLFill.ltgray:undefined); r++; });
  xlDataRow(ws,r,['','TOTAL ASSETS','',totalAssets],undefined,true); r+=2;
  xlSectionTitle(ws,r,4,'LIABILITIES'); r++;
  xlTableHeader(ws,r,['GL Code','Account Name','Category','Balance (FCFA)']); r++;
  allAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='LIABILITY').forEach(a=>{ xlDataRow(ws,r,[a.code,a.name,a.category||'',a.balance],r%2===0?XLFill.ltgray:undefined); r++; });
  xlDataRow(ws,r,['','TOTAL LIABILITIES','',totalLiab],undefined,true); r+=2;
  xlSectionTitle(ws,r,4,'EQUITY'); r++;
  xlTableHeader(ws,r,['GL Code','Account Name','Category','Balance (FCFA)']); r++;
  allAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='EQUITY').forEach(a=>{ xlDataRow(ws,r,[a.code,a.name,a.category||'',a.balance],r%2===0?XLFill.ltgray:undefined); r++; });
  xlDataRow(ws,r,['','TOTAL EQUITY','',totalEquity],undefined,true); r+=2;
  xlDataRow(ws,r,['','TOTAL LIABILITIES + EQUITY','',totalLiab+totalEquity],undefined,true); r++;
  xlDataRow(ws,r,['','BALANCE CHECK','',Math.abs(totalAssets-(totalLiab+totalEquity))<1?'BALANCED':'OUT OF BALANCE'],undefined,true);
  xlSetWidths(ws,[14,32,20,20,20,16,16]);
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb,ws,'Balance Sheet');
  downloadWorkbook(wb,'atlas-balance-sheet.xlsx');
  showToast('success','Export Complete','Balance sheet exported as XLSX.');
}

function printBalanceSheet() {
  renderBalanceSheet();
  // ★ FIX (BS-003): Pass bsDateTo to getGLBalances so print uses date-filtered data.
  // Also use bsDateTo for the asAtDate display instead of always showing today.
  const bsDateTo = $('bsDateTo')?.value || '';
  const glBal = getGLBalances(null, $('bsBranch')?.value || '', bsDateTo);
  const coa = DB.chartOfAccounts;
  const b = DB.bankBranding||{};
  const allAccounts = coa.filter(a=>a.isActive!==false).map(a=>({...a,balance:glBal[a.code]||0}));
  const assetAccounts = allAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='ASSET');
  const liabAccounts = allAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='LIABILITY');
  const equityAccounts = allAccounts.filter(a=>a.type==='EQUITY');
  const totalAssets = assetAccounts.reduce((s,a)=>s+a.balance,0);
  const totalLiab = liabAccounts.reduce((s,a)=>s+a.balance,0);
  const totalEquity = equityAccounts.reduce((s,a)=>s+a.balance,0);
  const totalLiabEquity = totalLiab + totalEquity;
  const variance = totalAssets - totalLiabEquity;
  const isBalanced = Math.abs(variance) < 1;
  const branch = $('bsBranch')?.value || (isAllBranchesMode() ? 'All Branches' : STATE.currentBranch);
  const stmtRef = generateDocumentNumber('BS');
  const stmtDate = dateFmt(new Date().toISOString());
  const asAtDate = bsDateTo ? new Date(bsDateTo+'T23:59:59').toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}) : new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'});

  // Register document for audit trail
  registerDocument({
    documentNumber: stmtRef, type: 'REPORT', subtype: 'BALANCE_SHEET',
    accountNumber: '', customerId: 0, customerName: '',
    branch: branch, periodFrom: null, periodTo: null,
    operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
    generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    printCount: 1, lastPrintedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    exportCount: 0, lastExportedAt: null,
    summary: { totalTransactions: allAccounts.length, openingBalance:0, closingBalance: totalAssets, totalCredits: totalLiabEquity, totalDebits: totalAssets, grossPay:0, netPay:0, totalDeductions:0, amount:0, transactionRef:'' },
    status: 'ACTIVE'
  });

  const renderBSRow = (a, typeColor) => `<tr>
    <td class="edt-mono">${a.code}</td>
    <td>${a.name}</td>
    <td style="text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:${a.balance>=0?typeColor:'#dc2626'}">${money(a.balance)}</td>
  </tr>`;

  const renderBSSection = (title, accounts, typeColor, accent) => {
    const total = accounts.reduce((s,a)=>s+a.balance,0);
    return `
    <div class="ent-doc-section">
      <div class="ent-doc-section-title" style="border-left:3px solid ${accent};padding-left:10px">${title}</div>
      <table class="ent-doc-table">
        <thead><tr><th>GL Code</th><th>Account Name</th><th style="text-align:right">Balance (FCFA)</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          ${accounts.length > 0 ? accounts.map(a=>renderBSRow(a,typeColor)).join('') : `<tr><td colspan="3" style="text-align:center;color:#718096;padding:12px">No active accounts in this category</td></tr>`}
        </tbody>
        <tfoot>
          <tr style="font-weight:800;background:#f8fafc">
            <td colspan="2" style="font-weight:800">Total ${title}</td>
            <td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:800">${money(total)}</td>
          </tr>
        </tfoot>
      </table>
    </div>`;
  };

  const html = `
    <div class="ent-doc">
      <!-- Enterprise Header -->
      <div class="ent-doc-header">
        <div class="edh-left">
          <div class="edh-logo">${b.logo ? '<img src="'+escUrl(b.logo)+'" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:14px" alt="Logo">' : (b.bankName||'A').charAt(0)}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="edh-bank-name">${b.bankName||'Atlas Bank'}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">${b.headOfficeAddress||''}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">SWIFT: ${b.swiftCode||'N/A'} · BEAC Approval: ${b.cbnLicenseNumber||'N/A'}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="edh-right">
          <div class="edh-doc-title">Balance Sheet</div>
          <div>Report Ref: ${stmtRef}</div>
          <div>As at: ${asAtDate}</div>
          <div>Generated: ${stmtDate}</div>
          <div>Operator: ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System'}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ent-doc-body">
        <!-- Report Metadata -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Report Information</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Branch</div><div class="edf-value">${branch}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">As at Date</div><div class="edf-value">${asAtDate}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Currency</div><div class="edf-value">XAF (FCFA)</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total GL Accounts</div><div class="edf-value">${allAccounts.length}</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Summary KPIs -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Financial Position Summary</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Assets</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:#1a365d">${money(totalAssets)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Liabilities</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:#92400e">${money(totalLiab)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Equity</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:#065f46">${money(totalEquity)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Liabilities + Equity</div><div class="edf-value" style="font-weight:800">${money(totalLiabEquity)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Balance Check</div><div class="edf-value" style="color:${isBalanced?'#16a34a':'#dc2626'};font-weight:800">${isBalanced?'BALANCED':'Variance: '+money(variance)}</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- ASSETS -->
        ${renderBSSection('ASSETS', assetAccounts, '#1e40af', '#1a365d')}

        <!-- LIABILITIES -->
        ${renderBSSection('LIABILITIES', liabAccounts, '#92400e', '#b45309')}

        <!-- EQUITY -->
        ${renderBSSection('EQUITY', equityAccounts, '#065f46', '#047857')}

        <!-- Grand Total -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-grand"><span>Total Assets</span><span>${money(totalAssets)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grand"><span>Total Liabilities + Equity</span><span>${money(totalLiabEquity)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-net" style="background:${isBalanced?'#f0fdf4':'#fef2f2'};border-color:${isBalanced?'#16a34a':'#dc2626'};color:${isBalanced?'#16a34a':'#dc2626'}">
            <span>Balance Verification</span><span>${isBalanced?'BALANCED — Accounting Equation Verified':'OUT OF BALANCE — Variance: '+money(variance)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Certification -->
        <div class="ent-doc-cert">
          <strong>Certification:</strong> This balance sheet has been prepared from the general ledger of ${b.bankName||'Atlas Bank'} and presents a true and fair view of the financial position as at ${asAtDate}. The accounting equation (Assets = Liabilities + Equity) has been verified. This document is generated electronically and does not require a physical signature. Any discrepancy should be reported to the finance department within 7 business days.
        </div>

        <!-- Signatures -->
        <div class="ent-doc-signatures">
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">${STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'Authorized Officer'}</div>
            <div class="eds-role">Prepared By / Branch Operations</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">${branch}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">Chief Financial Officer</div>
            <div class="eds-role">Finance Department</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">Authorized Signatory</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Footer -->
        <div class="ent-doc-footer">
          ${b.bankNameShort||'Atlas Bank'} Limited · Registered in Cameroon · ${b.registrationNumber||'N/A'} · BEAC Approval: ${b.cbnLicenseNumber||'N/A'}<br>
          Registered Office: ${b.headOfficeAddress||'N/A'}<br>
          SWIFT Code: ${b.swiftCode||'N/A'} · Tel: ${b.phone||'N/A'} · Email: ${b.email||'N/A'}<br><br>
          <strong>CONFIDENTIAL:</strong> This document contains privileged financial information intended solely for authorized personnel. Unauthorized use, disclosure, copying, or distribution is strictly prohibited.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;

  printIsolated(html);
  addAuditEntry('BALANCE_SHEET_PRINTED','Report',stmtRef,`Balance sheet printed. Branch: ${branch}. Assets: ${money(totalAssets)}. Liabilities: ${money(totalLiab)}. Equity: ${money(totalEquity)}. Balanced: ${isBalanced?'Yes':'No'}.`);
}

/* ----- CASH FLOW STATEMENT ----- */
/* Shared data pipeline — ensures display, print, XLSX, CSV all use identical data */
function getFilteredCashFlowData() {
  const dateFrom = $('cfDateFrom')?.value || '';
  const dateTo = $('cfDateTo')?.value || '';
  const branch = $('cfBranch')?.value || '';
  // Branch-filtered base data
  const br = (items) => branch ? items.filter(i=>(i.branch||'')===branch||(i.actorBranch||'')===branch) : items;
  const allProfit = br(filterByUserBranch(DB.profitLedger));
  const allExpenses = br(filterByUserBranch(DB.expenses).filter(e=>e.status==='APPROVED'));
  const allOpTxns = br(filterByUserBranch(DB.operatingAccount.transactions||[]));
  // ★ FIX (CF-004): Include ALL loans that were disbursed (any status) — a loan
  // disbursement is a cash outflow regardless of whether the loan is now PAID,
  // CLOSED, WRITTEN_OFF, or DEFAULTED. Previously only DISBURSED/ACTIVE were
  // included, causing investing outflow to be understated for historical periods.
  const allLoans = br(filterByUserBranch(DB.loans).filter(l=>l.disbursedAt));
  // Date-filtered subsets
  const opIncome = allProfit.filter(e=>(!dateFrom||e.date>=dateFrom)&&(!dateTo||e.date<=dateTo));
  const opExpense = allExpenses.filter(e=>(!dateFrom||e.date>=dateFrom)&&(!dateTo||e.date<=dateTo));
  const opFundTxns = allOpTxns.filter(t=>{
    const td = (t.date||t.timestamp||'').slice(0,10);
    return (!dateFrom||td>=dateFrom)&&(!dateTo||td<=dateTo);
  });
  // Computed totals
  // ★ FIX (CF-001): Use feeAmount (the actual fee/interest income) for operating
  // inflow. Previously used `grossAmount > feeAmount ? grossAmount : feeAmount`
  // which selected grossAmount for LOAN_INTEREST entries where grossAmount =
  // totalPayment (principal + interest). This double-counted the principal — it
  // appeared both in operating (via grossAmount) AND investing (via loanRepayments).
  // Per IAS 7, interest received = operating cash inflow = feeAmount only.
  // Fallback to grossAmount when feeAmount is 0 (e.g. penalty-only entries).
  const operatingInflow = opIncome.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.feeAmount||e.grossAmount||0),0);
  const operatingOutflow = opExpense.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amount,0);
  const netOperating = operatingInflow - operatingOutflow;
  // ★ FIX (DASH-004): Filter loan disbursements by selected date range
  const disbursedLoans = allLoans.filter(l => {
    const dd = (l.disbursedAt||'').slice(0,10);
    return (!dateFrom || dd >= dateFrom) && (!dateTo || dd <= dateTo);
  });
  const loanDisbursements = disbursedLoans.reduce((s,l)=>s+l.principal,0);
  // ★ FIX (BS-011): Add loan principal repayments as investing INFLOW.
  // IAS 7 / IFRS: principal received from borrowers is an investing cash inflow.
  // ★ FIX (CF-002): Use principal-only amount for investing inflow. Previously used
  // t.principalAmount||t.amount — but principalAmount is NEVER mapped from the
  // backend, so t.amount (full P+I) was always used, double-counting interest that
  // is already in operating inflow (via profit ledger feeAmount). Now we cross-ref
  // the profit ledger to subtract the interest portion from the repayment amount,
  // yielding the principal-only figure that belongs in investing activities.
  const allRepayments = br(filterByUserBranch(DB.transactions||[]).filter(t=>t.type==='LOAN_REPAYMENT'&&t.status==='POSTED'));
  // Build a map of transaction refs → interest amounts from profit ledger
  // so we can extract principal-only from each repayment transaction.
  const interestByRef = {};
  allProfit.filter(e=>e.sourceType==='LOAN_INTEREST'||e.category==='LOAN_INTEREST').forEach(e=>{
    if(e.sourceRef) interestByRef[e.sourceRef] = (interestByRef[e.sourceRef]||0) + (e.feeAmount||0);
  });
  const dateFilteredRepayments = allRepayments.filter(t => {
    const td = (t.date||t.timestamp||'').slice(0,10);
    return (!dateFrom || td >= dateFrom) && (!dateTo || td <= dateTo);
  });
  const loanRepayments = dateFilteredRepayments.reduce((s,t)=>{
    const interest = interestByRef[t.ref] || 0;
    const principal = Math.max(0, Number(t.amount||0) - interest);
    return s + principal;
  },0);
  const netInvesting = loanRepayments - loanDisbursements;
  const fundCredits = opFundTxns.filter(t=>t.type==='CREDIT').reduce((s,t)=>s+Number(t.amount||0),0);
  const fundDebits = opFundTxns.filter(t=>t.type==='DEBIT').reduce((s,t)=>s+Number(t.amount||0),0);
  const netFinancing = fundCredits - fundDebits;
  const netCashChange = netOperating + netInvesting + netFinancing;
  // Detail movements for table
  let allMoves = [];
  // ★ FIX (CF-001): Operating income movements use feeAmount (actual income), not grossAmount
  opIncome.forEach(e=>allMoves.push({ref:e.sourceRef,date:e.date,type:'Operating',category:e.category,desc:e.description||e.glAccountName,amount:e.feeAmount||e.grossAmount||0}));
  opExpense.forEach(e=>allMoves.push({ref:e.id,date:e.date,type:'Operating',category:e.category,desc:'Expense: '+(e.description||e.vendor),amount:-e.amount}));
  // ★ FIX (BS-011): Add loan repayment movements to investing detail
  // ★ FIX (CF-002): Use principal-only amount (amount minus interest from profit ledger)
  dateFilteredRepayments.forEach(t=>{
    const interest = interestByRef[t.ref] || 0;
    const principal = Math.max(0, Number(t.amount||0) - interest);
    allMoves.push({ref:t.ref||t.id,date:(t.date||t.timestamp||'').slice(0,10),type:'Investing',category:'LOAN_REPAYMENT',desc:'Loan principal repayment' + (interest > 0 ? ' (interest '+money(interest)+' in operating)' : ''),amount:principal});
  });
  // ★ FIX (CF-003): Add individual loan disbursement movements to investing detail.
  // Previously only the total was used in section cards — the detail table never
  // showed individual disbursements, making the running total unable to reconcile
  // with net cash change and hiding which loans were disbursed.
  disbursedLoans.forEach(l=>allMoves.push({ref:l.loanNumber,date:(l.disbursedAt||'').slice(0,10),type:'Investing',category:'LOAN_DISBURSEMENT',desc:'Loan disbursement — '+(l.customerName||'Unknown'),amount:-l.principal}));
  opFundTxns.forEach(t=>allMoves.push({ref:t.ref,date:t.date||t.timestamp?.slice(0,10),type:'Financing',category:t.type,desc:t.description||('Fund '+t.type),amount:t.type==='CREDIT'?Number(t.amount||0):-Number(t.amount||0)}));
  allMoves.sort((a,b)=>(b.date||'').localeCompare(a.date||''));
  return {dateFrom,dateTo,opIncome,opExpense,opFundTxns,operatingInflow,operatingOutflow,netOperating,loanDisbursements,loanRepayments,netInvesting,fundCredits,fundDebits,netFinancing,netCashChange,allMoves,disbursedLoans};
}

STATE.cfPage = STATE.cfPage || 1;
STATE.cfPageSize = 25;

function setCFPeriod(p) {
  const now = new Date();
  if (p==='month') { $('cfDateFrom').value = new Date(now.getFullYear(),now.getMonth(),1).toISOString().slice(0,10); $('cfDateTo').value = now.toISOString().slice(0,10); }
  else if (p==='quarter') { const q = Math.floor(now.getMonth()/3)*3; $('cfDateFrom').value = new Date(now.getFullYear(),q,1).toISOString().slice(0,10); $('cfDateTo').value = now.toISOString().slice(0,10); }
  else if (p==='year') { $('cfDateFrom').value = new Date(now.getFullYear(),0,1).toISOString().slice(0,10); $('cfDateTo').value = now.toISOString().slice(0,10); }
  else if (p==='all') { $('cfDateFrom').value=''; $('cfDateTo').value=''; }
  STATE.cfPage = 1;
  renderCashFlow();
}
function resetCFFilters() { $('cfDateFrom').value=''; $('cfDateTo').value=''; $('cfBranch').value=''; STATE.cfPage=1; renderCashFlow(); }

function renderCashFlow() {
  // Populate branch filter dynamically from DB
  if($('cfBranch') && $('cfBranch').children.length <= 1) {
    (DB.branches||[]).forEach(b=>{const o=document.createElement('option');o.value=b.name;o.textContent=b.name;$('cfBranch').appendChild(o);});
  }
  const d = getFilteredCashFlowData();
  // ★ FIX (BS-011): Destructure loanRepayments from cash flow data
  const {netOperating,netInvesting,netFinancing,netCashChange,operatingInflow,operatingOutflow,loanDisbursements,loanRepayments,fundCredits,fundDebits,allMoves} = d;

  // KPIs
  $('cfKpis').innerHTML = [
    {label:'Net Operating',value:money(netOperating),sub:`Inflow ${money(operatingInflow)} · Outflow ${money(operatingOutflow)}`,color:netOperating>=0?'var(--accent)':'var(--danger)',icon:'bar-chart-3'},
    // ★ FIX (BS-011): Show both disbursements and repayments in KPI sub-label
    {label:'Net Investing',value:money(netInvesting),sub:`Repayments ${money(loanRepayments||0)} · Disbursements ${money(loanDisbursements)}`,color:netInvesting>=0?'var(--accent)':'var(--danger)',icon:'landmark'},
    {label:'Net Financing',value:money(netFinancing),sub:`Credits ${money(fundCredits)} · Debits ${money(fundDebits)}`,color:netFinancing>=0?'var(--accent)':'var(--danger)',icon:'building-2'},
    {label:'Net Cash Change',value:money(netCashChange),sub:'Operating + Investing + Financing',color:netCashChange>=0?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)',icon:'coins'}
  ].map(k=>`<div class="kpi-card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:start"><span class="kpi-label">${k.label}</span>${IC(k.icon, 22)}</div><div class="kpi-value" style="color:${k.color}">${k.value}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${k.sub}</div></div>`).join('');

  // Section cards
  const sectionCard = (title,items,color,net) => `<div class="card" style="border-left:3px solid ${color}"><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.92rem;margin-bottom:10px;color:${color}">${title}</div>${items.map(i=>`<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:5px 0;font-size:.84rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)"><span>${i.label}</span><span style="font-weight:600;color:${i.val>=0?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${money(i.val)}</span></div>`).join('')}<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:8px 0 4px;font-weight:800;font-size:.9rem;margin-top:6px;border-top:2px solid ${color}"><span>Net ${title}</span><span style="color:${net>=0?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${money(net)}</span></div></div>`;

  $('cfSections').innerHTML =
    sectionCard('Operating Activities',[
      {label:'Fee Income Received',val:operatingInflow},
      {label:'Operating Expenses Paid',val:-operatingOutflow}
    ],'var(--accent)',netOperating) +
    // ★ FIX (BS-011): Show loan repayments (inflow) alongside disbursements (outflow)
    sectionCard('Investing Activities',[
      {label:'Loan Principal Repayments',val:loanRepayments||0},
      {label:'Loan Disbursements',val:-loanDisbursements}
    ],'#58b7ff',netInvesting) +
    sectionCard('Financing Activities',[
      {label:'Fund Credits',val:fundCredits},
      {label:'Fund Debits',val:-fundDebits}
    ],'#C9A962',netFinancing);

  // Detail table — use pre-sorted movements from shared helper
  // ★ FIX (CF-007): Running total must carry forward from previous pages.
  // Previously `let rt = 0` reset on every page, making page 2+ show
  // running totals starting from 0 instead of the cumulative total.
  const {items,total,pages} = paginate(allMoves, STATE.cfPage, STATE.cfPageSize);
  const prevPageTotal = allMoves.slice(0, (STATE.cfPage - 1) * STATE.cfPageSize).reduce((s,m)=>s+m.amount, 0);
  let rt = prevPageTotal;
  $('cfDetailBody').innerHTML = items.map(m=>{
    rt += m.amount;
    return `<tr>
      <td class="td-mono" style="font-size:.78rem">${m.ref||'—'}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.82rem">${m.date}</td>
      <td><span class="pill ${m.type==='Operating'?'pill-approved':m.type==='Financing'?'pill-salary':m.type==='Investing'?'pill-current':'pill-pending'}" style="font-size:.72rem">${m.type}</span></td>
      <td style="font-size:.82rem">${(m.category||'').replace(/_/g,' ')}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.84rem">${m.desc}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;color:${m.amount>=0?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${m.amount>=0?'+':''}${money(m.amount)}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.88rem;font-weight:600;color:${rt>=0?'var(--text)':'var(--danger)'}">${money(rt)}</td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="7" class="empty-state"><p>No cash flow entries for the selected period</p></td></tr>';
  renderPagination('cfDetailPagination',STATE.cfPage,allMoves.length,'goCFPage',STATE.cfPageSize);
}
function goCFPage(p) { STATE.cfPage=p; renderCashFlow(); }

function exportCashFlowCSV() {
  const d = getFilteredCashFlowData();
  const periodLabel = (d.dateFrom||'All')+' to '+(d.dateTo||'All');
  const branch = $('cfBranch')?.value || 'All Branches';
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('Cash Flow Statement',[['Period',periodLabel],['Branch',branch]]);
  // ★ FIX (CF-008): Add section summary rows before detail so CSV is a complete
  // standalone cash flow statement, not just raw movements without totals.
  // ★ FIX (CF-013): Add Running Total column matching the on-screen table.
  const header = 'Type,Category,Reference,Date,Description,Amount (FCFA),Running Total (FCFA)\n';
  let rows = '';
  // Section summaries
  rows += csv('') + ',' + csv('OPERATING ACTIVITIES') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csvNum(0) + ',' + csv('') + '\n';
  rows += csv('Operating') + ',' + csv('Fee Income Received') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csvNum(d.operatingInflow) + ',' + csv('') + '\n';
  rows += csv('Operating') + ',' + csv('Operating Expenses Paid') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csvNum(-d.operatingOutflow) + ',' + csv('') + '\n';
  rows += csv('Operating') + ',' + csv('NET OPERATING') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csvNum(d.netOperating) + ',' + csv('') + '\n';
  rows += csv('') + ',' + csv('INVESTING ACTIVITIES') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csvNum(0) + ',' + csv('') + '\n';
  rows += csv('Investing') + ',' + csv('Loan Principal Repayments') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csvNum(d.loanRepayments||0) + ',' + csv('') + '\n';
  rows += csv('Investing') + ',' + csv('Loan Disbursements') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csvNum(-d.loanDisbursements) + ',' + csv('') + '\n';
  rows += csv('Investing') + ',' + csv('NET INVESTING') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csvNum(d.netInvesting) + ',' + csv('') + '\n';
  rows += csv('') + ',' + csv('FINANCING ACTIVITIES') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csvNum(0) + ',' + csv('') + '\n';
  rows += csv('Financing') + ',' + csv('Fund Credits') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csvNum(d.fundCredits) + ',' + csv('') + '\n';
  rows += csv('Financing') + ',' + csv('Fund Debits') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csvNum(-d.fundDebits) + ',' + csv('') + '\n';
  rows += csv('Financing') + ',' + csv('NET FINANCING') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csvNum(d.netFinancing) + ',' + csv('') + '\n';
  rows += csv('') + ',' + csv('NET CASH CHANGE') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csvNum(d.netCashChange) + ',' + csv('') + '\n';
  rows += csv('') + ',' + csv('--- DETAIL ---') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + ',' + csv('') + '\n';
  // Detail rows with running total
  let rt = 0;
  d.allMoves.forEach(m=>{ rt += m.amount; rows+=`${csv(m.type)},${csv(m.category)},${csv(m.ref)},${csv(m.date)},${csv(m.desc)},${csvNum(m.amount)},${csvNum(rt)}\n`; });
  const footer = csvFooter(d.allMoves.length, [
    {label:'Net Operating (FCFA)',value:csvNum(d.netOperating)},
    {label:'Net Investing (FCFA)',value:csvNum(d.netInvesting)},
    {label:'Net Financing (FCFA)',value:csvNum(d.netFinancing)},
    {label:'Net Cash Change (FCFA)',value:csvNum(d.netCashChange)}
  ]);
  downloadCSV(meta + header + rows + footer, 'atlas-cash-flow-statement.csv');
  showToast('success','Export Complete','Cash flow statement exported as CSV.');
}

function exportCashFlowXLSX() {
  const d = getFilteredCashFlowData();
  const periodLabel = (d.dateFrom||'All')+' to '+(d.dateTo||'All');
  const branch = $('cfBranch')?.value || 'All Branches';
  const b = DB.bankBranding||{};
  const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
  const ws = xlMakeSheet(40,6);
  let r=0;
  xlNavyTitle(ws,r,6,(b.bankName||'Atlas Bank').toUpperCase()+' — CASH FLOW STATEMENT'); r+=2;
  // ★ FIX (CF-010): Add Branch to XLSX header info grid
  r = xlDualInfoGrid(ws,r,0,1,3,4,[['Period',periodLabel],['Currency','XAF (FCFA)'],['Branch',branch]],[['Generated By',STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System']]); r+=3;
  xlSectionTitle(ws,r,5,'OPERATING ACTIVITIES'); r++;
