  xlDataRow(ws,r,['','Fee Income Received','',d.operatingInflow],undefined,true); r++;
  // ★ FIX (CF-005): Outflows must be NEGATIVE in XLSX to match sign convention
  // of section cards and print. Previously shown as positive, breaking reconciliation.
  xlDataRow(ws,r,['','Operating Expenses Paid','',( -d.operatingOutflow)],undefined,true); r++;
  xlDataRow(ws,r,['','Net Operating','',d.netOperating],undefined,true); r+=2;
  xlSectionTitle(ws,r,5,'INVESTING ACTIVITIES'); r++;
  // ★ FIX (BS-011): Show loan principal repayments in XLSX export
  xlDataRow(ws,r,['','Loan Principal Repayments','',d.loanRepayments||0],undefined,true); r++;
  // ★ FIX (CF-005): Loan Disbursements shown as negative (outflow)
  xlDataRow(ws,r,['','Loan Disbursements','',( -d.loanDisbursements)],undefined,true); r++;
  xlDataRow(ws,r,['','Net Investing','',d.netInvesting],undefined,true); r+=2;
  xlSectionTitle(ws,r,5,'FINANCING ACTIVITIES'); r++;
  xlDataRow(ws,r,['','Fund Credits','',d.fundCredits],undefined,true); r++;
  // ★ FIX (CF-005): Fund Debits shown as negative (outflow)
  xlDataRow(ws,r,['','Fund Debits','',( -d.fundDebits)],undefined,true); r++;
  xlDataRow(ws,r,['','Net Financing','',d.netFinancing],undefined,true); r+=2;
  // ★ FIX (CF-012): Add reconciliation verification row so auditors can confirm
  // Net Operating + Net Investing + Net Financing = Net Cash Change.
  xlDataRow(ws,r,['','Net Operating + Net Investing + Net Financing','',d.netCashChange],undefined,true); r++;
  xlSetWidths(ws,[20,28,14,18,18,18]);
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb,ws,'Cash Flow');
  downloadWorkbook(wb,'atlas-cash-flow.xlsx');
  showToast('success','Export Complete','Cash flow statement exported as XLSX.');
}

function printCashFlowStatement() {
  const d = getFilteredCashFlowData();
  const periodLabel = d.dateFrom && d.dateTo
    ? new Date(d.dateFrom).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'})+' — '+new Date(d.dateTo).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'})
    : 'All Transactions';
  const daysInPeriod = d.dateFrom && d.dateTo ? Math.max(1, Math.ceil((new Date(d.dateTo) - new Date(d.dateFrom)) / (1000*60*60*24))) : 'N/A';
  const branch = $('cfBranch')?.value || 'All Branches';
  const b = DB.bankBranding || {};
  const stmtRef = generateDocumentNumber('CFS');
  const stmtDate = dateFmt(new Date().toISOString());

  // Register document for audit trail
  registerDocument({
    documentNumber: stmtRef, type: 'REPORT', subtype: 'CASH_FLOW_STATEMENT',
    accountNumber: '', customerId: 0, customerName: '',
    branch: branch, periodFrom: d.dateFrom, periodTo: d.dateTo,
    operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
    generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    printCount: 1, lastPrintedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    exportCount: 0, lastExportedAt: null,
    // ★ FIX (CF-006): Include loanRepayments in totalCredits — they are investing
    // inflows and must be counted in the document registration summary.
    summary: { totalTransactions: d.allMoves.length, openingBalance:0, closingBalance: d.netCashChange, totalCredits: d.operatingInflow + d.fundCredits + (d.loanRepayments||0), totalDebits: d.operatingOutflow + d.loanDisbursements + d.fundDebits, grossPay:0, netPay:0, totalDeductions:0, amount:0, transactionRef:'' },
    status: 'ACTIVE'
  });

  const html = `
    <div class="ent-doc">
      <!-- Enterprise Header -->
      <div class="ent-doc-header">
        <div class="edh-left">
          <div class="edh-logo">${b.logo ? '<img src="'+escUrl(b.logo)+'" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:14px" alt="Logo">' : (b.bankName||'A').charAt(0)}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="edh-bank-name">${b.bankName||'Atlas Bank'}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">${b.headOfficeAddress||''}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">SWIFT: ${b.swiftCode||'N/A'} · BEAC Approval: ${b.cbnLicenseNumber||'N/A'}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="edh-right">
          <div class="edh-doc-title">Cash Flow Statement</div>
          <div>Report Ref: ${stmtRef}</div>
          <div>Generated: ${stmtDate}</div>
          <div>Operator: ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System'}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ent-doc-body">
        <!-- Report Metadata -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Report Information</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Period</div><div class="edf-value" style="font-size:.82rem">${periodLabel}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Days in Period</div><div class="edf-value">${daysInPeriod}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Branch</div><div class="edf-value">${branch}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Currency</div><div class="edf-value">XAF (FCFA)</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Movements</div><div class="edf-value">${d.allMoves.length}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Operating Fund Balance</div><div class="edf-value">${money(branch && branch !== 'All Branches' ? filterByUserBranch(DB.operatingAccount.transactions||[]).filter(t=>(t.branch||'')===branch||(t.actorBranch||'')===branch).reduce((s,t)=>s+(t.type==='CREDIT'?Number(t.amount||0):-Number(t.amount||0)),0) : DB.operatingAccount?.balance||0)}</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- OPERATING ACTIVITIES -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Operating Activities</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Fee Income Received</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#16a34a">+${money(d.operatingInflow)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Operating Expenses Paid</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#dc2626">−${money(d.operatingOutflow)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grand"><span>Net Operating Activities</span><span>${money(d.netOperating)}</span></div>
        </div>

        <!-- INVESTING ACTIVITIES -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Investing Activities</div>
          <!-- ★ FIX (BS-011): Show loan principal repayments as investing inflow -->
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Loan Principal Repayments</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#16a34a">+${money(d.loanRepayments||0)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Loan Disbursements</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#dc2626">−${money(d.loanDisbursements)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grand" style="background:#4a5568"><span>Net Investing Activities</span><span>${money(d.netInvesting)}</span></div>
        </div>

        <!-- FINANCING ACTIVITIES -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Financing Activities</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Fund Credits Received</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#16a34a">+${money(d.fundCredits)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Fund Debits / Transfers Out</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#dc2626">−${money(d.fundDebits)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grand" style="background:#4a5568"><span>Net Financing Activities</span><span>${money(d.netFinancing)}</span></div>
        </div>

        <!-- NET CASH CHANGE -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Net Cash Position</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">Net Operating + Net Investing + Net Financing</span><span class="edtr-value" style="color:#4a5568">${money(d.netOperating)} + (${money(d.netInvesting)}) + ${money(d.netFinancing)}</span></div>
          <div class="ent-doc-net" style="background:${d.netCashChange>=0?'#f0fdf4':'#fef2f2'};border-color:${d.netCashChange>=0?'#16a34a':'#dc2626'};color:${d.netCashChange>=0?'#16a34a':'#dc2626'}">
            <span>Net Cash Change</span><span>${d.netCashChange>=0?'+':''}${money(d.netCashChange)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- DETAIL TABLE -->
        ${d.allMoves.length > 0 ? `
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Cash Movement Detail (${d.allMoves.length} entries)</div>
          <table class="ent-doc-table">
            <thead><tr><th>Reference</th><th>Date</th><th>Type</th><th>Category</th><th>Description</th><th style="text-align:right">Amount (FCFA)</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
              ${d.allMoves.map(m => `<tr>
                <td class="edt-mono" style="font-size:.72rem">${m.ref||'—'}</td>
                <td style="white-space:nowrap">${m.date ? new Date(m.date).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}) : 'N/A'}</td>
                <td>${m.type}</td>
                <td class="edt-mono">${(m.category||'').replace(/_/g,' ')}</td>
                <td>${m.desc||''}</td>
                <td class="edt-mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:${m.amount>=0?'#16a34a':'#dc2626'}">${m.amount>=0?'+':''}${money(m.amount)}</td>
              </tr>`).join('')}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>` : ''}

        <!-- Certification -->
        <div class="ent-doc-cert">
          <strong>Certification:</strong> This cash flow statement is a true and accurate reflection of the bank's cash inflows and outflows during the stated period. The figures have been compiled from the general ledger, profit ledger, expense records, loan disbursements and repayments, and operating fund transactions. This document is generated electronically and does not require a physical signature. Any discrepancy should be reported to the finance department within 14 days.
        </div>

        <!-- Signatures -->
        <div class="ent-doc-signatures">
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">${STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'Authorized Officer'}</div>
            <div class="eds-role">Prepared By / Branch Operations</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">${branch}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">Branch Manager</div>
            <div class="eds-role">${branch}</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">Authorized Signatory</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Footer -->
        <div class="ent-doc-footer">
          ${b.bankNameShort||'Atlas Bank'} Limited · Registered in Cameroon · ${b.registrationNumber||'N/A'} · BEAC Approval: ${b.cbnLicenseNumber||'N/A'}<br>
          Registered Office: ${b.headOfficeAddress||'N/A'}<br>
          SWIFT Code: ${b.swiftCode||'N/A'} · Tel: ${b.phone||'N/A'} · Email: ${b.email||'N/A'}<br><br>
          <strong>CONFIDENTIAL:</strong> This document contains privileged financial information intended solely for authorized personnel. Unauthorized use, disclosure, copying, or distribution is strictly prohibited.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;

  printIsolated(html);
  addAuditEntry('CASHFLOW_PRINTED','Report',stmtRef,`Cash flow statement printed. Period: ${periodLabel}. Branch: ${branch}. Net change: ${money(d.netCashChange)}.`);
}

/* ----- FINANCIAL RATIOS DASHBOARD ----- */
function getFilteredRatiosData() {
  const ratioBranch = $('ratioBranch')?.value || '';
  const br = (items) => ratioBranch ? items.filter(i=>(i.branch||'')===ratioBranch||(i.actorBranch||'')===ratioBranch) : items;
  // ★ FIX (BS-002): Pass ratioBranch to getGLBalances() so that totalAssets,
  // totalLiabilities, and totalEquity are branch-filtered. Previously these were
  // computed from filterByUserBranch() data (ignoring the dropdown), creating
  // inconsistency with totalDeposits/totalLoans which were branch-filtered.
  const glBal = getGLBalances(null, ratioBranch);
  const coa = DB.chartOfAccounts;
  // ★ FIXED: Use server data (STATE.plServerData) for P&L metrics instead of
  // stale local DB.profitLedger. Falls back to local cache if server data not yet loaded.
  const serverSummary = STATE.plServerData?.summary?.summary;
  // ★ FIX (FR-002): Fallback totalRevenue now uses feeAmount||grossAmount (matching
  // server semantics where total_income includes all income categories). Previously
  // used only feeAmount which understated revenue when server data was unavailable,
  // causing ROA/ROE/NIM to jump when server data loaded vs. when it wasn't.
  const totalRevenue = (serverSummary?.total_income !== undefined && serverSummary?.total_income !== null)
    ? serverSummary.total_income
    : br(filterByUserBranch(DB.profitLedger)).reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.feeAmount||e.grossAmount||0),0);
  const totalExpenses = (serverSummary?.total_expenses !== undefined && serverSummary?.total_expenses !== null)
    ? serverSummary.total_expenses
    : br(filterByUserBranch(DB.expenses).filter(e=>e.status==='APPROVED')).reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amount,0);
  const netProfit = totalRevenue - totalExpenses;
  const totalAssets = coa.filter(a=>a.type==='ASSET').reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBal[a.code]||0),0);
  const totalLiabilities = coa.filter(a=>a.type==='LIABILITY').reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBal[a.code]||0),0);
  const totalEquity = coa.filter(a=>a.type==='EQUITY').reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBal[a.code]||0),0);
  const totalDeposits = br(filterByUserBranch(DB.accounts).filter(a=>a.status==='ACTIVE')).reduce((s,a)=>s+a.ledgerBalance,0);
  const totalLoans = br(filterByUserBranch(DB.loans)).reduce((s,l)=>s+l.outstanding,0);
  const activeAccounts = br(filterByUserBranch(DB.accounts).filter(a=>a.status==='ACTIVE')).length;
  const nplLoans = br(filterByUserBranch(DB.loans).filter(l=>l.status==='DELINQUENT'||l.status==='DEFAULTED'));
  const nplAmount = nplLoans.reduce((s,l)=>s+l.outstanding,0);
  // ★ FIX (FR-008): Operating fund must respect the ratioBranch dropdown filter.
  // Previously the CSV export had a different operatingFund source than the main
  // render — now the data pipeline returns a consistent value that all consumers use.
  const operatingFund = ratioBranch
    ? (DB.operatingAccount.transactions||[]).filter(t=>(t.branch||'')===ratioBranch||(t.actorBranch||'')===ratioBranch).reduce((s,t)=>s+(t.type==='CREDIT'?Number(t.amount||0):-Number(t.amount||0)),0)
    : (isAllBranchesMode()?DB.operatingAccount.balance:filterByUserBranch(DB.operatingAccount.transactions||[]).reduce((s,t)=>s+(t.type==='CREDIT'?Number(t.amount||0):-Number(t.amount||0)),0));
  // ★ FIX (FR-001): Extract interest income from profit ledger for correct NIM.
  // NIM = Net Interest Income / Average Earning Assets (per IAS/IFRS & Basel III).
  // Interest income = LOAN_INTEREST category feeAmount; Interest expense = GL 4500.
  const interestIncome = br(filterByUserBranch(DB.profitLedger)).filter(e=>e.category==='LOAN_INTEREST'||e.sourceType==='LOAN_INTEREST').reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.feeAmount||0),0);
  const interestExpense = coa.filter(a=>a.code==='4500').reduce((s,a)=>s+Math.abs(glBal[a.code]||0),0);
  const earningAssets = totalLoans + operatingFund; // loans + cash on hand
  // ★ FIX (FR-014): Branch-filter staff and branches counts for efficiency ratios.
  const branchStaff = ratioBranch
    ? (DB.staff||[]).filter(s=>(s.branch||'')===ratioBranch||(s.branches||[]).includes(ratioBranch))
    : (DB.staff||[]);
  const branchCount = ratioBranch
    ? 1
    : (DB.branches||[]).length || 1;
  return {glBal,coa,totalRevenue,totalExpenses,netProfit,totalAssets,totalLiabilities,totalEquity,totalDeposits,totalLoans,activeAccounts,nplLoans,nplAmount,operatingFund,interestIncome,interestExpense,earningAssets,branchStaff,branchCount};
}

function renderFinancialRatios() {
  // Populate branch filter dynamically
  if($('ratioBranch') && $('ratioBranch').children.length <= 1) {
    (DB.branches||[]).forEach(b=>{const o=document.createElement('option');o.value=b.name;o.textContent=b.name;$('ratioBranch').appendChild(o);});
  }
  const {glBal,coa,totalRevenue,totalExpenses,netProfit,totalAssets,totalLiabilities,totalEquity,totalDeposits,totalLoans,activeAccounts,nplLoans,nplAmount,operatingFund,interestIncome,interestExpense,earningAssets,branchStaff,branchCount} = getFilteredRatiosData();
  // ★ FIX (FR-003): Guard against zero/negative equity for ROE. If equity is
  // negative (liabilities exceed assets), ROE produces meaningless massive numbers.
  // Use absolute value as denominator with a minimum floor of 1.
  const avgAssets = Math.abs(totalAssets) || 1;
  const avgEquity = totalEquity !== 0 ? totalEquity : 1;

  // Profitability
  const roa = (netProfit / avgAssets) * 100;
  // ★ FIX (FR-003): If equity is negative, show ROE as N/A (meaningless metric)
  const roe = totalEquity > 0 ? (netProfit / totalEquity) * 100 : (totalEquity < 0 ? NaN : 0);
  // ★ FIX (FR-001): NIM = (Interest Income − Interest Expense) / Earning Assets.
  // Per IAS/IFRS & Basel III: NIM measures the net return on earning assets.
  // Previously used (totalRevenue - totalExpenses) / totalLoans = netProfit/totalLoans
  // which is NOT NIM — it's a modified ROA that double-counts non-interest items.
  const nim = earningAssets > 0 ? ((interestIncome - interestExpense) / earningAssets) * 100 : 0;
  const profitMargin = totalRevenue > 0 ? (netProfit / totalRevenue) * 100 : 0;

  // Liquidity
  // Liquid assets = operating fund (cash on hand). For a bank, cash/short-term liabilities
  const liquidAssets = operatingFund;
  const currentLiabilities = totalDeposits; // deposits are the bank's short-term obligations
  const currentRatio = currentLiabilities > 0 ? liquidAssets / currentLiabilities : 0;
  const loanToDeposit = totalDeposits > 0 ? (totalLoans / totalDeposits) * 100 : 0;
  const liquidityRatio = totalAssets > 0 ? (liquidAssets / totalAssets) * 100 : 0;

  // Efficiency
  const costToIncome = totalRevenue > 0 ? (totalExpenses / totalRevenue) * 100 : 0;
  // ★ FIX (FR-014): Use branch-filtered staff/branch counts, not global counts.
  const revenuePerEmployee = branchStaff.length > 0 ? totalRevenue / branchStaff.length : 0;
  const depositsPerAccount = activeAccounts > 0 ? totalDeposits / activeAccounts : 0;
  const expensePerBranch = branchCount > 0 ? totalExpenses / branchCount : 0;

  // Capital & Solvency
  // ★ FIX (FR-013): Renamed "Capital Adequacy Ratio" to "Equity-to-Assets Ratio"
  // because (Equity / Assets) is NOT the Basel III Capital Adequacy Ratio (which
  // requires Tier 1 + Tier 2 Capital / Risk-Weighted Assets). Labeling this as
  // "CAR" is misleading for regulatory reporting. The formula remains the same
  // but the label now accurately describes what is computed.
  const equityToAssets = totalAssets > 0 ? (totalEquity / totalAssets) * 100 : 0;
  const debtToEquity = totalEquity > 0 ? (totalLiabilities / totalEquity) : (totalLiabilities > 0 ? Infinity : 0);
  const nplRatio = totalLoans > 0 ? (nplAmount / totalLoans) * 100 : 0;
  const equityMultiplier = totalEquity > 0 ? totalAssets / totalEquity : (totalAssets > 0 ? Infinity : 0);

  const assess = (val, good, warn) => val >= good ? 'Strong' : val >= warn ? 'Moderate' : 'Weak';
  const assessInv = (val, good, warn) => val <= good ? 'Strong' : val <= warn ? 'Moderate' : 'Weak';
  const assessColor = (a) => a==='Strong'?'var(--success)':a==='Moderate'?'#C9A962':'var(--danger)';
  // ★ FIX (FR-003): Format NaN/Infinity as 'N/A' in display
  const fmtVal = (v) => (v !== v || v === Infinity || v === -Infinity) ? 'N/A' : v;

  const allRatios = [
    {cat:'Profitability',name:'Return on Assets (ROA)',val:fmtVal(roa),pct:'%',bm:'>1.5%',a:assess(roa,1.5,0.5)},
    {cat:'Profitability',name:'Return on Equity (ROE)',val:fmtVal(roe),pct:'%',bm:'>12%',a:roe===roe&&roe!==Infinity&&roe!==-Infinity?assess(roe,12,5):'Weak'},
    {cat:'Profitability',name:'Net Interest Margin (NIM)',val:fmtVal(nim),pct:'%',bm:'>3%',a:assess(nim,3,1)},
    {cat:'Profitability',name:'Profit Margin',val:fmtVal(profitMargin),pct:'%',bm:'>15%',a:assess(profitMargin,15,5)},
    {cat:'Liquidity',name:'Current Ratio',val:fmtVal(currentRatio),pct:'x',bm:'>1.5',a:assess(currentRatio,1.5,1.0)},
    {cat:'Liquidity',name:'Loan-to-Deposit Ratio',val:fmtVal(loanToDeposit),pct:'%',bm:'<80%',a:assessInv(loanToDeposit,80,100)},
    {cat:'Liquidity',name:'Liquidity Ratio',val:fmtVal(liquidityRatio),pct:'%',bm:'>10%',a:assess(liquidityRatio,10,5)},
    {cat:'Efficiency',name:'Cost-to-Income Ratio',val:fmtVal(costToIncome),pct:'%',bm:'<60%',a:assessInv(costToIncome,60,80)},
    {cat:'Efficiency',name:'Revenue per Staff',val:fmtVal(revenuePerEmployee),pct:'',bm:'N/A',a:'—'},
    {cat:'Efficiency',name:'Avg Deposit per Account',val:fmtVal(depositsPerAccount),pct:'',bm:'N/A',a:'—'},
    {cat:'Efficiency',name:'Expense per Branch',val:fmtVal(expensePerBranch),pct:'',bm:'N/A',a:'—'},
    // ★ FIX (FR-013): Renamed from "Capital Adequacy Ratio" to "Equity-to-Assets Ratio"
    {cat:'Capital & Solvency',name:'Equity-to-Assets Ratio',val:fmtVal(equityToAssets),pct:'%',bm:'>8%',a:assess(equityToAssets,8,4)},
    {cat:'Capital & Solvency',name:'Debt-to-Equity Ratio',val:fmtVal(debtToEquity),pct:'x',bm:'<3.0',a:debtToEquity!==Infinity?assessInv(debtToEquity,3,6):'Weak'},
    {cat:'Capital & Solvency',name:'NPL Ratio',val:fmtVal(nplRatio),pct:'%',bm:'<5%',a:assessInv(nplRatio,5,10)},
    {cat:'Capital & Solvency',name:'Equity Multiplier',val:fmtVal(equityMultiplier),pct:'x',bm:'<10',a:equityMultiplier!==Infinity?assessInv(equityMultiplier,10,20):'Weak'}
  ];

  // Summary KPIs
  $('ratioSummaryKpis').innerHTML = [
    {label:'ROA',value:(fmtVal(roa)==='N/A'?'N/A':roa.toFixed(2)+'%'),sub:'Return on Assets',color:assessColor(assess(roa,1.5,0.5)),icon:'bar-chart-3'},
    {label:'ROE',value:(fmtVal(roe)==='N/A'?'N/A':roe.toFixed(2)+'%'),sub:'Return on Equity',color:roe===roe&&roe!==Infinity?assessColor(assess(roe,12,5)):'var(--danger)',icon:'trending-up'},
    {label:'Cost-to-Income',value:costToIncome.toFixed(1)+'%',sub:'Efficiency',color:assessColor(assessInv(costToIncome,60,80)),icon:'trending-down'},
    {label:'NPL Ratio',value:nplRatio.toFixed(2)+'%',sub:'Asset Quality',color:assessColor(assessInv(nplRatio,5,10)),icon:'alert-triangle'}
  ].map(k=>`<div class="kpi-card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:start"><span class="kpi-label">${k.label}</span>${IC(k.icon, 22)}</div><div class="kpi-value" style="color:${k.color}">${k.value}</div><div class="kpi-sub">${k.sub}</div></div>`).join('');

  const ratioCard = (items) => items.map(r=>`<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:8px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)"><div><div style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600">${r.name}</div><div style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)">Benchmark: ${r.bm}</div></div><div style="text-align:right"><div style="font-size:.95rem;font-weight:700;color:${r.a==='Strong'?'var(--success)':r.a==='Moderate'?'#C9A962':r.a==='Weak'?'var(--danger)':'var(--muted)'}">${typeof r.val==='number'?r.val.toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2}):r.val}${r.pct}</div><span class="pill ${r.a==='Strong'?'pill-approved':r.a==='Moderate'?'pill-pending':r.a==='Weak'?'pill-rejected':'pill-salary'}" style="font-size:.68rem;margin-top:2px">${r.a}</span></div></div>`).join('');

  $('ratioProfitability').innerHTML = ratioCard(allRatios.filter(r=>r.cat==='Profitability'));
  $('ratioLiquidity').innerHTML = ratioCard(allRatios.filter(r=>r.cat==='Liquidity'));
  $('ratioEfficiency').innerHTML = ratioCard(allRatios.filter(r=>r.cat==='Efficiency'));
  $('ratioSolvency').innerHTML = ratioCard(allRatios.filter(r=>r.cat==='Capital & Solvency'));

  $('ratioDetailBody').innerHTML = allRatios.map(r=>`<tr>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem">${r.cat}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.86rem;font-weight:600">${r.name}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700">${typeof r.val==='number'?r.val.toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2}):r.val}${r.pct}</td>
    <td style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted)">${r.bm}</td>
    <td><span class="pill ${r.a==='Strong'?'pill-approved':r.a==='Moderate'?'pill-pending':r.a==='Weak'?'pill-rejected':'pill-salary'}" style="font-size:.72rem">${r.a}</span></td>
  </tr>`).join('');
}

function exportRatiosXLSX() {
  // ★ FIX (GLA-012): Added NIM with correct formula, aligned all ratios with UI display.
  // ★ FIX (GLA-011): Added missing ratios (Current Ratio, Liquidity Ratio, Equity Multiplier).
  // ★ FIX (FR-001): NIM now uses (interestIncome - interestExpense) / earningAssets.
  // ★ FIX (FR-005): Added Branch to XLSX header.
  // ★ FIX (FR-006): Added all 15 ratios (was missing Revenue/Staff, Deposit/Acct, Expense/Branch).
  // ★ FIX (FR-009): Added Assessment column.
  // ★ FIX (FR-013): Renamed "Capital Adequacy" to "Equity-to-Assets Ratio".
  const {totalRevenue,totalExpenses,netProfit,totalAssets,totalEquity,totalLiabilities,totalDeposits,totalLoans,nplAmount,operatingFund,interestIncome,interestExpense,earningAssets,activeAccounts,branchStaff,branchCount} = getFilteredRatiosData();
  const b = DB.bankBranding||{};
  const branch = $('ratioBranch')?.value || 'All Branches';
  const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
  const ws = xlMakeSheet(24,7);
  let r=0;
  xlNavyTitle(ws,r,7,(b.bankName||'Atlas Bank').toUpperCase()+' — FINANCIAL RATIOS ANALYSIS'); r+=2;
  // ★ FIX (FR-005): Added Branch info
  r = xlDualInfoGrid(ws,r,0,1,3,4,[['Generated',new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB')],['Currency','XAF (FCFA)'],['Branch',branch]],[['Net Profit',fcfa(netProfit)],['Total Assets',fcfa(totalAssets)]]); r+=3;
  // Compute ratios — same formulas as renderFinancialRatios()
  const roa = (netProfit / (Math.abs(totalAssets) || 1)) * 100;
  const roe = totalEquity > 0 ? (netProfit / totalEquity) * 100 : 0;
  const nim = earningAssets > 0 ? ((interestIncome - interestExpense) / earningAssets) * 100 : 0;
  const profitMargin = totalRevenue > 0 ? (netProfit / totalRevenue) * 100 : 0;
  const currentRatio = totalDeposits > 0 ? (operatingFund || 0) / totalDeposits : 0;
  const loanToDeposit = totalDeposits > 0 ? (totalLoans / totalDeposits) * 100 : 0;
  const liquidityRatio = totalAssets > 0 ? ((operatingFund || 0) / totalAssets) * 100 : 0;
  const costToIncome = totalRevenue > 0 ? (totalExpenses / totalRevenue) * 100 : 0;
  const revenuePerEmployee = branchStaff.length > 0 ? totalRevenue / branchStaff.length : 0;
  const depositsPerAccount = activeAccounts > 0 ? totalDeposits / activeAccounts : 0;
  const expensePerBranch = branchCount > 0 ? totalExpenses / branchCount : 0;
  const equityToAssets = totalAssets > 0 ? (totalEquity / totalAssets) * 100 : 0;
  const debtToEquity = totalEquity > 0 ? (totalLiabilities / totalEquity) : 0;
  const nplRatio = totalLoans > 0 ? (nplAmount / totalLoans) * 100 : 0;
  const equityMultiplier = totalEquity > 0 ? totalAssets / totalEquity : 0;
  const assess = (val, good, warn) => val >= good ? 'Strong' : val >= warn ? 'Moderate' : 'Weak';
  const assessInv = (val, good, warn) => val <= good ? 'Strong' : val <= warn ? 'Moderate' : 'Weak';
  const ratios = [
    ['PROFITABILITY','Return on Assets (ROA)',roa.toFixed(2)+'%','>1.5%',assess(roa,1.5,0.5)],
    ['PROFITABILITY','Return on Equity (ROE)',roe.toFixed(2)+'%','>12%',assess(roe,12,5)],
    ['PROFITABILITY','Net Interest Margin (NIM)',nim.toFixed(2)+'%','>3%',assess(nim,3,1)],
    ['PROFITABILITY','Profit Margin',profitMargin.toFixed(2)+'%','>15%',assess(profitMargin,15,5)],
    ['LIQUIDITY','Current Ratio',currentRatio.toFixed(2)+'x','>1.5',assess(currentRatio,1.5,1.0)],
    ['LIQUIDITY','Loan-to-Deposit Ratio',loanToDeposit.toFixed(2)+'%','<80%',assessInv(loanToDeposit,80,100)],
    ['LIQUIDITY','Liquidity Ratio',liquidityRatio.toFixed(1)+'%','>10%',assess(liquidityRatio,10,5)],
    ['EFFICIENCY','Cost-to-Income Ratio',costToIncome.toFixed(1)+'%','<60%',assessInv(costToIncome,60,80)],
    ['EFFICIENCY','Revenue per Staff',fcfa(revenuePerEmployee),'N/A','—'],
    ['EFFICIENCY','Avg Deposit per Account',fcfa(depositsPerAccount),'N/A','—'],
    ['EFFICIENCY','Expense per Branch',fcfa(expensePerBranch),'N/A','—'],
    // ★ FIX (FR-013): Renamed from "Capital Adequacy" to "Equity-to-Assets Ratio"
    ['CAPITAL','Equity-to-Assets Ratio',equityToAssets.toFixed(2)+'%','>8%',assess(equityToAssets,8,4)],
    ['CAPITAL','Debt-to-Equity',debtToEquity.toFixed(2)+'x','<3.0',assessInv(debtToEquity,3,6)],
    ['CAPITAL','NPL Ratio',nplRatio.toFixed(2)+'%','<5%',assessInv(nplRatio,5,10)],
    ['CAPITAL','Equity Multiplier',equityMultiplier.toFixed(2)+'x','<10',assessInv(equityMultiplier,10,20)]
  ];
  let prevCat = '';
  ratios.forEach(row=>{
    if(row[0]!==prevCat){xlSectionTitle(ws,r,6,row[0]);r++;prevCat=row[0];}
    // ★ FIX (FR-009): Added Assessment column (row[4])
    xlDataRow(ws,r,[row[1],row[2],row[3],row[4]]);r++;
  });
  xlSetWidths(ws,[28,18,18,18,18,18,18]);
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb,ws,'Financial Ratios');
  downloadWorkbook(wb,'atlas-financial-ratios.xlsx');
  showToast('success','Export Complete','Financial ratios exported as XLSX.');
}

function exportRatiosCSV() {
  // ★ FIX (FR-008): Use operatingFund from getFilteredRatiosData() directly —
  // no more separate `opFund` fallback that diverged from the main render.
  // ★ FIX (FR-001): NIM now uses (interestIncome - interestExpense) / earningAssets.
  // ★ FIX (FR-013): Renamed "Capital Adequacy" to "Equity-to-Assets Ratio".
  const {totalRevenue,totalExpenses,netProfit,totalAssets,totalLiabilities,totalEquity,totalDeposits,totalLoans,nplAmount,operatingFund,interestIncome,interestExpense,earningAssets,activeAccounts,branchStaff,branchCount} = getFilteredRatiosData();
  const branch = $('ratioBranch')?.value || 'All Branches';
  const meta = csvMetaHeader('Financial Ratios Analysis',[['Date',new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB')],['Branch',branch]]);
  const header = 'Category,Ratio,Value,Benchmark,Assessment\n';
  const assess = (val, good, warn) => val >= good ? 'Strong' : val >= warn ? 'Moderate' : 'Weak';
  const assessInv = (val, good, warn) => val <= good ? 'Strong' : val <= warn ? 'Moderate' : 'Weak';
  const roa = (netProfit / (Math.abs(totalAssets) || 1)) * 100;
  const roe = totalEquity > 0 ? (netProfit / totalEquity) * 100 : 0;
  const nim = earningAssets > 0 ? ((interestIncome - interestExpense) / earningAssets) * 100 : 0;
  const profitMargin = totalRevenue > 0 ? (netProfit / totalRevenue) * 100 : 0;
  const currentRatio = totalDeposits > 0 ? operatingFund / totalDeposits : 0;
  const loanToDeposit = totalDeposits > 0 ? (totalLoans / totalDeposits) * 100 : 0;
  const liquidityRatio = totalAssets > 0 ? (operatingFund / totalAssets) * 100 : 0;
  const costToIncome = totalRevenue > 0 ? (totalExpenses / totalRevenue) * 100 : 0;
  const revenuePerEmployee = branchStaff.length > 0 ? totalRevenue / branchStaff.length : 0;
  const depositsPerAccount = activeAccounts > 0 ? totalDeposits / activeAccounts : 0;
  const expensePerBranch = branchCount > 0 ? totalExpenses / branchCount : 0;
  const equityToAssets = totalAssets > 0 ? (totalEquity / totalAssets) * 100 : 0;
  const debtToEquity = totalEquity > 0 ? (totalLiabilities / totalEquity) : 0;
  const nplRatio = totalLoans > 0 ? (nplAmount / totalLoans) * 100 : 0;
  const equityMultiplier = totalEquity > 0 ? totalAssets / totalEquity : 0;
  const rows = [
    ['Profitability','Return on Assets (ROA)',roa.toFixed(2)+'%','>1.5%',assess(roa,1.5,0.5)],
    ['Profitability','Return on Equity (ROE)',roe.toFixed(2)+'%','>12%',assess(roe,12,5)],
    ['Profitability','Net Interest Margin (NIM)',nim.toFixed(2)+'%','>3%',assess(nim,3,1)],
    ['Profitability','Profit Margin',profitMargin.toFixed(2)+'%','>15%',assess(profitMargin,15,5)],
    ['Liquidity','Current Ratio',currentRatio.toFixed(2)+'x','>1.5',assess(currentRatio,1.5,1.0)],
    ['Liquidity','Loan-to-Deposit Ratio',loanToDeposit.toFixed(2)+'%','<80%',assessInv(loanToDeposit,80,100)],
    ['Liquidity','Liquidity Ratio',liquidityRatio.toFixed(1)+'%','>10%',assess(liquidityRatio,10,5)],
    ['Efficiency','Cost-to-Income Ratio',costToIncome.toFixed(1)+'%','<60%',assessInv(costToIncome,60,80)],
    ['Efficiency','Revenue per Staff',fcfa(revenuePerEmployee),'N/A','—'],
    ['Efficiency','Avg Deposit per Account',fcfa(depositsPerAccount),'N/A','—'],
    ['Efficiency','Expense per Branch',fcfa(expensePerBranch),'N/A','—'],
    ['Capital','Equity-to-Assets Ratio',equityToAssets.toFixed(2)+'%','>8%',assess(equityToAssets,8,4)],
    ['Capital','Debt-to-Equity',debtToEquity.toFixed(2)+'x','<3.0',assessInv(debtToEquity,3,6)],
    ['Capital','NPL Ratio',nplRatio.toFixed(2)+'%','<5%',assessInv(nplRatio,5,10)],
    ['Capital','Equity Multiplier',equityMultiplier.toFixed(2)+'x','<10',assessInv(equityMultiplier,10,20)]
  ].map(r=>`${csv(r[0])},${csv(r[1])},${csv(r[2])},${csv(r[3])},${csv(r[4])}`).join('\n');
  const footer = csvFooter(15, [{label:'Net Profit (FCFA)',value:csvNum(netProfit)},{label:'Total Assets (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalAssets)},{label:'Total Equity (FCFA)',value:csvNum(totalEquity)}]);
  downloadCSV(meta + header + rows + footer, 'atlas-financial-ratios.csv');
  showToast('success','Export Complete','Financial ratios exported as CSV.');
}

function printRatiosDashboard() {
  // ★ FIX (GLA-003): Compute ratio values locally instead of destructuring from
  // getFilteredRatiosData() which doesn't return computed ratio properties.
  // Previous code destructured roa, roe, capitalAdequacy, etc. which were all undefined,
  // causing assessment logic to always evaluate to 'Weak'.
  // ★ FIX (FR-004): Use branch from dropdown, not global STATE.currentBranch.
  // ★ FIX (FR-001): NIM now uses (interestIncome - interestExpense) / earningAssets.
  // ★ FIX (FR-013): Renamed "Capital Adequacy" to "Equity-to-Assets Ratio".
  const {totalRevenue,totalExpenses,netProfit,totalAssets,totalLiabilities,totalEquity,totalDeposits,totalLoans,nplAmount,activeAccounts,nplLoans,operatingFund,interestIncome,interestExpense,earningAssets} = getFilteredRatiosData();
  // Compute ratios locally — same formulas as renderFinancialRatios()
  const roa = (netProfit / (Math.abs(totalAssets) || 1)) * 100;
  const roe = totalEquity > 0 ? (netProfit / totalEquity) * 100 : 0;
  const nim = earningAssets > 0 ? ((interestIncome - interestExpense) / earningAssets) * 100 : 0;
  const profitMargin = totalRevenue > 0 ? (netProfit / totalRevenue) * 100 : 0;
  const liquidAssets = operatingFund;
  const currentLiabilities = totalDeposits;
  const currentRatio = currentLiabilities > 0 ? liquidAssets / currentLiabilities : 0;
  const loanToDeposit = totalDeposits > 0 ? (totalLoans / totalDeposits) * 100 : 0;
  const liquidityRatio = totalAssets > 0 ? (liquidAssets / totalAssets) * 100 : 0;
  const costToIncome = totalRevenue > 0 ? (totalExpenses / totalRevenue) * 100 : 0;
  const equityToAssets = totalAssets > 0 ? (totalEquity / totalAssets) * 100 : 0;
  const debtToEquity = totalEquity > 0 ? (totalLiabilities / totalEquity) : 0;
  const nplRatio = totalLoans > 0 ? (nplAmount / totalLoans) * 100 : 0;
  const equityMultiplier = totalEquity > 0 ? totalAssets / totalEquity : 0;
  const assess = (val, good, warn) => val >= good ? 'Strong' : val >= warn ? 'Moderate' : 'Weak';
  const assessInv = (val, good, warn) => val <= good ? 'Strong' : val <= warn ? 'Moderate' : 'Weak';
  const b = DB.bankBranding||{};
  // ★ FIX (FR-004): Use ratioBranch dropdown value, not STATE.currentBranch.
  // Previously if user selected "Douala Branch" in ratios and printed, the report
  // showed their default branch instead of the selected one.
  const branch = $('ratioBranch')?.value || (isAllBranchesMode() ? 'All Branches' : STATE.currentBranch);
  const stmtRef = generateDocumentNumber('FRA');
  const stmtDate = dateFmt(new Date().toISOString());
  const asAtDate = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'});

  // Register document for audit trail
  registerDocument({
    documentNumber: stmtRef, type: 'REPORT', subtype: 'FINANCIAL_RATIOS_ANALYSIS',
    accountNumber: '', customerId: 0, customerName: '',
    // ★ FIX (FR-012): Add as-at date for period, and meaningful transaction count
    branch: branch, periodFrom: asAtDate, periodTo: asAtDate,
    operator: STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'System',
    generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    printCount: 1, lastPrintedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    exportCount: 0, lastExportedAt: null,
    summary: { totalTransactions: activeAccounts||0, openingBalance:0, closingBalance: totalAssets, totalCredits: totalRevenue, totalDebits: totalExpenses, grossPay:0, netPay:0, totalDeductions:0, amount:netProfit, transactionRef:'' },
    status: 'ACTIVE'
  });

  const rr = (label,val,bm,good) => `<div class="ent-doc-total-row"><span class="edtr-label">${label}</span><span class="edtr-value">${val}</span></div><div style="font-size:.72rem;color:#718096;padding-left:18px;margin-top:-2px;margin-bottom:4px">Benchmark: ${bm} ${good?'· Status: '+good:''}</div>`;

  const html = `
    <div class="ent-doc">
      <!-- Enterprise Header -->
      <div class="ent-doc-header">
        <div class="edh-left">
          <div class="edh-logo">${b.logo ? '<img src="'+escUrl(b.logo)+'" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:14px" alt="Logo">' : (b.bankName||'A').charAt(0)}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="edh-bank-name">${b.bankName||'Atlas Bank'}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">${b.headOfficeAddress||''}</div>
            <div class="edh-bank-sub">SWIFT: ${b.swiftCode||'N/A'} · BEAC Approval: ${b.cbnLicenseNumber||'N/A'}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="edh-right">
          <div class="edh-doc-title">Financial Ratios Analysis</div>
          <div>Report Ref: ${stmtRef}</div>
          <div>As at: ${asAtDate}</div>
          <div>Generated: ${stmtDate}</div>
          <div>Operator: ${STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System'}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ent-doc-body">
        <!-- Report Metadata -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title">Report Information</div>
          <div class="ent-doc-grid">
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Branch</div><div class="edf-value">${branch}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Currency</div><div class="edf-value">XAF (FCFA)</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Total Assets</div><div class="edf-value">${money(totalAssets)}</div></div>
            <div class="ent-doc-field"><div class="edf-label">Active Accounts</div><div class="edf-value">${activeAccounts||0}</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Profitability -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title" style="border-left:3px solid #16a34a;padding-left:10px">Profitability Ratios</div>
          ${rr('Return on Assets (ROA)',((netProfit/(totalAssets||1))*100).toFixed(2)+'%','>1.5%',assess(roa,1.5,0.5))}
          ${rr('Return on Equity (ROE)',((netProfit/(totalEquity||1))*100).toFixed(2)+'%','>12%',assess(roe,12,5))}
          ${rr('Net Interest Margin (NIM)',nim.toFixed(2)+'%','>3%',assess(nim,3,1))}
          ${rr('Net Profit Margin',totalRevenue>0?((netProfit/totalRevenue)*100).toFixed(2)+'%':'0%','>15%',assess(profitMargin,15,5))}
        </div>

        <!-- Liquidity -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title" style="border-left:3px solid #2563eb;padding-left:10px">Liquidity Ratios</div>
          ${rr('Current Ratio',currentRatio.toFixed(2)+'x','>1.5',assess(currentRatio,1.5,1.0))}
          ${rr('Loan-to-Deposit Ratio',totalDeposits>0?((totalLoans/totalDeposits)*100).toFixed(2)+'%':'0%','<80%',assessInv(loanToDeposit,80,100))}
          ${rr('Liquidity Ratio',liquidityRatio.toFixed(1)+'%','>10%',assess(liquidityRatio,10,5))}
        </div>

        <!-- Efficiency & Capital -->
        <div class="ent-doc-section">
          <div class="ent-doc-section-title" style="border-left:3px solid #C9A962;padding-left:10px">Efficiency &amp; Capital Ratios</div>
          ${rr('Cost-to-Income Ratio',totalRevenue>0?((totalExpenses/totalRevenue)*100).toFixed(1)+'%':'0%','<60%',assessInv(costToIncome,60,80))}
          ${rr('NPL Ratio',totalLoans>0?((nplAmount/totalLoans)*100).toFixed(2)+'%':'0%','<5%',assessInv(nplRatio,5,10))}
          ${rr('Equity-to-Assets Ratio',((totalEquity/(Math.abs(totalAssets)||1))*100).toFixed(2)+'%','>8%',assess(equityToAssets,8,4))}
          ${rr('Debt-to-Equity',debtToEquity.toFixed(2)+'x','<3.0',assessInv(debtToEquity,3,6))}
          <!-- ★ FIX (FR-015): Added Equity Multiplier to print (was missing) -->
          ${rr('Equity Multiplier',equityMultiplier.toFixed(2)+'x','<10',assessInv(equityMultiplier,10,20))}
        </div>

        <!-- Certification -->
        <div class="ent-doc-cert">
          <strong>Certification:</strong> This financial ratios analysis has been prepared from the general ledger, loan portfolio, account records, and expense data of ${b.bankName||'Atlas Bank'}. All ratios are computed using standard banking formulas and are based on data as at ${asAtDate}. This document is generated electronically and does not require a physical signature. Any discrepancy should be reported to the finance department within 7 business days.
        </div>

        <!-- Signatures -->
        <div class="ent-doc-signatures">
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">${STATE.currentUser?.fullName || 'Authorized Officer'}</div>
            <div class="eds-role">Prepared By / Branch Operations</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">${branch}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ent-doc-sig">
            <div class="eds-line"></div>
            <div class="eds-name">Chief Financial Officer</div>
            <div class="eds-role">Finance Department</div>
            <div class="eds-role" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:.72rem">Authorized Signatory</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Footer -->
        <div class="ent-doc-footer">
          ${b.bankNameShort||'Atlas Bank'} Limited · Registered in Cameroon · ${b.registrationNumber||'N/A'} · BEAC Approval: ${b.cbnLicenseNumber||'N/A'}<br>
          Registered Office: ${b.headOfficeAddress||'N/A'}<br>
          SWIFT Code: ${b.swiftCode||'N/A'} · Tel: ${b.phone||'N/A'} · Email: ${b.email||'N/A'}<br><br>
          <strong>CONFIDENTIAL:</strong> This document contains privileged financial information intended solely for authorized personnel. Unauthorized use, disclosure, copying, or distribution is strictly prohibited.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  printIsolated(html);
  addAuditEntry('RATIOS_PRINTED','Report',stmtRef,`Financial ratios dashboard printed. Branch: ${branch}. ROA: ${((netProfit/(totalAssets||1))*100).toFixed(2)}%. NPL Ratio: ${((nplAmount/(totalLoans||1))*100).toFixed(2)}%.`);
}

/* ================================================================
   XLSX EXPORTS FOR EXISTING FINANCIAL VIEWS
   P&L, Expenses, Operating Fund, Trial Balance
   ================================================================ */

function exportProfitLossXLSX() {
  // Prefer server-side data for enterprise-grade export
  const sd = STATE.plServerData;
  const b = DB.bankBranding||{};
  const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
  let totRev, totExp, incByCategory, expByCategory;

  if (sd && sd.summary) {
    totRev = sd.summary.summary.total_income;
    totExp = sd.summary.summary.total_expenses;
    incByCategory = sd.summary.income_by_category || [];
    expByCategory = sd.summary.expenses_by_category || [];
  } else {
    // Fallback to local cache
    const filtered = getFilteredProfitLedger();
    totRev = filtered.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0);
    totExp = filterByUserBranch(DB.expenses).filter(e=>e.status==='APPROVED').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amount,0);
    incByCategory = [{category:'WITHDRAWAL_FEE',total:filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='WITHDRAWAL_FEE').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0)},
                     {category:'LOAN_INTEREST',total:filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='LOAN_INTEREST').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0)},
                     {category:'LATE_PENALTY',total:filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='LATE_PENALTY').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0)},
                     {category:'TRANSFER_FEE',total:filtered.filter(e=>e.category==='TRANSFER_FEE').reduce((s,e)=>s+e.feeAmount,0)}];
    expByCategory = [];
  }

  // Sheet 1: Executive Summary
  const ws1 = xlMakeSheet(30,6);
  let r=0;
  xlNavyTitle(ws1,r,6,(b.bankName||'Atlas Bank').toUpperCase()+' \u2014 PROFIT & LOSS'); r+=2;
  r = xlDualInfoGrid(ws1,r,0,1,3,4,[['Generated',new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB')],['Operator',STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System']],[['Currency','XAF (FCFA)'],['Source',sd?'Database':'Local Cache']]); r+=3;
  xlSectionTitle(ws1,r,4,'OPERATING REVENUE'); r++;
  (incByCategory||[]).forEach(c => { xlDataRow(ws1,r,[(c.gl_account_name||c.category||'').replace(/_/g,' '),'',parseFloat(c.total||0)],undefined,true); r++; });
  xlDataRow(ws1,r,['TOTAL REVENUE','',totRev],undefined,true); r+=2;
  xlSectionTitle(ws1,r,4,'OPERATING EXPENSES'); r++;
  (expByCategory||[]).forEach(c => { xlDataRow(ws1,r,[(c.gl_account_name||c.category||'').replace(/_/g,' '),'',parseFloat(c.total||0)],undefined,true); r++; });
  xlDataRow(ws1,r,['TOTAL EXPENSES','',totExp],undefined,true); r++;
  xlDataRow(ws1,r,['NET PROFIT','',totRev-totExp],undefined,true);
  xlSetWidths(ws1,[28,18,18,18,18,18]);
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb,ws1,'Summary');

  // Sheet 2: Detail Ledger
  const detailItems = (sd && sd.entries && sd.entries.items) ? sd.entries.items : DB.profitLedger;
  const ws2 = xlMakeSheet(Math.max(detailItems.length+5,20),12);
  r=0;
  xlNavyTitle(ws2,r,12,'PROFIT LEDGER DETAIL'); r++;
  xlTableHeader(ws2,r,['Ref','Date','GL Account','Category','Account','Customer','Branch','Gross','Fee','Fee%','Operator','Description']); r++;
  detailItems.forEach(e=>{
    const src = e.source_ref||e.sourceRef||'';
    const dt = (e.created_at||e.timestamp||e.date||'').slice(0,10);
    const gl = e.gl_code||e.glAccount||'';
    const cat = e.category||'';
    const acct = e.account_number||e.accountNumber||'';
    const cust = e.customer_name||e.customerName||'';
    const br = e.branch||'';
    const gross = parseFloat(e.gross_amount||e.grossAmount||0);
    const fee = parseFloat(e.fee_amount||e.feeAmount||0);
    const pct = parseFloat(e.fee_pct||e.feePct||0);
    const op = e.operator||'System';
    const desc = e.description||'';
    xlDataRow(ws2,r,[src,dt,gl,cat,acct,cust,br,gross,fee,pct+'%',op,desc],r%2===0?XLFill.ltgray:undefined); r++;
  });
  xlSetWidths(ws2,[14,12,14,16,16,20,14,14,14,8,14,24]);
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb,ws2,'Detail Ledger');
  downloadWorkbook(wb,'atlas-profit-loss.xlsx');
  showToast('success','Export Complete','P&L exported as multi-sheet XLSX.');
}

function exportExpensesXLSX() {
  const filtered = getFilteredExpenses();
  const b = DB.bankBranding||{};
  const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
  const ws = xlMakeSheet(Math.max(filtered.length+8,20),10);
  let r=0;
  xlNavyTitle(ws,r,10,(b.bankBranding||b.bankName||'Atlas Bank').toUpperCase()+' — EXPENSE REPORT'); r+=2;
  const totAmt = filtered.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amount,0);
  const pending = filtered.filter(e=>e.status==='PENDING').length;
  r = xlDualInfoGrid(ws,r,0,1,3,4,[['Total Expenses',fcfa(totAmt)],['Records',filtered.length]],[['Pending Approval',pending],['Generated',new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB')]]); r+=3;
  xlTableHeader(ws,r,['ID','Date','Category','GL Code','Amount','Vendor','Branch','Status','Operator','Description']); r++;
  filtered.forEach(e=>{ xlDataRow(ws,r,[e.id,e.date,e.category,e.glCode,e.amount,e.vendor||'',e.branch||'',e.status,e.operator||'',e.description||''],r%2===0?XLFill.ltgray:undefined); r++; });
  xlSetWidths(ws,[8,12,14,12,16,20,16,12,14,28]);
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb,ws,'Expenses');
  downloadWorkbook(wb,'atlas-expenses.xlsx');
  showToast('success','Export Complete','Expenses exported as XLSX.');
}

function exportOperatingXLSX() {
  const op = DB.operatingAccount;
  const txns = getFilteredOperatingTxns();
  const b = DB.bankBranding||{};
  const branchTxns = filterByUserBranch(DB.operatingAccount.transactions);
  const totalCr = branchTxns.filter(t=>t.type==='CREDIT').reduce((s,t)=>s+Number(t.amount||0),0);
  const totalDr = branchTxns.filter(t=>t.type==='DEBIT').reduce((s,t)=>s+Number(t.amount||0),0);
  const displayBal = isAllBranchesMode() ? op.balance : (totalCr - totalDr);
  const balLabel = isAllBranchesMode() ? 'Current Balance' : `Net Balance (${STATE.currentBranch})`;
  const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
  // ★ FIX (OPFUND-009): Add Branch column to XLSX export for multi-branch traceability
  const ws = xlMakeSheet(Math.max(txns.length+10,20),8);
  let r=0;
  xlNavyTitle(ws,r,8,(b.bankName||'Atlas Bank').toUpperCase()+' — OPERATING FUND'); r+=2;
  r = xlDualInfoGrid(ws,r,0,1,4,5,[['Account',op.accountNumber],[balLabel,fcfa(displayBal)]],[['Transactions',txns.length],['Currency','XAF (FCFA)']]); r+=3;
  xlTableHeader(ws,r,['Reference','Date','Type','Description','Amount','Balance After','Operator','Branch']); r++;
  txns.forEach(t=>{ xlDataRow(ws,r,[t.ref,t.date||t.timestamp?.slice(0,10),t.type,t.description||'',t.amount,t.balance||0,t.operator||'',t.branch||''],r%2===0?XLFill.ltgray:undefined); r++; });
  xlSetWidths(ws,[16,12,10,28,16,16,16,18]);
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb,ws,'Operating Fund');
  downloadWorkbook(wb,'atlas-operating-fund.xlsx');
  showToast('success','Export Complete','Operating fund exported as XLSX.');
}

function exportTrialBalanceXLSX() {
  const glBal = getGLBalances();
  const coa = DB.chartOfAccounts;
  const b = DB.bankBranding||{};
  const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
  const ws = xlMakeSheet(coa.length+10,9);
  let r=0;
  xlNavyTitle(ws,r,9,(b.bankName||'Atlas Bank').toUpperCase()+' — TRIAL BALANCE'); r+=2;
  // ★ FIX: Compute actual debit/credit totals from GL journal entries, not hardcoded zeros
  const branchGlAll = filterByUserBranch(DB.generalLedger || []);
  const totalDR = coa.reduce((s,a)=>s+(glBal[a.code]||0),0);
  r = xlDualInfoGrid(ws,r,0,1,4,5,[['Total Balance',fcfa(totalDR)],['Accounts',coa.length]],[['Generated',new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB')],['Operator',STATE.currentUser?.fullName||'System']]); r+=3;
  xlTableHeader(ws,r,['GL Code','Account Name','Type','Category','Net Balance','Total Debit','Total Credit','Entries','Status']); r++;
  coa.forEach(a=>{
    const bal = glBal[a.code]||0;
    // ★ FIX: Pull actual debit/credit/entry-count from branch-filtered GL journal entries
    const codeEntries = branchGlAll.filter(e=>e.accountCode===a.code);
    const codeDebit = codeEntries.reduce((s,e)=>s+Number(e.debit||0),0);
    const codeCredit = codeEntries.reduce((s,e)=>s+Number(e.credit||0),0);
    const codeCount = codeEntries.length;
    xlDataRow(ws,r,[a.code,a.name,a.type,a.category||'',bal,codeDebit,codeCredit,codeCount,a.isActive!==false?'Active':'Inactive'],r%2===0?XLFill.ltgray:undefined);
    r++;
  });
  xlSetWidths(ws,[12,28,12,16,16,14,14,10,10]);
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb,ws,'Trial Balance');
  downloadWorkbook(wb,'atlas-trial-balance.xlsx');
  showToast('success','Export Complete','Trial balance exported as XLSX.');
}

</script>
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  try { if (typeof lucide !== 'undefined') lucide.createIcons(); } catch(e) {}
});
</script>
</body>
